ch: 哀丽秘榭
en: Aedes Elysiae

ch: 迷路迷境
en: Membrance Maze

ch: 迷路迷境下层
en: Membrance Maze Lower Floor

ch: 迷路迷境上层
en: Membrance Maze Upper Floor

ch: 既然这扇门背后就是翁法罗斯……※见证长夜月登上舞台
en: That's why I need to go through... Amphoreus or not ※ Witness Evernight take the stage

ch: 决定匹诺康尼之旅的下一站\n<color=#8790abff>※出发——「永恒之地」翁法罗斯！</color>
en: Decide upon the next stop at Penacony\n<color=#8790abff>※ To Amphoreus, The Eternal Land!</color>

ch: 这一次，你们的所作所为将令阿基维利感到骄傲\n<color=#8790abff>※在翁法罗斯插下第一支界域定锚</color>
en: This time, your deeds will make Akivili proud\n<color=#8790abff>※ Place your first Space Anchor in Amphoreus</color>

ch: 伴随战鼓，破碎的记忆再度浮现于世\n<color=#8790abff>※回到全盛时期的悬锋城</color>
en: Broken memories will resurface with the war drums\n<color=#8790abff>※ Return to Castrum Kremnos in the age of its prime</color>

ch: 回到翁法罗斯「开拓」的起点\n<color=#8790abff>※回到列车坠毁的地方看看</color>
en: Return to the place where you began "trailblazing" in Amphoreus\n<color=#8790abff>※ Return to where the Express car went down</color>

ch: 雄狮远离故土，抵达他流徙的终点\n<color=#8790abff>※见证悬锋继业者归乡的末路</color>
en: The lion has left his homeland and reached the end of his exile\n<color=#8790abff>※ Witness the end of the Kremnos heir's homecoming</color>

ch: 公民们将以投票的方式决定翁法罗斯的未来\n<color=#8790abff>※见证「公民大会」最后的结果</color>
en: The citizenry will vote to decide the future of Amphoreus\n<color=#8790abff>※ Witness the final result of the citizens' assembly</color>

ch: 英雄啊，回返那安宁的家乡\n<color=#8790abff>※在哀丽秘榭见到已故之人</color>
en: Hero, Return to That Peace of Home\n<color=#8790abff>※ Encounter the deceased at Aedes Elysiae</color>

ch: 英雄啊，粉碎那悲哀的造像\n<color=#8790abff>※斩下盗火行者的面具</color>
en: Hero, Shatter That Woeful Effigy\n<color=#8790abff>※ Tear off the Flame Reaver's mask</color>

ch: 既然这扇门背后就是翁法罗斯……\n<color=#8790abff>※见证长夜月登上舞台</color>
en: That's why I need to go through... Amphoreus or not\n<color=#8790abff>※ Witness Evernight take the stage</color>

ch: 故事之外，有谁还在？\n<color=#8790abff>※告别翁法罗斯，窥见下一站的线索</color>
en: Who else remains beyond the story?\n<color=#8790abff>※ Bid farewell to Amphoreus and glimpse the clues to the next destination</color>

ch: 群星将看见翁法罗斯的答案\n<color=#8790abff>※「你好，世界」</color>
en: The stars shall witness Amphoreus's answer\n<color=#8790abff>※ "Hello, World"</color>

en: Open Treasures <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s) in Amphoreus

ch: 蝴蝶们要去向何方？\n<color=#8790abff>※解开「永恒圣城」奥赫玛的预言谜题</color>
en: Whereto shall the butterflies go?\n<color=#8790abff>※ Solve the prophetic riddle in "Eternal Holy City" Okhema</color>

ch: 战士总是在奔跑吗？\n<color=#8790abff>※解开「纷争荒墟」悬锋城的预言谜题</color>
en: Is the warrior always running?\n<color=#8790abff>※ Solve the prophetic riddle in "Strife Ruins" Castrum Kremnos</color>

ch: 阳光能普照所有角落吗？\n<color=#8790abff>※解开「浴血战端」悬锋城的预言谜题</color>
en: Can sunlight shine down on all corners?\n<color=#8790abff>※ Solve the prophetic riddle in "Bloodbathed Battlefront" Castrum Kremnos</color>

ch: 使用「预言算碑」让悬锋城铁链上的「落雷」消散
en: Use the Prophecy Tablet to scatter the thunderbolts afflicting the iron chains of Castrum Kremnos

ch: 将「纷争荒墟」悬锋城的所有战魂塑像全部回溯
en: Rewind all the Warsoul Statues in the "Strife Ruins" of Castrum Kremnos

ch: 将奥赫玛城内的所有雕塑全部打坏
en: Destroy all statues within Okhema city

ch: 将奥赫玛城内所有残留有记忆的物件全部回溯完好
en: Rewind all memory-laden objects in Okhema city

ch: 通过悬锋城的浮空锁链
en: Pass through the suspended chains of Castrum Kremnos

ch: 在「浴血战端」悬锋城击碎超速运行的飞天坛递
en: Smash the speeding Flying Amphora in the "Bloodbathed Battlefront" Castrum Kremnos

ch: 别以为躲到树上就安全了……\n<color=#8790abff>※使用扎格列斯之手的冲拳动作，击败神悟树庭某棵树木上的敌人</color>
en: Don't think you're safe just because you're hiding up a tree...\n<color=#8790abff>※ Use the Hand of Zagreus's Punch Action to defeat the enemy on a certain tree in the Grove of Epiphany</color>

ch: 几人的塑像丢失了面庞？\n<color=#8790abff>※解开「呓语密林」神悟树庭的预言谜题</color>
en: How many statues have lost their faces?\n<color=#8790abff>※ Solve the prophetic riddle in "Murmuring Woods" Grove of Epiphany</color>

ch: 神明需要跪拜吗？\n<color=#8790abff>※解开「黎明云崖」奥赫玛的预言谜题</color>
en: Do gods need to be worshiped?\n<color=#8790abff>※ Solve the prophetic riddle in "Dawncloud" Okhema</color>

ch: 捷足能否逃离厄运？\n<color=#8790abff>※解开「沉沦暮城」奥赫玛的预言谜题</color>
en: Can the fleet-footed outrun their fate?\n<color=#8790abff>※ Solve the prophetic riddle in "Fallen Twilight City" Okhema</color>

ch: 风铃诉说着怎样的旋律？\n<color=#8790abff>※解开哀丽秘榭的预言谜题</color>
en: What manner of melody does the wind chime sing?\n<color=#8790abff>※ Solve the puzzle behind Aedes Elysiae's prophecy</color>

ch: 如何供奉无限？\n<color=#8790abff>※解开「辉痕圣林」神悟树庭的预言谜题</color>
en: How to offer Infinity?\n<color=#8790abff>※ Solve the prophecy puzzle in "Radiant Scarwood" Grove of Epiphany</color>

ch: 见证奥赫玛的社会难题\n<color=#8790abff>※我们该去往何方？面对这一永恒之问，你选择以仁慈作答</color>

ch: 见证奥赫玛的社会难题\n<color=#8790abff>※我们该去往何方？面对这一永恒之问，你选择以沉默作答</color>
en: Witness the societal conundrum of Okhema\n<color=#8790abff>※ Whereto shall we go? Faced with this eternal question, you chose silence as your answer</color>

en: Reignite all extinguished Living Flames of Georios in "Fallen Twilight City" Okhema and "Lightless Chapel" Dawncloud

en: Repair all damaged Verax Leos in the "Fallen Twilight City" Okhema and the "Lightless Chapel" Dawncloud

en: Witness the fate of an Okhema resident and record their story

en: Experience a good time with Cyrene in Aedes Elysiae

en: Ride the dromas at Aedes Elysiae

en: Find a companion for Aedes Elysiae's baby seal

en: Grieve for a burned heart in "Radiant Scarwood" Grove of Epiphany

ch: 在「辉痕圣林」神悟树庭，长久凝视那无言的空洞
en: Stare long and hard into the wordless void in "Radiant Scarwood" Grove of Epiphany

ch: 在「辉痕圣林」神悟树庭，去往封印地室更深处，见证矩阵光点的变化
en: Venture further into the Sealed Chamber in "Radiant Scarwood" Grove of Epiphany to observe the shifting matrix lights

ch: 善意如同火炬，传递下去才烧得更旺\n<color=#8790abff>※与翁法罗斯告别后，重回雅利洛-Ⅵ行政区</color>
en: Kindness is like a torch. It burns brighter when shared\n<color=#8790abff>※ After bidding farewell to Amphoreus, return to the Jarilo-VI Administrative District</color>

ch: 英雄一词，在民众心中本就有分量\n<color=#8790abff>※与翁法罗斯告别后，重回仙舟「罗浮」星槎海中枢</color>
en: The word "hero" has always held meaning in people's hearts\n<color=#8790abff>※ After bidding farewell to Amphoreus, return to Central Starskiff Haven of the Xianzhou Luofu</color>

ch: 逐火的征程，会是茶余饭后的谈资吗？\n<color=#8790abff>※与翁法罗斯告别后，重回匹诺康尼黄金的时刻</color>
en: Will the Flame-Chase Journey end up as mere dinner-table chatter?\n<color=#8790abff>※ After bidding farewell to Amphoreus, return to Penacony's Golden Hour</color>

ch: 「开拓」一向如此：做好准备，也心怀希望\n<color=#8790abff>※与翁法罗斯告别后，重回空间站「黑塔」主控舱段</color>
en: Trailblaze has always been like this: be ready, but keep hope alive\n<color=#8790abff>※ After bidding farewell to Amphoreus, return to the master control zone of the Herta Space Station</color>

ch: 与昔涟留在哀丽秘榭的记忆重逢。
en: Reunite with the memories Cyrene left in Aedes Elysiae

ch: 在「至黑之剑，盗火行者」施放【沉默的悲叹】期间，击败所有「残破容器」
en: Defeat all Long-Shattered Vessels during the Flame Reaver of the Deepest Dark's casting of "Silent Sorrow"

ch: 单场战斗中，我方角色万敌在#1次【血仇】状态下，施放#2次【弑王成王】或【弑神登神】
en: In a single battle, have ally character Mydei cast "Kingslayer Be King" or "Godslayer Be God" #2 time(s) in #1 instance(s) of "Vendetta"

en: Amphoreus' Saga of Heroes

en: Little Grove

en: To Amphoreus

en: Okhema Does Not Believe in Tears

en: Return to the place where you began "trailblazing" in Amphoreus

en: The citizenry will vote to decide the future of Amphoreus

en: That's why I need to go through... Amphoreus or not

ch: 群星将看见翁法罗斯的答案
en: The stars shall witness Amphoreus's answer

ch: 猜猜谁是奥赫玛最爱大地兽的人？
en: Guess who loves dromases the most in Okhema?

ch: 驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大健康长大了，它的德智体美劳全面发展，以至于成为了奥赫玛粉丝最多的大地兽……
en: Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas grew up strong and healthy, developing in all areas: morality, intellect, physique, aesthetics, and diligence. It became the dromas in Okhema with the most fans...

ch: 某日，奥赫玛的课堂上。
en: Just another day in an Okhema classroom...

ch: 错，错到离谱！那块石碑就立在树庭外面，你连照着背都不会吗？
en: Wrong! Spectacularly wrong! The tablet is right outside the Grove. Can't you just read off it?

ch: 呜，呜嗡？（还有，为什么翁法罗斯的烈阳会「升起」？艾格勒不是用开闭眼睛控制昼夜的吗？）
en: Grumph, grumph? (And if Aquila controls day and night by blinking, why does the blazing sun still rise in Amphoreus?)

ch: 老实说，每头大地兽看起来都完全一样——多数翁法罗斯人都这么认为。
en: If you asked most Amphoreans, they'd tell you every dromas looks identical to the next.

ch: 奇美拉是人类最好的朋友——奥赫玛公民们普遍同意这点，却不会联想到同样亲近的大地兽。\n你害怕这个事实会伤害驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大的感情，没想到它听说以后非常淡定。
en: Chimeras are widely considered humanity's best friends among Okhema's citizens, yet few extend this sentiment to the equally friendly dromas.\nYou were worried this fact might hurt Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas's feelings, only to be surprised by how unbothered it seemed.

ch: 次日的奥赫玛石板头条：一大地兽从近郊挖掘出千年文物，已受表彰。老巴特鲁斯用它的圆手入了个镜。
en: The headline on Okhema slates on the next day: "Dromas Unearths Thousand-Year-Old Artifact in Outskirts, Receives Official Commendation." Old Bartholos managed to grab a slice of fame in the process.

ch: 初步掌握欧洛尼斯祷言的驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大试图解决奥赫玛公民的烦恼。
en: After learning the fundamentals of Oronyx's Prayer, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas has taken to helping Okhema's citizens with their troubles.

ch: 初步掌握欧洛尼斯祷言的驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大试图解决奥赫玛公民的烦恼。
en: After learning the fundamentals of Oronyx's Prayer, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas has taken to helping Okhema's citizens with their troubles.

ch: 吃多了奥赫玛菜的你决定去城郊钓鱼，驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大自告奋勇地跟了过去。但一只大地兽能为钓鱼提供什么帮助呢？
en: After eating too much Okhema food, you decide to go fishing out near the city's edge. Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas eagerly volunteers to tag along. But what could a dromas even do when it comes to fishing?

ch: 我的故乡治安很差，就算迁来奥赫玛后，还是会担心入室抢劫。
en: My hometown wasn't a safe place. Even after moving to Okhema, I still worry about robbers breaking into my house.

ch: 初步掌握欧洛尼斯祷言的驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大试图解决奥赫玛公民的烦恼。
en: After learning the fundamentals of Oronyx's Prayer, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas has taken to helping Okhema's citizens with their troubles.

ch: 最近，为大地兽修蹄子的视频在万帷网上颇受欢迎，几乎每个奥赫玛公民都在刷。
en: Lately, dromas hoof-trimming videos have gone viral on the World Wound Web. Seems like every Okhema citizen is hooked.

ch: 嗡…呜嗡嗡……（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，今天在市集我瞥见了奥赫玛的房价。就算我驮一辈子货，也攒不起那么多利衡币……）
en: Grumph... Grumphhhh... ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}, I caught a glimpse of housing prices in Okhema at the market today. Even if I haul cargo my entire life, I'll never save up that many Balance Coins...)

ch: 想到旅团生涯难免遭遇黑潮袭击，驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大托你找到万敌，希望学上几招以备不时之需。
en: Knowing that black tide attacks are bound to happen in their troupe life, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas asked you to seek out Mydei, hoping to pick up a few tricks just in case.

ch: 不久后，奥赫玛出版了一套文集，题名为「万帷网上，没人知道你只是一头大地兽」。
en: Not long after, Okhema published a collection of essays titled "On the World Wound Web, Nobody Knows You're Just a Dromas."

ch: 不久后，驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大发的红土照片，荣登奥赫玛「最具地区特色菜肴」评选榜首。
en: Shortly after, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas's redsoil photo topped Okhema's "Most Regionally Iconic Cuisine" rankings.

ch: 万敌
en: Mydei

ch: 万敌
en: Mydei

ch: 翁法罗斯的列车难题
en: The Amphorean Trolley Problem

ch: 近日奥赫玛市集上假货古玩猖獗，古玩店老板急需一名学徒，协助他进行鉴定……
en: Recently, the Okhema Market has been flooded with fake antiques. The antique shop owner desperately needs an apprentice to help authenticate items...

ch: 热闹的奥赫玛市集出现了一名走失的孩子，她左右张望，似乎在寻找着什么……
en: A lost child has appeared in the bustling market of Okhema. She glances around, seemingly trying to find something...

ch: 生命花园培育出的奇美拉，竟然是奥赫玛居民的好帮手？成为这群小家伙的管理员，为有需要的人们解决更多困难吧！
en: Chimeras bred in the Garden of Life are actually fantastic helpers for the people in Okhema? Step up as their caretaker and tackle the challenges that come your way to assist those in need!

ch: 生命花园培育出的奇美拉，竟然是奥赫玛居民的好帮手？成为这群小家伙的管理员，为有需要的人们解决更多困难吧！
en: Chimeras bred in the Garden of Life are actually fantastic helpers for the people in Okhema? Step up as their caretaker and tackle the challenges that come your way to assist those in need!

ch: 光历 █ █ █ █年，一名狂妄的盗贼流窜翁法罗斯各处。今日，天神也生出了凡人的烦恼……
en: In Light Calendar Year ████, a brazen bandit roamed everywhere in Amphoreus. That was the day even gods felt the worries of mortals...

ch: 光历 █ █ █ █年，又一处家园在悬锋军的铁蹄下化为废墟。落难的人们向着最后的希望「奥赫玛」艰难行进，却被不舍的追兵逼入邪物四伏的「雅努萨波利斯」……
en: In Light Calendar Year ████, yet another home turned into ruins under the iron hooves of the Kremnoan army. The displaced people struggled towards Okhema, their last hope, but were pushed by the incessant pursuers into Janusopolis, where abominations lurked in every corner...

ch: 光历 █ █ █ █年，一名狂妄的盗贼流窜翁法罗斯各处。今日，天神也生出了凡人的烦恼……
en: In Light Calendar Year ████, a brazen bandit roamed everywhere in Amphoreus. That was the day even gods felt the worries of mortals...

ch: 光历 █ █ █ █年，又一处家园在悬锋军的铁蹄下化为废墟。落难的人们向着最后的希望「奥赫玛」艰难行进，却被不舍的追兵逼入邪物四伏的「雅努萨波利斯」……
en: In Light Calendar Year ████, yet another home turned into ruins under the iron hooves of the Kremnoan army. The displaced people struggled towards Okhema, their last hope, but were pushed by the incessant pursuers into Janusopolis, where abominations lurked in every corner...

ch: 圣树木物件极其稀有，仅有一处来源：相传圣树初长成时，瑟希斯曾允诺取其枝干搭建树庭某处圣所，而后木材被扎格列斯盗走，流落于各个城邦。
en: Artifacts made from the Sacred Tree wood are incredibly rare, with a single origin: It's said that when the Sacred Tree was first grown, Cerces promised its wood for a Grove sanctuary, but Zagreus stole the materials, spreading them across different city-states.

ch: 翁法罗斯
en: Amphoreus

ch: 万敌
en: Mydei

ch: 【血仇】状态期间，万敌造成的伤害无视敌方目标<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>的防御力，且接受治疗后会将<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>的治疗数值转化为充能，累计转化的充能不超过<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>点。任意单位行动后重置可累计的充能。
en: During "Vendetta," the DMG dealt by Mydei ignores <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of enemy targets' DEF. After he receives healing, converts <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of the healed amount to Charge. The tally of the converted Charge cannot exceed <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> point(s). Resets this tally of Charge after any unit takes action.

ch: 对指定敌方单体造成等同于万敌<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>生命上限的虚数属性伤害。
en: Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mydei's Max HP to one designated enemy.

ch: 消耗等同于万敌当前生命值<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>的生命值，对指定敌方单体造成等同于万敌<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>生命上限的虚数属性伤害，同时对其相邻目标造成等同于万敌<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>生命上限的虚数属性伤害。\n若当前生命值不足，施放战技时万敌的当前生命值降低至1点。
en: Consumes HP by an amount equal to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of Mydei's current HP. Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mydei's Max HP to one designated enemy and Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mydei's Max HP to adjacent targets.\nIf the current HP is not sufficient, using Skill reduces Mydei's current HP to 1.

ch: 回复等同于万敌<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color>生命上限的生命值并积攒<unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak>点天赋充能。对指定敌方单体造成等同于万敌<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>生命上限的虚数属性伤害，同时对其相邻目标造成等同于万敌<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>生命上限的虚数属性伤害，并使目标与相邻目标陷入嘲讽状态，持续<unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>回合。下一次【弑神登神】优先攻击指定敌方单体，该效果仅对最新目标生效。
en: Restores HP by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Mydei's Max HP and accumulates <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> Talent's Charge point(s). Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mydei's Max HP to one designated enemy, and deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mydei's Max HP to adjacent targets. Additionally, Taunts the target and targets adjacent to it, lasting for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s). The next use of "Godslayer Be God" prioritizes attacking one designated enemy, and this effect only works on the latest target.

ch: 使用秘技后牵引一定区域内的敌人并使其陷入<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>秒的晕眩状态，晕眩状态下敌人不会主动攻击我方目标。\n若主动攻击陷入晕眩状态的敌人，进入战斗时，对敌方全体造成等同于万敌<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>生命上限的虚数属性伤害，并使目标陷入嘲讽状态，持续<unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>回合。自身积攒<unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak>点天赋充能。
en: After using Technique, pulls in enemies within a certain area and inflicts Daze on them for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> second(s). Dazed enemies will not actively attack ally targets.\nIf actively attacking Dazed enemies, when entering battle, deals Imaginary DMG equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Mydei's Max HP to all enemies, and Taunts the targets, lasting for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s). This unit accumulates <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> point(s) of Talent's Charge.

ch: 消耗等同于万敌当前生命值<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>的生命值，对敌方单体造成等同于万敌<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>生命上限的虚数属性伤害，同时对其相邻目标造成等同于万敌<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>生命上限的虚数属性伤害。\n若当前生命值不足，施放战技时万敌的当前生命值降低至1点。\n该技能会自动施放。
en: Consumes HP by an amount equal to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of Mydei's current HP. Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mydei's Max HP to one enemy and Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mydei's Max HP to adjacent targets.\nIf the current HP is not sufficient, using Skill reduces Mydei's current HP to 1.\nThis ability will be automatically used.

ch: 消耗<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>点充能，对敌方单体造成等同于万敌<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>生命上限的虚数属性伤害，同时对其相邻目标造成等同于万敌<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>生命上限的虚数属性伤害。\n该技能会自动施放。此技能期间无法积攒充能。
en: Consumes <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> point(s) of Charge. Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mydei's Max HP to one enemy and Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mydei's Max HP to adjacent targets.\nThis ability will be automatically used. While this ability is in use, Charge cannot be accumulated.

ch: 消耗<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>点充能，对敌方单体造成等同于万敌<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>生命上限的虚数属性伤害，同时对其相邻目标造成等同于万敌<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>生命上限的虚数属性伤害，并使生命上限永久提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>点，每场战斗最多提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color>次。\n该技能会自动施放。此技能期间无法积攒充能。

Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mydei's Max HP to one enemy and Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mydei's Max HP to adjacent targets.\nIf the current HP is not sufficient, using Skill reduces Mydei's current HP to 1.\nThis ability will be automatically used.

ch: 消耗等同于万敌当前生命值<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>的生命值，对敌方单体造成等同于万敌<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>生命上限的虚数属性伤害，同时对其相邻目标造成等同于万敌<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>生命上限的虚数属性伤害。\n若当前生命值不足，施放战技时万敌的当前生命值降低至1点。\n该技能会自动施放。
en: Consumes HP by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mydei's current HP. Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mydei's Max HP to one enemy and Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mydei's Max HP to adjacent targets.\nIf the current HP is not sufficient, using Skill reduces Mydei's current HP to 1.\nThis ability will be automatically used.

ch: 消耗<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>点充能，对敌方单体造成等同于万敌<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>生命上限的虚数属性伤害，同时对其相邻目标造成等同于万敌<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>生命上限的虚数属性伤害，并使生命上限永久提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>点，每场战斗最多提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color>次，且回复等同于生命上限<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>的生命值。\n该技能会自动施放。此技能期间无法积攒充能。
en: Consumes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> point(s) of Charge. Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mydei's Max HP to one enemy and Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mydei's Max HP to adjacent targets, permanently increases Max HP by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> point(s), up to a max increase of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color> in each battle. Furthermore, restores HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of Max HP.\nThis ability will be automatically used. While this ability is in use, Charge cannot be accumulated.

ch: 消耗<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>点充能，对敌方单体造成等同于万敌<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>生命上限的虚数属性伤害，同时对其相邻目标造成等同于万敌<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>生命上限的虚数属性伤害，并使生命上限永久提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>点，每场战斗最多提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color>次，且回复等同于生命上限<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>的生命值。\n该技能会自动施放。此技能期间无法积攒充能。
en: Consumes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> point(s) of Charge. Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mydei's Max HP to one enemy and Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mydei's Max HP to adjacent targets, permanently increases Max HP by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> point(s), up to a max increase of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color> in each battle. Furthermore, restores HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of Max HP.\nThis ability will be automatically used. While this ability is in use, Charge cannot be accumulated.

Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mydei's Max HP to one enemy and Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mydei's Max HP to adjacent targets, permanently increases Max HP by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> point(s), up to a max increase of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color> in each battle. Furthermore, restores HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of Max HP.\nThis ability will be automatically used. While this ability is in use, Charge cannot be accumulated.

en: Consumes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> point(s) of Charge. Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mydei's Max HP to one enemy and Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mydei's Max HP to adjacent targets, permanently increases Max HP by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> point(s), up to a max increase of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color> in each battle. Furthermore, restores HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of Max HP.\nThis ability will be automatically used. While this ability is in use, Charge cannot be accumulated.

ch: 对敌方单体造成大量冰属性伤害，并大幅降低【翁法罗斯的「恨」】！
en: Deal massive Ice DMG to one enemy and greatly reduce "Amphorean Hatred"!

ch: 对敌方全体造成大量真实伤害，并大幅降低【翁法罗斯的「恨」】！
en: Deals massive True DMG to all enemies and greatly reduces "Amphorean Hatred"!

ch: 万敌
en: Mydei

ch: 万敌
en: Mydei

ch: 万敌
en: Mydei

ch: 万敌
en: Mydei

ch: 我方目标施放终结技可恢复1点能量，对敌方单体造成大量冰属性伤害，并大幅降低【翁法罗斯的「恨」】！
en: Ally targets using Ultimate can regenerate 1 Energy, deal massive Ice DMG to one enemy, and greatly reduce "Amphorean Hatred"!

ch: 我方目标施放终结技可恢复1点能量，对敌方全体造成大量真实伤害，并大幅降低【翁法罗斯的「恨」】！
en: Ally targets using Ultimate can regenerate 1 Energy, deal massive True DMG to all enemies, and greatly reduce "Amphorean Hatred"!

ch: 使用群体攻击技能尽快消灭【残破容器】来削弱【至黑之剑，盗火行者】的攻击
en: Use AoE attacks to defeat "Long-Shattered Vessel" as soon as possible to weaken attacks from "Flame Reaver of the Deepest Dark"

ch: 施放终结技可为【英雄，如群星永燃】充能，效果为对敌方单体造成大量伤害，并大幅<color=#f29e38ff>降低【翁法罗斯的「恨」】</color>！
en: Use Ultimate to charge "Heroes, Ever Ablaze," which deals massive DMG to one enemy target and greatly <color=#f29e38ff>reduces "Amphorean Hatred"</color>!

ch: 【翁法罗斯的「恨」】提高时会降低我方目标可回复的生命上限和可回复的战技点上限，当【恨】达到上限时<color=#f29e38ff>战斗失败</color>！
en: When "Amphorean Hatred" increases, it reduces ally target's Maximum Restorable HP and Maximum Recoverable Skill Points. When "Hatred" reaches its maximum, <color=#f29e38ff>the combat ends in failure</color>!

ch: 【天谴之矛，迈德漠斯】吸收所有剩余的【征服或被征服】，并强化了【纷争之主】！
en: "Mydeimos, Lance of Fury" absorbed all remaining "Conquer or Be Conquered" and enhanced "Lord of Strife"!

ch: 角色的魂灵被【天谴之矛，迈德漠斯】抽取！
en: The character's soul has been extracted by "Mydeimos, Lance of Fury"!

ch: 翁法罗斯的「恨」
en: Amphorean Hatred

ch: 由奥赫玛知名美食家亲自整理的烹饪书，每个泰坦的信徒都能在其中找到适合自己的食谱。
en: A cookbook personally curated by a renowned Okheman gourmand. Every Titans' disciple will be able to find a recipe to their liking in it.

ch: 原定在奥赫玛进行公演的戏剧剧本，讲述了弥卡斯王试图欺骗塞纳托斯，却被泰坦所惩罚的故事。
en: A theater script originally slated to be performed in Okhema. A story of how King Mikas sought to beguile Thanatos, only to be punished by the Titan.

ch: 翁法罗斯本地的独特历法，记载了存在已久的十二月份，以及人们于这些月份中从事的工作。是奥赫玛居民生产生活的重要指南。
en: The unique local calendar of Amphoreus, in which is recorded the long-existent twelve months and the work that people engage in during said months. An important directive on how Okhema's citizens live life.

ch: 关于利衡币——翁法罗斯本地货币的简要介绍，内含一则历史故事。
en: About Balance Coins — A brief introduction to Amphoreus' local currency, including a historical anecdote.

ch: 某位古代居民留下的刻字石板，记载了名为萨白尼的城邦融入奥赫玛前的最后时刻。
en: A slate left behind by some ancient resident, recording the final moments before the city-state of Sabany was assimilated into Okhema.

ch: 翁法罗斯的沿海百邦无奇不有——其中也包括一些与奥赫玛截然相反、不那么崇敬泰坦的异端文化。
en: The Seaside States of Amphoreus have just about everything, including exotic cultures that, unlike Okhema, do not worship the Titans very much.

ch: 看样子是古代悬锋城的军事教材。封面上有一行小字：「战争是荣誉、是艺术，也是科学。」
en: Looks like a military education textbook from ancient Castrum Kremnos. "War is an honor, an art, and a science" is written in small print on the front cover.

ch: 在悬锋城某个角落发现的、一封再无法寄出的绝笔信。
en: Found in a corner of Castrum Kremnos, this is a letter penned before someone's demise and could no longer be sent.

ch: 以悬锋古语写就的石板，根本看不懂。或许可以找懂悬锋古语的人帮忙翻译翻译。
en: A stone tablet covered in text written in the ancient Kremnos language. Maybe you can find someone who understands that language to help you translate it.

ch: 悬锋城郊发现的破碎记叙，一位悬锋战士英勇奋战的终末。
en: A fragmented narrative discovered on the outskirts of Castrum Kremnos. It tells of how a heroic Kremnos Warrior met their end in battle.

ch: 似乎是神悟树庭的曳石学派为本派新人制定的一份健身指南。
en: It seems to be a fitness guide created for newbie Helkolithists by the Grove of Epiphany.

ch: 某位智种学派学者的著作，打破了树庭对瑟希斯泰坦的旧有认知。
en: The work of a Nousporist scholar that revolutionized the way the people of the Grove thought of the Titan, Cerces.

ch: 奥赫玛的好事者撰写的调查报告，里面记载了各个奇美拉小队的管理员情报，但其真实性仍旧存疑。
en: A research report compiled by an Okheman busybody. It records information on the chimera squad administrators, but its legitimacy is questionable.

ch: 神悟树庭学派共通教育读本的其中一页，多年来一直作为「要求全文背诵」的重要考点折磨着世代学者。
en: A page from a book used in the Grove of Epiphany's general education courses. It has been torturing generations of scholars for many years as an important test point that "requires memorization of the entire text."

ch: 神悟树庭的绳结学派在不久前制定的新招生简章。看得出，绳结学派认为这些要求非常基本且简单。
en: An enrollment brochure designed recently by the School of Nodism under the Grove of Epiphany. It is clear to see that the school believes these requirements to be extremely simple and easy.

ch: 由学者克瑞斯汇集而成的树庭巨变之时的真实故事集，因在编修时数次嚎哭致使工作难以为继而得名。
en: A collection of true stories compiled by a scholar named Kyros from a time of great change in the Grove. They received their name from the constant tears that Kyros shed during compilation which made continuing their work extremely challenging.

ch: 神悟树庭与奥赫玛的定期通讯信件，因灾害而未能即时送出。
en: A regular correspondence between the Grove of Epiphany and Okhema that was never delivered due to disasters.

ch: 一册对树庭植物的介绍手册，不知为何却是以旅游指南的格式写下的。
en: A guidebook to the Grove's plants, curiously written in the style of a tourist guide.

ch: 敬拜学派学者著作节选，本书试图从神话学角度讨论翁法罗斯不同地域泰坦敬拜仪式的异同。
en: An excerpt from a Venerationist's work discussing the similarities and differences in Titan worship rituals across different regions of Amphoreus.

ch: 记载着奥赫玛公民大会制度的演变历程与运行机制的研究报告，对理解奥赫玛的政治体系具有重要参考价值。
en: A comprehensive study on the evolution and mechanisms of Okhema's citizens' assembly, offering crucial insights into the city-state's political system.

ch: 某位已叛逃的祭司的随身手札，原件下落不明，此为树庭抄本的复制品。
en: A personal journal belonging to a defected priest. The original document remains lost. This is a duplicate of the transcript preserved in the Grove.

ch: 在树庭的友爱之馆中发现的一册闲书，分类上算是…青春文学？
en: A leisure read discovered in the Library of Philia in the Grove. In terms of classification, it would be considered... young adult romance?

ch: 在树庭的友爱之馆中发现的一册闲书，分类为幻想小说。
en: A leisure read discovered in the Library of Philia in the Grove, classified in the fantasy fiction genre.

ch: 在树庭的友爱之馆中发现的一册闲书，分类为「历史言情」。
en: A leisure read discovered in the Library of Philia in the Grove, classified in the historical romance genre.

ch: 在迷路迷境的邮箱中发现的信，收件人一栏写着你的名字。寄托了妖精们满满的祝福。
en: A letter found in the mailbox of the Membrance Maze, addressed to you, carrying the fairies' heartfelt blessings.

ch: 万敌战友托勒密暮年所著，讲述千余年前吉奥刻勒斯组建大地兽龙骑军、煊赫翁法罗斯，最终又因背叛而溃亡的故事。
en: Written during Ptolemy's twilight years, who is a comrade of Mydei, this account details how Geocles created the Dromas Legion over a thousand years ago. It follows their meteoric rise in Amphoreus and the treachery that ultimately sealed their fate.

ch: 不知道来源的奥赫玛地摊读物，实际写作者——是粉霞天女本人？真的不是幽灵吗？
en: A mysterious street vendor's book from Okhema... Could the actual author be the Rosy Celestial Maiden herself? Is she really not a ghost?

ch: 翁法罗斯的历法
en: Amphoreus' Calendar

ch: 悬锋城的古语石板
en: Castrum Kremnos' Archaic Language Slate

ch: 悬锋诸王通鉴
en: Kings of Kremnos

ch: 未寄出的树庭定期报告
en: Undelivered Grove Report

ch: 树庭植物的导引石版摘
en: A Slate Guide to Grove Flora

ch: 哀丽秘榭农事历
en: Aedes Elysiae Farmer's Almanac

ch: 翁法罗斯
en: Amphoreus

ch: 悬锋城，迎来新的神了。
en: A new god has come to Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 和祭司们一样，我伪造了神谕。在黑暗中，我用儿时的记忆，勉强拼凑出奥赫玛的方向。
en: Like the priests, I forged an oracle. In the darkness, I clung to my childhood memories, barely piecing together the path that would lead to Okhema.

ch: 我们将越过众神的残骸，在凡人中流离。如此，拨开翁法罗斯漆黑的迷雾。
en: We will step over the gods' corpses and wander among humanity. And thus, we shall sweep apart Amphoreus' pitch-dark fog.

ch: 这关乎翁法罗斯的本质：一个有关「生命第一因」的故事。
en: This is about the nature of Amphoreus itself: a story of "the prime mover of life."

ch: 超乎翁法罗斯的轮回。
en: Supersedes Amphoreus's cycles.

ch: 翁法罗斯的见证者
en: Witness to Amphoreus.

ch: 「『天谴之矛』迈德漠斯」
en: "Mydeimos the 'Lance of Fury.'"

ch: 「用悬锋的英魂贯穿敌王」
en: "Pierce the enemy's king with Kremnos' heroic souls."

ch: 翁法罗斯。
en: Amphoreus.

ch: 我用它们讲述翁法罗斯的故事
en: I've used them to tell the stories of Amphoreus.

ch: 我用它们讲述翁法罗斯的故事
en: I've used them to tell the stories of Amphoreus.

ch: 黄金裔的领袖阿格莱雅向你们表达了善意，但同时提出了一个奇怪的请求：切勿向奥赫玛居民提及天外之界。奥赫玛是一座繁华祥和的城邦，你们在城中闲逛时，三月七的照片意外流出，被冠以「粉霞天女」之名在城中传得沸沸扬扬，还差点闹出人命。不得已之下，你们暴露了自己天外来客的身份。
en: The leader of the Chrysos Heirs, Aglaea, offers you her goodwill but also puts forth a strange request. She asks that you not mention the world beyond the sky to the people of Okhema. Okhema is a prosperous city-state, and while you're wandering its streets, a picture of March 7th's is accidentally leaked, causing the city to come abuzz with chatter about the so-called "Rosy Celestial Maiden," with the excitement almost causing fatalities. Without another choice, you are forced to reveal your identity as a visitor beyond this world.

ch: 泄密一事没能瞒过阿格莱雅。她冷酷地以极端手段逼供、确认你们的来意。历此险境，你们对翁法罗斯的印象大打折扣，但在白厄的诚恳请求下，你们进入创世涡心了解了黄金裔的救世苦旅，并最终决定留在翁法罗斯，帮助黄金裔们讨伐尼卡多利、夺取火种。
en: This leak does not go unnoticed by Aglaea. Through vicious means, she compels you to confess and confirm your intentions. After experiencing this, your impression of Amphoreus suffers a major hit, but at Phainon's earnest request, you enter the Vortex of Genesis to learn about the arduous journey for salvation conducted by the Chrysos Heirs. Thus, you ultimately decide to stay in Amphoreus and aid the Chrysos Heirs to confront Nikador and seize the Coreflames.

ch: 自重渊归来，你们再次兵分两路。丹恒与白厄前去援助死战多时的万敌，而你则利用欧洛尼斯赋予的力量，收集记忆碎片、打开悬锋城的往世之门，与遐蝶一同设法破解尼卡多利的不死神躯。
en: After returning from the Abyss, you split into two teams once again. Phainon and Dan Heng head to assist the battle-worn Mydei, while you plan to harness Oronyx's power to gather the memory fragments. Once this is done, the goal is to open a way into Castrum Kremnos' past, where everyone would join forces with Castorice to destroy Nikador's undying body.

ch: 得知奥赫玛可能遭到尼卡多利渗透，阿格莱雅亲自巡查，金线交织之下污浊无处遁形。只是元老院对她的态度并不友好，恐怕奥赫玛和平的表象下亦有暗潮涌动。
en: Aglaea begins a personal investigation after discovering that Okhema might have been infiltrated by Nikador. Beneath the woven golden threads, that which is filth has nowhere to hide. However, the Council of Elders responds to her with an unfriendly attitude, hinting at dark currents running beneath Okhema's peaceful surface.

ch: 尼卡多利一战，以一众黄金裔取胜告终。你们返回奥赫玛，见证尼卡多利火种的归还。白厄踏入了火种试炼——他需向尼卡多利的神性证明，自己能够击溃内心深处的恐惧。
en: The battle against Nikador ends with victory for the Chrysos Heirs. Upon returning to Okhema, you witness Nikador's Coreflame returned. Phainon then enters the Coreflame trial, seeking to prove to Nikador's divinity that he can defeat his innermost fears.

ch: 距离白厄进入创世涡心挑战「纷争」试炼已过去很长时间，在等待中试炼突生变故。情急之下，你们介入试炼，将为心魔所困的白厄救出。白厄的火种试炼失败，意味着承载尼卡多利神权的重任落到了唯一的悬锋王储——黄金裔万敌的身上。但纵然身为「纷争」的正统继承人，万敌却对接过神权表现出了怪异的犹疑与抗拒，似乎悬锋的荣耀反而成为了他的心魔。
en: It's been a long while since Phainon had entered the Vortex of Genesis to challenge the Strife trial. With a sudden incident in the trial, you intervened, saving Phainon from his inner demon. With Phainon's Coreflame trial ending in failure, the responsibility of bearing Nikador's divinity now falls to Chrysos Heir Mydei, the lone crown prince of the Kremnos. Yet even as the true heir to "Strife," Mydei seems to exhibit an odd trepidation and resistance, as if the glory of Kremnos had become his inner demon.

ch: 万敌找到悬锋老将克拉特鲁斯，想与他商谈悬锋城的未来一事。克拉特鲁斯却态度强硬，言语中毫不掩饰对万敌接下神权、称王并还乡的渴盼。
en: Mydei found the Kremnoan veteran, Krateros, to discuss the future of Castrum Kremnos. However, Krateros remained resolute, openly expressing his desire for Mydei to take up divine authority, claim kingship, and return home.

ch: 黑潮倾覆树庭后，丹恒在风堇的帮助下重返树庭抢救有关「天空」泰坦的资料。在整理资料的过程中，无意间发现了与那刻夏相关的研究——随着两人进一步搜寻，从不同文本中推理出那刻夏的真实目的为「将自身与泰坦的火种熔合」。
en: After the black tide devastated the Grove, Dan Heng returned with Hyacine's help to salvage data on Sky Titan. During this search, the two stumbled upon records about Anaxa. As they dug deeper, they uncovered Anaxa's true goal: To fuse himself with the Titan's Coreflame.

ch: 阿格莱雅的死讯传来，你们带着惊愕赶回奥赫玛。无言的压抑弥漫在圣城中，你们走访各处，安慰着哀伤的同伴们。白厄思索着阿格莱雅的留言与嘱托，决意向众人诉说。他的讲演感染了奥赫玛的民众，支持逐火之旅的声音响彻了整个半神议会。
en: News of Aglaea's death has arrived. You return to Okhema in a stunned hurry. There, in that silent, depressed holy city, you travel about, comforting your sorrowful companions. Phainon contemplates on Aglaea's message and the task she entrusted him, and decides to impart them on the people. His speech ignites the hearts of Okhema's masses, and voices supporting the Flame-Chase Journey shakes the entirety of the Demigod Council.

ch: 赛飞儿将火种带至斯缇科西亚，并将前来抢夺的「清洗者」悉数击败。然而，随之现身的盗火行者却对她穷追不舍。她用计守护住了火种，自身却被盗火行者刺穿。回忆着千年前的往事，她呼唤着阿格莱雅的名字，在冥岸阖上了双眼。
en: Cipher delivers the Coreflame to Styxia, defeating all pursuing "Cleaners" — only to be relentlessly hunted by the Flame Reaver. She outwits them to protect the Coreflame but is fatally pierced by the Reaver. Recalling millennia-old memories, she whispers Aglaea's name and closes her eyes on the shores of the underworld.

ch: 一切真相水落石出，白厄与心中的英雄告别，接下三千万次轮回积累的火种，决意正面对抗自己的命运。而你肩负着翁法罗斯的黎明，步入了新的世界。
en: Every truth now stands revealed. Phainon bid farewell to the Hero Within and embraced the Coreflame accumulated through thirty million Cycles, determined to confront his fate. And you, carrying the promise of dawn for Amphoreus, stepped forward into a new world.

ch: 在哀丽秘榭，你与迷迷化作的昔涟相遇，思考未来打败铁墓的计划。在螺丝咕姆和黑塔的建议下，你们知晓需在新的轮回中取得「律法」的力量修改「负世」火种，逆转再创世。来古士将你邀入「神话之外」的智识领域，带来了最后的警告，但你决心与之对抗，改变翁法罗斯的命运。
en: In Aedes Elysiae, you encountered the Cyrene that Mem turned into and contemplated plans to defeat Irontomb. Following Screwllum and Herta's suggestions, you two learned that you must obtain the power of Law in the new cycle to modify the Worldbearing Coreflame and reverse the Era Nova. Lygus invited you into a realm of erudition named the Exomyth and brought a final warning. However, you are determined to stand against him and change Amphoreus's destiny.

ch: 你与昔涟回到了第一次逐火之旅的时代，遇见了 「律法」的黄金裔刻律德菈，以及「海洋」的黄金裔海瑟音。担任奥赫玛领导者的刻律德菈接纳了你们，并在同盟会议上宣颁了讨伐法吉娜的战令。同时，你们也在云石天宫与海瑟音相熟，知晓征战前还会举办一场盛大的宴会。但在宴会中，海瑟音向你们透露了刻律德菈背后的阴谋——来古士以铁墓的力量为筹码，拉拢刻律德菈与之合谋，海瑟音希望你们能够帮助她的王摆脱谗言。你们在宴会上窃听了来古士与刻律德菈的对谈，但被刻律德菈得知。在一番争辩后，刻律德菈以拘捕为由来保护你们，但来古士强行出手，再次将你放逐至「神话之外」。刻律德菈则召来二位天才，与来古士展开博弈。
en: You and Cyrene returned to the era of the first Flame-Chase Journey, where you encountered Cerydra, the Chrysos Heir of Law, and Hysilens, the Chrysos Heir of Ocean. As the leader of Okhema, Cerydra welcomed you both and declared a war decree against Phagousa during the alliance council. Meanwhile, you also became acquainted with Hysilens at the Marmoreal Palace, learning that a grand banquet would be held before the campaign. During the banquet, however, Hysilens revealed Cerydra's hidden scheme to you — Lygus had used the power of the Irontomb as leverage to tempt Cerydra into an alliance with him. Hysilens hoped you could help her sovereign escape these malicious whispers. You eavesdropped on the conversation between Lygus and Cerydra at the banquet but were discovered by Cerydra. After a heated debate, Cerydra attempted to protect you under the pretense of detention, but Lygus intervened forcefully, once again banishing you to the Exomyth. Cerydra then summoned two geniuses to engage in a battle of wits with Lygus.

ch: 「神话之外」已被改造为了你的囚笼，不过在黑塔的提示下，你通过「记忆」的力量唤来了外力协助，逃入命途空间。在这里，陌生的忆者试图蛊惑你，但却被与三月七相貌相同的来客驱逐。来客自称「长夜月」，她将已被改造的「负世」火种交出，并将你送回了奥赫玛，延续中断的救世之旅。
en: The Exomyth was already transformed into your prison, but with Herta's hint, you summoned external help through the power of Remembrance and escaped into the Path Space. There, a strange Memokeeper tried to bewitch you, but was driven away by a visitor who looked identical to March 7th. The visitor called herself Evernight, and she handed over the modified Worldbearing Coreflame, sending you back to Okhema to continue your interrupted journey of deliverance.

ch: 翁法罗斯中的时间已流逝了千年，奥赫玛成为了一片废墟。你沿着昔涟留下的记忆指引，见证了过去你所熟知的黄金裔们与来古士的争斗。他们纷纷牺牲在这漫长的博弈之中，并将拯救世界的使命传承给了你。最终，你接过了昔涟留下的仪式剑，在英雄们的祝福下沿着彩虹桥重返通往涡心道路的城邦——斯缇科西亚。
en: A millennium had passed in Amphoreus, and Okhema had fallen into ruins. Guided by the memories that Cyrene left behind, you witnessed the struggles between the Chrysos Heirs you once knew and Lygus. They sacrificed themselves in this arduous struggle, passing on their mission of saving the world to you. Finally, you took up Cyrene's ceremonial blade, and with the blessing of these heroes, you returned across the rainbow bridge to Styxia — the city-state that leads to the heart of the Vortex.

ch: 黑天鹅借助着星期日与「长夜月」的接触，深入命途的河流，见识到擅自闯入翁法罗斯的「忆者」的下场……
en: Through Sunday's encounter with Evernight, Black Swan traveled deep into the Path's streams and witnessed the end of the Memokeepers who recklessly entered Amphoreus...

ch: 面对铁墓的威胁，银河诸势力在列车的牵头下结为同盟。姬子、瓦尔特等人按计划进入翁法罗斯，目睹了你化身负世泰坦、驶过天穹的瞬间。
en: Facing the threat of Irontomb, cosmic forces allied under the leadership of the Astral Express. Himeko, Welt, and others entered Amphoreus according to plan, witnessing the moment you transformed into the Worldbearing Titan and traversed the sky dome.

ch: 名叫苏克提瑞斯的老者不忍受伤的外邦人得不到医治，以身试法为他们偷来了药物。他的行为也引出了一个无法忽视的问题：末日当前，奥赫玛该如何对待需要帮助的外邦人？\n最终，你给出了自己的答复，但这座永恒之城仍需思考要去向何方。
en: An elder named Soctires could not bear to see the wounded outlanders left untreated, so he risked his life to steal medicine for them. His actions led to an unavoidable question: In the face of the coming apocalypse, how should Okhema treat outlanders who need help?\nIn the end, you provided your answer, but this Eternal City still needs to reflect on which path it should take.

ch: 「罗浮杂俎」上无奇不有，比如能够「将活人从现世带走」的幽灵星槎。\n十妖在林，不如一妖在手。岁阳唯一该去的地方，就是绥园中的镇妖塔。
en: The Ghostly Grove offers a myriad of uncanny stories, including an enigmatic Phantom Starskiff that eradicates the existence of living beings.\nThe only good heliobus is a captured heliobus. The only place they should go is the Suppression Tower in Fyxestroll Garden.

ch: 「罗浮杂俎」上无奇不有，比如能够「夺人魂魄」的棋盘残局。\n十妖在林，不如一妖在手。岁阳唯一该去的地方，就是绥园中的镇妖塔。
en: The Ghostly Grove offers a myriad of uncanny stories, including rumors about a chessboard that possesses the power to absorb the souls of its victims.\nThe only good heliobus is a captured heliobus. The only place they should go is the Suppression Tower in Fyxestroll Garden.

ch: 「罗浮杂俎」上无奇不有，比如「早到晚归，勤勤恳恳」的青雀。\n十妖在林，不如一妖在手。岁阳唯一该去的地方，就是绥园中的镇妖塔。
en: The Ghostly Grove offers a myriad of uncanny stories, including rumors about the suddenly hardworking Qingque.\nThe only good heliobus is a captured heliobus. The only place they should go is the Suppression Tower in Fyxestroll Garden.

ch: 「罗浮杂俎」上无奇不有，比如「传出闹鬼怪谈」的凶宅。\n十妖在林，不如一妖在手。岁阳唯一该去的地方，就是绥园中的镇妖塔。
en: The Ghostly Grove offers a myriad of uncanny stories, including rumors about a haunted house and its eerie tales.\nThe only good heliobus is a captured heliobus. The only place they should go is the Suppression Tower in Fyxestroll Garden.

ch: 「罗浮杂俎」上无奇不有，比如「拍摄到不存在之物」的相机。\n十妖在林，不如一妖在手。岁阳唯一该去的地方，就是绥园中的镇妖塔。
en: The Ghostly Grove offers a myriad of uncanny stories, including rumors about a camera that captures things that do not exist.\nThe only good heliobus is a captured heliobus. The only place they should go is the Suppression Tower in Fyxestroll Garden.

ch: 受到十王司的召集，你们结成了「十王司下辖岁阳逃逸事件特别处理行动小组」。\n捉鬼小队需借助「罗浮杂俎」寻找逃逸岁阳的线索。
en: Summoned by the Ten-Lords Commission, you have established the "Ten-Lords Commission Special Operations Team for the Heliobi Containment Breach Incident."\nNow, you need to collect clues about the escaped heliobi from the Ghostly Grove.

ch: 受到十王司的召集，你们结成了「十王司下辖岁阳逃逸事件特别处理行动小组」。\n捉鬼小队需借助「罗浮杂俎」寻找逃逸岁阳的线索。
en: Summoned by the Ten-Lords Commission, you have established the "Ten-Lords Commission Special Operations Team for the Heliobi Containment Breach Incident."\nNow, you need to collect clues about the escaped heliobi from the Ghostly Grove.

ch: 受到十王司的召集，你们结成了「十王司下辖岁阳逃逸事件特别处理行动小组」。\n捉鬼小队需借助「罗浮杂俎」寻找逃逸岁阳的线索。
en: Summoned by the Ten-Lords Commission, you have established the "Ten-Lords Commission Special Operations Team for the Heliobi Containment Breach Incident."\nNow, you need to collect clues about the escaped heliobi from the Ghostly Grove.

ch: 受到十王司的召集，你们结成了「十王司下辖岁阳逃逸事件特别处理行动小组」。\n捉鬼小队需借助「罗浮杂俎」寻找逃逸岁阳的线索。
en: Summoned by the Ten-Lords Commission, you have established the "Ten-Lords Commission Special Operations Team for the Heliobi Containment Breach Incident."\nNow, you need to collect clues about the escaped heliobi from the Ghostly Grove.

ch: 一场「满溢之杯」法吉娜降下的预知梦，把你拽入了变身小海豹的危机。\n作为传闻中的「预言之子」，为了不使噩梦成真，勇敢地参加「豹豹碰碰大作战」，拯救一无所知的翁法罗斯人吧！
en: A prophetic dream bestowed by Phagousa, Chalice of Plenty dragged you into the baby seal transformation crisis.\nAs the rumored "Child of Prophecy," bravely participate in Seal Slammers to save the unsuspecting people of Amphoreus and prevent the nightmare from coming true!

ch: 最盛大的宴会正式开幕！妖精和伙伴们都沉浸在热烈的欢宴氛围中，毫无疑问，大家在迷路迷境度过了一段极为难忘的时光。希望宴会永远不要结束。
en: The grandest feast has officially begun! Fairies and companions are all immersed in the lively, festive atmosphere. Without a doubt, everyone has spent an unforgettable time in the Membrance Maze. May this feast never end.

ch: 悬锋孤军要将那奥赫玛周边的威胁荡平，你们似乎能帮把手。 「我们没有背弃纷争，而是将矛尖转了一个方向。征讨更该征讨的敌人，守护更该守护的东西。」 ——米太亚德，悬锋孤军
en: The Kremnoan Detachment will eradicate the threats in Okhema's outskirts. You lot seem to be able to help. "We have not forsaken Strife, but we shifted our spears to a different direction. We will campaign against foes more deserving of our enmity, and protect those more deserving of protection." — Miltiades, Kremnoan Detachment

ch: 神悟树庭的学者希望获取更多关于黑潮造物的研究资料，有空的话就帮个忙吧。 「我们从知识中汲取力量，学者的敌人永远只有无知。」 ——希绪图亚，山羊学派
en: The scholars of Grove of Epiphany seek further knowledge on the black tide Creatures. If you have the time, assist them in their pursuit. "As scholars, we draw strength from knowledge, as our only true enemy is ignorance." – Hisetua, Caprism

ch: 奥赫玛的阳光需要泰坦的圣物维系，黎明云崖向你们发出了委托。 「刻法勒托起了黎明机器，但那光芒并不永恒，就像城中的安和，随时都可能熄灭。」 ——卡勒克提斯，元老
en: Okhema's sunlight needs maintenance via Titans' divine objects, and thus the Dawncloud sends this assignment to you lot. "Kephale holds up the Dawn Device, yet their light is not eternal and can go out any time, just like the peace in this city." — Callictis, Elder

ch: 昔涟、缇宝、刻律德菈、长夜月、丹恒•腾荒、海瑟音、风堇、白厄、那刻夏、阿格莱雅、万敌、遐蝶、赛飞儿、开拓者•记忆。
en: Cyrene, Tribbie, Cerydra, Evernight, Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae, Hysilens, Hyacine, Phainon, Anaxa, Aglaea, Mydei, Castorice, Cipher, Trailblazer (Remembrance).

ch: 回到最初的哀丽秘榭。
en: To return to the Aedes Elysiae at the very beginning.

en: Adds "Flame Reaver of the Deepest Dark (Corrupted)"

en: <unbreak>134</unbreak>th Eternal Recurrence: Grove of Epiphany

ch: 铭心之萃 • 万敌
en: Indelible Coterie: Mydei

en: Amphoreus

ch: 万敌的独立伤害增幅提高#1。
en: Increases Mydei's Independent DMG Amplification is by #1.

ch: 【血仇】状态期间，万敌造成的伤害无视敌方目标<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>的防御力。角色赋能中，我方前台回复生命值时，万敌回复的生命值变为原值的<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>。
en: During the "Vendetta" state, DMG dealt by Mydei ignores <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of enemy target's DEF. During Character Empowerment, whenever an on-field ally restores HP, Mydei's HP restored becomes <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of the original value.

ch: 万敌的独立伤害增幅提高<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>。
en: Increases Mydei's Independent DMG Amplification by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

ch: 【血仇】状态期间暴击伤害提高<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>。角色赋能中，万敌施放【弑神登神】时，额外回复等同于生命上限<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>的生命值。
en: During the "Vendetta" state, CRIT DMG is increased by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. During Character Empowerment, when Mydei uses "Godslayer Be God," he additionally restores HP equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Max HP.

ch: 万敌的独立伤害增幅提高<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>。
en: Increases Mydei's Independent DMG Amplification by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

ch: 行动时施放，万敌以<unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>的速度行动。
en: Use when taking action. Mydei takes action at <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> SPD.

ch: 行动时施放战技进行攻击并积攒充能以施放【弑神登神】，且永久提高生命上限。我方前台回复生命时万敌也回复生命。
en: When taking action, uses Skill to attack and build Charge to use "Godslayer Be God," permanently increasing Max HP. Mydei heals when an on-field ally restores HP.

ch: 消耗<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>点充能，对敌方单体造成等同于万敌<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f9b0f0><gridfightmod type=cyrene index=1 format=i%></color>生命上限的虚数属性伤害，同时对其相邻目标造成等同于万敌<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f9b0f0><gridfightmod type=cyrene index=2 format=i%></color>生命上限的虚数属性伤害，并使生命上限永久提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>点，每场战斗最多提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color>次。\n该技能会自动施放。此技能期间无法积攒充能。
en: Consumes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> point(s) of Charge. Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f9b0f0><gridfightmod type=cyrene index=1 format=i%></color> of Mydei's Max HP to one enemy and Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f9b0f0><gridfightmod type=cyrene index=2 format=i%></color> of Mydei's Max HP to adjacent targets, and permanently increases Max HP by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> points, up to a max increase of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color> in each battle.\nThis ability will be automatically used. While this ability is in use, Charge cannot be accumulated.

ch: 在「罗浮杂俎」上开设账号了！
en: I got an account on Ghostly Grove!

ch: <color=#42a8b9>#鬼话连篇##不吐不快#</color>你们都把她当成手心里的宝捧着，但我偏要说说大实话。她拍的视频，她发的贴子有任何原创性可言吗？不止在「罗浮杂俎」，她也在其他网络平台上出没的，但她发布的内容不是蹭热度，就是玩梗…还是玩过气的梗，要不就是抄袭别人的创意。不会就我一个人觉得她无聊吧，不会吧不会吧？而且她不是标榜自己是个创作者吗？只会玩梗小桂子你对得起自己创作者的名头吗？你有这么多资源，为什么不更关心一下社会问题呢？整天只会拍些搞笑娱乐的东西！世道就是被你这种人败坏的！
en: I have to get this one off my chest. Y'all are simping for her as if the whole world revolved around her, but I feel compelled to speak the truth. Is there ANY originality to the vids and posts she makes? She's terminally online, and her accounts are literally everywhere, churning out her vapid content not just here on Ghostly Grove but on other platforms as well. Is she that desperate for money? And everything she posts is either overused, outdated, cringey memes or just clout-chasing clickbaity stuff that appeals to the lowest common denominator. If not that, then she would just straight up STEAL other people's ideas. And she calls herself a "content creator," LMAO. I can't be the only one who finds her boring, right? Right? She has such a large following, yet she never uses it to address any of the pressing social issues. Why is that!? All she does every day is make mind-numbingly "fUnNY" hogwash! People like her are the reason why society is going down the drain! <color=#42a8b9>#GhostTales #BreakingMySilence</color>

ch: 大家好，我是桂乃芬，在「罗浮杂俎」上开设账号了，主要内容接受大家的调查委托，平时也分享一些生活动态，有时也会在评论区和大家互动！\n再次感谢大家的喜爱！
en: Hi everyone. I'm Guinaifen, and I've opened an account on Ghostly Grove. Most of my content will be taking up your requests for investigations, as well as sharing some of my daily life and replying to your posts!\nThank you once again for your support!

ch: 鳞渊境龙脉的事，我听摘星社导游讲过的，在罗浮杂俎上也看得到，真别怪我多想
en: That affair at the Scalegorge Waterscape... I heard the guide from the Star-Picking Tours mentioned it before. And now it's getting corroborated here on Ghostly Grove. Can't blame me for connecting the dots.

ch: 罗浮杂俎，分享你刚编的故事
en: Alright, Grovers, time to share your made-up stories

ch: 管理员是罗浮杂俎负责的，你说请就请？不用走流程？
en: Mods are set up by Ghostly Grove. You reckon they'll pop out as soon as we want one? That there are no procedures to go thru?

ch: 在那黎明照拂的圣城，织者抚弄金丝，连缀命运。\n背负「浪漫」火种的黄金裔，召集世间英雄，带领他们再度踏上漫长的征程\n——击落众神，归还神火，予以几近覆灭的翁法罗斯新生。
en: In that holy city kissed by the dawn, the weaver caresses the golden threads, entwining fates.\nThe Chrysos Heir that bears the "Romance" Coreflame gathered the world's heroes, leading them on a long journey once more\n— to topple the gods, reclaim the divine flame, and grant rebirth to the nearly fallen Amphoreus.

ch: 那沉入迷雾的悬锋，纷乱与战争之城！它的王室流着弑亲的血脉，它的神明以灾厄为名。\n不死的迈德漠斯，离群的狮子，逐猎「纷争」火种的黄金裔。忍受万死，浴血还乡，孤身背负疯狂的宿命\n——弑王成王，弑神登神。征战的铁蹄踏遍荒野，终归要沾上故乡的血。
en: Kremnos, the mist-shrouded city of chaos and war! Its royal lineage is tainted with patricide, and its god bears the name of calamity.\nThe undying Mydeimos, the lion apart from the rest. Chrysos Heir who seeks the Coreflame of Strife, must suffer a thousand deaths, be bathed in blood on the path home, and bear the madness of fate alone.\n— Kingslayer be king, godslayer be god. Iron-hooves pound across the wilderness for the campaign, and must eventually soak in the blood of their homeland.

ch: 神悟树庭，滋养知识的学府，诞育哲人的摇床。\n但渎神的阿那克萨戈拉斯，诘问「理性」火种的黄金裔，试问：你甘愿身负恶名，也要违逆预言，将怀疑的枝杈刺入智慧的圣树？\n——「可笑。这世界遍地虚假，唯有我才是真实。」
en: The Grove of Epiphany, where knowledge flourishes and philosophers are born.\nYet here stands Anaxagoras the blasphemer, the Chrysos Heir who challenges the Coreflame of Reason. He is questioned: Would you defy the prophecy even if you must bear infamy, and insist on driving the thorns of doubt into the Sacred Tree of wisdom?\n——"Ridiculous. In a world full of lies, I am the only truth."

ch: 北境帝国，失落的王朝，寒冷的疆土燃烧着征伐的野心。\n君主刻律德菈，执握「律法」火种的黄金裔，布局设子，与神相弈，审判异心的罪囚，为此世奠定逐火的基业\n——「这绝非终点，翁法罗斯的征途，当是银河群星！」
en: The Northern Empire, a lost dynasty, where its frozen lands burn with the fever of conquest.\nSovereign Cerydra, the Chrysos Heir who wields the Coreflame of "Law," weaves her schemes, contends with the gods, passes judgment upon the faithless, and lays the foundation of Flame-Chase into this world.\n..."This is far from the end. Amphoreus's journey is set to blaze across the stars!"

ch: 又一次站在旅途的终点，男人的身影被金色的骄阳吞没。 「那黄金的血液，救世的希望，原来……」 他的眼泪还未落下，便蒸发不见。 「小白，明天见！」 「救世主，记得活到最后！」 「去成为翁法罗斯的黎明吧……」 …… 众人的愿望空余回响，无名的英雄破碎，露出那酷烈的死亡。 「若怒火不足以焚灭悖谬的命运……」 他一次又一次朝着那山顶攀升，一次又一次跌落粉碎—— 「那就让我与它一同燃尽！」
en: Once again, at the journey's end, the man's silhouette was swallowed by the sweltering golden sun. "So... that golden blood, the last hope of deliverance, was really..." His tears never had the chance to fall — they vanished into steam. "Snowy, see you tomorrow!" "Deliverer, remember to stay alive till the final act!" "Go be the dawn of Amphoreus..." ... The people's wishes echoed in the void. The Nameless Hero crumbled, his fierce and tragic death laid bare. "If rage can't burn this twisted fate to ashes..." He climbed toward the peak, over and over, only to fall and be shattered, again and again— "Then let me burn with it!"

ch: 位面球中封存着翁法罗斯的哀地里亚，信仰{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的民众们在雪原上修筑起巨碑，敬奉为他们带来死亡祝福的圣女。
en: Encapsulated in the Planar Sphere is Aidonia of Amphoreus. Believers of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} have raised colossal monuments on the snow plains, offering tribute to the Holy Maiden who brings them the blessing of death.

ch: 位面球封装的是翁法罗斯的神悟树庭，「裂分之枝」{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的神躯在此沉思。「最初的学者」带领众人在林间建立起花园与庭院，分享学识，树庭由此初诞。
en: Encapsulated in the Planar Sphere is Amphoreus' Grove of Epiphany, where the divine corpus of the Bough of Rift, {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}, ponders. "The First Scholar" led others to establish gardens and courtyards within the woods and shared knowledge, and the Grove was born.

ch: 金丝与藤蔓串联起树庭识网，成为学派间共享成果的生命线。信息由根系传入，沿脉络游览、析构。直至化作一滴露珠，溶入友爱之馆的池中。
en: The golden threads and vines weave a network in the Grove, becoming a lifeline through which schools share their findings. Information enters from the roots, unraveled and deconstructed through the leaves' veins, until it becomes a drop of dew merging into the Library of Philia's pool.

ch: 位面球中封装着哀丽秘榭的「迷路迷境」，拨开金色的麦草，掉进一片深深、深深的树洞，咦？好多小妖精，「一二三四五六七？」，错啦！是「哆徕咪发嗦啦嘻！」
en: Encapsulated in the Planar Sphere is the Membrance Maze of Aedes Elysiae. Brush aside the golden wheat, and down, down, down you tumble into a deep tree hollow. Huh? There are so many little fairies! "One two three four five six seven?" Wrong! It's "Do re mi fa sol la si!"

ch: 能在列车的留声机上播放的碟片，是偶然所得，亦是他人馈赠。音律飞旋时，那些笑容、擦肩、触碰，还有战斗时激荡的心绪，都一一涌上心头。或许这就是时代飞速发展向前，却依然有人在收集碟片的原因。\n当前碟片中刻录着《圣林》。
en: A record that can be played on the Express' phonograph. It might be a chance acquisition or a gift from someone else. All sorts of memories surge up when the music plays — the smiles, encounters, touches, and the excitement of battle. Maybe that is why people still collect records even as society rapidly advances.\nThe current record contains the track "Sacred Grove."

ch: 《圣林》
en: Sacred Grove

ch: 效仿翁法罗斯黄金浴池的入浴剂，据说里面添加了真正的黄金。\n\n「含金量0.0013%…嗯，可以当矿了。」
en: This bath soak, inspired by the golden bath of Amphoreus, is said to contain actual gold.\n\n"Gold content... 0.0013%. Pfft. You could practically mine this stuff."

ch: 用于束衣的粉色缎带，轻薄柔软，形似蝴蝶——又仿佛翁法罗斯本身的形状。\n\n「女孩子的缎带怎么可能只有一个？」
en: A light, soft pink ribbon for fastening garments. It's shaped like a butterfly... or maybe it's the shape of Amphoreus itself.\n\n"A girl always has more than one ribbon."

ch: 悬锋城首屈一指的参谋，每句话都蕴含着深刻的哲理，和奥赫玛城中的狮口截然不同。\n\n「不过这只是个模型，你可以自行为它配音。」
en: The most eminent advisor in all of Castrum Kremnos. Every word it utters is steeped in profound philosophy, a far cry from the lion's maw in Okhema.\n\n"This is just a model, though. You can provide your own voice for it."

ch: 翁法罗斯千种秘酿中的最上上品，金色的甜美甘露。据说来自于「满溢之杯」泼洒在大地上的神体，乃是献给泰坦的最佳祭礼。只需数滴便可让人沉醉于其醇香之中。自行饮用后会不省人事，如同在汪洋中沉沦。
en: The absolute finest of Amphoreus' thousand ambrosias. A golden, sweet nectar. It is said to come from the divine corpus of the Chalice of Plenty spilled onto the earth, making it the perfect offering to the Titans. Just a few drops are enough to inebriate a mortal with its rich fragrance. Consuming it on its own leads to unconsciousness, as if one is drowning in a vast ocean.

ch: 曾被认知为「仙馔秘酿」的珍馐，在翁法罗斯的轮回被揭示时，也一同展露出了真容。从瓶口逸散出的气息和之前相比似乎更为醇香，但仍然不建议亲自饮用。
en: A precious drink that was once considered "Celestial Ambrosia" in worldly cognition. As the cycles of Amphoreus were revealed, so did the truth of this drink. The scent wafting out of the bottle's mouth seems even more intense and sweeter than before, but imbibing is still not recommended.

ch: 「——拥有掌控大半个迷路迷境的力量迷！」
en: "—With the power to control most of the Membrance Maze!"

ch: 罗浮杂俎向订阅数量达到百万的博主发出的纪念奖牌。\n\n「恭喜，您在罗浮杂俎上有百万人关注了！」
en: The commemorative medallion sent by Ghostly Grove to influencers attaining one million subscribers.\n\n"Congratulations, you have one million subscribers on Ghostly Grove!"

ch: 罗浮杂俎向订阅数量达到十万的博主发出的纪念奖牌。\n\n「恭喜，您在罗浮杂俎上有十万人关注了！」
en: The commemorative medallion sent by Ghostly Grove to influencers attaining one hundred thousand subscribers.\n\n"Congratulations, you have one hundred thousand subscribers on Ghostly Grove!"

ch: 这份有关悬锋城过往的记忆来自大工匠哈托努斯，似乎印刻着山之民一族的沉重历史。
en: This memory of Castrum Kremnos originates from the Grand Craftsman Chartonus, seemingly carrying with it the profound and weighty history of the Mountain Dwellers.

ch: 悬锋城特色武器钢爪匕首，只是握柄处纹路已被磨损，看上去并不完全崭新。
en: A Steelclaw Dagger, a type of weapon unique to Castrum Kremnos. Its grip shows signs of wear, with the patterns faded, giving it the look of an old blade.

ch: 悬锋城特色武器悬锋盾牌，只是色泽有些黯淡，看上去有些年份了。
en: The Kremnos Shield, a type of weapon unique to Castrum Kremnos. It just has a slightly dull coloration, giving it an aged appearance.

ch: 悬锋城特色武器悬锋重剑，只是似乎断了一截，好像被人重新翻修过。
en: A Kremnos Greatsword, a type of weapon unique to Castrum Kremnos. Its blade appears to be fractured, as though it has been reforged.

ch: 一张沾染了血迹的树庭工作证，上面的名字是「尼科马库斯」。
en: A bloodied Grove of Epiphany work permit with the name "Nicomachus."

ch: 一张破损的树庭工作证，上面依稀可辨的名字是「安德烈亚斯」。
en: A damaged Grove of Epiphany work permit with the name "Andreas."

ch: 一张被汗水渗得皱巴巴的树庭工作证，上面的名字是「科洛埃」。
en: A Grove of Epiphany work permit wrinkled with sweat with the name "Clio."

ch: 树庭的黄金裔学者——阿塔卡玛的佩剑。在那场抵御黑潮的战役中，这柄剑陪伴着主人战斗到了最后一刻；而在阿塔卡玛倒下后，又由其妹库娜涅拾起，直至无穷无尽的怪物们将一切鲜活血肉吞噬殆尽。
en: The sword once wielded by Artakama, a Chrysos Heir scholar of the Grove. In the dire battle against the black tide, this sword stood steadfast by its master until her final breath. Following Artakama's demise, her younger sister, Cynane, picked up the sword and continued the fight until the ceaseless swarms of monsters devoured everything living.

ch: 这里面能喝到翁法罗斯所有水果的味道！迷醉指数为零，安全放心！
en: You can taste all the Amphorean fruits in this! Zero intoxication level, totally safe and worry-free!

ch: 来自「纷争的冠军」——万敌的馈赠，象征着他身为王者，亦为守护者的荣耀与约束。
en: From the "Champion of Strife": Mydei's bestowal, symbolizing both his glory and restraint as a ruler and protector.

ch: 世界的微小「变量」，诞生自「再创世」后的崭新架构。 每当你凝望瓶中星点时，总会有潮水般的记忆涌入思绪，彷佛翁法罗斯岁月的一部分正封装于此。 也许它能帮到你，在某个你尚未抵达的时刻。 「究竟是书写传奇的人才能成为英雄，还是必须成为英雄才能书写传奇？」
en: A minute "variable" of the world, born from the brand-new structure born after the Era Nova. Each time you gaze at it, memories surge like a tide — as if a fragment of Amphoreus's years lies sealed within. It might help you in a time you've not yet reached. "Is it the legend-writers who become heroes, or must one first become a hero to write legends?"

ch: 迷路迷境最常见的作物。接管农田的学者向妖精们多次强调，从生物学意义上来说它其实是一种莴苣。
en: The most common crop in the Membrance Maze. The scholar who took over the farmland has repeatedly emphasized to the fairies that, biologically speaking, it's actually a type of celtuce.

ch: 据说有保护眼睛，预防夜盲症的功效。因此在四处都非常昏暗的迷路迷境，意外地广受欢迎。
en: It's said to protect your eyes and prevent night blindness. That's why it's unexpectedly popular in the dimly lit Membrance Maze.

ch: 似乎是神悟树庭的新人赠礼，只是从来没人想过给大地兽戴上——还挺合适的！
en: Seems like it's a welcome gift from the Grove of Epiphany. No one ever thought of putting it on a dromas before, but it fits surprisingly well!

ch: 「勇士的象征，赠予奥赫玛的明日之星，大地兽驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大」
en: "A symbol of a warrior for the rising star of Okhema, dromas Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas."

ch: 「请问如何评价罗浮杂俎的商业化？」「请不必担心，罗浮杂俎未来有可能会消失，但绝不会变质。」
en: "How would you evaluate the commercialization of Ghostly Grove?" "Please don't worry, Ghostly Grove may disappear in the future, but it will never lose its essence."

ch: 黄金蜜饼，可以称得上是翁法罗斯历史最悠久的美食，也是过去贵族们热爱享用的高级甜品。在奥赫玛的传信石版上，它正在成为一种具有时尚性质的热门食物…… 「这东西最近火得也太快了吧…我可是土生土长的奥赫玛人，但我小时候都没在家里吃过甜味的煎饼！」 「好像是说有一家甜品店找万敌先生在传信石版上做了广告，爆火之后其他商家也眼红了起来……」 「…不过你别说，他们几家开发出来的味道确实都挺不错。」
en: Golden Honeycakes, one of the oldest delicacies in Amphoreus history, was once a favorite high-end dessert among the nobility. Now, it's becoming a trendy, fashionable food on Okhema's teleslate... "This thing blew up way too fast... I'm a native Okheman, but I never had sweet pancakes at home growing up!" "Apparently, a dessert shop got Mr. Mydei to advertise it on the teleslate, and after it went viral, other businesses got envious..." "...But honestly, you have to admit, the new flavors they've developed are actually pretty good."

ch: 通过极其简单的仪式流程所制作出的秘酿，口感粗糙，但由于价格非常便宜，仍旧有不小的市场。据说当年抗击黑潮时，由于干净的水源十分匮乏，人们曾一度依靠这种粗制秘酿补充水分与养分。\n\n「奥赫玛现在有干净的水喝，孩子他爸，别再找借口天天买秘酿了。」
en: The ambrosia made through an incredibly simple ritual process has a rough taste, but due to its very low price, it still has a considerable market. It is said that during the fight against the black tide, when clean water was scarce, people relied on this rough-brew ambrosia to supplement their hydration and nutrients.\n\n"Okhema now has clean water, o sire of my children. Stop making excuses to buy ambrosia every day."

ch: 以翁法罗斯传统工艺制成的陶罐，罐身绘制着黄金裔英雄们过往的英勇场景，颈部与底座则饰以精致的几何纹样。既可用于日常储水，也可作为祭祀供器。\n\n「我们用它盛水、祭祀，也用它讲述那些未竟的故事。」
en: A dolium crafted via traditional Amphoreus crafts, its surface adorned with scenes of past heroics by Chrysos Heirs. The neck and base feature intricate geometric patterns. It serves both as an everyday water vessel and as an offering in rituals.\n\n"We use it to hold water, to make offerings, and to tell the stories yet unfinished."

ch: 在翁法罗斯民间神话里，这是一种从吉奥里亚神体裂缝中开采的矿石。作为大地泰坦的一部分，至今仍散发着微弱的生机，传来神明的回声。山之民常将它打磨成各类首饰，以此向大地泰坦致敬。 「把耳朵凑上去就能听见吉奥里亚的叹息…」 「我怎么觉得是呼噜声？」
en: In the folk mythology of Amphoreus, this is a mineral extracted from the fissures of Georios' divine body. As a part of the Earth Titan, it still emanates a faint vitality, carrying the echoes of the divine. The Mountain Dwellers often polish it into various jewelry pieces as a tribute to the Earth Titan. "If you put your ear close, you can hear Georios' sighs..." "I don't know. It sounds more like snoring to me."

ch: 据说是扎格列斯从奥赫玛名厨的灶台上偷来的昂贵美食，不知道为什么储存在巴特鲁斯的大胃袋里。
en: Rumor has it that it's an expensive delicacy stolen by Zagreus from the kitchen of Okhema's master chef, but somehow ended up in Big Chungus Bartholos's massive belly.

ch: 据说是扎格列斯从树庭的花圃里收获的珍贵食材，不知道为什么储存在巴特鲁斯的大胃袋里。
en: Rumor has it that it's a precious ingredient that Zagreus harvested from the Grove's garden, but somehow ended up in Big Chungus Bartholos's massive belly.

ch: 翁法罗斯献予{NICKNAME}的桂冠。
en: A wreath that Amphoreus offered to {NICKNAME}.

ch: 驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大的衣服套装之一，奥赫玛风格。
en: One of Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas's outfits, in the Okhema style.

ch: 罗浮杂俎的打赏积分。可用于订阅计划中兑换奖励。
en: Points gifted by viewers in Ghostly Grove. They can be used to redeem rewards from the subscription plan.

ch: 悬锋城徽记
en: Castrum Kremnos Crest

ch: 色泽黯淡的悬锋盾牌
en: Dull Kremnos Shield

ch: 个头不大的悬锋重剑
en: Relatively Small Greatsword of Kremnos

ch: 「留情奥赫玛」
en: "Have Mercy, Okhema"

ch: 记载预言的金织-「哀丽秘榭」
en: Portentous Goldwoven: Aedes Elysiae

ch: 悬锋盾牌
en: Kremnos Shield

ch: 配方：悬锋盾牌
en: Recipe: Kremnos Shield

ch: 悬锋重剑
en: Greatsword of Kremnos

ch: 永恒之地翁法罗斯
en: Amphoreus, The Eternal Land

ch: 永恒之地翁法罗斯
en: Amphoreus, The Eternal Land

ch: 永恒之地翁法罗斯
en: Amphoreus, The Eternal Land

ch: 永恒之地翁法罗斯
en: Amphoreus, The Eternal Land

ch: 记载预言的金织-「哀丽秘榭」
en: Portentous Goldwoven: Aedes Elysiae

ch: 【万敌】的星魂
en: Mydei's Eidolon

ch: 万敌
en: Mydei

ch: 神悟树庭的沉思巨桹
en: Grove of Epiphany's Pondering Colossus

ch: 神悟树庭的联识叶路
en: Grove of Epiphany's Interwoven Veins

ch: 迷路迷境的恬梦树屋
en: Membrance Maze's Serene Treehouse

ch: 迷路迷境的祈愿笛哨
en: Membrance Maze's Wishing Whistle

ch: 翁法罗斯的西风尽途
en: Last West Wind of Amphoreus

ch: 厨艺精湛的万敌。\n\n「给。」
en: Mydei, a master chef.\n\n"Here."

ch: 万敌•佳肴
en: Mydei: Delicacies

ch: 奥赫玛的黄金裔，「浪漫」的半神，亦是逐火之旅的领导者。\n她身为织者，亲自穿针引线，召集世间英雄再度踏上漫长的征途。
en: The Chrysos Heir of Okhema, the demigod of Romance, and the leader of the Flame-Chase Journey.\nAs a weaver, she personally threads the needle, gathering heroes of the world to embark once more on a long and arduous journey.

ch: 雅努萨波利斯的黄金裔，「门径」的半神，奥赫玛的小小信使与祭司。\n三人以预言带领黄金裔向前，各自又肩负着不同的职责。
en: The Chrysos Heir of Janusopolis, the demigod of Passage, and the little messengers and priests of Okhema.\nThe three of them, with their prophecy, lead the Chrysos Heirs forward, yet each of them bears different responsibilities.

ch: 哀地里亚的督战圣女，奥赫玛的「入殓师」。\n身负名为「死亡之触」的诅咒，指尖触碰到的生命都会凋亡归无。
en: The Maiden of War from Aidonia and mortician of Okhema.\nBearing the curse known as the Touch of Death, any life her fingertips touch withers and returns to nothing.

ch: 哀丽秘榭的黄金裔，奥赫玛的战士。\n温和开朗的青年，心思细腻，力求诸事臻于完美。
en: The Chrysos Heir of Aedes Elysiae, a warrior of Okhema.\nA gentle and cheerful young man with a detail-oriented mind and a pursuit of perfection in everything he does.

ch: 长着粉色绒毛的神秘生物，似乎与翁法罗斯有着千丝万缕的联系。
en: A mysterious creature with pink fur, seemingly intricately linked to Amphoreus.

ch: 浪漫之泰坦。\n它与它的眷属们追逐着世间的美好，编入金丝，织作世间的浪漫，令翁法罗斯的众生拥有情爱。
en: The Romance Titan.\nThey and their Titankins pursue the beauty of the world, weaving it into golden threads to craft the romance of existence, granting the inhabitants of Amphoreus the gift of love and affection.

ch: 律法之泰坦。\n塔兰顿绝不容许偏袒和不公，它捍卫翁法罗斯的禁忌与边界，为万物指定逻辑与法。
en: The Law Titan.\nTalanton permits neither favoritism nor injustice, safeguarding Amphoreus' taboos and boundaries while prescribing logic and law for all things.

ch: 翁法罗斯的泰坦是维系天地的力量，是从古至今的命运，是世间万物的规则。\n凡人们生活在它们的喜怒哀乐中，学识、战争、情爱以及生死都与它们的神权息息相关。
en: The Titans of Amphoreus are the forces that sustain the heavens and the earth, the fates flowing from ancient times to the present, and the rules governing all things in the world.\nMortals live within their joys and sorrows — knowledge, war, love, life, and death are all deeply entwined with their divine authority.

ch: 凡人在刻法勒脚下建立起聚落，由此诞生了「奥赫玛」的前身。\n如今，它既是末世的庇护所，也是「再创世」旅途的起点。
en: Humankind established settlements at the feet of Kephale, giving birth to the predecessor of "Okhema."\nToday, it stands as both the sanctuary in the end times and the starting point of the Era Nova journey.

ch: 巨大的移动要塞，信仰尼卡多利的战士之城。\n悬锋人以战斗至死为荣，以严酷纪律闻名于翁法罗斯。
en: A massive mobile fortress, the city of warriors who worship Nikador.\nThe Kremnoans take pride in fighting to the death and are renowned throughout Amphoreus for their strict discipline.

ch: 溶解了灵魂的水体，吞没翁法罗斯的黑暗。\n黑潮及黑潮造物是翁法罗斯濒临毁灭的直接原因。
en: The water that dissolves souls. The darkness engulfing Amphoreus.\nThe black tide and its creations are the direct cause of Amphoreus' near destruction.

ch: 伴随黑潮而来、狩猎泰坦火种的无名剑士，无人知晓其真身。\n在悬锋城围猎中与众人死斗数合，最终落败，下落不明。
en: A nameless swordmaster who came with the black tide and is hunting down the Titans' Coreflames. None knows their true identity.\nThey fought multiple rounds against the heroes in the entrapment set up within Castrum Kremnos before finally losing. Their current whereabouts is unknown.

ch: 围绕瑟希斯化身建立的花园庭院，翁法罗斯的学术圣地之一。\n现今是奥赫玛的友邦，也是研究黑潮、泰坦等神秘事物的前沿阵地。
en: A courtyard-like structure interspersed with gardens, built around Cerces's manifestation and one of Amphoreus's foremost academic institutions.\nIt is currently a city-state allied to Okhema, and the leader in research on mysterious occurrences such as the black tide and Titans.

ch: 围绕瑟希斯化身建立的花园庭院，翁法罗斯的学术圣地之一。\n已在黑潮袭击中覆灭。
en: A courtyard-like structure interspersed with gardens, built around Cerces's manifestation and one of Amphoreus's foremost academic institutions.\nIt has been destroyed in an attack by the black tide.

ch: 雅努萨波利斯的黄金裔，「门径」的半神。曾是端丽的圣女，因火种的代价退行为孩童模样。\n缇安在盗火行者的袭击中牺牲，灵魂彻底消散，化作与之形貌相仿的娃娃。
en: The Chrysos Heir of Janusopolis, the demigod of "Passage." Once a demure and beautiful Holy Maiden, she had regressed to the form of a child. Such is the price she paid for the Coreflame.\nTrianne sacrificed herself in the Flame Reaver's attack. Her soul dissipated completely, and she turned into a doll that looks just like her.

ch: 神悟树庭的黄金裔，七贤人之一，智种学派的创立者。因坚持人神无异而被唤作「渎神者」。\n在树庭劫难中奇迹生还，理性之泰坦的火种现正寄居其身。
en: The Chrysos Heir of the Grove of Epiphany. One of the Seven Sages and the founder of Nousporism. Called by others as the "blasphemer" due to his insistence that humans and gods are the same.\nHe miraculously survived the calamity at the Grove and the Coreflame of the Reason Titan currently resides within his body.

ch: 神悟树庭的黄金裔，「理性」的半神。七贤人之一，智种学派的创立者。\n在树庭劫难中早已身亡，却在死后与泰坦同行，战胜试炼，揭示翁法罗斯世界本质。
en: The Chrysos Heir of the Grove of Epiphany and the demigod of "Reason." One of the Seven Sages and the founder of Nousporism.\nThough he had long since perished in the calamity at the Grove, he journeyed alongside a Titan after death, overcoming the trial and unveiling the true nature of the world of Amphoreus.

ch: 奥赫玛最接近「负世之泰坦」刻法勒的地方，黄金裔与泰坦建立沟通纽带的圣地。\n此处庄严神圣，是奥赫玛城中身份崇高者们的聚集处，也是奥赫玛的政治文化中心。
en: The closest place in Okhema to Kephale, the Worldbearing Titan — this sacred site serves as the bridge between the Chrysos Heirs and the Titans.\nMajestic and revered, it is the gathering place of Okhema's highest dignitaries and the heart of its political and cultural affairs.

ch: 被冠以泰坦之名的云间城邦枢纽，作为艾格勒的栖地，于天空俯瞰大地。\n画壁映照出翁法罗斯的天象，似乎掩藏着某种秘密。
en: The city-state in the clouds, named after a Titan and once the dwelling of Aquila, looks down upon the world from the skies.\nMurals within reflect Amphoreus' shifting skies, hinting at secrets long buried in starlight.

ch: 黎明机器熄灭后的奥赫玛圣地。多数区域已被涌出的黑潮侵占。\n作为行政枢纽尚未失去运作能力。部分民众在议会堂附近避难，与卫士们一同抵御着怪物的侵攻。
en: Okhema's Sanctum, after the fall of the Dawn Device, is now awash in the black tide.\nThe administrative core still clings to function. Near the parliament hall, a handful of civilians stand their ground with the guards, fighting back against the monsters.

ch: 哀丽秘榭，永夜之帷包围的小村庄，毁于黑潮。\n英雄从故乡的麦浪中走出，再未回头。
en: Aedes Elysiae, a small village surrounded by the Veil of Evernight and destroyed by the black tide.\nThe hero walked out from the golden waves of grain of his hometown and never looked back.

ch: 隐于哀丽秘榭密林中的小小天地，妖精的村落。\n据说，只有天真无邪的孩子才能进入。
en: The village of fairies is a small world hidden in the dense forests of Aedes Elysiae.\nWord has it that only pure and innocent children are allowed to enter it.

ch: 以「神礼观众」自居，翁法罗斯演算的操盘者。\n行于「智识」命途，却意图创造「毁灭」。
en: The operator of the Amphorean extrapolation who addresses himself as the Theoros.\nHe walks the Path of Erudition, yet intends to create Destruction.

ch: 哀丽秘榭的黄金裔，奥赫玛的战士，预言中「负世」的半神。\n实验名为「NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>」。苦旅至世界尽头，残酷的真相令他蒙受「毁灭」瞥视。
en: The Chrysos Heir from Aedes Elysiae, a warrior of Okhema, and the demigod of Worldbearing in the prophecy.\nHis experimental name is "NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>." As his torturous journey led him to the world's end, the cruel truth subjected him to the gaze of the Destruction.

ch: 哀丽秘榭的神秘少女，祝祭庭院的祭司，预言中「岁月」的半神。\n实验名为「PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>」。现今下落不明。
en: A mysterious girl from Aedes Elysiae, a priestess of the Sacrament Courtyard, and the demigod of Time in the prophecy.\nHer experimental name is "PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>." Her whereabouts are unknown.

ch: 长着粉色绒毛的神秘生物，与翁法罗斯有着千丝万缕的联系。\n与{NICKNAME}同行至世界尽头，取回了更多的「记忆」。
en: A mysterious creature with pink fur, seemingly intricately linked to Amphoreus.\nShe traveled alongside {NICKNAME} to the world's end and retrieved more "memories."

ch: 翁法罗斯世代更迭的形式，同时也是刻法勒的试炼。\n「负世」之半神须通过记忆，创造并背负新的世界，直到不堪重负倒下，或来人接过其神职。
en: The mode of Amphoreus's iteration, and also the trial of Kephale.\nThe demigod of Worldbearing must create and bear a new world through memories, until they collapse from the weight or their godly authority is taken over.

ch: 翁法罗斯世代更迭的形式，同时也是权杖δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>「翁法罗斯」的演算机制。\n旨在求解「毁灭」方程，为其循环输入对抗和学习的样本。\n理论上的最后一次「再创世」被白厄和昔涟阻止，陷入多达<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次的死循环。
en: The mode of Amphoreus's iteration, and how the Scepter δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak> "Amphoreus" extrapolates.\nIt aims to solve the equation of Destruction by continuously feeding the equation learning data in the form of resistance.\nThe last theoretical "Era Nova" was thwarted by Phainon and Cyrene, and has since looped for as many as <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak> times.

ch: 许珀耳的黄金裔，北境帝国之主，止战的燃冕者，翁法罗斯唯一的凯撒。\n于扫合诸邦后召集天下英雄，发起逐火之旅，誓要打破旧律、书写新律。
en: Chrysos Heir of Hyperborea, master of the Northern Empire, Flamecrowned who ended wars, and the only ever Imperator of Amphoreus.\nAfter uniting the fractured lands, she summoned heroes from all corners to embark on the Flame-Chase Journey, sworn to break the old order and pen a new one.

ch: 以「神礼观众」自居，翁法罗斯演算的操盘者。\n自称天才俱乐部#1赞达尔，欲借翁法罗斯创造毁灭博识尊的力量。\n行于「智识」命途，却意图创造「毁灭」。
en: The operator of the Amphorean extrapolation who addresses himself as the Theoros.\nHe also calls himself Zandar, member #1 of the Genius Society. He seeks to borrow Amphoreus's power to create the power to destroy Nous.\nHe walks the Path of Erudition, yet intends to create Destruction.

ch: 翁法罗斯与现实宇宙的交界，权杖δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>的硬件设施。\n英雄故事的观众席，数据与字符在此流淌，化作演算「原动力」的电信号。
en: Where Amphoreus meets the real universe stands the hardware complex of Scepter δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>.\nThis is the audience chamber of heroic epics, where data and code stream freely, transformed into electric signals that drive the extrapolation of Primum Mobile.

ch: 指向大墓深处的「毁灭」金光贯穿了神悟树庭。\n如今被忆潮影响，无数错乱的记忆在这里交汇。
en: A golden beam of Destruction piercing through the Grove of Epiphany, pointing toward the depths of the Great Tomb.\nNow affected by the memoria tide, countless chaotic memories converge here.

ch: 翁法罗斯世代更迭的形式，同时也是权杖δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>「翁法罗斯」的演算机制。\n而今，{NICKNAME}将以「负世」之名，为翁法罗斯开创前所未有的结局。
en: The form through which Amphorean generations are substituted, and also serves as the computational basis for Scepter δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak> "Amphoreus."\nNow, {NICKNAME} shall forge an unprecedented ending for Amphoreus in the name of Worldbearing.

ch: 奥赫玛的领袖，「浪漫」的半神，实验因子「KaLos<unbreak>618</unbreak>」。\n她身为织者，亲自穿针引线，召集世间英雄，编织翁法罗斯的未来。
en: The leader of Okhema, the demigod of "Romance," Experimental Factor "KaLos<unbreak>618</unbreak>."\nAs a weaver, she personally threads the needle, gathering heroes of the world to weave the future of Amphoreus.

ch: 雅努萨波利斯的圣女，「门径」的半神，实验因子「HapLotes<unbreak>405</unbreak>」。\n翁法罗斯的第一位半神，因火种的代价退行为孩童模样，以神谕引领黄金裔前行。
en: The Holy Maiden of Janusopolis, the demigod of "Passage," Experimental Factor "HapLotes<unbreak>405</unbreak>."\nThe first demigod of Amphoreus, who paid the price of a Coreflame and regressed into the form of a child, guiding the Chrysos Heirs through the prophecy.

ch: 悬锋城的君王，「纷争」的半神，实验因子「PoleMos<unbreak>600</unbreak>」。\n引领子民投身逐火的事业，而后独自返乡，以一己之力抵御席卷世界的黑潮。
en: The King of Castrum Kremnos, the demigod of "Strife," Experimental Factor "PoleMos<unbreak>600</unbreak>."\nHe led his people to join the great work of Flame-Chase, then returned home alone, standing on his own in defense against the black tide that tears through this world.

ch: 神悟树庭的学者，「理性」的半神，实验因子「SkeMma<unbreak>720</unbreak>」。\n他创立智种理论，驳斥泰坦和天才，揭示翁法罗斯的世界本质。
en: A scholar from the Grove of Epiphany, the demigod of "Reason," Experimental Factor "SkeMma<unbreak>720</unbreak>."\nHe established the Nouspore Theory, refuted the Titans and geniuses, and revealed the true nature of the world of Amphoreus.

ch: 多洛斯的盗贼，「诡计」的半神，实验因子「OreXis<unbreak>945</unbreak>」。\n身负神速之力，看似无心逐火，却以谎言维系了奥赫玛的千年光明。
en: A thief from Dolos, the demigod of "Trickery," Experimental Factor "OreXis<unbreak>945</unbreak>."\nBlessed with divine speed, she is seemingly indifferent to the Flame-Chase. Yet, she has sustained Okhema's light for a millennium through deception.

ch: 渊下古国的海妖，「海洋」的半神，实验因子「ApoRia<unbreak>432</unbreak>」。\n以「剑旗」为名的骑士，孤身对抗千年的虚无，为翁法罗斯争取希望。
en: The sea siren of the ancient kingdom beneath the sea, the demigod of "Ocean," Experimental Factor "ApoRia<unbreak>432</unbreak>."\nA knight known as "Gladius," fighting alone against the Nihility over a thousand years, all to strive for hope for Amphoreus.

ch: 许珀耳的君主，「律法」的半神，实验因子「HubRis<unbreak>504</unbreak>」。\n翁法罗斯唯一的凯撒，与神相弈，书写新律，愿翁法罗斯自立于群星。
en: The sovereign of Hyperborea, the demigod of "Law," Experimental Factor "HubRis<unbreak>504</unbreak>."\nThe one and only Imperator of Amphoreus, who plays chess with the gods and writes new laws, in hopes that Amphoreus will stand independent among the stars.

ch: 哀丽秘榭的战士，「负世」的半神，实验因子「NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>」。\n身为完美的容器，选择以自身囚禁铁墓，在轮回尽头，托举黎明升起。
en: A warrior from Aedes Elysiae, the demigod of "Worldbearing," Experimental Factor "NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>."\nAs the perfect vessel, he chose to use himself to imprison Irontomb, bringing the rise of dawn at the end of the cycles.

ch: 得知奥赫玛可能遭到「渗透」，阿格莱雅亲自出手，将暗藏城内各处的污秽一一揪出……
en: Aglaea begins a personal investigation after discovering that Okhema might have been infiltrated, pulling out the filth hidden in the nooks and crannies of the city...

ch: 万敌的子民，悬锋人，似乎对「纷争」神权另有所图。在战胜试炼前，他必须先取得族人的信任……
en: Mydei's people, the Kremnoans, seem to have other plans for the divine authority of Strife. Before overcoming the trial, he must first gain the trust of his people...

ch: 缇宝发觉远赴神悟树庭的缇安再次打开了「百界门」，她感到十分焦虑……
en: Tribbie realized that Trianne, currently located at the Grove of Epiphany, had opened the Century Gate once again. Tribbie is now deeply anxious...

ch: 为了令悬锋人与奥赫玛人重归于好，缇宝、缇安和缇宁决定觐见泰坦，寻回记忆……
en: In order to reconcile the Kremnoans and the Okhemans, Tribbie, Trianne, and Trinnon decided to visit the Titan and retrieve their memories...

ch: 万敌已将身后事安排妥当：是时候回返家乡了……
en: Mydei has arranged all his affairs. Now, it is time to go home...

ch: 显然翁法罗斯算是个不错的「设问」，能够推动那位天才行动起来……
en: Clearly, Amphoreus poses quite the intriguing "question" — one compelling enough to push THAT genius into action...

ch: 伴随「长夜月」同行，黑天鹅将见证「记忆」究竟是如何参与到翁法罗斯的命途纠缠之中……
en: Walking alongside Evernight, Black Swan would witness how Remembrance weaves itself into the fate of Amphoreus...

ch: 丹恒重新回到了翁法罗斯，他下定决心要找出{NICKNAME}与三月七再次团聚……
en: Dan Heng returned to Amphoreus, determined to find {NICKNAME} and reunite with March 7th...

ch: 星穹列车的诸位准备进入翁法罗斯……
en: The Express Crew is preparing to enter Amphoreus...
