ch: 翁法罗斯研究员
en: Amphoreus Researcher

ch: 翁法罗斯批评家
en: Amphoreus Critic

ch: 奥赫玛的信仰中心和政治枢纽，祭司们凝望着负世泰坦，元老们在圆形会场中辩论不休。
en: The spiritual and political center of Okhema, where priests gaze upon the Worldbearing Titan, and Elders debate endlessly in the circular assembly hall.

ch: 翁法罗斯某处偏僻的村庄，受永夜之帷庇护而遗落世外，麦田、风车与海滨共同守望着这隅宁静美好的时光。
en: A remote village in a certain part of Amphoreus. It is protected by the Veil of Evernight and was left behind outside of the rest of the world. Wheat fields, windmills, and the ocean watch over this tranquil and serene moment.

ch: 遭受「毁灭」的一击后，被巨树流淌出的金血腐蚀的神悟树庭。枝叶染上金色，炽烈的辉光灼烫刺目。
en: Struck by the power of "Destruction," the Grove of Epiphany was corroded by the golden blood seeping from the giant tree. Its branches and leaves turned gold, and a searing radiance now blazes with blinding intensity.

ch: 翁法罗斯（地名）
en: Amphoreus (Location)

ch: 翁法罗斯（地名）
en: Amphoreus (Location)

ch: 跃迁过后，车窗外仍然空无一物。黑天鹅动用忆者能力，为你揭示翁法罗斯的全景。
en: After the warp, there was still nothing outside the window. Black Swan activated her Memokeeper ability to reveal a panoramic view of Amphoreus for you.

ch: 你在大地兽背上被丹恒叫醒，奥赫玛正遭受纷争眷属的袭击。你与丹恒加入到保卫圣城的战斗中。
en: You woke up on the back of a dromas to Dan Heng's call. Okhema was under attack by Strife Titankins. You joined Dan Heng in the battle to defend the holy city.

ch: 战败的尼卡多利再度起身，不死的神躯恢复完好。尼卡多利调转竞技场上空的天谴之锋，使其直指远方的负世泰坦和奥赫玛。
en: The defeated Nikador rose again, his immortal divine body fully restored. Nikador redirected the Blade of Fury, hovering above the arena, pointing it straight at the distant Worldbearing Titan and Okhema.

ch: 万敌与众多纷争眷属血战，突然听到你的提醒。回身之际，白厄挥着大剑骤然袭来。
en: While Mydei engaged in intense combat with multiple Strife Titankins, your alert unexpectedly gained his notice. The moment he looked back, Phainon attacked with his greatsword.

ch: 盗火行者手持仪式剑，准备对遐蝶发动致命攻击。那刻夏以右臂穿透盗火行者的胸膛，发动炼金法阵重创盗火行者。
en: The Flame Reaver, wielding a ceremonial blade, prepared to deliver a fatal strike to Castorice. Anaxa pierced through the Flame Reaver's chest with his right arm, activating an alchemical matrix to gravely wound them.

ch: 那刻夏力战不敌，盗火行者向你们发起突袭。危急时刻，缇安拼尽全力打开「百界门」，与遐蝶合力将盗火行者传送走，旋即昏迷倒地。
en: Anaxa was overpowered in battle when the Flame Reaver launched a surprise attack on you all. In that critical moment, Trianne used every ounce of her strength to open the Century Gate and, together with Castorice, teleported the Flame Reaver away before fainting.

ch: 缇宝、缇安与缇宁在命运重渊遭遇盗火行者。危急时刻，缇安以最后的力量打开「百界门」牵制盗火行者，并将缇宝和缇宁传送走。
en: Tribbie, Trianne, and Trinnon encountered the Flame Reaver in the Abyss of Fate. In a desperate moment, Trianne used her last bit of strength to open the Century Gate to hold off the Flame Reaver, teleporting Tribbie and Trinnon to safety.

ch: 那刻夏与盗火行者在悬锋竞技场缠斗。在迷迷和缇宝的能力作用下，在场众人被传送到过去的悬锋城。你与白厄加入战斗。
en: Anaxa and the Flame Reaver were locked in combat at the Kremnos Arena. Under the influence of Mem and Tribbie's powers, everyone present was teleported to Castrum Kremnos of the past. You and Phainon joined the battle.

ch: 那刻夏以炼金术将「岁月」火种自盗火行者的仪式剑中取出，缇宝随即带大家返回当下。盗火行者欲从往昔中挣脱，万敌赶到支援战斗。
en: Anaxa used alchemy to extract the Coreflame of Time from the Flame Reaver's ceremonial blade, and Tribbie immediately returned everyone to the present. As the Flame Reaver fought to escape the past, Mydei arrived as reinforcement.

ch: 万敌发动「纷争」权能，以血晶汇聚成巨大的标枪，将盗火行者及其分身尽数摧没。自尼卡多利死后，悬锋城见证新神登基。
en: Mydei unleashed the power of Strife, gathering blood crystals to form a massive spear that obliterated the Flame Reaver and all their duplicates. After Nikador's death, Castrum Kremnos beheld the ascension of a new god.

ch: 在赛飞儿失去硬币的瞬间，盗火行者将其重创，并从赛飞儿体内剥离出火种。然而「火种」再度化为陶罐，赛飞儿的诡计得逞。
en: The moment Cipher lost the coin, the Flame Reaver struck, ripping the Coreflame from her body. But the Coreflame turned back into a dolium, and Cipher's trick succeeded.

ch: 黎明机器熄灭，奥赫玛陷入末日永夜。「谎言总是谎言，只是某些时候，它可以比坦诚高贵。」
en: The Dawn Device went dark, and Okhema sank into apocalyptic Evernight. "Lies are always but lies... But sometimes... But you can make them more beautiful than the truth."

ch: 盗火行者降临奥赫玛，万敌与遐蝶负责断后拖延。缇宝为你们打开「百界门」，你与白厄、丹恒藉此离开此地。
en: The Flame Reaver descended upon Okhema. Mydei and Castorice held the rear to buy time. Tribbie opened the Century Gate, and you, Phainon, and Dan Heng escaped through it.

ch: 万敌背后负创而死，缇宁耗尽自身力量，赛飞儿长眠于冥流浅滩，丹恒全力阻止盗火行者。「众人将与一人离别，惟其人将觐见奇迹。」
en: Mydei died with wounds on his back. Trinnon used up all her strength. Cipher lay still on the Stream of Souls. Dan Heng gave everything he had to stop the Flame Reaver. "All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle."

ch: 盗火行者踏入创世涡心，将来古士的头颅斩下。你与白厄做好战斗准备，为「再创世」扫清阻碍。
en: The Flame Reaver entered the Vortex of Genesis and severed Lygus's head. You and Phainon prepared for battle and cleared the path for the Era Nova.

ch: 白厄斩落盗火行者的面具，却发现面具之下是与白厄无异的脸庞，只是如同破碎的雕像。
en: Phainon struck off the Flame Reaver's mask and saw a face just like his own beneath it, cracked like a shattered statue.

ch: 盗火行者的胸膛被「侵晨」刺穿，他示意白厄用仪式剑处决自己。「何不…让愤怒…焚化命运？」
en: Dawnmaker pierced the Flame Reaver's chest. He signaled for Phainon to finish him with the ceremonial blade. "Why not... let wrath... incinerate fate...?"

ch: 白厄以仪式剑处决盗火行者，取得卡厄斯兰那的全部记忆。白厄受到纳努克的瞥视。
en: Phainon executed the Flame Reaver with the ceremonial blade and obtained the full Remembrance of Khaslana. He came under Nanook's gaze.

ch: 为抹除翁法罗斯的「岁月」，白厄不得不杀死昔涟。白厄带上仪式剑重返时间的起点，自此踏上永劫回归。
en: To erase the "Time" of Amphoreus, Phainon was forced to kill Cyrene. With the ceremonial blade in hand, he returned to the origin of time and began his journey of Eternal Recurrence.

ch: 你自坠落中惊醒，发现自己身处哀丽秘榭的麦田中。昔涟对你回眸微笑：「这是命运的邂逅吗，还是…久别重逢呢？」
en: You woke from the fall and found yourself in the wheat fields of Aedes Elysiae. Cyrene turned to you with a smile. "Is this a meeting ordained by fate, or... a long-overdue reunion?"

ch: 光、天空、大海、星辰、种子、花、飞鸟、希望、爱。这些美好的词汇，是我对世界最初的想象。一直以来，我用它们讲述翁法罗斯的故事。现在，这是最后一个，关于「明天」的故事……献给你的故事。
en: Light, sky, sea, stars, seeds, flowers, birds, hope, and love. Such words of beauty were how I first imagined the world. For as long as I can remember, I've used them to tell the stories of Amphoreus. And now, this is the last one... a story about "tomorrow," dedicated to you.

ch: 你与丹恒击退「纷争」眷属，被奥赫玛市民当作是来自异邦的黄金裔。缇宝再次发动「欧洛尼斯祷言」，将阻塞城区干道的城柱复原。
en: You and Dan Heng drove back the Strife Titankin, which led Okhema's citizens to mistake you for Chrysos Heirs from the outlands. Tribbie again used Oronyx's Prayer to fix the fallen pillars blocking the main road.

ch: <color=#f29e38ff>阿格莱雅</color>将你与丹恒奉为圣城的贵客，你得知她以指尖金线感知世界，而非双目。方才所击败的只是尼卡多利的分身，阿格莱雅派缇安尾随逃亡的「纷争」眷属，以追踪<color=#f29e38ff>尼卡多利真身</color>的藏匿之处。阿格莱雅答应为你解答翁法罗斯的一切。
en: <color=#f29e38ff>Aglaea</color> treated you and Dan Heng as esteemed guests of the holy city. You discovered she perceived the world through golden threads at her fingertips, not with her eyes. You had only defeated a manifestation of Nikador. Aglaea sent Trianne to follow the escaping Strife Titankins to find <color=#f29e38ff>Nikador's true form</color>. Aglaea promised to reveal everything about Amphoreus to you.

ch: 通过四问，阿格莱雅尝试探明你们来到翁法罗斯、援助奥赫玛的意图，以及你的力量是否会对奥赫玛、对逐火之旅造成威胁。
en: With four questions, Aglaea tried to figure out why you came to Amphoreus and helped Okhema, and whether your power might endanger Okhema or the Flame-Chase Journey.

ch: 不死的尼卡多利汇聚战魂，意图挥动「天谴之锋」。万敌舍身与之缠斗，让你与白厄去寻找破解尼卡多利不死之躯的方法。
en: The immortal Nikador collected the spirits of warriors, getting ready to use the Blade of Fury. Mydei put his life on the line to fight Nikador, buying you and Phainon time to find a way to destroy Nikador's immortal body.

ch: 在迷迷能力的作用下，你与遐蝶看到过去鼎盛时期的悬锋城。为确定当下时代，你们决定在外围调查一番。
en: Thanks to Mem's powers, you and Castorice witnessed a vision of Castrum Kremnos in its golden age. To confirm the timeline, you decided to explore the outskirts and investigate further.

ch: 你们遭遇「纷争」的化身，得知白厄在试炼中战败身陨。为争夺白厄的灵魂，万敌与泰坦对峙，其与「纷争」的旧怨被揭开：万敌母亲为保护其子而与悬锋先王决死角斗，而后万敌弑父夺得王权却放弃悬锋王位。「纷争」泰坦讥讽万敌逃避宿命，预言其弑神之后必将登神。
en: You encountered the embodiment of Strife and learned that Phainon had been defeated and perished within the trial. To reclaim his soul, Mydei faced off against the Titan. With that, their long-buried grudge came to light: Mydei's mother had once battled Kremnos' old king to the death to protect her son. Later, Mydei slew his father to seize the crown, only to abandon the throne. The Strife Titan mocked him for fleeing his fate, proclaiming that after slaying a god, he, too, would ascend and become one.

ch: 白厄与万敌谈论在「纷争」试炼中的见闻。白厄遭遇毁灭哀丽秘榭、杀死<color=#f29e38ff>昔涟</color>的凶手，与之交战，并记下对方的面具、巨剑与黑色斗篷。
en: Phainon and Mydei exchanged stories from their experiences in the trial of "Strife". Phainon had confronted the one who annihilated the Aedes Elysiae, also the killer of <color=#f29e38ff>Cyrene</color>. As they clashed, he noted that person's mask, greatsword, and black cloak.

ch: 远征之前，白厄来到创世涡心会见万敌。万敌讲述了「开山者」吉奥刻勒斯的故事，下定决心采取行动，背负「纷争」的命运。万敌向白厄透露自己的弱点，如果有一天「纷争」再度站到逐火的对立面，记得从背后刺入他的<color=#f29e38ff>第十节胸椎</color>，这是唯一能杀死自己的方法。
en: Before the expedition, Phainon visited the Vortex of Genesis to meet with Mydei. Mydei spoke of the Mountainbreaker, Geocles, and affirmed his resolve to take action and shoulder the fate of Strife. Mydei revealed his weak point to Phainon, instructing that should "Strife" ever oppose the Flame-Chase again, he must strike from behind. Target the <color=#f29e38ff>tenth thoracic vertebra</color>, for that was the only way to kill him.

ch: 克拉特鲁斯与盗火行者对峙，对方嗤笑其不堪一击。克拉特鲁斯仍然举盾，誓以悬锋勇士之名保护缇安，高呼「宁战死，毋荣归」。
en: Krateros engaged in a standoff with the Flame Reaver, who mocked his weakness. Krateros raised his shield anyway, proclaiming, "Valorous Death Before Glorious Return." On his honor as a Kremnoan warrior, he swore to protect Trianne.

ch: 克拉特鲁斯希望继承「纷争」的万敌带领族人还乡，但万敌选择卸下「王」的名号。他以悬锋城末代僭主的身份，宣告悬锋王朝终结。
en: Mydei assumed the divinity of "Strife," and Krateros hoped he could finally lead their people home. However, Mydei instead renounced his title as "king." As the last King of Castrum Kremnos, he declared an end to the Kremnoan dynasty.

ch: 在最后的送别，白厄感谢万敌帮助打败盗火行者。万敌则认为战斗还未结束，劝白厄向前看，看向等待被拯救的一整个世界。
en: In their final farewell, Phainon thanked Mydei for helping him defeat his archenemy, the Flame Reaver. Mydei warned him that the battle was far from over. He advised Phainon to look forward, and remember that there was a whole world behind him waiting to be saved.

ch: 遐蝶预感这份礼物会成为拯救你生命的关键，缇安欣慰地与你们道别。行至冥流终点，万敌必须于此折返凡间。你与遐蝶行向炼金法阵。
en: Castorice felt that Trianne's gift would be key to saving your life. Trianne bade farewell to everyone, telling you all to keep smiling and to carry on bravely. Having reached the end of the Stream of Souls, Mydei was forced to turn back and find his way back to the realm of the living. Only you and Castorice remained as you approached the alchemical matrix.

ch: 即使灾厄三泰坦陨落，黑潮危机仍然存在，并有盗火行者觊觎众神的火种。奥赫玛之所以平和，是因为黄金裔们将灾厄挡在城墙之外。遍地虫豸的元老院为攫取权位，极力将奥赫玛推离逐火的事业。无论表决结果如何，黄金裔都会誓死捍卫奥赫玛，永不动摇。白厄如是说。
en: Even if the Three Titans of Calamity should fall, the black tide would not recede, and the Flame Reaver would continue to hunt down the Coreflames. Okhema could only enjoy peace because of the Chrysos Heirs shielding them from calamity. However, the Council of Elders, now infested with vermin and corrupted by power, wanted to push Okhema away from the Flame-Chase Journey. Phainon swore that, no matter the result of the vote, the Chrysos Heirs would remain Okhema's faithful guardians and pledge their lives to upholding the people's decision.

ch: 来古士称只要中止协助逐火之旅，他能将你与丹恒送离翁法罗斯。丹恒认为不能抛弃黄金裔们，与此同时，元老院的刺客们将丹恒包围。
en: Lygus stated that as long as you and Dan Heng stopped helping the Flame-Chase Journey, he could send you and Dan Heng away from Amphoreus. However, Dan Heng refused to abandon the Chrysos Heirs. At this moment, assassins from the Council of Elders surrounded Dan Heng.

ch: 赛飞儿揪出附着在巴特鲁斯身上的若虫。金丝向赛飞儿传递消息，称阿格莱雅即将离逝。黄金裔的使命需要赛飞儿，请尽快返回奥赫玛。
en: Cipher found the nymph attached to Bartholos. The golden threads informed Cipher that Aglaea was soon to perish. For the sake of the Chrysos Heirs' mission, Cipher was ordered to return to Okhema at once.

ch: 盗火行者现身，赛飞儿挑衅其无法飞上天空，只能在地面伺机抢夺火种。赛飞儿宣称刻法勒的火种就在自己身上，引诱盗火行者追逐。
en: The Flame Reaver appeared. Cipher taunted them, saying they couldn't reach the sky, but lurk on the ground and try to steal the Coreflame. Cipher claimed to carry the Coreflame of Kephale herself, luring Flame Reaver into the chase.

ch: 赛飞儿到达高塔顶端，再次与盗火行者遭遇。盗火行者重复念诵着「轮回」与「宿命」，赛飞儿发动「诡计」神力与盗火行者战斗、
en: Cipher reached the top of the tower and encountered the Flame Reaver once more, who chanted endlessly about "cycles" and "fate." Cipher unleashed her divine power of "Trickery" and charged into battle.

ch: 赛飞儿奄奄一息，向若虫表达对阿格莱雅的歉意。赛飞儿执意离开奥赫玛，是害怕自己「黎明永存」的谎言被阿格莱雅洞察而失效。
en: Barely clinging to life, Cipher apologized to the nymph for leaving Aglaea. She had fled Okhema because she feared Aglaea would see through her lie of "eternal dawn" and break its spell.

ch: 你看到自己与白厄并立，并作为他所憧憬的「救世主」引领其前进。<color=#f29e38ff>盗火行者</color>踏入创世涡心，他正是方才所观看无数记忆的主人。
en: You saw yourself standing beside Phainon as the "Deliverer" he dreamed of, and led him forward. Then, the <color=#f29e38ff>Flame Reaver</color> stepped into the Vortex of Genesis. They were the owner of the countless memories you'd just witnessed.

ch: 来古士揭露黄金裔实为「毁灭」的柴薪，翁法罗斯将化作<color=#f29e38ff>绝灭大君「铁墓」</color>摧毁宇宙。昔涟质疑其有所隐瞒，决定自我牺牲换来「记忆」瞥视，不断重置时间。白厄接过她的仪式剑，<color=#f29e38ff>承诺将背负所有火种，踏上永不终结的逐火之旅直到真正的救世主到来。</color>
en: Lygus showed that the Chrysos Heirs were in fact fuel and kindling for the Destruction, and Amphoreus would become the <color=#f29e38ff>Lord Ravager, Irontomb</color>, to destroy the universe. Cyrene rebuked him and suspected him of hiding certain facts. She decided to sacrifice herself to make the Remembrance gaze in this direction, thus allowing time to be continuously reset. Phainon took up her ceremonial blade and <color=#f29e38ff>vowed to carry all Coreflames, embarking on the Flame-Chase Journey without end, until the true Deliverer arrives.</color>

ch: 昔涟现身，揭穿忆者们营造的幻像，尝试阻止三月七通过记忆之门进入翁法罗斯。三月七顾及伙伴的安危，仍然选择进入翁法罗斯。
en: Cyrene appeared, shattering the illusions the Memokeepers had spun and trying to stop March 7th from crossing the Gate of Memory to enter Amphoreus. However, March 7th, who was concerned for her companions' safety, still chose to enter Amphoreus.

ch: 更多的假三月七出现，她们由几位忆者幻化而成。忆者们有办法将你送回翁法罗斯，代价是让你取回翁法罗斯「记忆」的起点，以此帮助忆庭掌握用「记忆」重建世界的能力。霎时，忆者们的身影被尽数抹去。形似三月七的少女来到你面前，称可以无条件送你回翁法罗斯。
en: More fake March 7ths appeared. They were disguises worn by Memokeepers. They offered a way to send you back to Amphoreus, at a cost of retrieving the starting point of Amphoreus's "memory" to help the Garden of Recollection gain the power to rebuild the world through the Remembrance. In an instant, the Memokeepers vanished without a trace. A girl resembling March 7th appeared before you, offering to return you to Amphoreus without condition.

ch: 进入翁法罗斯后，三月七以迷因状态走遍世界。为寻求保护你和丹恒的方法，三月七向长夜月献出她的全部记忆。
en: After entering Amphoreus, March 7th wandered the world in a memetic state. In search of a way to protect you and Dan Heng, March 7th offered all her memories to Evernight.

ch: 丹恒深入树庭。在白厄的倾力一击之下，「毁灭」已将忆潮彻底驱散。
en: Dan Heng ventured deeper into the Grove. Under Phainon's full-force strike, the Destruction had completely dispelled the memoria tide.

ch: 白厄的记忆苏醒，认为无名客们将为翁法罗斯带来真正的明天。白厄愿以「毁灭」向罪恶怒吼，为后世「开拓」黎明。
en: Phainon's memory awakened, believing that the Nameless would bring a true tomorrow to Amphoreus. Phainon vowed to roar against evil through Destruction, and to "trailblaze" a dawn for future generations.

ch: 哀丽秘榭的帷幕外，是不再有黑潮侵扰的新世界。三千万世的「记忆」改变了昔涟的模样，她询问你是否做好准备，去迎接世人的召唤。
en: Beyond the curtains of Aedes Elysiae lurked a new world, free from the black tide's torment. Thirty million cycles of Remembrance had changed Cyrene's appearance, and she asked if you're ready to answer the call of the world.

ch: 万敌将悬锋印戒交予你们，它最适合成为万敌「记忆」的质料。带上这枚印戒，用它开辟前路，便是与万敌同行。
en: Mydei entrusted the Signet of Kremnos to you, as it is most suitable to become the material for Mydei's "memory." To wear this signet and use it to forge your path onward is akin to walking alongside Mydei.

ch: 昔涟回到铁墓灭世的瞬间，创造「一页永恒」。原来当时瞥视翁法罗斯的并非浮黎，而是回望过去的昔涟自己。
en: Cyrene returned to the moment when Irontomb destroyed the world, and created An Eternal Page. It seemed Fuli hadn't been the one glancing at Amphoreus, but rather Cyrene looking back into the past.

ch: 姬子与螺丝咕姆谈及「翁法罗斯」，因得知其受到智识命途影响，而求助于黑塔。以此为契机遇见了<color=#f29e38ff>停云</color>，并将护送她还乡。
en: Himeko and Screwllum talked about "Amphoreus." As Himeko knew the location was influenced by the Path of Erudition, she sought help from Herta. That was how she encountered <color=#f29e38ff>Tingyun</color> and ended up escorting Tingyun home.

ch: 你与黑天鹅交谈，得知她已知晓列车的下一站是其所提议的翁法罗斯。她希望此次开拓之旅能使翁法罗斯的「记忆」重见天日。
en: During your talk with Black Swan, you discovered she already knew the Express's next stop was her recommendation, Amphoreus. She hoped this trailblazing expedition would uncover the forgotten memories of Amphoreus.

ch: 你与丹恒尝试追踪未知生物。丹恒提醒你做好最坏的打算，从破坏车厢的那一击来看，翁法罗斯本地居民的实力不容小觑。
en: You and Dan Heng tried to follow the unknown creature. Dan Heng advised you to be prepared for trouble, since whatever damaged the train car clearly showed Amphoreus's locals were dangerously powerful.

ch: 你与丹恒追上白厄，得知率军进攻圣城的「纷争」泰坦尼卡多利正是「负世」泰坦刻法勒的死敌。你与丹恒决定加入保卫圣城的战斗。
en: When you and Dan Heng found Phainon, he told you that Nikador, the Strife Titan leading the attack on the holy city, was the nemesis of Kephale, the Worldbearing Titan. You and Dan Heng chose to help defend Okhema.

ch: 你们遇到一群拒绝撤离的市民。市民们坚信在刻法勒的威光照拂下，英雄们会守护奥赫玛。为保护市民，你们与「纷争」眷属开战。
en: You ran into a group of citizens who refused to evacuate, confident that heroes blessed by Kephale would protect Okhema. To protect these citizens, you engaged in battle against the Strife Titankins.

ch: <color=#f29e38ff>万敌</color>认为你与丹恒是圣城的外来者，劝你们别太信任白厄。在哈托努斯的斡旋下，内讧暂得避免。你与丹恒、白厄前去迎战尼卡多利。
en: <color=#f29e38ff>Mydei</color> treated you and Dan Heng as strangers to the holy city and cautioned you against trusting Phainon completely. Chartonus stepped in to prevent conflict among you. You, Dan Heng, and Phainon then left to confront Nikador.

ch: 阿格莱雅请你们进入浴池，称浴池中的灵水是「海洋」泰坦的馈赠，并邀请你聆听浴场精灵所讲述的翁法罗斯历史。
en: Aglaea invited you to step into the bath, telling you the spirit water was a gift from the Ocean Titan. She invited you to listen to the bath sprite tell the story of Amphoreus.

ch: 你闭上双眼，沉浸在浴池中，让暖流拥抱你。灵水会为你诠释，翁法罗斯的前世今生。
en: You closed your eyes and felt the warm ripples of water embrace you. The spirit water began to show you Amphoreus's distant and recent past.

ch: 在灵水的叙述中，你得知翁法罗斯有十二位泰坦。三位编织法则，三位支撑天地，三位捏造生命，三位引发灾难。泰坦争斗不休，世间生灵涂炭。直到一道神谕降临翁法罗斯——召集能够挑战十二位泰坦的<color=#f29e38ff>黄金裔</color>，重新点亮它们的<color=#f29e38ff>「火种」</color>，世界就能回归和平。
en: The spirit water revealed that Amphoreus had twelve Titans. Three wove fate, three held up the sky and earth, three created life, and three brought disaster. These Titans constantly fought, causing endless suffering. Then a prophecy appeared, calling for <color=#f29e38ff>Chrysos Heirs</color> who could challenge the twelve Titans, rekindle their <color=#f29e38ff>Coreflames</color>, and restore peace to the world.

ch: 阿格莱雅用探听谎言的金线与你相连。从阿格莱雅的叙述中，你得知翁法罗斯面临着原因未知的黑潮威胁，众黄金裔正致力于一场击败泰坦、归还火种的<color=#f29e38ff>逐火之旅</color>，藉此实现<color=#f29e38ff>再创世</color>的伟业。她要求你作出承诺，不向市民透露<color=#f29e38ff>「天外之界」</color>的存在。
en: Aglaea connected lie-detecting golden threads to you. She explained that Amphoreus was threatened by a mysterious black tide, and the Chrysos Heirs were on a <color=#f29e38ff>Flame-Chase Journey</color> to defeat the Titans, return their Coreflames, and bring about the <color=#f29e38ff>Era Nova</color>. She made you promise not to tell citizens about <color=#f29e38ff>the world beyond the sky</color>.

ch: 你与丹恒会合，向他传递了先前与阿格莱雅会谈的情报与承诺。你们决定在「圣城」奥赫玛四下看看，向当地人了解信息。
en: You met up with Dan Heng again and told him about what you learned and promised during your meeting with Aglaea. You both decided to explore the holy city of Okhema and talk to locals for more information.

ch: 在当地公民的热心帮助下，你与丹恒的通信石板连接上奥赫玛的<color=#f29e38ff>万帷网</color>，并且成功加入「粉霞天女」讨论组。
en: With some helpful locals' assistance, you and Dan Heng got your teleslate connected to Okhema's <color=#f29e38ff>World Wound Web</color> and managed to join the Rosy Celestial Maiden Discussion Group.

ch: 在万敌的威胁下，真言狮口终于肯配合你们平息关于「粉霞天女」的流言。万敌劝你们自求多福，祈祷这出闹剧还没传到阿格莱雅耳中。
en: Under Mydei's threats, the Verax Leo finally agreed to help silence the rumors about the Rosy Celestial Maiden. Mydei told you to pray for the best and hope this farce has not reached the ears of Aglaea.

ch: 从阿格莱雅与缇宝的对话中，你得知缇安正在追踪尼卡多利所在的悬锋城。阿格莱雅带领你与丹恒去看赠予你们的谢礼。
en: From Aglaea and Tribbie's conversation, you learned Trianne was tracking down Nikador at Castrum Kremnos. Aglaea then took you and Dan Heng to see a gift she'd prepared for you.

ch: 你得知白厄是受遐蝶之托前来阻止阿格莱雅。在创世涡心，你看到六颗已被点亮的火种。归还火种的黄金裔会成为对应的<color=#f29e38ff>半神</color>，代行泰坦责任，填补神职空缺。阿格莱雅与缇宝是如今圣城中唯二的半神，也是逐火之旅的重启者。在介绍完毕后，白厄提议你们聆听星宿之声。
en: You found out Phainon came because Castorice asked him to stop Aglaea. At the Vortex of Genesis, you saw six Coreflames that had already been lit. When Chrysos Heirs returns Coreflames, they become <color=#f29e38ff>demigods</color>, taking over the Titans' duties and filling their vacant seats. Aglaea and Tribbie were the only two demigods in Okhema and had started the Flame-Chase Journey again. After explaining all this, Phainon suggested listening to the Voice of Constellation.

ch: 你与丹恒在浴场与众黄金裔会合。在讨伐尼卡多利的战前动员中，你与白厄、万敌被确定为出征人选，缇安会打开通往悬锋城的大门。
en: You met the Chrysos Heirs at the baths. As they prepared to fight Nikador, they chose you, Phainon, and Mydei for the mission, with Trianne opening the way to Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 缇安为你们打开「百界门」，创造出去往悬锋城的途径。临出发时，丹恒将三月七的相机交给你，嘱咐你保护好自己，等你回来。
en: Trianne opened the Century Gate, making a path to Castrum Kremnos. Before you left, Dan Heng handed you March 7th's camera and told you to take care of yourself and return safely.

ch: 万敌指引你看向大门，从那里走进去，就是卫城。
en: Mydei pointed out the main gate and told you the acropolis was just beyond it.

ch: 白厄提议与万敌比试一番，看谁能干掉更多「纷争」眷属，赌注是给尼卡多利的最后一击。万敌应允，让你与白厄组队与他较量。
en: Phainon suggested a contest with Mydei to see who could kill more Strife Titankins, with the winner getting to land the final blow on Nikador. Mydei agreed and let you team up with Phainon against him.

ch: 战斗结束后，你与白厄收集用于计数的徽记。你得知白厄与万敌是亦敌亦友的关系，把万敌支开是为了让他得以抒发故地重返的乡愁。
en: After defeating the enemies, you and Phainon picked up crests to count your victories. Phainon told you that he and Mydei shared a complicated relationship as both friends and foes. He explained he'd sent Mydei off alone so he could deal with his feelings about returning to his former home.

ch: 白厄一侧的落雷停止后，你们发现万敌正迎着落雷奔跑。
en: When the lightning bolts stopped on Phainon's side, you saw Mydei running straight through the bolts without stopping.

ch: 你与白厄捡到一块写着悬锋城古语的石板，暂时无法释读。你们决定与万敌会合之后，把石板交给他看。
en: You and Phainon found a stone tablet with ancient Kremnoan writing that you couldn't read. You decided to show it to Mydei when you met up with him again.

ch: 你与白厄遭遇大群敌人，觉得这是超过万敌的好机会。只要通过这条路，你们就能抵达悬锋斗技场。
en: You and Phainon ran into a bunch of enemies and saw a chance to beat Mydei's score. This path would take you to the Kremnos Arena.

ch: 你与白厄在竞技场与万敌会合，然而没有发现尼卡多利的身影。万敌猜测尼卡多利藏身于铸魂区，出发之前，你考虑要不要在此拍张照。
en: You and Phainon found Mydei at the arena, but no sign of Nikador. Mydei thought Nikador might be hiding in the Soul-Forging Zone. Before leaving, you thought about taking a photo.

ch: 你遇到三条道路，主路通往尼卡多利潜在的藏身处，路障背后可能是悬锋城藏宝室，以及一个未知通路的出口。白厄交由你来定夺。
en: You found three paths: the main one toward Nikador's possible hiding spot, a blocked one that might lead to Castrum Kremnos's treasure vault, and one leading to an unknown area. Phainon let you decide which way to go.

ch: 在与万敌会合后，他向你们展示了三十枚悬锋徽记。靠一场比试决定荣耀的归属，不是敬神的表现，白厄与万敌选择联手击败尼卡多利。
en: When you met up with Mydei, he showed you his thirty Kremnos crests. Phainon and Mydei agreed that deciding glory with just one contest wasn't respectful to the gods, so they decided to work together against Nikador.

ch: 你与白厄、万敌遇到「黄金狮首」，得知尼卡多利正酝酿着某个阴谋。狮首恳请万敌终结尼卡多利，让「纷争」泰坦以战士的身份死去。
en: You, Phainon, and Mydei found a Chryseus Leo that told you Nikador was planning something sinister. It begged Mydei to kill Nikador so that the Strife Titan could die as a warrior should.

ch: 你与白厄、万敌进入「雕琢区」。「纷争」的腐蚀使白厄思绪杂乱，他在燥热中努力集中精神。
en: You went into the Sculpting Zone with Phainon and Mydei. Strife's corruption scrambled Phainon's thoughts, and he had trouble focusing while suffering the intense heat.

ch: 在白厄与万敌的交谈中，你得知尼卡多利会为自己打造半身以苟延残喘，与此同时万敌身为黄金裔的天赐正是「拒绝死亡」。
en: As Phainon and Mydei talked, you learned Nikador would make a double of himself to survive, while Mydei's divine gift as a Chrysos Heir was "defying death."

ch: 在当下突如其来的攻击后，白厄觉得「纷争」眷属的行为毫无逻辑可言。万敌则认为这一切的疯狂即将结束，只要击败尼卡多利。
en: After a surprise attack, Phainon said the Strife Titankins were acting completely irrationally. Mydei believed they could end all this madness by defeating Nikador.

ch: 在缇安的带领下，你与白厄回到奥赫玛。缇安回去休息，而你与白厄前去寻找阿格莱雅商量对策。
en: Trianne led you and Phainon back to Okhema. She went to get some rest, while you and Phainon looked for Aglaea to plan your next move.

ch: 借助「百界门」抵达命运重渊后，缇宝将雅努斯祭司符节交给你，嘱咐你们小心神殿中残余的法界。随后缇宝返回奥赫玛协助阿格莱雅。
en: When you reached the Abyss of Fate through the Century Gate, Tribbie handed you the Janus Priest's Talisman and warned you about remaining magical barriers in the temple. She then went back to Okhema to help Aglaea.

ch: 欧洛尼斯拒绝这样的配平结果，天秤的一端再度沉坠。左侧托盘放置着翁法罗斯的命运，你们需要找到<color=#f29e38ff>「比世界的命运更为沉重之物」</color>。
en: Oronyx didn't accept your balancing attempt, and one side of the scales sank again. The left tray contained Amphoreus's fate, and you had to find <color=#f29e38ff>"what weighs more than the fate of the world"</color>.

ch: 丹恒认为「世界的命运」对翁法罗斯人而言过于沉重，但你们还有天外的「同伴」。丹恒将相机放上托盘，天秤倾倒，你们通过了考验。
en: Dan Heng realized that while "the fate of the world" might overwhelm Amphoreus people, you had "companions" from beyond the sky. He placed the camera on the scale, which finally tilted, letting you pass the test.

ch: 你与大工匠哈托努斯交谈。遐蝶请求哈托努斯回忆为悬锋城打造圣器的故事，但哈托努斯表示无法记清。好在迷迷有找回记忆的方法。
en: You talked to Grand Craftsman Chartonus. Castorice asked him to tell the story of making a holy vessel for Castrum Kremnos, but Chartonus couldn't remember it well. Thankfully, Mem could help recover those memories.

ch: 阿格莱雅将意欲逃跑的贼灵捉回，没收了贼灵在奥赫玛窃取的赃物。阿格莱雅在释放贼灵时再次强调，别忘了给赛飞儿递话。
en: When the Spirithief attempted to flee, Aglaea seized them and confiscated the stolen goods they pilfered from Okhema. Before releasing them, she once again reminded them not to forget her message for Cipher.

ch: 你们听到悬锋族人谈论王欧利庞与王储迈德漠斯的分道扬镳。遐蝶说，万敌曾带领一部分族人离开悬锋城，而欧利庞最终被万敌杀死。
en: You caught whispers among the Kremnoans that King Eurypon and crown prince Mydeimos have gone their separate ways. Castorice explained that Mydei had once led a faction of his people away from Castrum Kremnos. And in the end, Eurypon fell by Mydei's hand.

ch: 通路打开后，遐蝶想向格奈乌斯表明目的。格奈乌斯无意过问，只希望你们不要妨碍到他的意图——粉碎盘踞在悬锋城深处的愚蠢。
en: Once the path forward opened, Castorice tried to explain your purpose to Gnaeus, but he had no interest in your intentions. All he asked was that you not stand in his way as he eradicated the deeply entrenched roots of foolishness within Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 你们与黄金狮首对话。黄金狮首称欧利庞正密谋着亵渎尼卡多利神性的计划，恳请你们回应召唤，成为勇士，拯救悬锋城。
en: You spoke with the Chryseus Leo. It claimed that Eurypon was scheming a blasphemous plan to defile Nikador's divinity, and pleaded with you to answer the call of becoming warriors and to save Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 遐蝶与未安歇的灵魂对话，得知悬锋祭司正试图封存泰坦的灵魂，他们惧怕失去信仰与指引，所用的容器正是由哈托努斯打造。
en: Castorice spoke with the restless spirit and learned that the priests of Kremnos, terrified of losing their faith and guidance, were attempting to seal away the Titan's soul with the vessel forged by Chartonus.

ch: 切换时空后，格奈乌斯看到了未来昏暗破败的悬锋城。他对此感到不可思议，同时也更坚定终结这场荒谬的决心。
en: While shifting through time, Gnaeus caught a glimpse of Castrum Kremnos' ruined and desolate future. The sight left him shaken, but more determined than ever to bring this farce to its end.

ch: 白厄携火种与阿格莱雅、缇宝会合。阿格莱雅希望白厄能填补「纷争」的空缺，白厄愿为此做出牺牲，但他认为万敌是更合适的人选。
en: Phainon reunited with Aglaea and Tribbie, carrying the Coreflame. Aglaea hoped Phainon would take on the mantle of Strife. Phainon was willing to make that sacrifice, but believed Mydei was the one truly fit for it.

ch: 白厄与遐蝶再次谈论<color=#f29e38ff>「比世界的命运更沉重之物」</color>，称自己仍会不时想起故乡哀丽秘榭被摧毁时的情景。遐蝶认为这个谜题对白厄太过残酷，她希望白厄保持平和的心态，相信其能通过「纷争」火种的试炼。
en: Phainon and Castorice once again spoke of <color=#f29e38ff>"the thing heavier than the fate of the world."</color> Phainon admitted he still often recalled the day his hometown Aedes Elysiae was destroyed. Castorice believed this riddle was far too cruel for him. She urged Phainon to keep his heart calm, and trusted in his ability to pass the trial of the Coreflame of Strife.

ch: 年幼的白厄在占卜中抽到名为「救世主」的神谕牌，但他不愿当什么大英雄，只想守护他所在的村庄。直到黑潮夺去哀丽秘榭的一切。
en: When he was a child, Phainon once drew the "Deliverer" Prophecy Card. But he never wanted to be some grand hero, only to protect his village. That was before the black tide swallowed Aedes Elysiae, and left nothing behind.

ch: 大黑塔接见到访的瓦尔特与星期日，得知两位为<color=#f29e38ff>「翁法罗斯」</color>而来。瓦尔特向大黑塔解释了列车组面临的困境，请求天才的智慧援助。
en: The Herta turned her attention to the arriving guests, Welt and Sunday, who had come seeking her counsel regarding the <color=#f29e38ff>Amphoreus</color>. Welt explained the Express Crew's dire situation, asking for the guidance of genius.

ch: 缇宁探听到，白厄在试炼中遇到了危险。阿格莱雅启动备用计划，你与万敌、丹恒介入试炼拯救白厄，遐蝶在涡心负责接应。
en: Trinnon had detected that Phainon was in danger within the trial. Aglaea activated plan B. You, Mydei, and Dan Heng entered the trial to rescue Phainon, while Castorice prepared for recovery at the Vortex.

ch: 你与丹恒总结翁法罗斯的现状，认为世界的「封闭」一定另有隐情。黑潮未必与星核有关，你们需要深入调查这种神秘的灾厄现象。
en: You and Dan Heng reviewed the current state of Amphoreus, suspecting that the world's "lockdown" concealed a deeper secret. The black tide may not be tied to Stellaron, and further investigation was needed.

ch: 你进入试炼，发现自己身处尸骸遍地的奥赫玛，万敌在你身后出现，提醒你这只是试炼的影子。丹恒似乎不在附近，你与万敌结伴行动。
en: Within the trial, you found yourself amidst Okhema's corpse-strewn fields. Mydei appeared behind you, reminding you this was merely a shadow of the trial. Dan Heng nowhere to be seen, you and Mydei pressed forward together.

ch: 你与万敌看到奥赫玛士兵正与悬锋难民交战，落单的帕狄卡斯力战不敌而亡。疯狂的奥赫玛士兵并未收手，转而向你和万敌发动攻击。
en: You witnessed Okhema's soldiers clashing with Kremnos refugees. Perdikkas, isolated and overwhelmed, fell in battle. Yet the maddened Okhema soldiers didn't relent, turning their blades toward you and Mydei.

ch: 万敌认识被击败的奥赫玛士兵，感慨其在「纷争」的试炼中被杀意捏造成这般扭曲模样。万敌看了一眼倒下的帕狄卡斯，但并未言语。
en: Mydei recognized the fallen soldiers, lamenting how killing intent had warped them into these twisted forms in the trial of Strife. He glanced briefly at Perdikkas's body, but said nothing.

ch: 你与万敌遇到大工匠哈托努斯。哈托努斯将悬锋印戒扔给万敌，令其离开奥赫玛。一道狭长的阴影破空而来，击散哈托努斯的幻影。
en: You and Mydei encountered the Grand Craftsman Chartonus, who tossed the Signet of Kremnos to Mydei, urging him to leave Okhema. Just then, a narrow shadow tore through the sky, shattering the illusion of Chartonus in an instant.

ch: 万敌在高温浴池遇到三名悬锋幼童，向他们打听克拉特鲁斯的去向。孩子们为万敌指路，期待万敌在接过「纷争」火种后带领族人还乡。
en: At the hot bath, Mydei met three Kremnoan children. He asked them about Krateros's whereabouts. The children eagerly gave directions, hoping Mydei would lead their people home once he bore the Coreflame of "Strife."

ch: 万敌在真言狮口处找到被两名奥赫玛卫兵监视的克拉特鲁斯，称呼其为「吾师」，邀请克拉特鲁斯换个地方说话。
en: At the Verax Leo, Mydei found Krateros, who was under watch by two Okhema guards. Mydei addressed him as his "teacher," and invited him to speak elsewhere.

ch: 万敌与克拉特鲁斯联手解决元老院的眼线，随后讨论悬锋族人的未来。克拉特鲁斯渴望重建荣光，但万敌认为这会将悬锋一族送上末路。
en: Having eliminated the Council's spies, Mydei and Krateros debated the future of the Kremnoans. While Krateros hungers to restore their former glory, Mydei warned this path would only lead their people to annihilation.

ch: 你们在城外大道遇到一位伤重昏迷的病人，风堇认出他身上由黑潮造成的伤痕。风堇请你们先行赶赴树庭，她将在安顿好伤者后赶来。
en: Outside the city, you encountered a gravely wounded and unconscious patient. Hyacine recognized the marks on his body as injuries caused by the black tide. She asked you to hurry to the Grove first, promising to follow after taking care of the patient.

ch: 黑潮蔓延的树庭的消息此前并不为你们所知。遐蝶勘察战斗痕迹，认为学者们付出巨大代价，挡住了怪物的第一波进攻。
en: Until now, you didn't know that the black tide had reached the Grove. Examining the battle's aftermath, Castorice concluded that the scholars had paid dearly to repel the first wave of monsters.

ch: 阿格莱雅与缇宝收到缇安传回的消息，得知黑潮已入侵树庭。她嘱咐你们，当务之急是尽快转移「理性」火种，以及确认<color=#f29e38ff>那刻夏</color>的下落。
en: Aglaea and Tribbie received Trianne's transmission, learning that the black tide had breached the Grove. Aglaea urged you to prioritize two objectives, which were swiftly evacuating the Coreflame of "Reason" and verifying <color=#f29e38ff>Anaxa</color>'s whereabouts.

ch: 你们调查发声的雕像，自称「卡吕普索」的魂灵从中飞出。她对树庭的情况了如指掌，并声称那刻夏尚未死灭，邀你们前去王座瞧瞧。
en: From the singing statue you examined emerged a spirit calling herself Calypso. Intimately familiar with the Grove, she insisted Anaxa still lived, bidding you come to the Throne to see for yourselves.

ch: 你调查水池，遐蝶称此处是树庭一切水流之源。你无法以常规方法灌满水池，只好去取「卡吕普索」所称的宝物。
en: You investigated the pool, and Castorice said it was the source of all water in the Grove. Unable to fill the pool through conventional means, you decided to go after the treasure Calypso mentioned.

ch: 你将「金枝誓言」的一瓣放入池中，成功启动水车。卡吕普索透露，需要你们扫除树庭的黑潮，为她夺回正身，她才能以真面目示人。
en: You placed a petal of the Golden Bough of Vows into the pool, successfully activating the water wheel. Calypso revealed that only by cleansing the black tide from the Grove and reclaiming her true form could she show you her real identity.

ch: 你奉上被余火点燃的「金枝誓言」，通路果然打开。卡吕普索与神识之蝶告别，遐蝶指出卡吕普索就是<color=#f29e38ff>瑟希斯</color>本尊。你们得知，有位黑衣剑士与黑潮一同袭击树庭，意欲夺取「理性」火种。瑟希斯不得已将自己的火种分作三份，分别藏在「金枝誓言」与墨涅塔的余火中。
en: You offered the Golden Bough of Vows kindled by the ember, and the path opened as expected. Calypso bid farewell to the Butterfly of Divine Mind. Castorice then revealed that Calypso was none other than <color=#f29e38ff>Cerces</color> herself. You learned that a black-robed swordsman had invaded the Grove alongside the black tide, seeking to seize the Coreflame of "Reason". To prevent this, Cerces had split her Coreflame into three parts — one in the Golden Bough of Vows, and another in Mnestia's ember.

ch: 遐蝶介绍说，那是「理性」泰坦瑟希斯的神躯。「最初的学者」塞勒苏斯于此建立神悟树庭，但此刻树庭中安静得出奇，仿若无人。
en: Castorice explained that the tree was the divine body of Cerces, the Reason Titan. Here, the First Scholar, Thalesus, established the Grove of Epiphany. But now, the place was eerily silent, as if abandoned.

ch: 阿格莱雅与缇宝看到倒下的白厄。万敌正以胜利者的姿态站在白厄身边，称自己又赢下一场角斗。阿格莱雅向万敌询问角斗内容。
en: Aglaea and Tribbie found Phainon collapsed on the ground. Mydei stood over him in triumph, declaring yet another duel won. Aglaea demanded of him the details of the duel.

ch: 万敌与白厄在浴场偶遇。在解决族人问题前，万敌不愿面对「纷争」的试炼。白厄提议进行一场竞赛，比谁能在超高温浴池里坚持更久。
en: As it turned out, Mydei and Phainon had run into each other at the baths. Still unwilling to face the trial of "Strife" before resolving issues with his people, Mydei accepted Phainon's challenge: a competition to see who could endure the hot bath the longest.

ch: 阿格莱雅阻止这场高温闹剧，白厄与万敌转而比试谁能护送更多晕倒的浴客离开。缇宝邀请风堇加入，和阿格莱雅一起去浴场放松一下。
en: Aglaea shut down this heated charade. So instead, Phainon and Mydei switched to a new contest of racing to escort as many fainting bathers as they could. Later, Tribbie invited Hyacine to join her and Aglaea to relax and enjoy the baths together.

ch: 万敌在试炼中见到在流亡岁月中拱卫自己的战友们，他们全都战死于悬锋孤军与奥赫玛联合之前。「纷争」带给他们荣耀，以及死亡。
en: Mydei's trial showed him visions of comrades who had shielded him through years of exile — all of whom perished before the Kremnoan Detachment joined forces with Okhema. To Mydei, Strife brought both glory and death.

ch: 万敌将「不死」视作诅咒。他担心带领族人还乡后，会重蹈「纷争」的黑暗与疯狂。缇宝紧急赶来，称缇宁被克拉特鲁斯掳走。
en: Mydei saw his "immortality" as a curse. Even if he led his people home, he feared they'd fall again into the same darkness and insanity thriving from Strife. Just then, Tribbie rushed in, claiming Trinnon had been taken by Krateros.

ch: 缇安使用「百界门」将你们传回奥赫玛。在面见阿格莱雅前，那刻夏要慰问在抗击黑潮中牺牲的学者家属，你与遐蝶陪其同去。
en: Trianne used the Century Gate to teleport you back to Okhema. Before meeting with Aglaea, Anaxa insisted on visiting the families of the scholars who perished fighting the black tide. You and Castorice accompanied him.

ch: 你们慰问库娜涅和阿塔卡玛的父亲。原本还担心女儿们在树庭闯祸的老者，在得知噩耗后，唯余震惊与轻微的啜泣。
en: You visited the father of Cynane and Artakama. The old man, who had originally worried about his daughters causing trouble in the Grove, was left only with stunned silence and quiet sobs upon hearing the tragic news.

ch: 你与丹恒汇总消息。丹恒称翁法罗斯的天空被「天空」泰坦艾格勒封锁，而风堇的先祖正是天空祭司，她或许能提供更多关于此的线索。
en: You regrouped with Dan Heng to consolidate information. He reported that the sky above Amphoreus was sealed by the Sky Titan Aquila, and that Hyacine's ancestor was once the Sky Priest. She may hold the key to further clues about this.

ch: 万敌回想起弑王之日，他率领悬锋孤军反攻悬锋城，用长枪贯穿欧利庞的胸膛。此举并非为加冕为王，而是带去命中注定的复仇。
en: Mydei recalled the day he slew the old king. He led the Kremnoan Detachment in a counterattack on Castrum Kremnos, and drove his spear through Eurypon's chest. It was not to seize the crown, but to deliver the vengeance written in fate.

ch: 万敌按克拉特鲁斯所说，来找哈托努斯，试图寻求建议。
en: Following Krateros's words, Mydei sought out Chartonus, hoping for some guidance.

ch: 哈托努斯将由其修复的悬锋印戒交与万敌，聆听其诉说面对试炼的踌躇。若能避免悬锋人重蹈血腥轮回，万敌愿意接受「纷争」的命运。
en: Chartonus offered him the repaired Signet of Kremnos, and listened intently as Mydei voiced his doubts about the trial. If there was a way to spare his people from reliving the bloodshed, then Mydei was ready to accept the Strife as his own destiny.

ch: 白厄向那刻夏询问关于黑袍剑士的消息。那刻夏将剑士的披风残片作为战利品送给白厄，白厄藉此确认其就是烧毁哀丽秘榭的凶手。
en: Phainon questioned Anaxa about the black-robed swordsman. Anaxa gifted him a torn scrap of the swordsman's cloak as a trophy. Thus, Phainon confirmed that person was the very one who had reduced Aedes Elysiae to ashes.

ch: 那刻夏猜测黑袍剑士的目标是猎取火种，将其称为「盗火行者」，并推测其下一处目标是欧洛尼斯。丹恒赶来，称缇宝在命运重渊失踪。
en: Anaxa speculated that the black-robed swordsman was after the Coreflames, dubbing them the Flame Reaver. He also suspected the Flame Reaver's next target would be Oronyx. Dan Heng arrived in haste, reporting that Tribbie had gone missing in the Abyss of Fate.

ch: 你与白厄等人赶到命运重渊，只找到昏迷的缇宝与缇宁。丹恒与风堇留下搜寻缇安，白厄带其余人返回圣城，商讨围猎盗火行者的计划。
en: You, Phainon, and the others rushed to the Abyss of Fate, only to find Tribbie and Trinnon unconscious on the ground. Dan Heng and Hyacine stayed behind to continue the search for Trianne, while Phainon led the others back to the holy city to plan a hunt for the Flame Reaver.

ch: 白厄提议借助你与迷迷的力量打开往日之门，引诱盗火行者深入。只要从其手中夺回「岁月」火种，盗火行者就会被封印在过去。
en: Phainon proposed using your and Mem's power to open a passage to the past, luring the Flame Reaver into it. Once the Coreflame of "Time" was reclaimed from the Flame Reaver's grasp, they would be sealed there forever.

ch: 阿格莱雅询问你对于围猎计划的看法。缇宝负责用「百界门」将你们送往战场，白厄会誓死保护你的安全，而万敌此刻正处理另一难题。
en: Aglaea asked for your opinion on the entrapment plan. Tribbie would use the Century Gate to send the team to the battlefield. Phainon swore to protect you with his life, while Mydei was dealing with another problem elsewhere.

ch: 你与白厄等人返回奥赫玛，公民们对「岁月」的陨落与「纷争」的归还议论纷纷。缇宁捎来消息，在山壑下发现了缇安与克拉特鲁斯。
en: You returned to Okhema with Phainon, where the citizens were discussing the fall of the Time Titan and the return of the Coreflame of "Strife." Trinnon brought news that Trianne's body was discovered at the bottom of the valley outside the temple, and that Krateros had been with her.

ch: 白厄向力竭的悬锋士兵询问战况，表明自己受阿格莱雅的命令来协助围猎盗火行者。悬锋士兵对此不屑一顾，坚信他们的王即将归来。
en: Phainon asked the weary Kremnoan soldiers about the situation. He said that the two of you were dispatched by Aglaea to help the soldiers entrap the Flame Reaver. However, believing that their king was soon to return, the soldiers paid him no heed.

ch: 万敌将悬锋印戒交给克拉特鲁斯，令其领导悬锋族人融入奥赫玛。而万敌将独自回到悬锋城，履行「纷争」神职，对抗吞噬世界的黑潮。
en: Mydei gave the Signet of Kremnos to Krateros, and instructed him to lead the Kremnoans to adapt to life in Okhema. As for Mydei, he returned alone to Castrum Kremnos to fulfill his divine duty of "Strife" by standing against the world-devouring black tide.

ch: 万敌与阿格莱雅道别，承诺会以「纷争」的力量抗击黑潮，为逐火之旅争取足够的时间。成为半神之后，阿格莱雅看到的预言是<color=#f29e38ff>「汝将最后一次沐浴，在温热耀眼的黄金中。」</color>，万敌则是<color=#f29e38ff>「终有一日，汝将背后负创而死。」</color>。
en: Mydei bade farewell to Aglaea, pledging to use the power of "Strife" to resist the black tide, buying the Chrysos Heirs time to complete their Flame-Chase Journey. After becoming a demigod, the prophecy that Aglaea saw told her: <color=#f29e38ff>"You shall have your final bath in warm and radiant gold."</color> For Mydei, his prophecy was: <color=#f29e38ff>"One day, you shall die with a wound in your back."</color>

ch: 万敌与缇宝道别，却在此遇到风堇。万敌相信风堇终将征服「天空」，并托她转述缇宝：只需来讯，天谴的锋刃便会指向奥赫玛的敌人。
en: After bidding farewell to Tribbie, Mydei encountered Hyacine. He believed that Hyacine would eventually conquer the Sky and asked her to relay a message to Tribbie: Just send the word, and the Blade of Fury shall point at Okhema's enemies.

ch: 万敌在城门遇到在此等待的白厄。二人身边聚集起前来送行的民众，白厄建议万敌聆听民众的欢送呼声。
en: At the city gates, Mydei found Phainon waiting for him, along with many citizens of Okhema who had come to see him off. Phainon encouraged Mydei to listen to the cheers of the people.

ch: 万敌看到先前遇见过的悬锋幼童。孩子们不再高呼「悬锋的王」，而将万敌称为「翁法罗斯的守护者」。
en: Mydei once again met the children of Kremnos he had seen before. They praised him, chanting "King of Kremnos" and calling Mydei the "Guardian of Amphoreus."

ch: 缇里西庇俄丝无从知晓当年是何人帮助自己。为了不忘初心，在她的记忆中，是未来的自己送其踏上遥远旅途。命运的箴言为缇里西庇俄丝揭示——<color=#f29e38ff>「汝将碎作千片，凋零在他乡的土壤。」</color>缇里西庇俄丝分裂为千名信使，将「再创世」的神谕传向翁法罗斯大地。
en: Tribios never knew who aided her in her escape. In order not to forget her beginnings, in her memory, it was a Tribios of the future who helped her and sent her on her long journey. Such was the maxim that unveiled Tribios's fate: <color=#f29e38ff>"You shall shatter into a thousand fragments and wither on the soil of foreign lands."</color> Tribios then split herself into a thousand messengers to spread the divine prophecy of Era Nova across the land of Amphoreus.

ch: 你与阿格莱雅谈论「岁月」的试炼。成为半神意味着你接过欧洛尼斯的神权，直至创世的终点。你相信迷迷的判断，下定决心接受试炼。
en: You spoke with Aglaea about Oronyx's trial. Becoming a demigod would mean taking on Oronyx's divinity and bearing the Time of Amphoreus until the end of Genesis. You trusted Mem's judgment and made up your mind to accept the trial.

ch: 欧洛尼斯的图腾虚位以待，若你已准备好成为翁法罗斯的支柱，便上前来。
en: Oronyx's vacant totem awaited you. If you had already made your preparations to become a pillar of Amphoreus, then all that remained was for you to step forward.

ch: 奥赫玛元老院的名誉元老、「神礼观众」来古士出面接见那刻夏，称其有能力掐断阿格莱雅对会面的探听。那刻夏则表示无需在意监视。
en: An honorary member of Okhema's Council of Elders, Lygus, the Theoros, came to meet Anaxa. He offered to prevent Aglaea from eavesdropping, but Anaxa assured him that there was no need to care about such surveillance.

ch: 那刻夏与书吏交谈，得知凯妮斯一派即将向逐火派发难。「纷争」火种归还后，凯妮斯声称奥赫玛以外大势已定，是时候清算阿格莱雅。
en: Anaxa talked to a young scribe. He learned that Caenis and her followers planned to oppose the Flame-Chase Journey. After the Coreflame of "Strife" had been returned, Caenis and the others began to claim that all was resolved beyond Okhema, with the only remaining menace now being Aglaea and her adherents.

ch: 风堇称黑潮对翁法罗斯的「光明」格外敏锐，自己身为天空祭司的赐福可能会吸引怪物。风堇将捡到的「天空」交给丹恒。
en: Hyacine explained that the black tide was remarkably quick to detect the light of Amphoreus, and as a bearer of the Sky Priest's blessings, she might have unknowingly called the monsters to her. Dan Heng handed her the scroll about the Sky that he picked up.

ch: 恩贝多克利斯为那刻夏揭露天空的虚假，支持他创立自己的学派。那刻夏接过老师对金血和灵魂的思考，誓要探明<color=#f29e38ff>「我们」究竟为何物</color>。
en: Empedocles revealed the nature of Amphoreus's false sky to Anaxa, encouraging him to establish his own school of thought. Anaxa inherited Empedocles's ideas on golden blood and the soul, and set out to seek an answer to the question: <color=#f29e38ff>"What exactly are 'we'?"</color>

ch: 你与白厄遇见克拉特鲁斯，他带领悬锋人来此牵制凯妮斯的手下。万敌传来消息，称盗火行者死灰复燃。议院传来嘘声，高呼「下台」。
en: You and Phainon met Krateros, and learned that he led some Kremnoans over to restrain Caenis's subordinates. Mydei also sent news, saying, "Watch out. The Flame Reaver is back." You heard cries from the stage, calling for the speaker to "Get off!" and "Scram!"

ch: 那刻夏得出结论——翁法罗斯的历史是一种「轮回」。背负火种的半神将在新世界成为泰坦，而方才所见正是刻法勒的前世记忆。依照玻吕茜亚的描述，「死亡」泰坦塞纳托斯位于已被淹没的<color=#f29e38ff>斯缇科西亚</color>。那刻夏把用自己心脏炼成的贤者之石交给遐蝶，以此助她探寻真相。
en: Anaxa posited that Amphoreus's history was cyclical in nature. Demigods who bore Coreflames would become the Titans of the new world, and the scenes they just witnessed were Kephale's own memories. According to Polyxia's description, Anaxa deduced that the Death Titan Thanatos dwelled in the flooded city of <color=#f29e38ff>Styxia</color>. Anaxa gave a Philosopher's Stone to Castorice, one transmuted from his own heart, to help her uncover the truth.

ch: 你与遐蝶围观路人的争吵。在交谈中，你得知遐蝶曾在哀地里亚担任「督战圣女」，为死囚、战俘与英雄们带去「仁慈的死亡」。
en: When walking with Castorice, you encountered some citizens of Okhema arguing. You learned from Castorice that she once served as Aidonia's Maiden of War, and was charged with granting "merciful deaths" to war captives, prisoners bound for execution, and heroes alike.

ch: 赛飞儿在冥流浅滩发现万敌的足迹。遐蝶认为万敌能帮助你们在死者的世界中辨认方向。为了渡过冥河，迷迷建议用「岁月」回溯河流。
en: Cipher had discovered traces of Mydei along the shores of the Stream of Souls. Castorice believed that finding him could aid in your search for Thanatos, as Mydei would be able to find his way even in the realm of the dead. To cross the River of Souls, Mem suggested using Oronyx's power to rewind time.

ch: 你们发现更多被打到的黑潮造物。如果赛飞儿所言属实，那么这些战斗痕迹或许是万敌所为。
en: You encountered some fallen Black Tide Creatures. If Cipher was to be believed, this was likely the handiwork of Mydei as he cut a path through his enemies.

ch: 灵魂球揭露出遐蝶初到奥赫玛的记忆。元老院让遐蝶加入阿格莱雅麾下，期待以滥施的处刑作为终结逐火之旅的理由，但夙谋终未得逞。
en: The spirit orb revealed Castorice's past, the days when she first arrived in Okhema. The Council of Elders placed Castorice under Aglaea's command. They wanted to wait for Aglaea to use Castorice's divine authority of "Death" callously, so they would have ample reason to terminate the Flame-Chase Journey. However, their plan never came to fruition.

ch: 你们在高塔上遇到缇安。万敌第一次在逆流而上时遇到亲友，而与你们不同的是，缇安自知无法回到大家身边。缇安有礼物要送给遐蝶。
en: You met Trianne on the tower. It was the first time Mydei had encountered a deceased friend on his way upstream in the River of Souls, the only difference being that, unlike Mydei, Trianne could not return to the world of the living with the rest of you. Trianne gave Castorice a gift.

ch: 公民们对白厄的登场议论纷纷。白厄稳住局势，以被毁灭的故乡哀丽秘榭，向听众阐述奥赫玛所面临的危机。
en: The Okheman citizens murmured among themselves as Phainon took the stage. Phainon told them of his destroyed hometown, Aedes Elysiae, and of the crisis Okhema still faced.

ch: 黑天鹅推测三月七的记忆遭到劫持。她向姬子坦白，调查翁法罗斯是为了阻止极端忆庭组织私藏世界。此时，「记忆」瞥视翁法罗斯。
en: Meanwhile, on the Astral Express, Black Swan speculated that March 7th's memories had been hijacked. She admitted to Himeko that her reason for investigating Amphoreus was to prevent Memokeeper extremists from concealing Amphoreus in the Garden of Recollection's mirror for their own ends. At that moment, the gaze of the Remembrance swept across Amphoreus.

ch: 黑塔检索窃忆者的意识，得知忆者们对「翁法罗斯」有预谋。黑塔计划将自己的「数据精神体」投射到翁法罗斯，从世界内部寻找线索。
en: Herta searched the Memosnatcher's consciousness and discovered that they had plans regarding Amphoreus. Herta planned to send herself to Amphoreus in the form of a data spirit entity to search for clues.

ch: 来古士拦截黑塔，称自己曾沐浴「智识」瞥视，缠绕翁法罗斯的第三条命途是「毁灭」，若黑塔强行突破，将释放出一位<color=#f29e38ff>「绝灭大君」</color>。
en: Lygus stopped Herta. He claimed that, just like her, he had basked in the gaze of the Erudition, and revealed that the third Path entangled with Amphoreus was the Destruction. If Herta attempted to invade Amphoreus anyway, she would unleash a <color=#f29e38ff>Lord Ravager</color> upon the cosmos.

ch: 你在涡心整理思绪。自从降落翁法罗斯，你已见证四次擢升，四场离别，但「开拓」仍未结束。与此同时，你的手机传来短信震动声。
en: In the Vortex of Genesis, you collected your thoughts. Ever since you arrived on Amphoreus, you witnessed the ascension of and bade farewell to four Chrysos Heirs. However, the journey of Trailblaze was far from over. At the same time, you received a message on your phone.

ch: 赛飞儿伪装成「盗火行者」，向你展示了一番「诡计」的神力。「谎言」只要被人相信，就能转化为现实。与此同时，你再次收到短信。
en: Cipher, who had disguised herself as the Flame Reaver, showed you one of the common powers of "Trickery." As long as "lies" could be believed, they could easily become reality. At that moment, you received yet another text message.

ch: 丹恒与来古士在列车坠落点交谈。丹恒猜想在「天空」火种归还后，翁法罗斯的隔绝状态便能打破。来古士检查车厢，寻求维修的方法。
en: Dan Heng and Lygus conversed at the crash site of the Express's train car. Dan Heng speculated that after the Coreflame of "Sky" was returned, Amphoreus's state of isolation would be shattered. Lygus inspected the train car for a way to repair it.

ch: 在神悟树庭，你将先前遭遇盗火行者的记忆复现，以此作为白厄的战斗训练。
en: In the Grove of Epiphany, you encountered memories of your first meeting with the Flame Reaver and used them to train your skills in battle with Phainon.

ch: 白厄也加入围观，你们发现迷迷在看《翁法罗斯占卜全书》。白厄想起昔涟，向你出示昔涟曾用的占卜牌。突然，友爱之馆内传来异动。
en: Phainon joined you, and you realized Mem was reading the Amphoreus Divination Compendium. Phainon thought of Cyrene, and showed you the divination cards she often used. Suddenly, there were strange movements throughout the Library of Philia.

ch: 缇宝带风堇选址，计划在奥赫玛重建「昏光庭院」，并谈论天空之民的历史。克莱门汀带来紧急消息，称阿格莱雅在云石天宫遭遇不测。
en: Tribbie brought Hyacine around Okhema to choose a site to rebuild the Twilight Courtyard. They talked about the history of the Skyfolk. Clementine arrived with urgent news, and said that Aglaea had met with an accident in the Marmoreal Palace.

ch: 白厄认为「清洗者」的实力不足以刺杀阿格莱雅，当下必须亲眼确认阿格莱雅的状况。他请缇宝尽力安抚公民，并与你即刻赶回奥赫玛。
en: Phainon did not believe the "Cleaners" were strong enough to kill Aglaea, and wanted to confirm her condition with his own eyes. He asked Tribbie to keep the citizens calm. Meanwhile, you and Phainon rushed back to Okhema.

ch: 你与白厄回到奥赫玛，不安的情绪在圣城中蔓延。你们前去寻找缇宝，向其了解事况。
en: You and Phainon arrived back in Okhema, where a wave of uneasiness had spread through the holy city. You rushed to find Tribbie to learn what transpired.

ch: 阿格莱雅留下遗言，坦承为清除圣城暗处的威胁而自毁设局，将守护翁法罗斯的使命托付白厄。白厄接过领袖重任，将以演讲团结公民。
en: In her final words, Aglaea admitted that she had destroyed herself to eliminate the threats lurking in the shadows of the Holy City. She entrusted Amphoreus's protection to Phainon, who accepted his responsibility, and left to address the citizens.

ch: 哈托努斯将形制如盗火行者之剑的神兵带给白厄，将其命名为<color=#f29e38ff>「侵晨」</color>。与武器一同交付白厄的，还有封存阿格莱雅残留神性的护身符。
en: Chartonus gave Phainon his divine weapon, a sword that resembled the Flame Reaver's, and named it <color=#f29e38ff>Dawnmaker</color>. Along with the weapon, he also gave Phainon the talisman that contained what remained of Aglaea's divinity.

ch: 赛飞儿回到奥赫玛，伫立于黎明云崖。时移事迁，她不禁回想起千年往事。
en: Cipher returned to Okhema, and stood in silence for a long time in Dawncloud. With the passage of time, she couldn't help but remember a story from a thousand years ago.

ch: 赛飞儿想要窃取「全世宝石」以救济贫民。阿格莱雅认可其同情心，但认为「诡计」会有更大的作用。某些时候，谎言可以比坦诚高贵。
en: Back then, Cipher wanted to steal the Gem of All Worlds to help the poor of Okhema. Aglaea acknowledged her sentiment, but felt that "Trickery" could serve a greater purpose. At some point, lies would become more precious than truth.

ch: 白厄请求赛飞儿保护刻法勒的火种，切勿令其落入元老院或盗火行者之手。
en: Phainon asked Cipher to guard Kephale's Coreflame, and keep it well away from the grasp of the Council of Elders and the Flame Reaver.

ch: 在征伐「天空」泰坦艾格勒之前，风堇回到树庭。作为天空一族的后人，「天空」的黄金裔，她缅怀自己在地面的生活回忆。
en: Before searching for the Aquila, the Sky Titan, Hyacine returned to the Grove. As a descendant of the Sky people and the Chrysos Heir of "Sky," she wanted to commemorate her memories of her life on the ground.

ch: 风堇的祖先「阳雷骑士」塞涅俄丝曾弑杀天空泰坦。为创造通往天空的彩虹桥，她必须获取先祖赐福。风堇在树庭遇到搜集资料的丹恒。
en: Hyacine's ancestor, Seliose the Daythunder Knight, once slew the Sky Titan. To build a rainbow bridge to reach the heavens, she needed her ancestors' blessings. It was at the Grove that she encountered Dan Heng, who was gathering research materials.

ch: 赛飞儿即将离开奥赫玛，她将一份礼物交给缇宝，要求其<color=#f29e38ff>天黑之后再打开</color>。缇宝将创世涡心让给风堇，为其留出进行召唤仪式的场地。
en: Cipher was about to leave Okhema. She left a gift with Tribbie, telling her to only open it <color=#f29e38ff>after nightfall</color>. Tribbie gave Hyacine access to the Vortex of Genesis to allow her to prepare her summoning ritual.

ch: 风堇回到树庭，向丹恒与小伊卡讲述与先祖的对话。丹恒从「天空」的预言中体会到悲伤，与风堇出发去悬锋城谒见最后一位天空先祖。
en: Hyacine returned to the Grove. She explained what she had discussed with her ancestors to Dan Heng and Little Ica. Dan Heng sensed sadness in the prophecy of "Sky." The group set out towards Castrum Kremnos to locate the last ancestor Hyacine needed to speak to.

ch: 你与迷迷来到黎明云崖，发现此处聚集起许多民众。奥赫玛于此为征伐「天空」的黄金裔们送行。
en: You and Mem arrived at Dawncloud, and found that many Okhemans had gathered there to send off the Chrysos Heirs in search of the "Sky."

ch: 壁画上描绘着一位陌生泰坦的形象，与翁法罗斯所有神话都无法联系起来，也许古代天空文明对泰坦有独特的诠释。
en: The mural depicted an unfamiliar Titan that didn't match any Amphorean mythology. Perhaps the ancient sky civilization had its unique interpretation of the Titans.

ch: 初到奥赫玛时，阿格莱雅以金线洞悉白厄背负的恐惧与记忆，引导其踏上逐火之旅。白厄决心如阿格莱雅般燃烧，成为照亮世界的烈火。
en: When she first arrived in Okhema, Aglaea used her golden threads to unveil the fear and memories Phainon carried and guided him onto the Flame-Chase Journey. Phainon vowed to burn just as brightly as Aglaea and become a fire that lights the world.

ch: 赛飞儿并未发现与凯妮斯有关的线索。震动传自天幕，这意味着风堇已取得「天空」火种。与此同时，赛飞儿感应到盗火行者迫近。
en: Cipher found nothing tying them to Caenis. A tremor rolled through the sky, which meant Hyacine had claimed the Coreflame of Sky. At the same time, Cipher sensed the Flame Reaver drawing near.

ch: 盗火行者出现在前方，赛飞儿被迫交出「火种」。然而「火种」在盗火行者接触的瞬间变为陶罐，赛飞儿藉此再度拉开距离。
en: The Flame Reaver cut Cipher off in front, forcing her to hand over the Coreflame. But the instant Flame Reaver touched it, the Coreflame turned into a dolium, just long enough for Cipher to escape again.

ch: 赛飞儿变作白厄模样，主动等待盗火行者，提出以决斗处置「火种」归属。盗火行者不予理会，径直走向「火种」，却再次得到陶罐。
en: Disguised as Phainon, Cipher waited for Flame Reaver and proposed a duel for the Coreflame. The Flame Reaver ignored her, reaching for the Coreflame, only to find another dolium.

ch: 千年以前，赛飞儿伪装成司铎模样，向奥赫玛全体公民宣布名为「神谕」的谎言——<color=#f29e38ff>黎明机器的光芒永不熄灭，刻法勒的庇佑没有尽头！</color>
en: A thousand years ago, Cipher disguised herself as a priest and told all citizens of Okhema a lie named "prophecy": <color=#f29e38ff>The light of Dawn Device never fades. Kephale's protection has no end!</color>

ch: 奥赫玛的黎明落幕，末日降临圣城。丹恒注意到某些建筑结构变成了数据体的材质，白厄猜想这与来袭的黑潮相关。
en: Dawn faded in Okhema and doomsday descended upon the holy city. Dan Heng noticed that parts of the architecture were turning into data streams, which Phainon suspected had to do with the black tide.

ch: 盗火行者降临黎明云崖，在你们身后紧追不舍。白厄认为现在不是恋战的时候，必须优先归还火种，确保「再创世」得以进行。
en: The Flame Reaver descended upon the Dawncloud, closing in fast. Phainon insisted now wasn't the time for battle. You had to return the Coreflame so that Era Nova may proceed.

ch: 盗火行者矗立前路，呢喃「归位」「重启」。白厄猜想盗火行者的目的也是「再创世」，但无法与对方产生交流，一场血战避无可避。
en: The Flame Reaver stood in your path, murmuring, "Return" and "Restart." Phainon guessed it also sought Era Nova, but there was no way to communicate. A brutal fight was inevitable.

ch: 白厄与你分别，要求卫士护送你和丹恒离开翁法罗斯。白厄请你原谅他的擅举，他不愿将你卷入未知的「再创世」，宁愿独自承担命运。
en: Phainon parted ways with you, ordering the guards to escort you and Dan Heng out of Amphoreus. He apologized for dragging you into the unknown of Era Nova, saying he'd rather face this fate alone.

ch: 火种向风堇传来<color=#f29e38ff>黎明机器熄灭</color>的消息。为避免奥赫玛秩序被黑暗与恐惧摧毁，风堇请丹恒打开涡心通路，她要成为庇护人们的「天空」。
en: The Coreflame whispered to Hyacine that <color=#f29e38ff>the Dawn Device had been extinguished.</color> To stop fear and darkness from devouring Okhema's order, Hyacine asked Dan Heng to open the path to the Vortex, where she would become the Sky to protect people.

ch: 出征之前，风堇将「昏光庭院」托付给克莱门汀。缇宝将来自阿格莱雅的认可带给风堇，鼓励风堇自信，并教授她归还火种的祷词。
en: Before the final battle, Hyacine entrusted the Twilight Courtyard to Clementine. Tribbie delivered Aglaea's recognition and encouraged Hyacine to believe in herself, teaching her the prayer to return the Coreflame.

ch: 黑塔与螺丝咕姆以投影形式窥探翁法罗斯内部，认为应该优先追踪你与丹恒的下落。黑塔揭露翁法罗斯的本质是一台「帝皇权杖」。
en: Herta and Screwllum used projections to perceive what is transpiring inside Amphoreus. They agreed the priority was to track down you and Dan Heng. Herta revealed that the true nature of Amphoreus was that of an "Emperor's Scepter."

ch: 在卫士的护送下，你去找正与盗火行者交战的丹恒会合，准备一同逃离翁法罗斯。
en: With guards at your side, you made your way to Dan Heng, who was locked in battle with the Flame Reaver. It was time to team up and get out of Amphoreus.

ch: 你与丹恒会合后，发现盗火行者因未知原因陷入一动不动的僵直中。你们与卫士一行人趁机逃离战场。
en: When you reunited with Dan Heng, you found the Flame Reaver somehow standing stiff and still. Wasting no time, you and the guards slipped away from the chaos.

ch: 螺丝咕姆出现，他揭示翁法罗斯是数据世界，因坠入毁灭命途即将进化出绝灭大君。你请缨留作内应，螺丝咕姆将<color=#f29e38ff>「识刻锚」</color>交予你。
en: Screwllum showed up and revealed that Amphoreus was a data world, which had fallen onto the Path of Destruction and was on the brink of spawning a Lord Ravager. You volunteered to stay behind as a mole, and Screwllum handed you the <color=#f29e38ff>Chronocognitive Anchor</color>.

ch: 白厄在故乡哀丽秘榭的麦田中醒来，他梦见一道神谕：<color=#f29e38ff>「汝将肩负骄阳，直至灰白的黎明显著。」</color>
en: Phainon woke in the golden wheat fields of Aedes Elysiae, his hometown. In his dream, he heard a prophecy: <color=#f29e38ff>"You will bear the blazing sun, until the pale dawn breaks."</color>

ch: 你出现在哀丽秘榭，白厄将你视为一生中最重要的伙伴。来古士点明当前场景是在白厄的记忆中，希望你见证白厄成长的旅程。
en: You appeared in Aedes Elysiae. To Phainon, you were the one companion who mattered most in his life. Lygus explained that you were in Phainon's memory, and he hoped that you would witness Phainon's growth.

ch: 你们在谷仓发现了白厄童年时雕刻到一半的木制小兵人，还遇到哀丽秘榭校舍唯一一位老师皮西厄斯。在谷仓没有发现神谕牌。
en: At the barn, you found a half-carved wooden toy soldier Phainon carved in his childhood and ran into Pythias — the only teacher at the school of Aedes Elysiae. No sign of the cards here.

ch: 你与昔涟眺望哀丽秘榭的风景，昔涟表示相信神谕，但对未来的命运感到迷茫。白厄呼唤你们，说找到了神谕牌。
en: You and Cyrene looked out on the second floor over Aedes Elysiae. Cyrene admitted she believed in prophecies but felt uncertain about the future. Then, Phainon called out to you two. He found the cards.

ch: 你们打开装神谕牌的盒子，发现神谕牌被替换成了一封奇怪的信。昔涟猜想是妖精在调皮捣蛋，要带大家去寻找「迷路迷境」。
en: When you opened the box containing the Prophecy Cards, you discovered the cards had been replaced by a strange letter. Cyrene figured the fairies were up to mischief again and proposed leading the way to find the "Membrance Maze."

ch: 由于太久没去拜访小妖精们，「迷路迷境」的入口被杂草覆盖。白厄三下五除二，把拦路的杂草清理干净。
en: No one had visited the fairies in ages, so the entrance of the Membrance Maze was all overgrown by weeds. Phainon cleared the way in seconds.

ch: 昔涟解释「迷路迷境」只有天真无邪的孩子才能进入，并预感命运的齿轮将因此而转动。迷境的入口被发现，你们先后进入迷境。
en: Cyrene explained that only children with pure hearts could enter the Membrance Maze, and she had a feeling that fate's gears would turn because of this. You discover the entrance and, one by one, you all enter the maze.

ch: 白厄为临近的灾难而忧虑，认为自己会留下来保护哀丽秘榭，并向昔涟索要「救世主」牌。与此同时，迷境之外传来灾难的变故。
en: Fearing the coming catastrophe, Phainon believed he would stay behind to protect Aedes Elysiae. He asked Cyrene to give him "The Deliverer" card. At that moment, news of the terrible calamity comes from outside the Maze.

ch: 「黑潮」降临哀丽秘榭，惟有迷路迷境可以幸免于难。但白厄决定拿起武器、走出迷境，去保卫受黑潮怪物侵袭的村庄。
en: The black tide had come to Aedes Elysiae. Only the Membrance Maze remained untouched. But Phainon decided to take his weapon and step out of the Maze to defend the village from the black tide monsters flooding in.

ch: 此时适逢万敌率领悬锋孤军兵临奥赫玛，要求以一场角斗来为族人争取在圣城平等生活的权利。在阿格莱雅的斡旋下，白厄代表奥赫玛接受挑战。
en: At just this moment, Mydei led the Kremnoan Detachment to Okhema, demanding a duel to win his people the right to live as equals in the holy city. With Aglaea's mediation, Phainon agreed to fight on Okhema's behalf.

ch: 在缇宁的主持下，白厄与万敌的角斗变更为——在塔兰顿的天平上各自放置一样<color=#f29e38ff>比世界的命运，更为沉重之物</color>，并由律法泰坦裁定胜负。
en: Overseen by Trinnon, the duel between Phainon and Mydei was redefined: both sides would place an item on Talanton's Scales — <color=#f29e38ff>something heavier than the fate of the world</color>. The Law Titan would decide the victor.

ch: 上秤之前，白厄与万敌交谈，得知万敌打算以悬锋印戒参与比试。那是悬锋族人的至宝，悬锋王权的象征，悬锋征战千年的荣耀所系。
en: Before the weighing, Phainon and Mydei spoke. Phainon learned Mydei planned to offer the Signet of Kremnos, a sacred relic of his people, a symbol of Kremnos's kingship, and the crystallization of the centuries of Kremnoan warfare for glory.

ch: 天平倾斜，白厄胜出。「救世主」牌承载的不仅是白厄的决心，还有世人呼唤救世主的夙愿。白厄与万敌握手言和，一同加入逐火之旅。
en: The scales tipped in Phainon's favor. "The Deliverer" card bore not only his resolve, but the world's call for a Deliverer. Phainon and Mydei shook hands, making peace, and joined forces on the Flame-Chase Journey.

ch: 来古士请你踏入传送门，去探寻「再创世」的真相。来古士声称所谓的「救世主」，不过是翁法罗斯一厢情愿反抗命运的可悲幻觉。
en: Lygus invited you to step into the teleporter and seek the truth behind the Era Nova. Lygus claimed that the so-called "Deliverer" was just Amphoreus's tragic and stubborn illusion, a desperate rebellion against destiny.

ch: 第<unbreak>134</unbreak>次永劫回归，除白厄外，创世涡心空无一人。盗火行者的脚步声逐渐逼近，白厄做好准备，与这位刽子手作最终死斗。
en: In the <unbreak>134</unbreak>th Eternal Recurrence, save for Phainon, the Vortex of Genesis stood empty. The Flame Reaver's footsteps drew near. Phainon braced himself, ready for a final death match with this executioner.

ch: 第<unbreak>67023</unbreak>次永劫回归，那刻夏余留的思想陪同白厄来到创世涡心。盗火行者迫近，那刻夏嘱托白厄，要让这可悲的刽子手血债血偿。
en: In the <unbreak>67,023</unbreak>rd Eternal Recurrence, the lingering thoughts of Anaxa accompanied Phainon to the Vortex of Genesis. As the Flame Reaver approached, Anaxa entrusted Phainon to make the executioner pay in blood.

ch: 第<unbreak>823156</unbreak>次永劫回归，小伊卡在创世涡心为白厄撑起一方晴空。盗火行者迫近，而白厄对抗这位刽子手的刀锋已然被照亮。
en: In the <unbreak>823,156</unbreak>th Eternal Recurrence, Little Ica held the sky clear above the Vortex of Genesis for Phainon. The Flame Reaver drew near, but Phainon's blade, facing this executioner, now shined with resolve.

ch: 第<unbreak>10348765</unbreak>次永劫回归，白厄在创世涡心见到随冥河涌至的遐蝶。盗火行者迫近，遐蝶已准备好将这位刽子手留在阴影中。
en: In the <unbreak>10,348,765</unbreak>th Eternal Recurrence, at the Vortex of Genesis, Phainon encountered Castorice drifting in with the flow of River of Souls. The Flame Reaver drew near. Castorice was ready to cast this executioner into the shadows.

ch: 第<unbreak>24581189</unbreak>次永劫回归，白厄怀抱缇宝娃娃来到创世涡心。盗火行者迫近，白厄誓要取出这位刽子手的心脏以告慰「命运」。
en: In the <unbreak>24,581,189</unbreak>th Eternal Recurrence, Phainon entered the Vortex of Genesis with the Tribbie doll in his arms. The Flame Reaver was closing in. Phainon swore to tear out this executioner's heart, and offer it to destiny itself.

ch: 来古士警告你，一旦揭开记忆的真容，世界进程便无法回头。他认为你受过星神的瞥视，一定能令翁法罗斯停滞的命运再度流动。
en: Lygus warned you that, once the truth of this memory was revealed, the progress of the world would never be able to turn back. As you had been gazed upon by Aeons, he believed you could definitely set Amphoreus's stalled fate back into motion.

ch: 来古士揭示「翁法罗斯」是由被「智识」抛弃的权杖演算形成，蕴蓄着其对智识星神的怒火。吞没世界的黑潮，显现为数据块的模样。
en: Lygus revealed the truth: Amphoreus was extrapolated by a Scepter that was cast aside by the Erudition, its computations fueled by fury against the Aeon of Erudition. The black tide that devoured the world appeared as a storm of data blocks.

ch: <color=#f29e38ff>第<unbreak>108642</unbreak>次永劫回归</color>白厄与万敌对峙，万敌决意以自身守护「纷争」的火种，在悬锋竞技场与白厄死战。
en: <color=#f29e38ff>The <unbreak>108,642</unbreak>nd Eternal Recurrence:</color> Phainon faced Mydei. Mydei was determined to protect the Coreflame of Strife with his life, and he fought Phainon to the death in the Kremnos arena.

ch: 在创世涡心，一如每一次永劫回归的尽头，盗火行者面对新生的白厄，进行使命的传递。他将仪式剑交予对方，示意其杀死自己。
en: At the Vortex of Genesis, like how every Eternal Recurrence ended, the Flame Reaver faced the newly reborn Phainon to pass on the mission. He offered the ceremonial blade, asking the new Phainon to kill him.

ch: 下一次「再创世」后，翁法罗斯就会坠入「毁灭」的结局。为了阻止来古士的计划，昔涟提醒你使用识刻锚来与天外取得联系。
en: Amphoreus would fall into an ending of "Destruction" after the next "Era Nova." To prevent Lygus's plan from unfolding, Cyrene urged you to use the Chronocognitive Anchor to make contact with the world beyond the sky.

ch: 昔涟带你复习历史：在第一次奥赫玛围城战中，一名黄金裔挺身而出，率领民众击退敌军，保卫圣城。那即是奥赫玛最初与最后的僭主：「凯撒」刻律德菈。
en: Cyrene helped you review history. During the first siege of Okhema, a Chrysos Heir rose up and led the people in repelling the enemy, defending the holy city. That figure was Okhema's first and last tyrant: "Imperator" Cerydra.

ch: 当前时代的凯妮斯被处死，刻律德菈将其作为献给你们的见面礼。刻律德菈称你为「救世主」，邀你和昔涟随她返回奥赫玛。
en: Caenis of this era had been executed, and Cerydra offered the event as a welcome gift for your arrival. Calling you the "Deliverer," she invited you and Cyrene to return with her to Okhema.

ch: 来古士称，若刻律德菈通过归还火种的试炼，他将藉此修正旧日「律法」中封闭翁法罗斯的条约，将黑潮汇入再创世的涡流。
en: Lygus said that if Cerydra succeeded in the trial of restoring the Coreflames, he would use it as an opportunity to correct the regulations within the old "Law" that sealed off Amphoreus and merge the black tide with the torrents of Era Nova.

ch: 你再次来到「神话之外」，来古士将此改造成专属于你的「观众席」。在这片<color=#f29e38ff>时间流速慢于世界内部</color>的空间，你将见证翁法罗斯步入尾声。
en: You returned to Exomyth, which Lygus had modified into an exclusive "audience area" for you. In this place, <color=#f29e38ff>where time flowed slower than within Amphoreus</color>, you would witness the end of that world.

ch: 黑塔强行侵入，告知翁法罗斯内部已过去几年，黄金裔们启动了识刻锚，让黑塔与螺丝咕姆得以暂时阻止来古士的行动。黑塔感知到某条命途对世界的强大影响，或许其能帮助你越狱。
en: Herta broke in, saying several years had passed within Amphoreus. The Chrysos Heirs had activated the Chronocognitive Anchor, allowing Herta and Screwllum to temporarily halt Lygus's actions. She sensed a powerful influence of a certain Path upon the world, which might help you escape.

ch: 少女以翁法罗斯的三月——<color=#f29e38ff>「长夜月」</color>为名，她向你出示刻法勒的火种，告知是「往昔的涟漪」将其藏进「岁月」的长河，而你将带着火种回到翁法罗斯，扭转「再创世」的结局。
en: The girl introduced herself as <color=#f29e38ff>"Evernight"</color>, the third month of Amphoreus. She showed you Kephale's Coreflame, explaining that it had been hidden within the river of "Time" by "Ripples of past reverie." Now, you would carry it back to Amphoreus and change the ending of the Era Nova.

ch: 「长夜月」为你打开通往奥赫玛的传送门。翁法罗斯需要「救世主」，你做好回应世界期待的准备，走入门中。
en: "Evernight" opened a portal to Okhema for you. Amphoreus needed a "Deliverer." You were prepared to respond to the world's expectations and stepped through the gate.

ch: 触碰识刻锚后，昔涟的身影再次出现。你不在的这段时间里，翁法罗斯已过去千年，昔涟要把这一千年的故事都讲给你听。
en: When you touched the Chronocognitive Anchor, Cyrene appeared once more. In your absence, a thousand years have passed in Amphoreus. Now, she would tell you the story of this millennium.

ch: 为搜寻刻法勒的火种，来古士率军洗劫奥赫玛，摧毁云石天宫。以自身之死为丝线，阿格莱雅为圣城编织起名为「团结」的坚固战袍。
en: To find Kephale's Coreflame, Lygus led a purge through Okhema and destroyed the Marmoreal Palace. Through her own death, Aglaea wove a battle robe called "Solidarity" for the holy city.

ch: 遐蝶让缇宝和海瑟音在斯缇科西亚创造一条通往创世涡心的密道，并由她永远看护。悬锋王欧利庞携王储迈德漠斯加入同盟，守卫圣城。
en: Castorice had Tribbie and Hysilens build a secret passage to the Vortex of Genesis in Styxia, which would be guarded by her forever. The Kremnoan king Eurypon, along with the crown prince Mydeimos, joined the alliance to safeguard the holy city.

ch: 依照那刻夏提出的方法，万敌请求缇安为自己主持「裂魂仪式」。以此将万敌的灵魂裂成五份，以此令「纷争」的锋刃永远高悬。
en: Following Anaxa's proposed method, Mydei had Trianne perform the Soul-Rending Ceremony to divide his soul into five parts, ensuring the blade of Strife would hang forever overhead.

ch: 凯撒遇刺，凶手正是剑旗。海瑟音感到茫然，若翁法罗斯的一切皆为虚妄，那征程还有何意义？待到「救世主」归来，就让宴会结束吧。
en: The Imperator was assassinated by none but the Gladius herself. Hysilens felt lost. If everything in Amphoreus was futile, what had the warring campaign been for? When the Deliverer returned, let the feast come to an end.

ch: 你将杯子的蜜酿倾倒在墓碑前，纪念第一次逐火之旅的英雄们。众人推动翁法罗斯的命运滚滚向前，将踏足星间的空想托付予后世。
en: You poured the honey brew before the grave, honoring the heroes of the first Flame-Chase Journey. All pushed Amphoreus's fate forward, entrusting the dream to walk among the stars to the hero yet to come.

ch: 千年前，黑塔、螺丝咕姆与来古士对峙，指出翁法罗斯的真身是历史上的第一台「权杖」，而来古士正是博识尊的创造者。来古士以十四行代数式重写自我意识，并将逻辑核心分布于九具躯体中，此身不过其中之一。来古士称，「智识」陨落之后，知识与真理才能自名为「命途」的牢笼中解放。
en: A thousand years ago, Herta, Screwllum, and Lygus confronted one another. They revealed that Amphoreus's true form was the first Scepter ever created, and that Lygus was Nous's creator. Lygus coded his own consciousness using quatorzain algebraic expressions, spreading his logic core over nine bodies. The one before you was only one vessel. Lygus declared that only after the Erudition falls could knowledge and truth be freed from the cage called "Path."

ch: 刻律德菈与昔涟远眺翁法罗斯的全貌。刻律德菈已决定好「律法」的去向，她最后想确认一事——「救世主」在旅途中，可曾见过大海？
en: Together, Cerydra and Cyrene gazed out over all of Amphoreus. Cerydra had already made up her mind about the fate of Law, but had one last question: Had the Deliverer ever seen the ocean during their journey?

ch: 黑塔要求「赞达尔」放弃对「铁墓」的演算。后者却称翁法罗斯是三重命途「死斗」之地，「记忆」和祂的孩子们将趁虚而入，抵达战场。
en: Herta demanded Zandar cease all extrapolations involving the Irontomb. But he claimed Amphoreus was where the Three Paths clashed in a battle to the death. Remembrance and their children would exploit this opening to seize the battlefield.

ch: <color=#f29e38ff>「长夜月」</color>现身创世涡心，自称是三月七燃尽记忆后的映影。「岁月」火种其实从未被归还，长夜月将其藏于你身，以此助她来到创世涡心。为对抗铁墓，长夜月想要过滤你的记忆，剔除其中杂质，来创造一个无瑕的「翁法罗斯」。
en: <color=#f29e38ff>Evernight</color> appeared in the Vortex of Genesis, claiming to be an echo born from March 7th after her memories had burned away. The Coreflame of Time had never been returned. Evernight had hidden it within you to reach the Vortex of Genesis. To oppose the Irontomb, Evernight sought to cleanse your memories of impurities and shape a flawless Amphoreus.

ch: 丹恒进入客房车厢，听到姬子与黑天鹅在讨论翁法罗斯的忆域环境。丹恒一直没有听到三月七的声音，决定进入房间去看看她的情况。
en: Dan Heng stepped into the Passenger Cabin and overheard Himeko and Black Swan discussing the Memory Zone of Amphoreus. With no sign of March 7th's voice, Dan Heng chose to check on her himself.

ch: 黑天鹅认为三月七与忆者们的计划无关，事实上，你们正是因三月七用忆质中和了防火墙才得以进入翁法罗斯。瓦尔特找到了丹恒和你的所在。
en: Black Swan believed March 7th had no involvement in the Memokeepers' plan. In truth, it was March 7th who neutralized the Firewall using memoria that allowed you to enter Amphoreus. Welt had found where you and Dan Heng were.

ch: 丹恒与你的身体被近似忆质的「气泡」保护，机能完好。螺丝咕姆称翁法罗斯被剧烈的「记忆」包裹，内外联系再次被阻断。丹恒决定利用自身能突破防火墙的优势，再度返回翁法罗斯，不遗余力地促成列车组的团聚。
en: Dan Heng and your body were protected by memoria-like bubbles, with all functions remaining intact. Screwllum reported that Amphoreus was wrapped in intense "Remembrance," once again severing all internal and external communication. Dan Heng resolved to return to Amphoreus, using his ability to breach the Firewall to reunite the Express Crew, no matter what it took.

ch: 在三月七的精神遭到挟持时，是一阵「记忆」的涟漪保护了她，将三月七送进此地，并一直保护翁法罗斯免受流光忆庭的窥视。
en: When March 7th's spirit was held captive, it was a ripple of "Remembrance" that protected her, sending her to this place and continuously shielding Amphoreus from the Garden of Recollection's prying eyes.

ch: 密钥上传之后，新的道路出现。你的耳畔响起昔涟的回声——以关于「明天」的故事，昔涟呼唤「救世主」与翁法罗斯的黎明。
en: After the encryption key was uploaded, a new path appeared. Echoing by your ear, Cyrene spoke of a story about "tomorrow," calling to the "Deliverer" and the dawn of Amphoreus.

ch: 在拍照之后，长夜月被拖入哀丽秘榭。三月七的精魄曾藏匿于此，并在你为欧洛尼斯拍照时钻入相机中，自此陪你走过在翁法罗斯的漫长旅程。藉由昔涟的讲述，三月七找回了曾在星间旅行的记忆。三月七告诫长夜月，无名客不应替别人做出决定。
en: After taking the picture, Evernight was sent to Aedes Elysiae. March 7th's spirit had hidden herself there and entered the camera when you were taking a photo of Oronyx. March 7th had since accompanied you through your long journey in Amphoreus, gradually recovering memories of her interstellar journey through Cyrene's narration. She warned Evernight that a Nameless had no right to make decisions for others.

ch: 昔涟向长夜月解释翁法罗斯在这一世遭遇的巨大变数——刻律德菈曾献上一位半神的性命，改写了一条「律法」。
en: Cyrene explained to Evernight the significant event that had affected Amphoreus in this cycle: Cerydra had offered a demigod's life to rewrite one law.

ch: 在星期日的调律帮助下，你与丹恒来到哀丽秘榭。三月七此刻就在这片忆域中。
en: With Sunday's tuning, you and Dan Heng arrived at Aedes Elysiae. March 7th was present within this Memory Zone.

ch: 你与丹恒见到形如「翁法罗斯」的壁画。丹恒认为长眠在地底的，或许正是翁法罗斯的最后一道命途——「记忆」。
en: You and Dan Heng discovered murals resembling Amphoreus. Dan Heng believed that what lay sleeping beneath the ground might be Amphoreus's final Path: "the Remembrance."

ch: 黑天鹅步入忆域深处。窃忆者们本该由此大量涌入翁法罗斯，却不知为何，只沦为遍地空骸。
en: Black Swan ventured deep into the Memory Zone. The Memosnatchers should have swarmed into Amphoreus from here, yet for some unknown reason, they were reduced to nothing but scattered husks.

ch: 在螺丝咕姆的帮助下，丹恒回到翁法罗斯。面对「记忆」的威胁，天才们与来古士达成合作，让其担任丹恒的向导。
en: With Screwllum's help, Dan Heng returned to Amphoreus. Faced with the threat of the Remembrance, the geniuses allied with Lygus, assigning him as Dan Heng's guide.

ch: 事关银河存亡，各方势力都有关乎自身利益的考量。无论如何，敬候佳音吧。瓦尔特提议深入涡心，查看翁法罗斯内部的样貌。
en: With the fate of the cosmos at stake, every faction had their own interests to consider. Either way, wait for some to good news. Welt suggested delving into the Vortex of Genesis to examine the interior of Amphoreus.

ch: 在三月七进入翁法罗斯之后，昔涟领会了精湛的弓箭技术。而那支承载金焰的箭矢，将会在未来划过星空，成为银河的曙光。
en: After March 7th entered Amphoreus, Cyrene mastered the art of archery. And that arrow bearing golden flames would streak across the stars in the future, becoming a glimmer of hope for the cosmos.

ch: 为让翁法罗斯被群星眷顾，昔涟向银河求援，这一瞬被黑天鹅捕捉。黑天鹅感谢昔涟，让她加深了对自己所行命途的理解。
en: To gain the favor of the stars for Amphoreus, Cyrene sent a call for help to the cosmos, which was caught by Black Swan. Black Swan thanked Cyrene for helping her gain greater understanding of the Path she walked.

ch: 在哀丽秘榭，昔涟为幼年白厄留下心中的英雄与神谕：「汝将肩负骄阳，直至灰白的黎明显著。」
en: In Aedes Elysiae, Cyrene left young Phainon with a hero within his heart and a prophecy: "You will bear the blazing sun, until the pale dawn breaks."

ch: 昔涟回到哀丽秘榭。故乡景象一如既往，仿佛昔涟从未离开。
en: Cyrene returned to Aedes Elysiae. Her homeland remained unchanged, as if she had never left.

ch: 昔涟为哀丽秘榭带去一件礼物——粉色头发、尖尖耳朵的小姑娘，以及锚定她命运的话语：「她将收梢于花开时，一如终结诞下起始。」
en: Long ago, Cyrene brought a gift to Aedes Elysiae: a girl with pink hair and pointed ears, along with words that would anchor her destiny: "She shall fade when the flowers bloom, for every ending begets a beginning."

ch: 最后一位英雄回到了她的归宿。在迷路迷境的大树下，昔涟沉入梦乡。
en: The final hero returned to where she belonged. Under the Great Tree of the Membrance Maze, Cyrene drifted into slumber.

ch: 在微醺的恣意中，万敌、阿格莱雅与刻律德菈讨论着关于政治体制的问题。万敌劝你去上面的车厢试试运气，或许能找到白厄。
en: Mydei, Aglaea, and Cerydra were tipsy as they discussed about issues with political systems. Mydei suggested you try your luck in the car above. You might find Phainon there.

ch: 万敌推崇武力，刻律德菈则强调制度，二者在政治观点上针锋相对。阿格莱雅向你保证，她会看好这两位黄金裔。
en: While Mydei advocated for military might, Cerydra emphasized order. Their political views were at odds. Aglaea assured you she would keep an eye on these two Chrysos Heirs.

ch: 你与白厄重逢，白厄称现在维系黄金裔们意识和身形的力量来自别处。你邀请白厄一起去旅行，在漫天银河中，一定也有类似哀丽秘榭的小村庄。
en: You reunited with Phainon, who revealed that the power sustaining the Chrysos Heirs' consciousness and forms now came from elsewhere. You invited Phainon to travel together, believing that there must be small villages just like Aedes Elysiae somewhere in the vast cosmos.

ch: 铁墓的陨落象征着权杖的衰亡。昔涟将翁法罗斯的记忆收拢在《如我所书》中，请你悉心保留。而今你的所在，是《如我所书》的尾声。
en: The fall of Irontomb heralded the decline of the Scepter. Cyrene preserved the memories of Amphoreus in As I've Written and asked you to safeguard it well. You now stood at the epilogue of As I've Written.

ch: 穿过神殿大门，迷迷与初入翁法罗斯的你相遇。该说是初次见面，还是，久别重逢呢？
en: Mem passed through the temple door and encountered you, who had just entered Amphoreus. Was this a first meeting, or... a long-awaited reunion?

ch: 「罗浮杂俎」上出现了白露在众人面前凭空消失的帖子，你们决定向浮烟探听情报。
en: A post on Ghostly Grove described Bailu disappearing into thin air before witnesses. The squad decided to approach Cirrus for information.

ch: 岁阳抓捕成功，白露也将要回归丹鼎司。接下来，将这次「灵异事件」的调查报告发到「罗浮杂俎」上吧。
en: Having captured the heliobus and with Bailu ready to return to the Alchemy Commission, it was time to post the investigation report on this "paranormal incident" to the Ghostly Grove.

ch: 藿藿十分想念尾巴，花了很久时间在「罗浮杂俎」中看帖。在众人的安慰下，藿藿终于发现了新线索。
en: Huohuo really missed Tail and spent hours browsing posts on "Ghostly Grove." With the squad's encouragement, Huohuo eventually discovered a new lead.

ch: 彦卿感谢诸位的相救，素裳则得意地向你们邀功。事情既已结束，将这次「灵异事件」的调查报告发到「罗浮杂俎」上吧。
en: Yanqing thanked everyone for the rescue, while Sushang proudly claimed credit for her part. With the incident resolved, go post the investigation report on this paranormal incident in the Ghostly Grove.

ch: 素裳仍在夸耀自己与彦卿作战一事。一切事毕，将这次「灵异事件」的调查报告发到「罗浮杂俎」上吧。
en: Sushang was still bragging about her clash with Yanqing. With the case finally closed, go post the investigation report on this paranormal incident to the Ghostly Grove.

ch: 你们打算利用「罗浮杂俎」这个灵异爱好者网站来获取信息。桂乃芬提议在网站上发布捉鬼实录来吸引粉丝、收集线索。
en: The squad decided to use "Ghostly Grove," a website for paranormal enthusiasts, to collect information. Guinaifen proposed posting recordings of ghost captures to draw followers and gather leads.

ch: 「罗浮杂俎」上出现了与青雀有关的帖子。
en: A post about Qingque appeared on Ghostly Grove.

en: "Eternal Holy City" Okhema

en: Amphoreus' Saga of Heroes

en: Membrance Maze

ch: 「永恒之地」翁法罗斯，三重命途交织的开拓陌地，命运的涡心正静待一叶扁舟蓦然驶入……
en: Amphoreus, the Eternal Land. A new horizon to trailblaze where the Three Paths intersect, and the vortex of fate calmly awaits the sudden arrival of a small vessel...

ch: 翁法罗斯：落木逐火英雄纪
en: Amphoreus: Heroic Saga of Flame-Chase

ch: 翁法罗斯：在黎明升起时坠落
en: Amphoreus: The Fall at Dawn's Rise

ch: 翁法罗斯：于长夜重返大地
en: Amphoreus: Back to Earth in Evernight

en: Defeat #4 Furiae Warrior(s) in Amphoreus
