ch: 在「翁法罗斯」捕捉#4个「贼灵」，并夺回被抢走的宝藏
en: Catch #4 Spirithieves in Amphoreus and take back the stolen treasure

ch: 在「翁法罗斯」捕捉#4个「贼灵」，并夺回被抢走的宝藏
en: Catch #4 Spirithieves in Amphoreus and take back the stolen treasure

ch: 在「翁法罗斯」捕捉#4个「贼灵」，并夺回被抢走的宝藏
en: Catch #4 Spirithieves in Amphoreus and take back the stolen treasure

ch: 在「翁法罗斯」找到#4次「黄金短矛」
en: Find Golden Short Spear in Amphoreus #4 time(s)

ch: 在「翁法罗斯」乘坐#4次大地兽
en: Ride dromases #4 time(s) in Amphoreus

ch: 在罗浮杂俎上累计回复<unbreak>10</unbreak>次评论
en: Accumulate a net total of <unbreak>10</unbreak> comment replies on Ghostly Grove

ch: 通过迷迷的力量，你们来到了这位神秘眷属记忆中的过往。悬锋城的喧嚣与奥赫玛的熙攘混杂，刀剑与金丝纠缠……
en: Through the power of Mem, you find yourselves transported into the memories of this mysterious Titankin. The clamor of Castrum Kremnos mixes with the bustling of Okhema, as swords and golden threads intertwine...

ch: 阿格莱雅逝去的消息很快便传遍了奥赫玛，焦躁与哀伤蔓延在圣城当中……
en: News of Aglaea's passing spread swiftly across Okhema. Restlessness and sorrow consumed the holy city...

ch: 我的奴仆，我的侍者，我的剑。我点燃欲望的火把，我想舍弃的柔软，我铁王冠上的锈。\n在这最伟大的牺牲前，于成千伙友、上万敌手、千万世人间。\n我竟然只难舍一人。
en: My servant, my attendant, my sword. The torch that ignites my desires, the tenderness I wish to discard, the rust upon my iron crown.\nBefore this greatest sacrifice, among thousands of companions, tens of thousands of foes, and millions of mortals.\nYet I find it hardest to let go of just one person.

ch: 昔涟以哀丽秘榭的「记忆」为灵感打造的迷宫。
en: A labyrinth crafted by Cyrene, inspired by the "memories" of Aedes Elysiae.

ch: 围猎「盗火行者」
en: Entrap the Flame Reaver

ch: 「呓语密林」神悟树庭
en: "Murmuring Woods" Grove of Epiphany

ch: 神悟树庭的沉思巨桹
en: Grove of Epiphany's Pondering Colossus

ch: 神悟树庭的联识叶路
en: Grove of Epiphany's Interwoven Veins

ch: 迷路迷境的恬梦树屋
en: Membrance Maze's Serene Treehouse

ch: 迷路迷境的祈愿笛哨
en: Membrance Maze's Wishing Whistle

ch: 翁法罗斯的西风尽途
en: Last West Wind of Amphoreus

ch: 永恒之地翁法罗斯
en: Amphoreus, The Eternal Land

ch: 永恒之地翁法罗斯
en: Amphoreus, The Eternal Land

ch: 欧洛尼斯的夜雾缠绕月桂树枝， 救世的英雄随着黑匣一同，自天外降临命运重渊。 {F#她}{M#他}应神谕而来，然而那时祭司们却畏惧着谈论天外。 「切莫高声谈论天空，那多疑的艾格勒从不犹疑降下阳雷的责罚。」 听罢这番话，自信的救世主怒气咻咻答道： 「灾难的预卜者，你从未考虑过，神明也应担忧来自人子的责罚。」 在城垣之上，救世主见证玫瑰色的黎明在地平线上升起， 「首先是那执掌『纷争』的尼卡多利， 我祈求它能为自己带来荣耀，而并非疯狂。」 救世主摘开风帽，将一柄长枪掷出， 那迅驰的飞影好似初春的独狼，冲向了悬锋城，在街巷间奔突。 「以墨涅塔之名！若命运纺线已断，我会重续篇章。」 远方响起了疯王的怒吼，那长枪先于脚步宣告了启程。 「那与我为伴的黄金裔伙伴将在旅程中等候，我必须出发了。」 雅努斯祭司们望向救世主披散的灰发，高声欢呼， 就像得到滋养的干枯草种一般欢欣。
en: The night fog of Oronyx entwines with laurel branches, as the hero of deliverance descends from beyond the sky into the Abyss of Fate, alongside a black box. {F#She}{M#He} came in response to the prophecy, yet in those times the priests feared to speak of what lay beyond the sky. "Do not speak loudly of the sky, for the suspicious Aquila never hesitates to castigate with Daythunder." Hearing this, the confident Deliverer replied in fury: "O diviner of calamities, you never considered that even the gods should fear punishment from the children of humanity." Upon the city walls, the Deliverer witnessed the rosy dawn rising on the horizon, "First comes Nikador, who wields Strife, I pray they bring me glory, not madness." The Deliverer pulled back {F#her}{M#his} hood and hurled a spear, its swift shadow like a lone wolf in early spring, charging through the streets of Castrum Kremnos. "In the name of Mnestia! If destiny's threads are broken, I shall weave a new chapter." The Mad King's roar echoed from afar, his spear heralding departure before his steps. "My Chrysos Heir companions await me on this journey, I must set forth." Janus's priests looked at the Deliverer's fluttering gray hair and cheered loudly, rejoicing like withered plants bestowed with nourishment.

ch:
神悟树庭的一缕思绪，巨树上的一束横枝。脉络牵出千百种论调，如繁枝细节般各自延展。虽相互独立，却又丛生交叠，最终，盘桓成令巨树繁茂蓬勃的树冠。

其中一根枝杈将叶柄指向了自己，纠结盘绕。「莲食学派」的苦行者为树纹花叶本身的奥秘所倾倒，将植生，乃至万象，都描绘为触手可及的显见存在。他们所专注的苦行，是调和世间万物的实践方式——在他们看来，苦修并非是弃绝自我的做法，反倒认识自己的捷径。

其中一根枝杈结育硕果，缀满枝头。「山羊学派」的学者们精于奇兽研究、繁殖和保护——奇美拉令人怜爱的百态，便是他们对万相生灵探求的小小实践。

其中一根枝杈虬结成完美的比例，精确而优雅。「绳结学派」的学者们宣称「万物皆数」，即——一切实体皆可用数字映射。作为树庭最早凝聚的学派，他们坚守学院门槛，要求「不识几何学者不得入内」，更将数理奉为{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}统御世间的手段。

其中一根枝杈生得浑厚圆实、韧性十足。「曳石学派」要求学者须在拜入前挥舞投石索，将圆石抛掷出指定范围外，以此证明其有意在锻炼、思辨及其竞技活动中「追求极致」。

其中一根枝杈时而垂下，时而挺立，向知觉传达纯粹的美感。「赤陶学派」将艺术与感性的探讨视作对逻辑思维的本源，坚信感官直接提取的信息最为精炼，所抵世界更为达观。

于繁茂的树冠之上，那虔诚敬拜的枝杈最适合祭礼，它形自巨木主干。「敬拜学派」精于泰坦仪式的理解及其神迹的运用，被称作「翁法罗斯政治家的摇篮」。他们不仅主导树庭信仰祭仪，其成果更是深入翁法罗斯的方方面面。偏偏有一根新生锐利的嫩枝，与它争锋相对——

「智种学派」继承自「最初的学者」对灵魂学说，专精于生命与事物间转化及扬升的理论，创办最为晚近，论点却最为犀利，其主导的学说，意图指向所有生命和物体的源头。

七大学派的七贤人各执治学领域，原则上不分先后——而理性的巨树身怀七贤人之首的虚衔，于无休止的辩论声中，将学识与理性开枝散叶，播撒世间。
en:
Each thought of the Grove of Epiphany is like a branch on the giant tree. The veins form hundreds of viewpoints, expanding like an intricate web of young boughs. Though independent, they intertwine, ultimately forming the thriving canopy of the great tree.

One branch pointed its leaf stalk toward itself, twisting in intricate coils. The Ascetics of Lotophagism were captivated by the very patterns of the tree's leaves and flowers, believing that all life and even the cosmos were visible, tangible realities. Their practice was not merely asceticism for its own sake, but a method of harmonizing all things — seeing asceticism not as the denial of self, but as a direct path to understanding it.

Another branch bore heavy fruit, filling the boughs. Scholars of Caprism specialized in the study, breeding, and preservation of animals. The many forms of the chimeras, both pitiful and beautiful, were their small but meaningful experiment to understanding the vast diversity of life.

One branch twisted into a perfect proportion, precise and elegant. The scholars of Nodism asserted that "all things are numbers," believing everything could be mapped mathematically. As one of the earliest schools to form in the Grove, they imposed strict standards, proclaiming "No scholar who is ignorant of geometry may enter" and regarded mathematics as the very means by which {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} governs the world.

Another branch grew thick and resilient, sturdy and enduring. Helkolithism required the scholars to prove their discipline by swinging a sling before admission, casting stones beyond a specific range. This was a test to demonstrate their commitment to "perfectionism" in thought, physical rigor, and competitive spirit.

One branch alternated between drooping and standing tall, transmitting an exquisite beauty to the senses. The Erythrokeramists view art and sensibility as the core of logical thinking, believing that the rawest and most refined knowledge comes from direct sensory experience, leading to a more enlightened and profound understanding of the world.

High above, in the lush treetop, one branch devoted and worshipful stood closest to the heart of the giant tree. This branch was the most suited for ritual. The Venerationists excelled in the understanding of Titan ceremonies and the deployment of divine miracles, earning the nickname "The Cradle of Amphoreus' Politicians." They not only governed the Grove's sacred rites but also influenced the very fabric of Amphoreus' politics. However, there was a new and sharp young shoot, rising in opposition...

The Nousporist inherited the First Scholar's teachings on the soul, and specialized in the transformation and ascension of life and matter. It was the youngest school, yet with the most cutting-edge arguments, focused on tracing the origins of all life and material existence.

The Seven Sages of the Seven Schools each presided over their respective fields of study, with no hierarchy among them. The towering giant tree of reason, the symbolic head of the Seven Sages, spread knowledge and reason like branches, scattering them across the world amid endless debates and intellectual discourse.

ch: 神悟树庭的沉思巨桹
en: Grove of Epiphany's Pondering Colossus

ch: 神悟树庭的联识叶路
en: Grove of Epiphany's Interwoven Veins

ch: 迷路迷境的恬梦树屋
en: Membrance Maze's Serene Treehouse

ch: 迷路迷境的祈愿笛哨
en: Membrance Maze's Wishing Whistle

ch: 翁法罗斯的西风尽途
en: Last West Wind of Amphoreus

ch: 万敌
en: Mydei

ch: 万敌不是也健身么，先用他的吧
en: Doesn't Mydei also lift weights? Use his for now

ch: 树庭学者的研究表明，每周充分摄入一次卡路里，对减脂很有帮助哦
en: Research from Grove scholars shows that eating a full-calorie meal once a week actually helps with fat loss.

ch: 都说万敌是大厨，让我尝尝吧
en: I've heard Mydei is an excellent chef. I'd like to try his food

ch: *我们*知道！奥赫玛也流行过这种店，好像叫欧玛…卡什么的
en: We've heard of these! Places like this were all the rage in Okhema, too. They called it... omaka-something

ch: @万敌是当值主厨，让他来教更适合
en: @Mydei is the head chef on duty, so he should be the one teaching

ch: 万师傅炒
en: Take the wok, Chef Mydei!

ch: 让万敌来教
en: Mydei should take the role

ch: 生长于哀丽秘榭的主厨依照回忆烹饪而成的菜肴。加入了田埂里生长的野菜，随着时序变换，食材也会全然不同。
en: A nostalgic dish crafted by the head chef from Aedes Elysiae. Made with wild greens growing along the ridges, its ingredients shift with the changing seasons.

ch: 以南瓜的奶香替代了焦糖的甜味。是奥赫玛城中观赏戏剧时的必备小吃。
en: Creamy pumpkin aroma replaces traditional caramel sweetness. A staple snack when enjoying theatrical plays in the city of Okhema.

ch: 为他带去树庭的证伪。
en: Bring him the Grove of Epiphany's negative evidence.

ch: 我要成为翁法罗斯首富。
en: I want to become the richest person in Amphoreus.

ch: 我要成为神悟树庭贤者。
en: I want to become a sage in the Grove of Epiphany.

ch: 大地与海洋是如此辽阔，哪怕是瑟希斯的学者，也难免在其中迷失。唯有雅努斯的加持，方能令世人得到指引。它慷慨地在镜中向人们揭示道路，在艾格勒紧闭百眼的夜晚，石镜散射的微弱光辉，也足以让旅者在黑暗中找到正确的方向。更有甚时，命运泰坦会以镜像昭示即将到来的灾难，以闪烁的群星，引领人们从黑潮中逃离。纵使早已陨落，万径之门也仍庇佑着翁法罗斯的众多子民。
en: The expanse of land and sea can overwhelm even the learned scholars of Cerces, leading them astray. Only with Janus's blessing can true guidance be found. The Stone Mirror of Revelation generously unveils paths, offering just enough light to navigate during the nights when Aquila's all-seeing eyes are shut. At crucial times, the Fate Titans use the mirror to predict impending calamities, guiding people away from looming disasters with the flickering of stars. Even in its decline, the Gate of Infinity continues to offer its protection to the many descendants of Amphoreus.

ch: 在遥远的年代，人们也曾用双脚丈量大地的尺度，然而行走的速度终究太过缓慢，没有人能描绘翁法罗斯的全貌。艾格勒的学者莱特泽维尔决定挣脱引力的桎梏，他打造出铁制的飞鸟，仅需涉取泰坦的光辉便能扇动双翼。铁鸟掠过之处，山川和江河尽数收入瞳孔，最终化为桌案上精准的地图。在铁鸟起飞前，学者都会虔诚地赞美艾格勒，他们相信这能让铁鸟飞得更快更稳。
en: Long ago, humans tried to map the vastness of Amphoreus with their steps, yet the speed of their gait was far too slow to capture the world's entire expanse. Seeking to break free from the constraints of gravity, Aquila's scholar, Ritzwehr, crafted an iron bird that could fly by merely harnessing the brilliance of the Titans. This iron bird captured the landscape in its pupils with such precision that rivers and mountains were shrunk into maps on his desk. Before each flight, the scholars of Aquila would offer their devout praises, believing their faith would grant the iron bird greater speed and stability.

ch: 自黄金世结束以来，翁法罗斯就从来不乏希冀逃避死亡的愚人。有人将自己关在一群疯子里面，试图以此混淆泰坦的视线。有人则把自己藏进棺椁，以磐石隔绝冥河的湍流，想要保留永世的容颜。而命运也自然赋予他们应得的下场，疯掉的王，再也没法死去；沉睡的少女，在永眠中迎来了不朽。而在灰黯之手的长船上，赐福和诅咒，从来都并无差别。
en: Since the end of Era Chrysea, Amphoreus has never lacked fools hoping to evade death. Some lock themselves among madmen, attempting to confuse the eyes of the Titan. Others hide in coffins, using boulders to isolate themselves from the turbulent River of Souls, seeking to preserve eternal beauty. And fate naturally bestows upon them their deserved end. Thus, the mad king can never die, while the slumbering maiden greets immortality in her eternal sleep. On the Hand of Shadow's long ship, blessings and curses are indistinguishable.

ch: 尼卡多利的眷属之所以是令所有翁法罗斯人畏惧的战争机器，一方面归功于纷争泰坦赐予的力量，另一方面则是因为出色的后勤保养。每当一场战争结束，悬锋人都会用特制的按摩仪为眷属们进行全身放松，这种仪器通过每秒钟数十次的快速击打，可以有效缓解各关节的迟钝，提高眷属的作战能力。唯一的缺点是，该按摩器的使用寿命十分有限，但悬锋人很快发现，退役的按摩器依旧可以在拷问战俘方面有很大的发挥空间。
en: The kins of Nikador are feared across Amphoreus as relentless war machines, owing not only to the power bestowed by the Strife Titan, but also to their exceptional logistical upkeep. After every battle, the Kremnoans use specially designed massage devices to relax the kins' bodies. These instruments deliver rapid dozens-per-second strikes, effectively loosening stiff joints and enhancing combat readiness. The only drawback? The devices have a notoriously short lifespan. However, the Kremnoans soon discovered that even after retirement, these massage tools could still serve a rather effective role in the interrogation of prisoners of war.

ch: 翁法罗斯有句名言——观察规律、总结规律、利用规律。某位塔兰顿的传教官无疑是这句话最优秀的践行者，她利用塔兰顿赐福过的天平有自动归正的特性，让人们向天平一侧许愿，一旦愿望成真，另一侧就会自动生出与之重量相等的奖赏。换句话说，愿望落空不亏，愿望达成加倍。许多人通过这种方式认识到了塔兰顿的力量，并心甘情愿的成为其信徒。
en: There is a well-known saying in Amphoreus: "Observe patterns, summarize patterns, utilize patterns." A certain missionary of Talanton was undoubtedly the finest practitioner of this philosophy. She took advantage of how Talanton's sacred scales would automatically rebalance to get people to make wishes on one side of the scales, and if the wish was fulfilled, an equivalent reward would manifest on the other side. In other words, if the wish failed, no harm was done. If it succeeded, the reward was doubled. Through this miraculous display, many came to recognize Talanton's power and willingly became devoted followers.

ch: 或沉默，或身陨，但泰坦的赐福却仍残留于世间。往昔的呐喊与呼唤被封存进水晶，为后继者带来些许希望。倘若赐福的存在并不依赖于泰坦，那泰坦与神权究竟谁先一步诞生？树庭曾围绕这一话题展开一场空前的辩论，可直到愤怒压倒了理性，也没能得出答案。
en: The Titans have all either fallen silent or demised, but their benedictions remain in this world. The calls and bellows of the past were sealed into crystals and will bring some meager hope to those who will come after them. But if such benedictions exist independently of the Titans, then what came first — Titans or divine authority? The Grove had once conducted a spectacular debate on this topic, but could not reach an answer before the participants' rage overwhelmed their reason.

ch:
让我来讲述一群强大的战士吧，锋刃之间的纷争。
米勒达人与我们的战争，信仰尼卡多利的战士各自为伍，
从不偏袒的战神将力量赐予勇士，
即使他们并未将自己拱卫。
米勒达的重甲步兵气势轩昂，向移动的要塞进军，
呐喊在方阵上涤荡波浪，长矛在天空汇成交叉的大雨。
他们的卫队如同河水，柔软却强硬，
变化的军阵，纵是悬锋伙友也疲于应付。
悬锋终是无匹的城邦，王的长矛贯穿了另一位的心脏，
可我绝不会忘记，有群战士曾与我同享胜利父的威光。
en:
Let me tell you about a group of mighty warriors, the strife between blades.
Amidst the war between the Mildanians and ourselves, warriors who believe in Nikador align themselves with different factions,
And the impartial War God grants power to the brave,
Even if they do not guard themselves.
The Mildanians' heavily armored infantry strides forward with great momentum, marching towards mobile fortresses.
Their battle cries resonate like rolling waves across the phalanx, and their spears converge in the sky, forming a downpour of crossing blades.
Their guards move like a river in battle, flexible yet unyielding,
With ever-changing formations that leave even Kremnos vanguards struggling to keep pace.
Kremnos, an unmatched city-state, stands victorious as the king's spear pierces the other's heart.
But I'll never forget the warriors who stood alongside me, sharing in the glory of our victories.

ch:
不必多言，在血亲的根系里，我们已知晓你的来意。
在刻法勒创造人类以前，仙女木便已遍及世界，
与无知的你们不同，我们的理性扎根于大地，
智慧如雨露在其间流淌，即使凋零，也终有新生的种子传承。
我们仍能记得，
瑟希斯的灵智教导我们如何舒展叶片，如何思辨自我，
来往的学者曾被我们质问至沉默，
树庭最初的贤者，因我们的低语而灵光乍现。
那场弑神的旅途，若你想要知晓我们的答案，就侧耳倾听吧，
花瓣落入土壤，死亡成就新生，失败也绝非终结。
en:
There is no need for words. Through the roots that connect our blood, your intent is already known to us.
Before Kephale created humanity, the White Dryad had already spread across the world.
Unlike your ignorant kind, our reason is deeply rooted in the earth.
Wisdom flows among us like the morning dew. Though we may wither, our seeds carry the promise of renewal.
We remember.
Cerces taught us to unfurl our leaves, to question our very being.
The travelling scholars all fell silent by our questions.
The first sage of the Grove got their revelation from our whispers.
So, are you seeking answers to the godslayer's journey? Then just lend your ear and listen.
Petals fall off, bury in the soil. Death nourishes new life. Failure is never the end.

ch:
我的表亲蒂泰尼，是守望沙漏的记述官之一。
岁月的指尖划出河流，让时间在其中流淌，
大地静默地陪伴着世人，承载千载的时光。
他们从河畔淘来沙粒，当它从沙漏中落下，
承载的历史也得以释放。
它曾是阿卡索斯的短剑，被战争卷携，
受冥河侵蚀，在水中迷离了百年的时光。
它曾是埃普斯的石雕，随纷争陷落深渊，因嬉戏的奇兽被洗刷至此。
由大地与岁月降下的赐福，自沙粒中解读出过往，
他们笃信，只要仍有人在读着翁法罗斯的故事，世界便永不灭亡。
en:
My cousin Titanis is one of the chroniclers who watch over the Hourglass.
The fingers of time drew river ways, time flowing through them.
The earth quietly stood by, bearing the weight of centuries.
The chroniclers gathered grains of sand from the riverbank and put them in the hourglass.
Each grain of sand would release a piece of history it bore.
Once, it was the short sword of Icatus, swept away by war,
Eroded by the River of Souls, lost to the currents for a century.
Once, it was a statue from Epos, fallen into the abyss in the wake of conflict, brought ashore by the playful beasts of legend.
A benediction from the earth and time enables us to read the past from the sand.
They believe that as long as there are those who read the stories of Amphoreus, the world shall never perish.

ch:
可别笑老恩勒我无礼，实在是停不下手头的工作。
以天空与烈阳为基准，锻造出钢铁的飞鸟，
螺旋工坊尚未焚毁的年岁，萨库曾四季如春。
我们的造物足以媲美天空祭司的城邦，
推论的公式连绳结学派也远道来求访。
破灭终至，翁法罗斯亦如天空日渐黯淡。
但螺旋的子嗣仍行走在大地上，背负沉重的行囊，
穿行于苟延残喘的城邦，修复断裂的机械，
重现业已消逝的技术、知识和思想。
此世曾受我主照耀，而我等将为它带回，
曾遍及此世的理性与睿智之光。
en:
Gee, please forgive me for my lack of manners. I simply can't stop my work at hand.
With the sky and the blazing sun as our measure, we once forged steel birds to fly.
In the years before the Helix Workshop burned down, Saku basked in eternal spring.
Our creations could rival those made by the cities of the Sky Priest.
Even the Nodists came from afar to study the theories we derived.
But later the destruction came, and Amphoreus grew dimmer by the day.
Yet, the offspring of the Helix Workshop still walk the earth, burdened with heavy backpacks,
Traveling through the crumbling city-states to fix broken machines.
They are dedicated to reviving the lost technologies, knowledge, and ideals.
This world was once blessed by the light of our god.
So we shall bring back to them the light of reason and intelligence that once illuminated every corner of it.

ch:
想知道我此行的目的地吗？被群山环绕的故乡。
崖壁上雕刻着蹩脚的花朵，大地兽俯身休憩，听着笑声入眠。
我们来自翁法罗斯的各个角落，
废墟的深处，因轻雨的冷而发出哭泣，直到被山之民们收养。
他们失去了自己的神灵，失去了一切，
不再冶炼，笨拙的手播撒种子，坚硬的臂膀拥抱新生，
哺育生命，乃是磐岩之脊留存给世人的，最后的天职。
大地已然陨落，背负着火种的巨兽不知去向，
但我仍愿合掌，向创造此间的吉奥里亚祈祷，愿生命茁壮成长。
en:
You want to know where I am going? It's my homeland, surrounded by mountains.
The cliffs there are adorned with awkwardly carved flowers, and the dromas rest in the valley, lulled to sleep by laughter of the inhabitants.
We were from every corner of Amphoreus.
In the deep ruins, we wailed in the cold rains until the Mountain Dwellers took them in.
The Mountain Dwellers lost everything, including their gods.
They stopped smelting. Their clumsy hands started to plow and sow. Their sturdy arms cradled new life.
Nurture was the last calling left to humans by the Pillar of Stone.
The earth has fallen. The Coreflame-carrying beasts have disappeared.
And I'll fold my hands in prayer to Georios. May life flourish again.

ch:
你可知在神悟树庭之外，还存在一批不被承认的学者？
他们不关注现有知识的传承，
只在意世人未曾知晓的领域。
他们将求知视为人生的苦旅，
身披荆棘，脚踩独木桥，
不仅须忍受煎熬，稍不留神还会粉身碎骨。
无论是黄金血的秘密，还是泰坦本身的存在，
甚至是那人人避之不及的黑潮，
皆是他们求知的方向。
如此亵渎的行为，必遭到神罚的苦难，
几乎所有学者都在研究稍有进展时遇难，
或被泰坦信徒围杀，或离奇意外死亡。
可他们依旧如飞蛾扑火一般，奔向那永远解不开的答案。
en:
Do you know that there's a group of unrecognized scholars beyond the Grove of Epiphany?
They don't care about the inheritance of established knowledge.
Instead, they focus solely on the mysterious, unexplored realms.
They regard the pursuit of knowledge as an arduous odyssey,
Where they brave thorny paths and precariously walk tightropes.
At every step, they endure immense suffering, and one misstep could spell their destruction.
Whether it's unraveling the mystery of the golden blood, probing into the existence of the Titans,
Or even the dreaded black tide,
Became a direction in their pursuit of knowledge.
Such blasphemous endeavors will surely invite divine punishment and suffering.
Nearly all scholars meet their untimely ends as soon as they make slight progress in their research,
Either being hunted down by Titan followers or dying in bizarre accidents.
Yet they continue to plunge toward those eternally unsolvable answers, like moths drawn to the flame.

ch:
没错，是我在照料这片花园，
无忧无虑之人才能定居的，无人流泪的理想乡，
将黑潮和战争都抛诸脑后，与世隔绝的田园。
何必去思考百年后的灾厄？何必苦恼后世的烦忧？
我们约定俗成地忘却翁法罗斯的一切，
在醒来后播种，
疲惫了便找块石头，坐着谈笑。
万径之门残存的赐福，护卫着它的壁垒，
只要人们仍依恋这片土地，它就不会倾倒。
你说这是自欺欺人，可忧虑无法改变事实，
不如趁着年华大好，流干最后的眼泪，
然后，围坐在篝火前，在宴会里安度余生。
en:
That's right, I'm the one tending this garden,
A utopia where only carefree people can settle, a place where no one sheds tears.
An isolated haven where the black tide and wars are thrown behind.
Why dwell on disasters a hundred years from now? Why fret over the troubles of future generations?
We conventionally forget everything about Amphoreus.
We sow seeds after a sound sleep,
And when weary, we find a stone to sit on and chat.
The remaining blessing of the Gate of Infinity protects its ramparts.
And as long as people remain attached to this land, it will not fall.
You say this is self-deception? But worry changes nothing.
So why not make the most of our good years, shed our last tears,
And gather by the bonfire to enjoy life's endless banquet?

ch:
这是刻录在石板上的巡猎时刻，天谴之矛尼卡多利的神迹。
无数人都曾见证过，征服者追猎天空的身形，
雷电扫过它的肩膀，双翼的眷属撕咬它的手臂，
无畏的纷争之神无暇擦拭金血，
以百支洞穿云翳的长矛作为回应。
于是天穹的百眼巨鸟尖啸着逃离，
胜利父跋涉过山峦和沟谷，
追猎那霸占了天空的，傲慢的仇敌。
从翁法罗斯的起点到终点，
如倒转的雨滴落入天空的长矛照亮黑夜，
刺入大地的雷枪亦永恒轰鸣。
模仿着神明，天空的祭司与悬锋的战士相向而对，
直到将另一方消灭殆尽，这场猎杀都绝不会止息。
en:
This is an instance of the hunt inscribed on a stone tablet. This is the miracle of Nikador, the Lance of Fury.
Countless witnesses had beheld the conqueror's heroic bearing as they fought in the sky.
Lightning swept across their shoulders, and the winged Titankin gnawed at their arms.
The fearless God of Strife spared no time to wipe away the golden blood.
In response, a hundred lances pierced through the dark clouds.
Wounded, the many-eyed giant bird of the sky dome shrieked and fled.
The Father of Victory traversed mountains and valleys
To relentlessly hunt the arrogant foe that usurped the sky.
Across Amphoreus, from north to south,
Lances like inverted raindrops pierced the sky, illuminating the night.
Thunder spears roared eternally as they struck the earth.
Imitating the divine, the sky priests and the warriors of Kremnos clashed head-on.
This hunt would never cease until one side was utterly annihilated.

ch:
这是刻录在石板上的智识话语，裂分之枝瑟希斯的神迹。
埃杜利亚的少女在诞生时，智慧便超脱常人，
她将百年间留下的难题尽数解开。
已无疑问能困扰的少女，找到瑟希斯的圣树，
傲慢的她向瑟希斯祈求一个问题，
倘若泰坦也无法难住自己，
自诩穷尽了世间知识的人子，便能证明，
自己比神明还要睿智。
瑟希斯提问，翁法罗斯之外有什么？
茫然的少女愣在原地，三天三夜亦无法解答。
问题的答案究竟是什么？
神明微笑着摇曳枝条，它亦无从知晓。
承认自我的愚钝，正是它比少女更睿智的地方。
en:
This is an erudite utterance inscribed on a stone tablet. This is the miracle of Cerces, the Bough of Rift.
A girl from Idilia was born with wisdom far surpassing that of ordinary people.
She solved all the puzzles left over a century.
With no questions left to challenge her, she found the sacred tree of Cerces.
In her arrogance, she prayed to Cerces for a question,
Believing even the Titans could not stump her.
She claimed to have exhausted all knowledge of the world, and wished to prove,
That she was wiser even than the gods.
Cerces asked, "What lies beyond Amphoreus?"
Bewildered, the girl stood motionless for three days and nights, unable to answer.
What, indeed, was the answer to the question?
The god smiled and swayed their branches, for they too did not know.
Admitting their own ignorance was what made them wiser than the girl.

ch: 万敌
en: Mydei

ch: <color=#f29e38ff>单次生效</color>，对万敌施放时解除<u>控制类负面状态</u>，若万敌处于【血仇】状态，则使其自动施放【弑神登神】并使暴击伤害提高。若万敌不处于【血仇】状态，使万敌<u>行动提前</u>。
en: <color=#f29e38ff>One-time effect</color>. When used on Mydei, removes <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u>. And if Mydei is in the "Vendetta" state, he automatically uses "Godslayer Be God" and increases his CRIT DMG. If he is not in the "Vendetta" state, Mydei's <u>action advances</u>.

ch: <color=#f29e38ff>单次生效</color>，对万敌施放时解除万敌陷入的所有<u>控制类负面状态</u>，若万敌处于【血仇】状态，则使其自动施放1次不消耗充能的【弑神登神】，本次攻击中万敌的暴击伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>，若施放前目标被消灭则对新入场的敌方目标施放。若万敌不处于【血仇】状态，则使万敌<u>行动提前</u><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>。
en: <color=#f29e38ff>One-time effect</color>. When used on Mydei, removes all <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> inflicted on him. And if Mydei is in the "Vendetta" state, he automatically uses 1 instance of "Godslayer Be God" without consuming Charge. Mydei's CRIT DMG increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> during this attack. If the target gets defeated before the use, then it will target the newly arriving enemy targets instead. If Mydei is not in the "Vendetta" state, then <u>advances Mydei's action</u> by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

ch: 【血仇】状态下万敌免疫<u>控制类负面状态</u>。
en: While in the "Vendetta" state, Mydei is immune to <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u>.

ch: 【血仇】状态下万敌受到致命攻击时不会退出【血仇】状态。
en: During the "Vendetta" state, Mydei will not exit the "Vendetta" state when receiving a killing blow.

ch: 【天谴之矛，迈德漠斯】征服了<color=#f29e38ff>%CasterName</color>的魂灵，受到<color=#f29e38ff>%CasterName</color>攻击的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>，被我方消灭后解除<color=#f29e38ff>%CasterName</color>的【受征服】。
en: "Mydeimos, Lance of Fury" conquered <color=#f29e38ff>%CasterName</color>'s soul and will take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> more DMG from <color=#f29e38ff>%CasterName</color>'s attacks. After being defeated by targets, dispel "Conquered" on <color=#f29e38ff>%CasterName</color>.

ch: 【天谴之矛，迈德漠斯】征服了<color=#f29e38ff>%CasterName</color>的魂灵，受到<color=#f29e38ff>%CasterName</color>及其忆灵攻击的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>，被我方消灭后解除<color=#f29e38ff>%CasterName</color>的【受征服】。
en: "Mydeimos, Lance of Fury" conquers <color=#f29e38ff>%CasterName</color>'s soul and will take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> more DMG from <color=#f29e38ff>%CasterName</color>'s memosprite attacks. After being defeated by targets, dispel "Conquered" on <color=#f29e38ff>%CasterName</color>.

ch: 可回复的生命上限和可回复的战技点上限降低，当【翁法罗斯的「恨」】降低时可削弱该效果。
en: Maximum Restorable HP and Maximum Recoverable Skill Points are reduced. This effect can be weakened when "Amphorean Hatred" decreases.

ch: 永恒之地翁法罗斯
en: Amphoreus, The Eternal Land

ch: 悬锋盾牌
en: Kremnos Shield

ch: 悬锋重剑
en: Greatsword of Kremnos

ch: 在那黎明照拂的圣城，织者抚弄金丝，连缀命运。\n背负「浪漫」火种的黄金裔，召集世间英雄，带领他们再度踏上漫长的征程\n——击落众神，归还神火，予以几近覆灭的翁法罗斯新生。
en: In that holy city kissed by the dawn, the weaver caresses the golden threads, entwining fates.\nThe Chrysos Heir that bears the "Romance" Coreflame gathered the world's heroes, leading them on a long journey once more\n— to topple the gods, reclaim the divine flame, and grant rebirth to the nearly fallen Amphoreus.

ch: 许多年之后，当她无意间找到少女时代织就的衣物，温柔自绸缎流淌而下，令她久无波动的心为之一颤。 世代供奉「墨涅塔」的家族中，人人从小学习一项「美」的技艺，大师们的画像悬于私人浴池的名誉墙上，无时无刻不审视着他们的子孙。 谁到了这里不是噤若寒蝉，可偏偏她在那大师目光的重压下轻盈走动。 「绘画失之于虚假，音乐失之于抽象，雕塑失之于笨重，戏剧失之于流俗……」 长辈一脸无奈，稚嫩的声音却让人无法反驳。 「小雅，还能有什么比它们更美？」 她踏出浴池，踮脚舞蹈至镜前，淡金色的长发如瀑般流淌而下。 「不。」 水晕弥漫的镜面上，金色的双眸牵引着万缕千丝的视线—— 「我一定会找到——那更美的存在。」 「就是为了这样单纯的理由，后来啊……」衣物的温暖触着指尖，泛起回忆。 她在树庭中淘气攀爬，浴池中沉思想象，只为了拾一枚金叶，一捧灵感的浪花。 她在屋顶跳跃奔跑，在原野逗留张望，为了用丝线重现微风的自由与弥远的花香。 时间流淌，织机不停，她的作品源源不断，于奥赫玛中掀起风潮，一次又一次。 她穿着最为得意的织物拜访神殿，但她仍怀有疑问：「这是美吗？」 那「墨涅塔」的祭司已至暮年，虽难以清晰视物，但女孩的光彩仍刺破了她眼前的昏暗。 「小雅，当你接过『金织』的职责时，你一定能创造出令诸神嫉妒的作品。 「这件衣物，以及穿着这件衣物的你，都是如此美丽…但这并不是『美』。」 「可…美和美丽…不是一个意思吗？」 「你呀，还不懂…不懂是好事，好事啊……」
en: Years later, when she unexpectedly discovers a garment she had woven in her youth, tenderness pours from the silk, gently shaking her long-stilled heart. In the family devoted to Mnestia throughout the generations, each member is taught a "beautiful" art from a young age. Portraits of the great masters hang on the honor wall of the private bath, ever watching over their progeny. While many are left speechless by the intense scrutiny of these masters, she moves with an effortless grace beneath their heavy gaze. "Painting succumbs to pretense, music to abstraction, sculpture to bulkiness, and drama to the mundane..." The elders show clear signs of defeat, but her voice, young and resolute, silences any objections. "Little Agy, surely there is nothing more beautiful than these." Stepping out of the bath, she dances on tiptoes to the mirror, her pale golden hair cascading like a waterfall. "No." In the steam-clouded mirror, her golden eyes pull countless strands of attention along — "I will find it — the existence that surpasses all others in beauty." "It was for such a simple reason that, later on..." The warmth of the garment touches her fingertips, awakening memories. She mischievously climbs in the Grove and mused in the baths, all for a golden leaf, a handful of inspirational spray. She dashed across rooftops and paused in meadows, all to weave the freedom of the breeze and the far-off fragrance of flowers into her threads. Time flowed on. The loom never stilled. Her creations spark trends in Okhema, again and again. Dressed in her finest fabric, she visits the temple, yet she still wonders, "Is this beauty?" The priest of Mnestia had reached her twilight years, her eyesight diminished, yet the girl's brilliance still cut through the gloom before her. "Little Agy, when you assume the mantle of the 'Goldweaver,' you're destined to craft works that even the gods would envy." "This garment, and you in this garment, are indeed beautiful... yet this isn't 'beauty'." "But... aren't 'beauty' and 'beautiful' the same?" "You still don't understand... and not understanding, that's a good thing, truly a good thing..."

ch: 「▇▇▇月▇▇日 我们初见阿雅的时候，她说喜欢缇里西庇俄丝这个名字，听起来又高贵又美丽，就像她编织的衣服。我们问她，就为了这个把我们留下？她摇摇头，说，主要是想听老师每天晚上讲故事。 当时阿雅也是个姑娘，又怕黑又怕鬼，想到她嘴馋了还要拉上我们偷偷去厨房吃晚上剩下的面包，我们就忍不住想笑。时光是个雕刻家，像刻律德菈、海瑟音一样，现在阿雅出落得多么美丽啊！ 就像我们平时教导的那样，阿雅没有让任何人失望，她手中的金丝就像密网一般，任何敌人都无法飞出她的指尖。 可那活在阴影中的清洗者在返程途中偷袭了我们的队伍，服务于元老院的刺客组织绝不允许能领导圣城奥赫玛的黄金裔成长起来。但我们也一样，宁愿选择牺牲自己，也绝不会眼睁睁地看着年轻的英雄夭折—— 我们顺利用百界门度过了这次劫难，但意识也模糊了一分…上一次用百界门以后，我还以为再也找不到缇宁和缇宝了…… 没事的，阿雅。还不是现在，我们只需要休息一会，一会便好…… 只是旅程的脚步，必须要加快了啊……」 ——一封字迹虚弱的日记 缇安在回忆，缇宁提笔写，缇宝来补充
en: "Date: ▇▇▇ / ▇▇ The first time we met Agy, she told us she was fond of the name Tribios, praising it as noble and beautiful, much like the garments she crafted. We asked if that was her sole reason for keeping us around. She shook her head, explaining she mainly wanted to hear this teacher's nightly tales. Agy was also just a girl back then, afraid of the dark and ghosts. Remembering how her cravings led us on stealthy trips to the kitchen for leftover bread at night always brings a smile to our faces. Time is a sculptor, and having shaped Cerydra and Hysilens, now it has rendered Agy beautifully. Agy never lets anyone down, just as we've always taught her. Her golden threads weave a dense net, ensnaring any foe that dares come close to her fingertips. Yet the Cleaners who dwell in the shadows ambushed our team on the return journey. The assassins loyal to the Council of Elders would never allow the growth of Chrysos Heir who could lead the holy city of Okhema. We are no different. We, too, would rather sacrifice ourselves rather than stand by and look on as the young heroes' lives were cut short — We managed to escape the ordeal using the Century Gate, though our consciousness grew hazy by one more portion... After the last passage through the Century Gate, I feared we'd never find Trinnon and Tribbie again... Don't worry, Agy. It's not our time yet. We just need a brief rest, and we'll be back on our feet... But we must hasten our steps now..." — A diary with weaker and weaker handwriting Reminisced by Trianne, recorded by Trinnon, and finalized by Tribbie

ch: 那沉入迷雾的悬锋，纷乱与战争之城！它的王室流着弑亲的血脉，它的神明以灾厄为名。\n不死的迈德漠斯，离群的狮子，逐猎「纷争」火种的黄金裔。你要忍受万死，浴血还乡，孤身背负疯狂的宿命\n——弑王成王，弑神登神。征战的铁蹄踏遍荒野，终归要沾上故乡的血。
en: Kremnos, the mist-shrouded city of chaos and war! Its royal lineage is tainted with patricide, and its god bears the name of calamity.\nThe undying Mydeimos, the lion apart from the rest. Chrysos Heir who seeks the Coreflame of Strife, must suffer a thousand deaths, be bathed in blood on the path home, and bear the madness of fate alone.\n— Kingslayer be king, godslayer be god. Iron-hooves pound across the wilderness for the campaign, and must eventually soak in the blood of their homeland.

ch: 神悟树庭，滋养知识的学府，诞育哲人的摇床。\n但渎神的阿那克萨戈拉斯，诘问「理性」火种的黄金裔，试问：你甘愿身负恶名，也要违逆预言，将怀疑的枝杈刺入智慧的圣树？\n——「可笑。这世界遍地虚假，唯有我才是真实。」
en: The Grove of Epiphany, where knowledge flourishes and philosophers are born.\nYet here stands Anaxagoras the blasphemer, the Chrysos Heir who challenges the Coreflame of Reason. He is questioned: Would you defy the prophecy even if you must bear infamy, and insist on driving the thorns of doubt into the Sacred Tree of wisdom?\n——"Ridiculous. In a world full of lies, I am the only truth."

ch: 「时至今日，我也未曾认同那神神叨叨的逐火之旅。但唯有一句话令我印象深刻——逐火是不断失却的旅途。 我从来不信黄金裔拥有相同的宿命，但毫无疑问，我也同样走在失却的道路上。 只是我失去的还不够…和我追求的东西相比，远不够满足等价交换的法则。 从提出泰坦与人的灵魂本质无异，灵魂由智种构成的理论后，我一直在等待一个彻底证实它的机会… 现在，这个机会终于来了！来得有些猝不及防，却也恰如其分。 今天，我终于能弥补多年前一场相似的灾难留下的遗憾。 我从死亡中得到灵感，也该如此偿还 ——我的身躯将作熔炼神明火种的容器，我的灵魂将成逼迫神明低头的枷锁，成就吾之理论的终极证明！ 现在的我无比快乐。 第一次造出能飞上天空的机械鸟，我曾这样笑着。第一次孵化出新生命时，我的双手曾这样颤抖。 后来的学子，倘若你看到这番话语，证明我已功败垂成，倒在黎明之前。 尽情使用我的成果，把我当作研究的对象！踏过我的身体，接过我的火把，把我当作照亮真理的薪柴投入燃烧的火焰！ 不要害怕亵渎—— 跨越神明本是禁忌，成为神明那又如何！」 ——树庭沦落后那刻夏记忆的回声之一，因无人发现而消散
en: "Even up till today, I still disagree with that bizarre Flame-Chase Journey. However, there is one statement that left a deep impression — Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey. I never believed that the Chrysos Heirs shared the same destiny, but I am undoubtedly also on the path of losses. Yet, I have not lost enough... In comparison to what I pursue, I have not lost enough to fulfill the law of equivalent exchange. After I had proposed the theory that the nature of souls of Titans and humans are no different, and that souls are constructed from seeds of wisdom, I have been waiting for a chance to prove it once and for all... Now, the opportunity has presented itself! It came rather unexpectedly, but also right on time. Today, I can finally make up for the regret, akin to a calamity, from numerous years ago. I gained inspiration from death, and should repay as such. My body shall become the vessel to forge the Coreflames of gods, and my soul shall become the chains that force the gods to bow. That will become the ultimate evidence for my theory! I am incredibly happy now. I once smiled like this, when I first created a mechanical bird that could fly in the sky. My hands once trembled like this, when I developed a new life through incubation. My future students, if you see these words, it proves that my endeavor has failed at the final step, falling just before the break of dawn. Use my results to the fullest extent, and make me the subject of your research! Step over my body and take the torch from my hands. Use me as the firewood to ignite the flames that will bring light to the truth! Do not fear blasphemy— It is already a sin to transcend the gods, so what if you become a god!" — One of the echoes in Anaxa's memories after the Grove had fallen, which vanished because nobody discovered it

ch: 哀丽秘榭，少年的家乡。 村庄日出而作，日落而息，如同他的身世，朴实无华。 只能容纳数人的校舍内，少年听着令人昏昏欲睡的历史课，心思早已跟手中飞舞的木屑一同飘向遥远的地方。  一笔一划，藏在桌屉里的木头逐渐显现出战士的模样。 「要有一把沉重的大剑，才配得上这样的实力……」 对着阳光，他磨利木片的边缘。 「铠甲闪耀着荣誉的伤痕，披风好似搏击风云的翅膀。 「还有……」 「白厄！想要成为最强的战士…就该好好听讲。」 皮西厄斯老师总是不厌其烦地打破他的幻想。 相比学校，少年更喜欢那麦秸堆垛的训练场。 那里是他的战场，稻草人时而是来袭的兵团，时而是横冲直撞的恶兽。 不上学的时候，他常常在这里与木头雕成的伙伴消磨一整天的时光，直到每一隅村户飘散出烹调的香味。 清凉的树荫下，疲惫的少年枕在草地便能安睡。 支离破碎的梦境中，他眺望着从未见过的城邦，见证波澜壮阔的故事。 「去成为英雄吧……」 那心声如同哀丽秘榭翻涌不息的麦浪，引领少年踏上远行的路。
en: Aedes Elysiae, the boy's hometown. The village lived by the rhythm of the sun: working at daybreak, resting at sundown, just like his own life, simple and unadorned. In a tiny schoolhouse that could barely fit a handful of students, the boy drifted off during a droning history lesson, his thoughts floating away with the wood shavings dancing from his hands. Stroke by stroke, the figure of a warrior slowly emerged from the block of wood hidden in his desk drawer. "A mighty greatsword... only a blade like that could match this strength..." He sharpened the edges of the wood chip in the sunlight. "Armor scarred by honor, a cloak like wings soaring through the storm." "And then..." "Phainon! If you want to be the strongest warrior... you'd better start paying attention." Miss Pythias never gets tired of dragging him back to reality. The boy preferred the training yard stacked with hay bales far more than school. It was his battlefield — where scarecrows turned into charging soldiers, or wild beasts on the rampage. When he was not at school, he often spent entire days there with his carved wooden comrades, until the smell of cooking wafted from every household. Beneath the cool shade of the trees, the exhausted boy could fall asleep right on the grass. In his broken dreams, he gazed at city-states he had never seen and witnessed grand tales unfold. "Go... become a hero." That voice, like the endless waves of wheat in Aedes Elysiae, guided the boy onto the road of adventure.

ch: 北境帝国，失落的王朝，寒冷的疆土燃烧着征伐的野心。\n君主刻律德菈，执握「律法」火种的黄金裔，布局设子，与神相弈，审判异心的罪囚，为此世奠定逐火的基业\n——「这绝非终点，翁法罗斯的征途，当是银河群星！」
en: The Northern Empire, a lost dynasty, where its frozen lands burn with the fever of conquest.\nSovereign Cerydra, the Chrysos Heir who wields the Coreflame of "Law," weaves her schemes, contends with the gods, passes judgment upon the faithless, and lays the foundation of Flame-Chase into this world.\n..."This is far from the end. Amphoreus's journey is set to blaze across the stars!"

ch: 三相的神谕自雅努萨波利斯，传向大地上无尽纷争的城邦。 「拯救世界…从来不是执棋者的兴趣。」 她品味神谕，熊熊燃烧的未来仿佛就在眼前—— 「但与那自视为主宰的神明相争，乃至走向天外…的确是旷古而绝世的一局！」 漫漫长夜中，她如璀璨的灯火吸引流淌金血的人子： 奥赫玛的议院中，黄金裔与平民共享争论与决议的公民权。 宏伟的图书馆拔地而起，逐火的使命人人皆可获取。 军队的旧习被废除，深海的游鱼搁浅在陆地，循着血与火的气味成为她的剑旗。 奥赫玛的政坛中，圣城的「金织」冉冉升起，金丝的颤动将众人的命运彼此连缀。 …… 但那棋盘以黄金之血勾勒，她的对手是神明。即便她以燃烧之痛换来冠冕，以永驻幼年换取未来，胜利的天平似乎从未真正倾向人子。 「逐火是不断失却的旅途…… 「唯有同等的代价，才能交换同等的胜利。但要击落神明，还远远不够……」 她日日夜夜推演，不愿自己的忧虑被人看见。 「既然你是棋手，我们便是棋子，对吧？」 不等她的回答，以剑为琴的少女洗去手上的血腥，点了点头。 「我明白了。」 唯有此时，那高傲的女皇才会罕见地沉默。 「如果可以……」 她的脸上浮现一丝似有若无的苦涩。 「不，没有如果。」 猎夺「海洋」火种的战役前，她再一次站在高台，望着五百位屏息等待谕令的臣子。 「诸位——」 当她的声音响起，欢呼声响彻云霄。 「今日，『海洋』将为我们倾覆，那『毁灭』的巨兽将成为无往而不利的武器，为征服星海举杯吧！」 她知道前方是有去无回的血海，但她必须扮演斩钉截铁的君王。 再一次，她仿佛听到老师的告诫—— 「棋是牺牲的艺术。 因此，棋手须首先立下必死的决心。」
en: The tripartite prophecy spreads from Janusopolis to the city-states in endless strife throughout the land. "Saving the world... has never been of a chessmaster's interest." She ponders the prophecy, envisioning a fiery future unfolding before her. "But to challenge gods who see themselves as rulers, and even venture beyond the sky... now that's a game worth playing!" Through the endless night, she draws golden-blooded children of humanity like a brilliant flame: In Okhema's Council, Chrysos Heirs and common folk alike share the right to debate and vote. Magnificent libraries rise from the ground, granting all access to knowledge of the Flame-Chase mission. As ancient military orders crumble into dust, a gladius of the deep is drawn to shore, following the perfume of blood and fire to serve as her blades. In the political waters of the holy city, the Goldweaver of Okhema rises on the horizon, and the trembles of golden threads entangle the people's fates. ... Yet her chessboard is etched in golden blood, and she plays against gods themselves. Though she trades burning pain for her crown and suffers eternal infancy for the future, the scales of victory have never truly tipped in humanity's favor. "Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey..." "Only through a worthy sacrifice can we gain a befitting victory. But to topple gods, this is far from enough..." Day and night she studies the board, concealing her anxieties from any watchful eyes. "If you're the chess master, then that makes us the pawns, right?" Without waiting for an answer, the girl who wields a sword like a musical instrument wipes blood from her hands and nods. "I understand now." Only in moments like these would the proud empress fall uncharacteristically silent. "If only..." A trace of bitterness flickers across her face. "No, there are no 'if onlys' anymore." Before the battle to claim the Ocean's Coreflame, she stands once more upon the platform, looking down at five hundred subjects who hold their breath, awaiting her decree. "My warriors..." As her voice resounds, cheers erupt throughout the crowd. "Today, the 'Ocean' shall surrender to us, and the beast of 'Destruction' will become our unstoppable weapon. Now, raise your cups! To our conquest of the sea of stars!" She knows that only a crimson sea of no return awaits ahead, but she must wear the mask of the unflinching ruler. In that moment, the wisdom of her teacher whispers to her again... "Chess is the art of sacrifice." "Your hands must accept death before touching the board."

ch: 万敌：王音希声
en: Mydei: Remnants of Regal Sounds

ch: 万敌：王音希声
en: Mydei: Remnants of Regal Sounds

ch: 名为缇宝的女孩借助奇妙的时空复现能力帮助难民脱离了险境，一行人即将安全奔赴奥赫玛。
en: A girl named Tribbie aids the refugees to lead them out of danger, using her remarkable ability to replicate space and time. The group is now preparing for a safe departure to Okhema.

ch: 纷争泰坦「尼卡多利」突袭奥赫玛，情急下我们伸出援手，跟随白厄一路击败泰坦眷属、保护居民。
en: Nikador, the Strife Titan, launched a surprise attack on Okhema. In a moment of desperation, we stepped in to assist. Following Phainon's lead, we defeated the Titankin and protected the residents on the way.

ch: 名为遐蝶与万敌的黄金裔为我们扫清沿途阻碍，我们即将与白厄一同直面「天谴之矛」尼卡多利，成就英雄之名。
en: The Chrysos Heirs named Castorice and Mydei cleared the obstacles in our path. Now, alongside Phainon, we will face Nikador, Lance of Fury, and become heroes.

ch: 击败尼卡多利的一具分身后，黄金裔领袖阿格莱雅带我们来到云石天宫，用别样的方式为我们讲述了翁法罗斯的历史。
en: After defeating a manifestation of Nikador, Aglaea, the leader of the Chrysos Heirs, guided us to Marmoreal Palace. There, she revealed the history of Amphoreus to us in a new and enlightening way.

ch: 「圣城」奥赫玛…据说是如今的末世长夜中，唯一的永昼之地。我们决定在城中游历一番，了解此处风土人情，同时收集可靠信息。
en: Okhema, the holy city... It is said to be the only place with eternal daylight amidst the end times' long night. We decide to tour the city to familiarize ourselves with the area and gather reliable information.

ch: 「圣城」奥赫玛…据说是如今的末世长夜中，唯一的永昼之地。我们决定在城中游历一番，了解此处风土人情，同时收集可靠信息。
en: Okhema, the holy city... It is said to be the only place with eternal daylight amidst the end times' long night. We decide to tour the city to familiarize ourselves with the area and gather reliable information.

ch: 好在「粉霞天女」风波结束得够快，黄金裔们暂未发觉。为感谢我们先前从尼卡多利手中保护奥赫玛，阿格莱雅似有谢礼要送。
en: Fortunately, the "Rosy Celestial Maiden" fiasco was quickly resolved before the Chrysos Heirs discovered it. As a token of gratitude for saving Okhema from Nikador, Aglaea seems to have prepared a special gift for us.

ch: 好在「粉霞天女」风波结束得够快，黄金裔们暂未发觉。为感谢我们先前从尼卡多利手中保护奥赫玛，阿格莱雅似有谢礼要送。

ch: 击败尼卡多利的一具分身后，黄金裔领袖阿格莱雅带我们来到云石天宫，用别样的方式为我们讲述了翁法罗斯的历史。
en: After defeating a manifestation of Nikador, Aglaea, the leader of the Chrysos Heirs, guided us to Marmoreal Palace. There, she revealed the history of Amphoreus to us in a new and enlightening way.

ch: 在黄金裔浴场中，阿格莱雅以自己的方式确认了我们的善意，似乎奥赫玛愿意将我们奉为贵宾。希望此次开拓之行真能这般顺利吧。
en: In the Chrysos Heirs bath, Aglaea affirmed our good intentions in her way, and it seems Okhema is willing to welcome us as honored guests. Let's hope this trailblazing expedition continues to unfold as smoothly.

ch: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
en: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

en: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

ch: 尼卡多利以神躯之百死淬炼剑刃，试图挥动「天谴之锋」刺穿远方的奥赫玛城。危急时刻，万敌独自殿后拖住尼卡多利，而其余人则回到奥赫玛，商议破局之法。
en: Nikador invoked the Body of a Hundred Deaths to temper blades, aiming to swing the Blade of Fury to pierce the distant Okhema. In this moment of crisis, Mydei held off Nikador alone, giving the rest of the party a chance to return to Okhema and strategize a way to counter this threat.

ch: 虽然我们成功来到欧洛尼斯所在，可它拒绝提供帮助。为了及时救援万敌，白厄不惜动用极端手段。
en: We arrived at Oronyx's residence, but they refused to offer any assistance. In a desperate attempt to save Mydei, Phainon was prepared to take drastic measures.

ch: 虽然我们成功来到欧洛尼斯所在，可它拒绝提供帮助。为了及时救援万敌，白厄不惜动用极端手段。在这剑拔弩张之时，欧洛尼斯的态度却在见到{NICKNAME}后发生了转变。
en: We arrived at Oronyx's residence, but they refused to offer any assistance. In a desperate attempt to save Mydei, Phainon was prepared to take drastic measures. Just as the sword was being drawn, Oronyx's demeanor shifted upon noticing {NICKNAME}.

ch: 虽然我们成功来到欧洛尼斯所在，可它拒绝提供帮助。为了及时救援万敌，白厄不惜动用极端手段。在这剑拔弩张之时，欧洛尼斯的态度却在见到{NICKNAME}后发生了转变。
en: We arrived at Oronyx's residence, but they refused to offer any assistance. In a desperate attempt to save Mydei, Phainon was prepared to take drastic measures. Just as the sword was being drawn, Oronyx's demeanor shifted upon noticing {NICKNAME}.

ch: 白厄的火种试炼突生变故，情急之下，我们决定与遐蝶、万敌一同介入试炼，将可能遭遇危险的白厄救出。
en: When crisis struck during Phainon's Coreflame trial as we waited anxiously, we made the snap decision to join Castorice and Mydei in rescuing Phainon from possible peril.

ch: 将白厄安顿好后，我与{NICKNAME}回到浴宫稍作休整。关于翁法罗斯世界的现状，我们也做了一些自己的判断与总结。
en: After ensuring Phainon's safety, {NICKNAME} and I retreated to the bath chamber to rest. We also drew our own conclusions about the present situation in the world of Amphoreus

ch: 我与{NICKNAME}他们失散在这片幻境中。据{NICKNAME}所说，{F#她}{M#他}看到了万敌心中的恐惧：那是来自悬锋一族以血铺就的荣耀……
en: {NICKNAME} and I became separated in this illusion. {NICKNAME} told me that {F#she}{M#he} travelled with Mydei and had seen the man's deepest fear, which was the blood-soaked glory of the Kremnos...

ch: 我与{NICKNAME}他们失散在这片幻境中。据{NICKNAME}所说，{F#她}{M#他}看到了万敌心中的恐惧：那是来自悬锋一族以血铺就的荣耀……

ch: 白厄的火种试炼失败，意味着承载尼卡多利神权的重任落到了唯一的悬锋王储——你的身上。但纵然身为「纷争」的正统继承人，你的心中却似乎有一处难以抹消的病灶……
en: The failure of Phainon's Coreflame trial means the responsibility of bearing Nikador's divinity now falls to the lone crown prince of Kremnos — you. Yet, even as the orthodox heir to "Strife," you seem to have an absurd extent of hesitation and objection to accepting the god's authority...

ch: 白厄的火种试炼失败，意味着承载尼卡多利神权的重任落到了唯一的悬锋王储——你的身上。但纵然身为「纷争」的正统继承人，你的心中却似乎有一处难以抹消的病灶……
en: The failure of Phainon's Coreflame trial means the responsibility of bearing Nikador's divinity now falls to the lone crown prince of Kremnos — you. Yet, even as the orthodox heir to "Strife," you seem to have an absurd extent of hesitation and objection to accepting the god's authority...

ch: 朝气蓬勃的悬锋稚童们让你再度思索悬锋城的未来，你决定找到悬锋老将克拉特鲁斯一叙。
en: Seeing the energetic Kremnoan children prompts you to reflect on Castrum Kremnos's future. You decide to seek out the Kremnoan veteran Krateros for a discussion.

ch: 朝气蓬勃的悬锋稚童们让你再度思索悬锋城的未来，你决定找到悬锋老将克拉特鲁斯一叙。
en: Seeing the energetic Kremnoan children prompts you to reflect on Castrum Kremnos's future. You decide to seek out the Kremnoan veteran Krateros for a discussion.

ch: 朝气蓬勃的悬锋稚童们让你再度思索悬锋城的未来，你决定找到悬锋老将克拉特鲁斯一叙。
en: Seeing the energetic Kremnoan children prompts you to reflect on Castrum Kremnos's future. You decide to seek out the Kremnoan veteran Krateros for a discussion.

ch: 昔日流思遍地的树庭，如今却陷入诡异的静默。{NICKNAME}一行人设法进入树庭，发现内部似乎情况不对……
en: The Grove, once filled with scholarly discourse, has now fallen into an eerie silence. {NICKNAME}'s group manages to enter, only to find that something seems amiss inside...

ch: 结束了堪称荒唐的比赛，白厄与万敌一同稍事休息。两位战士聊起火种试炼，吐露出彼此不为人知的往事……
en: Following a ridiculous contest, Phainon and Mydei stop to rest. The two warriors discuss the Coreflame trial, revealing untold stories from their pasts...

ch: 结束了堪称荒唐的比赛，白厄与万敌一同稍事休息。两位战士聊起火种试炼，吐露出彼此不为人知的往事……
en: Following a ridiculous contest, Phainon and Mydei stop to rest. The two warriors discuss the Coreflame trial, revealing untold stories from their pasts...

ch: 阿格莱雅因事务繁多，暂时无法与树庭归来的众人面议。舟车疲顿的{NICKNAME}一行人决定先休息一番。
en: With many matters demanding her attention, Aglaea cannot yet receive those back from the Grove. {NICKNAME}'s travel-weary group decides to rest first.

ch: 阿格莱雅因事务繁多，暂时无法与树庭归来的众人面议。舟车疲顿的{NICKNAME}一行人决定先休息一番。

ch: 阿格莱雅因事务繁多，暂时无法与树庭归来的众人面议。舟车疲顿的{NICKNAME}一行人决定先休息一番。
en: With many matters demanding her attention, Aglaea cannot yet receive those back from the Grove. {NICKNAME}'s travel-weary group decides to rest first.

ch: 缇安以耗尽神力为代价，将缇宝与缇宁送离战场。城中英雄会合，准备制定战术，救回缇安、围猎「盗火行者」。
en: Depleting her divine power, Trianne manages to send Tribbie and Trinnon away from the battle. The heroes gather in the city to plan tactics for rescuing Trianne and hunting down the Flame Reaver.

ch: 缇安以耗尽神力为代价，将缇宝与缇宁送离战场。城中英雄会合，准备制定战术，救回缇安、围猎「盗火行者」。

en: Depleting her divine power, Trianne manages to send Tribbie and Trinnon away from the battle. The heroes gather in the city to plan tactics for rescuing Trianne and hunting down the Flame Reaver.

ch: 与盗火行者的最终战场就在悬锋城。面对未知的强敌，众黄金裔必须全力以赴。
en: The final battle with the Flame Reaver takes place in Castrum Kremnos. Against this mysterious mighty foe, the Chrysos Heirs must fight with everything they have.

ch: 与盗火行者的最终战场就在悬锋城。面对未知的强敌，众黄金裔必须全力以赴。
en: The final battle with the Flame Reaver takes place in Castrum Kremnos. Against this mysterious mighty foe, the Chrysos Heirs must fight with everything they have.

ch: 与盗火行者的最终战场就在悬锋城。面对未知的强敌，众黄金裔必须全力以赴。
en: The final battle with the Flame Reaver takes place in Castrum Kremnos. Against this mysterious mighty foe, the Chrysos Heirs must fight with everything they have.

ch: 围猎盗火行者一役以黄金裔的凯旋作结。已肩负成神使命的你，如今将要面临另一个重要的抉择：成王与返乡。
en: The hunt for the Flame Reaver ends in victory for the Chrysos Heirs. Now bearing the mission of attaining divinity, you face another crucial choice: Claim the throne or return home.

ch: 我，不死的迈德漠斯，亡国的王储，纷争的新神…如今已迈上以血作辙的归途。
en: I, the undying Mydeimos, the Last Prince, the new God of Strife... now tread the blood-soaked road home.

ch: 我，不死的迈德漠斯，亡国的王储，纷争的新神…如今已迈上以血作辙的归途。
en: I, the undying Mydeimos, the Last Prince, the new God of Strife... now tread the blood-soaked road home.

ch: 我，不死的迈德漠斯，亡国的王储，纷争的新神…如今已迈上以血作辙的归途。
en: I, the undying Mydeimos, the Last Prince, the new God of Strife... now tread the blood-soaked road home.

ch: 我，不死的迈德漠斯，亡国的王储，纷争的新神…如今已迈上以血作辙的归途。
en: I, the undying Mydeimos, the Last Prince, the new God of Strife... now tread the blood-soaked road home.

ch: 虽然我们赢下了与盗火行者的战斗，却永远地失去了缇安……
en: Though we won the fight against the Flame Reaver, we have lost Trianne forever.

ch: 与盗火行者的意外遭遇，导致欧洛尼斯的火种被提前取出。众黄金裔们希望由{NICKNAME}来承担岁月的神职。\n开拓总是会面对如此的时刻，将自己的命运与他人的命运深深地结合在一起…只有{NICKNAME}自己能决定{F#她}{M#他}的命运走向何方。
en: An unexpected encounter with the Flame Reaver led to the premature extraction of Oronyx's Coreflame. The Chrysos Heirs hope that {NICKNAME} will take on the divine role of Time.\nTrailblazers always face moments like this, where their fate becomes deeply entwined with that of others... Yet only {NICKNAME} can decide where {F#her}{M#his} destiny leads.

ch: 与盗火行者的意外遭遇，导致欧洛尼斯的火种被提前取出。众黄金裔们希望由{NICKNAME}来承担岁月的神职。\n开拓总是会面对如此的时刻，将自己的命运与他人的命运深深地结合在一起…只有{NICKNAME}自己能决定{F#她}{M#他}的命运走向何方。

ch: 与盗火行者的意外遭遇，导致欧洛尼斯的火种被提前取出。众黄金裔们希望由{NICKNAME}来承担岁月的职责。\n{NICKNAME}和迷迷愿意尝试接受欧洛尼斯的试炼，而公民大会将近，黄金裔的英雄们也有新的麻烦要面对。
en: An unexpected encounter with the Flame Reaver led to the premature extraction of Oronyx's Coreflame. The Chrysos Heirs hope that {NICKNAME} will take on the authority of Time.\n{NICKNAME} and Mem are willing to face Oronyx's trial. But with the citizens' assembly approaching, the Chrysos Heir heroes have new troubles on the horizon.

ch: 与盗火行者的意外遭遇，导致欧洛尼斯的火种被提前取出。众黄金裔们希望由{NICKNAME}来承担岁月的职责。\n{NICKNAME}和迷迷愿意尝试接受欧洛尼斯的试炼，而公民大会将近，黄金裔的英雄们也有新的麻烦要面对。

The Chrysos Heirs hope that {NICKNAME} will take on the authority of Time.\n{NICKNAME} and Mem are willing to face Oronyx's trial. But with the citizens' assembly approaching, the Chrysos Heir heroes have new troubles on the horizon.

ch: 与盗火行者的意外遭遇，导致欧洛尼斯的火种被提前取出。众黄金裔们希望由{NICKNAME}来承担岁月的职责。\n未流淌着黄金血的异乡旅者也接受了泰坦的试炼，希望{NICKNAME}和迷迷一切顺利。\n「那不存在于预言之中，却由我纺入命运的，也并非仅此一例。」我想起了初次见到阿格莱雅时听到的这句话。
en: An unexpected encounter with the Flame Reaver led to the premature extraction of Oronyx's Coreflame. The Chrysos Heirs hope that {NICKNAME} will take on the authority of Time.\nEven as an outland traveler, whose veins carry no golden blood, has accepted the Titan's trial. Wishing {NICKNAME} and Mem the best of luck.\n"I've woven many unforeseen events into the tapestry of fate, this is but one instance." I remembered hearing this the first time I met Aglaea.

ch: 泰坦断崖——整个翁法罗斯中距离刻法勒奥体最近的地方。你的心中早就盘算着觐见负世之泰坦的计划。\n与神同行，登上神山。
en: The Titan Cliff — the closest one can get to Kephale's mystic body in all of Amphoreus. You have been planning to seek an audience with the Worldbearing Titan.\nTo walk with the gods, and ascend the holy mountain.

ch: 泰坦断崖——整个翁法罗斯中距离刻法勒奥体最近的地方。你的心中早就盘算着觐见负世之泰坦的计划。\n你的身体在云崖圣道上攀登，灵魂却在冥河滩涂上缓行…那些亡魂与登山道重合在一起，究竟想要讲述什么……
en: The Titan Cliff — the closest one can get to Kephale's mystic body in all of Amphoreus. You have been planning to seek an audience with the Worldbearing Titan.\nYour body climbs the Sacred Path of Dawncloud, but your soul lingers at the shores of River of Souls... The souls along the mountain path — what do they want to tell?

en: The Titan Cliff — the closest one can get to Kephale's divine vessel in all of Amphoreus. You have been planning to seek an audience with the Worldbearing Titan.\nTime to discover what lies ahead.

ch: 得知阿那克萨戈拉斯投奔元老院之后，为了掌控火种动向，阿格莱雅立刻动身前去黎明云崖质问元老院。\n将万敌传来的警告告诉阿格莱雅。
en: After discovering Anaxagoras had fled to the Council of Elders, Aglaea rushed to Dawncloud to confront the Council.\nDeliver Mydei's warning to Aglaea.

ch: 遐蝶登门拜访，既是为了散心，也是让{NICKNAME}跟随她取一样东西。\n遐蝶准备的礼物被翁法罗斯最有名的猫咪怪盗给偷走了，而她还留下了线索。
en: Castorice's visit isn't only for the purpose of relaxation, but also to have {NICKNAME} follow her to retrieve a certain item.\nThe gift that Castorice prepared was stolen by the famous Amphorean Kitty Phantom Thief. What's more, the thief left clues.

ch: 计划有变，赛飞儿希望{NICKNAME}与遐蝶在奥赫玛城外会面。\n{NICKNAME}又稀里糊涂地在私人浴宫醒来。
en: Plans have changed. Cipher hopes that {NICKNAME} can meet with Castorice outside Okhema.\n{NICKNAME} awakens groggily in the private baths once more.

ch: 遐蝶登门拜访，既是为了散心，也是让{NICKNAME}跟随她取一样东西。\n遐蝶准备的礼物被翁法罗斯最有名的猫咪怪盗给偷走了，而她还留下了线索。

ch: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n杀出冥界的战士万敌，他那灵魂的幻影也出现在冥河滩涂之上。
en: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nIllusions of Mydei's soul seem to have appeared on the banks of the River of Souls as he slaughters his way out of the nether realm.

ch: 公民大会关于「暂停逐火之旅」的议题也即将迎来尾声，众人也将见证「投票选出的明天」究竟是何模样。\n掌握翁法罗斯命运的最后一枚陶片就在你的手中，你会将它掷于何处？
en: The citizens' assembly on the matter of "Pausing the Flame-Chase Journey" is coming to an end. Soon, everyone will witness what "vote-decided tomorrow" they will experience.\nYou hold the last ceramic shard that will decide Amphoreus's fate. Where will your vote fall?

ch: 公民大会关于「暂停逐火之旅」的议题也即将迎来尾声，众人也将见证「投票选出的明天」究竟是何模样。\n掌握翁法罗斯命运的最后一枚陶片就在你的手中，你会将它掷于何处？

en: The citizens' assembly on the matter of "Pausing the Flame-Chase Journey" is coming to an end. Soon, everyone will witness what "vote-decided tomorrow" they will experience.\nYou hold the last ceramic shard that will decide Amphoreus's fate. Where will your vote fall?

ch: 三月七的状况似乎更加严重了。\n黑天鹅似乎仍有隐瞒，翁法罗斯对忆庭来说意味着什么，它又为何如此重要。
en: March 7th's condition seems to be getting worse.\nBlack Swan still seems to be hiding something... What does Amphoreus mean to the Garden of Recollection? And why is it so important?

ch: 感恩戴德吧，星穹列车。幸好黑塔大人对「翁法罗斯」很感兴趣，她打算亲自去到那里实地考察。\n黑塔大人您能多和第四面镜我说说话吗？
en: Be grateful, Astral Express. Fortunately, Madam Herta is quite interested in Amphoreus and plans to conduct an on-the-ground investigation there.\nMadam Herta, could you speak with me, the Fourth Mirror, a little more?

ch: 感恩戴德吧，星穹列车。幸好黑塔大人对「翁法罗斯」很感兴趣，她打算亲自去到那里实地考察。\n黑塔大人您能多和第四面镜我说说话吗？
en: Be grateful, Astral Express. Fortunately, Madam Herta is quite interested in Amphoreus and plans to conduct an on-the-ground investigation there.\nMadam Herta, could you speak with me, the Fourth Mirror, a little more?

en: Be grateful, Astral Express. Fortunately, Madam Herta is quite interested in Amphoreus and plans to conduct an on-the-ground investigation there.\nMadam Herta, could you speak with me, the Fourth Mirror, a little more?

ch: 学着点吧，星穹列车。黑塔大人不用肉身闯关，就能亲自降临翁法罗斯，只要轻轻出手，就能立刻探明这个陌生世界的奥秘。\n别问为什么我如此肯定，因为我早就是黑粉了。
en: Learn from this, Astral Express. Madam Herta doesn't need to traverse obstacles in the flesh to personally visit Amphoreus. She can immediately uncover the secrets of this unknown world with just a simple touch.\nDon't ask me why I'm so sure — it's because I've been a Heritor for so long.

ch: 另一方面，在奥赫玛，元老院卑劣的加害计划正在悄然实施，很快，便演变成了一场巨大风波。
en: Meanwhile, in Okhema, the Council of Elders' despicable scheme was quietly taking shape, and soon, it erupted into a storm of chaos.

ch: 另一方面，在奥赫玛，元老院卑劣的加害计划正在悄然实施，很快，便演变成了一场巨大风波。
en: Meanwhile, in Okhema, the Council of Elders' despicable scheme was quietly taking shape, and soon, it erupted into a storm of chaos.

ch: 将{NICKNAME}与白厄接送至树庭后，赛飞儿找来「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，回到冥滩一阵搜刮…
en: After dropping {NICKNAME} and Phainon off at the Grove, Cipher rounded up the "Spirithief", Bartholos, and returned to the Nethershore for a bit of scavenging...

ch: 将{NICKNAME}与白厄接送至树庭后，赛飞儿找来「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，回到冥滩一阵搜刮…
en: After dropping {NICKNAME} and Phainon off at the Grove, Cipher rounded up the "Spirithief", Bartholos, and returned to the Nethershore for a bit of scavenging...

ch: 克拉特鲁斯向我传达了阿格莱雅的死讯，而随后衣匠发来的短信也证明了他所言非虚，我相当震惊。摆脱「清洗者」的纠缠，我立即赶回奥赫玛，和{NICKNAME}汇合后，向同伴们了解情况…
en: Krateros brought word of Aglaea's death, and the Garmentmaker's message that followed confirmed it, I was stunned. After shaking off the "Cleaners," I returned to Okhema at once. Upon reuniting with {NICKNAME}, I sought out our companions to learn what had happened...

ch: 克拉特鲁斯向我传达了阿格莱雅的死讯，而随后衣匠发来的短信也证明了他所言非虚，我相当震惊。摆脱「清洗者」的纠缠，我立即赶回奥赫玛，和{NICKNAME}汇合后，向同伴们了解情况…

ch: 克拉特鲁斯向我传达了阿格莱雅的死讯，而随后衣匠发来的短信也证明了他所言非虚，我相当震惊。摆脱「清洗者」的纠缠，我立即赶回奥赫玛，和{NICKNAME}汇合后，向同伴们了解情况…

en: Krateros brought word of Aglaea's death, and the Garmentmaker's message that followed confirmed it, I was stunned. After shaking off the "Cleaners," I returned to Okhema at once. Upon reuniting with {NICKNAME}, I sought out our companions to learn what had happened...

ch: 赛飞儿将刻法勒的火种带至斯缇科西亚保护起来，并独自解决了前来抢夺的「清洗者」。只是，威胁并非只有元老院的刺客，于此同时，盗火行者的身影也已触抵冥岸。
en: Cipher brought Kephale's Coreflame to Styxia for safeguarding, then single-handedly fended off the Cleaners who sought to seize it. Yet the threat goes beyond the Council's assassins, for at the same moment, the Flame Reaver's figure has settled upon the nether shore.

ch: 赛飞儿将刻法勒的火种带至斯缇科西亚保护起来，并独自解决了前来抢夺的「清洗者」。只是，威胁并非只有元老院的刺客，于此同时，盗火行者的身影也已触抵冥岸。
en: Cipher brought Kephale's Coreflame to Styxia for safeguarding, then single-handedly fended off the Cleaners who sought to seize it. Yet the threat goes beyond the Council's assassins, for at the same moment, the Flame Reaver's figure has settled upon the nether shore.

ch: 黑潮的造物连同那位盗火行者在此间步步紧逼，而刻法勒的火种却仍不见踪影。我们选择相信被托付火种的赛飞儿，向着云石天宫不断奔跑。
en: Black Tide Creatures, along with the Flame Reaver, are closing in step by step, yet Kephale's Coreflame remains nowhere to be found. We choose to trust Cipher, who was entrusted with the Coreflame, and keep running toward Marmoreal Palace.

ch: 黑潮的造物连同那位盗火行者在此间步步紧逼，而刻法勒的火种却仍不见踪影。我们选择相信被托付火种的赛飞儿，向着云石天宫不断奔跑。
en: Black Tide Creatures, along with the Flame Reaver, are closing in step by step, yet Kephale's Coreflame remains nowhere to be found. We choose to trust Cipher, who was entrusted with the Coreflame, and keep running toward Marmoreal Palace.

ch: 黑潮的造物连同那位盗火行者在此间步步紧逼，而刻法勒的火种却仍不见踪影。我们选择相信被托付火种的赛飞儿，向着云石天宫不断奔跑。
en: Black Tide Creatures, along with the Flame Reaver, are closing in step by step, yet Kephale's Coreflame remains nowhere to be found. We choose to trust Cipher, who was entrusted with the Coreflame, and keep running toward Marmoreal Palace.

ch: 在遐蝶权能的掩护下，万敌帮我们拖住了盗火行者的脚步，让我们得以从云崖脱身，抵达云石天宫附近。这里也同样是一片狼藉，好在奥赫玛的居民受到风堇的庇护，其时已无大碍。\n距离创世涡心只有一步之遥，得加快脚步了。
en: Shielded by Castorice's power, Mydei buys us time against the Flame Reaver, enabling our escape from Dawncloud to Marmoreal Palace. Though this place too lies in ruins, we're relieved to find Okhema's residents unharmed under Hyacine's protection.\nThe Vortex of Genesis awaits just a short distance away — we must hasten our steps.

ch: 在遐蝶权能的掩护下，万敌帮我们拖住了盗火行者的脚步，让我们得以从云崖脱身，抵达云石天宫附近。这里也同样是一片狼藉，好在奥赫玛的居民受到风堇的庇护，其时已无大碍。\n距离创世涡心只有一步之遥，得加快脚步了。

Though this place too lies in ruins, we're relieved to find Okhema's residents unharmed under Hyacine's protection.\nThe Vortex of Genesis awaits just a short distance away — we must hasten our steps.

en: Shielded by Castorice's power, Mydei buys us time against the Flame Reaver, enabling our escape from Dawncloud to Marmoreal Palace. Though this place too lies in ruins, we're relieved to find Okhema's residents unharmed under Hyacine's protection.\nThe Vortex of Genesis awaits just a short distance away — we must hasten our steps.

ch: 将{NICKNAME}与白厄接送至树庭后，赛飞儿找来「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，回到冥滩一阵搜刮…
en: After dropping {NICKNAME} and Phainon off at the Grove, Cipher rounded up the "Spirithief", Bartholos, and returned to the Nethershore for a bit of scavenging...

ch: 击败塞涅俄丝的同时，风堇与迷迷不约而同地感应到奥赫玛发生的异变，留给我们思考的时间不多了。
en: At the moment of Seliose's defeat, both Hyacine and Mem sensed a strange happening in Okhema at the same time. Our window of consideration is narrowing by the second.

ch: 世界之外，天才们藉现有信息进行推演，令翁法罗斯的本质逐步浮出水面。
en: Worlds beyond, the geniuses compile the present information to begin their extrapolation, compelling Amphoreus's quintessential nature to surface.

ch: 盗火行者突然陷入凝滞，似乎是发生了某种变故。思索间，我却再次见到了{NICKNAME}的身影…
en: The Flame Reaver suddenly froze, as if something unforeseen had transpired. As I pondered what might have happened, I spotted {NICKNAME}'s figure once more...

ch: 盗火行者突然陷入凝滞，似乎是发生了某种变故。思索间，我却再次见到了{NICKNAME}的身影…

ch: 盗火行者突然陷入凝滞，似乎是发生了某种变故。思索间，我却再次见到了{NICKNAME}的身影…
en: The Flame Reaver suddenly froze, as if something unforeseen had transpired. As I pondered what might have happened, I spotted {NICKNAME}'s figure once more...

ch: 螺丝咕姆先生的现身无疑是一个转机，我们对翁法罗斯的状况有了新的认知。\n应他的请求，{NICKNAME}将留在翁法罗斯临机应变，而我会按照原定计划返回列车，与列车组的其他成员汇合后，商讨下一步的计划。
en: Mr. Screwllum's arrival marks a definite turning point, giving us fresh insights into Amphoreus's condition.\nFollowing his request, {NICKNAME} will stay behind in Amphoreus to adapt to changing circumstances, while I'll return to the Express as planned to regroup with the other Crew members and formulate our next course of action.

ch: 螺丝咕姆先生提供的信息让我们感到些许不安——此时此刻，三月七似乎也被卷入了翁法罗斯。
en: Mr. Screwllum's information has left us feeling rather unsettled. It seems March 7th has now also become entangled in the events of Amphoreus.

ch: 螺丝咕姆先生的现身无疑是一个转机，我们对翁法罗斯的状况有了新的认知。\n应他的请求，{NICKNAME}将留在翁法罗斯临机应变，而我会按照原定计划返回列车，与列车组的其他成员汇合后，商讨下一步的计划。

ch: 「戏剧」实为某人年少时的记忆，舞台是昔日的哀丽秘榭，{NICKNAME}带着一肚子的问题， 扮演着其人「最重要的伙伴」，陪伴他与昔涟一同找寻着某物…
en: The "theater" is actually someone's childhood memories, staged in the Aedes Elysiae of old. {NICKNAME}, with many questions in mind, assumes the role of this person's "most important companion," joining him and Cyrene on their search for something important...

ch: 「戏剧」的第二幕，是白厄与那位我们熟知的悬锋王子——万敌的初遇…
en: The second act of this "drama" is Phainon's first encounter with Mydei, the Kremnos prince we all know...

ch: 翁法罗斯的千万次轮回，连同那无缘黎明的盗火者一同，即将在此刻跨入终幕。真相呈现在{NICKNAME}面前，引领着{F#她}{M#他}跨入「岁月」的起点。
en: The millions cycles of Amphoreus, along with the Flame Reaver who was denied the dawn, are about to reach its final curtain. The truth now lies before {NICKNAME}, guiding {F#her}{M#him} toward the origin point of "Time."

ch: 翁法罗斯的千万次轮回，连同那无缘黎明的盗火者一同，即将在此刻跨入终幕。真相呈现在{NICKNAME}面前，引领着{F#她}{M#他}跨入「岁月」的起点。
en: The millions cycles of Amphoreus, along with the Flame Reaver who was denied the dawn, are about to reach its final curtain. The truth now lies before {NICKNAME}, guiding {F#her}{M#him} toward the origin point of "Time."

ch: 你已知悉翁法罗斯的往日，如今，你要改写它的明天。该如何与命运的伟力抗衡？你身旁的伙伴与同行的智者，一定能驱散疑虑的阴云。
en: You have seen the past of Amphoreus. Now, you shall shape its future. How will you stand against the weight of destiny? The companion beside you and the sages who walk with you will definitely clear the clouds of doubt.

ch: 你已知悉翁法罗斯的往日，如今，你要改写它的明天。该如何与命运的伟力抗衡？你身旁的伙伴与同行的智者，一定能驱散疑虑的阴云。

ch: 翁法罗斯被剧烈的「记忆」命途包裹，再次阻断了外来者的渠道。只有我能回去，我必须回去。\n找到{NICKNAME}和三月。我们会在那里团聚。
en: Amphoreus is enveloped by the fierce Path of Remembrance, once again cutting off all channels of communication for outsiders. Only I can go back, and I must go back.\nFind {NICKNAME} and March. We will reunite there.

ch: 翁法罗斯被剧烈的「记忆」命途包裹，再次阻断了外来者的渠道。只有我能回去，我必须回去。\n找到{NICKNAME}和三月。我们会在那里团聚。
en: Amphoreus is enveloped by the fierce Path of Remembrance, once again cutting off all channels of communication for outsiders. Only I can go back, and I must go back.\nFind {NICKNAME} and March. We will reunite there.

ch: 如今翁法罗斯被三重命途之一的「记忆」所裹挟，三月、{NICKNAME}…{F#她们}{M#他们}俩去向不明，能将他们带回的就只有我了。\n如今翁法罗斯迷雾重重，还有一位友人能为我拨云见日。
en: Now Amphoreus is ensnared by the Remembrance, one of the Three Paths, and March and {NICKNAME}... they are nowhere to be found. I'm the only one who can bring them back.\nAmphoreus is shrouded in mystery now, but I have a friend who can help me see through the fog.

ch:
翁法罗斯！我并非陡然地呼唤你的名字。
我来此，是为了讲述历史——
末日的黑潮降临大地，神明堕入疯狂，凡人举戈相向。
但仍有逐火的英雄，在创世的伟业中先行。

此世，他们将燃烧的金血熔进身躯。
来日的命运，可会记得他们的姓名？

以「负世」之名，我向你保证：刻法勒永志不忘。
en:
Amphoreus! I do not beckon your name in haste.
I come here to tell a tale of history.
When the black tide of doom descended upon Earth, gods fell into madness, and mortals turned against each other.
Yet there were Flame-Chasing heroes, pioneering the great enterprise of creating a world.

In this world, they shall meld burning golden blood into their bodies.
Will the destiny of days to come remember their names?

In the name of Worldbearing, I promise you: Kephale will never forget.

ch: 天外之界的来客背负起世界的命运，用「开拓」为翁法罗斯写下新的起点。哀丽秘榭之外，是所有人愿望中的崭新纪元。\n而今你已抵达黎明，准备好迎接世人的召唤了吗，{NICKNAME}？
en: A visitor from beyond the sky shoulders the world's destiny, writing a new beginning for Amphoreus through "Trailblaze." Beyond the Aedes Elysiae lies a new era that everyone wishes for.\nNow that you have arrived at the Dawn, {NICKNAME}, are you ready to answer the world's summon?

ch: 天外之界的来客背负起世界的命运，用「开拓」为翁法罗斯写下新的起点。哀丽秘榭之外，是所有人愿望中的崭新纪元。\n而今你已抵达黎明，准备好迎接世人的召唤了吗，{NICKNAME}？

ch: 按照黑塔制定的作战计划，列车组众人将深入翁法罗斯内部，与银河联军里应外合，共同击败「铁墓」。
en: According to Herta's battle plan, the Express Crew will infiltrate deep into Amphoreus and coordinate with the Cosmic Alliance in a pincer attack to defeat Irontomb together.

ch: 按照黑塔制定的作战计划，列车组众人将深入翁法罗斯内部，与银河联军里应外合，共同击败「铁墓」。
en: According to Herta's battle plan, the Express Crew will infiltrate deep into Amphoreus and coordinate with the Cosmic Alliance in a pincer attack to defeat Irontomb together.

ch: 按照黑塔制定的作战计划，列车组众人将深入翁法罗斯内部，与银河联军里应外合，共同击败「铁墓」。
en: According to Herta's battle plan, the Express Crew will infiltrate deep into Amphoreus and coordinate with the Cosmic Alliance in a pincer attack to defeat Irontomb together.

ch: 翁法罗斯与外界的隔绝状态被打破，三位无名客先行者成为新世界的泰坦。圣城居民向「负世」的{NICKNAME}祈祷，虔诚等待全世的神谕降临。
en: The isolation of Amphoreus has been shattered, and the three Nameless forerunners have become Titans of the new world. The holy city's residents pray to the Worldbearing {NICKNAME}, devoutly awaiting the divine prophecy to descend upon the world.

ch: 翁法罗斯与外界的隔绝状态被打破，三位无名客先行者成为新世界的泰坦。圣城居民向「负世」的{NICKNAME}祈祷，虔诚等待全世的神谕降临。
en: The isolation of Amphoreus has been shattered, and the three Nameless forerunners have become Titans of the new world. The holy city's residents pray to the Worldbearing {NICKNAME}, devoutly awaiting the divine prophecy to descend upon the world.

ch: 归墟埋藏着三千万世的执念与苦果。随着不断深入，万敌、赛飞儿、遐蝶、风堇相继加入队伍。在埋藏着救世之愿的晶体旁，那刻夏等候已久。我们需要启动仪式，尝试带走白厄的愿望，止息他心间沉重的回响。
en: The ruins harbor the obsessions and bitter fruits of <unbreak>30</unbreak> million cycles. As we venture deeper, Mydei, Cipher, Castorice, and Hyacine join the team one after another. Anaxa has been waiting by the crystal that holds the wish to save the world. We need to initiate the ceremony, attempt to take away Phainon's wish, and silence the heavy reverberation in his heart.

ch: 归墟埋藏着三千万世的执念与苦果。随着不断深入，万敌、赛飞儿、遐蝶、风堇相继加入队伍。在埋藏着救世之愿的晶体旁，那刻夏等候已久。我们需要启动仪式，尝试带走白厄的愿望，止息他心间沉重的回响。
en: The ruins harbor the obsessions and bitter fruits of <unbreak>30</unbreak> million cycles. As we venture deeper, Mydei, Cipher, Castorice, and Hyacine join the team one after another. Anaxa has been waiting by the crystal that holds the wish to save the world. We need to initiate the ceremony, attempt to take away Phainon's wish, and silence the heavy reverberation in his heart.

ch: 归墟埋藏着三千万世的执念与苦果。随着不断深入，万敌、赛飞儿、遐蝶、风堇相继加入队伍。在埋藏着救世之愿的晶体旁，那刻夏等候已久。我们需要启动仪式，尝试带走白厄的愿望，止息他心间沉重的回响。

ch: 在黄金裔们的陪伴下，我们终于来到归墟的最深处，白厄的英魂就在此处镇守「毁灭」的劫火。当空白的愿望烧灼为负世的意志，我们终将为卡厄斯兰那带来解脱，并接过他的责任与最后的心愿——击败铁墓，拯救翁法罗斯，乃至全银河。
en: Accompanied by the Chrysos Heirs, we finally reached the deepest part of the ruins, where Phainon's heroic soul guards the cataclysmic fire of the Destruction. As the blank wish is transformed through fire into the will to bear the world, we shall finally bring release to Khaslana and inherit his responsibility and final wish: to defeat Irontomb, help Amphoreus, and save even the entire cosmos.

ch: 在迷迷的帮助下，你们闯入了这位眷属的记忆。这是独属于她的往世，也是已然发生过的注定之事，你在这里能做的只有见证与解疑。\n在过去的悬锋城中，记忆的主人却不见踪影，看来你又要来一次轰轰烈烈的劫狱作战了。
en: With Mem's help, you successfully enter the Titankin's memories. This is a past that belongs solely to her. It is also an unchangeable fate that you will only be able to witness.\nIn this past version of Castrum Kremnos, the master of this memory is nowhere to be seen... Looks like you have another explosive jailbreak battle ahead of you.

ch: 在迷迷的帮助下，你们闯入了这位眷属的记忆。这是独属于她的往世，也是已然发生过的注定之事，你在这里能做的只有见证与解疑。\n悬锋城人为什么要在牢房周围放一堆能打开牢房的机关？是出于对劫狱者的尊重？还是天天打架真的会影响智力？
en: With Mem's help, you successfully enter the Titankin's memories. This is a past that belongs solely to her. It is also an unchangeable fate that you will only be able to witness.\nWhy would the people of Castrum Kremnos place mechanisms that can open the prison doors placed all around the cells? Are they showing respect for those who would perform a jailbreak? Or has fighting every day taken its toll on their brain power?

ch: 在迷迷的帮助下，你们闯入了这位眷属的记忆。这是独属于她的往世，也是已然发生过的注定之事，你在这里能做的只有见证与解疑。\n你救出了天谴猎手，以及她念叨的那位帕里斯——一个油腔滑调的年轻人。多亏翁法罗斯是个封闭的世界，他这说话方式拿到外面去，估计要在星际和平网络论坛里被笑话几百楼。
en: With Mem's help, you successfully enter the Titankin's memories. This is a past that belongs solely to her. It is also an unchangeable fate that you will only be able to witness.\nYou rescue the Furiae Archer and this "Paris" that she had mentioned so many times... A glib and cheesy young man. He's fortunate that Amphoreus is a closed-off world. If anyone outside of Amphoreus heard him speak like that, there's no doubt he'd be trolled brutally on the Interastral Peace Network.

ch: 不受束缚的观众在岁月与岁月之间跳跃，跳过她是如何压抑心中的顾虑，如何磨削旁人的冷眼，如何争得仇敌的接纳。她做了很多，终于成为了一名奥赫玛的臣民而非敌手或客人——但这真的是她想做的吗？\n是否和你一样，只是被任务目标一样的命运牵着走呢？\n戏剧的过场有时也代表着岁月的流逝，有剧作家否认这种做法，提倡将时间、地点与人物统一，好让观众与舞台同调——但这样很难。
en: Unbound, the spectators leap through time: Skipping past how it was that she suppressed the concerns in her heart, how she wore down the cold stares of those around her and how she won the acceptance of her former enemies. She has done so much to finally become a true subject of Okhema, as opposed to a guest or an enemy... But is this truly what she wants to do?\nIs she not the same as you, being blindly led along by fate towards her mission?\nSometimes play interludes are used to represent the passage of time. Some playwrights criticize this approach, saying that time, location, and characters should be unified in order for spectators to resonate with the scene... But this is very difficult.

ch: 不受束缚的观众在岁月与岁月之间跳跃，跳过她是如何压抑心中的顾虑，如何磨削旁人的冷眼，如何争得仇敌的接纳。她做了很多，终于成为了一名奥赫玛的臣民而非敌手或客人——但这真的是她想做的吗？\n是否和你一样，只是被任务目标一样的命运牵着走呢？\n戏剧的过场有时也代表着岁月的流逝，有剧作家否认这种做法，提倡将时间、地点与人物统一，好让观众与舞台同调——但这样很难。
en: Unbound, the spectators leap through time: Skipping past how it was that she suppressed the concerns in her heart, how she wore down the cold stares of those around her and how she won the acceptance of her former enemies. She has done so much to finally become a true subject of Okhema, as opposed to a guest or an enemy... But is this truly what she wants to do?\nIs she not the same as you, being blindly led along by fate towards her mission?\nSometimes play interludes are used to represent the passage of time. Some playwrights criticize this approach, saying that time, location, and characters should be unified in order for spectators to resonate with the scene... But this is very difficult.

ch: 不受束缚的观众在岁月与岁月之间跳跃，跳过她是如何压抑心中的顾虑，如何磨削旁人的冷眼，如何争得仇敌的接纳。她做了很多，终于成为了一名奥赫玛的臣民而非敌手或客人——给她派发任务的，是这位似乎爱着她的人吗？还是说，他们同样都是被束缚的茧呢？\n「我们追求的不仅是好的东西，而且是不朽的东西，爱所盼望的就是永远拥有好的东西。 」
en: Unbound, the spectators leap through time: Skipping past how it was that she suppressed the concerns in her heart, how she wore down the cold stares of those around her and how she won the acceptance of her former enemies. She has done so much to finally become a true subject of Okhema, as opposed to a guest or an enemy... The person that gave her this mission, was it this person that seems to love her? Or are they both simply bound by their own cocoons?\n"What we seek is not only the good, it is also the permanent. What love seeks is to have something good forever."

ch: 这回是真的走到最后了。我们的故事，会被寰宇铭记吧？\n翁法罗斯，明天见。
en: This is truly the end of the road. Will the universe remember our story?\nSee you tomorrow, Amphoreus.

ch: 翁法罗斯的世界残留着一些常理难以解释的遗存，所谓「黄金替罪羊」就是其中之一。一时兴起，你试图破解其中的奥秘，然而它似乎很快就变成了某种闹剧……
en: The world of Amphoreus left behind a number of relics that seem to defy common sense — "The Golden Scapegoat" being one of them. Curious, you attempted to unravel its secret, but it seems this has quickly become a whole separate issue...

ch: 「黄金替罪羊」当中蕴含的信息既神秘又若有所指。来古士对它颇有兴趣，提出可以利用树庭的装置对其进一步分析。
en: The information within the Golden Scapegoat is both enigmatic and revealing. Lygus, intrigued by it, suggests using the Grove's devices for deeper analysis.

ch: 奥赫玛维系千年的黎明结束了，黑潮袭来，城邦为苦痛、哭号和死亡吞没。\n聚集着大批避难者的黎明云崖圣殿里，似乎有人正在请求帮助……
en: The millennium-long dawn of Okhema has ended. The black tide surges in, engulfing the city-states in suffering, wailing, and death.\nIn the Dawncloud Temple, where many refugees have gathered, someone seems to be seeking help...

ch: 整个树庭倾覆之前，竟然没有一只无辜的小动物受到伤害…这一切的原因竟然是「贼灵」巴特鲁斯。\n它想炫耀一下自己的英雄事迹，你可以打听打听，听完有赏。
en: Before the Grove collapsed, miraculously, not a single innocent critter was harmed... and it was all thanks to the Spirithief Bartholos.\nThey're eager to brag about their heroic deed. Ask them about it, and you might get rewarded.

ch: 泰坦的恩赐无处不在，奥赫玛也不例外。探寻过往的奥秘，重启神秘的仪式。
en: The Titan's blessing surrounds us, as does Okhema. Uncover the mysteries of the past and reignite the mystical ceremony.

ch: 辩论的风气在奥赫玛流行已久，而你恰巧碰见了两位精通修辞学的教师，去听听他们会提出什么样有趣的观点吧。
en: The culture of debate has been popular in Okhema for a long time, and you just so happen to have met with two teachers that are proficient in the art of rhetoric. Go and see what kinds of interesting perspectives they put forward.

ch: 辩论的风气在奥赫玛流行已久，而你恰巧碰见了两位精通修辞学的教师，去听听他们会提出什么样有趣的观点吧。

ch: 奥赫玛的集市上总有个小女孩跑来跑去，叫卖着不存在的新闻…难道她很缺钱？
en: There is a young girl that is always running around the Okhema market selling made-up news... Could it be that she is in dire need of money?

ch: 在风堇的委托下，你答应去拜访那些树庭牺牲者的家属，了解一下他们的近况。\n但或许除此以外，你能做的还有很多。
en: You promised to visit the families of those who lost their lives at the Grove and find out about how they're doing at Hyacine's request.\nAside from this, however, you might be able to do something more...
