ch: 据说在奥赫玛，倒霉的人会被大地兽撞，你会是那个「幸运儿」吗？
en: It is said that in Okhema, the unfortunate will be knocked over by a dromas. Are you one of the "lucky" ones?

ch: 你们驱除了依附在白露身上的岁阳。接下来该是将这场胜利在「罗浮杂俎」上公之于众的时候了。既要淡化此事的危险，以免引起恐慌，又要吸引眼球，彰显捉鬼小队的胜利，这麻烦程度不逊于方才祓除岁阳啊！
en: After successfully exorcising the heliobus in Bailu, your next task is to publicize this victory on Ghostly Grove. However, you must minimize the public's perception of how dangerous the incident was to prevent panic, while also trying to stand out online to showcase the ghost-hunting squad's triumph. The task of writing a social media post is not any less challenging than exorcising the heliobus!

ch: 你们驱除了依附在符玄身上的岁阳。接下来该是将这场胜利在「罗浮杂俎」上公之于众的时候了。既要淡化此事的危险，以免引起恐慌，又要吸引眼球，彰显捉鬼小队的胜利，这麻烦程度不逊于方才祓除岁阳啊！
en: After successfully exorcising the heliobus in Fu Xuan, your next task is to publicize this victory on Ghostly Grove. However, you must minimize the public's perception of how dangerous the incident was to prevent panic, while also trying to stand out online to showcase the ghost-hunting squad's triumph. The task of writing a social media post is not any less challenging than exorcising the heliobus!

ch: 你们驱除了依附在彦卿身上的岁阳。接下来该是将这场胜利在「罗浮杂俎」上公之于众的时候了。既要淡化此事的危险，以免引起恐慌，又要吸引眼球，彰显捉鬼小队的胜利，这麻烦程度不逊于方才祓除岁阳啊！
en: After successfully exorcising the heliobus in Yanqing, your next task is to publicize this victory on Ghostly Grove. However, you must minimize the public's perception of how dangerous the incident was to prevent panic, while also trying to stand out online to showcase the ghost-hunting squad's triumph. The task of writing a social media post is not any less challenging than exorcising the heliobus!

ch: 你们驱除了依附在藿藿身上的岁阳。接下来该是将这场胜利在「罗浮杂俎」上公之于众的时候了。既要淡化此事的危险，以免引起恐慌，又要吸引眼球，彰显捉鬼小队的胜利，这麻烦程度不逊于方才祓除岁阳啊！
en: After successfully exorcising the heliobus in Huohuo, your next task is to publicize this victory on Ghostly Grove. However, you must minimize the public's perception of how dangerous the incident was to prevent panic, while also trying to stand out online to showcase the ghost-hunting squad's triumph. The task of writing a social media post is not any less challenging than exorcising the heliobus!

ch: 「罗浮杂俎」上无奇不有，比如能够「将活人从现世带走」的幽灵星槎。按照帖子的线索去迴星港调查一番，想必与岁阳脱不了干系。
en: The Ghostly Grove offers a myriad of uncanny stories, including an enigmatic Phantom Starskiff that eradicates the existence of living beings from the mortal world. It would be wise to follow the clues in the post and investigate in Stargazer Navalia, as it is highly possible that a heliobus is involved.

ch: 一切尘埃落定，该是你们例行在「罗浮杂俎」上发布帖子的时候了。
en: Regardless, the incident has been resolved. It is time to post on Ghostly Grove, as per usual.

ch: 一切尘埃落定，该是你们例行在「罗浮杂俎」上发布帖子的时候了。
en: Regardless, the incident has been resolved. It is time to post on Ghostly Grove, as per usual.

ch: 在罗浮杂俎上，一则「凶宅」的帖子引起了你们的注意。桂乃芬私信发帖人之后，认为这个选题不仅与岁阳有关，还是涨粉的大好选题。你们决定去丹鼎司与发帖人见个面……
en: A post on Ghostly Grove concerning a haunted residence catches your group's attention. After Guinaifen sent a private message to the poster, she now believes this issue is not only related to heliobi but also great content that can get more fans. You decide to go to the Alchemy Commission to meet up with the poster...

ch: 在罗浮杂俎上，一则「凶宅」的帖子引起了你们的注意。桂乃芬私信发帖人之后，认为这个选题不仅与岁阳有关，还是涨粉的大好选题。你们决定去丹鼎司与发帖人见个面……
en: A post on Ghostly Grove concerning a haunted residence catches your group's attention. After Guinaifen sent a private message to the poster, she now believes this issue is not only related to heliobi but also great content that can get more fans. You decide to go to the Alchemy Commission to meet up with the poster...

ch: 一切尘埃落定，该是你们例行在「罗浮杂俎」上发布帖子的时候了。
en: Regardless, the incident has been resolved. It is time to post on Ghostly Grove, as per usual.

ch: 在罗浮杂俎上，一则「鬼来电」的帖子引起了你们的注意。在桂乃芬私信了发帖人后，你们与自称饱受「鬼来电」骚扰之苦的女子阿月取得了联系。你们约定在长乐天见面，阿月答应她会告诉你们她所知道的一切……
en: A post on Ghostly Grove concerning phone calls from ghosts catches your group's attention. After Guinaifen sends a private message to the poster, you make contact with a woman named A-Yue, who claims she has been constantly harassed by calls from ghosts. You agree to meet her at Exalting Sanctum, where she will share all the information she has...

ch: 你与捉鬼小队的成员再度在绥园聚首。如同上班打卡一般，翻翻「罗浮杂俎」瞧瞧有什么足够怪异的事情，再去探查一番，一天便这么过去了。
en: Once again, you reunite with your fellow ghost hunters at Fyxestroll Garden. Scanning through the posts on Ghostly Grove and conducting investigations have become routine tasks for you.

ch: 你与捉鬼小队的成员再度在绥园聚首。如同上班打卡一般，翻翻「罗浮杂俎」瞧瞧有什么足够怪异的事情，再去探查一番，一天便这么过去了。
en: Once again, you reunite with your fellow ghost hunters at Fyxestroll Garden. Scanning through the posts on Ghostly Grove and conducting investigations have become routine tasks for you.

ch: 你与捉鬼小队的成员再度在绥园聚首。如同上班打卡一般，翻翻「罗浮杂俎」瞧瞧有什么足够怪异的事情，再去探查一番，一天便这么过去了。
en: Once again, you reunite with your fellow ghost hunters at Fyxestroll Garden. Scanning through the posts on Ghostly Grove and conducting investigations have become routine tasks for you.

ch: 「罗浮杂俎」，原本只是个灵异爱好者们聚集的网站，却最终成了罗浮上平民茶余饭后交换流言蜚语的大型网络社区。\n努力拓展你的影响力吧，它不仅会将情报汇聚你手中，更能让你以「捉鬼小队」的名义正大光明地行动。
en: Ghostly Grove, once a modest gathering website for supernatural enthusiasts, has now become a thriving community where denizens of the Luofu Xianzhou exchange tales and rumors.\nTry to expand your sphere of influence, as this not only helps you get the information you need, but also allows you to operate openly in the name of the respected ghost-hunting squad.

ch: 「罗浮杂俎」，原本只是个灵异爱好者们聚集的网站，却最终成了罗浮上平民茶余饭后交换流言蜚语的大型网络社区。\n努力拓展你的影响力吧，它不仅会将情报汇聚你手中，更能让你以「捉鬼小队」的名义正大光明地行动。

ch: 热闹的奥赫玛市集中出现了一名走失的孩子，她左右张望，似乎在寻找什么……
en: A lost child has appeared in the bustling market of Okhema. She glances around, seemingly trying to find something...

ch: 当你和丹恒被困在翁法罗斯时，两位天才正在谈论着什么。
en: While you and Dan Heng were trapped in Amphoreus, two geniuses were discussing about something.

ch: 依靠树庭的泰坦神迹，以及脑内关于测试的残存记忆，你成功在圣树的根系网络中仿造出了差分宇宙。按照卡利多托斯的说法，这是最适合你的求学场所，用命途的方程式去理解翁法罗斯的神话和历史。说起来，这算不算是——模拟宇宙的模拟宇宙？
en: Using the Titan Miracle from the Grove and remnant memories pertaining to the test, you successfully emulated a counterfeit Divergent Universe in the Sacred Tree's root system. According to Calidorthos, this is a most appropriate place for you to gain knowledge by using Path Equations to understand Amphoreus' myths and history. Come to think of it, isn't this a simulated version of the Simulated Universe?

en: Somewhere in Okhema, a long-awaited conversation is happening...

ch: 迷路迷境的村长向你提出了复兴餐馆的委托，还说妖精的肚子空空的就想毁灭世界…所以，你是穿越到了昔涟讲的故事中吗？
en: The village chief of Membrance Maze gave you an assignment to revive the restaurant, saying that fairies with empty stomachs might just destroy the world... So... does that mean that you have teleported into Cyrene's stories?

ch: 迷路迷境盛大的宴会就要开场了，快和餐馆的伙伴们过去吧，可别让妖精们等急啦！
en: The grand feast at Membrance Maze is about to begin! Hurry over with your restaurant companions. Don't keep the fairies waiting!

en: Follow the scholar's guidance and connect to the Grove's network

ch: 跟随学者的指引，接入树庭「网络」
en: Follow the scholar's guidance and connect to the Grove's network

ch: 定分枪的眼睛看着万敌：「<unbreak>0.59</unbreak>？」眼睛流露出七分疑惑，三分怀疑。
en: The Rating Pistol gazes at Mydei: "<unbreak>0.59</unbreak> points?" the gaze reveals a look of confusion and semi-suspicion.

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「永恒之地，翁法罗斯」。</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>The Eternal Land, Amphoreus.</color>

ch: 「你呢，迈德漠斯？你的杀意足以与命运相配么？！」
en: "What about you, Mydeimos? Can your murderous intent match up to what fate has in store for you!?"

ch: 「在恐惧中抛却凡躯吧，悬锋之王！」
en: "In fear you shall abandon your mortal body, King of Kremnos!"

ch: 悬锋诸王，这就是你们渴望的力量么？
en: Kings of Kremnos, this is the power you desired?

ch: （悬锋的未来…去找克拉特鲁斯吧。）
en: (The future of Kremnos... I should find Krateros.)

ch: 被三重命途缠绕的神秘天体于忆者之镜中映现——那是「开拓」的下一站目的地，「永恒之地」翁法罗斯。
en: A mysterious celestial body entangled by Three Paths appears in the Memokeeper's mirror — Amphoreus, The Eternal Land, the next stop for the Trailblaze.

ch: 但降落的过程不算顺利，绝处逢生后，开拓小队结识了当地的「黄金裔」英雄，并从他们口中得知，支撑世界的泰坦诸神正在腐坏，翁法罗斯的大地遍布伤痕。
en: But the landing is not a smooth one. After surviving the crash, the Trailblaze squad meets the local Chrysos Heir heroes. They learn from them that the Titans supporting the world are rotting away, and that the land of Amphoreus is covered in scars.

ch: 为彻底摧毁尼卡多利的正身，众人计划潜入往日的悬锋城捞取真相。在命运重渊的尽头，开拓者谒见「岁月」泰坦欧洛尼斯，神差鬼使间接受了浮黎的瞥视。
en: In order to destroy Nikador's true form, the group plans to infiltrate Castrum Kremnos of the past to discover the truth. At the end of the Abyss of Fate, the Trailblazer communes with the Time Titan Oronyx, and somehow receives a gaze from Fuli.

ch: 就这样，奥赫玛度过了漫长的一天。
en: And so, this long day passed for Okhema.

ch: 准备好，迈德漠斯。
en: Get ready, Mydeimos.

ch: 两位贵客没有为逐火之旅出生入死的义务，还是由我和万敌阁下同行吧。
en: Our two distinguished guests are not obliged to risk their lives for the Flame-Chase Journey. Let me join you instead, Lord Mydei.

ch: 机会难得…火种事关翁法罗斯的世界本质，我们还是一探究竟为好。
en: This is a rare opportunity, though... The Coreflame has something to do with the workings of Amphoreus. It's best for us to learn more.

ch: …遵命。
en: ...Yes, Lord Mydei.

ch: 来到翁法罗斯后已多次听人提及，能否请各位展开讲讲，这「黑潮」究竟是？
en: Since coming to Amphoreus, we have heard many talking about this "black tide." Could you tell us more about it?

ch: 来到翁法罗斯后已多次听人提及，能否请各位展开讲讲，这「黑潮」究竟是？
en: Since coming to Amphoreus, we have heard many talking about this "black tide." Could you tell us more about it?

ch: 是让翁法罗斯众生陷入疯狂的元凶之一。自纷争世起，此种不可名状之物便如同瘟疫，随{RUBY_B#死亡、纷争与诡计}灾厄三泰坦{RUBY_E#}一同降临大地……
en: It is one of the culprits that drives the people of Amphoreus to madness. It was during the Era Bellica that this... unspeakable thing first appeared, like a plague, alongside the {RUBY_B#Death, Strife, and Trickery}Three Titans of Calamity{RUBY_E#}.

ch: 万敌，你身为悬锋的继业者，自然明白：若只是在「纷争」的疆场上取胜，对你们而言易如反掌……
en: As the successor to Kremnos, Mydei, you know better than anyone that if it were simply about emerging triumphant on the battlefield of Strife, you and your people could manage it with ease.

ch: 不错，这是一种可能性。再回想下翁法罗斯的特征——一个「陷入永夜」、「与世隔绝」且「遭到不知名力量蚕食」的世界……
en: That's right. If you think about the various characteristics of Amphoreus — an isolated world of eternal night being eroded by an unknown power... we cannot discount this possibility.

ch: 不错，这是一种可能性。再回想下翁法罗斯的特征——一个「陷入永夜」、「与世隔绝」且「遭到不知名力量蚕食」的世界……
en: That's right. If you think about the various characteristics of Amphoreus — an isolated world of eternal night being eroded by an unknown power... we cannot discount this possibility.

ch: 再回想下翁法罗斯的特征吧——这是一个「陷入永夜」、「与世隔绝」且「遭到不知名力量蚕食」的世界……
en: Let's think about the various characteristics of Amphoreus instead. An isolated world of eternal night being eroded by an unknown power...

ch: 我先前就很在意，种种迹象表明，翁法罗斯绝不是一个从未接触过宇宙的世界。无论是泰坦的降生，还是黑潮来袭…都难以用文明的自然发展解释。
en: This has been bothering me for a while now. Everything we have seen thus far suggests that Amphoreus wasn't always isolated from the rest of the universe. Be it the birth of the Titans or the encroaching black tide, none of these can be explained as a "natural progression" of a civilization.

ch: 悬锋人…在和奥赫玛人交战？
en: Kremnoans... and Okhemans are at war?

ch: 随你怎么说，下贱的奥赫玛人……
en: Say whatever you like, despicable Okheman...

ch: {RUBY_B#万敌}迈德漠斯{RUBY_E#}…王啊……
en: {RUBY_B#Mydei}Mydeimos{RUBY_E#}... My king...

ch: {RUBY_B#万敌}迈德漠斯{RUBY_E#}…王啊……
en: {RUBY_B#Mydei}Mydeimos{RUBY_E#}... My king...

ch: …荒唐透顶。我认得这奥赫玛人，他是个磊落的战士，却被「纷争」捏造成了这般扭曲模样。
en: ...Absurd. I know this Okheman. Strife contorted an honorable warrior into this perverse and twisted being.

ch: 迈德漠斯，你是……
en: Mydeimos, you are...

ch: 羞辱我，不必——滚出去，滚出奥赫玛！
en: Humiliate me, you shall not. Leave. Get out of Okhema!

ch: 滚吧！你们的王权，带上！悬锋的印戒，享受染血的荣光，你们自己！
en: Get out! Symbol of your sovereignty, take it! Signet of Kremnos, bask in blood-soaked glory, your kind alone!

ch: 「呵，迈德漠斯…你诚然是个目光闪亮的勇士。」
en: "Ah, Mydeimos... You are a keen warrior, indeed."

ch: 「为什么？她为捍卫你的尊严，明知自己将死于毒计，却仍向悬锋先王发起角斗。难道你想说，这一切都不过是她空自劳苦么？」
en: "Why not? She challenged the former Kremnos king to a duel, even knowing that it was a deadly trap, all to protect your dignity. Are you suggesting her efforts were for naught?"

ch: 「呵！你的恨意了然于色，迈德漠斯，这些话想必刺痛了你的心胸。但也正因此，我终于明白了……」
en: "Hah! Your hatred is as clear as day, Mydeimos. My words must have stung you deeply. But thanks to them, I have also come to realize..."

ch: 「这就是你弑父夺得王权，却任凭印戒沉入冥海，不愿延续悬锋荣光的理由……」
en: "This is why you killed your father for the throne, only to let your signet sink to the bottom of the Sea of Souls, refusing to let the glory of Kremnos live on..."

ch: 「当你破开我的胸膛，那也正是你登神之时——悬锋的继业者啊，我向你致敬！」
en: "The very moment you rip my chest apart shall be the moment of your ascension. To you, the successor of Kremnos!"

ch: 奥赫玛将两位卷入{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}一战，令你们身处险境，实属无奈。我等对两位的「开拓」义举感激不尽，愿以奥赫玛最上等的礼仪相谢。
en: For all that has happened, it was never our intention to drag you two into the battle against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} and jeopardize your safety. To express our gratitude for your kind Trailblazing endeavors, we would like to present you with the highest honor of Okhema.

ch: 此物名为「神血蜜露」，据传仅有十二瓶，乃是用众泰坦各自神血浇灌的作物酿成。世间仅存的三瓶现皆已收入奥赫玛宝库。
en: This is the Dew of Divine Blood, brewed from crops nourished by the blood of the Titans. It is said that only twelve bottles existed. The last three bottles are now being kept in the treasure vault of Okhema.

ch: 如今，奥赫玛愿依传统为天外来客斟饮奉赠，以表诚意。
en: And now, in keeping with tradition, Okhema dedicates this drink to our esteemed guests from beyond the sky in appreciation of what you have done for us.

ch: 恕我直言…与黄金裔结盟，是否意味着我们会被卷入奥赫玛的内部纠葛？
en: With all due respect... won't forging an alliance with the Chrysos Heirs embroil us in the conflicts within Okhema?

ch: 只是…我听说黄金裔与奥赫玛的元老院之间存在分歧，作为外来者，我们不想在这场斗争中站队……
en: It's just... I've heard of the friction between the Chrysos Heirs and the Council of Okhema. As outsiders, we are wary of getting caught up in this conflict—

ch: 所以…我想和两位交朋友，听两位讲有关天空的故事！阿格莱雅女士，奥赫玛好不容易拿出这么珍贵的礼物，就让我也沾沾光吧？
en: Can we be friends? I'd love to hear your tales of the sky! And ooh, it's a rare occasion that Okhema presents such an invaluable gift to guests. Lady Aglaea, may I have the honor of tasting it, too?

ch: 当然，我不会拒绝。也请二位相信，这份礼物的背后并无过多深意——结盟一事，我们可以择日再议。
en: Of course you may. Esteemed guests of Okhema, please believe me when I say that this gift carries no hidden agendas. As for the matter of the alliance, you need not give me an answer here and now.

ch: 既然如此…那我们也不推辞了。感谢奥赫玛的赠礼，也欢迎风堇女士随时交流。
en: ...I see. In that case, we will accept this gift from Okhema. We welcome the chance to talk with you, Lady Hyacine.

ch: 正式引荐一下吧——这位是来自神悟树庭「智种学派」的讲师助理，也是医疗机构「昏光庭院」的首席护理师，风堇。
en: Allow me to do the honors. This young lady is Hyacine, assistant lecturer of the Nousporists at the Grove of Epiphany and head nurse at the medical institution known as the Twilight Courtyard.

ch: 前些日子奥赫玛遭{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}袭城，不少黄金裔因战负伤，树庭特遣风堇女士前来支援奥赫玛，为伤者提供治疗……
en: Many of the Chrysos Heirs suffered injuries during {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s attack on Okhema, so the Grove sent Lady Hyacine to treat the wounded in Okhema.

ch: 虽然很想再多留你几日，但若将你强留在奥赫玛…树庭的人可要背后多话了。
en: I would love to keep you in Okhema for a few more days, but I would hate to provoke the ire of the Grove.

ch: 既然事涉奥赫玛邦交事务，我们就先行离开了。
en: Since this involves Okhema's diplomatic affairs, we'll give you some privacy.

ch: 我倒是有个提议。{NICKNAME}若闲不下来，何不与大家同去树庭？那里的景貌幽邃雅致，适合旅行。
en: If you're not keen on just sitting around, {NICKNAME}, why not go with them? The Grove is a picturesque place, perfect for sightseeing.

ch: 这个提议好，欢迎灰宝来树庭做客！就由我来做你的导游吧？
en: That's a wonderful suggestion! Come visit the Grove, Grayie! I'd be delighted to show you around!

ch: 听起来不错。多收集翁法罗斯不同地区的风土人情，也是「开拓」的一环。
en: Sounds good. Gaining more insight into the customs and geography of different regions of Amphoreus is also part of Trailblazing.

ch: 此物名为<color=#dbc291ff>「引纬」</color>，是我家族世代相传的纺衣器具，如今象征意义已远大于实用性。见到此物便等于见过我本人，倘若树庭有为难的意思，出示之便可。
en: This tool, called the <color=#dbc291ff>Weft</color>, is used to spin thread and has been passed down in my family through generations. Though it doesn't see much practical use nowadays, it's become a symbol of great significance. In this respect, it is the perfect token to represent my will. If you encounter trouble at the Grove, just take this out and show it to them.

ch: 此外，遐蝶知道，在树庭的地界上，它引出的金丝能为各位勾勒周遭一切已形或未形之物，如同…我之所见。
en: While you're in the Grove, the golden thread of the Weft can also render all things around you visible, regardless of whether they're corporeal or not, allowing you to see things as I would. Castorice knows this, too.

ch: 善加运用吧。缇安在奥赫玛的城郊等待各位——祝你们此行顺利。
en: Make good use of it. Trianne is already waiting for you at the outskirts of Okhema, so I won't keep you any longer. May your journey be smooth.

ch: 我和白厄等人曾在树庭求学，那刻夏老师当时负责教授我们与黄金裔和泰坦相关的知识。我也是在那时结识了风堇小姐——她曾是那刻夏老师的助教。
en: When I was studying at the Grove alongside Phainon and the others, Professor Anaxa was responsible for teaching us about the Chrysos Heirs and the Titans. That's also when I met Miss Hyacine... She was Anaxa's teaching assistant then.

ch: 神悟树庭是什么样的地方？
en: What is the Grove of Epiphany?

ch: 神悟树庭是奥赫玛的友邦学院——他们保管着{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种，是研究黑潮、泰坦等神秘事物的前沿机构，也为逐火之旅提供学术研究支持。
en: The Grove of Epiphany is Okhema's partner academy. They look after the Coreflame of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} and are the organization at the forefront of researching phenomena such as the black tide and the Titans. They also provide academic research support for the Flame-Chase Journey.

ch: 在那里同样驻扎着几名黄金裔，其中就有风堇小姐和那刻夏老师。
en: Several Chrysos Heirs are based in the Grove, including Miss Hyacine and Professor Anaxa.

ch: 发生什么事了吗，克莱门汀…啊，好重的伤！
en: Did something happen, Clementine? Ah... that's a serious injury!

ch: …是缇安发现的！缇安今天早上心情不好，就跑到奥赫玛的郊外散心，然后，然后就发现他倒在了路边！
en: ...Was discovered by Trianne! Trianne was in a baaaad mood this morning, so we went to the outskirts of Okhema for some fresh air... b—but then we found him collapsed on the roadside!

ch: 灰宝、蝶宝、还有缇安老师，麻烦你们先行赶赴树庭吧？待伤者情况转好，我会和克莱门汀赶上你们的。
en: Grayie, Cassie, and Trianne. Would you mind making your way to the Grove first? Once this man is out of danger, Clementine and I will join you.

ch: 请你们先赶赴树庭吧——愿瑟希斯捍卫你们的思想！
en: Please make your way to the Grove first. May Cerces safeguard your thoughts!

ch: 从这条路，飞起来，我们就要，离开奥赫玛！
en: Down this road we go! To the skies we fly! Leaving Okhema behind!

ch: 好喔，我们，大手拉小手！去树庭！
en: Okie-dokie! Everybody, let's hold hands! To the Grove we go!

ch: 树庭，路途远！准备，要做好！
en: The Grove is far! It's important to be ready!

ch: 几日后 神悟树庭
en: A few days later, Grove of Epiphany

ch: 开个玩笑！不过，人家相信，这次来神悟树庭，一定也会收获满满。
en: I was just kidding! Anyway, I believe that this trip to the Grove of Epiphany will definitely be a fruitful one.

ch: 好！缇安记得，*我们*要帮阿雅去问问大树，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}愿不愿意去奥赫玛做客……
en: Okie-dokie! Trianne remembers that we need to help Agy ask the Big Tree whether {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} would be willing to visit Okhema...

ch: 愿这条浪漫之路，能为奥赫玛带去佳音。
en: May this romantic path bring good tidings to Okhema.

ch: 很久以前，「最初的学者」塞勒苏斯带领众人在林间建立起花园与庭院，并取名「神悟树庭」，供世人醒神、求识、悟道之用。
en: A long time ago, Thalesus, the First Scholar, led the masses to build a garden and courtyard in the forest, naming the site the "Grove of Epiphany." There, people sought mental clarity, knowledge, and enlightenment.

ch: 树庭历来欢迎求学者，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}也会借微风捎来嫩叶，并伸出枝梢，结成道路，以示迎接。
en: The Grove has always welcomed scholars. So too would {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} give us her delicate leaves and extend her branches in greeting.

ch: 可现在…树庭的使者也好，泰坦也好，似乎都无动于衷。
en: Yet... it seems both the Grove's messengers and the Titan are indifferent to our arrival.

ch: 树庭闭门谢客了？
en: Is the Grove closed to visitors?

ch: 阁下，这种话…等下进去以后可千万不要说。
en: Um... Please don't speak such words once we're in the confines of the Grove.

ch: 不太可能…在我记忆里，树庭里的辩论声终日不绝于耳。
en: That's not very likely... As far as I can recall, the voices of people engaged in debate echoed throughout the Grove at all hours of the day.

ch: 还记得吗？阿格莱雅大人说过：「在树庭的地界上，它引出的金丝也能为各位勾勒周遭一切已形或未形之物」……
en: Do you remember? Lady Aglaea said this: "While you're in the Grove, the golden thread of the Weft can also render all things around you visible, regardless of whether they're corporeal or not."

ch: 这是因为，树庭并不单是{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的根系所在，也是{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}「黄金之茧」{RUBY_E#}显迹之地——
en: This is achievable because the Grove is not only where the roots of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} are... but also where the Chrysalis of Gold manifests.

ch: 大家，提高警惕…无论树庭发生了什么，能在这里见到黑潮造物的遗骸，绝不是个好兆头。
en: Everybody, stay alert. Regardless of what has happened to the Grove, the fact that we're seeing the remains of a black tide creation here definitely doesn't bode well.

ch: 虽然树庭所处地理位置相对偏僻，但黑潮竟能迅速蔓延至此……
en: To think the black tide has spread this quickly to the Grove despite its remote location...

ch: 呜，那奥赫玛岂不是也危险了？
en: Oh no... Does this mean that Okhema is also in danger?

ch: 与此同时 奥赫玛
en: At the same time, in Okhema

ch: 别有压力，你已尽了你的职责。现在也别着急回树庭了，先好好休息吧。
en: Don't stress yourself out over this. You've already done everything in your power to save him. There's no need to hurry to the Grove either. You deserve a good rest now.

ch: 他并非奥赫玛人。其身上所着衣裳，针脚的藏埋方式颇为特殊…是树庭的手艺。
en: He is not Okheman. The way the stitches on his clothes are hidden is quite unique... Such craftsmanship is undeniably from the Grove.

ch: 树庭？难道说……
en: The Grove? You mean...

ch: 算算时间，遐蝶她们也该到了。
en: Now that I think about it, Castorice and the rest should have arrived at the Grove by now.

ch: *我们*…*我们*看到树庭已遭黑潮造物入侵……
en: The black tide has invaded the Grove...

ch: …黑潮威胁果真加剧了，只没想到竟是树庭首当其冲。
en: ...The black tide is posing an even greater risk to us now. I did not expect the Grove to be the first to be impacted, though.

ch: 当务之急是尽快确认并转移火种，搜寻幸存者，以便厘清树庭之灾始末…就这么转告{M#他们}{F#她们}吧。
en: Please let them know that for now, the most pressing task is to identify the Coreflame and transfer it to a safe place as quickly as possible. We must also search for survivors and find out exactly what happened to the Grove.

ch: 内忧外患呵。{RUBY_B#「黄金战争」}痛苦的残杀{RUBY_E#}虽已辍停，奥赫玛的宿敌却在我们眼下砥砺锋芒至今……
en: We're facing threats from both within and without Okhema. The {RUBY_B#Chrysos War}merciless carnage{RUBY_E#} may have ceased, but Okhema's nemeses continue to sharpen their blades even now...

ch: 唉…希望树庭的人们，度过这次难关的…越多越好。
en: ...We can only hope that the Grove weathers this crisis with as many survivors as possible.

ch: …除他拼死逃出，树庭恐怕凶多吉少。
en: ...It's likely he is the only one who managed to escape from the Grove, against all odds.

ch: 缇安觉得…会没事的！树庭的大家都很聪明，肯定能赶跑黑潮。
en: Everything will be fine! The people at the Grove are really smart. They'll definitely be able to chase away the black tide!

ch: 啊？这种人还在这里搞研究…你们刚才不是说，树庭是围绕泰坦建立的学院嘛？
en: Huh? And he's still able to conduct research here? Didn't you just say that the Grove is an academy that was established around a Titan?

ch: 缇安相信，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}不会有事的！毕竟都说了，树庭的大家都很聪明嘛。
en: Trianne believes {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} will be alright! After all, everybody says that the people of the Grove are really smart.

ch: 黑色的怪物业已倒下，如同倾圮的雕像。其身躯内有金色的余灰残留，与翁法罗斯常见的黄金血或为一物。
en: The black-colored monster has fallen like a toppled statue. Within its body lie golden ashes, perhaps the same substance as the golden blood that is commonly seen in Amphoreus.

ch: 嗯，翁法罗斯的绝大多数门都是靠{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的力量封闭的。
en: Yes, most of the doors on Amphoreus are sealed using the power of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}.

ch: 我名为阿那克萨戈拉斯，神悟树庭七贤人之一，「智种学派」的创始者。丑话先说在前头：第一，别叫我那刻夏。
en: My name is Anaxagoras, one of the Seven Sages of the Grove of Epiphany and the founder of the Nousporists. Before we go any further: Rule number one, do not call me Anaxa.

ch: 只有小部分学者与我一起留守，捍卫树庭。如果不出意外，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种应在不久后同时抵达奥赫玛……
en: Only a small fraction of the scholars stayed behind with me to defend the Grove. If all goes well, {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}' Coreflame will reach Okhema before long...

ch: 犹如天雷贯地，「毁灭」金光直欲撕裂黎明机器，摧坼穹窿。一时间，翁法罗斯无数洞天里，众人只觉天地翻覆、山河动荡。真可谓帝弓再临射星矢，灵木摧折云埃起……
en: Like a celestial thunderbolt piercing the earth, the "Destruction" radiance threatened to tear apart the Dawn Device, shattering the firmament. In an instant, within the many delves of Amphoreus, everyone felt the world overturn and the mountains and rivers tremble. It was as if the imperial bow had returned to shoot the stars, splintering sacred trees and raising clouds of dust...

ch: 这颗心脏是树庭一切水流之源……
en: This heart is the source of all water in the Grove...

ch: 正是。新灵感的火花每每在树庭中迸发，露水便会自此垂落，落入池中。
en: Indeed. When the sparks of inspiration burst forth within the Grove, dewdrops fall and land within the pool.

ch: 怎么区别对待呀，是怕人家太聪明，问出颠覆整个翁法罗斯的问题吗？
en: What's with this unfair treatment? Is it because I'm too smart and you're afraid that the question I ask will turn Amphoreus upside down?

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>方才已告说过了，吾乃神悟树庭七贤人之一。若觉着这答案不够利落，再附赠一条：吾实为七贤人之首。</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>As I've previously mentioned, I'm one of the Seven Sages of the Grove of Epiphany. If you think that this answer is insufficient, then I'll add to it. I'm the leader of the Seven Sages.</color>

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>吾想确认汝等是否有实力，为吾夺回正身…更从黑潮手中夺回树庭。</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>I want to ascertain your ability to help me reclaim my true form... and reclaim the Grove from the black tide.</color>

ch: 一个在树庭游荡的…幽灵？
en: A spirit... wandering around the Grove?

ch: 嗯！缇安不久前在一根树枝上找到的。缇安还顺着用金丝找了找，发现整个树庭到处都有类似的气息。
en: Yup! Trianne found it on a branch not long ago. Trianne even used the golden thread to search around and found that the entire Grove is giving off a similar aura.

ch: 抱歉，我也不知道…毕竟这可是整个树庭、乃至翁法罗斯，都只有极少数人知晓的秘中之秘。
en: Sorry, but even I don't know how... After all, this is a secret among secrets that only a select few in the entire Grove and even Amphoreus know.

ch: 即便是翁法罗斯本土神话，也不外乎「心诚则灵」四个字。只要你能展现出诚意，蝴蝶便绝不会无动于衷……
en: Even in the native myths of Amphoreus, it all boils down to "sincerity brings miracles." Show genuine intent, and the butterfly will surely respond...

ch: 还有，「出言必有据」——这正是我在树庭求学时习得的宝贵知识。
en: Also, "to make a claim, one must have evidence" — this is the precious knowledge that I acquired during my time at the Grove.

ch: 呵呵，毕竟树庭的学者们为了捍卫吾之火种，不惜赴火蹈刃，从容就义…吾既贵为尊神，若只眼睁睁看着人子们舍己成人，未免太没面子。
en: Hehe, after all, the scholars of the Grove have always been willing to lay down their lives to defend my Coreflame... As a respected god, it would be too embarrassing if I were to do nothing and simply watch the children of humanity give up their lives for me.

ch: 尤其是那名唤那刻夏的异端——不惜磔裂灵魂当作础石，引发奇迹，在这树庭中布下天罗地网，将一众黑潮造物困于樊笼中，以免殃及他方。
en: Especially that heretic named Anaxa. He did not even hesitate to tear his soul apart and use it to perform a miracle. He trapped all the creations of the black tide within the Grove so that they would not be able to harm others.

ch: 真是只伶俐的小兔子。如此，吾既能夺回正身，汝等也能将火种和恩师迎回奥赫玛……
en: What a smart little bunny. This way, I'll be able to regain my true form, and you will be able to bring the Coreflame and your teacher back to Okhema...

ch: 大家，跟缇安走！从奥赫玛，飞呀飞！
en: Everybody, follow Trianne! Fly, fly, fly away from Okhema!

ch: 为了翁法罗斯…给我陪葬吧，泰坦。
en: For the sake of Amphoreus... Die with me, Titan.

ch: 如果接过神权的是你，他们一定会心甘情愿追随的…因为你是悬锋城的英雄。
en: If you take on the divine role, they will have no reservations about following your lead... After all, you're the hero of Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 我父母现在在圣城守备队中服役…他们是悬锋的战士，比所有奥赫玛人都勇敢。
en: My parents are serving in the Holy City Garrison now. As warriors of Kremnos, they're braver than any Okheman!

ch: 你们几个，可曾去过悬锋城？
en: Have you ever been to Castrum Kremnos?

ch: 你们出生在圣城，生活与奥赫玛人无异，对一族的了解也只来自旁人口述。
en: You were all born in the holy city and are living lives no different from the Okhemans. Everything you know about our people comes only from the tales of others.

ch: 爸爸妈妈说，悬锋的孩子打出生起就手持利剑，注定要奔向战场。
en: Mom and Dad told me that the children of Kremnos are born to wield swords and fight on the battlefield.

ch: 他们还说，王子率领的{RUBY_B#悬锋城流亡军}悬锋孤军{RUBY_E#}是翁法罗斯最勇猛的军队，战无不胜。
en: They also said that the {RUBY_B#Kremnoan army in exile}Kremnoan Detachment{RUBY_E#} led by the crown prince is the bravest army across all of Amphoreus. No one can defeat them!

ch: 还不是时候。悬锋的年轻人，听我口令：回到父母身边，从今日起，把全部时间用在饮食和锻炼上。想成为合格的悬锋勇士，这两件事决不能落下。
en: That time has not yet arrived, but... Young men of Kremnos, heed my command! Return to your parents at once. From hereon, you are to dedicate yourselves to rigorous training and a healthy diet. You must not neglect these two aspects if you are to become a brave warrior of Kremnos.

ch: 糟了，是他，那悬锋城的王储……
en: Drat! It's the crown prince of Castrum Kremnos...

ch: 奥、奥赫玛的宪兵队正在执行公务，请勿随便靠近！
en: Th—The Civil Guard of Okhema is on official duty. Please keep out of this area!

ch: 你觉得自己博古通今？那我考考你，你可知道悬锋城的黄金狮首，是怎么被砌到墙上去的？
en: So, you think yourself knowledgeable? Then here is a question for you: Do you know how Chryseus Leo in Castrum Kremnos came to be mounted on the wall?

ch: 哈哈哈，那我就给你说道说道。当年，悬锋城的建立者带着一众战士在特雷托斯城郊围猎雄狮……
en: Hahaha! Let me enlighten you. A long time ago, the founder of Castrum Kremnos led a group of warriors to hunt down a lion on the outskirts of the city of Tretos.

ch: 那牙尖爪利的恶兽为害多年，巢穴里的骸骨垒得比环绕奥赫玛的山峰还高。
en: That vicious beast had been a menace for years, and the bones in its den were stacked even higher than the peaks around Okhema.

ch: ——哎哟，这不是，万敌阁下嘛？！真是好久不见哪，哈，哈哈……
en: — Well, well. If it isn't Lord Mydei! It's been a while, ahaha...

ch: 哦？这奥赫玛吹的是什么风……
en: Oho, what in Okhema is happening?

ch: 言外之意…你曾想过放弃悬锋的王权，放弃领导你的族人。
en: In other words... you did entertain the thought of giving up the throne of Kremnos and forsaking your people.

ch: 假如让他们知道，备受族人尊崇的王储萌生了放弃的念头…迈德漠斯，你该如何向你逝去的母亲交代？
en: If they ever learn that the crown prince they look up to so much is actually toying with the notion of stepping down... think of the disgrace it would bring upon your departed mother, Mydeimos.

ch: 别忘了，她可是为了你——为了重振悬锋的荣光——才会死于{RUBY_B#悬锋先王，万敌之父}欧利庞{RUBY_E#}的毒计！
en: You'd best remember that she died for you because of {RUBY_B#Former Kremnoan King, Father of Mydei}Eurypon's{RUBY_E#} schemes! To restore the glory of Kremnos!

ch: 你是在羞辱我吗，迈德漠斯？我是老了，但还没老到愚痴。我当然记得，欧利庞死于悬锋孤军的围剿……
en: Are you trying to shame me, Mydeimos? I may be old, but I haven't become so decrepit that I've forgotten it all. Of course, I remember that Eurypon died when the Kremnoan Detachment surrounded him.

ch: 走吧，万敌——那些黄金裔是这么称呼你的——走你自以为正确的道路。你骨子里是个我行我素的战士，一旦下定决心，没人能阻止你。
en: Go, Mydei... Hah, that's what those Chrysos Heirs call you, isn't it? Go down the path you have deemed correct. Deep down, you have always been one to do as you please, and I am well aware that no one can deter you once you've made up your mind.

ch: 可是不要妄图否定悬锋的传统…我们身在奥赫玛，但永远是「纷争」的子民。
en: But don't you ever dream of renouncing the traditions of Kremnos... We may reside in Okhema now, but we remain eternally bound to Strife by blood.

ch: 欧利庞，{RUBY_B#万敌}这孩子{RUBY_E#}没做错任何事！
en: Eurypon, {RUBY_B#Mydei}the boy{RUBY_E#} did nothing wrong!

ch: 这是一场谋杀！别让婴孩无辜的鲜血玷污悬锋人的荣耀——别把软肋暴露给你的敌人！
en: This is murder! Do not sully the noble name of Kremnos with the blood of an innocent child! You mustn't reveal your weaknesses to the enemy!

ch: 我们…必须拯救悬锋城。
en: We must... save Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 荒谬！他的手就连枪头都举不起来，你觉得他能威胁到悬锋城？
en: Don't be absurd! Those tiny hands lack the strength to even lift a spear! Do you truly believe him a threat to Castrum Kremnos!?

ch: 你要是真这么做，那才是断绝了悬锋的血脉——让我们千百年的荣光变成彻头彻尾的笑柄！
en: You'll be ending the bloodline of Kremnos if you do this. Our millennia-old glory will become nothing more than a joke!

ch: 至于悬锋城千百年的「荣光」，那本来就是个笑话——杀戮就是杀戮，为虚荣而高兴的杀人凶手，并不比翁法罗斯最凶蛮的野兽更高贵。
en: As for our millennia-old "glory"... it has always been a joke in my eyes. Glorify it all you want, but it will not alter the nature of slaughter. Those who revel in it are but murderers. They are no more noble than the most monstrous beasts in Amphoreus.

ch: 大言不惭！你，还有悬锋诸王，你们的每一顶王冠，哪个不是从父辈的尸身摘得……
en: Enough with your words! Among all the kings of Kremnos, which one did not inherit the crown only after plucking it from the lifeless body of his father?

ch: 吾儿…迈德漠斯。
en: My son... Mydeimos.

ch: 迈德漠斯，吾儿啊……
en: Mydeimos, my son...

ch: 若无王冠便无以为悬锋…那我就夺来它，掷碎它，激醒众人吧。
en: If there is no Kremnos without the crown... then I shall seize the crown and smash it to pieces to bring the people to their senses.

ch: 为了奥赫玛！死吧！
en: In Okhema's name! Perish!

ch: 怎么了…是树庭那面遇到麻烦了么？
en: What's wrong...? Is there trouble at the Grove?

ch: 凶手…是…迈德漠斯……
en: The culprit... is... Mydeimos...

ch: 说说吧，万敌？告诉我们，你和白厄做了些什么傻事。
en: Speak up, Mydei. Tell us exactly what kind of foolishness you and Phainon indulged in this time.

ch: 「…长夜最后的光亮，城垣坚固的奥赫玛。」
en: "In twilight's last gleam, Okhema stands bold. Her walls sturdy, tales untold."

ch: 这几句表达了作者的思乡之情，正如奥赫玛离大部分人的故乡都很遥远。
en: These lines express the poet's yearning for their home, just as Okhema is distant from many people's homes.

ch: 嚯…听你的意思，勇猛的迈德漠斯，悬锋王位的继承人，居然想打破一族延续千年的古老传统？
en: So... are you suggesting that you, the mighty Mydeimos and the heir to the throne of Kremnos, wish to defy the tradition that has endured among your people for millennia?

ch: 或许我们都需要释放压力。来吧，迈德漠斯，延续你我之前的竞赛……
en: Maybe we both need to relieve some stress. Come, Mydeimos! Let's recommence our previous competition...

ch: 翁法罗斯的大地上，有些生命死于黄昏，有些生命死于拂晓，而有些生命——它们命中注定死于正午的烈阳！
en: On the land of Amphoreus, some lives meet their end at dusk, some at dawn, and yet others... are fated to perish under the blistering sun at noon!

ch: 状态恢复后，白厄与万敌将晕倒的浴客们送离了案发现场……
en: After recovery, Phainon and Mydei escorted the fainted bathers away from the scene.

ch: 那…先前和{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}对决时，你们在奥赫玛上空张开的巨大「百界门」，岂不是……
en: In that case... when you opened that giant Century Gate above Okhema during the battle against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}...

ch: 咱俩认识也有段时间了，听你说悬锋古语的次数…屈指可数啊。
en: Though we've been acquainted for some time, I have... rarely heard you talk in the ancient tongue of Kremnos.

ch: 呵…因为实在没什么可说的。哀丽秘榭只是个小村庄，因为战火，早就不复存在了。
en: Well... It's because there isn't much to say. Aedes Elysiae is simply a tiny village that disappeared many years ago in the flames of war.

ch: 嗯，我看见了，燃烧的哀丽秘榭，我的亲人、朋友、同族…所有人都倒在火海里。
en: Yes, I saw it all. Aedes Elysiae ablaze, with everyone — my family, friends, and my kin — lying in a sea of flames.

ch: 对…所以我由衷地感谢你，迈德漠斯。
en: That's right... And that's why I am truly thankful to you, Mydeimos.

ch: 那你呢，万敌？你在那试炼里看见了什么…你的恐惧又是什么？
en: Then what about you, Mydei? What did you see in that trial? ...What do you fear?

ch: 然后，我在其中看到了奥赫玛。以及……
en: But to answer your question, I saw Okhema in the trial, as well as...

ch: 翁法罗斯的野风有铁锈的味道。赫菲斯辛总笑话我喝蜜酿加羊奶，说把鲜红的血色拌得不伦不类。他生得瘦小，但在战场上凶悍无比，杀敌如麻。
en: The wind in the wilds of Amphoreus smells like rust. Hephaestion would always tease me about adding goat milk to the honey brew, claiming I ruined the blood-red color of the drink. He had a scrawny figure, but was a relentless force on the battlefield, dispatching foes without so much as a blink.

ch: 托勒密总爱咬文嚼字，离开悬锋时，从大图书馆顺走了不少古籍——都是我家的，也不用还了。至于朴塞塔…呵，他不爱说话，但弹得一手好琴……
en: Ptolemy was a real bookworm, always spouting off in chapters and verses. When we left Kremnos, he made off with a stack of ancient tomes from the grand library — not like it mattered, since my family owns the library. And then there was Peucesta... Heh, he was the silent type, but a truly masterful musician...

ch: 当然。在悬锋孤军与奥赫玛联合前，他们就战死了。
en: They died on the battlefield before the Kremnoan Detachment managed to join Okhema.

ch: 「迈德漠斯，不要悲伤。我已挣得荣耀，用光荣的死亡回敬夙敌……」
en: "Mydeimos, do not mourn. I have achieved honor by bestowing a noble death upon the enemy..."

ch: 「多好啊，迈德漠斯…我终于能将你成王的讯息带向冥界了……」
en: "This is perfect, Mydeimos... I can finally deliver the news of you ascending the throne to the nether realm..."

ch: 「迈德漠斯，请你转告我的家人：打倒我托勒密的并非歹毒的诡计，而是翁法罗斯一切历史的重量。」
en: "Mydeimos, please tell my family: It was not cunning schemes that vanquished Ptolemy, but the immense weight of Amphoreus' entire history."

ch: 「迈德漠斯，戴上王冠吧。」
en: "Mydeimos, don the crown."

ch: 「迈德漠斯…{RUBY_B#悬锋人}我们{RUBY_E#}的王啊…不要落泪，那不称你的身份。」
en: "Mydeimos... {RUBY_B#Kremnoan}Our{RUBY_E#} king... Do not shed tears for me. It's not befitting of your status."

ch: 他死后，我本想过带领族人回归故乡。但彼时的悬锋已是一片荒芜，能在其中生长的只有黑暗与疯狂。
en: Following his demise, I considered leading my people back to our homeland, but Kremnos had already turned into a wasteland. Only darkness and insanity thrived there.

ch: 顶着许多人——也包括克拉特鲁斯——的反对之声，我让悬锋孤军留在了奥赫玛。但我明白，他们的荣耀不可能被磨灭。
en: Against the dissent of many — Krateros included — I made the Kremnoan Detachment stay in Okhema, but I know that their glory will never be doused out.

ch: 不久后 奥赫玛城下
en: Shortly after, in Okhema

ch: 呼…真是险之又险的逃生。但幸好，终究是安全抵达奥赫玛了。
en: Phew... That was a close call. Thank goodness that we returned to Okhema unharmed.

ch: 奥赫玛，你的球棒侠回来了！
en: Okhema, your baseballer is back!

ch: 不对，缇安大人。若不是你挺身而出，我们早已葬身树庭了。
en: Please don't blame yourself, Lady Trianne. If it weren't for you, we would've already met our end at the Grove.

ch: 真是嘈杂…奥赫玛还是老样子啊。
en: All this noise and commotion... Okhema hasn't changed a bit, has it?

ch: …老师，我直说了：阿格莱雅大人给我们的任务是，寻找幸存者、弄清树庭之灾的原委，以及…回收{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种。
en: ...Professor, let me be frank: The mission Lady Aglaea entrusted us is to search for survivors, uncover the truth about the disaster at the Grove, and... retrieve the Coreflame of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.

ch: 只是在那之前，我还有些事情要办。树庭有几位同僚的家属就住在圣城，我想在面见阿格莱雅前…先去慰问一下他们。
en: But I have some things to take care of first. The families of some of my fellow Grove scholars live in the holy city. Before we meet Aglaea... I want to visit them.

ch: 呵…我猜猜，她不但会拒绝让我慰问死者家属，还会封锁树庭的消息，那女人就是这般冷血。
en: Heh... Let me guess. That woman will not only prevent me from visiting the families of the deceased, but will also suppress any information about the Grove. She's always been that cold-hearted.

ch: 树庭的一些朋友为了和我一起捍卫火种，抗击黑潮，不幸牺牲，他们的家属…有权利得知这一切。
en: My fellows at the Grove gave their lives defending the Coreflame and fighting the black tide alongside me. Their families... deserve to know the truth.

ch: 女士，卡林尼库斯在几日前，为了保护树庭，牺牲在抗击黑潮的过程中了。
en: Ma'am, Callinicus passed away a few days ago defending the Grove against the black tide.

ch: 那么，树庭…他守住了么？
en: So... did he manage to defend the Grove?

ch: 我是悬锋人。死亡、牺牲…我皆能坦然面对。
en: I come from Kremnos. Death... and sacrifice... are things I have learned to face with composure.

ch: 如今，悬锋的新王要降临了。丈夫的仇债，我自会用手中的长枪问黑潮怪物们讨回。
en: With the coming coronation of the new king of Kremnos, I'll take up my lance against the creatures of the black tide and seek vengeance for my husband.

ch: 哎哟，你瞧我，都老糊涂了。我那俩争气的女儿，早就毕业啦，现在在树庭做学者呢。你说我，年纪大了，总是一个晃神，就看到好多年前的事情。
en: Alas, forgive this old brain of mine. Both of my daughters graduated long ago, and they are now scholars at the Grove. As I get older, memories from years past tend to blend together.

ch: …她们为了保护树庭、抗争黑潮，战至最后一刻了。
en: ...They fought until their last breath against the black tide to defend the Grove.

ch: 我是驻留树庭的黄金裔，没能保护好她们，费贝尔先生，如果您有怒火……
en: As the Chrysos Heir stationed at the Grove, I failed to protect them. Mr. Fabio, if you're upset...

ch: 冷静，提图斯。我是神悟树庭的阿那克萨戈拉斯，与你的父亲老提图斯是同道。
en: Keep your cool, Titus. I'm Anaxagoras from the Grove of Epiphany and a colleague of your father, Old Titus.

ch: 我早和他说过，一把年纪了，老老实实回圣城养老不好么？非要去什么树庭，和一群神神叨叨的学者瞎折腾。
en: I've been telling him for ages to stay in the holy city and enjoy his retirement. But no, he just had to go off to that Grove and mess around with those scholars.

ch: 还请小心。奥赫玛不是树庭，这里……
en: Please be careful. Okhema isn't the Grove. This place...

ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，这趟树庭之行…实在发生了太多意料外的事情，我们本无意将你卷入危险，遑论直面黑潮……
en: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, so many unexpected things happened on our journey to the Grove... We truly had no intention of putting you in danger, let alone face the black tide head on...

ch: 如今{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}火种缺位，黑潮卷土重来…作为对黑潮研究最深的学院城邦，树庭绝非不堪一击之辈，却在朝夕之间倾覆，徒留一城英灵血泪……
en: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} Coreflame now sits vacant and the black tide has returned... The Grove is an academic city with the best understanding of the black tide. It shouldn't have fallen so easily, and yet it was taken overnight, leaving the city in blood and tears, haunted by the spirits of departed heroes...

ch: 「纷争」的试炼已是迫在眉睫，希望万敌…能尽早下定决心吧。
en: The trial of Strife is imminent. I pray Mydei will be able to steel his resolve soon...

ch: 树庭的可怕敌人，也是黑潮造物？
en: The dreadful enemies of the Grove are also creations of the black tide?

ch: 缇宝老师曾走遍翁法罗斯万千城邦，可就连她们都对这个黑袍剑士毫无印象…此人绝不可小觑，一人一剑便将我们逼得喘不过气，对黄金裔来说，无疑是新的威胁。
en: Lady Tribbie once traveled across thousands of cities in Amphoreus to repel the black tide, but even they have no recollection of this powerful enemy in all their journeys. Perhaps the fall of Strife has triggered even more terrifying events in unseen places...

ch: 缇宝大人为了抗击黑潮踏上旅途，然而自旅途伊始，到走过万千城邦，她们都未曾在黑潮中遭遇如此强敌。说不定是「纷争」陨落，暗中激起了更为骇人的影响……
en: Lady Tribbie once traveled across thousands of cities in Amphoreus to repel the black tide, but even they have no recollection of this powerful enemy in all their journeys. Perhaps the fall of Strife has triggered even more terrifying events in unseen places...

ch: 但当时，在树庭，你接下我的时候……
en: Yet when you caught me in the Grove...

ch: 奔波数日，想必{NICKNAME}阁下也很疲惫了吧？请暂时将树庭的惨剧抛在脑后，好好休息一日吧。
en: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, you must be tired after being on the move these past few days. Please set aside the tragedy at the Grove for now and rest for the day.

ch: 呵…没想到翁法罗斯还能锤炼无名客的意志。
en: Heh... I wasn't expecting Amphoreus to temper the will of the Nameless.

ch: 发现一件很有趣的事。还记得么？翁法罗斯的天空被一位泰坦封锁了，{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}…它的存在让这个世界与天外隔绝。
en: I discovered something interesting. Do you remember that Amphoreus's sky was sealed away by a Titan? {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila's{RUBY_E#} presence keeps this world isolated from the rest of the world beyond the sky.

ch: 树庭事发，接下来肯定又会有几番动荡。事已至此，先休息吧。
en: After what happened at the Grove, there's sure to be unrest in the coming days. We should rest for now.

ch: 啊，迈德漠斯……
en: Ah, Mydeimos...

ch: 你要维护这女人吗，迈德漠斯？过去的千年里，围绕她——还有她们宣扬的神谕，多少战火燃起，多少城邦自相残杀？
en: Are you defending this woman, Mydeimos? How many wars did people start because of her and her so-called prophecy? How many cities fell in the past millennium, their people massacring each other?

ch: 自你的父亲死后，我和族人就一直在等待复兴悬锋的时机。我们将一切希望寄托于你，却迟迟没有得到回应。
en: Ever since your father died, our people and I have been waiting for a day to revive Kremnos. We placed all of our hopes in you but never received an answer.

ch: 你若真能带领族人打破这染血的命运，就再次证明给我看吧，迈德漠斯。
en: If you're truly capable of leading our people beyond this bloodstained fate, then prove it to me once more, Mydeimos.

ch: 真是勇猛的斗士…软弱的奥赫玛人，竟也拥有如此豪杰。
en: A fierce fighter... I did not expect such heroism from a feeble Okheman.

ch: 洗耳恭听吧！我是悬锋孤军之首，{RUBY_B#万敌}迈德漠斯{RUBY_E#}——
en: Listen closely! I am the leader of the Kremnoan Detachment — {RUBY_B#Mydei}Mydeimos{RUBY_E#}!

ch: 那就挥剑吧！拿走我的王冠，用先王的血加冕，继承一切…名正言顺，成为悬锋的新王。
en: Then swing your blade! Take my crown, coronate yourself with an old king's blood, and inherit it all... Become the new rightful king of Kremnos.

ch: 不，我不要王冠。听好了——倘若悬锋的王只有一种宿命，那它对我毫无意义……
en: No, I don't want the crown. Listen — If there's only one end for the kings of Kremnos, then the crown means nothing to me...

ch: 但悬锋的城墙不会随我一同崩塌…吾儿，你以为自己逃得出命运的掌心？
en: But the walls of Kremnos will not fall with me. Do you truly think you can escape fate's grasp, my son?

ch: 悬锋的王，是你。你会来，我有预感。
en: King of Kremnos, it is. That you would come, I knew.

ch: 悬锋，王者的印戒，属于你母亲。重铸、修复…由我。
en: A signet ring. For the king of Kremnos. Belonged to your mother. Recast and restore it... I did.

ch: {RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的圣女能聆听门神的指引，也许你梦见的，就是翁法罗斯某处仙境的景象哦。
en: {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}' Holy Maidens can receive guidance from the god of passages. Perhaps what you saw in your dream is a divine land somewhere in Amphoreus.

ch: 嗯…很遗憾，它确实存在于翁法罗斯，只是离我们的圣殿还很遥远。
en: Yes... Unfortunately, it does exist in Amphoreus, but it's very far away from our temple.

ch: 既然心意已决，就穿越黑潮，为翁法罗斯拨开迷雾吧……
en: Since your mind is made up, then traverse the black tide and dispel the fog for Amphoreus...

ch: 与此同时 奥赫玛某处
en: At the same time, somewhere in Okhema

ch: 不会错…就是它。烧毁了哀丽秘榭…杀害所有人的凶手。
en: I was right... It is this thing. The one who torched Aedes Elysiae to the ground... and killed everyone.

ch: 奉劝你别逞英雄。眼下的奥赫玛，恐怕没人是它的对手。
en: Don't try to be a hero. No one in Okhema stands a chance against that thing right now.

ch: 你想主张…它来自翁法罗斯之外？
en: Are you suggesting that... it originates from beyond Amphoreus?

ch: 我只想为自己发誓保护的城邦除掉一个祸端，仅此而已。树庭的惨剧，绝不能再度上演。
en: I just want to eliminate a threat to the city I pledged to protect. That's all. The tragedy at the Grove must never happen again.

ch: 没什么！只是…又想起树庭的事。
en: Nothing! Just... remembering what happened at the Grove.

ch: 不久前 奥赫玛
en: Not long ago, in Okhema

ch: 但要是如你所说，它岂不是很快就会冲着奥赫玛来？创世涡心可是摆满了泰坦的火种。
en: But if your argument holds up, wouldn't they be headed to Okhema soon? The Vortex of Genesis is full of the Titans' Coreflames.

ch: 未必。我们暂且将此人称为「盗火行者」。假设推测成立，此人的目标共有三处。
en: Not necessarily. Let's call that person the "Flame Reaver" for now. If my presumption holds, that person has three targets.

ch: 一是我本人；二是仍未陨落的{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}；三是保管诸神火种的奥赫玛和创世涡心。
en: The first target is me. The second target is {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, who hasn't yet fallen. And the third is Okhema and the Vortex of Genesis, where the Coreflames are housed.

ch: 不过，我猜奥赫玛不会是首选。{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的火种有元老院的秘法管控，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的水幕应该也足以隔断外界的感应。
en: But I suspect Okhema won't be their first target. {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame is guarded by the Council of Elders' arcane power, and {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa's{RUBY_E#} water curtain should be able to block out any external perceptions.

ch: 它若生有羽翼，我就不可能从树庭活着回来。
en: If they had wings, I wouldn't have made it out of the Grove alive.

ch: 那还真该庆幸啊。那么，既然盗火行者可能的目标有二，我们更得加快动作了……
en: That's a relief. Anyway, since the Flame Reaver has two targets, we need to move fast...

ch: 考虑到奥赫玛、树庭和这几处目标地点的距离，我想，最应该设防的是……
en: With the distances between Okhema, the Grove, and these potential targets, I believe we should bolster our defense in...

ch: 我权赐你与悬锋众英灵，同享尸床的权利——
en: Rejoice, for I grant you the honor of sharing your final resting place with Kremnos' departed heroes!

ch: 又来这套…万敌，我配合你进攻。
en: Not the same trick again... Mydei, I'll follow your lead.

ch: 阿雅，还是不要苛责小白了…奥赫玛的处境，非常危险。
en: Agy, there's no need to scold Snowy... Okhema is currently in grave danger.

ch: 对，和「逐火之旅」如出一辙…那刻夏老师认为盗火行者的出现，也许是黑潮进一步蔓延的表征。
en: Yes, just like the Flame-Chase Journey is doing. Professor Anaxa thinks the Flame Reaver's arrival is likely a sign that the black tide has spread further.

ch: 莫非是<color=#dbc291ff>悬锋城</color>？
en: Is it <color=#dbc291ff>Castrum Kremnos</color>?

ch: 正是。各位一定记得，{NICKNAME}和{M#他}{F#她}的伙伴在{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}一役中施展过令人惊叹的神迹，唤醒了悬锋城的过往。
en: Yes. I'm sure everyone remembers the astonishing miracle {NICKNAME} performed with {M#his}{F#her} companion during the battle with {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} and how they awakened Castrum Kremnos' past.

ch: 然后，将盗火行者「封印」在岁月的迷宫。
en: Then, we'll "seal" the Flame Reaver in the Maze of Time.

ch: 白厄，我希望与你达成共识：我们要将那盗火行者一举拿下，斩获战果。此后，面对元老院的挑战，我们也将有自己的底牌。
en: Phainon, it is my hope that we can come to an understanding on this: We must take down the Flame Reaver in one go and retrieve the Coreflame, and in doing so, grant ourselves an advantage against the Council of Elders.

ch: 抱歉，{NICKNAME}阁下，如今奥赫玛内忧外患，又将你推上浪尖。
en: I apologize for tasking you to spearhead the plan once again, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, but Okhema is currently beset by enemies from within and without.

ch: 但…盗火行者的剑想要伤到你，得先穿透我的胸膛。
en: But the Flame Reaver will have to step over my dead body if they wish to do you harm.

ch: 自然。与盗火行者交锋后，若阁下心力不支，自可抽身脱离战场，我们另寻他法。
en: Of course. Should you feel fatigued after our confrontation with the Flame Reaver, you are free to withdraw from the battlefield. We will find another way.

ch: 你说万敌么？他正在解决另一桩难题呢。
en: You mean Mydei? He's dealing with a different problem.

ch: 奥赫玛 创世涡心
en: Vortex of Genesis, Okhema

ch: 你若真能带领族人打破这染血的命运，就再次证明给我看吧，迈德漠斯。
en: If you're truly capable of leading our people beyond this bloodstained fate, then prove it to me once more, Mydeimos.

ch: 没错，这会是无比艰难的一仗。目的地…还是悬锋城。
en: That's right. It's going to be a tough battle, and our destination is... turns out to be Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 不久之后，我就会离开奥赫玛，去和这世间的至暗搏斗，去背负…{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的命运。
en: I'll be leaving Okhema soon to fight the great darkness of this world... and to shoulder {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} destiny.

ch: 但我的事不重要。迈德漠斯，我看到了…最后，你还是拥抱了自己的命运。
en: But this isn't about me, Mydeimos. I saw it... You've finally decided to embrace your own fate.

ch: 没错，你实现了每一位悬锋先王的野心。
en: Indeed. You've realized the aspirations of every former king of Kremnos.

ch: 现在，你终于能带领族人还乡，去重铸悬锋的荣光了。
en: And now, you can at last bring our people home and reforge the glory of Kremnos.

ch: 别这么做，迈德漠斯……
en: Do not do this, Mydeimos...

ch: 拿上它，召集失去了身份的人们。告诉他们，登上神阶的迈德漠斯昭告天下——
en: Take it and rally those who have lost their identities. Convey the words of Mydeimos, now ascended to divinity:

ch: 翁法罗斯将迎来残酷的明天。大敌当前，再辉煌的王朝也不过是一堆瓦砾。
en: A cruel fate awaits Amphoreus. No matter how illustrious a dynasty may seem, it crumbles to rubble and gravel before formidable foes.

ch: 那一晚，说服阿格莱雅放了我的…是你么，迈德漠斯？
en: The one who persuaded Aglaea to set me free that night... Was that you, Mydeimos?

ch: 那现在呢，迈德漠斯？
en: And what is next, Mydeimos...?

ch: 那折磨{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的疯狂，吞噬整个翁法罗斯的黑暗……
en: The madness that has plagued {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} and the darkness that has consumed Amphoreus...

ch: 你来了，迈德漠斯……
en: You're here, Mydeimos...

ch: 你帮奥赫玛渡过了又一道难关，没有言语能表达我的谢意。
en: You aided Okhema through yet another trying ordeal, and my gratitude knows no bounds.

ch: 那正是悬锋城的历代僭主缺失的东西。
en: That is precisely what every ruler of Castrum Kremnos has been missing.

ch: 翁法罗斯会迎来新生的，迈德漠斯…只是，带领人们抵达终点的不一定要是你我。
en: Mydeimos, a new chapter awaits Amphoreus... Yet, the one who guides the people to the destination need not be you and I.

ch: 所以，你也看见了么，迈德漠斯？
en: So, I assume you also glimpsed yours, Mydeimos?

ch: 再见了，万敌。
en: Farewell, Mydei.

ch: …万敌？
en: ...Mydei?

ch: 假如万事顺利，我们也许不会再见。感谢你们为翁法罗斯带来的一切。
en: If all goes according to plan, this may be our final meeting. I just want to let you know that I appreciate everything you have done for Amphoreus.

ch: 如今我身负神权，隐隐能感觉到…你们对翁法罗斯的未来重要非凡。
en: Now that I bear the divine within me, I can get the vague feeling that... that you have a great significance for the future of Amphoreus.

ch: 感觉不错。你觉得呢，万敌？
en: Looks pretty good. What do you think, Mydei?

ch: …也祝你们在翁法罗斯不留遗憾。
en: ...I wish the same for you during your time in Amphoreus.

ch: 悬锋之王，虽无印戒…却更有王相，如今。
en: The King of Kremnos, without the signet ring... But looking more like a king now.

ch: 与众人一同，我将在此，聆听悬锋城…那道惊雷。
en: Together with everyone, I shall remain here. That thunder... from Castrum Kremnos, we wait to hear.

ch: 万敌阁下！
en: Lord Mydei!

ch: 树庭的事，我听说了。请你节哀。
en: I've heard about what happened at the Grove. I am deeply sorry for your loss.

ch: 总是这么一针见血呢，万敌阁下。请放心吧，假如命运真的指定了我，我会做好准备的。
en: You've always been so perceptive, Lord Mydei. Rest assured. If fate has truly selected me, I will be ready.

ch: 我将返回悬锋城对抗黑潮，恐怕不会再回到奥赫玛了。
en: I'm heading back to Castrum Kremnos to fight against the black tide. In all likelihood, I will never again return to Okhema.

ch: 尽管说吧，万敌阁下。我一定逐字逐句帮你传达。
en: I'm all ears, Lord Mydei. I'll make sure to convey every single word.

ch: ——告诉她们，以后不必再以肉身勘察敌后了。只需一条讯息，天谴的锋刃便会指向奥赫玛的敌人。
en: ...Tell them that there is no longer a need to send scouts behind enemy lines. With a single message, the Lance of Fury will target anyone who dares oppose Okhema.

ch: …万敌阁下。
en: ...Lord Mydei.

ch: 我不会那么做的，万敌阁下。死亡不是游戏。
en: I would never do that, Lord Mydei. Death is not a game.

ch: 所以，你要独自返乡了吗，万敌阁下？
en: So, are you returning home alone, Lord Mydei?

ch: 还乡…也许吧。现在悬锋城不仅是我的故乡，还是我命运的归宿。
en: Returning home, you say... Heh, maybe. At this moment, Castrum Kremnos is not just my birthplace, but also my fated destination.

ch: 我会的，万敌阁下。
en: I will, Lord Mydei.

ch: 从这里到悬锋城，路途漫长。
en: The road to Castrum Kremnos from here is long.

ch: 但话都说到这份上了…感谢你助我手刃仇敌，迈德漠斯。
en: Well, with that said... thank you for aiding me in defeating my archenemy, Mydeimos.

ch: 融入奥赫玛的过程中，他们一定会遇到阻力…我唯一的遗憾，便是无法与他们同担这段时光。
en: They will undoubtedly face challenges while assimilating into Okhema... It is my sole regret that I cannot stand by them during this time.

ch: 祝你战无不胜，迈德漠斯。
en: May triumph always be yours, Mydeimos.

ch: 怎么了，迈德漠斯？
en: What is it, Mydeimos?

ch: …你是对的，迈德漠斯。
en: ...You're right, Mydeimos.

ch: 那时我才发现，自己信奉的一切都脆弱不堪。也许悬锋精神真的存在过…但随着贪欲之花绽放，它早已随我们的荣耀一同凋零了。
en: It was at that moment I realized how everything I believed in was utterly hollow. Perhaps the spirit of Kremnos had once existed... but as greed bloomed in the hearts of humanity over the years, such spirit had long faded alongside our glory.

ch: 那就是你的母亲，迈德漠斯，你的守护者……
en: That of your mother, Mydeimos. Your guardian...

ch: …梦总会结束于此。返回悬锋城的路途也比我预想更久。
en: ...That dream always ends there. The journey back to Castrum Kremnos is proving to be longer than expected.

ch: 光历<unbreak>4931</unbreak>年 平衡月\n「纷争」之泰坦，天谴之矛，尼卡多利陨落。悬锋之王迈德漠斯战胜试炼，新神诞生。
en: Year <unbreak>4931</unbreak> of the Light Calendar, Month of Balance\nNikador — the Strife Titan, Lance of Fury — fell. Mydeimos, king of Kremnos, triumphed over the trial, and the new god was born.

ch: 向翁法罗斯的守护者——致敬——！
en: We salute the Guardian of Amphoreus!

ch: 再见了…悬锋的拯救者。
en: Farewell... Savior of Kremnos.

ch: 愿你战无不胜，悬锋的王。
en: May triumph always be yours, King of Kremnos.

ch: 再见了，迈德漠斯！
en: Farewell, Mydeimos!

ch: 看啊，迈德漠斯回来了！
en: Look, Mydeimos is back!

ch: 迈德漠斯！你刚训练回来吗？
en: Mydeimos! Did you just come back from training?

ch: 欢迎回家…迈德漠斯。
en: Welcome home... Mydeimos.

ch: 你现在可是「翁法罗斯」的守护者。
en: You're now the Guardian of Amphoreus, after all.

ch: …奥赫玛人？你为什么在这里……
en: ...An Okheman? Why are you here...?

ch: 为什么…阿格莱雅没告诉你们吗？我们受命前来协助各位，围猎盗火行者。
en: What...? Didn't Aglaea tell you? We have been instructed to assist you in trapping the Flame Reaver.

ch: 还记得之前万敌说的话，身在战场，就要抛却杂念……
en: But remember what Mydei said before? "Cast aside all distractions once you're on the battlefield"...

ch: 为了悬锋！为了王！
en: For Kremnos! For the king!

ch: ——来吧！为了悬锋，为了吾王……
en: Come, let us fight! For Kremnos! For my king!

ch: …为了翁法罗斯！
en: ...For Amphoreus!

ch: 我用了天空祭司的手段，才让他能再度行走。但倘若有一日，光明从奥赫玛彻底消失…但愿那种事不会发生吧。
en: I had to use the Sky Priests' techniques to help him walk again, but if light ever disappears from Okhema for good... No, let's hope that never happens.

ch: 白厄、遐蝶、万敌、风堇…我和吾师在世间寻觅千年，才终于找到了他们。
en: Phainon, Castorice, Mydei, and Hyacine... Tribbie and I devoted a millennium scouring the world, only to find these few people.

ch: 我是认真的哦！你对翁法罗斯具有特别的意义，这点大家都心知肚明。而{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}……
en: I'm serious! You're special to Amphoreus, and we all know that. Now, about {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}...

ch: 奥赫玛的风中有阳光的味道……
en: We smell sunlight in the wind of Okhema...

ch: 迈德漠斯出发了，去背负属于他的命运。
en: Mydeimos has left the city to face his own fate.

ch: 所以，我想知道——身为翁法罗斯第一位半神，是怎样的勇气让你迈出了这条路上最初的一步。
en: So, what I want to know is — As Amphoreus' first demigod, what compelled you to take the first step on this journey?

ch: 因为翁法罗斯已步入纷争世？
en: Is it because Amphoreus has entered Era Bellica?

ch: 嗯。眼下纷争还远在翁法罗斯的另一边，但五年后的同一个{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}，这座圣殿将成为又一场战火的源头。
en: Yes. Strife remains distant from this part of Amphoreus right now, but in five years' time, at the same {RUBY_B#Dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#}, this temple will become the source of another war.

ch: 听起来挺简单的，也许万敌都能一遍过。
en: Seems pretty straightforward. Even Mydei might be able to complete it in a single try.

ch: 怎么背后说人坏话！
en: How could you talk smack about Mydei behind his back!

ch: 你说得对，但至少得两遍。
en: I agree it's straightforward, but Mydei might need at least two shots at it.

ch: 哎，那家伙…要是他还在，许多问题根本不必弯弯绕绕。
en: Mydei... If he were still here, we'd probably take a lot fewer detours to solve our issues.

ch: 嚯，这书架可真够壮观的，堪比树庭的友爱之馆了。
en: Look at that! This bookshelf is quite a sight, almost on par with the Library of Philia back at the Grove.

ch: 如此，拨开翁法罗斯漆黑的迷雾……
en: And thus, we shall sweep apart Amphoreus' pitch-dark fog...

ch: 她穿越「万径之门」，分裂为千名信使，将创世的神谕传向翁法罗斯大地。
en: She traversed the "Gate of Infinity," splitting into a thousand messengers to spread the divine prophecy across the land of Amphoreus.

ch: 为新世界带来明天的，或许只是几位英雄。但引领大家迈向明天的预言，却属于翁法罗斯的每一个人。
en: It may be that only a few heroes will bring tomorrow to the new world, but the prophecy of leading everyone to tomorrow belongs to all in Amphoreus.

ch: 但我更害怕的是，你会把自己和翁法罗斯绑得太紧…如果真的接过了那位泰坦的神职，你还有机会把它放下么？
en: But what concerns me even more is that you'll further bind yourself to Amphoreus... If you truly assume that Titan's divinity, do you believe you'll be able to lay it down again?

ch: 奥赫玛城里暗流涌动啊。
en: Looks like dark undercurrents are roiling in Okhema.

ch: 黑夜不可能降临在奥赫玛。
en: Nights do not fall upon Okhema.

ch: 可惜，我得代表奥赫玛，请你们放缓脚步了。
en: Unfortunately, on behalf of Okhema, I must ask you to slow your pace.

ch: 现在 奥赫玛
en: Presently, in Okhema

ch: 奥赫玛的祸患…
en: A disaster for Okhema...

ch: 翁法罗斯没有你们的位置！
en: There's no place for you in Amphoreus!

ch: 「永恒之地」翁法罗斯……
en: Amphoreus, The Eternal Land...

ch: 帕姆还不知道这项提议，也得征询列车长的意见。
en: We should consider Pom-Pom's opinion, too. They don't know we're considering Amphoreus as a destination.

ch: 是啊，就算最后不去那儿，燃料问题也得解决。
en: Yeah! Plus, even if we pass Amphoreus over, we've still got a fuel problem to solve.

ch: 考虑到这趟旅程的特殊性，不妨多做些准备。在正式决定前，我也会尝试从列车的盟友那里打听翁法罗斯的消息。
en: Seeing as how this is going to be an unusual adventure, it'd be good for us to take some time out to make preparations for the journey. Meanwhile, I'll see if I can find out more about Amphoreus from our allies before we depart.

ch: 的确还有另一个原因：黑天鹅小姐提到翁法罗斯是个受三重命途影响的世界，而其中一条就是「智识」。
en: Yes, there is something else. Miss Black Swan said Amphoreus is a world influenced by three Paths, and the Erudition is one such Path.

ch: 可惜俱乐部的会员往来甚少，大部分人也已死在寂静领主手上。我从未听说过「翁法罗斯」这个名字。
en: It's a pity we do not communicate much within the society, not to mention we've lost most of our members to the Lord of Silence. I have never heard of Amphoreus, however.

ch: 嗯，但在出发前，我还想尝试联络下黑塔女士。此前请她帮忙调查翁法罗斯，即便没有结果，也不能不打招呼就一走了之。
en: Yeah, but let me try contacting Madam Herta again before we set off. She helped us look into Amphoreus, even though nothing new came up... I should at least let her know we're leaving.

ch: 另外，那位忆者还补了句——相信各位一定会选择「翁法罗斯」。
en: Though she did say that she believes we'll end up deciding on Amphoreus.

ch: 最后，也是最大胆的选项——<color=#dbc291ff>「永恒之地，翁法罗斯」</color>。
en: And finally, the most adventurous option: <color=#dbc291ff>The Eternal Land, Amphoreus</color>.

ch: 果然比起其他选项，翁法罗斯还是多了个非去不可的理由啊……
en: Amphoreus does have something to offer, unlike the other options...

ch: 我的看法也一样。虽说前路未卜，但另外两个站点也谈不上多么安全。既然都要冒险，不如大胆一点。
en: I feel the same. While we know nothing about Amphoreus, we know the other two worlds aren't exactly safe options. Anyway, if it's a risk we're taking, we might as well throw in some adventure for good measure.

ch: ——当然，我的答案也是翁法罗斯。
en: That includes me, too. I'm for Amphoreus.

ch: 那我正式宣布：下一站——翁法罗斯！
en: It's official, then. Our next stop is... Amphoreus!

ch: 那等到了翁法罗斯，咱们一落地就去拍两张吧！
en: Then let's go snap some photos as soon as we arrive in Amphoreus!

ch: 咱也是。这次翁法罗斯之旅，可要留下一张大家都满意的合照！
en: Me too! This time in Amphoreus let's make sure we get a group photo that everyone loves!

ch: 是翁法罗斯。
en: We're going to Amphoreus.

ch: 你来啦。听说各位无名客选择了翁法罗斯，十分明智的决定。
en: Ah, you're here. I hear the Nameless are going to Amphoreus. A very wise decision.

ch: 你为什么要去翁法罗斯？
en: Why do you want to go to Amphoreus?

ch: 打捞湮没无闻的「记忆」是我的职责，而忆庭之镜映照出的翁法罗斯…就像橱窗中的珍宝，闪闪发光，也难以触及。
en: It's my duty to salvage unknown memories, and the Amphoreus that has been revealed by the Garden's mirror is like a treasure inside a display case — dazzling yet out of reach.

ch: 我需要一枚能钉破玻璃的尖钉，也就是各位。只有「开拓」能深入翁法罗斯，穿过层层迷雾，令世界的「记忆」重现天日。
en: I need a sharp nail to break through that glass, and that's where you come in. Only through trailblazing can we reach the heart of Amphoreus, cut through the thick mist, and bring the world's "memories" back to light.

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「永恒之地，翁法罗斯」</color>。
en: <color=#dbc291ff>The Eternal Land, Amphoreus</color>.

ch: 「三重命途交织缠绕着翁法罗斯，共同谱写世界的命运」——按照你的说法，普通的命途行者不会在镜中留下痕迹，所以……
en: "Three Paths interweave and fetter Amphoreus, co-authoring the fate of the world." Ordinary Pathstriders aren't known to leave traces in the mirror, so if what you said is true...

ch: 难怪忆庭的使者能揭开它的面纱啊。那，最后一重呢？
en: I see. Then it makes sense that a messenger of the Garden would be capable of unveiling Amphoreus for us. What about the final Path?

ch: 这条缠绕翁法罗斯的白色光带，也许就是三重命途彼此交织的结果。也只有各位「开拓」的行者能深入漩涡中心，看清它的容貌。
en: This white ribbon of light encircling Amphoreus might very well be a product of the three interwoven Paths. Only when Pathstriders of the Trailblaze enter the center of the vortex will its true nature be revealed.

ch: 我想此刻也是同理。三月小姐受到了某种来自外部的影响，可能是来自命途、星神…或是翁法罗斯本身。
en: I'm guessing this is something similar. Miss March appears to be affected by a certain external stimulus, perhaps a Path, an Aeon, or even... Amphoreus itself.

ch: 不过，在查明原因前，我建议三月七小姐不要贸然接近翁法罗斯。
en: Before we identify the cause, my suggestion is for Miss March to avoid venturing anywhere near Amphoreus.

ch: 咱们遇见的第一个当地人，肯定藏着不得了的大秘密！
en: The first local we met in each of those worlds all harbored their own deep secret! I'm sure it'll be the same on Amphoreus.

ch: 你觉得翁法罗斯会和三月七的过去有关吗？
en: Do you think March 7th's past could be connected to Amphoreus?

ch: 不至于这么巧，我没见到任何和「六相冰」有关的线索。更有可能是翁法罗斯的某种力量率先在她身上显现了。
en: No, that'd be too much of a coincidence. I haven't seen anything related to Six-Phased Ice yet. It's more likely that some kind of energy on Amphoreus affected her before any of us.

ch: 翁法罗斯这一站意义特殊，车上的每位乘客都不可或缺。开荒世界的工作交给年轻人正合适，相信你和丹恒能成为彼此的照应。
en: Amphoreus is a crucial stop, so everyone on the Express has been roped in to help in some way or another. Venturing into the unknown world is a task perfect for you youngsters. I'm sure you'll both have each other's backs.

ch: 翁法罗斯不在星际和平通信的服务范围内，缺乏远程联络的手段。
en: Amphoreus is outside the Interastral Peace Communications' coverage zone, so there's no chance of remote communication when you're there.

ch: 为了给你们最大限度的支援，我们计划将星穹列车的一节车厢分离出去，当作降落舱使用，落地后也能充当安全屋。
en: Uncoupling and using one of the Express's cars as your landing capsule is the best way we can ease your exploration. It can also be your safe house once you're on Amphoreus.

ch: 放心，车厢上有独立的推进器，一定能把你们送进翁法罗斯，找个安全的地点着陆。
en: The car you're getting has its own thrusters, so just buckle up, and It'll take you into Amphoreus and land you somewhere safe.

ch: 翁法罗斯之外，银河中某个熟悉的角落……
en: Outside Amphoreus, in a familiar corner of the Cosmos...

ch: 黑塔女士，<color=#dbc291ff>我们是为「翁法罗斯」而来。</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>We're here because of Amphoreus</color>, Madam Herta.

ch: 但依旧剩下一份天文数字的清单——什么「『翁法罗斯神王队』下一赛季将使用王者巴维鲁取代队徽」——希望能帮上各位的忙吧。
en: There's still an unbelievably long list of generated results. Something about how the Divine Amphoreus team will swap out their current crest emblem for one in King Baviru's likeness in the next season. I hope that can be of some help to you.

ch: 尤其是在亲眼见证后，如果翁法罗斯真的与星神、命途，乃至「智识」密切相关，我们需要天才的智慧。
en: If Amphoreus is indeed inextricably entwined with Aeons, Paths, and even the Erudition, we're going to need the wisdom of a genius to help us. Especially now that we've seen the planet for ourselves.

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>对我们而言十分重要的两位同伴，在进入翁法罗斯后便杳无音讯。</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>We've lost all contact with two indispensable companions since they entered Amphoreus.</color>

ch: 拍摄悬锋斗技场
en: Take a photograph of Kremnos Arena

ch: 得先找个安全的地方当根据地。从四周的建筑，还有这尊雕像来看，翁法罗斯肯定存在文明……
en: Let's find someplace safe to set up a base of operations first. This statue and the buildings we've seen so far point to a civilization here on Amphoreus...

ch: 不像是智库中记载的任何一个物种，这也是理所当然，翁法罗斯对于我们是彻彻底底的「未知」。
en: It's unlike any of the known species in our data bank. But I guess that's to be expected. We know nothing about Amphoreus, after all.

ch: 哪怕是雅利洛-Ⅵ，列车在抵达前也对它的历史和地貌有所了解。但翁法罗斯…黑天鹅口中的几句描述，就是我们对它全部的认知。
en: Back when we were trailblazing into Jarilo-VI, we knew its history and terrain even before arriving on the planet. But with Amphoreus... All we have is whatever little Black Swan told us about the world.

ch: 我是哀丽秘榭的白厄。先前有所冒犯，请接受我的致歉。
en: I'm Phainon from Aedes Elysiae. Sorry if I offended you just now.

ch: 心思也很缜密，对话过程中始终保持着距离。我尝试套取「翁法罗斯」的情报，他俩一唱一和都糊弄过去了。
en: He was also quite cautious, keeping his distance throughout the conversation. I tried probing for more information on Amphoreus, but they both casually glossed over it.

ch: 枪断了固然可惜，却换来了有价值的信息：翁法罗斯的锻兵技术能和造出这柄击云的技艺一较高下。
en: Though losing the spear is unfortunate, we gained some important insight: Amphoreus' weapon-forging skills are on par with the craftsmanship that forged Cloud-Piercer.

ch: 失去信仰，失去一切。你真以为奥赫玛容得下我们？末世将近，身在何处都是朝不保夕！
en: Lose your faith, and you lose everything. Do you seriously think you can seek shelter in Okhema? Nowhere is safe with the end times looming!

ch: 前些天，我又目睹同伴死在那些怪物手下，实在崩溃了…就向奥赫玛做出祈祷。本以为回应没这么快，时间足够我说服诺杜斯先生，没想到各位来得如此迅速……
en: A few days ago, I watched another companion fall to those monsters, and I was shattered... I offered a prayer to Okhema, thinking the answer would take time, at least enough for me to convince Mr. Noldus. I didn't expect your arrival to be so swift...

ch: 那位老人刚才提到了「末世」，还说翁法罗斯哪里都不安全。请问这是……
en: The elder spoke of the "end times" just now and claimed that no place in Amphoreus is safe. What did he mean by that...?

ch: 诺杜斯先生，维尔图斯说的没错呀，你们在这儿可危险了，还是跟*我们*一起回奥赫玛吧。
en: Mr. Noldus, Virtus was right. It's too dangerous for all of you to be here. Please come back to Okhema with us.

ch: 但*我们*以万径之门，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的名义向你起誓，只要黄金裔一日尚存，奥赫玛就会保护每一位泰坦的子民，*我们*不分彼此。
en: But we swear to you in the name of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus,{RUBY_E#} the Gate of Infinity that so long as the Chrysos Heirs live, Okhema will protect all followers of the Titans. We are one and the same.

ch: 也许各位真能从末日手中解救翁法罗斯。就像今日，四位英雄拯救了我们的生命和信仰。
en: Perhaps you really can save Amphoreus from its doom, just like how the four of you heroes saved our very lives and faith today.

ch: 也是如今唯一的人类城邦，<color=#dbc291ff>「圣城」奥赫玛</color>存在的意义。
en: It's also the reason for the <color=#dbc291ff>holy city Okhema</color>'s existence — the only human city left in our present day.

ch: 哎呀，别把气氛弄得这么沉重嘛。总之，{RUBY_B#奥赫玛}圣城{RUBY_E#}是绝对安全的，到那里就没事啦。
en: Hey now, don't be so serious. You're bringing the mood down. Anyway, in short, {RUBY_B#Okhema}the holy city{RUBY_E#} is absolutely safe. Everything will be fine once we get there.

ch: 大伙儿都坐稳了吗？那我们就出发吧——目的地，奥赫玛！
en: Is everyone properly seated? Then we're off! Next stop: Okhema!

ch: 希望奥赫玛是个安全的地方。
en: Hopefully, Okhema is a safe place.

ch: 求求你们，救救奥赫玛吧，疯王{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}回来了，看哪，混乱、纷争，到处都是……
en: Please, I beg of you! Save Okhema! The mad king {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} has returned! Look! There's strife and conflict everywhere...

ch: 感激不尽。幸亏奥赫玛也不是毫无准备，神谕早已警示我们。这是天灾，但并非死劫。
en: You have my gratitude. Thankfully, Okhema is not completely unprepared. The prophecy had warned us about this. This is a catastrophe, but it's not the end.

ch: 不必惊慌，奥赫玛也不是毫无准备，神谕早已警示我们。这是天灾，但并非死劫。
en: There's no need to panic. Okhema is not completely unprepared. The prophecy had warned us about this. This is a catastrophe, but it's not the end.

ch: …翁法罗斯的惊喜越来越多了。
en: ...The surprises never cease in Amphoreus.

ch: 放心吧！有我们在呢，只要用「百界门」，啪的一下就能把大伙儿送去翁法罗斯最安全的地方——
en: Don't worry! With us here, we can just use the Century Gate to whoosh the people to the safest place in Amphoreus—

ch: 那不就是奥赫玛吗？
en: Wouldn't that be Okhema?

ch: 放心吧，虽然有些孩童心性，但缇宝老师在黄金裔中也称得上资历深厚，更是奥赫玛的支柱之一。她们值得信赖。
en: Don't worry. Although they are a little childish, the trio are experienced Chrysos Heirs and one of the pillars of Okhema. Therefore, they can definitely be trusted.

ch: 至于你，万敌…如果我没记错，你的责任应当是保护市民吧？
en: As for you, Mydei... If I'm not mistaken, shouldn't your responsibility be protecting the citizens?

ch: {RUBY_B#缇宁，缇宝，缇安}雅努斯的三位祭司{RUBY_E#}，同面同心，耳目相连。你们的一举一动早已暴露在奥赫玛人的视线下。
en: {RUBY_B#Trinnon, Tribbie, Trianne}The three priests of Janus{RUBY_E#} share the same appearance and mind, and their senses are also interlinked. The Okhemans have long been aware of your presence and what you have been doing.

ch: 自打相识起，我就告诉过你们，无论过往抑或未来，悬锋人都不可能同意与你们握手言和……
en: From the moment we first met, I already told you that regardless of whether it's in the past or in the future, the people of Kremnos will never agree to make peace with the likes of you...

ch: ——我，万敌，身为悬锋的继业者，无法在这种问题上独断专行。况且到了这份上，我更有必要提醒各位*贵客*，你们的东道主可谈不上精于待客之道。
en: As the successor of Kremnos, I, Mydei, am not able to act independently on such matters. Furthermore, things have escalated to a point where I must warn you, esteemed guests, that your host is anything but proficient in the ways of hospitality.

ch: 别和万敌较真，因为他真的不开玩笑。
en: Avoid getting too serious with Mydei, because he means every word he says.

ch: 好在无人伤亡。希望万敌只是嘴上说说，他是无可挑剔的战士，但如果铁了心要我行我素…恐怕没人能阻止他，就算是我。
en: Thankfully, no one was hurt. I hope that Mydei doesn't act on his words. After all, he's an exemplary fighter, if he's dead set on doing things his way... I fear not a soul could prevent it, not even myself.

ch: 欢迎来到奥赫玛。
en: Welcome to Okhema.

ch: 但今天，白厄阁下…奥赫玛需要你。
en: But today, Lord Phainon... Okhema needs you.

ch: 奥赫玛，黄金裔，一群懦夫。忠诚和荣耀，铸就我们。欺瞒和软弱，捏成你们。
en: Okhema, Chrysos Heirs — what cowards. We live by loyalty and glory, while you live by weakness and deceit.

ch: 出发吧。在{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}尚未沉默的年代，无人能当它的敌手。而今，将由我等接过神明的职责，庇佑翁法罗斯众生——
en: Let's get going. In the era when {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} had not yet fallen silent, none could stand as their equal. Today, we inherit the duty of the gods, safeguarding the inhabitants of Amphoreus.

ch: 奥赫玛的两位新盟友，欢迎来到翁法罗斯。
en: New allies of Okhema, welcome to Amphoreus.

ch: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}堕入疯狂后，它的堡垒便消失在了迷雾中，无人知晓其所在。但如今，它一反常态，主动向奥赫玛发起攻势……
en: After {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} succumbed to madness, their fortress disappeared into the fog, with no one being able to ascertain its location anymore. However, now that they have acted out of character and attacked Okhema of their own accord...

ch: 我答应过他们，在时局安定后，要为我们的盟友解答翁法罗斯的一切。
en: I gave my word that after the situation stabilized, I would reveal all about Amphoreus to our allies.

ch: 但奥赫玛刚刚脱离一场劫难，还有许多惊魂未定的民众需要安抚。阿格莱雅，能请你代劳吗？
en: However, given that Okhema has just barely survived a calamity, and there are still many shaken citizens who need comfort... Aglaea, would you mind taking care of this in my stead?

ch: 胜利属于奥赫玛！
en: Victory belongs to Okhema!

ch: 奥赫玛永世唾弃你！
en: Okhema shall forever despise you!

ch: 住口，万敌！你想让圣城毁于一旦吗？
en: Enough, Mydei. Are you trying to destroy the holy city?

ch: 预言中的英雄会扫清命运的阴影，刻法勒的光辉会永远庇护奥赫玛……
en: The hero from the prophecy will sweep away the shadows of fate, and Kephale's light will always protect Okhema...

ch: 我向你保证，这不会带来任何负面的后果——请把它当作一种旅程的仪式。
en: I can assure you that this will not bring any repercussions to Okhema. Think of it as a ceremony when traveling to someplace new.

ch: 这样翁法罗斯也有「界域定锚」了——「开拓」的又一大步。
en: With this Space Anchor on Amphoreus, we've taken yet another giant step on the Path of Trailblaze.

ch: 两位初来乍到，想必对人们口中的泰坦、黄金裔、神谕都满心疑虑。在回答具体的问题前，我想先向二位展现翁法罗斯的历史。
en: Both of you are new here, so it's only natural to be confused about the prophecy, Titans, and Chrysos Heirs that have been mentioned in passing. But I'd like you to learn about Amphoreus' history before I tell you more.

ch: 灵水会为你诠释，<color=#dbc291ff>翁法罗斯的前世今生。</color>
en: The spirit water shall show you <color=#dbc291ff>Amphoreus' distant and recent past</color>.

ch: 「起初，翁法罗斯是一团混沌！」
en: "Amphoreus started off as a ball of chaos!"

ch: 「一道神谕出现了！它突然降临在翁法罗斯——」
en: "A prophecy appeared on Amphoreus! Something no one saw coming!"

ch: 「所以，大家明白了嘛？一定要吃饱喝好、坚持锻炼，这样长大后才有可能成为大英雄，为翁法罗斯献出自己的力量——」
en: "So, here's the takeaway: Eat well and train well, so you can grow up into a powerful hero and do your part for Amphoreus!"

ch: 翁法罗斯面临的困境不小啊。
en: Amphoreus seems to be going through a rough patch.

ch: 看来在奥赫玛，英雄和平民的地位并不对等。
en: Seems like prophesied heroes and civilians aren't treated equally in Okhema.

ch: 就是这样，很不错。补上迟来的自我介绍吧，我是「金织」阿格莱雅，奥赫玛的改衣师，翁法罗斯的「黄金裔」之一。承蒙同袍信任，我暂时主持着黄金裔的行动。
en: Yes, you're doing great. Alright, it's about time I formally introduce myself: I am Aglaea the Goldweaver, dressmaster of Okhema and one of the Chrysos Heirs of Amphoreus. The trust placed in me is how I came to lead the Chrysos Heirs in our mission today.

ch: 感觉到了吗？金线起了波痕。它告诉我，你对奥赫玛的真诚尚存一丝怀疑，我必须消除这份顾虑。
en: Did you feel that? The golden threads are rippling. They reveal the distrust you still have for Okhema, and I take it upon myself to dispel these concerns.

ch: 而今，黑潮席卷全世，大地沉入永夜，唯有奥赫玛在{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的庇佑下，保有最后一丝光明。
en: Amphoreus has since fallen into eternal night, the black tide engulfing our world. Okhema is now the only city to still receive light, and we owe it to {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s protection.

ch: 集结于此的黄金裔是世人唯一的希望。人们奉我们为英雄、守护者、救世主……
en: The Chrysos Heirs gathered here are Amphoreus' only hope. People hail us as heroes, as protectors, and as deliverers...

ch: 这便是翁法罗斯的逐火之旅——「<color=#dbc291ff>一众英雄踏上弑神的旅途，摘得十二枚火种，实现再创世的伟业。</color>」
en: This is Amphoreus' Flame-Chase Journey — "<color=#dbc291ff>a band of heroes dedicated to slaying the gods and reclaiming the twelve Coreflames for the world to start over anew.</color>"

ch: 我们身陷末世，还需指引万千民众行向山顶。奥赫玛亟需更多盟友，成为我们坚实的助力。
en: With the end times before us, we are expected to lead all of our people toward the summit. Okhema needs as many allies as possible, to aid us in the upcoming battles.

ch: 可能我将希望放错了地方。但为了翁法罗斯，我愿意一试。
en: If I'm putting my hopes in the wrong place, so be it. But for Amphoreus, I am willing to take the chance.

ch: 或许是我有些心急…为了翁法罗斯，我愿意一试。
en: I may be getting ahead of myself, but for Amphoreus, I am willing to take a chance on you.

ch: 请答应我：无论如何，<color=#dbc291ff>不要向市民透露「天外之界」的存在</color>。
en: Promise me to <color=#dbc291ff>never tell the people of Okhema about the worlds beyond the sky</color>, no matter what may happen.

ch: 但在翁法罗斯，天空更像是…一座监牢，就连谈论天外都成了一种禁忌。明明有着如此先进的技术……
en: The sky above Amphoreus, though, is more like... a prison. They clearly have advanced technology, so who could imagine that even discussing what's beyond the sky would be taboo?

ch: 还记得那团遮蔽世界的混沌物质吗？我总有种预感，翁法罗斯是被人为封锁的。神话中的那些泰坦，也可能和某位星神有所关联。
en: Do you remember the mass of chaotic matter concealing Amphoreus from the rest of the universe? I can't help thinking that someone is intentionally keeping Amphoreus hidden. Their Titans could also be related to some Aeon.

ch: 咦，你是说刚到奥赫玛那会儿吗？这么一说，*我们*当时也觉得有点奇怪。
en: Eh? When we all arrived in Okhema? Come to think of it, we felt something a bit odd, too.

ch: 咦，你怎么也念上啦？说起来，刚到奥赫玛那会儿，你是不是也这么做了？
en: Eh? You can recite this, too? Wait, did you also chant this when we arrived in Okhema?

ch: 翁法罗斯也有新闻学？
en: They also teach journalism here in Amphoreus?

ch: 认真地讲，*我们*都觉得两位降临在…咳咳，来到奥赫玛绝非偶然。上手就能和{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}共鸣的祭司，缇宝老师也是第一次见。
en: You know, we are pretty certain there's more to your sudden... arrival to Okhema. And Tribbie has never seen a priest achieve resonance with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} on their first try.

ch: 学会了它，你们在翁法罗斯就能畅行无阻啦。嗯，基本上吧。
en: But with this, you should be able to clear any obstacle when traveling around Amphoreus... Um, most of the time, at least.

ch: 啊对了，差点忘记正事…*我们*来找两位，是想确认你们有没有<color=#dbc291ff>传信石版</color>。没了它，在奥赫玛可是寸步难行。
en: Oh, right... We came by to check if you have teleslates with you. It'll be a lot easier to get around Okhema with them.

ch: 就是它！果然，天外…两位的城邦也有雅努萨波利斯的祭司嘛！
en: Yeah! We knew it, there are also Janusopolis priests beyond the sk — um, beyond Okhema... like the city you're from!

ch: 大功告成！以后*我们*就能通过石版联络对方啦。不过仅限于奥赫玛城中哦，离开了阿雅编织的金线，传信就不起效果了。
en: All set! Now we can contact one another with our teleslates. Only in Okhema though. Messages won't send once you're outside Agy's web of golden threads.

ch: 我们初来奥赫玛，希望能留下些纪念，所以来到视野宽阔的地方…嗯，制作…不对，捕捉？总之，想留住这片风景。
en: It's our first time in Okhema, so we thought we'd find a nice vantage point to... uh, create...? No, capture...? I mean, to remember this city and its sights by.

ch: ——奥赫玛欢迎你们。
en: Okhema welcomes you.

ch: 毕竟「塔拉萨波利斯」只是我临场编造的，如果他真是探险家，又对翁法罗斯的地理了如指掌，恐怕我们早就被看穿了。
en: After all, Thalassopolis was something I came up with on the fly. If he's truly an explorer familiar with the geography of Amphoreus, I'm afraid that he'll have already seen through our lies.

ch: 所幸没留下什么证据。不过…就算星空在翁法罗斯是一种禁忌，果然还是会有人对它报以憧憬。
en: Fortunately, there's no evidence. But... seems like even though the starry sky is taboo on Amphoreus, there are people who still yearn for it.

ch: 造出这柄枪的人也是位赫赫有名的工匠吧，天外有天，我完全无法想象一个翁法罗斯之外的世界。
en: The one who crafted this spear must also be a renowned master. I guess there's always someone greater out there. Although I still can't imagine a world outside Amphoreus.

ch: 壁画以简约而细腻的雕工记载了{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}创生、奥赫玛建城的故事。
en: The murals record in simple and delicate carvings the stories of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} creating life and building Okhema.

ch: 在它的脚下，沐浴金血的人类们合力修建起一座宏伟的城邦。这就是奥赫玛，翁法罗斯文明的发源地。
en: At their feet, the humans bathed in the golden blood work together to create a great city. This city is Okhema, the origin of Amphoreus civilization.

ch: 奥赫玛唷！{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}全世之座{RUBY_E#}足下，金血溯流之始。
en: Okhema! Standing at the foot of the {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Throne of Worlds{RUBY_E#}, your golden blood can be traced back to the very beginning.

ch: 我们是异邦来的战士，此前参与了奥赫玛保卫战。
en: We're warriors from a foreign land who assisted in the defense of Okhema.

ch: 请两位拿出石版，我来教你们连入奥赫玛的<color=#dbc291ff>万帷网</color>。
en: Please take out your teleslate. I'll help you connect to Okhema's <color=#dbc291ff>World Wound Web</color>.

ch: 想用匹诺康尼的剑斩翁法罗斯的官？哈，你想多了。
en: You think you can use a Penaconian key to open an Amphorean lock? Ha, that's wishful thinking!

ch: 下次再见到这些「若虫」，就把它们收集起来吧…说不定能借助它们进一步了解翁法罗斯。
en: We should catch these nymphs the next time we encounter them... Perhaps they can help us better understand Amphoreus.

ch: 这不是奥赫玛的新朋友，两位远道而来的勇士吗？幸会幸会，吼吼吼！
en: Aren't you Okhema's two new friends? The brave warriors from a faraway place? It's an honor to meet you, roarrr!

ch: 没人告诉你们吗？本狮可是奥赫玛的千里眼、顺风耳，街头巷尾流传之事，全都逃不过本狮的视听。
en: Didn't anyone tell you? I'm the far-seeing eye and all-hearing ear of Okhema. I see and hear every single thing that happens in the streets and alleys of this place.

ch: 哦、哦吼、吼吼！这不、这不是万敌阁下嘛！您、您最近可还好啊？
en: O—Oh, roarrr! Isn't this Lord Mydei! H—How have you been lately?

ch: 翁法罗斯的地貌十分壮丽，这里过去一定是个如仙境般美丽的世界。
en: The landscape of Amphoreus is breathtaking. In the past, this place must have been a beautiful paradise.

ch: 即便是「神」也要遵循世界的底层规则，我还在尝试理解翁法罗斯的。
en: Even gods have to obey the underlying laws of the world. I'm still trying to understand Amphoreus's laws.

ch: 万事万物都要遵循世界的底层规则，我还在尝试理解翁法罗斯的。
en: All things have to obey the underlying laws of the world. I'm still trying to understand Amphoreus's laws.

ch: 还没呢，但*我们*摸清了那些逃兵的去向。要不了多久，就能追踪到<color=#dbc291ff>悬锋城</color>的方位了。
en: Not yet. But we've already figured out where the deserters are headed to. With a little more time, we'll be able to track down the location of Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 悬锋城…是哪？
en: Castrum Kremnos... Where is that?

ch: 是万敌提到过的地名。
en: Mydei has mentioned this place before.

ch: 悬锋城是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的领地，也是它如今的居所，一座隐于迷雾的移动城邦。
en: Castrum Kremnos, both {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} territory and their current abode, is a moving city-state enveloped in fog.
