ch: 你倚在阳台的石栏边眺望远方，翁法罗斯层叠的山峦被雾气遮蔽，轮廓若隐若现，如同一组在缓慢匍匐与站立之间转变姿态的石之巨人。
en: You lean against the stone railing of the balcony, gazing into the distance. The mist-shrouded mountains of Amphoreus appear as vague outlines, like stone giants slowly shifting between crouching and standing.

ch: 翁法罗斯的历史，还有「圣城」奥赫玛，你们已有所见闻。而现在…对于黄金裔的旅途，我想带两位亲眼见证。
en: You have learned, to some extent, about the history of Amphoreus and of the holy city Okhema. Now... I wish for both of you to witness the journey of the Chrysos Heirs for yourselves.

ch: 粉霞天女，奥赫玛的明光……
en: Rosy Celestial Maiden, Okhema's light...

ch: 缇宝再次开启「百界门」，与白厄、丹恒一同驰援悬锋城。
en: Tribbie opens the Century Gate once more, rushing to the rescue of Castrum Kremnos with Phainon and Dan Heng.

ch: 你们三人赶赴悬锋城，来到斗技场的中央
en: The three of you rush into Castrum Kremnos and arrive at the arena

ch: 此地名为云石天宫，是奥赫玛的公共浴场。换作平时，气氛会更熙攘些。
en: We're here at Marmoreal Palace, Okhema's public baths. Normally, this place would be much livelier.

ch: 回头看看吧，从这里望去，可以看见整座奥赫玛。
en: Turn around and look. We can see the entire city of Okhema from here.

ch: 边疆的英雄来到奥赫玛，在此建立起丰功伟业……
en: Frontier heroes grace Okhema, feats abound right here...

ch: 若要留在奥赫玛，两位自然需要一处落脚之地。
en: If you are to stay in Okhema, you'll need a place to rest.

ch: 翁法罗斯从不缺少向往天外的人。曾有一邦僭主穷尽举国之力修建「天舟」，意欲突破苍穹、企及星空……
en: There have always been people in Amphoreus who looked beyond the skies. Indeed, there used to be a tyrant nation that spared no expense in constructing "skyships," with the desire to break through the blue sky and reach the stars...

ch: 翁法罗斯并非不愿行向群星，只是妄图触犯天穹者，无不触怒神明，令生灵的大地燃烧，凡人的国度殒灭，{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}「晨昏之眼」{RUBY_E#}只是其中一例。
en: It's not that Amphoreus is unwilling to head toward the stars. Yet, anyone who even thinks about breaching the firmament would undoubtedly infuriate the gods, causing this land of the living to burn and an entire nation of mortals to perish. The {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Eye of Twilight{RUBY_E#} is only one example of this.

ch: 我们对翁法罗斯没有恶意…
en: We mean no harm toward Amphoreus...

ch: 神罚没有公正可言，而我身为奥赫玛的守护者，同样身不由己。
en: Divine punishment has never been fair. As Okhema's guardian, I must do the same.

ch: 异乡人——<color=#dbc291ff>你们为何来到翁法罗斯？</color>
en: Outlanders, <color=#dbc291ff>why have you come to Amphoreus?</color>

ch: 异乡人——<color=#dbc291ff>你们因何对奥赫玛伸出援手？</color>
en: Outlanders, <color=#dbc291ff>why did you lend your aid to Okhema?</color>

ch: 我后悔了，压根就不该出手！
en: I regret what we did. We shouldn't have aided Okhema at all!

ch: 异乡人——<color=#dbc291ff>倘若形势剧变，你是否可能将刀尖对准奥赫玛，还有它的公民？</color>
en: Outlanders, <color=#dbc291ff>if the current situation changed dramatically, could you eventually point your blades at Okhema and its citizens?</color>

ch: 二位也许是降临在翁法罗斯的一道希望。但在一切得到证明前…你们不能变成翁法罗斯的一道威胁。
en: You may be a ray of hope that fell onto Amphoreus. However, until all has been proven, you cannot be allowed to pose a threat to Amphoreus.

ch: 如果不能赢得诸位——不，如果无法赢得你的信任，阿格莱雅女士——我们会自觉离开。翁法罗斯并不是无名客唯一的选择。
en: If we cannot gain people's — no, if we cannot gain your trust, Lady Aglaea — we'll depart. Amphoreus isn't the only option for the Nameless.

ch: 眼下奥赫玛正需要援手，我不想就这样失去两位盟友。
en: At present, Okhema is desperate for aid, and I am loath to lose two allies just like that.

ch: 二位可能是降临在翁法罗斯的一道希望，但也可能…是翁法罗斯的一道威胁。我别无选择，只能为你们关上命运的门扉。
en: While you may be a ray of hope that fell onto Amphoreus, you may also be... a threat to Amphoreus. You leave me no choice but to shut the doors of your fates.

ch: 重生之我在翁法罗斯？
en: I've been reborn on Amphoreus?

ch: 你们来到翁法罗斯才多久？无情如{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}，也不会这么仓促结束一段旅程吧？
en: You've been on Amphoreus for such a short time. Even someone as ruthless as {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} wouldn't end a journey so hurriedly.

ch: 眼下奥赫玛正需要援手，我不想就这样失去两位盟友。
en: At present, Okhema is desperate for aid, and I am loath to lose two allies just like that.

ch: 阿格莱雅她…为了奥赫玛，她的心早就结成了冰。
en: Aglaea... She has long sealed her heart in ice, for Okhema's sake.

ch: 啊…又多了一件需要解释的事。别担心，翁法罗斯最深的秘密都藏在这儿了。
en: Ah... one more thing to explain. Let's not worry about that for now. You'll soon find out that Amphoreus' deepest secrets are all hidden here.

ch: 十二张虚位的图腾，对应翁法罗斯的十二尊泰坦。而每一座被点亮的星宿，都代表一颗被人类归于原位的火种。
en: The twelve vacant signs symbolize the twelve Titans of Amphoreus, while each illuminated constellation represents one Coreflame that mankind has restored to its rightful place.

ch: 黄金裔、半神…神谕中书写的，真的是翁法罗斯唯一的命运吗？
en: Chrysos Heirs, demigods... Is what's written in the prophecy truly Amphoreus' only possible fate?

ch: 勇气和决心都已具备，只等缇安老师找到悬锋城的所在，我们就踏上征程。
en: Armed with courage and unwavering resolve, our quest will begin as soon as Trianne locates Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 前路艰险，我不会强迫你们。但如果二位决定留下，我——哀丽秘榭的白厄，定会努力修补你们和黄金裔之间的嫌隙，不遗余力。
en: The path ahead is bound to be perilous, and I won't impose my will upon you. Yet, if you choose to stay, I, Phainon from Aedes Elysiae, will spare no effort to bridge the gap between you and the Chrysos Heirs.

ch: 留在翁法罗斯。
en: Stay on Amphoreus.

ch: 太好了，你们果真是翁法罗斯的希望。
en: That's wonderful to hear. You truly are the hope of Amphoreus.

ch: 请一定要在浴宫中好好休息。等两位蓄满精力，相信缇安老师也带着悬锋城的消息归来了。
en: Be sure to rest well in the bath chamber. I trust that Trianne will have returned with news about Castrum Kremnos by the time the two of you are fully recharged.

ch: 离开翁法罗斯。
en: Leave Amphoreus.

ch: 太好了，你们果真是翁法罗斯的希望。
en: That's wonderful to hear. You truly are the hope of Amphoreus.

ch: 请一定要在浴宫中好好休息。等两位蓄满精力，相信缇安老师也带着悬锋城的消息归来了。
en: Be sure to rest well in the bath chamber. I trust that Trianne will have returned with news about Castrum Kremnos by the time the two of you are fully recharged.

ch: …我明白了。回头想想，两位一直出于无私和善意帮助奥赫玛，我们却总是以怀疑和胁迫回应，的确不公平。
en: ...I understand. Now that I think back on it, you both have selflessly helped Okhema, while we have met your good will with doubt and intimidation. It's indeed not fair.

ch: 在一名长成智械模样的奥赫玛公民的协助下，你们驶离了翁法罗斯，没有遭受那所谓「天外诅咒」的谴罚。
en: With the assistance of an Okhema citizen resembling an Intellitron, you depart Amphoreus without suffering the so-called "curse from beyond the sky."

ch: 至于「永恒之地」翁法罗斯的命运，以及它终将为银河带来的剧变…至少在你的有生之年内，这一切都与你无关了。
en: As for the fate of Amphoreus, the Eternal Land, and the dramatic changes it will bring to the Cosmos... It has nothing to do with you, at least in your lifetime.

ch: 你我终有一日要退出这舞台，翁法罗斯的命运将被移交至他人之手…<color=#dbc291ff>那是你看到的未来，不是吗？</color>
en: You and I will eventually step off the stage and leave Amphoreus' fate in the hands of others... <color=#dbc291ff>That's the future you foresee, isn't it?</color>

ch: 你睡着的时候，我思考了一些问题，眼下最麻烦的，果然还是翁法罗斯人对天外世界的态度。短期内，我们恐怕没办法联络上列车了。
en: While you were asleep, I did some thinking. I believe the most pressing concern is still how the people of Amphoreus view what's beyond the sky. Unfortunately, contacting the Express might not be feasible for a while.

ch: 如果我们尝试飞出翁法罗斯…
en: If we try to fly out of Amphoreus...

ch: 是的。最坏情况下，翁法罗斯的入口是道单向门，只能进不能出。
en: Yes. In the worst case, the entrance to Amphoreus is a one-way door, letting people in but not out.

ch: 说不定两者兼有呢。万敌，你也该多交几个朋友了。
en: Maybe both. You should really make more friends, Mydei.

ch: 缇安捎回了信息：多年以来，我们首次驱散了包围悬锋城的迷雾，确定了它的位置。
en: Trianne has returned with news: For the first time in many years, we have dispersed the fog around Castrum Kremnos and verified its location.

ch: {NICKNAME}擅长使用多种武器，那把炎枪不止一次化解了敌人的攻势。而我和万敌都更擅长进攻，如果仅从作战角度考虑……
en: {NICKNAME} excels in wielding a range of weapons, and {M#his}{F#her} flaming lance has quelled the enemy's advances multiple times. Mydei and I are both better at offense, so from a tactical standpoint...

ch: …悬锋城是你的故乡，迈德漠斯，你的族人曾是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的子民——但你选择了依归奥赫玛，为神谕奉献己身。
en: Mydeimos, Castrum Kremnos was your home. Your people were once {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} followers, yet you've chosen to turn to Okhema and dedicate yourself to the prophecy.

ch: 我——奥赫玛的阿格莱雅，黄金裔，承载{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}神权的半神——对你们即将践行的道路施以祝福。
en: I — Aglaea from Okhema, Chrysos Heir and the demigod who bears {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}'s divine authority — hereby bless your journey ahead.

ch: 缇安会为你们打开通往悬锋城的大门。愿金色的丝线指引你们的征途，亦愿它能带你们找到归家的路。
en: Trianne will open the gate that will lead you to Castrum Kremnos. May the golden thread guide you on your journey and bring you safely home.

ch: 走哇，走哇~风风…旋风…悬锋城！
en: Blow, wind, blow~! All the way to Castrum Kremnos!

ch: 别看缇安老师贪玩，她可是翁法罗斯技艺最精湛的门匠，创造出的「百界门」万无一失。
en: It's true Trianne is very playful, but she's the best gatekeeper in Amphoreus. Her Century Gate never fails.

ch: 这可不像你啊？万敌的万，难道不是「以一敌万」的万吗？
en: That's not like you at all, Mydei. Don't tell me you're scared?

ch: 我打算多花些时间留在这，向缇宝女士讨教翁法罗斯的知识。你负责行动，我负责研究，我们各司其职。
en: I plan to stay here for a while and learn more about Amphoreus from Lady Tribbie. You'll handle the action, and I'll deal with the research. We each have a role to play.

ch: 神意使然，你终究还是站在了奥赫玛这边。
en: It is by the will of the gods that you stood on Okhema's side in the end.

ch: 你是白厄与万敌的同伴，只要他们愿意向你托付生死，我的信任并不重要。
en: You are Phainon and Mydei's companion. So long as they're willing to entrust you with their lives, my trust in you doesn't matter.

ch: 去吧，和两位黄金裔一起。奥赫玛需要一位真正的战神。疯狂的{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，他的统治该被终结了。
en: Go. Stand with the two Chrysos Heirs. Okhema has need of a true god of war. It's time for the mad god {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} reign to end.

ch: 迈德漠斯
en: Mydeimos

ch: 万敌
en: Mydei

ch: 「永恒之地」翁法罗斯
en: Amphoreus, The Eternal Land

ch: 这里就是「悬锋城」。
en: This is Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 要是悬锋城还留有昔日兵力，哪怕只剩半成，阿格莱雅也是在让我们送死。
en: If even half of Castrum Kremnos' old might remains, it would mean that Aglaea sent us to our deaths.

ch: 是啊，悬锋城曾是每一位战士的向往之地。
en: Yeah, Kremnos used to be the place every warrior longed for.

ch: …万敌，你会觉得可惜吗？自己没有活在那个强者如云的年代。若非往日的英雄一一凋零，我也不会是你唯一的对手。
en: Kind of a shame you didn't live in that era full of strong warriors, eh Mydei? If all the heroes of the past hadn't fallen one after another, I wouldn't be the only worthy opponent you have left.

ch: 走吧，夺回「纷争」的火种，或是死在它的悬锋下——
en: Let's go. We'll take back the Coreflame of Strife or die in Kremnos.

ch: 为了翁法罗斯，缇安老师也付出了很多代价。
en: Trianne has sacrificed a lot for Amphoreus.

ch: 说起来，你不打算给{NICKNAME}讲讲悬锋城的事吗？不担心我给{F#她}{M#他}灌输些你最痛恨的野史？
en: By the way, aren't you going to tell {NICKNAME} any stories about Castrum Kremnos? Aren't you worried I'll tell {M#him}{F#her} all the historical myths you despise?

ch: 悬锋城自古便是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的领地，是信众围绕泰坦建立的军事要塞，也是一座巨大的移动堡垒。
en: Castrum Kremnos has been {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s territory since ancient times. It's a massive moving fortress that surrounds the Titan, built by their followers.

ch: 在{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}尚未堕落的年代，悬锋城会随它一同出征，以战养战，是纪律严明、极端尚武的城邦。
en: In the age before the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#} fell from grace, Castrum Kremnos would follow the Lance into battle after battle. It's a city that enforces strict discipline and reveres military might.

ch: 看来阻碍我们的不止有敌人。这桥年久失修，悬锋城的工艺也有不可靠的时候？
en: It seems enemies aren't the only things stopping us. This bridge has fallen into disrepair. I suppose even Kremnoan craftsmanship can be unreliable sometimes.

ch: 有点夸张了吧？悬锋城在黄金战争中的失利，我一下能记起来的就有三场。
en: I think you're exaggerating a little. I can think of at least three losses suffered by Castrum Kremnos in the Chrysos War, just off the top of my head.

ch: 猜猜我在想什么，万敌？
en: Guess what I'm thinking, Mydei?

ch: 让我见识见识悬锋城最盛大的搏杀竞技项目，也给眼前这场征伐多镀上一层荣耀的金边。<color=#dbc291ff>看看谁能干掉更多发疯的眷属</color>——如何？
en: Show me what the grandest fighting competition in Castrum Kremnos was like. Let's gild this expedition with another layer of glory and <color=#dbc291ff>compete to see who can kill the most crazed Titankin</color>. How about it?

ch: 我了解他，这家伙只爱单打独斗。这前面有两条通路，{NICKNAME}就跟我走一边。
en: I know Mydei. He prefers to fight alone. There are two paths ahead. {NICKNAME} and I will take the same one.

ch: 你和白厄合力打倒了4个泰坦眷属，并从它们身上收集了悬锋徽记……
en: You and Phainon defeated 4 Titankins together, and you collected Kremnos crests from their bodies...

ch: 别担心，万敌很强，我也一样。
en: Don't worry. Mydei is strong, and so am I.

ch: 毕竟对万敌而言，族人和荣誉大于一切。就算破败成这样，能让他自由自在的地方，也只有悬锋城一处了。
en: Nothing is more important to Mydei than his people and glory. The city may be in ruins, but... Kremnos is still the only place where he can be free.

ch: 区区闪电，也想拦住悬锋城的战士？
en: Mere lightning won't stop a warrior of Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 积了一大层灰，应该很久没人动过了。大概是万敌的族人在离开时留下的吧？
en: There's a thick layer of dust. Guess no one's been here for a long time. They must have been left behind by Mydei's people when they departed.

ch: 你在奥赫玛一定见过，但只靠双眼很难辨别。
en: You've likely seen them in Okhema, but it's hard to tell just by appearance.

ch: 我也看不懂上面的符文，大概写的是悬锋城的古语。
en: I can't read the runes either. It must be written in an ancient language of Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 别怕，隔壁不还有一位专家么？等和万敌合流了，让他看看吧。
en: Don't worry. We have an expert next door. We can show it to Mydei when we group back up.

ch: 但说起这个…我一直很奇怪，你明明来自天外，为什么能理解翁法罗斯的文字和语言？
en: Though that does remind me: I've been wondering how you can understand the language and writing we use in Amphoreus when you're from beyond the sky.

ch: 也许翁法罗斯没那么封闭。
en: Maybe Amphoreus isn't that isolated after all.

ch: 难道翁法罗斯和天外之界的交集远比人们想象更多？但史料里完全没有这部分记载啊。
en: Did Amphoreus have more dealings with worlds beyond the sky than we thought? But nothing like this was ever recorded in our historical materials.

ch: 不是你的问题。悬锋城毕竟是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的领地，恶劣的环境会阻隔你和{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的共鸣。
en: It's not your fault. Castrum Kremnos is {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} territory, after all. The environment is cutting off your ability to resonate with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.

ch: 当然不是。悬锋城毕竟是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的领地，恶劣的环境会阻隔你和{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的共鸣。
en: It really isn't. Castrum Kremnos is {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} territory, after all. The environment is cutting off your ability to resonate with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.

ch: 换句话说，我们有机会超过万敌了。
en: In other words, this is our chance to overtake Mydei.

ch: 如果记载无误，「天谴之锋」的正下方就是举世闻名的「悬锋斗技场」。我们脚下这条路，或是通向荣耀，或是通向死亡……
en: If the records are correct, directly beneath the Blade of Fury lies the world-renowned Kremnos Arena. The path before us leads either to glory or to death...

ch: 或许可以用铁球砸碎路障，但愿那边是悬锋城的藏宝室吧，否则可不值当。
en: Maybe we can use the iron ball to smash through the roadblock. Hopefully, it leads to Castrum Kremnos' treasure vault. Otherwise, it might not be worth the effort.

ch: 对了，刚才忘了说，前面拿到一块刻着悬锋城古语的石板，待会儿帮忙翻译下？
en: I just remembered — we came across a slate with inscriptions in an ancient language of Castrum Kremnos. Could you help translate it?

ch: 难怪悬锋城能连战连捷，借这种方式，士兵简直源源不绝啊。
en: No wonder Castrum Kremnos keeps winning battle after battle. With this method, they can create as many soldiers as they want...

ch: 万敌展示出他收集的三十枚悬锋城徽记。
en: Mydei displays the thirty Castrum Kremnos crests in his collection.

ch: 与万敌比较了徽记总数……
en: Compare the total number of crests you obtained with Mydei's...

ch: 不愧是悬锋城的「王储」，对这些繁文缛节还真是重视啊。
en: I guess being the crown prince of Kremnos makes you obsessed with all this ceremonial stuff.

ch: 黄金狮首是悬锋城首屈一指的参谋，它的谏言为我族赢下了诸多战役，化解了无数阴谋。
en: Chryseus Leo was the top advisor in Castrum Kremnos, whose wise counsel helped my tribe win many battles and thwart numerous schemes.

ch: 迈德…漠斯？
en: M—Mydeimos...

ch: 迈德…漠斯……
en: M—Mydeimos...

ch: 人民为生存迁徙，传统被时光消磨，但荣光？哪怕隐入浓雾，城墙崩析，悬锋城从未背弃战士的荣耀。为何口出此言？
en: To survive, our people have migrated, and our traditions have faded with time. But glory? Even though it has vanished into the mist and its walls have crumbled, Castrum Kremnos has never forsaken the glory of its warriors. Why say otherwise?

ch: 我恳求你，迈德漠斯…终结它漫长的痛苦，让它以战士的身份死去！它必须…带着荣耀……
en: I urge you, Mydeimos, to put an end to their endless suffering. Allow them to die as a warrior! They must... go with honor...

ch: …万敌。
en: ...Mydei.

ch: 难怪奥赫玛会遭遇袭击，没想到堕入疯狂的泰坦还能有此算计……
en: That explains the surprise attack on Okhema. I didn't think that the mad Titan could have orchestrated it...

ch: 奥赫玛将要面临灭顶之灾。必须有人回援。
en: Okhema is on the brink of destruction. Someone needs to go back and rescue them.

ch: 就如同那可怕的一击，你和我也是离弦的箭矢。{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}能给奥赫玛带来灭顶之灾，反过来，我们也一样。
en: Just like that decisive strike, there is no turning back for us. {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} could drive Okhema to the brink of ruin, but we can do the same to them.

ch: 而且…我信任阿格莱雅和缇宝老师。奥赫玛有两位半神驻守，还有我们的伙伴，她们能保护好圣城。
en: Besides, I have faith in Aglaea and Tribbie. With two demigods and our allies watching over Okhema, they should be more than capable of protecting the holy city.

ch: 眷属，我问你——悬锋城是否正准备灭绝奥赫玛？
en: Titankin, let me ask you this: Is Castrum Kremnos planning to destroy Okhema?

ch: 进攻奥赫玛的{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}只是一具半身。按它的意思，悬锋城中不会还有吧？
en: The {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} that attacked Okhema was only a double. Considering what the Titankin said, could there be more of them in Castrum Kremnos?

ch: 它们和悬锋城一样，被那疯狂扭曲了。虽然仍记得如何杀戮，但忘却了杀戮背后的意义。
en: They've been twisted by madness, just like Castrum Kremnos. They remember how to kill, but they've forgotten why.

ch: 我是悬锋之子，神谕中的黄金裔。我为你带来了最公平的价码——
en: I am a son of Kremnos and a Chrysos Heir of the prophecy, and I now offer you the fairest deal—

ch: 战魂正在悬锋城上空聚集…正在涌向「天谴之锋」！
en: The souls of war are amassing in the skies above Kremnos... surging toward the Blade of Fury!

ch: 我必须留下，不是为了奥赫玛的安危，而是要和自己的神明做个了结。
en: I must stay here, not for Okhema's safety, but to settle the score with my god.

ch: 呵…不愧是<color=#dbc291ff>悬锋的王储</color>。
en: Oh... As befitting of <color=#dbc291ff>the crown prince of Kremnos</color>.

ch: 漂亮！去收获我们应得的奖励吧，反正悬锋城是没人用得上了。
en: Well done! Go claim our rewards — no one else in Kremnos will have any use for them anyway.

ch: 马上就要跟万敌汇合了，<color=#dbc291ff>要不要把这片区域清理干净，多收集些</color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>悬锋徽记</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>战利品</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>？</color>
en: We'll be meeting up with Mydei soon. <color=#dbc291ff>Want to clean up this area and increase our</color> {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Kremnos crest</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>trophy</color>{RUBY_E#} <color=#dbc291ff>count?</color>

ch: 你的残酷不亚于悬锋城的刽子手。
en: Your ruthlessness is akin to that of the executioners in Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 万敌，我做不到和你一样……
en: Mydei, I may not be able to fight like you...

ch: 你与白厄在掩护下撤离、回到奥赫玛……
en: You and Phainon retreat using the opportunity and return to Okhema...

ch: 万敌与尼卡多利的战吼自颓垣之后传出…不要辜负了万敌的搏命鏖战，抓紧时间破解尼卡多利的秘密吧。
en: Mydei and Nikador's battle cries can be heard from beyond the crumbling walls... Don't let Mydei's desperate struggle be in vain. Hurry up and uncover Nikador's secrets as fast as you can.

ch: 接着赶路吧，不能让那家伙太得意。那扇紧闭的大门，也许可以用预言算碑打开。
en: Let's keep going. We can't let Mydeimos get too full of himself. The Prophecy Tablet might be able to unlock that closed gate.

ch: 没事的…{RUBY_B#万敌}迈德漠斯{RUBY_E#}是我见过最强悍的战士。
en: He'll be fine... {RUBY_B#Mydei}Mydeimos{RUBY_E#} is the fiercest warrior I know.

ch: 是万敌生来就背负的赐福，但也是诅咒。那是他身为黄金裔的表征。
en: Something Mydei was born with. A blessing and a curse — the true mark of a Chrysos Heir.

ch: 是万敌生来就背负的赐福，但也是诅咒。那是他身为黄金裔的表征。
en: Something Mydei was born with. A blessing and a curse — the true mark of a Chrysos Heir.

ch: 若要以同样的方式应对每桩危机，奥赫玛会终日不得安宁。于无声中抹去威胁，让他们不必活在恐惧的阴霾之下，才是黄金裔的职责。
en: Okhema would be in constant turmoil if we were to raise the alert each time danger befell us. Silently eliminating threats and sparing them from living under the shadow of fear — that is the duty of the Chrysos Heirs.

ch: 但{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}为自己打造了不灭的躯壳，无法被彻底杀死。万敌正在拖延时间…我们必须珍惜他争取到的每一秒。
en: But {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} has crafted an indestructible body for themself, one that can't be entirely destroyed. Mydei is buying us time... We need to cherish every second he's fought for.

ch: 但悬锋城隐入迷雾许久，我们无从得知{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}神躯不灭的奥秘。
en: Castrum Kremnos has been shrouded in the fog far too long, leaving us unable to discover the mystery behind {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s undying body.

ch: 还有另一件事。悬锋堡的石板上提到了「渗透」……
en: There's one other thing. We found a slate in Kremnos that mentioned an infiltration...

ch: 接下来的每一步都至关重要。这不止关系到万敌…还有圣城的全体公民。
en: Important decisions will be waiting for us every step of the way. What we're about to do will not only determine Mydei's fate... but also that of every single resident in Okhema.

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「现在置于左侧托盘的配重…代表着翁法罗斯的命运。」</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Weights in the left weighing pan... represent the fate of Amphoreus."</color>

ch: 也就是说，我们需要找到字面意义上比「翁法罗斯的命运」更为沉重之物？听上去是一道无解的难题。
en: Which means that we have to find something that literally has more weight than the fate of Amphoreus? It sounds like an impossible task.

ch: 对于翁法罗斯人，真的存在比这片土地更重要的东西吗？他们甚至没有逃向天外这个选项。
en: For the people of Amphoreus, is there really anything that has more weight than this land? They don't even have the option to flee beyond the sky.

ch: 的确，对翁法罗斯人而言，「世界的命运」实在是过于沉重的砝码。
en: Indeed, for the people of Amphoreus, the fate of the world is a weight that is far too heavy.

ch: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的疯狂正将翁法罗斯推向末日。它摒弃了荣耀，以疯狂的手段复制自身，意图毁灭天父和它庇护的文明。
en: The madness of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} is pushing Amphoreus toward the end times. They have abandoned their honor, replicating themself through crazed means, and are fully intending to destroy the sky father and the civilization they protect.

ch: 万敌不知已赔上了几条性命，遐蝶。我的犹豫就是对他的残忍。
en: Castorice, our hesitation is just cruelty to Mydei. How many lives must he have lost already?

ch: 我们需要收集悬锋城的记忆。
en: We must collect the memories of Kremnos.

ch: 长话短说：{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}不愿帮我们揭露悬锋城的过去。但不知为何，它对{NICKNAME}展现出了兴趣。
en: Simply put, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} refused to help us uncover the past of Castrum Kremnos. But for some reason, they showed interest toward {NICKNAME}.

ch: 缇宝老师，接下来我想兵分两路：由我立刻动身，赶往悬锋城支援万敌。
en: Tribbie, let's split up here. I'll make my way to Kremnos immediately to lend my support to Mydei.

ch: 我和万敌在战场上等你。
en: Mydei and I will be waiting for you on the battlefield.

ch: 「但你从未屈服！你也从未临阵脱逃过啊。你金黄的战士之魂，也终有一日会战胜黑潮，重塑那悬锋的王座啊。」
en: "But you never faltered, nor did you flee! Your golden warrior spirit, brave and bold, will conquer the black tide, as foretold. To the throne of Kremnos, you'll return once more!"

ch: 哈托努斯…这么说来，我是听说过它为悬锋城打造圣器的故事。
en: Chartonus... Come to think of it, I remember hearing about them making a holy vessel for Kremnos.

ch: 为了保护奥赫玛。
en: To protect Okhema.

ch: 悬锋城最上等的石料，拿来。纷争泰坦的黄金血，找来。剑皿，我会锻造。
en: The finest stones in Kremnos, give me. The golden blood of Strife Titan, find me. The Sword Vessel, I shall craft.

ch: 和平，给我的族人。山之民，不再做悬锋城的奴隶或斗士，永远。
en: Peace, for my people. Mountain Dwellers, no longer servants or fighters for Kremnos. Ever.

ch: 你有和悬锋城相关的记忆吗？
en: Do you have any memories related to Castrum Kremnos?

ch: 悬锋城？对于我们这些手无寸铁的平民，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的领土可是禁地。就算是在从前……
en: Castrum Kremnos? For us unarmed civilians, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s territory is off-limits. Even in the past...

ch: …等等，你提醒了我，阁下…我的确去过悬锋城。请给我片刻……
en: Oh, n–no... Wait, I just remembered! I did visit Castrum Kremnos once. Let me find it for you...

ch: …该出发去悬锋城了。
en: ...It's time to head to Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 阿格莱雅大人，她为奥赫玛做出的奉献值得更多感激。但大多数人只记住了她冰冷的一面。
en: Lady Aglaea's contributions to Okhema deserve more appreciation, but people mostly see her as distant and aloof.

ch: 现在不是说这些的时候…该出发了。希望这个小家伙能帮我们复现悬锋城的记忆。
en: We don't have time to talk about this right now... Let's set off. Hopefully, this little one will help us recreate the memories of Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 伙伴，相信！出发，悬锋！
en: Friend, trust! Go, Kremnos!

ch: 记住，阿格莱雅，无论黄金裔还是元老院，我们的地位都是由奥赫玛的公民赋予的。
en: Remember, Aglaea, whether it be the Chrysos Heirs or the Council, our positions are entrusted to us by the people of Okhema.

ch: 那会惊动奥赫玛的公民。假使他们知晓敌人有绕过黄金裔、渗透奥赫玛的手段，局面可能失控。
en: That would alarm Okhema's citizens. If they learn that the enemy can bypass the Chrysos Heirs and infiltrate the city, the situation might spiral out of control.

ch: （不…没什么。你要记得，以后不可以独自在街上玩耍…即便是在奥赫玛。）
en: (Nothing. But promise me you won't play on the streets alone from now on, even in Okhema.)

ch: 呃，当然是…当然是因为我们想为奥赫玛的公民除害啦，桀桀桀！
en: Uh, it's... it's we're just trying to get rid of any threats to Okhema, haha!

ch: 我们可不敢骗您啊，阿格莱雅大人~您可是整个奥赫玛最受尊敬的……
en: We would never dream of deceiving you, Lady Aglaea. In all of Okhema, you are the most revered—

ch: 神有神的耳目，人也有人的应对。待到所谓的「神谕」破灭之时…奥赫玛的命运会重新被公民握在手中。
en: While gods see and hear more extensively, mortals have their own means of dealing with things. When that so-called prophecy crumbles... the destiny of Okhema shall once again rest in the grasp of its people.

ch: 接着走你自己的路吧，半神，用尽你的浑身解数来证明我们是错的…但一刻也别忘记，在翁法罗斯，即便是「神」也不能为所欲为。
en: Keep following your chosen path, demigod, use every bit of your power to show that we are mistaken... but don't forget for a second, in Amphoreus, even "gods" are not above the law.

ch: 我会尽己所能拯救翁法罗斯，凯妮斯阁下。不论是从诸神手中……
en: I will employ every means at my disposal to save Amphoreus, Elder Caenis. Whether it means wresting it from the grasp of the gods...

ch: 悬锋城……
en: Castrum Kremnos...

ch: 怕是…会被当做可疑的人吧？悬锋城不是闲游之地，我们不该表现得太过显眼。
en: ...We may draw suspicion this way. Castrum Kremnos is no leisure spot for tourists. We shouldn't draw unnecessary attention to ourselves.

ch: 的确…有些奇妙。悬锋城不是闲游之地，我们不该表现得太过显眼。
en: It's... quite intriguing, indeed. But Castrum Kremnos is no leisure spot for tourists. We shouldn't draw unnecessary attention to ourselves.

ch: 迈德漠斯是个懦夫！随他离开悬锋城的人愧对{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}的名…耻辱的逃亡者，此生将无法再沐浴荣光！
en: Mydeimos is just a coward! Those who deserted Kremnos with him have brought shame upon the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#}... Despicable traitors will never bask in glory again!

ch: 但迈德漠斯确实是我们之中最强大的战士…如今他也选择了离开，我们还能追随谁？
en: But Mydeimos is undoubtedly the mightiest warrior among us... Who else can we turn to now that he's gone?

ch: 你在胡言乱语什么？王欧利庞——悬锋城真正的领导者——还没有倒下！他仍坚守在这座城邦，也未曾放弃唤醒伟大的泰坦。
en: What nonsense are you spouting? King Eurypon, the rightful ruler of Castrum Kremnos, has not fallen! He still stands firm in this city and has never given up on awakening the great Titan.

ch: 万敌是个…逃兵？
en: Mydeimos... is a deserter?

ch: 不…我不认为万敌阁下的出走是出于怯懦…相反，那是勇敢的决定。
en: No... I don't believe that Lord Mydei left out of cowardice. It was, in fact, a courageous choice.

ch: 他们有理由愤慨…因为万敌阁下曾是悬锋城的英雄。
en: They are entitled to that rage... because Lord Mydei was once the hero of Castrum Kremnos.

ch: …被万敌阁下杀死的结局。
en: ...He was killed by Lord Mydei.

ch: 上等武器！都来看啊，悬锋城最锋利的武器！
en: Finest weapons for sale! Come take a look! The sharpest blades in all of Kremnos!

ch: 上等武器！都来看啊，悬锋城最锋利的武器！
en: Finest weapons for sale! Come take a look! The sharpest blades in all of Kremnos!

ch: 看来我们回到了黄金战争的末年，悬锋城正面临内部分化和泰坦失神的两重打击。
en: It seems that we've traveled back to the last years of the Chrysos War, a time when Castrum Kremnos grappled with both internal strife and the Titan's waning divinity.

ch: 没人胆敢迎战吗？你们难道不愿赌上荣耀，在悬锋的光辉下燃烧自己的生命吗？
en: Does no one have the courage to take up the challenge? Are you not prepared to wager your glory and set your lives ablaze under the splendor of Kremnos?

ch: 来吧——「生存」就是唯一的规则！只要你们还有一丝呼吸，要么克服所有难关，赢得此世的荣耀——要么把灵魂留在悬锋城，成为「纷争」的养料！
en: Let the trial begin, then! Your only goal is to survive! As long as you still hold the breath of life, you'll either triumph over every trial and claim worldly glory — or leave your soul in Kremnos to become fuel for Strife!

ch: 要坚定，{NICKNAME}阁下…想想白厄和万敌，我们也要拿出同样的决心。
en: Have faith, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}... Lord Phainon and Lord Mydei are still fighting. We must match their unwavering resolve.

ch: 愿你们的战魂能取悦{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，成为悬锋城征战的养料。
en: May your courageous souls satisfy {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} and fuel the conquests of Kremnos.

ch: 愿你们的战魂能取悦{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，成为悬锋城征战的养料。
en: May your courageous souls satisfy {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} and fuel the conquests of Kremnos.

ch: …是在说万敌吗？
en: ...Is that Mydei?

ch: 年迈又昏聩的王，在密谋着不可言说的计划…他们想要亵渎{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的神性、它的灵魂、还有它留给悬锋城的遗产啊。
en: The aging and feeble king is plotting something unspeakable... One that seeks to defile {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s divinity, their soul, and the legacy they left to Kremnos.

ch: 如果不加以阻止，它会对后世的翁法罗斯形成巨大的威胁。
en: If we do not stop them now, they will pose a grave danger to the future generations of Amphoreus.

ch: 「听说了吗？欧利庞王的谋臣们正在拟定计划，他们好像打算对奥赫玛发动总攻。」
en: "Have you heard? King Eurypon's advisors are coming up with a plan to launch an all-out attack on Okhema."

ch: 袭击奥赫玛的计划，在如此久远的年代就已有雏形了吗？
en: So their plan to attack Okhema was conceived that long ago?

ch: 遥远未来的某日…陷入疯狂的{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}会把我们的伙伴和家园逼上绝路。我们回到这里…就是为了寻找阻止末日降临的方法。
en: Some day in the distant future... a mad {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} will drive our companions and our homeland to the brink of destruction. The reason we came back here... is to find a way to prevent Amphoreus from falling to its doom.

ch: 两位阁下，请你们找到让{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的灵魂重归完整的办法。只有修正了这段历史…翁法罗斯才能拥有未来。
en: Please, you must find a way to make {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s soul whole again. It is only by fixing this point in history... that we can salvage the future of Amphoreus.

ch: 用更悬锋的方式前进！<color=#dbc291ff>（跳过解谜）</color>
en: Progress forward in the way of Kremnos! <color=#dbc291ff>(Skip puzzle)</color>

ch: 如此昏暗破败，这就是悬锋城的未来吗？
en: This dark and derelict place... is this the future of Kremnos?

ch: 这些年里一定发生了很多事。
en: Kremnos must have been through a lot since then...

ch: 不知何时，从遥远的地平线外诞生了黑潮——它缓慢地逼近翁法罗斯的边界，而{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}是第一位与之接触的泰坦。
en: No one knows when the black tide first appeared beyond the distant horizon, but when it slowly encroached upon Amphoreus' borders, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} was the first Titan to venture forth.

ch: 那声战吼，是万敌阁下？
en: That battle cry... Is that Lord Mydei?

ch: 咦？它们在翁法罗斯应该随处可见才对。
en: Huh? They're all over Amphoreus.

ch: 你或许…是悬锋城的救赎啊……
en: You could well be... Castrum Kremnos' salvation...

ch: 不必心急，万敌阁下。待回到奥赫玛后，由我来为你转述吧。
en: Not now, Lord Mydei. I'll tell you everything once we return to Okhema.

ch: 万敌，你……
en: Mydei, do you...

ch: 走吧，回奥赫玛去。把胜利的消息带给两位半神。
en: In any case, let's return to Okhema and share news of our victory with the two demigods.

ch: 我…必须向你们坦白，我认为万敌是更合适的人选。他曾是悬锋城的王储，生命中的大部分时间都在随{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}一同征战。
en: I... want to be honest about this: I believe Mydei is the better candidate. He was once the crown prince of Kremnos after all, and much of his lifetime was spent fighting alongside {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}.

ch: 你所说种种，也许正是迈德漠斯不愿接过这颗火种的理由。
en: The qualities you've mentioned are very likely the reasons Mydeimos refused this Coreflame.

ch: 所以…你做好觉悟了吗，哀丽秘榭的白厄？
en: So I will ask you once more... Have you made up your mind, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae?

ch: 能在如此乱世中静心享乐，翁法罗斯人的精神属实脱俗。
en: The people of Amphoreus must have extraordinary spirits to be able to enjoy their lives even in such troubled times.

ch: 万敌去哪了？
en: Where did Mydei go?

ch: 倦意包裹了你…此时此刻，无论哪位翁法罗斯的神明都无法让你的目光从这张躺椅上移开。
en: Exhaustion envelops you... At this moment, no god of Amphoreus could pull your gaze away from this lounge chair.

ch: 当你身处奇异的睡梦时，奥赫玛的另一处……
en: While you were having the strange dream, somewhere else in Okhema...

ch: 今天、明天，有什么区别呢？反正在{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的庇佑下，奥赫玛永远都是黎明。
en: Today, tomorrow, what difference does it make? It's always morning in Okhema under {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s protection.

ch: 因为我认为一定有其它解法。<color=#dbc291ff>「比翁法罗斯的命运更为重要之物」…这个题面对你来说太过残酷，太不公平。</color>
en: Because I knew there must be another solution. <color=#dbc291ff>"Something more important than the fate of Amphoreus"... It is far too cruel and unfair to ask that of you.</color>

ch: 我一时找不到合适的辞藻…但我知道你并不平庸，白厄阁下。万敌常戏称你为「救世主」…我想他的语气中并不都是玩笑。
en: I don't have the right words for you now, but... I know you're far from ordinary, Lord Phainon. Mydei often calls you "Deliverer" in jest, but I don't believe he means it mockingly.

ch: 最近这段时间，我的故乡…哀丽秘榭的景色总在我眼前闪过。
en: The sights of Aedes Elysiae — my homeland — have been flashing before my eyes lately.

ch: 悬锋城的那些家伙，掌握了不得了的技术啊…要是我也能把自己的身体和灵魂分割开来就好了。那样，我就能随时让魂魄出窍，飞回家乡那片熟悉的茅草地。
en: Those Kremnoans mastered some cutting-edge technology... If only I could separate my soul from my body too. That way, I'd be able to fly my soul back to the comforting fields of my homeland any time.

ch: 翁法罗斯内部，{NICKNAME}的私人浴宫……
en: Within Amphoreus, at {NICKNAME}'s private bath chamber...

ch: 万敌阁下没有到场……
en: Lord Mydei isn't here yet...

ch: 哀丽秘榭的白厄——请上前来。
en: Please step forward, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae.

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>为了预言中的明天，我会成为翁法罗斯需要的神。</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>For our prophesied tomorrow, I will become the god Amphoreus needs.</color>

ch: 「随我来吧，哀丽秘榭的白厄……」
en: "Come with me, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae..."

ch: 万敌，你刚才说的「担忧」，指的是……
en: Mydei, what do you mean when you said you were "worried"?

ch: 万敌阁下…由我来吧。
en: Lord Mydei... please allow me.

ch: 那，小英雄…如果有一天，我们必须和哀丽秘榭说再见了，你会愿意成为「救世主」吗？
en: Well, little hero... If the day comes for us to say goodbye to Aedes Elysiae, could you become a Deliverer then?

ch: 哈哈，我在逗你玩呢~放心吧，哀丽秘榭可是很和平的，坏人绝对找不到我们。
en: Haha, I'm just teasing you. Don't worry. Aedes Elysiae is a peaceful place. Bad people won't reach us here.

ch: 的确。我想起在树庭求学的时光，每逢考试，理应沉心复习的时候，平日无暇关照的杂务都会变得条理清晰起来。
en: I understand completely. During my time at the Grove, the closer exams drew, the more efficient I became at tackling everyday mundane tasks — anything but my actual studies.

ch: 他在盗火行者一役中立下了功劳，我愿意退让一步，给他时间找出剥离火种的方法。
en: In light of his assistance in the battle against the Flame Reaver, I am willing to grant him some time to find a way to remove the Coreflame.

ch: 但接受试炼的风险，也请你仔细掂量：成为半神意味着你将舍弃人的身份，接过欧洛尼斯的神权，只身背负翁法罗斯的「岁月」。
en: However, I urge you to carefully consider the risks of accepting the trial: Becoming a demigod means forsaking your humanity. You will inherit Oronyx's divinity and bear the Time of Amphoreus, all on your own.

ch: 事态发展至此，我身为领路人难辞其咎。你们一次次为奥赫玛挺身而出，仅凭一樽蜜露早已难表谢意。
en: It is difficult for me as the guide to absolve myself from blame for things to have progressed to this point. Time and again, you have risen to the occasion for Okhema. Merely rewarding you with some Honeydew is no longer able to express the extent of our gratitude.

ch: 我走过翁法罗斯的许多城邦，可从未了解过天外的世界。如果有机会……
en: Despite having visited many cities in Amphoreus, I still understand nothing about the world beyond the sky. If there is an opportunity...

ch: 谈不上麻烦。我只是觉得，两位应该对奥赫玛的内部局势有更多了解。
en: I wouldn't call it trouble. I just think it will be favorable if the both of you understand the situation in Okhema better.

ch: 跟你补充下前情：元老院是由翁法罗斯的城邦代表们组成的权力机构，手握圣城的立法权，负责主持数年一度的公民大会。
en: Some background information for you: The Council of Elders is an authoritative body in Amphoreus made up of different city representatives. They hold legislative power over the holy city and are in charge of presiding over the citizens' assembly held once every few years.

ch: 这是奥赫玛最重要的社会活动，影响力之大…甚至能左右逐火之旅的动向。
en: This is the most important social event of Okhema. It is highly influential... and can even affect what happens to the Flame-Chase Journey.

ch: 那刻夏老师从不相信神谕，倒也没有「背叛」一说。但他教导过许多黄金裔，早已是奥赫玛重要的盟友。我实在不愿…眼睁睁看着同袍兵戈相向。
en: Anaxa has never believed in the prophecy, so technically it cannot be considered a betrayal. However, he has taught many Chrysos Heirs and has long been considered an important ally of Okhema. I truly do not wish to... see comrades turning on one another.

ch: 事情总是扎堆而至…{NICKNAME}和迷迷还要应对{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的试炼。我也计划去一趟树庭，搜集「天外之界」的线索。
en: Things are piling up again... {NICKNAME} and Mem are tied up with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s trial, and while I'm preparing to visit the Grove to uncover clues about the world beyond the sky.

ch: 说起来，奥赫玛的浴场似乎没有橡皮鸭玩具。只有这些…海豹？
en: Speaking of which, I don't recall seeing any rubber duck toys in the baths of Okhema. It seems like they only have these... seals?

ch: 也许，翁法罗斯的「开拓」之旅要步入新的阶段了。
en: Perhaps, a new phase of our Trailblazing expedition in Amphoreus is about to begin.

ch: 若你已准备好成为翁法罗斯的支柱，便上前来。
en: If you have already made your preparations to become a pillar of Amphoreus, please step forward.

ch: 第一次带你进入创世涡心的光景还历历在目。那时我无论如何也想不到，一位天外来客会肩负起翁法罗斯的命运。
en: I can still vividly recall when you entered the Vortex of Genesis for the first time. At that time, I could never have imagined that a guest from beyond the sky would shoulder the fate of Amphoreus.

ch: 你很累了，对吗？漫长的岁月里，你一直在守护翁法罗斯的命运。人们从记忆中汲取力量，每一丝涟漪都落在你的肩上。
en: Aren't you tired? Throughout the long years, you have always been protecting the fate of Amphoreus. Each time people draw strength from within their memories, every single ripple falls onto your shoulders.

ch: 翁法罗斯…永恒的无序…将会陷入……
en: Amphoreus... will succumb to... eternal disorder...

ch: 降落到翁法罗斯时，我们的车厢被{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的长矛贯穿了。还记得当时的情境么？在重渊的废墟，我是这么说的——
en: When we landed on Amphoreus, our car was pierced by {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s lance. Do you remember? Back in the ruins of the Abyss, this was what I said:

ch: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}也提到了「找回被夺走的未来」，还有「欺骗死亡」。想想万敌的不死之身，翁法罗斯存在着某种奇迹般的伟力，甚至能够逆转死亡……
en: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} mentioned "finding your stolen future" and "cheating death." Considering Mydei's indestructible body, it seems to suggest that there is some kind of miraculous power in Amphoreus that can even reverse death...

ch: 此前在树庭，我还疑惑阁下为何不会受到我的诅咒影响。我还以为是天外旅客的异能，可没想到，竟然是这种原因……
en: Back at the Grove, I was puzzled as to why you were not affected by my curse. I thought that it might have been the special ability of a traveler from beyond the sky. Never did I expect that this would be the true reason...

ch: 翁法罗斯…需要你。
en: Amphoreus... needs you.

ch: 但我没能料到…奥赫玛居然同时出现了两位「欺瞒死亡之人」。
en: However, I never expected that... two people who have cheated death would appear in Okhema at the same time.

ch: 我们刚才就在聊这事。该死，万敌在奥赫玛待了那么久，怎么就没人研究过他的不死之身？但凡能留下一点成果，现在也不至于毫无头绪……
en: That's what we have been talking about. Ugh, Mydei has been in Okhema for such a long time but — has no one ever thought to study his indestructible body? If there were even any minor breakthroughs, we wouldn't be as clueless as we are right now...

ch: 我会设法让她返回奥赫玛，但也请做好希望落空的准备。请你理解，在翁法罗斯的历史上，没有人能逃离「死亡」的掌心。于时光的尽头，塞纳托斯静候着每一个人。
en: I'll try and get her to return to Okhema but do be prepared for a less-than-ideal outcome. Please understand that throughout the history of Amphoreus, no one has ever managed to escape the clutches of Death. At the end of time, Thanatos silently awaits all.

ch: 喂！请问——这是什么地方，位于翁法罗斯何处？
en: Hey! Excuse me — what is this place? Where in Amphoreus are we?

ch: 本人谨代表奥赫玛全体公民向你致意，也为神悟树庭的遭遇表示深切遗憾。
en: I greet you on behalf of all the citizens of Okhema and express my deepest regret about what happened at the Grove of Epiphany.

ch: 我名为吕枯耳戈斯，唤我「来古士」便可。现今是为奥赫玛元老院的名誉元老，以「神礼观众」之名，捍卫每一位正直的公民自我表达的权利。
en: I am Lycurgus, though you may call me Lygus. Holding an honorary position within the Council of Elders in Okhema, and as the Theoros, I stand to protect the right of all upright citizens to express themselves freely.

ch: 而我，阿那克萨戈拉斯，身为树庭在奥赫玛公民大会的特派公使，也早已了解你的能耐……
en: While I, Anaxagoras, serving as the Grove's special envoy to Okhema's citizens' assembly, have long known the extent of your abilities...

ch: 呵，那就说明翁法罗斯人编撰的神话，连笑话都不如。
en: Heh, in that case, the myths crafted by the people of Amphoreus are nothing more than pitiful jests.

ch: 四下望去…此地可有描绘吾的壁画？吾倒是好奇，树庭以外的人子，如何看待别尊泰坦呢。
en: Now that I look around... I wonder if there are any murals bearing my portrait around here. I'm quite intrigued to see how the children of humanity beyond the Grove perceive another Titan.

ch: 那刻夏老师？听说树庭的学者为了抵御黑潮英勇牺牲，想不到您还安然无恙…真是命运垂青！
en: Professor Anaxa? Word has it that the scholars of the Grove valiantly perished resisting the black tide. To find you here safe and sound... Thank the fates!

ch: 这么说，您此行是来向元老院禀报事件始末的么？我听说，不仅树庭被黑潮吞没，奥赫玛也不远了。就算有「纷争」的半神站在人类这边……
en: So, are you here to report the incident to the Council? I heard that after the black tide devoured the Grove, Okhema would be next in line. Even with the demigod of Strife standing alongside humankind...

ch: 但等到{RUBY_B#万敌}那位王子{RUBY_E#}登神，阻退黑潮，她又马上调转枪头，声称奥赫玛以外大势已定，唯一的威胁只剩阿格莱雅及其党羽。大概下一次公民大会，她们就该发难了吧。
en: Yet, when {RUBY_B#Mydei}the crown prince{RUBY_E#} ascended to godhood and repelled the black tide, she immediately altered her tune, declaring that all was resolved beyond Okhema, with the only remaining menace now being Aglaea and her adherents. They might well make their move at the upcoming citizens' assembly.

ch: 呵呵…难道说，汝是出于这种缘由，才在树庭遇袭时妄图炼化吾之灵魂不成？
en: Heheh... Was this the reason why you failed in your attempt to refine my soul when you were ambushed at the Grove?

ch: 汝还有家人哪，他们也在这奥赫玛城中？
en: So, there are other members in your family, eh? Are they also living in Okhema?

ch: 这、这可是渎神哪…即便自由如树庭，此举也足以将你送上火葬的尸床…！
en: B—But this is absolute blasphemy... Regardless of how much freedom the Grove provides, such an act could cause you to be burned at the pyre...!

ch: 你那至亲…她现在身在何处？快将她送离树庭，去到人寻不得的地方，否则你我都将接受七贤人会的审判哪…！
en: Your beloved... Where is she now? Send her away from the Grove at once, to a place where nobody will ever be able to find her. Otherwise, the both of us will be judged by the Council of the Seven Sages...!

ch: 神悟树庭「智种学派」掌门人，恶名昭彰的「渎神者」，身怀{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}火种的黄金裔，树庭惨案的幸存者……
en: Head of the Nousporists of the Grove of Epiphany, notorious blasphemer, a Chrysos Heir who bears {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}' Coreflame, a survivor of the Grove calamity...

ch: 黄金裔们呼唤战争，我们就回应以战争。冲突必将发生：既然阿格莱雅妄图用金血的力量压制善良的民众，我们就不惮彰显奥赫玛公民应有的权利和气概。
en: Well, since the Chrysos Heirs are calling for war, we will respond in kind. Conflict is inevitable. Since Aglaea endeavors to suppress the virtuous commoners with blood of gold, we will not hesitate to display the rights and mettle that the citizens of Okhema are so entitled to.

ch: 这片小小的舞台，正是奥赫玛千百年来最深刻的缩影。而在十五个日夜后，此地也将成为奥赫玛历史最重要、也是最后的转折点……
en: This tiny stage is the most profound embodiment of Okhema in centuries. In fifteen days, this site shall also become the most important, as well as the final turning point in Okhema's history...

ch: 她是奥赫玛众黄金裔中资历次长者，在岁月磋磨与火种烧蚀中逐渐丧失人性…是一位可敬可畏的对手。
en: She is the second-most experienced Chrysos Heir across the whole of Okhema, who has gradually lost her humanity to the ravages of time and the ablation of the Coreflame... A formidable opponent indeed.

ch: 执刑者遐蝶，相信你对这个名字并不陌生。早在我返回奥赫玛时，阿格莱雅便派她来监视我了。如果我没能及时赴约，{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}必将先一步找上我。
en: I believe you're aware of Castorice the executioner. Long before I returned to Okhema, Aglaea had already dispatched her to monitor me. If I weren't able to reach this place in time, I would have been forced to meet {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} first.

ch: 至少，你我都同意这位穷奢极欲的暴君正是奥赫玛和平最大的敌人。元老院愿意捍卫您生存的权利，正如我们捍卫每一位遭到压迫的公民。
en: At the very least, the both of us agree that this tyrant who wallows in extravagance and greed is the greatest threat to achieving peace in Okhema. The Council of Elders is willing to defend your right to live, just as we defend every oppressed citizen.

ch: 我的支持代表树庭全体的支持。
en: Garnering my support is equivalent to garnering the support of the entire Grove.

ch: 虽然令人感到遗憾，但客观来说，树庭遭袭之后，学院的实际权力者变成了我。
en: Although the circumstances are rather unfortunate, from an objective point of view, it is an undeniable fact that ever since the Grove was attacked, I have become the de facto leader of the Grove.

ch: 退一步说，我早就是树庭在奥赫玛的特派公使，在公民大会上自然也保有关键的一票。
en: At the very least, I have served as the Grove's special envoy to Okhema for a significant amount of time. Of course, this also means that I will hold a crucial vote at the citizens' assembly.

ch: 以{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的名义，奥赫玛感谢您的诚意和宝贵意见。
en: In the name of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, Okhema thanks you for your sincere and valuable thoughts.

ch: 元老院宣誓对奥赫玛全体公民永远忠诚——至于你，阁下，你要如何保证自己配得上这份诚意，而不会像你现在背叛阿格莱雅一样，择机背叛奥赫玛战无不胜的人民？
en: The Council of Elders has vowed to all citizens of Okhema that it will always remain loyal to them. As for you, my lord, how will you guarantee that you will be able to live up to such earnestness and will not betray Okhema's indomitable citizens when the opportunity presents itself, just as you now betray Aglaea when it suits you?

ch: 你当然没有理由，但凯妮斯有。谁能掌握{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的火种，谁就能掌握奥赫玛……
en: You may not, but Caenis has. Whoever gets hold of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame will get to rule over Okhema...

ch: 看来方才的智辩实属枯脑焦心哪…若翁法罗斯有来生，记得多加强身健体，也别再逃避人情酬应了。
en: So, the intellectual debate from earlier was too draining for you, huh... If Amphoreus gets a new lease on life, you should focus on strengthening your body and stop shirking social interactions.

ch: 这也是「负世」之重的一道侧写吧。如果翁法罗斯真有来生，记得多锻炼啊。
en: I guess this also counts as one aspect of the Worldbearing burden. If Amphoreus does have a next life, you may want to get your body in shape.

ch: （卡吕普索？她是七贤人…树庭的人？）
en: (Calypso? She's one of the Seven Sages... A member of the Grove?)

ch: （晚安，迷迷。晚安，奥赫玛……）
en: (Goodnight, Mem. Goodnight, Okhema...)

ch: （晚安，迷迷。晚安，奥赫玛……）
en: (Goodnight, Mem. Goodnight, Okhema...)

ch: 晚些时候 奥赫玛某处
en: Later, somewhere in Okhema...

ch: 元老院？元你个头！我的家乡早就被黑潮吞没了，还回到黄金世？我看是回到奥赫玛的黄金世还差不多吧！
en: The Council of Elders? More like the council of buffoons! The black tide took my hometown long ago! Who are they kidding with bringing back Era Chrysea? It's all a sham to create their own Era Chrysea in Okhema!

ch: 奥赫玛今天也很和平。
en: Just another peaceful day in Okhema.

ch: 欸？阁下竟然有这种兴趣吗，那你应该…很喜欢奥赫玛的氛围。
en: Hm? You're interested in that? Well, you'll feel right at home in Okhema then.

ch: 时至今日，我仍会觉得不可思议。在摇摇欲坠的翁法罗斯，唯独这里依旧是一片光明。奥赫玛的人们还会用投票来解决问题……
en: To this day, I still find it almost unreal that Okhema is the only place illuminated by light amidst the crumbling ruins of Amphoreus, and its people are even holding votes to reconcile differing opinions...

ch: 没错。现在，我是奥赫玛的「入殓师」……
en: Yes. You now know me as the mortician of Okhema...

ch: 因为我也是：我不明白，为什么阁下身为天外之人，会以这种残忍的方式早早卷入翁法罗斯的命运……
en: I felt just as confused. Why, as someone from beyond the sky, were you so cruelly dragged into Amphoreus's fate?

ch: 哪怕早在树庭，我们就有过无心的接触。那时明明什么都没有发生……
en: Even when we brushed against each other unintentionally in the Grove... and it was obvious that nothing had happened...

ch: 金织、控制狂、奥赫玛第一美人、阿格莱雅妈妈…还要我多说几个外号吗？
en: Goldweaver, control freak, number one beauty of Okhema, Aglaea the Mom... How many more nicknames do you wanna hear?

ch: 翁法罗斯货币和我们的不一样。
en: The currency I use isn't the same as the one in Amphoreus.

ch: 不过，计划有变：明天别去浴场，来奥赫玛城门口找我。
en: A minor change in plans, though. Don't go to the bath tomorrow. Come look for me at Okhema's city gates instead.

ch: 没什么，单纯因为我怕了裁缝女那副冷冰冰的面孔。如果可以，我一秒都不想在奥赫玛多待。
en: Oh, nothing really. Just a bit scared of the seamstress' frosty face. I wouldn't stay a second longer in Okhema if it were up to me.

ch: 次日 奥赫玛
en: Next day, Okhema...

ch: 给我带哪了，还是翁法罗斯吗？
en: Where am I? Are we still in Amphoreus?

ch: 万敌…阁下？
en: Lord Mydei...?

ch: 如果万敌阁下此时也在浅滩上，那他一定能成为我们的道标。因为，他和那些离群的亡魂不同…即便在死者的世界，他也一定能找到方向。
en: If Lord Mydei is also somewhere along the river shoals right now, then he will certainly become our signpost. After all, he's different from those wandering souls... He will find his way even in the realm of the dead.

ch: 如果赛飞儿阁下所言属实…或许真是万敌阁下所为。
en: If Lady Cipher is to be believed... this could be the handiwork of Lord Mydei.

ch: 神谕已然昭示你的姓名，「死亡」的黄金裔，奥赫玛理应将你奉为贵宾。
en: Since the prophecy has already pronounced your name as Chrysos Heir of "Death," Okhema ought to treat you as an esteemed guest.

ch: 整理好心爱的衣物，随我启程吧。奥赫玛欢迎你，遐蝶。
en: Tidy up your precious garments and come with me. Okhema welcomes you, Castorice.

ch: 据说，女王不计代价将她带回城堡，她意欲以这前所未见的伟力，将整个翁法罗斯纳入掌中……
en: I've heard that the queen spared no effort in bringing her back to the castle. Her Majesty intends to control all of Amphoreus with this unprecedented power...

ch: 万敌…阁下？
en: Lord Mydei...?

ch: 万敌阁下，我一直都想知道…死亡为何会抗拒你？
en: Lord Mydei, I have always wanted to... Why does Death reject you?

ch: 这真是那个霸道的万敌吗？
en: Is this really the proud Mydei?

ch: 万敌阁下，你愿意与我们同行吗？
en: Lord Mydei, are you willing to travel with us?

ch: 悬锋城是不是也有这个…
en: Didn't Castrum Kremnos also have this...?

ch: 缇安，还有万敌…我明白了。
en: Trianne and Mydei... I get it now.

ch: 我还在思量，万敌阁下。
en: I have yet to make my decision, Lord Mydei.

ch: 万敌阁下…还有一件事，或许你应该知晓。
en: There is one more thing you should know, Lord Mydei.

ch: 感谢你，万敌阁下。那个正确的选择…我会找到它的。
en: Thank you, Lord Mydei. I will find the right decision.

ch: 我…为重铸翁法罗斯生死秩序而来。
en: I'm... here to reforge the order of life and death in Amphoreus.

ch: 与此同时 奥赫玛
en: At the same time, in Okhema

ch: 汝声称：「翁法罗斯历史乃是『轮回』」——
en: You were saying that Amphoreus' history is cyclical...

ch: 奥赫玛在这一制度下屹立千年不倒，自然能证明其存在的合理性。
en: Okhema has stood strong under this system for a thousand years. It stands to reason that there is purpose in its existence.

ch: ——奥赫玛正直的公民，哀丽秘榭的白厄，将为本场大会带来最后的演说！
en: Phainon of Aedes Elysiae, virtuous citizen of Okhema and the last speaker of the assembly.

ch: 刻法勒在上，各位奥赫玛的公民——
en: By Kephale above, dear citizens of Okhema...

ch: 我的故乡哀丽秘榭，那是一处被时间遗忘的村落。那里的好风如薄荷般清新，麦浪宽广到能连上海洋…我曾坚信，自己会在那与邻里亲友永享安宁。
en: Aedes Elysiae, my beloved hometown, is a village forgotten by time. It is a place with the most invigorating breeze and wheat fields that spread all the way to the sea... I once thought that there, I would enjoy a lifetime of peace and quiet with my friends and family.

ch: 这就是黑潮，奥赫玛如今迫在眉睫的威胁。凯妮斯或许承诺了，灾厄三泰坦皆已陨落，奥赫玛必将重返「黄金世」——
en: That is the black tide — a looming threat that can bring Okhema to its knees anytime. Caenis may have promised that, with the Three Titans of Calamity gone, Okhema will return to an Era Chrysea once more, but...

ch: 但现在，我要让各位失望了。因为，我会对你们说：即便{RUBY_B#万敌}「纷争」之半神{RUBY_E#}已为我们挡下许多，但「它」就要来了。
en: Much as it pains me, I must disappoint you: While {RUBY_B#Mydei}the demigod of Strife{RUBY_E#} has done everything in his power to hold them back, "they" are still coming.

ch: 那黑袍剑士…「盗火行者」的名字，恐怕早已传遍大街小巷。现在，「纷争」用他的惊雷送来信号，告诉我们：它已自死灰中复活，并渴求着众神的火种。
en: By now, the name of that black-robed swordmaster... the Flame Reaver, has likely echoed throughout the city already. The roaring thunder is a message from the Strife demigod: The Flame Reaver has risen from death, and they hunger for the Coreflames of the gods.

ch: 正是！奥赫玛美好的公民生活没有停歇的迹象。仔细想想吧，各位，这场公民大会能够和平召开，难道是因为危机消失了吗？
en: Exactly! The city of Okhema shows no signs of pandemonium or chaos. And why is that? I beg you, spare a moment to think about this. Are we able to stand here and hold this assembly in peace today because the danger has passed?

ch: 不！那是因为黄金裔们挺身而出，将灾厄挡在了奥赫玛的城墙之外——阿格莱雅用她的金线，维系并捍卫了你们所能享用的一切！
en: No! This peace we enjoy is no gift of fate. We are able to stand here today only because the Chrysos Heirs have stepped up and shielded Okhema from calamity! With her golden threads, Aglaea has preserved — and continues to preserve — these idyllic days that all of you hold dear!

ch: 元老院说，她会抛下所有人，只因神性正在蚕食她的身心。但各位可曾想过，那些贵人本能向她伸出援手——他们为何选择了冷眼旁观，并将奥赫玛推离逐火的事业？
en: The Council of Elders claims that Aglaea will one day forsake the people because her divinity is eroding her body and soul. But ask yourselves this: Rather than offering her aid and support, why do they choose to watch and push Okhema away from the Flame-Chase Journey?

ch: 她从未辜负奥赫玛的期待，却只因虫豸的围攻撕咬、就该蒙受莫大的羞辱吗？除却那后至的「神性」…她的本心，难道不是始终与「人」同在吗？
en: Not once has she ever failed Okhema, yet these vermin attempt to tear her apart, tarnishing her name with unfounded allegations! She may have been blessed by divinity, but hasn't her heart always stayed true to humanity?

ch: 他们想欺骗你们，把这场大会粗暴地归结成「人」与「神」的对立。还记得我的请求吗？奥赫玛的公民们，请擦亮双眼，仔细端详一下站在你们身边的人吧！
en: They attempt to mislead you and reduce this assembly to a crude standoff between gods and humans, but citizens of Okhema! Once more, I implore you to open your eyes and look at those around you!

ch: 在一片哗然中，奥赫玛不同城邦代表领袖将手中的陶片扔进陶罐中……
en: In an uproar, representative leaders from different cities in Okhema throw pieces of pottery into the dolium...

ch: 感谢诸位耐心等待。我，阿那克萨戈拉斯，谨代表神悟树庭七贤人与全体学者，投下庄严一票。
en: Thank you all for your patience. On behalf of the Seven Sages of the Grove of Epiphany and the scholars of Amphoreus, I, Anaxagoras, am ready to cast my vote.

ch: 元老们，公民们，请肃静！神悟树庭的阿那克萨戈拉斯请求向公民大会宣告。还请各位留步，以便聆听其宣言。
en: Elders and citizens, your attention, please! Stay for a moment more, if you will. Anaxagoras of the Grove of Epiphany has an announcement for the assembly.

ch: 诸君！就在刚才，你们亲手决定了翁法罗斯的命运。作为逐火之旅的支持者，我也十分乐见诸位的抉择——
en: Just moments ago, all of you made a decision on the fate of Amphoreus. As a supporter of the Flame-Chase Journey, it pleases me to see the choice you have made.

ch: 都给我提起耳朵，听清楚了！现在，我，神悟树庭的阿那克萨戈拉斯，就这样告诉你们——
en: Now, listen up, and listen well! I, Anaxagoras of the Grove of Epiphany, hereby declare:

ch: 逐火之旅许诺的一切确凿无疑：因为预言中{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的半神，哀丽秘榭的白厄，将以他完整无缺的记忆，将我们所有人重塑在新世界中！
en: Everything that the Flame-Chase Journey promises is true! Phainon of Aedes Elysiae, the prophesized demigod who shall succeed {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, will reforge each and every one of us in the new world with his complete, intact memories!

ch: 天啊，连凯妮斯也背叛了奥赫玛……
en: By the gods, even Caenis has betrayed Okhema...

ch: 首先，对于奥赫玛元老凯妮斯，与「神礼观众」来古士，被指控疏忽职守，徇私枉法，致使尊神奥体遭受严重亵渎……
en: First, Elder Caenis of Okhema and Lygus the Theoros stand accused of neglecting their duties and abusing the law, leading to the egregious blasphemy against a god...

ch: 以{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}之名：奥赫玛应在第七个{RUBY_B#午时}践行时{RUBY_E#}以前责成委员会展开检察，并公开宣示结果，以便进一步审理！
en: In the names of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, Okhema is to form a committee before the seventh {RUBY_B#Noon}Action Hour{RUBY_E#} to conduct an investigation and disclose the findings to the public for subsequent judgment!

ch: 其次，对于神悟树庭的阿那克萨戈拉斯，指控其自身对{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的严重亵渎——
en: Now, concerning Anaxagoras of the Grove of Epiphany, he has confessed to grave blasphemy against {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}...

ch: 现在 奥赫玛
en: Presently, in Okhema

ch: 当然。吾在此立誓见证：神悟树庭「智种学派」的阿那克萨戈拉斯，业已战胜理性之试炼。
en: Very. I hereby swear I have borne witness: Anaxagoras of the Nousporists and the Grove of Epiphany has successfully overcome the trial of Reason.

ch: 你引领我们前来翁法罗斯，却始终不愿谈及真实目的。「收集记忆」…并不是一个能让我信服的回答。
en: You've guided us to Amphoreus but refused to tell us your true intentions. "Collecting memories"... is simply not a convincing answer.

ch: 当然，没问题。真正的原因是：翁法罗斯有着特殊的意义，在一些秉持极端理念的忆庭成员眼中，它…是一个「完美的范例」。
en: That's not a problem, of course. The true reason behind my intentions is that Amphoreus holds special significance. For some Memokeepers of the Garden with extremist views, it... is a "perfect example."

ch: 一个只能被忆庭之镜映照出的世界，意味着忆者拥有将其「私藏」的权利。如果那些「记忆」行者先一步掌握了翁法罗斯的奥秘……
en: A world that can only be seen through the Garden's mirror means that Memokeepers have the right to keep the world in their private collection. If those pathstriders of Remembrance were to uncover the secrets of Amphoreus first...

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>浮黎…祂的目光，刚刚掠过了翁法罗斯。</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>It's Fuli... THEIR gaze has just swept across Amphoreus.</color>

ch: 更有趣的是，她的潜意识里也出现了「翁法罗斯」这四个字。
en: What's even more interesting is that the word "Amphoreus" has appeared in her subconscious.

ch: 「翁法罗斯」——不仅这人知道它，还有很多忆者都对那里感兴趣。
en: Not only does this person know of Amphoreus, but there are also many Memokeepers who are interested in the place.

ch: 这个神秘兮兮的翁法罗斯，既然从外部找不到有用的线索，那我干脆——登门拜访。
en: Since I'm not able to find any useful clues from the outside, why don't I personally visit this mysterious Amphoreus?

ch: 第二面镜，准备「思维折射」。从星穹列车到翁法罗斯天体还有一段距离，你得把我发射过去——
en: Second Mirror, prepare for the Thought Refraction. There's still some distance from the Astral Express to the Amphoreus celestial body. You're in charge of sending me over...

ch: …坐标输入完毕，准备启动空间折跃。目标：未知天体「翁法罗斯」。
en: ...Coordinates input complete. Preparing to activate spatial warp. Destination: Unknown celestial body, Amphoreus.

ch: 嚯…那就是翁法罗斯？外形还真是别具一格。
en: Oh... So that's Amphoreus? Its appearance is — well — sure is unique.

ch: 嚯…好一番壮观的景象，这就是翁法罗斯的入口吗？
en: Oh... What a magnificent sight. Is this the entrance to Amphoreus?

ch: 接下来…该怎么进入翁法罗斯内部呢？
en: Now then... How am I going to get into Amphoreus?

ch: 但标准总是灵活的。在不违反终极协议的前提下，我可以透露一条信息：如您所想，此地是「翁法罗斯」的入口。
en: However, standards are always flexible. While not violating the ultimate protocol, I'm able to disclose this piece of information: As you thought, this is the entrance to Amphoreus.

ch: 而现在——请回吧，女士。很遗憾，翁法罗斯不是您应当染指的世界。无论您建立过多少丰功伟绩，此地都不会轻易敞开大门。
en: Now, please kindly turn back. Amphoreus is not a world that you should be involved with. Regardless of what kind of magnificent achievements you have accomplished, this place will not open its doors so easily.

ch: 其一：由于不可言说的原因，翁法罗斯是「绝对封闭」的天体。除我以外，没有任何能协助您进入其中的方法。
en: First: For reasons that cannot be disclosed, Amphoreus is a completely isolated celestial body. Apart from me, no one else will be able to help you enter.

ch: 它关乎缠绕翁法罗斯的第三条命途，也是您和您的朋友至今未能解明的那一条……
en: It concerns the third Path that is entangled with Amphoreus — a Path that you and your friends still very much lack understanding of...

ch: 正在众人静候「纷争」的半神从试炼中诞生时，意外也发生了。开拓小队立即随万敌深入试炼，并救出了困于其中的白厄。正当众人松了一口气时，新的问题却随之而来。
en: While everyone is awaiting the demigod of Strife to emerge from the trial, something unexpected happens. The Trailblaze squad immediately follows Mydei into the trial and rescues Phainon, who is trapped inside. Just as everyone breathes a sigh of relief, a new problem arises.

ch: 万敌不得不肩负起「纷争」的重任，但悬锋人也绝不会将火种拱手让给宿敌奥赫玛。为了寻求理解，他决定首先向恩师，悬锋老将克拉特鲁斯请教，二人不欢而散。
en: Mydei had to shoulder the burden of Strife, but the Kremnoans would never willingly give up the Coreflame to their old foe Okhema. In an attempt to gain a better understanding, he decides to first seek advice from his teacher Krateros, a veteran of Kremnos. The two part on bad terms.

ch: 与此同时，奥赫玛向神悟树庭派出以缇安、遐蝶为代表的外交使节。众人抵达时意外发现黑潮来袭，并与神秘剑士交战，但最终还是成功救出那刻夏和他身负的火种。
en: Meanwhile, Trianne and Castorice are dispatched to the Grove of Epiphany as diplomatic envoys of Okhema. When they arrive, they discover to their surprise that the black tide has struck, and they fight a mysterious swordmaster. In the end, they manage to rescue Anaxa and the Coreflame that he carries.

ch: 就在众人返程途中，奥赫玛城内，悬锋老将因挟持缇宁，擅闯禁地被捕。在万敌斡旋下，缇宝等人同意袒露记忆，以便实现悬锋人与奥赫玛人的和解。
en: While everyone is on their way back, within the city of Okhema, Krateros is arrested for abducting Trinnon and trespassing on forbidden grounds. Under Mydei's mediation, Tribbie and her sisters agree to reveal their memories in order to facilitate reconciliation between the Kremnoans and Okhemans.

ch: 计划一波三折，但万敌以「纷争」半神之姿归来，协助众人成功夺回火种。不久后，他成功说服子民放下对宿仇的成见，便与众人告别，返回家乡，踏上对抗黑潮的前线。
en: The plan suffers multiple setbacks, but Mydei returns as the demigod of Strife and helps everyone reclaim the Coreflame. Not long after, he successfully persuades his people to let go of their prejudices against Okhema. He says goodbye to everyone and returns home to join the frontline against the black tide.

ch: 丹宝也能理解吧，毕竟，把你和{NICKNAME}囚禁在翁法罗斯的泰坦…就是{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}。
en: You get what I'm saying, right Dannie? After all, the Titan that imprisoned you and {NICKNAME} here in Amphoreus is none other than {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} themself...

ch: 但总有地上的人怀抱着飞向天空的梦想。树庭不乏对{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的研究，这也是我们此行的目的。
en: But there will always be people who dream of soaring toward the sky. The Grove has a wealth of research on {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}, and that is exactly what we are here for.

ch: 偌大的树庭，不知要找的东西都分散在哪儿。我们分头行动吧，相信以丹宝的身手，黑潮造物也伤不到你。
en: In any case, what we're looking for could be anywhere in this enormous Grove. Let's split up to cover more ground. Dannie, with your skills, I'm sure those monsters born of the black tide will pose no threat to you anyway.

ch: 离开翁法罗斯的方法…
en: How to leave Amphoreus...

ch: （艾格勒，统治天空的泰坦。神话中，它被描述为一只长有百眼、俯瞰世界的巨鸟。只要它依旧飞翔于云端，翁法罗斯人就无法离开地面……）
en: (In the myths, Aquila, the Titan who reigns over the domain of the skies, is a colossal bird that overlooks the world beneath them with a hundred eyes. As long as they continue to soar above the clouds, the people of Amphoreus will remain trapped on the ground...)

ch: 翁法罗斯的泰坦神话…
en: Amphoreus' Titan mythology...

ch: （在翁法罗斯，「泰坦」是绕不开的话题。人们创造了神话，神话又塑造了他们…身在其中，总是很难保证客观。）
en: (In Amphoreus, Titans are a common topic of discussion. People create myths that, in turn, conceive Titans... It's a tricky task to keep an objective view when among the people of Amphoreus.)

ch: （没能保护好{F#她}{M#他}，是我的失职…但还有一线希望。翁法罗斯独特的死生规则，如今反倒成了救命稻草。）
en: (I should have done more to keep {M#him}{F#her} safe... but it's not too late. We still have a fighting chance. The unique rules that govern life and death on Amphoreus might just work in our favor and save {M#him}{F#her}.)

ch: （以树庭藏书之广博，会有类似记载吗？希望有吧……）
en: (The Grove is a veritable library of knowledge... Maybe they'll have records on a similar case? Please let there be one...)

ch: 果然，谈论「天空」在树庭算不上禁忌。这两位学者在争论的「天舟」，记得阿格莱雅审讯时也提到过，不是什么愉快的回忆。
en: As I expected, the Grove doesn't forbid discussions about the Sky. It's a debate between two scholars about the skyships... Aglaea also made mention of the ships when she interrogated us... a memory I'd rather forget.

ch: 可能…是因为我吧。黑潮对翁法罗斯的「光明」格外敏锐，也许是天空祭司的赐福吸引了它们。
en: The black tide is remarkably quick to detect the light of Amphoreus, so I... or rather, the blessings of the Sky Priest in me, might have unknowingly called them to me.

ch: 说「可能」有些委婉了。老师一向不敬神明，对神谕也持否定态度，即便在自由的树庭，他也被视作异端。
en: "Might" is an understatement. Anaxa has never been one to venerate the gods, nor has he ever found it within himself to put any faith in the prophecy. People have come to think of him as a heretic, even in a place as liberal as the Grove.

ch: 我对树庭还不够了解，方便问几个问题么？
en: There's still much I don't know about the Grove. Do you mind if I ask you a few questions?

ch: 神悟树庭有七大学派，虽然都是围绕「最初的学者」塞勒苏斯的理念建立的，但彼此间各有不同，其中「敬拜学派」是最为敬奉泰坦的一支。
en: The Grove of Epiphany is home to seven schools of thought. While all seven schools are founded on the ideologies of Thalesus the First Scholar, each is unique in its own way. Among them, the Venerationists revere and worship the Titans the most.

ch: 如今，几乎每一个翁法罗斯人都知道「天舟」的故事。{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的身躯比天空更伟岸，它的神罚是如此无情。
en: Nearly everyone in Amphoreus has heard the story of the skyships by now. {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}'s stature is loftier than the heavens, and their divine retribution is merciless.

ch: 这里是树庭的藏书处，友爱之馆。
en: This is the Library of Philia, a place where the Grove stores its collection of tomes.

ch: 那，树庭「打劫」过悬锋城么？
en: Well, if you don't mind: Did the Grove ever rob Castrum Kremnos?

ch: 友爱之馆的书目过于庞杂，一卷卷翻阅不现实。我们用藏书石版检索出需要的资料，统一带回奥赫玛研究吧。
en: There are too many books in the Library of Philia. Flipping through them all will take too long. Why don't we use the biblioslate to search for the texts we need? We can bring them back to Okhema for reading after that.

ch: 课题二：树庭内有真正的植物在模仿相邻近的仙女木的生长趋势，申请研究。回复：这是「莲食学派」的研究方向，暂不批准。
en: Topic 2: An observation of real plants within the Grove imitating the growth patterns of nearby White Dryads. Permission to research. Reply: Falls under the domain of the Lotophagist school, not approved.

ch: 「至于泰坦，它们真的符合凡人对神的认知？神造的世界必定是完美的，可翁法罗斯却遍布愚钝和丑陋！」
en: "Are the Titans truly an accurate reflection of what humans think gods should be? Worlds created by gods are indubitably perfect, but what of Amphoreus? Only foolishness and insensitivity everywhere you turn!"

ch: 说是审判，其实是辩论。他需要一一回应学者们的控诉，否则就要被逐出树庭。
en: Though what he took on in the end was more a debate than an actual trial. He had to address every one of the scholars' allegations, or face expulsion from the Grove.

ch: 对了，这沓投诉信提醒了我，树庭里还有个地方，或许存在石版中都查不到的线索……
en: By the way, this stack of complaint letters has reminded me of a place in the Grove... We may find clues there that aren't on the teleslate.

ch: 以树庭的藏书风格，竟会有这种眼皮底下的遗漏？
en: Given the Grove's meticulous approach to archiving, could there really be such an oversight right under their noses?

ch: 树庭都成这样了，小小打破一下禁令也没事吧…对不住啦那刻夏老师。
en: With the Grove in this state, I'm sure Anaxa won't be mad even if we sneak into the lab for a short while... Right?

ch: 这是怎么回事…奥赫玛的大家，还有我？连我也在老师的研究范围内？
en: What's going on...? Anaxa is conducting research on our friends in Okhema and... me?

ch: 从命运重渊到悬锋城，我已见过许多泰坦造物，树庭里也有不少{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}创造的生灵。
en: From the Abyss of Fate to Castrum Kremnos, I've seen many a Titan creation during my time in Amphoreus. Lifeforms created by {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} can also be found in the Grove.

ch: 你还记得吗？黑潮抵近时，树庭本打算转移{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种，可中途遭遇意外，那刻夏老师也以身殉道……
en: Do you remember? When the black tide was approaching, the Grove had planned to send {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}' Coreflame to a safe place, but an accident happened along the way, and Anaxa lost his life in the process...

ch: 「应掌握造物的原理，令万物诞生时即为完美的状态」…如今那刻夏身在奥赫玛，他的目标……
en: "To conceive an entity of perfection, one must first understand the principles of creation"... If Anaxa is in Okhema now, then that means...

ch: 所以，奥赫玛的天空也是虚假的。
en: So, the skies of Okhema are fake, too.

ch: 因为那根本不是你，而是「卡吕普索」，来自树庭的七贤人之一。
en: Because that wasn't you. That was Calypso, one of the Seven Sages of the Grove.

ch: 七贤人就更是笑谈了，若真是在吾之树荫下蒙受庇护的贤人，吾必能发觉。汝不也对树庭的过去如指诸掌么？
en: And surely you jest. Don't you think I, of all people, would know if that were the name of one of the Seven Sages under the shade of my tree? Don't you claim to know the Grove's past like the back of your hand?

ch: 适应了奥赫玛的日光，都不习惯夜色了。
en: The night sky feels unusual... now that I've gotten used to the eternal light of Okhema.

ch: 总有种不妙的预感，难道树庭之灾背后还有别的秘密？
en: I have a bad feeling about this. Could there be more to what happened at the Grove?

ch: 半神议院是奥赫玛的政治腹地，重要性不亚于创世涡心。在我的使命结束后，总有一天，这里会取代猎神的疆场，成为你们的下一道难关——
en: Being Okhema's political center, the Demigod Council holds just as much significance as the Vortex of Genesis. Someday, after my duty is over, this site will take the place of the battlefield where you hunt gods, become the next challenge you ought to overcome...

ch: 你好，翁法罗斯的奥列格。
en: Hello, Oleg of Amphoreus.

ch: 雷声是「纷争」的烽火，是少主捎来消息了。他向奥赫玛掷来了传信的投枪，上面只有几个字。
en: Thunderclaps are beacon signals of Strife. They are a message from the young lord. He threw a spear bearing several words at Okhema.

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「盗火者，死灰复燃，警惕。」</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Watch out. The Flame Reaver is back."</color>

ch: …果然。先前在悬锋竞技场，我们没有真正杀死它。
en: ...I guessed as much. We didn't actually kill them back at the Kremnos arena.

ch: 奥赫玛正直的公民，哀丽秘榭的白厄，与异乡人{NICKNAME}，正在向我们走来！
en: Virtuous citizens of Okhema, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae and {NICKNAME} the outlander are heading toward us!

ch: 可是，要怎么才能让翁法罗斯回到「黄金世」？
en: But how are we supposed to send Amphoreus back to "Era Chrysea"?

ch: 树庭七贤人之一，阿那克萨戈拉斯，以及哀地里亚的「死亡女神」遐蝶——
en: Anaxagoras, one of the Grove's Seven Sages, and Castorice, Aidonia's "Goddess of Death"!

ch: 很简单：我们将有机会消除世间「死亡」，令翁法罗斯回到万物永生的时代…一个与「逐火之旅」完全不同的崭新未来！
en: The answer is simple: We will have a chance to rid the world of "death" and bring Amphoreus back to an era when all beings live forever... We'll usher in a new future that will be entirely different from "the Flame-Chase Journey"!

ch: 盗火行者迟早会盯上这里！
en: But this place will become the Flame Reaver's target sooner or later!

ch: 哦？莫非，盗火行者亲口告诉你了？
en: Oh? Could it be that you heard that from the Flame Reaver themself?

ch: 若我们消除了死亡，便不必畏惧那盗火者，不是么？
en: If we eliminate death, then there's no need for us to fear that Flame Reaver, right?

ch: 奥赫玛选择了她的命运。本次公民大会议题将变更为「暂停逐火之旅」，该决议并将张贴于纪名英雄墙前，全体公民应知晓城邦的前路。
en: Okhema has chosen her destiny. The issue up for discussion at this citizens' assembly shall be modified to the "Suspension of the Flame-Chase Journey." This resolution shall be put up on the Wall of Heroes such that all citizens are aware of the city's way forward.

ch: 翁法罗斯的历史在泰坦诞生前是一片「混沌」，这还不奇怪吗？
en: Amphoreus' history before the Titans were born was complete chaos. Is that not strange by itself?

ch: 听说现世的悬锋城也刻着同样的话，居然是炼金的术式啊。
en: I've heard that these words are still engraved in Castrum Kremnos even today. It didn't occur to me that they were actually part of an alchemical formula.

ch: 正如今日的逐火之旅——翁法罗斯的历史是一种「轮回」。
en: ...Just like the Flame-Chase Journey of today. Amphoreus' history is cyclical in nature.

ch: 此时此刻，我正在努力帮助这里的人们逃离。*我们*打开了许许多多的百界门，把大家传送到了奥赫玛，*我们*的姐妹缇宝的身边……
en: Right now, I'm doing everything I can to help people escape. We have been guiding them through the Century Gate, sending them to Okhema, where our sister Tribbie is waiting.

ch: 也都想见证奥赫玛的第二次黎明——
en: And we all want to see Okhema's second dawn —

ch: 你会把那苦涩的真相…传达给奥赫玛的全城公民吗？
en: Will you share this harsh truth... with all the citizens of Okhema?

ch: 以普通人的标准衡量，几位的身手也算不错了。你们要是没误入歧途，怎么也能在奥赫玛当个守城卫士，领个铁饭碗吧？
en: By any standard, you all are quite capable. Had you not strayed, you could have been guarding Okhema, securing a stable income.

ch: 黑衣剑士，盗火行者，管你叫什么名字——
en: Black-clad swordmaster, the Flame Reaver, whatever your name is —

ch: *太美丽了，斯缇科西亚…哎唷，这不盗火行者吗？*
en: Styxia, you're stunning... Oh? Look who it is — the Flame Reaver!

ch: *初次…哦不对，多次见面，我是奥赫玛的大英雄，翁法罗斯的救世主！*
en: First time — wait, no, not the first time meeting you. I'm the great hero of Okhema, the Deliverer of Amphoreus!

ch: …拜拜，「盗火行者」！
en: ...Bye-bye, "Flame Reaver"!

ch: 现在——由我来验验你这盗火者的成色吧！
en: Now, let me see if you're worth your title, Flame Reaver!

ch: *奥赫玛的全体公民哪——今天，我要给你们带来两个消息：一则悲报，一则佳音。*
en: To all citizens of Okhema — today, I bring you two pieces of news: one sorrowful, one joyous.

ch: *那就是我要为诸位带来的喜报！伟大的负世泰坦陷入缄默以前，它在我的恩师耳边留下的话语…现在，我要将它传予翁法罗斯的全部世人！*
en: And that brings me to the joyous news I share with you today! Before the great Worldbearing Titan fell silent, they spoke one final message to my revered mentor. And now, I shall share those words with every soul in Amphoreus!

ch: 那时，我…咳、咳咳…我必须离开奥赫玛……
en: Back then, I... I had to leave Okhema...

ch: 你是翁法罗斯湮没无闻的英雄，赛法利娅。你拯救了我们所有人。
en: You are the unsung hero of Amphoreus, Cifera. You saved us all.

ch: 白厄阁下，在翁法罗斯的神话中——<color=#dbc291ff>黎明机器是艾格勒赠予刻法勒的礼物</color>，对么？
en: Lord Phainon, in Amphoreus's mythology, <color=#dbc291ff>isn't the Dawn Device said to be a gift from Aquila to Kephale?</color>

ch: 如果火种给你留下的消息属实，奥赫玛失去了黎明机器的加护……
en: If the Coreflame's message is true, Okhema has lost the Dawn Device's protection...

ch: 数日之前，奥赫玛的「昏光庭院」……
en: A few days ago, in Okhema's "Twilight Courtyard"...

ch: 克莱门汀小姐的医术，很厉害哦——*我们*也觉得，你一定能担得起昏光庭院的牌面！
en: Miss Clementine's medical skills are amazing! We believe you'll make the Twilight Courtyard proud!

ch: 其实…我并不是对事事都有自信哦，克莱门汀。
en: Honestly... I'm not confident about everything, Clementine.

ch: 谢谢你，克莱门汀！
en: Thank you, Clementine!

ch: 我之前一直留在树庭助讲，没什么机会来奥赫玛…大家都已熟记于心的语句，对我来说还十分陌生。
en: I've always been at the Grove helping with lectures and never had the chance to come to Okhema... The phrases everyone has memorized still feel unfamiliar to me.

ch: 奥赫玛危在旦夕，我必须尽快扛起半神的职责，以天空的力量庇佑大家。
en: Okhema is on the brink, and I must quickly embrace the role of demigod to protect everyone with the power of the Sky.

ch: 燃烧的天空、破碎的巨像，还有尸横遍野…糟透了。如果这就是「翁法罗斯」内部的样貌，那确实叫人意外。
en: Burning skies, shattered statues, corpses strewn everywhere... What a mess. If this is what the inside of "Amphoreus" looks like, it's truly shocking.

ch: 既然如此，黑塔。我对「翁法罗斯」世界本质的猜想，你是否也有足够的理由相信了？
en: If that's the case, Herta, do you now have enough reason to believe my conjecture about the true nature of "Amphoreus"?

ch: 不如再附加一个任务目标：<color=#dbc291ff>玩牌的忆者告诉我，那结了冰的开拓小姑娘，很可能也被困在了翁法罗斯内部。</color>
en: Why not add another mission objective while we're at it: <color=#dbc291ff>The card-playing Memokeeper told me that the frozen Trailblazer girl might just also be trapped inside Amphoreus.</color>

ch: 翁法罗斯悲剧的源头……
en: The source of Amphoreus' tragedy...

ch: 它们象征着翁法罗斯的十二位神灵：这个世界的命运、支柱、生灵和灾祸。
en: They embody the twelve Amphorean deities: Fate, Foundation, Creations, and Calamity of this world.

ch: 而继承其位的半神——不死的迈德漠斯，选择独自背负悬锋之名，还乡代冠，将其身化作圣城的最后一道防线。
en: And its demigod successor, the undying Mydeimos, chose to bear the title of Kremnos alone, returning home to be crowned as the last line of defense for the holy city.

ch: 万敌，愿你战无不胜。
en: Mydei, may your battles know no defeat.

ch: 不久前，树庭贤人之首与你们相伴，将黑潮中步出的残虐威胁斥回。
en: Not long ago, the head of the Grove Sages helped you repel the menace that is the black tide.

ch: 「盗火行者」…
en: It's the Flame Reaver...

ch: 这是…是那「盗火行者」的斗篷？！它怎么会在这里……
en: Could this be from... the Flame Reaver's cloak!? Why is it here?

ch: 这家伙，精神错乱了。
en: The Flame Reaver's gone mad. The end.

ch: 别生气呀，整这一出只是为了给你们提个醒，翁法罗斯可一点都不安全，全是流窜的威胁，包括那个黑衣剑客…不管在哪里都要提高警惕！
en: C'mon, don't be upset. I'm just giving you a kind reminder that Amphoreus isn't safe at all. The whole place is full of dangers, including that swordmaster... Make sure you stay on your toes, no matter where you are!

ch: 所以，那「盗火行者」是赛飞儿小姐的伪装？骗术？像真的一样…这就是「诡计」半神的力量？
en: So... was that a Flame Reaver disguise? Or a magic trick? It looked so real... Is that the power of the Trickery demigod?

ch: 打个比方，刚才，你们认出那块碎布是盗火行者的东西以后，心里想的是什么?
en: For example, what did you think when you realized that piece of cloth came from the Flame Reaver's cloak?

ch: 嗯…「难道盗火行者在这附近」？
en: Hmm... We thought that maybe the Flame Reaver was around here somewhere?

ch: 「糟了…一定是盗火行者来了」？
en: Well, we thought it must be the Flame Reaver coming this way...?

ch: 嚯…你可真受欢迎啊。但凡事讲究先来后到，先陪我搞定宝贝的事，我再送你俩去树庭呗？
en: Heh, aren't you a popular one? But I got to you first, so help me with the treasures, and then I'll send you two to the Grove.

ch: 遐蝶成功炼成死龙•玻吕刻斯，并利用它回到冥界见到「死亡」泰坦塞纳托斯，并将泰坦火种与夺走的未来悉数归还，翁法罗斯的生死流转重归有序。
en: Castorice successfully recreated the Netherwing, Pollux, via alchemy and used its power to return to the nether realm, where she faced Thanatos the Death Titan. She returned both the Titan's Coreflame and the stolen future, restoring the cycle of life and death in Amphoreus.

ch: 奥赫玛人尊重智慧，渴望知识。若满城公民都知晓了二位的来历，想必会有更多人对「开拓」产生兴致——可惜对「天外之界」的探讨至今仍是禁忌。
en: Okhemans hold wisdom and knowledge in high esteem. If the citizens knew of your origins, I'm sure more would be intrigued by "the Trailblaze." Sadly, discussions about the "world beyond the sky" remain taboo.

ch: 阁下不必自咎。令翁法罗斯众多学者费神千年的难题，即便您天资过人，也不可能于一朝一夕间得到解答。
en: Don't be too hard on yourself, my lord. This puzzle has stumped Amphoreus's scholars for centuries. It isn't something you can solve overnight... even someone as gifted as yourself.

ch: 在树庭，我找到许多有关天空泰坦的研究，也了解到翁法罗斯的学者大多把「天外之界」的禁忌归结于艾格勒降下的诅咒。
en: In the Grove, I discovered extensive research on the Sky Titan. It appears that many scholars from Amphoreus believe the taboo against the "world beyond the sky" stems from a curse cast by Aquila.

ch: 正是。在翁法罗斯的十二位泰坦神明中，艾格勒是最为阴晴不定的一位。
en: Exactly. Of the Twelve Titans of Amphoreus, Aquila is known for being the most capricious.

ch: 假设，丹恒阁下，我能为两位开辟一条脱离翁法罗斯的通路，且能绕过艾格勒的神罚……
en: Hypothetically, Lord Dan Heng, if I could open up a path out of Amphoreus that circumvents Aquila's divine punishment...

ch: 与此同时，在神悟树庭……
en: Meanwhile, in the Grove of Epiphany...

ch: 还好有哈托努斯这个翁法罗斯最一流的铁匠。
en: It's a good thing Chartonus is the finest blacksmith in Amphoreus.

ch: 今时不同往日，我肩负之物…无比珍贵，也无比脆弱。我为翁法罗斯的明日而挥剑，因此决不允许自己再被仇恨蒙蔽，有失职责。
en: Times have changed. The responsibility I bear is both precious and fragile. I wield my sword for the future of Amphoreus. I will not let hatred cloud my judgment again and neglect my duties.

ch: 好主意！…不过，那以后再来树庭就没盼头了。
en: Great idea! However, that would mean no more reasons to visit the Grove.

ch: 看来树庭的学者们在深奥的学术探讨之余，也没忘了自己的小爱好。那么，你要翻阅哪篇读物呢？
en: It seems that the scholars of the Grove, amidst their profound academic discussions, haven't forgotten their little hobbies. So, which reading material will you peruse?

ch: …如果是后者，那盗火行者得负全责。
en: ...If it were the latter, the Flame Reaver is fully responsible.

ch: 不过现在的翁法罗斯，好像也没有可以钓鱼的地方？
en: But then again, are there even any spots left to fish in Amphoreus these days?

ch: 在聊什么好东西呢？这是…《翁法罗斯占卜全书》？
en: What're you guys chatting about? Is this... the Amphoreus Divination Compendium?

ch: 要是占卜结果里提到的吉兆都是真实的…那我的家乡，哀丽秘榭，也就不会消失了。
en: If the good omens foretold by divination were true... my hometown, Aedes Elysiae, wouldn't have disappeared.

ch: 呵…竟然能直接叫出我们的名字，看来你对翁法罗斯遗落的历史也颇有研究啊，白厄阁下。
en: Ha... To directly call us by our name, it seems you, Lord Phainon, have studied the forgotten history of Amphoreus quite thoroughly.

ch: 能劳烦你把这段野史作者的姓名透露给我么，白厄阁下？我可不希望奥赫玛纯真的孩子们，被这家伙的春秋笔法荼毒啊。
en: Could you disclose the name of the author behind this popular legend, Lord Phainon? I'd hate for the innocent children of Okhema to be tainted by such slanted narratives.

ch: …啊，这不就想起来啦！《悬锋与苍穹》，第三卷第五节——
en: ...Ah, now we remember! Kremnos and the Firmament, Volume 3, Section 5 —

ch: 「最后，继承了阳雷骑士塞涅俄丝血脉的一族被瑟希斯的学者们接纳，并在树庭建立起了昏光庭院……」
en: "Finally, those descended from Seliose the Daythunder Knight were welcomed by the scholars under Cerces and established the Twilight Courtyard in the Grove..."

ch: 这…怎么会这样？我一直以为，有阿格莱雅大人在，奥赫玛一直都很安定祥和……
en: How can this be? I always thought that with Lady Aglaea here, Okhema would remain peaceful...

ch: …克莱门汀？你…别着急，快先喘口气！
en: ...Clementine? Take a breath... What's going on?

ch: 建立它的目的，原本是为了纪念那第一次逐火之旅，为了追忆于千年前为翁法罗斯做出重大牺牲的英雄们。
en: Its purpose was to commemorate the first Flame-Chase Journey, and to remember the heroes who made great sacrifices for Amphoreus a millennium ago.

ch: 我早说了，如今你不但痴盲，而且昏聩。近些日子，你对奥赫玛的掌控变弱了。
en: Like I said, you're not only blind but deaf too. Lately, your control over Okhema has weakened.

ch: 翁法罗斯最会撒谎的女人，也被那个阿格莱雅给骗了，桀桀桀！
en: You're Amphoreus's most cunning liar, and even you were fooled by Aglaea — hehehe!

ch: 哎呀，瞧瞧这紫色水晶的透亮程度…正好跟我的肤色绝配！赛飞儿大姐头，你果真是全翁法罗斯审美最顶级的侠盗！
en: Look at the clarity of this purple crystal... It matches my skin tone perfectly! Cipher, Cipher, you truly have the most refined taste of all the thieves in Amphoreus!

ch: 哎呀…这看上去可真够惨的。你觉得他们成功逃到奥赫玛了吗？
en: Oh... this looks tragic. Do you think they made it to Okhema?

ch: 八成没有。我在奥赫玛从没见过斯缇科西亚出身的家伙，连听都没听说过。
en: Probably not. I've never seen or heard of anyone from Styxia in Okhema.

ch: 呵，想想还真是不公平呀。仅仅是因为生错了地方，就得承受这样的灭顶之灾…反倒是那些奥赫玛人，只因为背靠负世泰坦，所以能一直维系到现在……
en: Heh, it does seem unfair, doesn't it? Just because they were born in the wrong place, they had to face such... devastation. Meanwhile, those in Okhema, simply because they're supported by the Worldbearing Titan, continue to survive...

ch: 「回奥赫玛来吧，我请求你。若没有你，他们将无法赢得抗争。」
en: "Please, come back to Okhema. I'm begging you. Without you, they don't stand a chance."

ch: 但我奉劝你们永远别再靠近奥赫玛，否则，愤怒的民众将把你们撕成碎片。
en: Stay away from Okhema forever. If you set foot there again, the fury of its people will tear you apart.

ch: 滚吧，别再出现在我们面前。转告你们身后的主子，想阻止逐火之旅，她最好集结一支比鼎盛时的悬锋更雄壮的军队。
en: Get out of here. Don't show your face around us again. If your master wants to stop the Flame-Chase Journey, she'd better bring an army that makes Kremnos at its peak look like child's play.

ch: 一切照常。我先给缇宝老师传信，让她尽力安抚公民。我们快马加鞭赶回奥赫玛，去确认城里的状况。假如中途再撞见拦路的敌人……
en: Stay on course. I'll contact Tribbie and ask her to keep the citizens calm. We'll hurry back to Okhema as fast as possible and assess the situation in the city. If we run into any enemies along the way...

ch: 针对泰坦发明，悬锋的铸魂技术。虽能保留神性…但会彻底过滤，人性的残余。
en: Invented for the Titans, Kremnos's Soul-Forging technology was. Though divinity it retains, filtered out, the remnants of humanity will be.

ch: 在树庭出现的家伙，还有在重渊和丹恒对峙的那些，都没有立刻诉诸暴力，只是监视和威慑。
en: The ones who appeared in the Grove, and those who confronted Dan Heng in the Abyss, didn't immediately resort to violence. They were just watching and trying to intimidate.

ch: 我会留在这里，带领卫士维持治安。你们就去弄清这起事情的原委吧——但别花太久，阿格莱雅已逝，必须有人代替她引领奥赫玛。
en: I'll stay here to lead the guards and maintain order. Find out what happened — but don't take too long. With Aglaea gone, someone has to take her place and lead Okhema.

ch: 你远赴树庭是为了让自己变得强大，强大到能对付威胁到奥赫玛的敌人。你没做错任何事，千万不要苛责自己呀。
