en: You went to the Grove to prepare yourself for the threats to Okhema. You didn't do anything wrong, so don't be hard on yourself.

ch: 我知道阿格莱雅对我的期望。当下，奥赫玛最不需要的就是一个自怨自艾的引路人。
en: I know what Aglaea expected of me. Right now, the last thing Okhema needs is a leader wallowing in self-pity.

ch: 冲天的火光也许会令人们混乱、畏惧，但我并不担心他们会迷失方向。因为奥赫玛还有你在，白厄。
en: The blaze soaring into the sky might sow fear and confusion, but I have no worries about people losing their way. After all, Okhema still has you to guide them, Phainon.

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>你是翁法罗斯注定的负世者，通向翁法罗斯未来的门扉。</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>You are the destined Worldbearer of Amphoreus, the gate to Amphoreus's future.</color>

ch: 请他们告诉每个人，凡是对圣城的未来和逐火之旅心存顾虑的公民，都应该来参加这次集会。告诉他们，阿格莱雅将希望的种子留给了翁法罗斯。
en: Urge everyone who has concerns about the holy city's future and the Flame-Chase Journey to attend this gathering. Tell them Aglaea has left Amphoreus the seeds of hope.

ch: 谢谢你，哈托努斯——我会用这把长剑守护翁法罗斯的生灵。
en: Thank you, Chartonus. I will use this sword to protect the beings of Amphoreus.

ch: 他会站出来引领奥赫玛么？
en: Will he step up to lead Okhema?

ch: 请允许我见证：哪怕失去了「浪漫」的神权，奥赫玛仍会是末世中的理想乡。在这里，居住着阿格莱雅所期待的、神谕中的新世界所期待的……
en: Let me bear witness: Even without the divine authority of Romance, Okhema will remain a sanctuary in these end times. A place for the kind people Aglaea dreamed of, the kind of people foretold in prophecy...

ch: 距离翁法罗斯的新生还有一段长路。但我们不会在前进时遗忘过去，因为翁法罗斯的记忆总能造福后人。
en: There's still a long way to go before Amphoreus is reborn. But we will not forget the past as we move forward, for the memories of Amphoreus will always benefit future generations.

ch: …她是奥赫玛的改衣师，黄金裔的领袖，「金织」阿格莱雅。而她这一生最大的壮举——
en: ...She was Okhema's dressmaker, the leader of the Chrysos Heirs, the Goldweaver Aglaea. And her greatest feat —

ch: 咱们之间又不是生离死别，你只是去悬锋城看门了而已，就别掺和这么催人泪下的场合了。
en: We aren't parting ways forever. You're just off to guard the gates at Castrum Kremnos. Let's not make this a tearful farewell.

ch: 回头见，哀丽秘榭的白厄。
en: See you around, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae.

ch: 约好了，迈德漠斯。
en: It's a date, Mydeimos.

ch: 奥赫玛有没有什么稀罕的宝贝，是连你…唔…连我们的店里都没有的？
en: Does Okhema have any treasures so rare that not even your... I mean, our shop, has seen?

ch: 那就来说些你不知道的事吧。「盗火行者」——据我观察，那家伙可是对奥赫玛虎视眈眈哪。
en: Then let me tell you something you don't know. The Flame Reaver — they've been watching Okhema closely.

ch: 那家伙是像条疯狗一样丧失理智，但它绝对不是傻子。你猜它为什么一直没对奥赫玛出手？
en: That lunatic may have lost their mind, but they're no fool. Why do you think they haven't made a move on Okhema yet?

ch: 告诉你吧，那家伙之所以没有贸然进攻奥赫玛——多半是因为裁缝女织成的防御网比你们想象中的还要坚固。
en: Allow me to let you in on the actual secret. They probably held off from attacking Okhema because the seamstress's defense network was way tougher than you thought.

ch: 感激不尽。那盗火者实力莫测，请务必小心。
en: You have my deepest gratitude. That Flame Reaver's power is truly unfathomable. Please be careful.

ch: 与此同时，在神悟树庭……
en: Meanwhile, in the Grove of Epiphany...

ch: 自从树庭遭到黑潮破坏，我就一直想尽量远离这里，远离可能让人感伤的回忆。
en: I've been trying to stay away from here since the black tide destroyed the Grove... And through that, stay away from the memories that might make me sad.

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>先祖们，请稍等我片刻吧</color>。我在树庭留下的回忆…值得花上一些时间来缅怀。
en: <color=#dbc291ff>O ancestors, please wait for just a bit longer</color>. The time I spent in the Grove... deserves some reminiscence.

ch: …以上，就是你们在树庭的最后一堂课了。
en: ...And that was your last lesson in the Grove.

ch: 从今往后，你们都有各自的路要走。从这里学去的知识能帮上多少忙，全看几位参悟的本领。
en: Now, each of you will head off on your own path. How much the Grove's teachings can help you in the real world depends on how well you can put knowledge into practice.

ch: 尽喜欢耍小聪明和嘴皮功夫——哀丽秘榭的白厄，扣一个学分！
en: All you do every day is wag that sharp tongue of yours — That's a credit deduction, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae!

ch: 根据树庭的讲义规范，授课教师在最后一个课时的结尾，应当「与学生畅谈卒业后之理想，引导学生走上妥实之道路。」
en: According to the Grove's protocols for a cohort's final class, the lecturer should take some time in that lesson to "discuss the students' post-graduation aspirations with them and guide them toward a solid path."

ch: 我看某些人的表达欲如此旺盛…不妨由你先来，哀丽秘榭的白厄——提问：你的理想是什么？
en: Since some of you are so eager to speak, why don't we start with you, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae? What is your post-graduation aspiration?

ch: 没想到又在树庭见面了。白厄说你在为征伐艾格勒作准备，莫非……
en: I didn't expect to see you again in the Grove. Phainon mentioned you were gearing up for the campaign against Aquila. Are you here to...

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>只有这样，地上的生灵才能创造出通往天空的彩虹桥。</color>而我要寻访的第一位先祖，他的灵魂就驻留在树庭。
en: <color=#dbc291ff>That's the only way for creatures on earth to forge the rainbow bridge to the sky</color>, and the soul of the first ancestor I want to see is here in the Grove.

ch: 我也有此意。树庭现在危机四伏，多一个人就多了一层保障。
en: I was thinking the same thing. The Grove is fraught with danger right now, and an extra pair of hands translates to extra security.

ch: 下一位要去拜访的先祖…据说她的英魂留在了创世涡心。可惜仪式必须按顺序进行，要搭伙回奥赫玛吗，丹宝？
en: Now, the next ancestor on the list... her spirit is said to rest in the Vortex of Genesis. A pity that the ceremony has to be performed in strict order. Shall we head back to Okhema together, Dannie?

ch: 和我故乡的洋流相比，翁法罗斯的水体要更…不羁。驯服它的过程有些艰难，还好我已大概摸清了其中的门路。
en: Compared to the currents of my home, the waters of Amphoreus are... rather untamed. Subduing the waters wasn't easy, but I've gotten the hang of it now.

ch: 下一位要去拜访的先祖…据说她的英魂留在了创世涡心。可惜仪式必须按顺序进行，要搭伙回奥赫玛吗，丹宝？
en: Now, the next ancestor on the list... her spirit is said to rest in the Vortex of Genesis. A pity that the ceremony has to be performed in strict order. Shall we head back to Okhema together, Dannie?

ch: 和我故乡的洋流相比，翁法罗斯的水体要更…不羁。驯服它的过程有些艰难，还好我已大概摸清了其中的门路。
en: Compared to the currents of my home, the waters of Amphoreus are... rather untamed. Subduing the waters wasn't easy, but I've gotten the hang of it now.

ch: 好不容易回来奥赫玛一趟，你本可以好好休息一阵的，我们一起叙叙旧……
en: It's been ages since you were last in Okhema. You could've taken some time to rest, and we could've caught up...

ch: 不能以貌取人呀，飞儿。小风堇在她的领域可是很厉害的专家哦，整个翁法罗斯都没有比她更靠谱的医师啦。
en: Don't judge a book by its cover, Ciphy. Cinny is a master of her craft. She's the most skilled and dependable physician in all of Amphoreus.

ch: 她一直都是那样啦，别在意。不管怎样，飞儿她愿意回来奥赫玛帮忙…实在是太好了。
en: Don't worry. She's always been like that... It's good to have her back in Okhema lending a hand.

ch: 走吧，该回树庭去了…不能让丹宝和小伊卡担心呀。
en: Alright, time to head back to the Grove... I shouldn't keep Dannie and Little Ica waiting.

ch: 呵…同为翁法罗斯的支柱，没想到「天空」的宿命要等到千年之后才能完满啊。
en: Heh... Who would've thought, as a fellow pillar of Amphoreus, the Sky's duty could only be fulfilled after a thousand years?

ch: 走吧，该回树庭去了…不能让丹宝和小伊卡担心呀。
en: Alright, time to head back to the Grove... I shouldn't keep Dannie and Little Ica waiting.

ch: 最后一站的目的地，是万敌阁下的故乡——悬锋城。
en: Our final stop is Lord Mydei's home — Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 悬锋城……
en: Castrum Kremnos...

ch: 万敌阁下在这里孤身对抗黑潮，日复一日…我有些担心他的状态。
en: Lord Mydei has been fighting the black tide here alone day after day... I'm worried about him.

ch: 他此前还以惊雷捎来消息，要我们提防盗火行者的行动。
en: He sent a message earlier, carried by thunder, warning us to watch out for the Flame Reaver's actions.

ch: 假如翁法罗斯与天外的隔绝的确是{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}降下的诅咒，那今天过后，你们就能重返家园了。
en: If the curse separating Amphoreus from the world beyond the sky is truly {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}'s doing, then you'll be able to return home after their fall.

ch: 请打倒冷漠的{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}晨昏之眼{RUBY_E#}，还翁法罗斯一片仁爱的天空吧。
en: Please defeat the indifferent {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Eye of Twilight{RUBY_E#}, and restore a compassionate sky to Amphoreus.

ch: 她也是奥赫玛，乃至整个翁法罗斯的骄傲。另外……
en: She's not just the pride of Okhema, but all of Amphoreus as well. And furthermore...

ch: 刚才那句话就是我发自内心的赞许，{NICKNAME}。要是那时我没有听从自己的直觉，信任你和丹恒，奥赫玛现在不知道会变成什么模样……
en: That praise was heartfelt, {NICKNAME}. Had I not trusted my instincts and put my faith in you and Dan Heng, it's hard to imagine what might have become of Okh-

ch: 风堇姐姐！愿迈德漠斯捍卫你！
en: Miss Hyacine! May Mydeimos protect you!

ch: 根据史料记载：信仰艾格勒的文明掌握着先进的科技。加上地理位置占优，天空之城是黄金战争中唯一能与悬锋城正面对抗的势力。
en: According to historical records, the civilization that worshiped Aquila once mastered advanced technology, which made their strategically located Sky Castrum the only force that could face Castrum Kremnos head-on in the Chrysos War.

ch: 但她没能终结艾格勒，归还「天空」的火种。有人说，她以自身封印了神明的怒火，将它囚禁在晨昏之眼深处，永世支撑翁法罗斯的苍穹。
en: Yet she still could not end Aquila nor bring back the Coreflame of Sky. Some say she sealed the wrath of the god within herself, trapping them deep within the Eye of Twilight to support the heavens of Amphoreus forever.

ch: 在天空城邦的习俗中，它连接着翁法罗斯的天幕，天象画壁呈现出的气候，将会转映为现实中的天气。
en: The Sky city believes that mural to be connected to Amphoreus's sky, and any weather condition depicted on it will become actual weather.

ch: 这么做，不会对奥赫玛产生影响么？
en: Wouldn't this affect Okhema?

ch: 不必担心，恐怕天象画壁早已失去了以前的作用。奥赫玛的白天，倚仗的也是刻法勒背上的黎明机器。
en: Don't worry. The mural probably lost its original function ages ago. Okhema's light comes from the Dawn Device shouldered by Kephale anyway.

ch: 我直面过天空的暴君，它的怒火足以熔化天穹——并非夸大其词，因为翁法罗斯的苍天即是它的权柄。
en: I have faced down the tyrant of the sky. It is no hyperbole that their raging fire is capable of melting the firmament. Amphoreus's heavens exist because of their authority.

ch: 好像和我翻阅过的所有翁法罗斯神话，都联系不起来。
en: It doesn't seem to match any of the Amphorean myths I've read.

ch: 据我们所知，正是艾格勒对世间降下了诅咒，禁止翁法罗斯人触碰天空之外的世界。
en: As far as we know, it was Aquila that placed the curse on this world, preventing Amphoreans from ever reaching the realm beyond the sky.

ch: 也许对神话的解读是错误的…想阻止翁法罗斯人接触天外之界的，可能另有其人。
en: Perhaps the interpretation of the myth is inaccurate... It might be someone else who seeks to prevent Amphoreans from reaching the world beyond the sky.

ch: 他们退化成了失去理性，同类相残的兽。不…这种说法是对兽性的侮辱。即便在翁法罗斯最荒蛮的山林间，我和索拉比斯亦从未目睹过那般疯狂。
en: They regressed into senseless beasts that devoured their own kin. No... that would be an insult to beasts. Solabis and I have never witnessed such madness, not even in the wildest corners of Amphoreus.

ch: 为了阻止艾格勒将整个翁法罗斯的天幕作为武器砸向大地，英雄塞涅俄丝选择牺牲自己，封印泰坦……
en: To prevent Aquila from using the sky of Amphoreus as a weapon to crush the earth, the hero Seliose chose to sacrifice herself, sealing the Titan in the process...

ch: 而且，*我们*和姐妹们之所以会离开雅努萨波利斯，就是为了给翁法罗斯带去希望和奇迹。而要把奇迹带入现实，光靠*我们*的力量可远远不够呀。
en: The reason we left Janusopolis was to bring hope and miracles to Amphoreus. But to turn those miracles into reality, our strength alone won't be enough.

ch: 奥赫玛的黎明…落幕了……
en: Okhema's Dawn has come to an end...

ch: 这…就是奥赫玛的末日吗……
en: Is this... the end for Okhema...?

ch: 意外才是我们旅途中的常量，无论如何，我们会陪奥赫玛走到最后关头。
en: The unexpected is always part of our journey. We'll stay with Okhema until the end, no matter what.

ch: 抱歉，阿格莱雅…我答应过你，要把「再创世」的选择留给翁法罗斯的人们……
en: Apologies, Aglaea... I promised you that I would leave the choice of Era Nova to the people of Amphoreus...

ch: 就在刚才，我们离开晨昏之眼以后…我感觉翁法罗斯的水体和我切断了联系。
en: Just now, after we left the Eye of Twilight... I felt the waters of Amphoreus severing their connection with me.

ch: 盗火行者……
en: The Flame Reaver...

ch: 若是如此，那你本应站在黄金裔身旁！为何要阻挠我们，「盗火行者」？
en: If so, you should be standing alongside the Chrysos Heirs! Why do you hinder us, "Flame Reaver"?

ch: 还远没到放松的时候…那盗火行者精通各种诡术，就算是万敌也不一定能限制住它的行动。
en: It's too early to relax... The Flame Reaver is a master in the art of deceit. Even Mydei may not be able to restrain them.

ch: 缇宝没有跟来…她是打算留在上层帮助万敌么？
en: Tribbie didn't follow us... Does she intend to stay above to help Mydei?

ch: 恐怕这就是翁法罗斯的末世了，哈托努斯。只有一个办法能拯救家园……
en: I fear this is Amphoreus's end, Chartonus. There is only one way to save our home...

ch: 嗯…记忆的质料，留存于翁法罗斯的万物之间。哪怕是一砖一瓦，也保留有许多往世的痕迹。
en: Yes... the textures of memories are preserved within all things in Amphoreus. Even a single brick or tile holds countless traces of the past.

ch: 记忆的质料，留存于翁法罗斯的万物之间…哪怕是一砖一瓦，也保留有许多往事的痕迹。
en: The textures of memories are preserved within all things in Amphoreus... Even a single brick or tile holds countless traces of the past.

ch: 难不成，万敌……
en: Don't tell me that Mydei...

ch: 前方不知是否还有盗火行者的分身…{NICKNAME}，护在白厄身边吧，以保不备。
en: We don't know if the Flame Reaver has any clones up ahead... {NICKNAME}, stay close to Phainon and keep him safe.

ch: 翁法罗斯人总把「宿命」挂在嘴边…那「开拓」的宿命，就是总会把每个世界的存亡与我们自身系在一起。
en: Amphoreans often speak of "destiny"... The destiny of the Trailblaze is to bind the life and death of every world to our own existence.

ch: 盗火行者在城内作乱，他还有诸多分身——泽弗，请找人通知克拉特鲁斯，让他带着最精英的卫士守在城内的关口——
en: The Flame Reaver is wreaking havoc in the city, and they still have many clones. Zeph, please get someone to inform Krateros, and have him lead the most elite guards to defend the city's passages...

ch: 征伐艾格勒以前，我做了最坏的准备。即便奥赫玛终有一日会被黑潮攻陷……
en: I prepared for the worst before the fight against Aquila. Even if there came a day when Okhema was taken by the black tide...

ch: 而在第二个故事里，丹恒和我讲到了那几位为「监狱星」付出了生命的无名客。我很清楚，你们两个甘愿为翁法罗斯做出同样的选择。
en: In the second story, Dan Heng told me about the few Nameless who sacrificed their lives for the "prison world." I know very well that the two of you are willing to make the same choice for Amphoreus.

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我绝不会让你们的旅途在这里画上句号，{NICKNAME}。</color>在翁法罗斯人从未触及的天外，还有很多人在等着你们回家。
en: <color=#dbc291ff>I won't let your journey end here, {NICKNAME}.</color> Somewhere beyond the sky, where Amphoreans have never reached, there are many people waiting for you to come home.

ch: 缇宁大人的百界门就开在奥赫玛的城外大道，{NICKNAME}阁下。
en: Lady Trinnon's Century Gate is open on the main street outside Okhema's walls, {NICKNAME}.

ch: 奥赫玛的夜幕降临时…所有的灵水也都随之枯涸了。*我们*猜到你会着急，所以才提前来这里等着。
en: When Okhema's night descended... all the spirit water dried up along with it. We anticipated that you'd be on edge, so we came ahead to wait for you.

ch: 巴特鲁斯…小白还不知道奥赫玛永昼的真相。
en: Bartholos... Snowy still doesn't know the truth behind Okhema's eternal daylight.

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>赛法利娅那丫头，用一个伟大的谎言骗过了整个翁法罗斯——</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>That girl, Cifera, spun a grand lie that deceived all of Amphoreus...</color>

ch: 她骗过了你们所有人，<color=#dbc291ff>让你们相信刻法勒背上那个大球会永远照亮奥赫玛……</color>
en: She tricked all of you <color=#dbc291ff>into believing that that giant ball on Kephale's back would cast light over Okhema forever...</color>

ch: 所以，千年以来…维系奥赫玛永昼的并非刻法勒的神迹，而是赛飞儿以「诡计」的神权编织的谎言……
en: So, for the last thousand years... what maintained Okhema's eternal daylight was not Kephale's miracle, but Cipher's lie woven using the divine authority of Trickery...

ch: 桀桀桀…看来你的机灵程度也有限呀，小鬼。别忘了，本大爷可是翁法罗斯的十二泰坦之一……
en: Heeheehee... Guess you're not as smart as I thought, brat. Don't forget. I am one of the Twelve Titans of Amphoreus...

ch: 记好咯——拯救了翁法罗斯的，不是刻法勒那个呆子的恩泽，也不是欧洛尼斯那个娃娃的呓语……
en: Remember this well... What saved Amphoreus wasn't the grace of that simpleton Kephale, nor was it the babbling of that child Oronyx...

ch: 为、为什么？！人家以为奥赫玛是安全的！
en: Wh—Why!? I thought Okhema was safe!

ch: 随着「理性」与「死亡」的火种得到归还，眼下还需讨伐的泰坦只剩下{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}。白厄委托我们复现时空，反复挑战盗火行者磨练自身。逐火之旅成功在即，圣城却异变突生……
en: Following the return of the Coreflames of Reason and Death, {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} is the only Titan that we still need to campaign against. Phainon asks us to recreate the past, and he repeatedly challenges the Flame Reaver to hone his abilities. The Flame-Chase Journey's triumphant conclusion draws nigh, yet a sudden disturbance occurs in the holy city...

ch: 与此同时，赛飞儿在龙骸古城与循火种而来的盗火行者周旋许久，最终不敌遭其杀害。但她早已设计将刻法勒火种交予贼灵巴特鲁斯，命它伺机将火种交付白厄等人。
en: At the same time in the city of the dead dragon's bones, Cipher contends with the Flame Reaver who comes seeking the Coreflame. Though she holds out for some time, she is no match and is slain in the end. But she had already given Kephale's Coreflame to Spirithief Bartholos, ordering them to wait for an opportunity to deliver the Coreflame to Phainon and the others.

ch: 伴随着赛飞儿的离去，「诡计」神力消散，因其谎言得以维续的奥赫玛千年黎明结束了。圣城遭到黑潮无情入侵，强大的盗火行者也步步紧逼。
en: Following Cipher's death, the divine power of Trickery dissipates, and the thousand-year dawn of Okhema that is sustained by her lie comes to an end. The holy city is met with the merciless invasion of the black tide, as the powerful Flame Reaver moves in ever closer.

ch: 盗火行者没有追来…真的是某种奇迹显灵了么？
en: The Flame Reaver isn't pursuing us... Could this really be some kind of divine intervention?

ch: 请您放心，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。黑塔女士同我正是为了翁法罗斯而来。
en: Rest assured, {NICKNAME}. Madam Herta and I have come here for the sake of Amphoreus.

ch: 两位所在之地，翁法罗斯，<color=#dbc291ff>是一个由数据和忆质构建的世界，一位星神的实验场。</color>
en: The place where you stand, Amphoreus, <color=#dbc291ff>is a world constructed from data and memoria, an experimental field of a certain Aeon.</color>

ch: 结论：假如放任翁法罗斯的进程不受限制地推移……
en: Conclusion: If Amphoreus continues unchecked on this course...

ch: 略去个中繁杂的推演，我向二位提出请求：为阻止「毁灭」的怒火席卷寰宇，恳请一位无名客能留在翁法罗斯，承担内应。
en: Putting aside the complex details of the inferences involved, I have a request to make, for one of you Nameless, to stay behind on Amphoreus, acting as an informant, in order to prevent the wrath of Destruction from ravaging the cosmos.

ch: 如果和那位机器先生说的一样，翁法罗斯注定会走向「毁灭」的结局…那人家也要陪伴在你身边，直到最后一刻。
en: If what that machine gentleman said is true, if Amphoreus is destined for destruction... then I'll stay by your side until the very end.

ch: 毕竟，就像列车之于你和丹恒…翁法罗斯也是人家的故乡呀。
en: Like how you and Dan Heng treasure the Express... Amphoreus means everything to me.

ch: 告诉我：{NICKNAME}能不为翁法罗斯的规则制约，平安返回{F#她}{M#他}的家乡。
en: Promise me {NICKNAME} can return safely to {M#his}{F#her} homeland, unbound by Amphoreus's laws.

ch: 以神礼观众之名，我见到：翁法罗斯已选择了她的命运。
en: As the Theoros, I declare: Amphoreus has determined her path.

ch: 请允许我重新自我介绍：我名为吕枯耳戈斯，过去是为奥赫玛元老院的名誉元老。身为「神礼观众」，我将见证并捍卫奥赫玛全体公民自由，直到最后一刻。
en: Allow me to reintroduce myself. I am Lycurgus, once an honored elder of the Okhema Council. As the Theoros, I have sworn to watch over and protect every citizen of Okhema until the very end.

ch: 当然，我知道仅是这样的回答不能满足阁下的好奇心。因此，我愿附上这样一条信息——它对翁法罗斯而言并无价值，但对您这样的天外行者则意义重大。
en: Of course, that alone won't satisfy your curiosity. So let me share something more... something that means little to Amphoreus, but everything to a traveler like yourself.

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>吕枯耳戈斯是万千「智识」行者的一员：它代博识尊将目光投向此地，以免翁法罗斯落入衰败的命运。</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>I, Lycurgus, am one of the Erudition's many pathstriders. Through me, Nous keeps watch over this realm, working to save Amphoreus from decay.</color>

ch: 那过去的，我已如实陈述；那未来的，我将公平见证。对于神礼观众之名，还有翁法罗斯和她的命运，我问心无愧。
en: What's done, I've told truthfully. What's to come, I'll witness fairly. My conscience is clear... to my role as the Theoros, to Amphoreus and her destiny.

ch: 你熟悉的阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下，也提出过类似的观点：翁法罗斯的一切，都是凭借「智种」在后人的记忆中诞生。
en: As your acquaintance Lord Anaxagoras suggested: everything in Amphoreus exists through Nouspores, living in the memories of those yet to come.

ch: 当然，我不准备探讨树庭的哲学，不妨把视线投向更远处吧。超脱于翁法罗斯，那被世人称作禁忌的天外……
en: But let's set aside the Grove's teachings for now, look further, past Amphoreus, to what they call the forbidden realms beyond the sky...

ch: 呵呵，这下您终于要踏入「翁法罗斯」的真相了。
en: Now, we come to the real truth of Amphoreus.

ch: 请相信他拯救奥赫玛的决心。
en: Believe in his resolve to save Okhema.

ch: 如何？阁下所见的风景，正是背负{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}火种的无名英雄的故乡：<color=#dbc291ff>哀丽秘榭</color>。
en: Beautiful, isn't it? This is <color=#dbc291ff>Aedes Elysiae</color>, home of the nameless hero who carried {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame.

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>扮作贯穿白厄一生中最重要的伙伴，一位始终指引其前进、却不曾在翁法罗斯历史中留名的「无名英雄」，在最佳位置欣赏这段旅程。</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>Become his lifelong closest friend, witnessing his hero's journey from the best seat in the house, as the nameless hero whose unwavering guidance shaped Phainon's destiny, yet whose name was never recorded in Amphoreus's history.</color>

ch: 孩子总是幸福的，觉得神明注意不到哀丽秘榭的小角落，会对我们睁一只眼、闭一只眼……
en: Ah, the blessing of childhood. Believing the gods might not notice our little corner of Aedes Elysiae, willing to let our small deceits slide...

ch: 哀丽秘榭的小校舍只有您一位老师，是太辛苦了。
en: With you being our only teacher in Aedes Elysiae, you must be working so hard.

ch: 还以为扔到海水里的许愿瓶，能把我们的心愿带到哀丽秘榭外面的世界，或者能带来一些回音……
en: You know what's funny? I really thought tossing that bottle into the sea would carry our wishes beyond Aedes Elysiae... maybe even bring something back to us...

ch: 要说哀丽秘榭最让人留恋的地方，除了大树下的秋千架，就是这儿了。
en: You know, besides the swing under the big tree, this has to be my favorite spot in all of Aedes Elysiae.

ch: 被连绵的山和海包围的哀丽秘榭，小时候还在纸上画过这里的风景。
en: I remember drawing Aedes Elysiae as a child, nestled between the sea and the mountains.

ch: 不过，占卜的次数多了，反倒会对命运产生迷茫。说着对神谕笃信不疑，但真要离开哀丽秘榭的话……
en: But here's the thing. The more divinations I do, the more doubt creeps in. I want to believe the prophecies, but actually leaving Aedes Elysiae...

ch: 你是说，「迷路迷境」里的…？
en: The ones from Membrance Maze, you mean?

ch: 迷路迷境？
en: The Membrance Maze?

ch: 只要沿着树洞爬一小段距离，穿过最狭窄的地方，就到它们的栖息地「迷路迷境」啦。
en: Once you get through the tight squeeze in the hollow, you'll reach their dwelling, the Membrance Maze.

ch: 不如担心一下，自己会不会被小妖精们拒绝吧。毕竟，迷路迷境实行的是「邀请制」，只有天真无邪的孩子才能进入呢。
en: Maybe worry more about whether the fairies will let you in! After all the Membrance Maze has an "invitation-only" rule, only children with pure hearts are welcomed.

ch: 「迷路迷境的最深处，揭晓未来答案的地方。」
en: "In Membrance Maze depths we seek to find, the answers future left behind."

ch: 粉色…在我印象里，迷路迷境似乎从来没有过粉色的妖精，不知道多哆啦迷有没有见过？
en: Pink ones? That's strange. I don't recall any pink fairies in the Membrance Maze. Have you seen any, Chief Dolimem?

ch: …就不得不取消了。如果灾难将至，我们还是留在哀丽秘榭为好，以防万一。
en: ...will have to be cancelled. If disaster's coming, we should stay in Aedes Elysiae, just to be safe.

ch: 我和白厄本来只打算离开村子一小段时间，学些本领回来。他要去悬锋城锻炼，我打算去雅努萨波利斯，接受命运泰坦的洗礼……
en: We weren't planning to be gone for long... just enough time to hone our abilities. Phainon would train in Castrum Kremnos, while I would seek the Fate Titans' blessing in Janusopolis...

ch: 学成之后，我们就回哀丽秘榭，保护村子的和平不受侵扰。
en: Then we'd return to Aedes Elysiae, to help keep our village safe.

ch: 哀丽秘榭离流血的世界太远了…这种传奇故事，实在无法不引人遐想啊。
en: Stories of such bloodshed like this feel so distant from Aedes Elysiae... but they sure can stir the imagination.

ch: 小小的哀丽秘榭，一昔之间降临了无数或尊贵、或传奇的人物：织者、门匠、君王、羁客、侍女、医师、学士……
en: The sleepy village of Aedes Elysiae in just one fleeting moment, welcomed an array of legendary figures: the Weaver, Gatekeeper, Ruler, Traveler, Servant, Healer, and Scholar...

ch: 他们的话语，和那言语中逐一流露的「心愿」，为哀丽秘榭出身的少年勾勒出对外界最初的想象。
en: Their stories and wishes showed the village boy glimpses of a world larger than he'd ever imagined.

ch: 这群丑陋的虫豸，不配假借着「人治」的名头再出现在奥赫玛了。
en: These crawling parasites have no place in Okhema, especially not under the deceitful claim of "human rule."

ch: 树庭女孩呢？
en: What about our friend from the Grove?

ch: 我也是这样想的，这些心愿…并不是沉重的东西，相反，像哀丽秘榭的孩子们喜欢的糖果纸，在有阳光的地方更加闪闪发亮。
en: I can't disagree with you. These wishes aren't weights to bear. They're like those candy wrappers the Aedes Elysiae children love, shining even brighter when bathed in sunlight.

ch: 刚才您不是说，翁法罗斯大灾将至吗？倘若如此，我和昔涟应该会一直留在哀丽秘榭才对，又怎会与形形色色的人相遇？
en: Didn't you say disaster would strike Amphoreus? If so, shouldn't Cyrene and I stay in Aedes Elysiae? How could we possibly meet all these people?

ch: 或许是他们来到了哀丽秘榭。
en: Perhaps they'll come to Aedes Elysiae?

ch: 如果是这样的话，那…哀丽秘榭的大家该由谁来保护呢？
en: If that's true, then... who will protect everyone in Aedes Elysiae?

ch: 您、您的意思是…哀丽秘榭，也要被卷入预言中的浩劫了吗？
en: Y—You mean... Aedes Elysiae will be swept up in the prophesied catastrophe?

ch: 孩子们，请躲在迷路迷境里，不要踏出此地半步。否则，你们二人一定也会被那恐怖的灾厄吞噬哪。
en: My children, take shelter in the Membrance Maze. One step outside and this horror will consume you both.

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「黑潮」，这就是灾厄的真面目。它将吞噬世间万物，惟有迷路迷境能够幸免。</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>The "black tide." That's what this calamity truly is. It consumes all in its path, sparing none but the Membrance Maze.</color>

ch: 对不起，村长大人！哀丽秘榭陷入危机，身为她的孩子…我绝不能袖手旁观！
en: Forgive me, Chief! But Aedes Elysiae needs us... and as her child, I must act!

ch: （白厄也在。还有…万敌，缇宁？）
en: (Hold on. Phainon's here too? And is that Mydei and Trinnon?)

ch: 你脑子坏了吗？那金色头发的可是悬锋城的王子！要是惹他生气了…整座城邦的人都得没命！
en: Are you insane? That blond man is the crown prince of Kremnos! Mess with him, and every last person in the city could wind up dead!

ch: 阁下所见的景象，发生在光历<unbreak>4926</unbreak>年的门关月。彼时，悬锋王子迈德漠斯率领的孤军兵临奥赫玛城下。
en: Behold! It is the Month of Gate, Light Calendar <unbreak>4926</unbreak>. The crown prince of Kremnos, Mydeimos, has led his forces to the gates of Okhema.

ch: 正如你所知，迈德漠斯性情高傲，但并非崇尚暴力之人。他向圣城元老提出角斗，只为给族人争取权利，不教他们以低人一等的姿态寄居他乡。
en: As you know, though Mydeimos was proud, he did not engage in needless violence. He challenged the elders of Okhema to a duel, not for glory, but for the rights and dignity of his people. To ensure they wouldn't live as second-class citizens in foreign lands.

ch: 在阿格莱雅的斡旋下，白厄作为代表接受了迈德漠斯的挑战。这场「角斗」将改变逐火的进程……
en: After Aglaea's mediation, Phainon met Mydeimos's challenge as the elders' representative. This duel was to change the course of the Flame-Chase Journey itself...

ch: 对于逐火之旅，每一位黄金裔都不可或缺。无论是你，还是那位悬锋的王子，都浮现在神谕描绘的图景里。
en: Every Chrysos Heir is indispensable to the Flame-Chase Journey. And you and the crown prince of Kremnos are both a part of the prophecy.

ch: 怕你不知情，我多嘴一句：在悬锋城，你这小偷般的发言已是对角斗的亵渎，当受穿刺之刑。
en: For your information, in Castrum Kremnos, the punishment for profaning a duel with such crooked words is impalement.

ch: 悬锋印戒，我族的至宝。它就是我的选择。
en: The Signet of Kremnos, the crown jewel of our people. That's my choice.

ch: 你只需知道，悬锋千年的荣耀，足以令一位泰坦为之倾倒，碾碎你这无名小卒的灵魂！
en: Just know that Kremnos's thousand years of glory could bring a Titan to its knees, let alone a nobody like you!

ch: （这也是日后，万敌背负的宿命……）
en: (And the very destiny that Mydei himself will eventually shoulder...)

ch: 理智告诉我，这些还远远不够。哀丽秘榭只是个小村庄，在翁法罗斯面前，它的消逝不过是一道无足轻重的伤疤。
en: Speaking rationally, I know it's not nearly enough. Aedes Elysiae was just a small village, its loss barely a scar on Amphoreus's face.

ch: 这还是我认识的翁法罗斯吗？
en: Did I stumble into the wrong Amphoreus?

ch: 因为我也忘不了哀丽秘榭的田野、红叶，树下有我的小秋千，我会在上面做甜甜的梦。还有迷路迷境的小妖精们，想到再也见不到它们，心就会很痛很痛……
en: I am with you because I remember it all too. The fields of Aedes Elysiae, those red leaves, that little swing of mine beneath the tree where I'd dream the sweetest dreams. And those dear fairies in the Lost Maze... It hurts so much knowing they're gone forever...

ch: 这场角斗关乎圣城的明天，既然站在这里，我就要为它摘得胜利。
en: The fate of Okhema hangs on this duel. I must claim victory, for their sake.

ch: 「——哀丽秘榭的来者，无名的英雄。」
en: "One from Aedes Elysiae, the Nameless Hero."

ch: 奥赫玛和悬锋孤军实力悬殊，可我方竟无一人阵亡，这恐怕并非巧合吧。
en: The Kremnoans far outmatch Okhema's forces, yet we haven't lost a single soul. That's no accident, is it?

ch: 看来奥赫玛也不像传闻中那么迂腐。比起圣城元老，在场各位更理解力量的本质。
en: Perhaps Okhema isn't as hidebound as the rumors say. You grasp the true marrow of power more clearly than those Elders.

ch: 历史会记下这一刻，神谕中的黄金裔已悉数就位，它喻示着翁法罗斯终将到来的黎明。
en: History shall remember this moment. The prophesied Chrysos Heirs now stand assembled, heralding a new dawn for Amphoreus.

ch: 西方有悬锋孤军坐镇，短时间内不会失守。那刻夏老师生前在北方和东方布下法阵，作用犹未可知，但我相信他。至于奥赫玛……
en: The west stands protected by Mydei's Kremnoans. It will hold for the time being. Professor Anaxa deployed wards in the north and east before... Their effectiveness is untested, but I believe in him. And Okhema...

ch: 所以，这是我们看{RUBY_B#奥赫玛}她{RUBY_E#}的最后一眼了。
en: So... this is the last time we'll see {RUBY_B#Okhema}her{RUBY_E#}.

ch: 翁法罗斯的愿望，如此不讲道理呢？
en: ...Why must Amphoreus's wishes be so... cruel?

ch: 黑潮已临奥赫玛城下，翁法罗斯的时间所剩无几……
en: The black tide has reached Okhema. Amphoreus does not have much time left...

ch: 所谓的「救世主」，不过是翁法罗斯误以为自己能够反抗命运，一厢情愿的可悲幻觉哪。
en: ...that the so-called "Deliverer" is nothing more than Amphoreus's own delusion, a pitiful fantasy that it could defy fate's decree.

ch: 亦或者，您可以直接迈向最后的真相：<color=#dbc291ff>一睹您所扮演的角色真容，并见证黄金裔、逐火之旅与翁法罗斯轮回的终极本质。</color>
en: Or perhaps, you can simply walk straight to the final truth: <color=#dbc291ff>See the true face of the character you play, and witness the ultimate nature of the Chrysos Heirs, Flame-Chase Journey, and the cycles of Amphoreus.</color>

ch: 你疯了，万敌！哪怕你是不死之身，哪怕你已成为「纷争」的半神……
en: Are you crazy, Mydei!? Immortal or not, even if you're the demigod of Strife...

ch: 您就一定能令翁法罗斯停滞的命运，再度流动……
en: You can make Amphoreus's frozen fate flow once again...

ch: 感到不知所措么？如您所见，此情此景正是戏剧《翁法罗斯》的最后篇章……
en: Feeling a bit lost? As you now see, this scene marks the final act of the drama "Amphoreus"...

ch: 这一次，在{M#他}{F#她}的指引下，英雄将作出如何抉择，全世命运又将流向何方？还有，翁法罗斯一切的终极本质又是什么？……
en: And this time, under {M#his}{F#her} guidance, what choice shall the hero make? Whither shall the fate of the world flow? And what is the ultimate truth of the nature of Amphoreus...?

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>他就是方才无数记忆的主人，此时此刻踏入涡心的另一位贵客，已将自我燃成焦炭的——盗火行者！</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>The master of the countless memories we saw, the other important actor now stepping into the Vortex, they who have already burnt their own self to cinder — the Flame Reaver!</color>

ch: 啊，一个完全数，多么绝妙的巧合。你我都心知肚明，在这三千万世徒劳中，翁法罗斯从未发生改变。
en: Ah, a perfect number. How poetic. You and I both know the truth: In all these millions of futile endeavors, Amphoreus has never changed.

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>名为「翁法罗斯」的永恒之地，正是那台权杖漫长而孤独的演算——</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>The Eternal Land known as "Amphoreus" is nothing more than the Scepter's endless, lonely extrapolation...</color>

ch: 翁法罗斯的愿望，如此不讲道理呢？
en: ...Why must Amphoreus's wishes be so... cruel?

ch: 那是「翁法罗斯」在哭泣吗？
en: Is that Amphoreus crying?

ch: 它的帷幕仿佛能装下整个翁法罗斯，光怪陆离的戏剧在其中上演……
en: The curtain seemed to contain all of Amphoreus, where strange and fantastic dramas played out within...

ch: 原来这才是天空被封闭的原因，翁法罗斯也只是更大的哀丽秘榭……
en: So, this is the reason the sky was sealed. Amphoreus is merely a larger Aedes Elysiae...

ch: 这是值得为宇宙铭记的一刻。千万次演算过后，名为「翁法罗斯」的实验场，终于迎来了成果。
en: This is a moment the universe will remember. After millions of extrapolations, the experimental environment known as "Amphoreus" has finally achieved results.

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>这便是翁法罗斯计算的终点，一道完美的「毁灭」方程式。</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>This is the endpoint of Amphoreus's calculations: a perfect equation of Destruction.</color>

ch: 呵呵，奇怪的问题。你可曾想过，在千万次演算中，翁法罗斯已然踏上不同于「智识」的另一条命途。它也早已将神明的赐福，平等地分给了每个孩子……
en: Heh, curious question. Have you ever considered that, after millions of extrapolations, Amphoreus is already following a different Path from the Erudition? It has long since granted divine blessings equally to each child...

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>那就是诸位体内流淌的金血，它源自与「毁灭」同名的负创神。翁法罗斯的黄金裔，从最初就是星神燃烧宇宙的柴薪啊。</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>The golden blood flowing in your veins... It comes from The Blemished One, whose name is "Destruction" itself. And Amphoreus's Chrysos Heirs were, from the very beginning, fuel for the Aeon to burn the universe.</color>

ch: 就像你说的，翁法罗斯只是一场实验，我们是局中人，只能沿着既定的轨迹，走向被星星注视的结局……
en: Like you said, Amphoreus is just an experiment, and we're the participants. We can only walk along the predetermined path toward the ending under the watchful eyes of the stars...

ch: 但那也意味着，会向翁法罗斯投来瞥视的「星神」，肯定不止一位吧？
en: But that also means that there isn't just one Aeon who can cast THEIR glance at Amphoreus, right?

ch: 翁法罗斯的命运，不止「毁灭」一种结局。
en: Destruction is not the only outcome for the fate of Amphoreus.

ch: 我明白。就让我踏入轮回，延续翁法罗斯的计算…欺骗众神，欺骗这个世界。
en: I understand. Then let me step into the cycles and continue Amphoreus's grand design: to deceive the gods, deceive the world itself.

ch: 直到翁法罗斯，迎来真正的黎明。
en: Until Amphoreus welcomes a true dawn.

ch: …倘若我们终究无法冲破这座囚笼，我会坚守。直到有人前来打破这漫长的轮回，为翁法罗斯的命运添上结尾。
en: ...If we can never break free from this prison, I will stand my ground. Until the day someone shatters this endless cycle and writes the final chapter of Amphoreus's fate.

ch: 哀丽秘榭，儿时的小村庄，微风和涛声依旧。
en: Aedes Elysiae, the little village of my childhood. The gentle breeze and the sound of waves still linger.

ch: 你知道，这里只是记忆的一角，真正的哀丽秘榭……
en: You know, this is just a corner of the memory. The real Aedes Elysiae...

ch: 逐火之旅，乃至整个翁法罗斯，都不过是「星神」梦中的泡影？
en: The Flame-Chase Journey, and even all of Amphoreus, are nothing but illusions in an Aeon's dreams?

ch: 但这一次，翁法罗斯迎来了命运的转折。
en: But this time, Amphoreus encountered a turning point in its fate.

ch: 人们遵守约定，让你接过了所有的火种。这一世，在缇里西庇俄丝之后，翁法罗斯没有一名半神诞生。
en: The people kept their promise and handed you all the Coreflames. In this world, after Tribios, no demigods were born in Amphoreus.

ch: 这事和你无关，树庭男孩。退下吧，我可不想有人受伤哪。
en: This is none of your business, Grove boy. Step aside, I don't want anyone getting hurt.

ch: 窃火的盗贼…你们真以为，靠虚张声势就能镇住树庭的贤人？
en: Coreflame thieves... You really think you can scare off a Sage of the Grove with nothing but empty threats?

ch: 要本大爷说…你自己就是翁法罗斯天大的祸患！
en: If you ask me... you're the greatest disaster Amphoreus has ever known!

ch: 万敌…你对我的称呼始终没有变过。
en: Mydei... your name for me has never changed.

ch: 有趣。告诉我，往日的迈德漠斯在面对你时，可曾退缩过？
en: Interesting. Tell me, when the Mydeimoses of the past faced you, did they ever retreat?

ch: 如果你能胜出，去告诉来世的迈德漠斯：此人是可敬的对手，切记使出全力，不得怠慢。
en: If you win, tell the Mydeimos of the next life: This person is a worthy opponent, so always remember to give it your all and never slack off.

ch: 它理应照亮众人，照亮前路，照亮翁法罗斯终将到来的黎明……
en: It should shine upon all, light the path ahead, and illuminate the dawn of Amphoreus that's to come...

ch: 但…如果只是与翁法罗斯毫不相干的旅人，未必会理解我们的挣扎，并甘愿投入这场抗争。
en: But... if it's just a traveler with no connection to Amphoreus, they may not understand our struggles, nor be willing to join this fight.

ch: 可现在，这具躯壳竟承载了足足四千八百万枚火种…我想，过不了太久——或许只要短短万年的时光——它便会被烧成{RUBY_B#盗火行者}哀毁骨立的焦炭{RUBY_E#}了吧。
en: And yet now, this fragile body holds a staggering forty-eight million Coreflames... I suppose it won't be long — perhaps just a fleeting ten thousand years — before it's reduced to nothing but {RUBY_B#Flame Reaver}charred, crumbling bones{RUBY_E#}.

ch: 为翁法罗斯…带来玫瑰色的黎明。
en: May they bring Amphoreus... a rosy-fingered dawn.

ch: 这就是翁法罗斯的愤怒吗？如果冥冥之中，它的选择早已注定……
en: Is this Amphoreus's wrath? If its choice has already been made, if fate is set in stone...

ch: 直到另一轮太阳在遥远的地平升起，为翁法罗斯带来真正的黎明。
en: Until another sun rises on the distant horizon, bringing the true dawn to Amphoreus.

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我会燃烧…会燃尽。我会成为这一世的盗火行者，履行和昔涟的约定。</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>I will burn... and fade away. I will become the Flame Reaver of this life and keep my promise to Cyrene.</color>

ch: 还记得吗？在最初的时间线里，你和迈德漠斯曾在公正天秤前展开「角斗」，称量各自心中「比世界的命运更为沉重之物」。
en: Do you remember? In that first timeline, you and Mydeimos stood before the Scales of Justice, locked in a "duel," each of you weighing what you held dearest, "what weighed more than the fate of the world."

ch: 我会成为翁法罗斯的黎明。
en: I will be the dawn of Amphoreus.

ch: 迈德漠斯……
en: Mydeimos...

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>这扇门的背后是「翁法罗斯」，它绝对不是一个温柔的世界。</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>That door leads to Amphoreus. Trust me, it's anything but welcoming.</color>

ch: 我决定走进这扇门，进入翁法罗斯。
en: I'm going through that gate, into Amphoreus.

ch: 所以，既然这扇门背后就是翁法罗斯，那我没有理由不追上去。而只要我们三人整整齐齐，就没什么克服不了的困难。
en: That's why I need to go through... Amphoreus or not. When the three of us are together, there's nothing we can't handle.

ch: 既然翁法罗斯是你的故乡…如果有办法能帮助你，我和我的同伴一定会尽力而为的。
en: Since Amphoreus is your homeland... if there's a way to help you, my companions and I will do everything we can.

ch: 比如在树庭时，你是不是对我许过…「变成少女」之类的心愿？
en: Like... Didn't you wish for me to turn into a pretty girl back at the Grove?

ch: 哀丽秘榭，真安静呀……
en: Aedes Elysiae is so quiet...

ch: 下一次「再创世」后，翁法罗斯就会坠入「毁灭」的结局……
en: Amphoreus will fall into an ending of "Destruction" after the next "Era Nova"...

ch: 哀丽秘榭是被「岁月」包裹的小村庄。在这里，我们或许能和外界取得联系。
en: Aedes Elysiae is a little village enclosed by Time. We might be able to contact the outside world from here.

ch: 时间紧迫，我会用你熟知的概念说明：名为翁法罗斯的世界，实为绝灭大君「铁墓」自我演算、成长的实验场。
en: Time is running out, so I'll explain in terms you understand: this world, Amphoreus, is in fact a testing ground where the Lord Ravager, Irontomb, evolves through self-extrapolation.

ch: 潜伏在翁法罗斯的铁墓是「源代码」——这台权杖就是它的培养皿。
en: The version of Irontomb hiding in Amphoreus is its "source code." And this Scepter is its incubator.

ch: 听仔细了，小家伙——翁法罗斯内外的时间流速相去甚远，「毁灭」迫在眉睫，但你还有机会当一回救世主……
en: So listen closely, little one. The speed of time is different in Amphoreus compared to the outside. Destruction is just about to arrive, but you can still play Deliverer one last time...

ch: 逻辑：「权杖」有着极其严密的自主协议，管理员也必须接受限制。在翁法罗斯，这道终极协议有另一重命名——
en: Deduction: The Scepter has an extremely strict autonomous protocol, restricting even its Administrator. In Amphoreus, this Ultimate Protocol goes by another name...

ch: 上一次回归的终点，丹恒先生并未与你一同进入新世界。已知：翁法罗斯内外时间流速并不一致。内部度过的千年，对于外界只是短短一瞬。
en: Mr. Dan Heng did not enter the new world with you at the end of the last cycle. Known: The flow of time inside and outside Amphoreus is not identical. A thousand years in this world may only be a fleeting second outside of it.

ch: 我和黑塔女士能捕捉到她的信号，却无法锁定位置。但可以确定的是，她仍在翁法罗斯。
en: Madam Herta and I can detect her signal, but cannot ascertain her location. What we can be sure of is that she's still in Amphoreus.

ch: 别担心，她身上的谜团多着呢。就算翁法罗斯炸了，她也能裹在冰里、完好无损地飘出来。不如先担心一下你自己吧。
en: Don't worry about her. She's absolutely chock-full of mysteries. Even if Amphoreus explodes, she'll probably float out perfectly protected in a nice thick layer of ice. Worry more about yourself instead.

ch: （去阁楼等昔涟吧，或者，我可以再多看哀丽秘榭一眼……）
en: (Should I head to the attic to wait for Cyrene... or should I have one last look at Aedes Elysiae...)

ch: （翁法罗斯还有太多没被揭开的秘密，但愿那其中埋藏着扭转一切的关键。）
en: (There are still too many secrets yet to be unveiled in Amphoreus. Here's hoping that one of those secrets can end up turning the whole situation around.)

ch: 就像你看见的，翁法罗斯所有被冠以英雄之名的人物，也都是身负缺陷的凡人。他们只是在每一个被世界需要的场合，恰到好处地出现在了那里。
en: You've seen how every person regarded as a hero in Amphoreus was nothing more than a flawed human. They were just at the right place at the right time when the world needed a hero.

ch: 为了联手解决危机，我作为内应留在翁法罗斯内部，丹恒则按原计划返回列车寻求帮助。不仅如此，螺丝咕姆还告诉我们，三月七也在早些时候被卷入了翁法罗斯。
en: To tackle the crisis together, I stayed behind in Amphoreus as an informant while Dan Heng returned to the Express as planned to seek help. On top of that, Screwllum informed us that March 7th had also been drawn into Amphoreus earlier.

ch: 不过，眼下当务之急是「再创世」。我很快抵达创世涡心，和白厄会合。「再创世」仪式本该在来古士主持下顺利进行，但盗火行者的出现再次让世界命运悬而未决。
en: However, the current priority was the "Era Nova." I quickly arrived at the Vortex of Genesis and met with Phainon. The "Era Nova" ritual was supposed to proceed smoothly under the guidance of Lygus, but the appearance of the Flame Reaver once again left the fate of the world hanging in the balance.

ch: 我们斩落对方面具，发现他的脸孔竟然与白厄无异。而当他的身体被仪式剑贯穿时，海量记忆喷涌而出，有关白厄、盗火行者和翁法罗斯的种种也终于浮出水面……
en: We struck down the enemy's mask, only to discover that his face was identical to Phainon's. When his body was pierced by the ceremonial blade, a flood of memories surged forth, revealing the truth about Phainon, the Flame Reaver, and Amphoreus...

ch: 原来，我们所有人都身处于白厄和昔涟创造的「永劫回归」中，而盗火行者就是背负无数火种后燃烧殆尽的白厄。他们的目的很简单：对抗星神，改写世界注定「毁灭」的结局。
en: It turned out that all of us were trapped in the "eternal recurrences" created by Phainon and Cyrene, and the Flame Reaver was Phainon himself, who had burned out after bearing countless Coreflames. Their goal was simple: To oppose the Aeon and rewrite the world's doomed fate of Destruction.

ch: 于是，在白厄的帮助下，翁法罗斯的岁月再次重置，可我却迷失在了时间乱流中。紧要关头，找回了全部记忆的迷迷以牺牲自己为代价，将我送回了时间起点……
en: Thus, with Phainon's help, time in Amphoreus reset once more, but I became lost in the chaotic flow of time. At the critical moment, Mem, who had regained all her memories, sacrificed herself to send me back to the beginning of time...

ch: 此地是翁法罗斯与现实宇宙的交界，是鄙人观察这场实验的观众席，您亦可称之为…<color=#dbc291ff>「神话之外」。</color>
en: This is the intersection between Amphoreus and the real universe, the audience seat where I observe this experiment. You can also call this location... the <color=#dbc291ff>"Exomyth."</color>

ch: 很美妙，不是吗？翁法罗斯正如银河的缩影，人们总爱描摹星空的浪漫，却在言语间遗忘了另一种更为真实的宇宙。
en: Doesn't it look marvelous? Amphoreus is like a microcosm of the cosmos. People love to portray the romance of the starry skies, but their tales often forget a different and far more truthful type of universe.

ch: 翁法罗斯的人们会怎么样？
en: What will happen to the people of Amphoreus?

ch: 「一百年前，战火点燃了奥赫玛。」
en: "One hundred years ago, the flames of war consumed Okhema."

ch: 「愤怒的人民随她汇成巨浪，汹涌澎湃。千万敌军如死水枯涸，灰灭无余。」
en: "The people full of wrath surged with her, forming a colossal wave, and the enemy hordes, drained of life, vanished into nothing."

ch: 「那是一个名字。它属于奥赫玛最初，亦是最后的僭主：『凯撒』刻律德菈。」
en: "It was the name borne by Okhema's first and final sovereign: the 'Imperator' Cerydra."

ch: 任务有些艰巨呢，得加快脚步啦。先想办法到奥赫玛去吧。那里人来人往，方便打听消息……
en: It'll be tricky, so let's pick up our pace. To Okhema first. We can learn more from the crowds there...

ch: 住口！你勾结悬锋，意图谋反，其罪当诛——
en: Hold your tongue! Conspiring with Kremnos and plotting rebellion are crimes punishable by death...

ch: 至于二位——奥赫玛知道你们所求为何物。待回圣城，你我再从长计议。
en: As for you two, Okhema knows what you seek. We'll confer in the holy city.

ch: 怎么会这样，和过去三千万个翁法罗斯完全不同…是谁改变了历史？
en: How could this be so different from the previous thirty million Amphoreus cycles... Who altered history?

ch: 报：悬锋城再度向边境发起进攻，「冬霖爵」已率军将敌寇击退。
en: Castrum Kremnos once again struck the border. Dux Brumalis led her troops to repel the enemy.

ch: 为两位献上迟来的自我介绍：我名为海瑟音，是宣誓效忠凯撒的「剑旗爵」，奥赫玛盟军的骑士统领。
en: Please allow me to belatedly introduce myself. My name is Hysilens, and I am the Dux Gladiorum who swears fealty to the Imperator, as well as the Knight Commander of the Okheman Alliance.

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>翁法罗斯必将挣脱束缚，走向天外之界。</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>Amphoreus shall break its chains and reach the world beyond the sky.</color>

ch: 凯撒治下的奥赫玛…完全走出了战火的阴影呢。
en: Okhema under the Imperator's rule... is no longer in the shadow of war.

ch: 如果有一天，翁法罗斯连这些都能抛弃…那，无论是普通人、黄金裔，还是泰坦诸神，恐怕都与野兽无异了吧。
en: If Amphoreus one day abandons this... then all of us, commoners, Chrysos Heirs, Titans, become no better than beasts.

ch: 是呀，<color=#dbc291ff>欧洛尼斯</color>凭借这一道神谕彻底改变了翁法罗斯。不过，其中关于「救世主」的部分，除了你的外貌和降临时间，就没有更多细节了。
en: Indeed! <color=#dbc291ff>Oronyx</color> reshaped Amphoreus through the prophecy. Although, regarding the Deliverer... there were not many details beyond your appearance and the time of your arrival.

ch: 正是欧洛尼斯告诉人类，「天外的救世主」会降临在翁法罗斯。
en: It was Oronyx who told mankind that the Deliverer from beyond the sky would descend upon Amphoreus.

ch: 刻法勒也降下过神谕。但只有欧洛尼斯告诉过人类，「天外的救世主」会降临在翁法罗斯。
en: Kephale issued prophecies too, but it was Oronyx who told mankind that the Deliverer from beyond the sky would descend upon Amphoreus.

ch: 幸会，我是「曳石爵」阿波罗尼，是神悟树庭的五贤人之一，逐火军的参谋。
en: Greetings. I am Apollonius, the Dux Helkolithist, one of the Five Sages of the Grove of Epiphany, advisor to the Flame-Chase Army.

ch: 这位是来自悬锋城的「吟风爵」维吉妮娅，凯撒大人的御用史官。
en: This is Verginia of Castrum Kremnos, the Dux Carminum and imperial scribe of the Great Imperator.

ch: 我是哀丽秘榭的昔涟，这位是救世主{NICKNAME}。很高兴认识二位。
en: I'm Cyrene from Aedes Elysiae. This is the Deliverer, {NICKNAME}. Nice to meet you both.

ch: 这是我们第一次踏上凯撒治下的土地。好惊人，奥赫玛比想象中还要宏伟好多…要是没有各位一路关照，我们恐怕早就晕头转向啦。
en: This is our first time in the Imperator's realm. Okhema is even more magnificent than we imagined... If you all weren't here to look after us, we'd be completely lost and confused.

ch: 我是哀丽秘榭的昔涟，这位是{NICKNAME}！我们初来乍到，人生地不熟，想向您请教一件事……
en: I'm Cyrene of Aedes Elysiae. This is {NICKNAME}. We're new here and wanted to ask you...

ch: 我来冻上你这愚忠之人的脑瓜子！
en: Groveling fool, I'll freeze that brain of yours!

ch: 我是奥赫玛的骑士统领，逐火军的大将，也是凯撒的近侍——
en: I'm the Knight Commander of Okhema, General of the Flame-Chase Army, and the Imperator's servant...

ch: 如你所见，她是奥赫玛的女皇，黄金战争的终结者，黄金裔的领袖。
en: As you've witnessed, she is the empress of Okhema, the one who ended the Chrysos War, and the leader of the Chrysos Heirs.

ch: 「命运爵」，知晓神谕的圣女，现在城中只有名为缇宝的这一位。为统合天下神谕，凯撒曾将她们掳作质子…不过，她们如今是奥赫玛重要的先知。
en: Dux Fatorum, the Holy Maiden who interprets the prophecy... Only the one named Tribbie remains in the city. The Imperator once took them as hostages in order to unify the prophecies of the world... But they are now Okhema's most vital prophets.

ch: 全体起立！以{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}之名，奥赫玛同盟向诸神宣誓——
en: All rise! In the names of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, the Okhema Alliance swears upon the gods...

ch: 刻法勒自不必多说。两日前的{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}，斥候本应准时抵达奥赫玛，为诸位带来「律法」已被征服的捷报……
en: Kephale, of course, needs no further explanation. As for the subjugation of the "Law," at the {RUBY_B#dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#} two days past, a scout should've brought the news to all of you...

ch: 呵，旧律！你们不早就把它毁了么？你们在奥赫玛第一次围城战时临阵倒戈，在重组元老院的决议中全部投下赞成票，还在昨天亲手用染血的刀锋亵渎了它——
en: Heh, the ancient laws! Didn't you destroy them long ago? You defected during the First Siege of Okhema, voted unanimously in favor of the Council of Elders' restructuring, and just yesterday, you desecrated them with a blood-stained blade...

ch: 呵，在我窥见此世…不，天外的秘密以后，翁法罗斯的神权早已无足轻重。
en: Hah, after I glimpsed the secrets of this world... no, the secrets beyond the sky, the divine authority of Amphoreus no longer held any significance.

ch: 我问你，救世主：于这翁法罗斯的天幕之外，存在名为「星神」的宏伟神祇——此事为真？
en: Let me ask you, Deliverer: Is it true that, beyond Amphoreus's sky, there are magnificent deities called "Aeons"?

ch: 翁法罗斯才能挣脱「毁灭」。
en: Only then can Amphoreus break free from "the Destruction."

ch: 如果能让他们介入翁法罗斯的「律法」，就有机会改变未来的命运，扭转这个世界注定的结局。
en: If they can intervene in Amphoreus's "Laws," we may have a chance to alter this world's impending fate and reverse its destined end.

ch: 「逐火铭牌」，逐火军的身份象征。奥赫玛每位王爵都持有此物。
en: The "Flame-Chase Medallion," a symbol of the Flame-Chase Army. Every noble in Okhema carries one.

ch: 见到此牌就等于见到凯撒本人，你们可以在城中随意行动。启程征伐海洋泰坦前，两位就在奥赫玛暂时休憩吧。
en: This medallion represents the will of the Imperator herself, and you may act freely within the city with it. Before we embark on the crusade against the Ocean Titan, you should rest in Okhema for a time.

ch: {M#他们}{F#她们}选择的道路将掩埋翁法罗斯的宏愿：这座行于「毁灭」命途的世界，必会远离它本应享有的荣光……
en: The road they have chosen will bury Amphoreus's grand aspirations: This world which follows the Path of "Destruction" will inevitably stray far from the glory it was meant to enjoy...

ch: 而在我为您揭示的道路上：翁法罗斯的众生将以凯撒之名弑杀造物尊神，征服天外万界。
en: But on the path I have revealed to you, the people of Amphoreus will slay their Creator in the name of the Imperator and conquer the worlds beyond the sky.

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>届时，翁法罗斯必能踏上遍布群星的征程。</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>Amphoreus will embark on a journey across the stars.</color>

ch: 奥赫玛的气氛…好陌生。不光逐火同盟，全城上下都在议论「天外世界」……
en: The atmosphere in Okhema... is so unfamiliar. It's not just the Flame-Chase Alliance talking about the "world beyond the sky" but the whole city...

ch: 又要打仗了吗…凯撒入主奥赫玛后，我们就没个安稳日子过。
en: Another war? Ever since the Imperator took control of Okhema, we haven't had a day of peace.

ch: 我是「曳石爵」阿波罗尼，是神悟树庭的五贤人之一，逐火军参谋。
en: I'm Apollonius, the Dux Helkolithist, one of the Five Sages at the Grove of Epiphany, advisor to the Flame-Chase Army.

ch: 这位是「吟风爵」维吉妮娅，来自悬锋城，是凯撒大人的史官。
en: This is Verginia from Castrum Kremnos, the Dux Carminum and historian of the Great Imperator.

ch: 吼吼吼，本狮可是奥赫玛的千里眼、顺风耳，街头巷尾流传之事，全都逃不过本狮的视听，可谓绝佳的采风伴侣……
en: Roarrr, I'm the far-seeing eye and all-hearing ear of Okhema. I see and hear every single thing that happens in the streets and alleys of this place. I'm the perfect partner for research...

ch: 吼、吼吼…闲话少叙，就按两位要求，奥赫玛今天最新的讯息来咯——
en: Roarrr, enough small talk. Here's the latest news from Okhema, as you requested...

ch: 请便。但容我提醒：凯撒的禁卫军，奥赫玛宪兵的军团长就在你面前。
en: Please, go ahead. But let me remind you: The Commander of the Imperator's Imperial Guard and the Okheman Civil Guard is right in front of you.

ch: 这一点也和我们熟悉的奥赫玛截然相反……
en: This is the complete opposite from what we know of Okhema...

ch: 眨眼间，陶杯贴上了你的嘴唇。不愧是凯撒御用的锋刃，翁法罗斯最敏捷的剑士。
en: The clay cup touches your lips in the blink of an eye. She is indeed the imperial blade of the Imperator and the swiftest swordmaster in Amphoreus.

ch: 自从他和欧洛尼斯的神谕一同降临，将群星的预言带给奥赫玛，逐火军就变了。他的低语难以抗拒，包藏祸心，令野心障目的人们一一踩入陷阱。
en: The Flame-Chase Army changed after he descended with Oronyx's divination and brought the prophecy of the stars to Okhema. His seductive whispers harbor something malicious within and will ensnare those of us blinded by ambition.

ch: 答案显而易见，我会将翁法罗斯与群星相连……
en: The answer is simple. I will connect Amphoreus with the stars...

ch: 容我更正：<color=#dbc291ff>我会修正旧日「律法」中封闭翁法罗斯的条约，并将黑潮汇入再创世的涡流。</color>
en: Allow me to adjust my statement: <color=#dbc291ff>I will correct the regulations within the old "Law" that sealed off Amphoreus, and merge the black tide with the torrents of Era Nova.</color>

ch: 奥赫玛盟军…无往不胜！
en: The Okheman Alliance... is invincible!

ch: …你有这么高速运转的毁灭进入翁法罗斯。
en: ...So you have this super duper speedy rotation of Destruction into Amphoreus.

ch: 我会采纳你的谏言，暂且退下吧，神礼官，回奥赫玛去。你也不想与那二人正面交锋，不是么？
en: I will heed your advice. Leave for now, Theoros, and go back to Okhema. You don't want to confront those two directly either, do you?

ch: 在橄榄树荫下，他们说奥赫玛绝不会臣服；在冰冷的死雾中，他们说哀地里亚绝不会臣服；在千门万径起点，他们说雅努萨波利斯绝不会臣服……
en: Under the shade of the olive groves, the people of Okhema said they would never bow to me. In the frozen lethal fog, the people of Aidonia said they would never bow to me. At the beginning of the myriad paths, the people of Janusopolis said they would never bow to me...

ch: 在我来到这里前…「负世」的黄金裔，是一位化名白厄的青年，他来自哀丽秘榭。
en: Before I arrived in this world... The Chrysos Heir of "Worldbearing" was a young man with the pseudonym of Phainon. He came from Aedes Elysiae.

ch: 为了和「再创世」的谎言抗争，让翁法罗斯免于「毁灭」的结局…他遍历三千多万次历史，只为在徒劳中找到突破口。
en: In order to combat the lies of the "Era Nova" and deliver Amphoreus from the ending of the Destruction... He lived through history more than thirty million times, hoping futilely to find a breakthrough.

ch: 为了与那谎言抗争…曾有一位化名白厄的青年踏上了三千多万次轮回，只为让翁法罗斯免于「毁灭」的结局。
en: To fight that lie... a young man with the pseudonym of Phainon lived through more than thirty million cycles of this world, all to save Amphoreus from the end of the Destruction.

ch: 至于来古士，他根本不是你们的引路人。他不在乎翁法罗斯，更不可能在乎你们的荣誉和征程。
en: Lygus is not a guide at all. He doesn't care about Amphoreus, and cares even less about your glory and campaigns.

ch: 他唯一在乎的，就是把翁法罗斯的实验推进到底，让「铁墓」降临于世，彻底摧毁银河的秩序。
en: The only thing he cares about is completing the Amphorean experiment, making sure Irontomb is born into this world, and using it to utterly destroy the cosmic order.

ch: 「铁墓」…它是翁法罗斯命运的终点，行于「毁灭」命途的恐怖化身，根本不可能被驯服。
en: "Irontomb"... is the ultimate end of Amphoreus's destiny. It is an embodiment of pure horror that walks the Path of Destruction, and can never be tamed.

ch: 它是来古士唯一在乎的事物。翁法罗斯，你们的荣誉和征程…在他眼中根本不值一提。
en: That is the only thing Lygus cares about. As for Amphoreus? Your glory and campaigns? ...He doesn't care about any of those.

ch: 试想这样一种可能性：若我将奥赫玛夷为平地，将她的人民碾作死灰，列位英雄又是否会重新觊觎半神的力量，以便与我相抗？
en: Why don't you entertain this possibility? What if I reduced Okhema to rubble and ground her people into minced meat? Would the heroes then once again desire the power of demigods, so they could fight against me?

ch: 自上次分别过后，我便着手将「神话之外」改造为专属于您的「观众席」。现在，您可以于此静待翁法罗斯的终幕上演了。
en: Since we parted ways last time, I have modified the Exomyth into an "audience area" exclusive to you. Now, you'll be able to silently wait here for the final act of Amphoreus to begin.

ch: 流速…慢于翁法罗斯？
en: Where time flows... slower than within Amphoreus?

ch: 我必须承认，为您解惑的过程…总能令我回忆起年少求学的快意时光。但很遗憾，此刻，在翁法罗斯内部，我的正身…不得不下场应对因您而起的「意外」。
en: I must admit that the process of answering your questions has... reminded me of the happy days of learning in my youth. However, it is a pity that my true form must now descend into Amphoreus to deal with the "accident" that arose because of you.

ch: 不过，无需等待太久。待到落幕时分，您一定能理解我与翁法罗斯的心愿。
en: But you won't have to wait long. When the curtain falls, you'll surely understand mine and Amphoreus's ardent wish.

ch: （「时间流速慢于翁法罗斯」…？如果来古士没有撒谎，那留给我的时间不多了。）
en: ("Where time flows slower than within Amphoreus..."? If Lygus spoke the truth, then I don't have much time left.)

ch: 长话短说吧，你不在的这段时间——对于翁法罗斯而言的「这几年」里……
en: Let's keep it short. While you were gone... well, in those few years, Amphoreus...

ch: （黑塔的意思是…某个派系来到了翁法罗斯，可以向他们求救吗？）
en: (Is Herta saying... a certain Path's faction has arrived in Amphoreus, and I can ask them for help?)

ch: （在过去的旅途中，我掌握了不同的命途力量…好好想想，来到翁法罗斯的到底是什么势力…该用哪一种命途的力量呼唤援助……）
en: (I mastered the powers of different Paths in my previous journeys... Think hard, and figure out exactly which faction has arrived at Amphoreus... and which Path's power I should use to call for reinforcements...)

ch: （对啊，无论是多么偏远的角落，只要潜藏商机，一定能引来公司关注，翁法罗斯不就是一片未被开发的商业蓝海吗？）
en: (That's right! No matter how far away a planet is, the IPC is guaranteed to pay attention as long as there's a business opportunity. Isn't Amphoreus a pristine and untapped market?)

ch: （看来，公司的大手也伸不到没有海外市场的翁法罗斯……）
en: (Seems like since Amphoreus has no overseas market, the IPC's hand can't reach it...)

ch: （对啊，我应黑天鹅之邀来到翁法罗斯，还在此接受了浮黎的瞥视，流光忆庭一定与翁法罗斯有千丝万缕的联系……）
en: (That's right... I came to Amphoreus because Black Swan asked us to come, and I even got a glance from Fuli here. The Garden of Recollection must be intricately involved with Amphoreus...)

ch: 翁法罗斯的{RUBY_B#神话}秘所思{RUBY_E#}，亟待你来续写……
en: The {RUBY_B#mythology}mythos{RUBY_E#} of Amphoreus... waits for you to continue its story...

ch: 这段时间，你肯定在翁法罗斯遇见了很多事吧？接下来可要给本姑娘好好讲讲哦。
en: You must have seen a lot in Amphoreus during this time, right? You gotta tell me all about it.

ch: 带我回现实吧！有个奇怪的声音告诉我，沿着这条路一直走下去，就能进入翁法罗斯——
en: Why don't you take me back to reality! A strange voice told me that I can enter Amphoreus if I keep following this road...

ch: 嗯？翁法罗斯不就是黄金裔和英雄之旅的世界嘛，用小拇指想想都知道啦。
en: Huh? Isn't Amphoreus the world of the Chrysos Heirs and their Hero's Journey? I could figure that out in an instant.

ch: （可是，翁法罗斯无法从外界观测，如果没有丹恒转述，她不可能知道这些……）
en: (But Amphoreus cannot be observed from the outside. She couldn't possibly know about these things unless Dan Heng told her...)

ch: 但我们有办法将你送回翁法罗斯。只要你愿意帮助我们……
en: But we can send you back to Amphoreus... As long as you are willing to help us...

ch: 提醒一下：在你犹豫的时候，翁法罗斯内部的时间可是在疾速流逝呢。
en: Just as a reminder: While you hesitate, time is quickly ticking away in Amphoreus.

ch: 所以，帮帮我们，找到翁法罗斯「记忆」的起点，然后把它带出来……
en: So, help us. Find where Amphoreus's "memory" began... and bring it out.

ch: 「记忆」可以帮你回到翁法罗斯，但未必要以他们提供的方式。当然，也不需要你做出任何交易…付出任何代价。
en: While Remembrance can help you return to Amphoreus, there's no need for you to do it the way they want you to. Of course, there's also no need for you to make any deal... or pay any price.

ch: 翁法罗斯的三月，属于永夜之帷的时间…暂时以<color=#dbc291ff>长夜月</color>这个称呼，将我放进你的回忆中吧♭
en: The third month of Amphoreus is the month reserved for the <color=#dbc291ff>Veil of Evernight</color>... So, place me into your memory using the name "Evernight" for now ♭

ch: 我愿意为你解释更多，但不是现在。我们可以有很多、很多私人时间，但翁法罗斯没有。
en: I'm happy to explain more, just not now. We might have a lot of time to ourselves, but Amphoreus does not have that luxury.

ch: 现在，带着它回去吧，亲爱的{NICKNAME}。回到翁法罗斯，扭转最后的「再创世」……
en: Now, take it, and return with it, dear {NICKNAME}. Return to Amphoreus and overturn the final Era Nova.

ch: 为了翁法罗斯，为了你，也为了你记忆中的「三月七」……
en: For Amphoreus, for you, and for the "March 7th" in your memories...

ch: 翁法罗斯需要「救世主」。
en: Amphoreus needs the "Deliverer."

ch: （这里是…奥赫玛？）
en: (Is this... Okhema?)

ch: {NICKNAME}，现在一定很困扰吧？你不在的这段时间，翁法罗斯发生了好多事。
en: You must be really confused right now, aren't you, {NICKNAME}? So much has happened in Amphoreus while you were gone.

ch: 「再创世」一定会到来，令翁法罗斯坠入「毁灭」。
en: "Era Nova" will come, and Amphoreus will fall into the Destruction.

ch: …看来翁法罗斯的命运，确实未到收梢之时。
en: ...It seems Amphoreus' fate isn't sealed just yet.

ch: 那个吕枯耳戈斯，他现在就在奥赫玛门前。
en: That Lycurgus... he's right outside Okhema.

ch: 所以，我只能寄希望于奥赫玛虔诚的公民，希望他们能在各位的哀嚎声中，为我献上答案。
en: Which is why I now place my hope in the faithful citizens of Okhema. Perhaps they'll give me what I seek in the echo of your screams.

ch: 他的阴谋不会得逞，因为「浪漫」将要兑现诺言，为翁法罗斯编织一袭坚不可摧的战袍……
en: His conspiracy won't succeed, because Romance is ready to make good on their promise to weave an indestructible armor for Amphoreus...

ch: 「…五十年后，来古士再次率军进攻奥赫玛。他单刀直入圣城，摧毁云石天宫，世人称之为『第三次奥赫玛围城战』。」
en: "Fifty years later, Lygus led his forces once again to Okhema. He charged directly into the holy city and razed the Marmoreal Palace. History would name this battle 'The Third Siege of Okhema'."

ch: 「这场战役中，共有九万青壮为奥赫玛英勇就义，其中也包括他们无畏的领袖——阿格莱雅。」
en: "Ninety thousand brave souls gave their lives for Okhema that day, including their fearless leader, Aglaea."

ch: 可是，留在奥赫玛等死，和去斯缇科西亚等死有什么区别？
en: But between staying in Okhema and going to Styxia... What difference does it make when it's death either way!

ch: 我反对<color=#dbc291ff>迁都</color>。奥赫玛有{RUBY_B#黎明机器}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的庇佑，不比那死城安全多了？
en: I'm against <color=#dbc291ff>relocating</color>. With {RUBY_B#Dawn Device}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s protection, isn't Okhema far safer than that dead city?

ch: 就像你说的，奥赫玛是人类的庇护所。*我们*从没打算让大家搬到斯缇科西亚去……
en: Like you said, Okhema is humanity's refuge. We never intended to get everyone moving to Styxia...

ch: 以及，赛飞儿，*我们*希望你尽快去一趟悬锋城。不管用什么方法，一定要和「纷争」结成同盟。
en: And Cipher, we need you to head to Castrum Kremnos as soon as possible. By any means necessary, forge an alliance with Strife.

ch: 我就是从悬锋城回来的，只是比消息快了一步。
en: I just came back from Castrum Kremnos, only a step ahead of the news.

ch: 缇宝，有什么东西正在朝奥赫玛飞来，特别特别快——
en: Tribbie, something's flying towards Okhema, and it's really fast...

ch: 「随后，缇里西庇俄丝踏上远行。同年，悬锋王欧利庞携王子迈德漠斯加入同盟，投身救世之战，为圣城保驾护航。」
en: "Soon after, Tribios departed on a long journey. That same year, the Kremnoan king Eurypon, along with his son, prince Mydeimos, joined the alliance to safeguard the holy city in the battle of deliverance."

ch: 就现状而言，这也是奥赫玛拥有的唯一选择。照我说的做吧……
en: In the current situation, this is the only path Okhema has left. Just do as I say...

ch: 翁法罗斯不再需要名为「纷争」的神。所以，也让我砸毁旧律，令「天谴之矛」重新变作捍卫世界的武器吧。
en: Amphoreus no longer needs a god named Strife. So let me shatter the former laws and turn the Lance of Fury back into a weapon that protects the world.

ch: 神悟树庭七贤人已踏上行程，不日将逐批抵达，投身抵抗事业。在他们中，有一位名叫阿那克萨戈拉斯的学者……
en: The Seven Sages from Grove of Epiphany are already en route. They'll arrive in waves to join the resistance in a couple of days. Among them is a scholar named Anaxagoras...

ch: 此人眼界超凡，无畏牺牲。这场「裂魂仪式」不仅是我的决断，更源于他的谏言。他的智谋必将成为翁法罗斯存续的中坚力量——
en: He has extraordinary insight and fears no sacrifice. This Soul-Rending Ceremony wasn't just my decision. It was his counsel. His wisdom will surely be the backbone of Amphoreus' survival.

ch: 别把事情想太简单，来古士刚发现奥赫玛过去五十年都是座空城，想必一定气急败坏，什么事都做得出来。
en: Don't oversimplify it. Lygus just found out Okhema's been an empty shell for the past fifty years. He's bound to be furious. At this rate, he could've done anything.

ch: 而且，涡心本就是与世隔绝的禁地——换句话说，全翁法罗斯最适合当监狱的地方。
en: Besides, the Vortex is cut off from the world. No place in Amphoreus makes a better prison.

ch: …呵，树庭男孩，人们都说你疯，我看这话一点不假。
en: ...Heh. I guess people weren't wrong when they said you're insane, Grove boy.

ch: 「奥赫玛将永远屹立」…赛飞儿小姐的谎言，终究还是破灭了呀。
en: "Okhema will stand eternal." Miss Cipher's lie has crumbled after all...

ch: 人们会知道，不必再去追逐什么，翁法罗斯早已迎来神谕中的{RUBY_B#天外的救世主}黎明{RUBY_E#}。
en: People will know that there's nothing left to chase. Amphoreus has already welcomed the {RUBY_B#Deliverer beyond the sky}dawn{RUBY_E#} foretold in prophecy.

ch: 然后，愿它能安然启航…与「负世」的火种一同飘过时间的长河，飘到{NICKNAME}身边，成为你回到翁法罗斯的指引。
en: And then... may it set sail in peace... Drift down the river of time along with the Coreflame of Worldbearing, reach {NICKNAME}'s side, and lead you back to Amphoreus.

ch: 虽然这一世，翁法罗斯没有「岁月」的半神，但「岁月」始终站在人类这边。
en: Even though this cycle has no demigod of Time, Time has always stood on humanity's side.

ch: 法吉娜在深渊中沉沦，杯身破碎——她的醉意注入黑潮，为翁法罗斯带来了最初的疯狂。
en: Phagousa sank into the abyss, with the chalice shattered, their intoxication spilled into the black tide, birthing the first madness in Amphoreus.

ch: 我不明白，如果海洋的欢宴、凯撒的愿景、翁法罗斯的存在都是虚妄…那我们的征程还有何意义？
en: I don't understand. If the ocean's feast, the Imperator's dream, and even Amphoreus's existence are all illusions... then what's the point of our journey?

ch: 千年时光在我的尺度之下，不过细沙中的一粒分子。而翁法罗斯之于银河，又不过是长滩上的一粒细沙。
en: A thousand years is a mere atom in a grain of sand to me. Amphoreus, compared to the cosmos, is but that grain upon a whole beach.

ch: 她的伟业，将不再限于翁法罗斯之间……
en: Her glory will no longer be bound by the borders of Amphoreus...

ch: 不…她不会让我们白白送死，她不会背叛人们的梦想…不会背叛翁法罗斯。
en: No... she wouldn't send us to die for nothing. She would never betray our dreams... or Amphoreus.

ch: 若你已不再与我共享愿景，不再承认我将为翁法罗斯编织崭新的「律法」，那就尽管夺走我的性命吧……
en: If you no longer share my vision or believe in the new Law I seek to weave for Amphoreus, then go on and end me...

ch: 翁法罗斯的凯撒或许冷酷，或许暴戾，但决不虚伪。当我说出「生命亦是微不足惜的代价」——
en: The Imperator of Amphoreus may be ruthless and cruel, but never a hypocrite. When I say "life itself holds little value."

ch: 于此地，你自法吉娜的身躯中剜出了「海洋」的火种；也是在这里，你与那位凯撒双双登神，成为翁法罗斯的支柱。那之后……
en: It was here you gorged out the Coreflame of Ocean from Phagousa's body. It was here you and that Imperator both completed apotheosis, becoming pillars of Amphoreus. And after that...

ch: 终于…<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次轮回又<unbreak>4931</unbreak>年后，翁法罗斯的终幕将要落下了。
en: At long last... <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak> cycles and <unbreak>4,931</unbreak> years later, Amphoreus' final curtain is ready to fall.

ch: 现在，我会用这颗火种，点燃翁法罗斯的黎明！
en: And now, with that Coreflame, I'll light the dawn of Amphoreus!

ch: 以一场残酷的献祭，他们点亮此世「律法」的星辰，推动翁法罗斯的命运滚滚向前。
en: Through a brutal sacrifice, they lit the stars of Law in this world, propelling Amphoreus' fate forward.

ch: 敬阿格莱雅，缇里西庇俄丝，迈德漠斯，遐蝶，阿那克萨戈拉斯，赛法利娅，雅辛忒丝……
en: To Aglaea, Tribios, Mydeimos, Castorice, Anaxagoras, Cifera, Hyacinthia...

ch: 这座旧世的墓碑是海妖幻境的锚点，海列屈拉用于自缚的符号。同时，它也正是好戏开幕时我曾声明的，翁法罗斯的缩影……
en: This tombstone of the old world serves as the anchor of the siren's illusion, a sigil Helektra used to bind herself. At the same time, it is the very thing I once proclaimed at the start of the show: a microcosm of Amphoreus itself...

ch: 那便是决定翁法罗斯，乃至银河命运的时分。
en: That shall be the moment that decides the fate of Amphoreus and the entire cosmos.

ch: 正如翁法罗斯支离破碎的命运。
en: Just like the broken fate of Amphoreus.

ch: 「纷争之半神」迈德漠斯，生于光历<unbreak>4071</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4284</unbreak>年。
en: Mydeimos, the Demigod of Strife. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>4071</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4284</unbreak>.

ch: 翁法罗斯的半神们用尽全力将我拘禁于此，可惜——
en: The Amphorean demigods used every ounce of their strength to constrain me here, yet regrettably...

ch: 你精心打造的面具已被揭开，我们解明了翁法罗斯的真身：<color=#dbc291ff>它是历史上第一台「权杖」，最初的原型机——博识尊神体的一部分。</color>
en: We've torn off your meticulous mask and figured out Amphoreus's true form: <color=#dbc291ff>It's part of the primordial Prototype Machine, the first Scepter ever created... In other words, it's a detached part of Nous's divine corpus.</color>

ch: 翁法罗斯正如银河的缩影，人们生来便是果壳中的囚徒。如那返回洞穴，向囚徒们宣扬日光的狂人。我的悲哀在于，我引领同胞们踏上了一条迈向深渊的绝路……
en: Amphoreus is a miniature of the cosmos, where all are born prisoners inside the nutshell called the universe. Like the madman who returned to the cave and preached about the daylight to his fellow prisoners, my greatest sorrow is that I led my peers down a road that plunges into the abyss, from which there is no return...

ch: 一旦翁法罗斯的绝灭大君成为下个知识奇点——你可是第一位天才，怎么可能不清楚后果？
en: In other words, when the Lord Ravager within Amphoreus becomes the next Knowledge Singularity... There's no way you wouldn't have grasped the consequences, First Genius, is there?

ch: 翁法罗斯人早已给出回答。无论是做那被吞食的小鱼，又或成为巨鲸，迎来盛大的沉落……
en: The Amphoreans already answered long ago: be it as a tiny fish destined to be swallowed, or as a giant whale poised for a magnificent descent...

ch: 不错，那我就单刀直入了：既然在翁法罗斯里，他的思考速度远超常人，我们现在要做的，就是通过外力把一段「记忆」植入他的灵感回路——
en: Good. Then I'll cut to the chase: Since his thinking speed far exceeds that of normal people within Amphoreus, we are going to externally plant a "memory" into his Inspiration Circuit...

ch: 这时候，翁法罗斯赋予他的多线处理优势就能让他彻底崩溃：记忆里的一道画面在我们看来只有一秒，对他来说却是几千万、甚至上亿次运算……
en: That's when the parallel processing advantage he gained via Amphoreus will completely destroy him. An image from a person's memory played in real-time might only be a second for us, but for him in Amphorean time? It could be millions or even billions of calculations...

ch: 你是诞生于翁法罗斯，却因{NICKNAME}的到来而苏醒，因{M#他}{F#她}行于「记忆」命途而成长的模因。
en: You are a memetic entity born in Amphoreus, yet you only awakened with {NICKNAME}'s arrival, and only matured as {F#s}he embarked on the Path of Remembrance.

ch: 这意味着，你只能依附于{NICKNAME}的记忆存在。如果有一天——哪怕只是短短几秒——{M#他}{F#她}忘记了你，或是和翁法罗斯失去最后一丝联系……
en: That means your existence is completely attached to {NICKNAME}'s memories. If there ever comes a day when {F#s}he forgets about you for even a few seconds or loses {M#his}{F#her} last connection with Amphoreus...

ch: 翁法罗斯每一个人，都在等待「救世主」的归来。
en: And everyone in Amphoreus was waiting for the Deliverer's return.

ch: 就像翁法罗斯的每一个人，都在等待「救世主」的归来。
en: Like how everyone in Amphoreus was also waiting for the Deliverer's return.

ch: 就像翁法罗斯的每一个人，都在等待「救世主」的归来。
en: Like how everyone in Amphoreus was also waiting for the Deliverer's return.

ch: {NICKNAME}，还记得我们在树庭开过的玩笑吗？
en: Remember the joke we made back at the Grove, {NICKNAME}?

ch: 即便「岁月」的权能，也无法调动整台权杖，令翁法罗斯的演算陷入循环……
en: Even the authority of Time cannot command the entire Scepter, nor can it plunge the Amphorean extrapolation into a loop...

ch: 这是{NICKNAME}遨游星海的第一站，叫做「黑塔」空间站。嗯，就当它是一座超级大的神悟树庭吧。
en: This is the first step of {NICKNAME}'s journey among the starry seas. This place is called the Herta Space Station. Ummm... Just think of it as a supersized Grove of Epiphany.

ch: 黑塔女士和螺丝咕姆先生，被人们称为「天才」。据说只有银河中最具智慧的人，才能得到翁法罗斯真正的造物主「博识尊」的青睐。
en: People call Madam Herta and Mister Screwllum "geniuses." Apparently, only the smartest people in the cosmos can receive the blessings of Nous, Amphoreus's true creator.

ch: 这个世界和翁法罗斯很像，也被关在天幕下，直到无名客到来，才得以回归群星……
en: This world was sealed beneath its sky just like Amphoreus was, and they only managed to reconnect with the stars when the Nameless arrived...

ch: 是的。他们用财富的流通征服了许多世界，开辟了辽阔的疆域。在翁法罗斯之外，有许多这般强大的同盟，它们行于和「毁灭」截然不同的道路。
en: Yes. The IPC conquered many worlds through trade and opened up a vast territory that way. There are many such powerful alliances beyond Amphoreus, and they all walk on roads different from the Destruction.

ch: 我绝不允许凯撒的帝国任人宰割。翁法罗斯必须成为强权，不容寰宇轻视。
en: I will never allow the Imperator's empire to be sullied by others. Amphoreus must become a power so strong that no interstellar foreigner would dare to look down upon us.

ch: 翁法罗斯，我们…必须击碎旧律，成为星间新的秩序。
en: We... No... Amphoreus must shatter the old law and become the new order among the stars.

ch: 很漂亮吧？这就是翁法罗斯。这个世界，就在这条无穷的光带中绵延流淌。
en: Isn't it pretty? That's our Amphoreus. Our world flows and meanders in this endless band of light.

ch: 我们虽然在神明的设计中挣扎，尚且不是真正的生命…但，翁法罗斯的黄金裔依旧选择同命运抗争，书写了和「人」无异的神话。
en: Though we were born from the designs of the gods and are not yet truly alive... the Chrysos Heirs of Amphoreus still chose to stand against fate and carved a legend no different from that of humankind.

ch: 正如翁法罗斯，一同你我二人的命运，像那回环的海流。
en: Like the circulating ocean current. Like our two fates. Like Amphoreus itself.

ch: 救世主也好，神礼官也罢，皆从天外而来，无权干涉我亲自征服的土地。翁法罗斯的「律法」，自当由她的主人裁定。
en: Both the Deliverer and the Theoros came from beyond the sky. They have no right to interfere with the lands I conquered with my own two hands. The "Law" of Amphoreus shall be determined by Amphoreus's master.

ch: 我意已决，翁法罗斯必须自立于群星。
en: I am determined for Amphoreus to stand on her own two feet among the stars.

ch: 「不破不立」——这就是你口中所谓的暴行。讽刺的是，它同样也是翁法罗斯变革的铁律。
en: "There's no new without destroying the old." That's what you consider an atrocity? Ironic, for that is also the unchanging law of Amphoreus's revolutions.

ch: 我涤荡了黄金战争的污垢，弥合了纷争世以来的所有分歧；我恢复了奥赫玛的权威，让凡人和黄金裔平等站上议院的讲坛；我惩罚了一切罪恶，赞赏了一切功绩……
en: I cleansed the Chrysos War's filth and mended all the conflicts left by the Era Bellica. I restored Okhema's might and allowed mortals and Chrysos Heirs to face each other as equals in the Council. I punished all sins and rewarded all achievements...

ch: 翁法罗斯濒临毁灭，已容不下无意义的争辩。
en: Amphoreus is about to be destroyed. There's no time left for pointless debates.

ch: 我问你，树庭西方关隘守军投降了吗？
en: The troops defending the pass to the west of the Grove. Have they surrendered?

ch: 非常好。现在他们一无退路、二无援兵、三无火力支援，我军必能迅速解放神悟树庭。
en: Very good. They now have no way out, no reinforcements, and no artillery support. We will be able to liberate the Grove of Epiphany in the blink of an eye.

ch: 我不如他们——况且，神谕也是他们的战争机器，我没有这种好运。贸然开战只会令我们陷于不利，一举一动都将受翁法罗斯所有人审判……
en: I am inferior to them in that regard. They also have the prophecy to wield as a weapon, something I am not blessed with. Launching an unplanned attack will only disadvantage us, as all of Amphoreus will judge our actions...

ch: 现在，翁法罗斯至伟大的「律法」，已被我踏破……
en: Now, I have shattered the greatest "Law" of Amphoreus...

ch: 听到…翁法罗斯……
en: Hear... Amphoreus's...

ch: 「但她的死令奥赫玛为之沸腾。城墙这边，捍卫自由的人们将纪念碑推倒在地；另一边，凯撒的拥护者挡在她的雕像前，竭力宣告：『皇帝还站在人群中央』。」
en: "We only know her death inflamed Okhema. On one side of the city, those who defended liberty toppled her statues to the ground. On the other side, her supporters put themselves between the masses and her monuments, declaring loudly that 'the sovereign is still among the people.'"

ch: 还是退回观众席，给自己、翁法罗斯还有整片银河一个更好的交代。
en: Or do you want to return to the audience's seat and give yourself, Amphoreus, and the entire cosmos a more fitting end?

ch: 翁法罗斯并非三重命途「纠缠」之地，而是三重命途「死斗」之地。
en: Amphoreus is not a place where three Paths "entangle," but where three Paths "fight to the death."

ch: 和翁法罗斯有不少相似之处呢。
en: Has a lot of similarities to Amphoreus.

ch: （终于走到了这里。交还这枚火种，由我成为「负世」的半神，就能终结翁法罗斯悲剧的轮回……）
en: (I'm finally here. Once I return this Coreflame and become the "Worldbearing" demigod, the cycles of Amphoreus's tragedy can finally end...)

ch: 虽然这一世，翁法罗斯没有「岁月」的半神，但「岁月」始终站在人类这边。
en: Even though this cycle has no demigod of Time, Time has always stood on humanity's side.

ch: 忆者们觊觎翁法罗斯的秘密，正如他们觊觎每一位天才的知识。在星神的对垒中，「记忆」从来不是「智识」的盟友。
en: The Memokeepers covet Amphoreus's secrets, just as they covet the knowledge of every genius. In the war between the Aeons, the Remembrance is never the Erudition's ally.

ch: 现在，在「开拓」身后，正有众多银河势力将目光投向翁法罗斯。他们秉持的理念各不相同，但在共同的敌人面前，生存的意志会将人们团结。
en: Right now, following behind the Trailblaze, numerous cosmic powers have cast their sights on Amphoreus. They all have vastly different philosophies, but the desire to survive will unite them against a common enemy.

ch: 多么荒谬，又令人称奇。竟能绕过「智识」的监视，在世界内部暗中布局。看来我对实验的判断，还是出现了一丝纰漏……
en: How absurd, but I can't help but admire it. You managed to avoid the watchful eye of the Erudition and plan all of this within Amphoreus. It seems that there was a slight oversight in my assessment of the experiment...

ch: 早在你和丹恒来到翁法罗斯前，「三月七」就先一步进入了这个世界。
en: "March 7th" entered this world long before you and Dan Heng arrived at Amphoreus.

ch: 以你的「记忆」为质料，我会重新编纂世界的因果，令一个无瑕的「翁法罗斯」从混沌中诞生。
en: With your "memories" as the base material, I will re-create the cause and effect of this world, and let a flawless "Amphoreus" be born from the chaos!

ch: 他们都没能突破{RUBY_B#防火墙}天空的封锁{RUBY_E#}。翁法罗斯默默无闻的原因，恐怕也有它自身的危险性吧。
en: None of these people managed to break through {RUBY_B#firewall}the Sky's seal{RUBY_E#}. There's probably a dangerous reason as to why Amphoreus had remained undiscovered for so long.

ch: 「恐怕那两位失踪的无名客，和三月七一样，受『记忆』命途影响，只有精神被卷入了翁法罗斯。」
en: "It's likely that the two missing Nameless, like March 7th, also came under the influence of the Path of Remembrance, and only their minds entered Amphoreus."

ch: 「这正是我想说的，姬子小姐。现在，翁法罗斯的忆域前所未有地充盈……」
en: "I was just about to get there, Miss Himeko. Right now, Amphoreus's Memory Zone is extraordinarily full..."

ch: 翁法罗斯事发后，黑天鹅小姐一直站在列车组这边。可以信任她。
en: Miss Black Swan has been on the Crew's side ever since things started going wrong in Amphoreus. We can trust her.

ch: 事实上，在你返程途中，翁法罗斯又出现了一些状况。
en: As a matter of fact, while you were on your way back, Amphoreus's circumstances changed once again.

ch: 「智识」和「毁灭」的信息，我大致理解了。不过，「记忆」的搅局者在翁法罗斯扮演的又是什么角色？
en: I mostly understand what we've learned about the Erudition and the Destruction, but what roles do the Remembrance's intruders play in Amphoreus?

ch: 问题正在于此。他们似乎对「毁灭」的行径早有察觉，但缺乏决定性的力量，无法穿透笼罩翁法罗斯的防火墙。
en: That's exactly the problem. They seem to have been aware of the Destruction's movements early on, but they lacked a decisive power and had no way to penetrate Amphoreus's firewall.

ch: 翁法罗斯，一柄权杖，从某种意义上可以被视作一个微观的「宇宙」，这也是窃忆者们频繁光顾「黑塔」的缘由。
en: Amphoreus, as a Scepter, can be viewed as a mini "universe." This is why Memosnatchers have been frequenting the Herta Space Station.

ch: 是「开拓」打破了封锁，让他们有机会趁虚而入；而现在，这些人一定会不择手段，阻止外部势力干扰翁法罗斯。
en: The Trailblaze broke the seal around Amphoreus, giving these people the opportunity to enter. Now, they'll do anything to prevent outside powers from interfering.

ch: 事实上，当降落用的车厢和翁法罗斯产生接触时，曾闪过一道剧烈的记忆湍流。结合现状，有理由怀疑，那道力量来自……
en: In fact, when the Car you used for landing first made contact with Amphoreus, a violent surge of memories flowed past. Combined with what we know now, I have reason to suspect that the flash of power came from...

ch: 对，那位少女。<color=#dbc291ff>她率先被「记忆」劫持，却用忆质中和了防火墙，让你们二人得以进入翁法罗斯。</color>
en: Exactly. <color=#dbc291ff>She was the first to be hijacked by the Remembrance, but she used memoria to neutralize the firewall, allowing you two to enter Amphoreus</color>.

ch: 眼下，我们和{NICKNAME}失去了联系，只能依靠两位天才的耳目了解世界内部。
en: At present, we've lost contact with {NICKNAME}. Our only choice now is to rely on the eyes and ears of those two geniuses to understand the situation within Amphoreus.

ch: 言归眼下，丹恒先生——我们对翁法罗斯天体周边进行了通彻的有机信号排查，终于发现了您与{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}的肉身。
en: Back to the topic at hand... Mr. Dan Heng, we did a sweep of the area surrounding Amphoreus's celestial body for organic signals, and we finally discovered the bodies of you and {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.

ch: 我们和翁法罗斯内部，完全失联了么？
en: Have we completely lost contact with the inside of Amphoreus?

ch: 但现在，翁法罗斯被剧烈的「记忆」命途包裹，再次阻断了外来者的渠道。
en: But now Amphoreus is enveloped by the fierce Path of Remembrance, once again cutting off all channels of communication for outsiders.

ch: 那是否意味着，现在只有我和{NICKNAME}身上带有翁法罗斯的「通行证」？
en: Then does that mean only {NICKNAME} and I have the "travel permit" for Amphoreus right now?

ch: 螺丝咕姆先生，你有办法将我的精神信号发射回翁法罗斯吗？
en: Mr. Screwllum, do you have a way to transmit my spirit signal back to Amphoreus?

ch: 翁法罗斯的心脏——<color=#dbc291ff>无名泰坦大墓。</color>
en: The heart of Amphoreus, <color=#dbc291ff>the great tomb of the nameless Titan</color>.

ch: 没那么复杂。刚才这段路，正是三月七「翁法罗斯之旅」的起点。
en: It's actually not all that complicated. The road we just walked was the beginning of March 7th's "journey in Amphoreus."

ch: 还记得么？三重命途缠绕翁法罗斯，有三位比肩「令使」的存在在这个世界留下过痕迹。
en: Do you still remember how Three Paths are said to intertwine in Amphoreus? That three entities, each comparable to an Emanator, left their marks in this world?

ch: 这么一会儿，{F#她}{M#他}就成翁法罗斯的大名人啦？
en: {M#He's}{F#She's} barely spent any time in Amphoreus, and {F#s}he's already famous?

ch: 但，它为什么会提到{NICKNAME}？三月七进入翁法罗斯，应当远远早于{NICKNAME}和丹恒。
en: But why did it mention {NICKNAME}? March 7th should have entered Amphoreus long before {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng did.

ch: 后来的<unbreak>97</unbreak>天，她——我们一起，一边躲避{RUBY_B#「智识」}监管者{RUBY_E#}的追捕，一边以迷因状态「开拓」翁法罗斯。
en: Over the next <unbreak>97</unbreak> days, she — no, the two of us — "trailblazed" through Amphoreus as memetic entities as she evaded the {RUBY_B#The Erudition}administrator's{RUBY_E#} pursuit.

ch: 是啊。没人能看见三月七，她不存在于翁法罗斯的「记忆」，就像个透明的影子，只能旁观这个世界。
en: Yes. No one could see March 7th. She didn't belong to Amphoreus's "memories." She could only watch this world from the sidelines like a transparent shadow.

ch: 为了同伴，三月七做出了许多努力，但种种尝试，也只为翁法罗斯徒增了几篇野史。
en: March 7th tried so many things to help her companions, but the only outcome of her efforts was a few Amphorean folk tales.

ch: 贤人万敌，还有…「那霎」？
en: Mydei the Sage? And... "Anaksa"?

ch: 多半就是「永劫回归」，也印证了此前的猜想：这里超脱翁法罗斯的轮回。
en: Probably referring to the Eternal Recurrences. It also proves the previous hypothesis that this place is outside of Amphoreus's cycles.

ch: 哀丽秘榭？
en: From Aedes Elysiae?

ch: 这位星神在翁法罗斯扮演的角色尚不得而知。但如果昔涟无意间踏上了「记忆」的命途，她的「牺牲」就不止是为了重置轮回，还有其他意义……
en: We still don't know the role THEY play in Amphoreus, but if Cyrene accidentally stepped onto the Path of Remembrance, then her "sacrifice" wasn't just for resetting the cycle. There was another purpose...

ch: 哀丽秘榭再过几千年，也会变成这样吗？
en: Would Aedes Elysiae end up looking like this after a few thousand years?

ch: 一位星神出现在她的梦里，缠绕翁法罗斯的三重命途，再加上忆庭不顾一切的入侵行动……
en: An Aeon appearing in her dreams, Three Paths intertwining in Amphoreus, and the Garden trying to infiltrate this world at all costs...

ch: 过去，这道机制是「岁月」和它的半神。但在翁法罗斯进入死循环后……
en: This mechanism was previously the Time Titan and their demigod, but after Amphoreus entered an endless loop...

ch: 以这种方式，翁法罗斯的「记忆」超脱循环，被源源不断地保存下来。而权杖则因为逻辑丢失，陷入一次又一次进程回退。
en: That's how the "memories" of Amphoreus transcended the loop and were continuously stored, while the Scepter had to revert its progress over and over again, because of loss in its logic.

ch: 「翁法罗斯，就不会被放弃。」
en: "Amphoreus won't be forgotten."

ch: 「是不是下一世就能迎来『救世主』，和翁法罗斯的黎明？」
en: "Will I be able to finally welcome the 'Deliverer' and Amphoreus's dawn in the next life?"

ch: 翁法罗斯至深的遗迹，埋葬「全世」过往的大墓……
en: The deepest ruin in Amphoreus, the great tomb where the pasts of "all worlds" are buried...

ch: 曾有人告诉最初的「我」，一切都是虚假的。翁法罗斯唯一的生命，是一场以世界为因子哺育而成的浩劫。
en: Someone once told the very first "me" that everything was false, that the only life in Amphoreus was a great catastrophe nurtured using the world as a factor.

ch: 所以在谈论翁法罗斯的命运前，何不让我们先放下嫌隙……
en: Before we talk about Amphoreus's destiny, why don't we lay aside our differences...

ch: 没错。浮黎在她心中种下虚假的希望，让她相信自己是特别的，而翁法罗斯仍有一线生机。
en: Indeed. Fuli planted a false hope in her heart, making her believe that she was special and that Amphoreus still had a chance.

ch: 我对{NICKNAME}承诺过，要重新编纂世界的因果，创造出一个无瑕的翁法罗斯。
en: I promised {NICKNAME} that I would re-create the cause and effect of this world, and form a flawless Amphoreus.

ch: 以如此巨量的质料为柴薪，足以彻底摧毁权杖的运行逻辑。铁墓将失去孵化的土壤，而翁法罗斯…也能真正迎来解脱。
en: Setting fire to this much material will be enough to completely annihilate the Scepter's operating logic. Irontomb will lose the soil upon which it grows, and Amphoreus... will be truly set free.

ch: 翁法罗斯不应被舍弃。
en: Amphoreus should not be discarded.

ch: 难以想象，这还是翁法罗斯么？
en: It's hard to believe... Is this still Amphoreus?

ch: 刻律德菈，她如何改写「律法」，世人始终不得而知…但我相信，它一定是翁法罗斯对命运的决胜一着。
en: The world never learned how Cerydra rewrote the Law... But I believe it was Amphoreus's decisive move against destiny.

ch: 迈德漠斯的「纷争」之路，再次抵达了光荣而孤独的尽头…一如既往。
en: Mydeimos's road of Strife once again reached its glorious and lonely end... as always.

ch: 在哀丽秘榭，我与昔涟相遇，并联系到了螺丝咕姆和黑塔。他们指出必须在新的世界循环中取得「负世」的火种，但来古士将成为我们的阻碍，要依靠「律法」的力量与之抗衡。
en: In Aedes Elysiae, I crossed paths with Cyrene and reconnected with Screwllum and Herta. They revealed that the Worldbearing Coreflame must be secured in the world's next cycle, but Lygus would stand in our way. Only with the power of the Law could we hope to oppose him.

ch: 在黑塔的提示下，我得到了流光忆庭的帮助，离开了来古士的囚笼。而在命途空间中，与三月七样貌相同的神秘来客「长夜月」带来了「负世」的火种，并将我送回了翁法罗斯。
en: Guided by Herta's hints, I obtained the Garden of Recollection's aid and left Lygus's cage. Within the Path Space, a mysterious guest bearing the likeness of March 7th — "Evernight" — appeared with the Worldbearing Coreflame and sent me back to Amphoreus.

ch: 在我离去的时间里，翁法罗斯的历史流逝千年。昔涟在荒废的奥赫玛城留下了过往的记忆：黄金裔与来古士进行了漫长的战争，付出了巨大的牺牲，为我铺就了再创世的道路。
en: While I was away, a thousand years had passed in Amphoreus. Amidst the desolation of Okhema, Cyrene left behind memories of a long war between the Chrysos Heirs and Lygus. Their sacrifices laid the groundwork for my return, and with it, the Era Nova.

ch: 欢迎来到哀丽秘榭，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}永夜之帷{RUBY_E#}包围的小村庄。现在，这道回忆也属于你……
