en: Welcome to Aedes Elysiae, a small village shrouded by the {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Veil of Evernight{RUBY_E#}. Now, this memory will also belong to you...

ch: 怎么会！既然说了要给我拍照，{NICKNAME}肯定会在翁法罗斯四处按下快门。我总有机会等到{F#她}{M#他}。
en: No way! {NICKNAME} will definitely be snapping away all over Amphoreus because {F#s}he promised me to take photos! I'm guaranteed to run into {M#him}{F#her} eventually.

ch: 哪怕只是透过镜头，我也知道，发生在翁法罗斯的爱、恨、挣扎，跟活生生的人没有区别。
en: Even through a camera lens, I know that the love, hate, and struggles that happened in Amphoreus were the same as what real living people experience.

ch: 假如银河是一座更大的奥赫玛，里头住着一位「凯撒」，那她也许可以替所有人做主，称量天秤两端的重量。
en: If the cosmos were nothing more than a bigger Okhema, ruled by a so-called "Imperator"... maybe then she'd have the right to weigh both sides and decide for us all.

ch: 只有这样，我才能在这场名为「翁法罗斯」的英雄之旅中……
en: Only then can I pen the name "March 7th"...

ch: 在这场前所未有的伟大「开拓」中，也写下「三月七」的名字！
en: Into this Hero's Journey called "Amphoreus"... Into this unprecedented Trailblaze!

ch: 看来，我们在翁法罗斯的「开拓」，也要临近尾声了。
en: Looks like our Trailblaze in Amphoreus is coming to an end.

ch: 奥赫玛、悬锋城、树庭…这几张都不错。不得不说，你的技术快赶上三月了。
en: Okhema, Castrum Kremnos, the Grove... these shots are all pretty great. I have to say, your skills are almost on par with March's now.

ch: 这一世，翁法罗斯出现了一个巨大的变数。
en: That a massive variable has emerged in Amphoreus in this cycle.

ch: 翁法罗斯濒临毁灭，已容不下无意义的争辩。
en: Amphoreus is about to be destroyed. There's no time left for pointless debates.

ch: 凯撒以自己的性命为代价，为最后的「再创世」添加了一道规则：如此，刻律德菈才能确保翁法罗斯不会成为银河对垒的牺牲品——
en: The Imperator added one extra rule to the final Era Nova at the cost of her life. That's how she can ensure Amphoreus doesn't become a sacrifice in the cosmic conflict.

ch: 你骗过了所有人，她更不可能知道你的计划。修改这条律令只是出于保险：防止星穹列车和天才们在她陨落后背叛翁法罗斯。
en: No. You managed to fool everyone. There's no way she could have known your plan. Modifying this law was just a precaution, to prevent the Astral Express and the geniuses from betraying Amphoreus after her downfall.

ch: 最终拯救了翁法罗斯的，除了■■■十二名■■■■■，还有一名关键的■■■■……
en: In the end, the salvation of Amphoreus was not only thanks to the ■■■■■-■■■■■■■ twelve ■■■■■■■ ■■■■■, but also to one crucial ■■■■■■■ ■■■■ ■■■■■■ ■■■ ■■■...

ch: 就算列车没有来到翁法罗斯，她的秘密也总有一天会浮出水面……
en: Even if the Express had never arrived at Amphoreus, her secret would have come to light eventually...

ch: 「…务必小心。翁法罗斯被异常汹涌的忆潮席卷，我也只能尽力而为。」
en: "Please, be careful. Amphoreus is being overwhelmed by an unusually violent memoria tide. I'll do all I can... but even that might not be enough."

ch: 树庭……
en: The Grove...

ch: 既然「毁灭」已将忆潮彻底驱散，该深入其中了。
en: Now that the Destruction has quelled the memoria tide, it's time for me to go deeper into the Grove.

ch: 那道烈焰，烧毁了树庭，惊扰了众生的沉眠……
en: That fiery blaze engulfed the Grove and woke all creatures from their slumber...

ch: 翁法罗斯「大地」的半神。他本该站在我们这边，却受人蛊惑，意图夺取化龙之力。
en: That is Amphoreus's "Earth" demigod. He should be on our side, but he was led astray and intends to seize the power of dragon transmutation.

ch: 这样一来，凯撒陛下的军团就可以从树庭发动奇袭了。
en: Now, the Imperator's legions can launch a surprise attack from the Grove.

ch: 方法…就在树庭中。
en: And the way I'll do it... is right here in the Grove.

ch: 和我故乡的洋流相比，翁法罗斯的水体要更…不羁。驯服它的过程有些艰难，还好我已大概摸清了其中的门路。
en: Compared to the currents of my home, the waters of Amphoreus are... rather untamed. Subduing the waters wasn't easy, but I've gotten the hang of it now.

ch: 翁法罗斯竟还有生者——此人还懂得唤水之术。
en: There are still survivors in Amphoreus, and this one even knows how to use the arts of water.

ch: 为了翁法罗斯的明天，它做出了正确的选择。
en: They made the right choice for Amphoreus's tomorrow.

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>翁法罗斯的至深之地，埋葬一切过往的大墓。</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>The deepest depths in Amphoreus. The great tomb where all the past is buried.</color>

ch: 以此身为舟，我会代你将它们送往明天。那里不是翁法罗斯的西风尽头……
en: With this body as an ark, I will deliver them to tomorrow for you. That tomorrow won't be the end of Amphoreus's west wind...

ch: 整个树庭，都在震颤……
en: The whole Grove is shaking...

ch: 没想到神悟树庭的学问竟然包含了那么多「水分」……
en: I didn't think the Grove of Epiphany's knowledge would be so "diluted"...

ch: 离开翁法罗斯时，我无意中和她产生过接触。或许是不想暴露行踪，她从我的脑海中剥离了那段记忆。
en: I had an unexpected encounter with her when I left Amphoreus. Perhaps to avoid exposing her whereabouts, she stripped that memory from my mind.

ch: 如果我没猜错，按照长夜月的计划，她打算让你遗忘翁法罗斯，包括与我们同行至今的黄金裔。
en: If I'm not mistaken, Evernight's plan is to make you forget Amphoreus, including the Chrysos Heirs who have journeyed with us up till now.

ch: 这是「长夜月」的原话么…如果没理解错，她打算让你遗忘翁法罗斯，包括与我们同行至今的黄金裔。
en: Are those "Evernight's" exact words? If I'm not mistaken, she intends to make you forget Amphoreus, including the Chrysos Heirs who have journeyed with us up till now.

ch: 若有机会，我也想多停留片刻。只是，翁法罗斯还未抵达花海的尽头……
en: If I could, I'd want to stay a little longer, but... Amphoreus is yet to reach the end of the sea of flowers.

ch: 形如「翁法罗斯」的符号？
en: A symbol in the shape of "Amphoreus"?

ch: 除非，不是壁画画出了翁法罗斯的外观…而是见过这幅壁画的人，把世界变成了如今的模样？
en: Unless... the mural isn't a drawing of Amphoreus... but rather someone saw the mural and shaped the world in its image?

ch: 务必小心。长眠在地底的，或许正是翁法罗斯的最后一道命途——「记忆」。
en: Be careful. What lies dormant beneath may well be Amphoreus's final Path — Remembrance.

ch: 为了三月七，也为了翁法罗斯……
en: For March 7th, and for Amphoreus...

ch: 为了三月七，也为了翁法罗斯……
en: For March 7th, and for Amphoreus...

ch: 窃忆者本该大量涌入翁法罗斯，这里应该「热闹非凡」才对……
en: Memosnatchers should be swarming into Amphoreus. I was expecting this place to be "very lively"...

ch: 「别担心。自从星穹列车的粉色姑娘闯入翁法罗斯后……」
en: "Don't worry. After the pink girl from the Astral Express broke into Amphoreus..."

ch: 「我后悔了…我不想再和翁法罗斯扯上任何关系了！求求你！」
en: "I wish I'd never come here... I don't want anything to do with Amphoreus anymore! Please! I'm begging you!"

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>她入侵并感染了「岁月」泰坦</color>，将翁法罗斯沉积的数据转化为忆域的傀儡。
en: <color=#dbc291ff>She hacked and infected the Time Titan</color>, converting the built-up data of Amphoreus into puppets of the Memory Zone.

ch: 她藏匿于「岁月」的夹缝，翁法罗斯最隐秘的角落。也只有最为暴烈的意志，才能冲破忆域，照亮她的去向……
en: She hides in the crevices of Time in the most concealed corner of Amphoreus. Only the most ferocious will can break through the Memory Zone and illuminate her footsteps...

ch: 无需再确认两位的决心了。而今，将由我等接过神明的职责，庇佑翁法罗斯众生——
en: There's no need to further confirm your resolve. Today, we inherit the duty of the gods, safeguarding the inhabitants of Amphoreus—

ch: 而他们将为翁法罗斯，带来真正的明天。
en: And they will bring the true tomorrow to Amphoreus.

ch: 躁动从神悟树庭传来，阁下该启程了。
en: There is a ruckus coming from the Grove of Epiphany. It is time for you to set out, my lord.

ch: 当三重命途再度交汇，翁法罗斯将迎来壮烈的终局。
en: When the Three Paths cross once again, Amphoreus shall face a most magnificent end.

ch: 翁法罗斯的因果，从「大衍穷观阵」中消失了。
en: That Amphoreus's causality has vanished from the Matrix of Prescience Ultima.

ch: 某位树庭贤者曾做过实验：取一枚奇兽胚胎，在长成前摘下它的头颅，向其身体持续输入刺激，让奇兽相信自己仍有大脑，置于灵液匣中培育。
en: A sage from the Grove once conducted an experiment. He took a chimera embryo, removed its head before maturity, and continuously stimulated its body to make the chimera believe it still had a brain, then nurtured it in an ichor vessel.

ch: 你不过是创造了一尊伪神，而翁法罗斯——早已将弑神写入了命运。
en: You merely created a false god... but Amphoreus has long since written deicide into its fate.

ch: 翁法罗斯三千万世，英雄们从未屈服，也从未倒下……
en: The heroes never yielded and never fell during Amphoreus's thirty million cycles...

ch: 翁法罗斯！我并非陡然呼唤你的名字。我来此，是为了讲述历史——
en: Amphoreus! I do not call your name suddenly or without cause. I come here to recount history.

ch: 好啦，现在别纠结这个了。如果*我们*变多了，那翁法罗斯的「门径」也会变得更多！
en: Oh, let's not get hung up on that now. If there are more of us, then there'll be more "passages" in Amphoreus too!

ch: 为翁法罗斯，带来真正的黎明吧。
en: Bring a true dawn to Amphoreus.

ch: 翁法罗斯的因果从穷观阵中消失了——在爻光将军看来，这一异象主何吉凶？
en: Amphoreus's karma has vanished from the Matrix of Prescience. What omen does General Yao Guang see in this anomaly?

ch: 保险起见，我再重复一遍计划：你们要进入翁法罗斯，与{RUBY_B#{NICKNAME}、三月七、丹恒}失散的三兄妹{RUBY_E#}汇合，设法从世界内部定位「铁墓」。
en: Let me go over the plan one more time, just in case: You'll enter Amphoreus, reunite with your {RUBY_B#{NICKNAME}, March 7th, Dan Heng}three separated companions{RUBY_E#}, and try to locate Irontomb from within the world.

ch: 银河已将目光投向翁法罗斯，只待…一声枪响。
en: The cosmos has set its sights on Amphoreus, and now it's just waiting for... the first shot.

ch: 不，当然不用！我早就帮大家勾选同意啦——目标：翁法罗斯！
en: Nah, just kidding! I've already checked the agreement box for everyone. And now, destination: Amphoreus!

ch: 我们也是时候深入涡心，去看看翁法罗斯内部的样貌了。
en: It's about time we dive into the Vortex and see what Amphoreus looks like on the inside.

ch: 奥赫玛一切如常，证明「新世界」不久前，还在享受和平的时光。
en: Everything in Okhema seems normal. The "New World" was enjoying peaceful times not long ago.

ch: 守卫翁法罗斯的十二泰坦。
en: The Twelve Titans who guard Amphoreus.

ch: 显然，你在翁法罗斯受了许多戏剧文化的熏陶。
en: You've obviously been learning from the theatrical culture in Amphoreus.

ch: 「别再给翁法罗斯的世界观加怪东西啦！眼见为实，跟上神谕的指引，来黎明云崖吧——」
en: "Please don't add weird stuff to Amphoreus's lore! Just go see it with your own eyes. Follow the prophecy's guidance and come to Dawncloud."

ch: 「那家伙背负着整个世界，每一次呼吸都与翁法罗斯的命运相连。」
en: "Our good buddy now bears the weight of the entire world, and every breath they take is intertwined with Amphoreus's destiny."

ch: 「由『岁月』守望昨天，由『大地』拱卫今天，直到『开拓』再度踏入翁法罗斯，沉睡的『救世主』便会苏醒……」
en: "Time watches over yesterday. Earth guards today. And when the Trailblaze steps into Amphoreus once more, the slumbering Deliverer shall awaken..."

ch: 是啊，{NICKNAME}，{F#她}{M#他}为翁法罗斯带来的奇迹……
en: Yes, it's the miracle {NICKNAME} brought to Amphoreus...

ch: 话说回来，既然翁法罗斯存在另一颗星核……
en: By the way, if there's another Stellaron in Amphoreus...

ch: 在你来之前，我一直在想，哀丽秘榭的帷幕外，正在诞生的是一个怎样的翁法罗斯？
en: Before you arrived, I kept wondering... beyond the veil of Aedes Elysiae, what kind of Amphoreus is being born?

ch: 我是「纷争」的神王，也是悬锋城的「万敌」。三千万世因果加诸此身——
en: I am the God of Strife, Mydei of Castrum Kremnos. In this body rests thirty million lifetimes of cause and effect.

ch: 往事历历在目，就连每一次横渡冥河的风景，也前所未有地清晰。更不必说逐火之旅的同道，和哀丽秘榭的昔涟……
en: The past remains vivid in my mind. Even the sights along each crossing of the River of Souls have never been clearer. Let alone the companions along the Flame-Chase Journey, or Cyrene from Aedes Elysiae...

ch: 这最后一役，「灾厄」将与翁法罗斯同在。
en: In this final battle, Calamity shall stand with Amphoreus.

ch: 我乃天谴之矛，迈德漠斯。以我的一千道伤疤和一百条性命——
en: I am Mydeimos, the Lance of Fury. I trade a thousand scars and a hundred lives of mine...

ch: 悬锋印戒。我每一世诞生与死亡的见证，它是「万敌」未尽的命运……
en: The Signet of Kremnos. It has witnessed every birth and death of mine. It is Mydei's unfinished destiny...

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>以凡人之名——「纷争的冠军，万敌」——此人为荣耀和自由迈向群星，并如愿以偿！</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>In the name of the mortal, Mydei, Champion of Strife, this soul rises to the stars, for glory and freedom, to have his wish fulfilled!</color>

ch: 「前进吧，英雄们。向着深渊进军，实现翁法罗斯的夙愿。」
en: "March on, heroes. March into the abyss, and fulfill that long-cherished wish of Amphoreus."

ch: 盗火行者？为什么会在这里。
en: Flame Reaver? Why is he here?

ch: 也许你还记得，万敌阁下。在与{NICKNAME}同行的那一世，你对我说过……
en: Perhaps you remember, Lord Mydei. In that lifetime when you traveled with {NICKNAME}, you once told me...

ch: 克莱门汀小姐，克拉特鲁斯先生，还有无数响应{NICKNAME}号召的人，以彩虹为指引，他们用相同的旋律传来喜讯……
en: Miss Clementine, Mr. Krateros, and countless others who have heeded {NICKNAME}'s call... guided by the rainbow. They're sending back good news, all to the same tune...

ch: 「即便知晓命运的真容，翁法罗斯的生灵也毋须自轻。」
en: "Amphoreans need not bow, even when destiny is unveiled."

ch: 「毕竟是树庭贤人口中，翁法罗斯最具眼光的泰坦呢。」
en: "Well, the Sages of the Grove do call him the Titan with the sharpest eye in Amphoreus."

ch: 是哀丽秘榭的…白厄的父母？
en: They're Phainon's parents from Aedes Elysiae...?

ch: 那片冷漠的星空不曾垂怜翁法罗斯。你为什么要替它燃烧，甚至…化作死灰？
en: The cold, indifferent cosmos has never shown mercy to Amphoreus. Why would you burn for it, only to... turn to ash?

ch: 恰如此时此刻，众人将为翁法罗斯编织的「未来」。
en: Just like the "future" we will now weave together for Amphoreus.

ch: 终于，世界内外连通了。这是翁法罗斯距离银河最近的一刻。
en: This world's insides are finally connected to the outside. This is the moment when Amphoreus is closest to the cosmos.

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>博识尊，向翁法罗斯投来了目光。</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>Nous has cast THEIR gaze upon Amphoreus.</color>

ch: 翁法罗斯最不缺少的奇迹，就是「战胜命运」，对吧？
en: The one miracle that Amphoreus was never short on is "defeating destiny," no?

ch: 在宇宙的「记忆」里，翁法罗斯将是一个辉煌、壮丽、英雄辈出的世界。
en: Amphoreus will be a glorious and magnificent world of heroes in the universe's "memories."

ch: 我明白，为了翁法罗斯！
en: I understand. For Amphoreus!

ch: 后方有我，愿翁法罗斯一往无前。
en: I've got your back. May there be nothing that stands in Amphoreus's way.

ch: 我看见，最高的那座名为「奥赫玛」，圣城的身影已初见雏形。
en: I see that the tallest among them is named "Okhema," and the form of the holy city is already taking shape.

ch: 你看，那道照彻树庭的金光，依然在天地间徘徊。就像翁法罗斯的神谕。
en: Look. The golden light that shone upon the Grove still meanders between heaven and earth, like the prophecies of Amphoreus.

ch: 不是哀丽秘榭吗？
en: Weren't you born in Aedes Elysiae?

ch: 总有一种不安挥之不去。就好像在哀丽秘榭，我望着水面，分不清水中的我和岸边的我，哪一个才是真正的我。
en: There's a sort of anxiety I can't get rid of. It's like when I was back in Aedes Elysiae, when the reflections in the water always made me wonder... which is the real me? The one reflected in the water, or the one standing on the shore?

ch: 哀丽秘榭，真安静啊。
en: Aedes Elysiae is so quiet.

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「终于，{RUBY_B#「记忆」浮黎}那位星神{RUBY_E#}向翁法罗斯投来视线了呀。」</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>"{RUBY_B#Fuli the Remembrance}That Aeon{RUBY_E#}... finally cast THEIR eyes toward Amphoreus."</color>

ch: 祂瞥视了翁法罗斯？
en: THEY glanced at Amphoreus?

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「这短暂而漫长的一瞬后，银河便将见证翁法罗斯的答案。」</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>"The cosmos will witness Amphoreus's answer after this fleeting yet eternal moment."</color>

ch: 翁法罗斯之心……
en: Amphoreus's Heart...

ch: 「你是诞生于翁法罗斯，却因{NICKNAME}的到来而苏醒，因{M#他}{F#她}行于『记忆』命途而成长的模因。」
en: "You are a memetic entity born in Amphoreus, yet you only awakened with {NICKNAME}'s arrival, and only matured as {F#s}he embarked on the Path of Remembrance."

ch: 「这意味着，你只能依附于{NICKNAME}的记忆存在。如果有一天——哪怕只是短短几秒——{M#他}{F#她}忘记了你，或是和翁法罗斯失去最后一丝联系……」
en: "That means your existence is completely attached to {NICKNAME}'s memories. If there ever comes a day when {F#s}he forgets about you for even a few seconds or loses {M#his}{F#her} last connection with Amphoreus..."

ch: 「我只想告诉你一件事，有关翁法罗斯这一站的意义——」
en: "So I just want to tell you one thing. I'll tell you the purpose of your stop at Amphoreus."

ch: 可别忘了呀？人家是「翁法罗斯的心灵」。身为「因子」的大家，他们力量的归宿现在不止铁墓一处——
en: Did you forget? I'm "Amphoreus's Heart." For everyone who's a "factor," their power isn't tied solely to Irontomb anymore. It has other places to go.

ch: 所以现在，就请你作为前辈，为翁法罗斯的大家言传身教吧？
en: So that's why I'm asking you... Step up as a senior, and show everyone in Amphoreus how it's done.

ch: 但翁法罗斯的光有十三种颜色，我们可不会输给它，对吧？
en: However, Amphoreus's light has thirteen different colors. We won't lose to that darkness, will we?

ch: …再来一杯吧，迈德漠斯。
en: ...Have another drink, Mydeimos.

ch: 我赋予这星穹列车至高的使命：尔等，务必要将翁法罗斯的伟业散播至银河各个角落。
en: I bestow upon the Astral Express this supreme mission: You must spread the great deeds of Amphoreus to every corner of the cosmos.

ch: 若论起源，悬锋是翁法罗斯最早启用元老院制度的城邦，但我们自光历三千年左右便不再对其进行迭代。
en: Speaking of origins, Kremnos was the first Amphorean city-state to establish the Council of Elders system, but we stopped iterating on it around the year <unbreak>3000</unbreak> of the Light Calendar.

ch: 此事不假。不过，我和吟风爵偶尔也会觉得，在树庭最敬重的泰坦座前恣意畅饮，似有不妥……
en: That's true. However, sometimes Dux Carminum and I feel it's a bit... inappropriate to drink so freely before the throne of the most revered Titan in the Grove...

ch: 我能想象，你、丹恒、还有三月小姐，你们被困在翁法罗斯时，一定十分想念这里的一切：漂亮的窗户，惬意的音乐，列车上的旅伴……
en: I can imagine how much you, Dan Heng, and Miss March must have missed everything here when you were trapped in Amphoreus. The beautiful windows, the soothing music, your fellow travelers on the Express...

ch: 这漫天的星星，在其中的某一颗上，一定也有类似哀丽秘榭的小村庄吧？
en: Among all these stars in the sky, there must be another little village like Aedes Elysiae out there, right?

ch: 而铁墓的殒落，也象征着权杖δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>的衰亡。<color=#dbc291ff>翁法罗斯——我们为之付出一切的家园——如今只存在于银河的记忆中了。</color>
en: The fall of Irontomb also symbolizes the demise of Scepter δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>. <color=#dbc291ff>Amphoreus — the home we sacrificed everything for — now exists only in the memories of the cosmos.</color>

ch: 银河绝对不会遗忘翁法罗斯。
en: The cosmos will never forget Amphoreus.

ch: 「开拓」掠过的每一颗星星，都会记得「翁法罗斯」的名字。
en: Every star that the Trailblaze passes by will remember the name of Amphoreus.

ch: 「收好它吧。也许，它就是翁法罗斯留给银河的最后一件馈赠。」
en: "Keep it safe. Perhaps this is the final gift that Amphoreus left for the cosmos."

ch: 当然。只要《如我所书》还在你手边，翁法罗斯就一直与你同在。
en: Of course. As long as As I've Written stays by your side, Amphoreus will always be with you.

ch: 那，你一定要把《如我所书》保管好啊。只要它还在你手边，翁法罗斯就一直与你同在。
en: Well, then make sure you take good care of As I've Written. As long as it's by your side, Amphoreus will always be with you.

ch: 「你看见了吗？翁法罗斯终于迎来了黎明。」
en: "Did you see? Amphoreus has ushered in the dawn."

ch: 「迈德漠斯，加冕为王吧。」
en: "Mydeimos, become king."

ch: 翁法罗斯最伟大的「诡计」，先溜一步——喵！
en: Amphoreus's greatest Trickery gotta bounce now... Meow!

ch: 不敢苟同。在如此庞大的丛林里，早期奥赫玛的独裁官制度才是能提供生存保障的范本。
en: I beg to differ. In such a vast jungle, the dictatorship system exhibited by early Okhema is the only example of guaranteed survival.

ch: 不愧是树庭的教授…即便对于从未亲眼见过的事物，竟也能如此笃定。
en: As expected of a professor from the Grove... To be so certain even about things you've never seen with your own eyes.

ch: 算上你们在翁法罗斯渡过的年月，列车组的辈分怕是该重新排布了。
en: We might need to reshuffle the seniority rankings of the Express Crew if we count the years you spent in Amphoreus.

ch: 原本我们不用谈论此事。但事到如今，我终于明白了包裹翁法罗斯的那团混沌物质是什么……
en: We were never meant to have to speak of this. But now I finally understand what that chaotic matter around Amphoreus truly is...

ch: 所以，帮帮我们，找到翁法罗斯「记忆」的起点，然后把它带出来……
en: So, help us. Find where Amphoreus's "memory" began... and bring it out.

ch: 这也意味着，翁法罗斯的因果与你无关，至少和现在的你无关。
en: That would mean Amphoreus's causality will no longer concern you, at least not the person you are now.

ch: 不仅如此，你会闭合翁法罗斯的因果。这是一个封闭世界，所以「记忆」为它带来的影响，会全部收束为「你」的影响。
en: And more than that, it means you will close off Amphoreus's causality. This world is sealed. The effect that the Remembrance brings to it will all converge on one thing. That one thing is "you."

ch: 翁法罗斯的孩子，早就不相信神明啦。比起喜欢恶作剧的祂们……
en: We children of Amphoreus gave up on gods long ago. Those beings who love to play pranks on the universe...

ch: 整整<unbreak>97</unbreak>天，三月走遍了翁法罗斯，只为找到拯救伙伴的方法。
en: March wandered all across Amphoreus for <unbreak>97</unbreak> days straight, chasing one goal. To save her friends.

ch: 「三重命途交织缠绕着翁法罗斯，共同谱写世界的命运」——按照你的说法，普通的命途行者不会在镜中留下痕迹，所以……
en: "Three Paths interweave and fetter Amphoreus, co-authoring the fate of the world." Ordinary Pathstriders aren't known to leave traces in the mirror, so if what you said is true...

ch: 为了让翁法罗斯被群星眷顾，「记忆」向银河求援。
en: To gain the favor of the stars for Amphoreus, the Remembrance sent a call for help to the cosmos.

ch: 长夜月小姐曾说，「记忆」并非眷顾翁法罗斯，而是在此蓄谋布局，进行吞并命途的准备……
en: Miss Evernight once said that the Remembrance wasn't looking after Amphoreus, but rather scheming and preparing to devour the Paths...

ch: …倘若我们终究无法冲破这座囚笼，我会坚守。直到有人前来打破这漫长的轮回，为翁法罗斯的命运添上结尾。
en: ...If we can never break free from this prison, I will stand my ground. Until the day someone shatters this endless cycle and writes the final chapter of Amphoreus's fate.

ch: 可是，你知道吗？当翁法罗斯的「心」诞生时，它最先看见的只是一个名字……
en: But do you know what Amphoreus saw when its "heart" was born? The first thing it saw was a name...

ch: 就是我们共同的{RUBY_B#哀丽秘榭}故乡{RUBY_E#}呀。
en: It leads to the place we both call {RUBY_B#Aedes Elysiae}home{RUBY_E#}.

ch: 「∞」最后的缺口就会闭合；<color=#dbc291ff>翁法罗斯的因果循环，将永远锚定在银河中。</color>
en: That final gap in ∞ will close. <color=#dbc291ff>The causal loop of Amphoreus will become a fixed point in the stars.</color>

ch: 我记得，哀丽秘榭的那棵树……
en: I remember that tree in Aedes Elysiae...

ch: 哀丽秘榭…一切的起点。
en: Aedes Elysiae... The place where it all began.

ch: 无论为昔涟、救世主，还是翁法罗斯的每一根枝芽，我将这篇讲述「爱」的故事留在这里。
en: Whether it's for Cyrene, the Deliverer, or every sprouting branch of Amphoreus, I leave this tale of "love" here.

ch: 阿格莱雅；迈德漠斯；遐蝶；赛法利娅……
en: Aglaea. Mydeimos. Castorice. Cifera...

ch: 哀丽秘榭的女儿……
en: Daughter of Aedes Elysiae...

ch: …翁法罗斯的{RUBY_B#十一月}哀悼月{RUBY_E#}，大地上的所有争斗都会止息；哀悼月的第十一个日夜，逝者将离别，生者将相拥，雪花将落下，篝火将升起，照亮每一颗哀怜的心。
en: ...In Amphoreus's {RUBY_B#11th month}Month of Mourning{RUBY_E#}, all conflicts across the land come to rest. On the eleventh day and night of the Month of Mourning, the dead will part, the living will embrace, the snow will fall, and bonfires will rise to warm every heart aching with lament.

ch: 无论翁法罗斯是因何而诞生，但此刻，它变得多么温柔…在我归去时，它想再次为我送上，我们相逢时的那段旋律。
en: No matter how Amphoreus came to be, right now it feels so gentle... As I return to where I came from, it wants to play for me once more that melody from when we first met.

ch: …得先找个安全的地方当根据地。从四周的建筑，还有这尊雕像来看，翁法罗斯肯定存在文明……
en: ...Let's find someplace safe to set up a base of operations first. This statue and the buildings we've seen so far point to a civilization here on Amphoreus...

ch: 翁法罗斯…会得救吗？
en: Will Amphoreus... be saved?

ch: 有关<color=#dbc291ff>「翁法罗斯之心」</color>的真相。
en: <color=#dbc291ff>...The conclusion regarding the truth of "Amphoreus's Heart."</color>

ch: 而它对应的躯壳，就是这台权杖。你干扰实验，将「翁法罗斯之身」变成了一具用来培养铁墓的空壳。
en: And its corresponding vessel... was this very Scepter. You interfered with the experiment and made "Amphoreus's Body" into a hollow shell, all to incubate Irontomb within.

ch: 它长成名为「翁法罗斯」的大树，而「岁月」是它沐浴光的枝叶。
en: It grew into a great tree named Amphoreus, and "Time" became its branches and leaves, basking in the light.

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>哀丽秘榭的女儿，悄然来到世上。</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>The daughter of Aedes Elysiae quietly came into this world.</color>

ch: 「『哀丽秘榭』这个名字，明明取自众神的哀伤……」
en: "But the name 'Aedes Elysiae' came from the unpleasant sorrows of the gods..."

ch: 哀丽秘榭再过几千年，也会变成这样吗？
en: Would Aedes Elysiae end up looking like this after a few thousand years?

ch: 「翁法罗斯，就不会被放弃。」
en: "Amphoreus won't be forgotten."

ch: 「是不是下一世就能迎来『救世主』，和翁法罗斯的黎明？」
en: "Will I be able to finally welcome the 'Deliverer' and Amphoreus's dawn in the next life?"

ch: 「『哀丽秘榭』这个名字，明明取自众神的哀伤……」
en: "But the name 'Aedes Elysiae' came from the unpleasant sorrows of the gods..."

ch: 哀丽秘榭的女儿，真是名副其实呀。
en: The daughter of Aedes Elysiae... I am very true to my name.

ch: 曾有人告诉最初的「我」，一切都是虚假的。翁法罗斯唯一的生命，是一场以世界为因子哺育而成的浩劫。
en: Someone once told the very first "me" that everything was false, that the only life in Amphoreus was a great catastrophe nurtured using the world as a factor.

ch: 看，光照进来了。「救世主」的光，要照亮翁法罗斯啦。
en: Look. A light is coming in. The "Deliverer's" light is going to illuminate Amphoreus.

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>成为「翁法罗斯之心」的力量。</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>Becoming the source of power for "Amphoreus's Heart."</color>

ch: PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>坚持了三千万世，孜孜不倦地赠予它翁法罗斯的「记忆」……
en: PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak> persevered for thirty million cycles and tirelessly gave the Demiurge "memories" of Amphoreus...

ch: 与此同时，丹恒精神折跃回到列车，却发现了窃忆者入侵。众人此时觉察到「记忆」的势力早已渗透了翁法罗斯，并阻拦了外部介入…为了与我取得联系，丹恒决心立刻返回翁法罗斯。
en: Meanwhile, Dan Heng warped back to the Express via a spirit warp jump, only to discover a Memosnatcher invasion. Everyone then realized that the Remembrance's forces had already permeated Amphoreus and blocked outside intervention... To establish contact with me, Dan Heng was determined to return to Amphoreus immediately.

ch: 重返翁法罗斯的丹恒，借用神血呼唤白厄英魂，从天而降的「毁灭」洞开了忆域，找到世界最隐秘的角落。为了追寻「长夜月」的去向，丹恒来到被烧毁的神悟树庭。
en: Dan Heng returned to Amphoreus and beckoned the heroic spirit of Phainon with divine blood. The Destruction, descending from the sky, pierced through the Memory Zone and discovered the most hidden corner of the world. In pursuit of "Evernight," Dan Heng arrived at the charred remnants of the Grove of Epiphany.

ch: 联盟所需的「烬灭金血」，无名客手中正好有那么一枚，那是翁法罗斯的英雄卡厄斯兰那赌上性命，从纳努克本尊处取来的。
en: And it just so happens that the Golden Blood of Ruin the Alliance needs is in the Nameless's hands. It was taken by the hero Khaslana of Amphoreus at the cost of his life, directly from Nanook THEMSELF.

ch: 也许，卡厄斯兰那会愿意将这份金血，交给为翁法罗斯赴汤蹈火的盟友。
en: Perhaps Khaslana would be willing to entrust the golden blood to an ally who went to great lengths for Amphoreus.

ch: 如此…甚好。我谨代表仙舟联盟，对那名为翁法罗斯的世界，和她伟大的英雄子民，致以崇高的敬意。
en: In that case... very well. On behalf of the Xianzhou Alliance, I offer our deepest respect to the world of Amphoreus and her brave, noble heroes.

ch: 权杖报废后，翁法罗斯星域空间持续紊乱了许久，哪怕有信号定位，想找到他们也并非易事。
en: With the Scepter put out of commission, there was a lot of chaos across the Amphoreus segmentum. Even with signal tracking, finding them was no simple task.

ch: 我不在乎，只想拯救翁法罗斯。
en: It matters not, as long as Amphoreus is saved.

ch: 「永恒之地」翁法罗斯
en: Amphoreus, The Eternal Land

ch: 迈德漠斯
en: Mydeimos

ch: 万敌
en: Mydei

ch: 白厄，盗火行者
en: Phainon, Flame Reaver

ch: 哀丽秘榭的女儿
en: Daughter of Aedes Elysiae

ch: 迷迷，昔涟，翁法罗斯之心
en: Mem, Cyrene, Amphoreus's Heart

ch: 姬子，你觉得如何？按照列车目前的状况，我们接受了黑天鹅女士的提议，应该安排一次去翁法罗斯的「开拓之旅」，补充燃料。
en: What do you think, Himeko? Since we've accepted Miss Black Swan's proposal, we should probably head to Amphoreus for refueling.

ch: 我…我们奥赫玛自己的驯养方针，什么时候轮到你个外邦人指手画脚了？难道你不尊重我们的习俗？
en: H—How we rear our livestock in Okhema will not be dictated by an ignorant outlander such as you! Are you disrespecting our customs?

ch: 我名叫苏克提瑞斯，全奥赫玛最无知的老头，也是最虔诚的求知者。
en: My name is Soctires, the most witless geezer in Okhema, and a most devoted seeker of knowledge.

ch: 我名叫苏克提瑞斯，全奥赫玛最无知的老头，也是最虔诚的求知者。
en: My name is Soctires, the most witless geezer in Okhema, and a most devoted seeker of knowledge.

ch: 或许你自恃受到尊敬，不会被凡人的纠纷困扰。但奥赫玛并没有表面上那么欢迎外邦人……
en: Perhaps because you are respected, therefore undisturbed by the woes of the common folk. But Okhema is not as welcoming of outlanders as it appears...

ch: 怎么不是？要不是他们带了坏头，奥赫玛人怎么会这么贪心！
en: Are they not? If they hadn't started the trend, Okhemans wouldn't have learned to be so greedy!

ch: 而现在，希望得到圣城庇护的逃难者数量激增——因为你们击败了尼卡多利，通向奥赫玛的道路也变得安全了许多……
en: And now, the number of refugees seeking protection in the holy city is rising. Because you defeated Nikador, and made the journey to Okhema that much safer...

ch: 灾厄中的资源有限，奥赫玛没法接纳太多外邦人，来者不拒只会让城邦陷入混乱。
en: Resources during disasters are scarce, and Okhema can't take in too many outlanders. Welcoming everyone will only plunge the city into chaos.

ch: 某些激进者确实这么想，说奥赫玛不应接纳任何外邦人。但那样的话，我们在黑潮面前就会孤立无援了——万敌和白厄两位勇士也来自外邦。
en: Some radicals do think this way, saying that Okhema should not accept any outlanders at all. But if that were the case we would be solitary in our stand against the black tide — Mydei and Phainon are foreign as well.

ch: 奥赫玛的资源有限，但也足够为绝大部分外邦人提供援助。真正的问题在于：<color=#dbc291ff>我们愿意付出代价吗？</color>
en: Okhema's resources are limited, but there is enough to aid most of the outlanders. The real question is: <color=#dbc291ff>Are we willing to pay the price?</color>

ch: 假设城门口来了一群快要饿死的陌生人，只要一口吃食就能活下去。奥赫玛当然有能力救助他们，但代价是你我会少吃……
en: If a group of strangers was starving at the gates, and they could live with a mouthful of food, Okhema would be more than capable of saving them, but you and I would have one fewer bite...

ch: 至少在我看来，奥赫玛应当是包容的。哪怕我们不能拯救所有人，也应怀抱更多善意、给予他们足以活下去的资源……
en: How I see it at least, is that Okhema should be tolerant. Even if we can't save everyone, we should embrace kindness, and provide resources for others to live on...

ch: 不知道。可能是他们与奥赫玛存在信仰分歧——就像那位诺杜斯祭司一样。
en: I don't know. Perhaps they have a conflict of faith with Okhema — like that priest of Noldus.

ch: 小友果然爽快。等回到奥赫玛之后，我请你吃饭。
en: You are most forthright. I must treat you to a meal when we return to Okhema.

ch: 而你是和黄金裔并肩作战的英雄。有你在，我们才能平安归来——等这件事结束之后，我请你吃饭。
en: And you are a hero who fought alongside the Chrysos Heirs. We will return safely with your company. I must treat you to a meal when we return to Okhema.

ch: 哈哈，当然——等回到奥赫玛之后，我请你吃饭。
en: Haha, of course. I must treat you to a meal when we return to Okhema.

ch: 如果你实在对他们不感兴趣，也可以把我的邀请当作一份委托——等回到奥赫玛之后，我请你吃饭。
en: If you're really uninterested in them, you can treat my invite as a commission — I must treat you to a meal when we return to Okhema.

ch: 可是，吾师…药品在奥赫玛是战略物资，现在管控严格，一般公民很难买到的。
en: But, teacher... All medicine is now considered wartime supplies in Okhema — distribution is under strict control. Most people won't even be able to buy any.

ch: 放心，这儿的食物都是奥赫玛最好的。就算不是最好，也是数一数二的。
en: Don't worry, the food here is Okhema's finest. Even if it's not, it's still pretty up there.

ch: 怎么样？我说过这是全奥赫玛最好的。当然，价格不算便宜，<unbreak>8000</unbreak>利衡币。
en: What'd you think? I told you I'd give you Okhema's finest. Of course, they cost quite a bit: <unbreak>8,000</unbreak> Balance Coins.

ch: 当然，总有人觉得自己不会陷入困境。只是…谁又能保证奥赫玛的城墙能永远挺立呢？
en: Of course, there are always people who think they'll never find themselves in hardship. Except... who can ensure that Okhema's city walls will stand tall forever?

ch: 我这是在为奥赫玛的利益着想。否则还不等下个门扉时到来，圣城仓库就要被搬空了。
en: I only have Okhema's interests at heart. Otherwise, by the next Entry Hour, the holy city's warehouse would have been plundered clean!

ch: 倘若为了救人而偷盗是大罪，难道你要说现在的奥赫玛建立在不义之上吗？否则，为什么黄金裔是英雄，苏克提瑞斯却成了罪人？
en: If stealing to save lives is such a heinous crime, are you insinuating that the present Okhema was built on injustice? If not, why are the Chrysos Heirs heralded as heroes, but Soctires a criminal?

ch: 就算他捐出全部家当，也不过是他个人的自由。但他不该拿我们全体公民的东西，奥赫玛人的财产只给奥赫玛人用！
en: Even if he donated his entire fortune, that would be his personal freedom to do so. But he should not have taken property that belongs to the people. Okhema's property is only for the people of Okhema!

ch: 你怎么定义奥赫玛人？
en: How do you define an Okheman?

ch: 你的意思是，奥赫玛人生来就是奥赫玛人？只要你睁开眼时不在墙内，这辈子就没机会加入圣城了？
en: You mean, an Okheman is determined the moment they are born? If, the first time you open your eyes, you aren't within city walls, you'll never have a chance to join the holy city?

ch: 你…不要质疑我对英雄们的感恩！万敌勇士乃是悬锋城王储，白厄勇士更是命定的救世主。
en: You— Do not undermine my gratitude for the heroes! Warrior Mydei is the crown prince of Castrum Kremnos, and Warrior Phainon is the destined Deliverer.

ch: <size=28>他们为奥赫玛带来的贡献，一万个外邦人都比不上！</size>
en: <size=28>The contributions they have made to Okhema... not even ten thousand outlanders can dream of garnering!</size>

ch: 那你又为奥赫玛出过多少力？
en: And how much have you contributed to Okhema?

ch: 那在之前的圣城保卫战中，身为奥赫玛人的你又为奥赫玛做了什么贡献呢？
en: In the last battle of the holy city's defense, what contributions did you make for Okhema, as an Okheman?

ch: 不说亲自上阵作战，你有出资帮助灾后重建吗？你做到过所谓「奥赫玛人的财产只给奥赫玛人用」吗？
en: Forget about personal deployment — Did you offer resources to help rebuild in the aftermath? Did you hold true to your previous declaration that "Okhema's property is only for Okhemans"?

ch: 你有没有想过，如果所有人都像你一样自私，谁来将黎明背负？奥赫玛又怎么能成为永恒之城？
en: You ever gave a second thought about this? If everyone was as selfish as you, who would bear the burden of dawn? How would Okhema even become the Eternal City?

ch: 外邦人是没有攻打圣城，但他们也没有守护圣城呀。奥赫玛是因为它的公民才得以幸存，轮不到外邦人来摘桃子！
en: The outlanders did not attack the city, but they also did not partake in its defense. Okhema survived because of her citizens — no outlander should deserve to reap her blessings!

ch: 你觉得自己能代表奥赫玛？
en: You think you're qualified to represent Okhema?

ch: 圣城应该什么样，是你说了算的吗？你能代表全部奥赫玛人？这座城邦到底是冰冷如铁还是热烈如火，应该由它的公民来评价才对。
en: Who are you to decide what the holy city should be? Can you represent all Okhemans? Whether this state is cold as steel or fiery with passion, it's up to its citizens to judge.

ch: 是奥赫玛人保卫了城市。
en: It's the Okhemans who protected the city.

ch: 如果外邦人真是我们的伙伴，为什么奥赫玛被疯王眷属围攻时他们没来？
en: If the outlanders are really our allies, why did they not come to our aid when the Mad King attacked Okhema?

ch: 圣城的资源有限，这个事实不因我们的态度而改变。奥赫玛帮不了所有人。
en: The resources of the holy city are limited. This truth cannot be changed by our attitudes. Okhema can't help everyone.

ch: 圣城的资源有限，这个事实不因我们的态度而改变。奥赫玛帮不了所有人。
en: The resources of the holy city are limited. This truth cannot be changed by our attitudes. Okhema can't help everyone.

ch: 那个…我在外行商时听流民们说过，泰坦眷属都聚集在黑潮下的<color=#dbc291ff>悬锋城</color>，只有你们这些英雄知道它在哪。
en: So... While I was traveling and selling my wares, I heard word from the refugees that the Titankin were gathering in <color=#dbc291ff>Castrum Kremnos</color> under the black tide. Only a hero such as yourself knows where they are.

ch: 这群泰坦眷属就聚集在<color=#dbc291ff>悬锋城</color>中，也只有你们这些英雄知道它在哪，拜托了！
en: These Titankin are gathered in <color=#dbc291ff>Castrum Kremnos</color>. Only a hero such as yourself knows where they are.

ch: 你此时才发现这副石铸的身躯是多么古老，如夜幕下的悬锋城墙一样陈旧而残破。
en: It's at this moment that you realize just how ancient its stone-cast body is. It's just as old and derelict as the walls of Castrum Kremnos under the curtain of night.

ch: 我猜他肯定不住在奥赫玛——这圣城上下的人都光顾过我的店铺，每个客人的名字我都记着呢！
en: I am certain that he doesn't live in Okhema. People from all over this holy city have frequented my store and I remember the name of every customer!

ch: 奥赫玛有旅行社带团吗？
en: Does Okhema have travel tours?

ch: 它的位置每个故事说的都不一样，有的说它在翁法罗斯的最中心，有的说它在法吉娜的海底…还有的说它在一群蝴蝶的背上，于高空中飘荡。
en: As for its location, every story says something different. Some say that it is at the center of Amphoreus. Some say it is in the ocean depths of Phagousa... Some even say that it is on the back of a flock of butterflies, floating high in the skies.

ch: 帕里斯？奥赫玛城中确实有过这样一位城民，应该是戍卫队的一员。
en: Paris? There is indeed no citizen of Okhema by this name. I imagine they are a member of the garrison.

ch: 很久以前，这个名字曾流传于奥赫玛的街头巷尾，人们说那是一个被黄金之茧庇佑的理想之城，在纷争正盛的年代，人人都向往那个地方。
en: A long time ago, this name spread through the streets and alleys of Okhema. People said that it was an ideal city that was protected by the Chrysalis of Gold. In the era of strife, people flocked to it.

ch: 是的，悬锋城便是这样的地方，而我的父亲——如果造主能称之为父亲的话——乃是带来纷争的尼卡多利。
en: That's right. That is exactly the kind of place that Castrum Kremnos is. My father — if you can call a creator father — was Nikador themself, bringer of strife.

ch: 凯旋尚且不能为傲，败退更是玷污悬锋的恶行。它曾告诉它们的先祖：悬锋上的泥垢，必须用血洗去。
en: There is no pride in victory, and defeat is an even more disgraceful act that tarnishes Kremnos. The god told their ancestors: "The filth of Kremnos must be washed clean in blood."

ch: 悬锋城督政官上。
en: The Ephor of Castrum Kremnos appears.

ch: 谁是战场上蒙羞而归的败者？谁是误入鲜血蜜酿的飞蝇？谁是悬锋上应被洗涤入血河的污垢？谁辜负了纷争的尼卡多利之授命？
en: Who is the loser who returned from the battlefield in shame? Who is the fly that accidentally flew into the mead of fresh blood? Who is the dirt on Kremnos that must be washed in the river of blood? Who has failed the duty of Nikador of strife?

ch: 是你——它亲自铸造的眷属。你的血统尊贵如角斗浴血的胜者，你的使命高尚如破腹献肠的祭司。但你却辜负了你的命运，在对奥赫玛军的突袭中失利，败退而归。
en: It is you... The Titankin that they created themselves. Your bloodlines are as noble as a gladiator's, raising their weapon high in victory. Your mission is as noble as the priest that pierces the belly and viscera of offerings. Yet you have failed your destiny, as you were defeated in your ambush of the Okhema army and returned vanquished.

ch: 那兄弟，要是咱们以后打了败仗，是不是也要挨悬锋城的铁矛啊？
en: Does that mean, brother... That if we are defeated in battle, we will suffer the spear of Castrum Kremnos, too?

ch: 呵呵，人们常说悬锋城是个粗野的地方，但看来并非如此——他们不仅为战俘带来了一位朋友，这位朋友还是个美丽的姑娘！
en: Hehe. They all say that Castrum Kremnos is a rough and boorish land, but I see that is not the case... Not only did they bring a friend for us prisoners of war, this friend happens to be a beautiful young girl!

ch: …轻口薄舌的流贼、恶痞、败寇，莫要用谵语侮辱悬锋城的战士。
en: ...Sharp-tongued thieves, scoundrels, and failed bandits should not seek to insult a warrior of Castrum Kremnos with their wild ravings.

ch: 有人闯进来了——穿着不是悬锋城的士兵，你是何人？
en: Someone has broken in... You do not wear the armor of a Castrum Kremnos soldier. Who are you?

ch: 悬锋特色火锅！
en: Kremnos' famous hotpot!

ch: 你们…竟然敢在悬锋城中侮辱尼卡多利——守卫！有闯入者……
en: You... You dare insult Nikador within the walls of Castrum Kremnos... Guards! There is an intruder...

ch: 无耻的懦夫，蒙羞的败者，以尼卡多利之名——绝不允许你们踏出悬锋城半步。
en: Shameless cowards, useless failures. In the name of Nikador, I will not allow you to step one foot outside Castrum Kremnos!

ch: 等等，你身旁的是献给奥赫玛的战利品吗？
en: Wait, do you bring with you a spoil of war as an offering to Okhema?

ch: 嗐，奥赫玛这么大，就找不到一个玩得转这玩意儿的人吗？
en: Hey, with a city as vast as Okhema, are you sure we can find no one that can make this thing spin?

ch: 太厉害了，恩人！我在奥赫玛这么久居然不知道有你这号文武双全的英雄！
en: My savior, you are truly amazing! After all my years in Okhema, I cannot fathom that I knew not of a hero as both wise and strong as you!

ch: 行啦，既然来了奥赫玛，逛云石市集可比骂我蠢有意思多了，我带你看看吧！
en: Okay, okay. Well, as we are in Okhema, a browse of Marmoreal Market would be far more entertaining than sitting around calling me foolish all day. I'll take you!

ch: 放心吧，婆婆，她是咱们奥赫玛的客人。
en: Fear not, granny. She is a guest of Okhema.

ch: 这样呀…不好意思，欢迎你来到奥赫玛，客人。
en: I see... My apologies, welcome to Okhema, dear guest.

ch: 呵呵，这里是奥赫玛，在刻法勒的庇护下，没什么好怕的。
en: Hah, here in the land of Okhema, we are under the protection of Kephale. There is nothing to fear here.

ch: 婆婆我这辈子没出过城，所以悬锋城的事情都是听来的——你们不种地只打仗，估计连水果都只能吃抢来的吧？
en: I have never left this city in my life, so all I know of Castrum Kremnos is what I've heard... like how you live only to fight and do not farm the land. I imagine the only fruit you've ever tasted is what you have pillaged?

ch: 来了奥赫玛，就让婆婆请你吃个够！来点苹果？还是麦迪特瑞恩蜜果？
en: You are in Okhema now, let me treat you to a feast! Would you care for an apple? Maybe a Mediterrana fig?

ch: 喂，这是咱们奥赫玛的客人，别这么无礼。
en: Hey! This is a guest of Okhema. Don't be so rude.

ch: 你们悬锋城人这么不爱看书吗？阿卡迪亚是墨涅塔编织的人间仙境，是它送给瑟希斯的礼物之一。在金丝的缠缚下，天谴之矛无法攻入，灰黯之手无法触及……
en: Do you not read in Castrum Kremnos? Arcadia is a wonderland woven by Mnestia. It was one of their gifts to Cerces. Safe under the bindings of the golden thread, the Lance of Fury cannot pierce it and the Hand of Shadow cannot touch it...

ch: 奥赫玛的城中…有好多这样的蝴蝶。
en: The city of Okhema... There are so many butterflies here.

ch: 真是稀奇呀，天谴之矛的士兵在云石市集可不常见——欢迎来到永恒之城，悬锋的客人。
en: How unusual! A soldier of the Lance of Fury browsing the Marmoreal Market is a rare sight indeed... Welcome to the Eternal City, guest from Kremnos.

ch: 怎么样，我们圣城的生活是不是比天天打架的悬锋城幸福多了？
en: What do you think? Isn't life in the holy city much happier than the life of constant fighting of Castrum Kremnos?

ch: 哈哈，我当然不知道了。如果我有答案，就绝不会在这奥赫玛多逗留一秒。
en: Haha, how would I know? If I knew that, I wouldn't linger one second longer in Okhema.

ch: 或许是没有战事让我感受时间的流逝，奥赫玛的岁月飞逝的速度如同飞矢。
en: Perhaps the lack of battle meant I also felt the flow of time less acutely, but my days in Okhema have flown by like an arrow.

ch: 别害羞啊！给我们看看悬锋城的舞蹈！
en: Don't be shy! Let us see the dance of Castrum Kremnos!

ch: 喂喂，不会是还放不下以前的心里的坎，不想给奥赫玛面子吧？
en: Hey now! You're not still so attached to your past that you cannot do Okhema the honor of a dance, are you?

ch: 这位眷属…女士是我们奥赫玛的贵客，不要将偏见带到这包容的城邦。
en: This Titankin... This lady is a guest of Okhema. Do not bring your prejudices into this city of acceptance.

ch: 云石天宫是法吉娜赐予我们的馈赠，也是奥赫玛宝贵的古老财产。依照律法，戍卫队应该将破坏此处的犯人扣押，交由法庭判处。
en: The Marmoreal Palace is a gift to us from Phagousa, and the precious property of Okhema. According to law, the Garrison must detain any criminal that damages this place and take them to the court for sentencing.

ch: 没错，审判她！连同过去伤害我们奥赫玛人的罪责一起审判！
en: That's right! Take her for sentencing! Judge her for this damage to Okhema alongside the past offenses she has committed against our people!

ch: 这位可是能在悬锋城中来去自如、执掌欧洛尼斯神力的英雄，绝不可能骗你的！恩人，快给他看看你的本事吧——
en: This hero can enter Castrum Kremnos as they please and wield the divine power of Oronyx. They would never deceive you! My savior, quickly, show them your talents...

ch: 自从这个眷属来到了奥赫玛，你就变得愈发散漫。别忘了，你还是圣城戍卫的一员，总有一日要为了保护奥赫玛，而与她的族人相杀。
en: Ever since that Titankin came to Okhema, you have grown even more undisciplined. Do not forget that you are also a member of the holy city's garrison. There will come a day when you will have to fight to the death against her kind to protect Okhema.

ch: 姑娘，你怎么还再念叨着什么命运？若是命运的枷锁如此牢靠，你早就是悬锋城里的砂砾了。
en: Girl, how is it that you are still speaking of fate? If the chains of fate were truly unbreakable, you would have long since been reduced to gravel in Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 神明不会亲手把剑插进我的胸膛，但你们悬锋城的战士会啊。而且他们尚且无心帮助虔诚祈福的信徒，又怎么会有空来管一个胡言乱语的凡人呢？
en: The gods would never pierce my heart with their blade personally, unlike the warriors of Castrum Kremnos. What's more, they cannot find it in themselves to assist their most devoted disciples. Do you think they have time to address a rambling mortal like me?

ch: 不，我已放下了我的弓箭，现在我是奥赫玛城中一位普通的妇人了。
en: No, I hung up my bow long ago. I am now an ordinary woman of Okhema.

ch: 那挂毯上绣的是奄奄一息的奥赫玛人，和挥舞着青铜武器的悬锋城人——因为你而在尼卡多利手中遭受的无数血战，被你织进了一根根纬线之中。
en: The tapestry shows the people of Okhema breathing their last, with those from Castrum Kremnos wielding the bronze weapons... The countless bloody battles that Okhema suffered under Nikador's rule, all because of you, have been woven to life in the tapestries forevermore.

ch: 哼，本以为你已成为了奥赫玛的子民，结果不能对你寄予期望。
en: Hmph. And I believed that you had become a citizen of Okhema. I knew it was wrong to place any hope in you.

ch: 奥赫玛的戍卫长……
en: Captain of Okhema...

ch: 此刻已是圣城存亡之刻，萨白尼、阿狄安、奥利弗兰卡…奥赫玛的藩邦一个个化为焦土，而天谴之矛已将矛尖指向城门。
en: The moment of reckoning has come for the holy city. Sabany, Adian, Alflanke... The vassal states of Okhema have been reduced to scorched earth one by one. Now, the Lance of Fury points its tip at the city gates.

ch: 可我会保护你的，我愿背弃悬锋城与尼卡多利，将一切力量为奥赫玛，为你所用！
en: But I will protect you. I will abandon Castrum Kremnos and Nikador, and give all of my power to Okhema. Use it as you please!

ch: 什么义务，什么使命，我根本不在乎，让悬锋城和奥赫玛带着它们一起见冥河去吧！
en: Duty? Mission? I don't care about those things! Castrum Kremnos and Okhema can disappear into the River of Souls with them for all I care!

ch: 太好了！既然这样，我在奥赫玛城中的理想也算是实现了！
en: Felicitations! My Okhema dream has finally come true!

ch: 呼——还好有恩人在，但为什么悬锋城的战士会闯进城里？
en: Phew... Thank the heavens you are here, savior. But how did the soldiers of Castrum Kremnos get into the city?

ch: 是你让那邪物踏足了奥赫玛…令城中的戍卫对眷属放松了警惕…而她如今就在城外攻打奥赫玛的队伍中——这就是你救下的邪物，恩将仇报的叛徒！
en: You allowed that wicked creature to step foot inside Okhema... You caused the city guards to lose their vigilance around Titankin... Now, she has joined the team outside the gates to attack Okhema... This is the creature that you saved. See how your kindness is repaid with vengeance and betrayal!

ch: 你若与她为伍，则会永远背负着共犯的罪责，永远成为被奥赫玛人怨恨的恶徒。
en: If you side with her, you will forever bear her sins. You will become a villain, hated by the people of Okhema for eternity!

ch: 而、而且，戍卫们会将菲罗克的死怪罪于你们！或许还会将你们捉回奥赫玛，处以最严厉的审判！
en: Further... Furthermore, the garrison guards will all place the death of Philoc on both of your heads! They may even bring you back to Okhema and see that you receive the most brutal of judgment!

ch: 对，没错！菲罗克不会骗我，那姑娘…天谴猎手一定是被她的同类唤起了纷争的本能，选择回到了悬锋城的军队中，背叛了我！
en: Exactly! Philoc would not lie to me. That girl... The Furiae Archer's battle instincts must have been awakened by her kin. She must have chosen to return to the forces of Castrum Kremnos... She has betrayed me...

ch: 第一个猎物，是你的同乡。他在军队的最前排，向你行起悬锋的礼仪，却被你贯穿了心脏。
en: Your first prey is your very own kin. On the Kremnos army's frontline, he gives you a salute, yet you shoot through his heart.

ch: 第三个、第四个、第五个…你不知疲倦地残害着你的同乡，却没有一箭射向奥赫玛人。
en: Number three, number four, number five... You ceaselessly hurt your own kin without stopping for rest. Yet your bow never aimed at any citizen of Okhema.

ch: 你等了很久很久，甚至为奥赫玛的戍卫队击退了一波凶险的敌潮，但你没有等来与你远行的旅伴。
en: You wait and wait, and help the Garrison of Okhema fight off a whole wave of assault. But the man you would travel with never comes.

ch: 你身上遍布圣城军与悬锋军的枪伤，你在这没有友亲的战场上寻找着失约的友亲——
en: As your body is covered in wounds dealt by both the army of the holy city and that of Kremnos, you search for the kin that missed his appointment in a battlefield bereft of kin...

ch: 那姑娘…天谴猎手一定是被她的同类唤起了纷争的本能，选择回到了悬锋城的军队中…背叛了我……
en: That girl... The Furiae Archer's battle instincts must have been awakened by her kin. She must have chosen to return to the forces of Castrum Kremnos... She has betrayed me...

ch: 没错，你是叛徒，你背叛了悬锋城，背叛了自己的同袍父兄，还想抛下这救赎你的圣城，你是不忠的叛徒。
en: That's right. You are a traitor. You betrayed Castrum Kremnos and your family. Then you set to abandon the holy city that saved you. You are exactly the traitor they made you.

ch: 没错，你是灾星，你为奥赫玛带来了动荡，你让这对你有恩的城失守，你是纷争的灾星。
en: That's right. You bring calamity, and you've caused Okhema to fall. The city was kind to you, but you brought strife on them all.

ch: 随着记忆谢幕的余音散去，你们又回到了飘着硝烟的悬锋城。
en: As the lingering echoes of the memory fade, you return to the smoke-filled streets of Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 失去生命的眷属尸首与碎石无异。你知道过不了多久，悬锋城带着血腥味的风会卷起沙砾，将这块巨石磨蚀成尘，飘往远方。
en: Having lost her life, the Titankin's body is no different from a pile of rubble. You know that before long, the blood-stained winds of Castrum Kremnos will whip up the surrounding gravel and reduce it to dust, carrying it far into the distance.

ch: 这只若虫在悬锋城中格外醒目。你知道，弥漫血腥味的废墟并不是浪漫眷属乐意造访的地方。
en: A nymph is an unfamiliar sight to the streets of Castrum Kremnos. As you know, ruins stained with the stench of blood are not a place that the Titankin of Romance would happily visit.

ch: 旧日的悬锋城，一场失败的战争后……
en: The former Castrum Kremnos, after a defeat in battle...

ch: 旧日的奥赫玛城门，一场胜利的战争后……
en: The former Okhema city gate, after a victorious war...

ch: 旧日的奥赫玛城中，一位战士在岁月的流淌中迷惘着……
en: Within the old Okhema, a soldier is lost in the flow of time...

ch: 许久后的奥赫玛城中，无休止的纷争再度苏醒……
en: A long time later, within the city of Okhema, the echoes of endless strife resurface once more...

ch: 在奥赫玛的城外，战士徘徊在注定的疯狂中……
en: On the outskirts of Okhema, the soldiers wander in doomed madness...

ch: 太懈怠了，奥赫玛人！刻法勒没教你们准时劳作的美德吗？
en: You Okhemans are so slothful! Has Kephale never taught you the virtue of punctuality in your labors?

ch: 她还曾让一位老人在耕耘月的头天到奥赫玛的城门边去，在那儿，他找到了在战争里失散的两个兄弟。
en: She even had an old person go to Okhema's city gates on the first day of the Month of Cultivation. There, he found the two brothers he thought lost during the war.

ch: 它说，在残破的命运三相殿里，一位名为帕西提亚的先知在等待着我们，她会带来命运泰坦的神谕，指引我们抵达奥赫玛。
en: It said that, within the dilapidated Temple of the Three Fates, a prophet named Pasithea was waiting for us. She will bring a prophecy from the Fate Titans, leading us to Okhema.

ch: 来到奥赫玛后，帕西提亚女士很快融入了进来。她为被命运选中的人们提供帮助，也会例行给予我们一些谕示，就像今天这样。
en: After arriving at Okhema, Lady Pasithea quickly integrated herself. She offers her help to those chosen by destiny and routinely bestows her prophecies on us, just like today.

ch: 几日前，在奥赫玛闹得沸沸扬扬的，黄金裔们的贵客，对吧？
en: You're the honored guest of the Chrysos Heirs who was causing such a commotion at Okhema just a few days back, right?

ch: 顺便告诉他们，未来的一段时间里，神殿都不需要祭品和草药了。这里没有更多的报酬给他们，要想活命的话，就去圣城奥赫玛吧。
en: Also tell them, in the near future, the temple will have no need of tribute or herbs. We have little else to reward them with. If they wish to live, tell them to go to the holy city of Okhema.

ch: 我明白了。这绝非神谕所启示的毁灭，仅仅是我们这些卑劣的家伙，不满于侍奉命运泰坦的清贫，所以才被扎格列斯蛊惑，逃向奥赫玛而已。
en: Understood. This is absolutely not the destruction preordained by prophecy. Some of us are simply unhappy with the poverty that comes with worshiping the Fate Titans, so we were deceived by Zagreus and fled to Okhema.

ch: 在离开前，恕我冒昧地问一句——我们真的没法逃脱这命运吗？我们可以说服那些固执的祭司，向奥赫玛请求支援。
en: Before I leave, forgive me for asking — can we truly not escape this fate? We can persuade those stubborn priests to plead for aid from Okhema.

ch: 你斟酌的修辞会被无数后人引用，你的名字也会被树庭的学者们所牢记。
en: Your eloquent rhetoric will be quoted by countless others after you. Your name will also be remembered by scholars of the Grove.

ch: 我当然知道我们宣告的神谕是假的，可既然如此，它为什么不把真正的神谕给我们？眼睁睁地看着翁法罗斯走向灭亡？
en: I obviously know the prophecy we declared is false. But since that's the case, why doesn't the Titan give us the true prophecy? Do they wish to simply watch as Amphoreus is destroyed?

ch: 我们可以逃去奥赫玛。
en: You all can escape to Okhema.

ch: 就在我们走进奥赫玛的那天夜里，失去双目的我，在梦中听到了天帷之外的回音。
en: On the very night we marched into Okhema, I, who had lost my sight, heard an echo from beyond the heavens in my dreams.

ch: 不知从何时起，帕西提亚的身边已挤满了前来寻求谕示的市民，仿佛你们所在的并不是奥赫玛，而是过去的命运三相殿。
en: At some point, Pasithea found herself surrounded by citizens seeking an oracle. It felt as if you were no longer in Okhema, but transported to the Temple of the Three Fates in the past.

ch: 大祭司，请您告诉我们，圣女大人究竟得到了怎样的谕示？雅努萨波利斯，不，翁法罗斯的命运，将何去何从？
en: High Priest, please tell us. What order did the Holy Maiden receive? As for Janusopolis... no, the destiny of Amphoreus... how would it be?

ch: 也是，奥赫玛的大家也还在等我回去呢。
en: Yes, everyone at Okhema is still waiting for my return.

ch: 她名为<color=#dbc291ff>帕西提亚</color>，把她带出来，她会带来命运泰坦的神谕，指引你们活着到达奥赫玛。
en: Her name is <color=#dbc291ff>Pasithea</color>. Bring her out, and she shall bestow you the prophecy of the Fate Titans, ensuring your survival to Okhema.

ch: 如果我带着她逃走，逃去奥赫玛…如果，如果，你在听吗？欧洛尼斯，我可以献上一切，我的心脏，我的眼睛，只要能实现我的祈愿。
en: If only I brought her along to escape to Okhema... If only, if only... are you listening? Oronyx, I can offer my everything. My heart, my eyes... as long as you can fulfill my wish.

ch: 何况为襁褓中的文明保驾护航，本就是战略投资部的天职——根据拉帝奥教授的说法，稳固银河对翁法罗斯的共同认知，一定程度上有助于它的未来。
en: Besides, safeguarding new and growing civilizations is precisely what the Strategic Investment Department was made to do. According to Dr. Ratio, establishing a consistent understanding of Amphoreus across the cosmos will aid its future, to a certain degree.

ch: 看来，你早就做好准备了。真不愧翁法罗斯的「全世之座」。
en: I see you've long been prepared. As expected of the "Throne of Worlds" of Amphoreus.

ch: 你转述了《如我所书》背后的故事，和翁法罗斯的现状…
en: You recounted the story behind As I've Written, and the current state of the Amphoreus...

ch: 翁法罗斯也是如此。同为发展中的文明，我们愿意为它的未来出一份力。善意就像火炬，传递下去才能烧得更旺。
en: The same goes for Amphoreus. As a similarly developing civilization, we are willing to contribute to its future. Goodwill is like a torch. It can only burn brighter when it is passed on.

ch: 这是属于翁法罗斯的故事。
en: This is the story of Amphoreus.

ch: 故事里说翁法罗斯有过六个月亮，那他们晚上岂不是不用点灯？
en: The story says Amphoreus had six moons. Guess they didn't need to turn on the lights at night, huh?

ch: 不过…贝洛伯格，会不会有一天也会像翁法罗斯那样，从宇宙里消失，只留下一本书呢？
en: But... will Belobog one day vanish from the universe like the Amphoreans did, leaving behind nothing except a book?

ch: 翁法罗斯没有消失！
en: Amphoreus hasn't disappeared!

ch: 嗯！如果真有那一天，我会像翁法罗斯的英雄们一样挺身而出，保护磐岩镇的大家。
en: Yeah! If that day ever comes, I'll stand tall like the heroes of Amphoreus and protect everyone in Boulder Town!

ch: 然后，我们可以和翁法罗斯签一份和仙舟一样的…贸易决定！
en: Then, we can sign a trade... adornment with the Amphoreans, just like we did with Xianzhou!

ch: 这不是重点啦。重点是，我们可以去奥赫玛泡温泉，坐大地兽…还有，我想养一只小奇美拉！
en: That's not the point! The point is, we can go to the hot springs in Okhema, ride dromases... and, I want to raise a little chimera!

ch: 不过…我们真的能像虎克老大一样坐星际航班，去翁法罗斯旅行吗？
en: But... can we really take an interstellar flight to Amphoreus like Boss Hook?

ch: 虽然觉得翁法罗斯离我们很遥远，但是看着他们在一次次轮回里挣扎的努力，看到最后整个银河摒弃嫌隙，一同对抗毁灭的决心……
en: Although Amphoreus seemed so distant from us, watching their struggles through each cycle, and seeing how the entire cosmos ultimately cast aside their differences to unite against the Destruction...

ch: 你转述了《如我所书》背后的故事，和翁法罗斯的现状…
en: You recounted the story behind As I've Written, and the current state of the Amphoreus...

ch: 我想问个私人问题：你对翁法罗斯的这趟旅途作何评价？
en: I'd like to ask you a personal question: What do you think about this journey to Amphoreus?

ch: 他日得罪负荆去，今朝浴血奏凯来。悬锋故邦皆沦丧，烈火分劈炼金刚。
en: That day he left in disgrace, bearing thorns in apology. Today he returns, bathed in blood, triumphant. Kremnos, his homeland, lay all in ruin, split asunder by blazing fire that forged adamant.

ch: 今日我们不说那哀地里亚的渡冥仙子，且说那「背芒灵官迈德漠斯」。这迈德漠斯，诨名万敌。万敌二字，乃万众难敌之万敌，万人不敌之万敌！
en: Yet today we shall not speak of the Psychopomp of Aidonia, but of "Mydeimos, the Backlit Spirit Warden," and bears the byname Mydei. The name Mydei that signifies "a foe that no multitude could withstand," as well as "a foe whom none among ten thousand could overcome!"

ch: 风割旌旗，雨打残军。遍原哀鸿，但闻狮啸。你道这万敌是何许人也？其乃悬锋王储，为父不容，数载冥海沉浮，炼就不坏之身，蒙千面童姥所召，遂投身逐火大业。
en: The wind tore through the banners, and rain beat down upon the remnants of the army. Across the plain rose cries of sorrow, yet only the roar of the lion was heard. And you ask: What manner of man was this Mydei? He was the crown prince of Kremnos, cast off by his father, drifting for years upon the Sea of Souls, where he forged an indestructible body. Summoned by the Thousand-Faced Matriarch, he threw himself into the great cause of Flame-Chase.

ch: 这可真是：怒狮百战踞高座，悬锋威名永流芳。
en: Now this is epic: Like a battle-hardened lion on its throne, Kremnos's mighty name shall echo through the ages.

ch: 翁星翻覆千轮事，《如我所书》见真章。欲知后事如何，请听下回分解！
en: Through countless cycles of upheaval, As I've Written reveals the truth of Amphoreus. Want to know what happens next? Stay tuned for the next chapter!

ch: 今日我们不说那背芒灵官迈德漠斯，且说那「负阳逐火白厄真君」。这白厄真君生于村舍巷陌，起于微末之中。何奈黑潮无情，凌虐乡野，瓦尽无存，唯他一人得生。
en: Today, we shall not speak of Mydeimos, the Backlit Spirit Warden, but of the "Lord Phainon, the Flame-Chasing Harbinger of Light." Born in a humble village of bucolic background, Lord Phainon rose from the most modest beginnings. Alas, the merciless black tide ravaged the countryside, leaving nothing but ruins, and he alone survived.

ch: 白厄真君先拜于树庭居士门下，后又追随千面童姥。负日逐火，讨获十二火种，百折千回，终得再造生机。
en: Lord Phainon first apprenticed under the Sages of the Grove, and later followed the Thousand-Faced Matriarch. Carrying the sun and chasing flame, he sought out the twelve Coreflames. Through countless trials and tribulations, he at last won the chance to remake the world.

ch: 翁星翻覆千轮事，《如我所书》见真章。欲知后事如何，请听下回分解！
en: Through countless cycles of upheaval, As I've Written reveals the truth of Amphoreus. Want to know what happens next? Stay tuned for the next chapter!

ch: 今日我们不说那背芒灵官迈德漠斯，亦不说那负阳逐火白厄真君。单说那十二金仙讨大君，打得那叫一个天摇地动，那叫一个难解难分!
en: Today we shall not speak of Mydeimos, the Backlit Spirit Warden, nor of Phainon, the Flame-Chasing Harbinger of Light. We speak only of the Twelve Golden Immortals who struck against the Archlord, and what a battle it was! Heaven and earth quaked, the struggle was fierce and unyielding!

ch: 而翁星中，白厄真君以身束缚大敌，十二金仙与之殊死搏斗。但见金丝浮荡、剑影刀光，破空飞矢、淋漓拳脚；自也有，烈风暴雨、奇术技巧，枪尖游龙、棋出杀招。
en: In the heart of Amphoreus, Lord Phainon restrained the enemy with his very body, while the Twelve Golden Immortals fought it in a battle to the death. Golden threads shimmered and drifted, blades and sword-lights flashed like lightning, arrows split the air, fists flew in a deadly dance. Then came storms and tempests, wondrous arts and cunning stratagems, spearpoints like swimming dragons, and lethal chess plays.

ch: 只可惜，不尽轮回，徒留银河一闪，万千追忆，化作故事一页。翁星就此归于原点。
en: Yet, alas, after all has been said and done about the endless cycle, all that remained was but a flash across the cosmos, thousands upon thousands of memories dissolving into a single page of story. Amphoreus returned then to its origin.

ch: 那遮天蔽日的巨木、停于半空的悬锋、流淌金血的英雄浴池…终有一日，此番盛景将重现宇宙；可惜，即便你我寿数绵长，恐怕也只能留待后人瞻仰了。
en: That sky-shrouding giant tree, the suspended peak of Kremnos, the hero's bath flowing with golden blood... One day, this splendid vision shall reappear in the universe. But, though our lifespans be long, I fear it shall be left for later generations to behold.

ch: 列位看官，翁星翻覆千轮事，都付于你我笑谈。若是大限之后，老朽能与那群黄金裔英雄一同，让故事代自己为诸位铭记，倒也算妙事一桩。
en: Good sirs and ladies, the countless turns of Amphoreus's fate are now entrusted to our cheers and chatter. Should it be, when my final hour arrives, that this old man may join those Chrysos Heir heroes, and let the tale remember me on your behalf... Why, that would be a fine thing indeed.

ch: 我相信翁法罗斯。
en: I believe in Amphoreus.

ch: 你转述了《如我所书》背后的故事，和翁法罗斯的现状…
en: You recounted the story behind As I've Written, and the current state of the Amphoreus...

ch: 它们对新生的翁法罗斯——姑且先这样称呼它——很关键。如果顺利，世界的演化能跳过无机生命阶段，向前迈进一大步。
en: They are crucial for the newborn Amphoreus. Well, let's call it that for now. If things go smoothly, the world's evolution can skip its inorganic life phase and take a big step forward.

ch: 螺丝和公司签订了专项协议。未来一段时间，他们会密切关注翁法罗斯的状态。
en: Screwy has signed a special agreement with the IPC. They will closely monitor the state of Amphoreus for a while.

ch: 奔涌的虚数能量让她创造了奇迹：以{RUBY_B#记忆}「自我」{RUBY_E#}为摇篮，闭合翁法罗斯的因果，让一个世界从忆域中诞生。
en: The surging Imaginary Energy enabled her to create a miracle. With {RUBY_B#the Remembrance}her self{RUBY_E#} as the cradle, she closed the cycle of causality in Amphoreus, making a world emerge from the Memory Zone.

ch: 新的翁法罗斯要多久才能诞生？
en: How long until a new Amphoreus is born?

ch: 但这不是翁法罗斯的答案，我想，应该也不是你的。
en: But that's not Amphoreus's answer, and I don't imagine it's yours either.

ch: 其实黑塔女士一直惦记着翁法罗斯。上次她三句不离某样东西，还是收容星核的时候呢。
en: Madam Herta has actually been thinking about Amphoreus all this time. The last time she couldn't stop talking about something was when we contained the Stellaron.

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「翁法罗斯学」！</color>
en: It shall be named <color=#dbc291ff>"Amphoreology"!</color>

ch: 回望来路，你讲述的翁法罗斯，在宇宙间深深扎下了根，静候发芽的那一天。
en: Looking back, the Amphoreus you spoke of has taken root deep across the universe, quietly awaiting the day it will sprout.

ch: 那当然！再怎么说，翁法罗斯也是咱们仨一起开拓的。本姑娘可是一阵好跑。
en: Of course! After all, we three trailblazed through Amphoreus together. I ran my heart out for this!

ch: 这便是你为翁法罗斯写下的最后一笔。它何时会回应，只有命运知晓答案。
en: This is the final stroke you write for Amphoreus. Only fate knows when it will respond.

ch: 翁法罗斯，明天见。
en: See you tomorrow, Amphoreus.

ch: 翁法罗斯有几个月亮？
en: How many moons does Amphoreus have?

ch: 迈德漠斯，真是翁星好儿郎！
en: Mydeimos, you're a true son of Amphoreus!

ch: 翁法罗斯？由忆质构成的世界？胡扯！
en: Amphoreus? A world made of memoria? What a joke!

ch: 翁法罗斯…我要是也能模拟出一个世界就好了。
en: Amphoreus... if only I could simulate a world like that.

ch: {NICKNAME}，我们在「记忆」的路上一起走出了很远很远的距离。虽然*我*记忆中的翁法罗斯会永远轮回下去，将铁墓封印在过去……
en: {NICKNAME}, we've come such a long, long way together on the path of Remembrance. Even though the Amphoreus in my memories will forever continue its cycles, sealing the Irontomb in the past...

ch: 这一幕是《如我所书》的结局，也是现实中翁法罗斯的原点：总有一天，它将孕育出真正的生命。记忆中的人们，会一一诞生，在「明天」等候你。
en: This scene is the ending of As I've Written, and also the origin point of the Amphoreus in the real world: One day, it will give birth to true life. The people in the memory will be born one by one, waiting for you "tomorrow."

ch: 你想起「开拓」的承诺：逐火的故事将传唱群星。人们会记得，翁法罗斯是一个辉煌、壮丽的世界。
en: You recall the promise of Trailblaze: the story of Flame-Chase will echo across the stars. People will remember that Amphoreus was a brilliant, magnificent world.

ch: 是啊，翁法罗斯发生了太多事，三言两语要如何概括？这场讲述，恐怕会持续很久……
en: Yeah, so much has happened in Amphoreus. How could I sum it all up in just a few words? This story... I'm afraid it's going to take a while...

ch: 在你抵达前，翁法罗斯几乎无人知晓。因列车到来，它得以冲破囚笼，奔向群星。
en: Before your arrival, Amphoreus was virtually unknown. Thanks to the Express, it broke free from its cage and raced toward the stars.

ch: 作为逐火的一员，你也投身于翁法罗斯伟大的征程。你与英雄们邂逅、结缘，共创伟业。作为旅行者，你留下的足迹已足够遥远。
en: As a member of the Flame-Chasers, you've joined Amphoreus's grand journey. You've encountered heroes, forged bonds, and achieved greatness together. As a traveler, your footprints have already reached far and wide.

ch: 长久以来，奥赫玛应该都是一个四季如春的城市…至少雕塑上的人们穿得都很清凉。
en: Since a long time ago, Okhema should have been a city of eternal spring... A fortuitous phenomenon, for the statues are dressed lightly.

ch: 在高塔上仰望星空——这是与当今的翁法罗斯彻底无缘的古代情景。某一日，神明不再游弋于天空，于是人们失去了日月和繁星…当地人好像是这么说的。
en: Gazing at the starry sky atop the high tower — an ancient sight that the present Amphoreus will never know. One day, the gods traversed the skies no longer, and thus people lost their sun, moon and stars... That's what the natives say.

ch: 一般来说，有着鸟类身体结构的动物更擅长在白昼行动——猫头鹰等个案除外。这副壁画的构图似乎是一个旁证，说明翁法罗斯人真的很久没有见过自然的黑夜与白昼。
en: Typically speaking, animals with avian anatomy are diurnal — apart from owls. This mural's composition appears to be supporting evidence that Amphoreans really have not seen the natural day and night cycles for a long time.

ch: 类似山中别墅的景致，让你时常忘记这里是一座修建在云端的城市。奥赫玛的水来自何方，又最终会流向哪里？这个问题的答案也许只有法吉娜自己知道。
en: Scenery reminiscent of a mountain villa, often making you forget that this is a city built atop clouds. Where does Okhema's water come from, and where does it eventually flow? Perhaps only Phagousa knows the answer to this question.

ch: 尽管宇宙中的人们彼此生活的环境千差万别，但他们对自然风光的审美却出人意料地一致——甚至在翁法罗斯这个与外部几无瓜葛的世界，人们喜爱的也是流水、假山、绿植……
en: Even if the lives of people dwelling in the universe are light-years apart, their aesthetics towards nature's sights are surprisingly similar — even on a secluded world like Amphoreus, severed from external communications, its people still favor flowing water, faux mountains, and verdant flora...

ch: 曾有人对铁匠如此调侃：「若是哪天『黎明机器」』熄灭了，你们店里的锻造炉怕不就成了整个奥赫玛最亮的东西」。铁匠只是笑笑，并未作答。
en: Someone once mocked the blacksmith: "If there comes a day the Dawn Device goes dark, your forge's furnace would be the brightest thing in all of Okhema." The blacksmith only smiled in silent response.

ch: 此处离天空很近，虽然看不到「晨昏之眼，艾格勒」，但你可以在这里俯瞰整个奥赫玛的风景。
en: This place is very close to the sky. You can't see Aquila, the Eye of Twilight, but you have a scenic view that overlooks Okhema.

ch: 浴场在装修上花了不少心思，就连大门中央的圆形纹饰都有讲究——融合了法吉娜的酒杯印记与雅努斯的门扉缩影，暗示着「一杯入喉，万径通达」的翁法罗斯民间谚语。
en: The baths have been painstakingly renovated. Even the circular patterns in the center of the main door have its meaning, combining Phagousa's goblet insignia with a mini design of Janus' doorway — a clever composition alluding to the Amphorean idiom of "a cup down the throat opens myriad paths."

ch: 不愧是圣城奥赫玛，人们在泡澡这等休憩时间都不忘阅读。不知道瑟希斯知道了会作何感想：它的信徒在浴池里读书，这究竟是对法吉娜的挑衅，还是对瑟希斯献上诚挚的爱？
en: This is the holy city of Okhema indeed — even in their baths, her people have their heads buried in reading books. You wonder what would Cerces think if it knew: Is it a taunt on Phagousa, or a tribute of their devoted love to Cerces, that the Titan's disciples are reading in the bath?

ch: 奥赫玛的种质库，记载着末世中灭绝的物种信息。等到这趟开拓之旅结束，或许可以令它们再度重现银河——你的朋友中一定有不少对此感兴趣。
en: Okhema's gene bank, archived with the information of organisms that went extinct during the apocalypse. When this trailblazing expedition ends, they may, perhaps, resurface across the Cosmos once more — many among your friends will be quite interested in that.

ch: 这片区域被提供给了学者们，用于讲学或是辩论。人们会为了奥赫玛的未来而贡献出自己的智慧——或者为了「烤肉卷饼该不该加奶酪」一事而进行言语上的激烈交锋。
en: This area has been allotted to the scholars for academic lectures and debates. People will contribute their own wisdom to Okhema's future... or be engaged in fervent debate on whether cheese should be placed on grilled meat wraps.

ch: 「老师们辛辛苦苦站着讲课，学生却慵懒地坐在台下走神，是否有些悲哀？」——这个现象在奥赫玛得到了有效改善。
en: "Teachers stand tirelessly, expounding their learnings, yet their students lackadaisically sit below the podium, their eyes glazed. Isn't that somewhat tragic?" This issue has been effectively improved in Okhema.

ch: 但大多数时候，悬锋城的泰坦眷属们会主动寻找敌人。
en: But most of the time, The Titankins of Castrum Kremnos will actively seek out their enemies.

ch: 悬锋城文化的神龛，里面存放着英雄们的魂灵。
en: A shrine from the Castrum Kremnos culture, housing the souls of heroes within.

ch: 细腻而富有肌理，就像红烧肉一样…依稀记得在公司的拍卖会上，有某种古玩的卖点也是如此。不知道从翁法罗斯出去之后，你能不能为它也附加上可以参加拍卖会的价值？
en: Sinewy and full of texture, just like braised meat... You vaguely recall such a characteristic for a certain antique at an IPC auction. You wonder whether you could tack an auction-worthy price on this after you leave Amphoreus?

ch: 对于奥赫玛来说，现实更接近于哪一种呢？
en: Which one is closer to Okhema's reality?

ch: 奥赫玛…真是座神奇的城市。
en: Okhema... certainly is an interesting city.

ch: 泰坦——翁法罗斯最符合「神明」概念的事物之一，与其他世界那些难寻实体的精神寄托不同，巨躯彰显着它的「存在」。
en: Titans — beings that most closely epitomize Amphoreus' concept of divinity. Different from those elusive spiritual custodians of other worlds, their monolithic figures are tangible evidence of their existence.

ch: 雕塑的外形和「黎明机器」有几分相似，难怪有人说奥赫玛的每一寸墙砖都在模仿那位背负光明的泰坦。
en: The sculpture looks rather similar to the Dawn Device. No wonder people say that every single wall tile in Okhema is an imitation of the light-bearing Titan.

ch: 他们的决心固然值得赞许，但泰坦们究竟是何方神圣？它们的力量来自哪里？若要开拓翁法罗斯，这些问题的答案必须写进智库才行。
en: Their determination is admirable, but just what are these Titans? Where does their power come from? If Amphoreus is to be trailblazed, these questions must be answered and entered into the data bank.

ch: 你不是第一次听说这东西，它是翁法罗斯灾难的源头。关于它的来历，你在脑海中闪过了几种不同的可能性，其中一个甚至让人后怕。
en: This is not the first time you've heard its name. It's the source of the disaster that is befalling Amphoreus. As for its origins, a number of possibilities flash through your mind — one of which leaves you feeling quite uneasy.

ch: 博识学会首次观测到名为「翁法罗斯」的新生星体，并正式将其编入星图。
en: The Intelligentsia Guild reports its first observation of a newly formed celestial body, designated as "Amphoreus," which has since been officially incorporated into astral charts.

ch: 公司代表从无名客口中获悉，这颗新生的星球名为「翁法罗斯」。
en: According to information provided by the Nameless, IPC representatives have learned that this newborn planet is called "Amphoreus."

ch: 博识学会的维里塔斯•拉帝奥教授表示，根据「赞达尔回归原理」，翁法罗斯必将衍生出文明，其忆质内容会成为文明演化的重要依据。
en: Dr. Veritas Ratio of the Intelligentsia Guild stated that, according to the "Zandar Recurrence Theorem," Amphoreus will inevitably give rise to civilization, and its memoria content will serve as a key foundation for the evolution of that civilization.

ch: 我们有理由相信，假以时日，翁法罗斯必将成为寰宇大家庭中璀璨的一员。
en: We remain confident that Amphoreus, in due course, will establish itself as a beacon within the cosmic community.

ch: 奥赫玛建筑美学的杰作，眼前的云石天宫依山而坐，显扬不对称的律动之美。
en: An architectural masterpiece from Okhema, the Marmoreal Palace was build alongside a mountain to demonstrate the beauty of asymmetrical rhythms.

ch: 最后的圣城在你眼前展开，阳光掠过负世泰坦之肩洒向人间，奥赫玛人皆可窥见那宏伟的身影——
en: The last holy city lays before you, as the sun, on the shoulder of the Worldbearing Titan, shines down on humanity. All Okhemans can catch a glimpse of the majestic silhouette...

ch: 奥赫玛市民共浴的满溢主池。
en: The Overflowing Bath for residents of Okhema.

ch: 奥赫玛的市集
en: Okhema Market

ch: 旧日的荣光，悬锋的王，荣耀是你的名。
en: Glory of the olden days, King of Kremnos, honor be your name.

ch: 「永恒之城」奥赫玛
en: Okhema, the Eternal City

ch: 奥赫玛的公民议会
en: The Citizens' Assembly of Okhema

ch: 你可真是自说自话啊，万敌，战士之间不需要谦让。等到了尼卡多利面前，我们应当凭实力夺取火种。
en: I see your concern only stretches as far as yourself, Mydei. There is no need for humility among warriors. When we are faced with Nikador, we should use our strength to seize the Coreflame.

ch: 别吵啦！别吵啦！悬锋城现在飘到了哪里我们都还不知道呢，上哪儿找尼卡多利呀……
en: Stop fighting! Stop fighting! We don't know where Castrum Kremnos has drifted off to. Where are we supposed to go in search of Nikador...?

ch: …我明白了。我会遣赛飞儿去看看，如果她愿意的话。现在，我们就在奥赫玛静观其变吧。
en: ...I understand. I will send Cipher to take a look, if she is willing. For now, we shall have to sit and watch for any developments from inside Okhema.

ch: 果然还是偷偷摸来了啊，万敌。你这副身躯实在显眼，别处也就算了，在云石天宫，不被人注意就怪了。
en: So you did come creeping in here after all, Mydei. I don't know about anywhere else, but that conspicuous body of yours is bound to be noticed in Marmoreal Palace.

ch: 若你的长矛洞穿了我的咽喉或者心脏，那么便将王冠拿去，让悬锋新王浴血代冠。
en: If your spear had pierced my throat or my heart, you could have taken the crown and been bathed in the blood of Kremnos as the new ruler.

ch: 荣幸之至。克拉特鲁斯必不惜此身，如铸铁羽翼卫于王侧，坚守悬锋荣耀。
en: It would be my greatest honor. I, Krateros, would give my life and defend your side, like iron wings that hold tight the honor of Kremnos.

ch: 克拉特鲁斯，你在欧利庞手下坚持了三十余合，于众督战勇士中亦最为骁勇，我以悬锋王后之名，将一项特殊的职责托付予你……
en: Krateros. You stood tall over thirty rounds against the hand of Eurypon. You stand as the most courageous of all warriors. As Queen of Kremnos, I bestow unto you a special duty...

ch: 我腹中的王子，迈德漠斯，数月后将来到这个世界。他继承了王欧利庞与我的铮铮铁骨，又日夜沐浴在尼卡多利的神性照耀之下，必将成为新的悬锋之王。
en: Mydeimos, the prince that I carry in my body, will be born to this world in a number of months. He has inherited the iron bones of myself and King Eurypon and been bathed in the divine light of Nikador day and night. He must become the new King of Kremnos.

ch: 欧利庞，不要说笑了，你比谁都相信迈德漠斯。
en: Do not be ridiculous, Eurypon. You have more faith in Mydeimos than anyone.

ch: 若他果真身负悬锋城的未来，朕这颗头颅就是让他拿去又如何？
en: If he will truly bear the future of Castrum Kremnos, what does it matter if he takes my head?

ch: 咳，说笑，说笑。克拉特鲁斯，督战勇士中的魁首，今后你就是迈德漠斯的师傅了。必要时候，你可忠于他胜过忠于我。
en: Ahem, I was kidding, just kidding! Krateros, master primus of the Watchers. From this day forward, you shall be Mydeimos' mentor. When the time calls, your loyalty to him shall supersede your loyalty to even me.

ch: 王欧利庞，您还在犹豫什么！想象我们先前构想的伟业，您是永远的王，悬锋城将万载延续…与这相比，一名婴孩的性命又算得了什么？
en: King Eurypon, what are you waiting for!? Imagine the great undertaking that we conceived. You will be the eternal King and Castrum Kremnos will continue on for millennia... What is the life of a single baby compared to all of this?

ch: …不过，道理朕是明白的。如今悬锋看似鼎盛，背后却危机四伏。在未名之敌黑潮的侵袭之下，就连尼卡多利也逐渐失神。
en: ...I understand your reasoning. Though Castrum Kremnos seems to be prospering on the surface, behind the scenes there is danger all around. Even Nikador is gradually losing their mind under the attacks of our faceless enemy, the black tide.

ch: 为了悬锋城的永续…已无回头路可走了。
en: For the eternal future of Castrum Kremnos... I have no other choice.

ch: 克拉特鲁斯，您当真要离开悬锋城？如今悬锋正值鼎盛，王欧利庞对你又颇为重用，光是王翼冠军的名号就足使万人景仰了。
en: Krateros, are you really going to leave Castrum Kremnos? Kremnos is prospering and King Eurypon places great importance on you. Just the title of King's Aegis is enough to win the admiration of thousands.

ch: 我曾向你的母亲发誓，用生命捍卫你的王冠。在你成王之后，我将做你的铸铁双翼，你若想统一翁法罗斯，我永远会是冲在最前面的那个！
en: I once vowed to your mother that I would give my life to protect your reign. Once you become king, I will be your iron wings. If you wish to unite Amphoreus, I will always be the one who charges ahead of you into battle!

ch: 莫要让你的母亲、你的族人们失望啊，迈德漠斯。
en: Do not let your mother or your people down, Mydeimos.

ch: 你记住了「曾与万敌交谈过」
en: You remembered "Talking with Mydei."

ch: 在某个广为流传的童话中，英勇的冒险者顺着豆茎偷走了天上巨人的种种宝贝，最后还杀死了它。面对着如今的树庭，你忽然意识到这个故事对于天上的巨人实在很不友好。
en: In a widely told fairy tale, a brave adventurer climbed a beanstalk to steal treasures from the giant in the sky, ultimately killing it. Standing now in the Grove, you suddenly realize how unkind this story is to the giants above.

ch: 树庭中每有灵感的火花乍现，巨木便为这思想的新生而悄然欢庆——露水凝聚、滴落池中，如丝雨润海、息吹入风。
en: Every spark of inspiration that arises within the Grove brings silent celebration from the giant tree toward this birth of thought — Dew gathers and drips into the pool, like silken rain nourishing the ocean, or breaths of wind infusing the air.

ch: 不知道它究竟是在守护树庭，还是在等待某个永远不会归来的人。
en: One wonders whether it guards the Grove or waits for someone who will never return.

ch: 这大概就是为什么翁法罗斯的人们总说记忆是最难被掩埋的——它总会找到照进黑暗的缝隙。
en: This may be why the people of Amphoreus often say that memory is the hardest thing to bury — it will always find cracks through which to shine into the darkness.

ch: 「最初的学者」曾在此指出：只有在辩论的时候，我们才算是真正的聊天。自那以后，这里就成了树庭的热门景点。
en: "The First Scholar" once declared here: only when we debate are we truly engaging in conversation. Since then, this place has become a favored gathering spot within the Grove.

ch: 这便是神悟树庭最初的由来——那时瑟希斯还在翁法罗斯为子民们无私地传授着知识，有幸得到传承者变成为了它最初的信徒。
en: This was the origin of the Grove of Epiphany — back when Cerces selflessly imparted knowledge to the people of Amphoreus. Those fortunate enough to receive their legacy became their earliest disciples.

ch: 壁画上记载着树庭的历史：巨树的顶端绘着一道金色光芒，那是瑟希斯将智慧赐予人类的时刻。
en: The mural records the history of the Grove: at the top of the great tree shines a golden light — the moment when Cerces granted wisdom to humanity.

ch: 树庭的学者们说，这是他们最后一次得到瑟希斯恩赐时的景象。
en: Scholars of the Grove say this image depicts the last time they received Cerces' blessing.

ch: 树庭学者们认为这和瑟希斯的审美一致，每个细节都在传递着它的神谕：所谓理性的真谛，大概就是在纷繁中找到本质，即使是在描绘自己的时候。
en: Scholars of the Grove believe this simplicity aligns with Cerces' aesthetic. Every detail conveys the prophecy: the essence of reason lies in finding simplicity within complexity, even in self-representation.

ch: 「学医救不了翁法罗斯」——曾有助手抛下这样的话语，离开了这座微小而明亮的庭院。庭院的主人没有责怪这位助手，她知道同一种光明无法抹平所有人的心伤。
en: "Medicine cannot save Amphoreus!" — a former assistant once tossed out this remark before leaving the small yet radiant courtyard. The courtyard's master did not blame the assistant. She knew that a single kind of light could not heal every wounded heart.

ch: 圣树底部的王座，凡世智慧的顶点——无数树庭学者为抵达知识的宝座而耗尽毕生心血，但现在，它就这样毫不设防地展现在你的面前。
en: At the base of the Sacred Tree lies the throne, the pinnacle of mortal wisdom. Countless scholars of the Grove spent their lives striving to reach this seat of knowledge. Yet now, it stands before you, unguarded and unclaimed.

ch: {NICKNAME}当上了树庭之王。
en: {NICKNAME} has become the Sovereign of the Grove.

ch: {NICKNAME}当上了树庭之王。
en: {NICKNAME} has become the Sovereign of the Grove.

ch: 想要更具幻想色彩的世界，很好。你背负着巨剑与两瓶石榴汁，只身来到了决战平台，挡在你身前的是那位熟悉的盗火行者。
en: You want a more fantastical world. Great choice. You shoulder a giant sword and carry two bottles of pomegranate juices as you approach the final battle platform alone. Standing in your way is the familiar Flame Reaver.

ch: {NICKNAME}当上了树庭之王。
en: {NICKNAME} has become the Sovereign of the Grove.

ch: 树庭学者并没有那么脆弱。比起生命，研究才是更值得守护的东西。
en: We Grove scholars are not so fragile. To us, research is worth far more than life itself.

ch: 我们的，心血，和翁法罗斯的，未来。
en: Our... efforts, and Amphoreus'... future.

ch: 给我吧。我会在结课报告里为你留下第二作者的位置，还会在致谢环节诚挚赞扬你的美德，往后，你就算是在树庭的核心期刊上发表过论文了。
en: Give it to me. I'll credit you as the second author in my final report and express sincere gratitude for your virtue in the acknowledgments. From then on, you'll have a publication in one of the Grove's core journals.

ch: 好。翁法罗斯，照明很差，我们，都要想办法。这些，给你花。
en: Good. Amphoreus... poor lighting. We... must find solutions. Here... take these flowers.

ch: 你呀，就别操心啦。多吃饭、多识字、多读读翁法罗斯的故事，看到你茁壮成长，妈妈比什么都高兴。
en: Honestly, you mustn't fuss over me. Just make sure you eat plenty, practice your reading and read lots of stories of Amphoreus. Nothing makes mommy happier than seeing you grow and thrive.

ch: 他知道布利萨不是悬锋城的对手，遂来求取能够拯救城邦的神谕。辅祭大人告诉他要善待并集结诸多盟邦，如此方能挫败天谴之锋的锐意。
en: He knew that Bulsa was no match for Castrum Kremnos and came in search of a prophecy to save his city. Sir Acolyte told him that if he gathers many allies and treats them well, he will be able to overcome the sharp edge of the Blade of Fury.

ch: 他本以为从此能高枕无忧，谁知悬锋城降临的时候，所有曾受他恩惠的小城邦畏惧天谴的锋芒，争先恐后地俯首称臣。
en: The King was convinced that he now had nothing to worry about. Who could have imagined that when Castrum Kremnos did attack, all of the small neighboring cities that had received his blessings were so scared of the Blade of Fury that they all rushed to surrender?

ch: 好在像布利萨那样牵涉进泰坦战争的城邦还不算多。希望和平能在翁法罗斯的大部分地方一直持续下去吧……
en: At least there weren't too many cities that were dragged into the strife of the Titans like Bulsa was. Let us hope that these days of peace will remain across the majority of Amphoreus...

ch: 身处这般末世，本来就压力很大，加上树庭到处黑漆漆的…我都快疯了。
en: The pressure is already great living in these end times. With the Grove now engulfed in darkness... I am starting to lose my mind.

ch: …是真的。我本来也不信，在奥赫玛之外还能存有昼光。但是，在这个庭院里，真的有一束和煦的光从天井照下来……
en: ...There really is. I didn't believe that there were places outside of Okhema that still had daylight either. However, there really was a single ray of light that descended from the heavens in this courtyard.

ch: 第一，叫我阿那克萨戈拉斯。第二，什么叫「也」？你的意思…你想死在树庭？当真老糊涂了？
en: First, call me Anaxagoras. Second, what do you mean "as well"? Do you mean... you want to die here in the Grove? Have you gone senile?

ch: 那刻夏，我以前和你辩论的时候或许不曾提起：我很早就志愿为树庭奉献自己的一生。
en: Anaxa, I may have not mentioned this in my previous debates with you, but I vowed to dedicate my life to the Grove long ago.

ch: 年轻时我因家庭暂时放弃了这个理想，好在到了这个岁数，还能有机会在树庭燃烧智慧。如今黑潮覆灭树庭将即，我便也无处可去了。
en: I temporarily gave up on this ideal when I was young because I had a family. Fortunately, I had the opportunity to re-ignite my wisdom here in my old age. Now that the black tide has come to destroy it, I have nowhere left to go.

ch: 你的逻辑可真是一团浆糊。我知道你儿子在奥赫玛混得不错，何来无处可去一说？
en: Your logic makes no sense! I know your son is getting by pretty well in Okhema. What do you mean, "you have nowhere to go"?

ch: 黑潮来势汹汹，连卡林尼库斯那样的黄金裔都阵亡了。我就不奢望能离开了…只愿死前能再读一读树庭的藏书。
en: The black tide descends with brutal ferocity. Even a great Chrysos Heir like Callinicus lost their life to it. I don't expect that I would be able to leave. I simply wish to sit and read in the Grove library one last time.

ch: 求援绝非逃兵所为。若无赌上性命的觉悟，半途就会死于黑潮的截击。
en: Calling for aid is not desertion. If you were not prepared to risk your life, the black tide would simply intercept you and kill you before you made it to Okhema.

ch: 啊，温暖而神圣的火。树庭的某位哲人曾说过：｢宇宙的过去、现在和未来是一团永恒的活火，它按一定尺度燃烧，又按一定尺度熄灭。｣
en: Ah, the warm, divine fire. A philosopher from the Grove once said: "The past, present, and future of the universe is an eternal, living flame, burning and extinguishing according to its own rhythm."

ch: 不要再破坏翁法罗斯世界观了。
en: Don't ruin the lore of Amphoreus.

ch: 你不得而知，毕竟在翁法罗斯记忆总是包含着奇迹的成分。
en: You cannot say for sure. After all, in Amphoreus, memory always holds a touch of the miraculous.

ch: 你想起了遐蝶，「冥河的女儿」。初来奥赫玛时，你曾险些被她拥入温柔的花乡…直到肌肤相贴时，你才发现她的拥抱并不能为你带来死亡。
en: You think of Castorice, "Daughter of the River of Souls." When you first arrived in Okhema, she almost led you into her gentle, flower-filled realm... until your skin touched hers, and you realized her embrace wouldn't bring you death after all.

ch: 「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
en: "Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.

ch: 谁是翁法罗斯最聪明的人？
en: Who is the wisest in all of Amphoreus?

ch: 当然是您呀。您就是整个翁法罗斯最有智慧的人，这点确凿无疑吼！
en: It's you, of course. You are, without a doubt, the wisest person in all of Amphoreus!

ch: 谁是翁法罗斯最勇敢的人？
en: Who is the bravest in all of Amphoreus?

ch: 当然是您呀。您就是整个翁法罗斯最有勇气的人，这点确凿无疑吼！
en: It's you, of course. You are, without a doubt, the bravest person in all of Amphoreus!

ch: 谁是翁法罗斯最美丽的人？
en: Who is the most beautiful in all of Amphoreus?

ch: 当然是您呀。您就是整个翁法罗斯最为美丽的人，这点确凿无疑吼！
en: It's you, of course. You are, without a doubt, the most beautiful person in all of Amphoreus!

ch: 谁是翁法罗斯最厉害的人？
en: Who is the strongest in all of Amphoreus?

ch: 当然是您呀。您就是整个翁法罗斯最为强大的人，这点确凿无疑吼！
en: It's you, of course. You are, without a doubt, the strongest person in all of Amphoreus!

ch: 「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
en: "Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.

ch: 不可以吼！本狮曾在悬锋城游历，特别崇尚武德，只认可单独对决的结果吼！
en: No! I once roamed through Castrum Kremnos, where I held martial honor in high regard and only recognized the outcome of one-on-one duels!

ch: 吼吼，听好了。众所周知，奥赫玛有许多可爱的生物，最受公民们欢迎的是哪种呢？
en: Roarrr, listen closely. It's well known that Okhema is home to many delightful creatures, but which one is the most beloved by the citizens?

ch: 答对了答对了！奥赫玛中最受公民们欢迎的生物，当然是本狮吼吼！
en: Yes, yes! The creature most beloved by the citizens of Okhema is, of course, this very lion!

ch: 相传，她将自己的研究以不为人知的方式保存了下来，又把它们分散到了翁法罗斯各地。这些石板可能是她的手笔…但有些细节还是难以解释。
en: It's said that she preserved her research in ways unknown and scattered it across Amphoreus. These slates may be her handiwork... but certain details remain unexplained.

ch: 石板上的内容于我无足轻重——除了遵从神谕、狩猎火种外，再无其他手段能拯救翁法罗斯。但将这些古物保存至今的方法，我很好奇。
en: The content of these slates is of little significance to me — other than following the prophecy and hunting for the Coreflames, there are no other means to save Amphoreus. However, the method by which these ancient relics have been preserved intrigues me.

ch: 嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>树庭入口的石像边</color>……
en: Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>near the statue at the Grove entrance</color>...

ch: 你不得而知，毕竟在翁法罗斯记忆总是包含着奇迹的成分。
