en: You cannot say for sure. After all, in Amphoreus, memory always holds a touch of the miraculous.

ch: 木马外表看上去毫无机关，但你却可以明显感受到，有股神秘的推力在让你们缓缓前进。看来「渡河」云云并非虚言——雅努斯的神力，翁法罗斯人的第一款水上发动机。
en: The wooden horse appears to have no mechanism, but you can feel an unseen force gently propelling you forward. It seems the "crossing" is no mere metaphor — Janus' divine power, the first water engine of Amphoreus.

ch: 嘟嘟。消息发送失败的提示音让你有些沮丧。很遗憾，万帷网是奥赫玛区域限定。
en: Beep beep. The message fails to send, and you feel a pang of frustration. Unfortunately, the World Wound Web is region-locked to Okhema.

ch: 但是，克莱门汀小姐，这是你和风堇小姐好不容易才选定的昏光庭院新址。
en: But Miss Clementine... this is the new location for the Twilight Courtyard that you and Miss Hyacine spent so much time selecting.

ch: 为了重建庭院，风堇小姐确实花了很多心思。无论在树庭还是奥赫玛，当她为昏光庭院选址的时候，总是会跑遍每一处角落，只为找到环境最优美的一隅。
en: She truly put in a lot of effort to rebuild it. Whenever she was choosing a location for the Twilight Courtyard, whether in the Grove or Okhema, she'd search every corner, just to find the most beautiful spot.

ch: 克莱门汀小姐，也请你先行撤离吧，我来帮你搬走这些医疗用具。
en: Miss Clementine, please evacuate this place. I'll help you move these medical supplies.

ch: 嘿，这不是怕大姐头又把我拽去啥危险的地方嘛。现在这奥赫玛可不太平，咱一个小贼灵可不想掺和进啥大风大浪。
en: Hey, I'm just trying to avoid you dragging me to dangerous places. Okhema's not safe right now, and as a little Spirithief, I want no part in big troubles.

ch: …你是说…我们的力量，诡计的力量…骗过了这世上所有的白痴、恶徒和灾难，拯救了翁法罗斯？
en: ...You mean... our divine power, the power of Trickery... has deceived all the world's fools, villains, and even the very calamities themselves? We saved Amphoreus?

ch: 上好的武器，我带来了。保卫奥赫玛，我与诸位勇士一同。
en: Fine weapons, I've brought them here. To protect Okhema, I stand with the brave warriors.

ch: 自从迁来奥赫玛，您的想法确实改变了不少。我想其他祭司们应该会笑着议论纷纷吧。
en: Your views have changed quite a bit since you arrived in Okhema. I imagine the other priests are probably laughing and discussing this behind your back.

ch: 但无论这次尝试成功与否，他大概都不会再回到奥赫玛了。
en: Regardless of whether this attempt succeeds, he probably won't be coming back to Okhema.

ch: 他是翁法罗斯注定的负世者，通向翁法罗斯未来的门扉。
en: He is the destined Worldbearer of Amphoreus, the gate to Amphoreus's future.

ch: 你盯着墙上的排风口，伸手感受着气孔处传来的微风，想起了翁法罗斯的一句民谚：「艾格勒的叹息即是凡间的风暴。」里面会是哪位泰坦在呼吸吗？
en: You stare at the vent on the wall, reaching out to feel the faint breeze escaping from its perforations. A saying from Amphoreus comes to mind: "Aquila's sighs are the storms of the mortal realm." Could there be a Titan breathing within?

ch: 大门上方的光源发出柔和的蓝光，在黎明与黄昏的交替中，它见证了翁法罗斯的兴衰。而你的出现，只是它漫长凝视中的一个瞬间。
en: The light above the gate emits a soft blue glow, witnessing the rise and fall of Amphoreus between dawn and dusk. Your presence is but a fleeting moment in its long, unwavering gaze.

ch: 壁画以金线勾勒出天文仪器、星座图谱与天象变化，艾格勒对翁法罗斯的观测与掌控跃然壁上。你不禁思考，当百眼凝视星空时，它看到了什么？
en: The mural, outlined in gold, depicts astronomical instruments, constellation charts, and celestial phenomena. Aquila's observation and control of Amphoreus come alive on the wall. You can't help but wonder: What did the Hundred Eyes see when it gazed upon the stars?

ch: 壁画上描绘着工具、酒杯与令人费解的器具，这是泰坦的象征，亦或翁法罗斯历史的剪影？或许两者皆是。
en: The mural depicts tools, goblets, and perplexing implements, symbols of the Titans, or perhaps glimpses of Amphoreus' history? Perhaps both.

ch: 难道这就是所谓的再创世，而你脚下的奥赫玛也会变成一片虚空？
en: Is this what Era Nova truly means? Will the Okhema beneath your feet also fade into nothingness?

ch: 再创世？啊，那个预言！怪不得刚刚有怪物在，原来是变天了啊。我还让一个奥赫玛人在神驹里面躲了躲呢。
en: Era Nova? Oh, that prophecy! No wonder the monsters were acting up, I guess we're in for a ride. I even let an Okheman hide inside the divine foal for a bit.

ch: 为保护刻法勒的火种，赛飞儿只身拖延着盗火行者。但那黑衣剑士最终还是回到了奥赫玛，这难道意味着……
en: To protect the Coreflame of Kephale, Cipher delayed the Flame Reaver alone. But that black-robed swordmaster eventually returned to Okhema. Does this mean...

ch: 你回想起车厢跨过云层被长枪洞穿的那一刻，那是冒险的伊始。在那之后，你目睹了燃尽血火的抗争，涉过月色下的花海…直到如今，主宰翁法罗斯命运的星辰渐次亮起。
en: You recall the moment the Express Car crossed the clouds and was pierced by the long spear. That was the beginning of the adventure. After that, you witnessed the strife that burnt out humanity's blood and walked through the sea of flowers under the moonlight... until now, when the stars that govern Amphoreus' fate are slowly lighting up.

ch: 麦粒与面粉是哀丽秘榭的主要物产，凝结着村民们的汗水与心血。
en: Grain and flour are key exports from Aedes Elysiae, each sack packed with the villagers' sweat and pride.

ch: 瀑布的流水急流而下，其中好似夹杂着过去的星辰。传闻中，翁法罗斯的一切水流都是{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的血液。它们从四面八方汇集，流入真正的大海。
en: Water rushes down the waterfall, as if carrying with it stars of the past. Some say all the rivers of Amphoreus are the very lifeblood of {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}, flowing ever onward to the true ocean.

ch: 哀丽秘榭的时间，的确过得很慢。
en: Indeed, time seems to pass very slowly in Aedes Elysiae.

ch: 你想起自己第一次来到哀丽秘榭，是在来古士的叙述中。而当你从再创世的光中苏醒时，便已身处这方美好的小村落。
en: You remember hearing about Aedes Elysiae for the first time from Lygus's tales and when you awakened from the light of Era Nova, you found yourself in this peaceful village.

ch: 你想起那位生长于哀丽秘榭的少女，承载「岁月」的黄金裔。她曾以牺牲自我的代价重置时间，为翁法罗斯编织永不醒觉的长梦。
en: You recall the Chrysos Heir girl who once lived in Aedes Elysiae, bearer of the power of "Time." She had once sacrificed herself to reset the flow of time, weaving an endless dream for Amphoreus.

ch: 总有些东西是刻进人们DNA里的——就比如即便世殊时异，翁法罗斯壁画的美术风格也如出一辙。
en: Some things must be etched into our DNA. Like how, no matter how much the world changes, the art style on the Amphoreus murals looks exactly the same.

ch: 翁法罗斯的海洋如蓝宝石般剔透，在无人知晓的旧日，美丽的「海洋」眷属就在其间起舞…这场幻境的造主也不例外。
en: The Amphoreus' ocean sparkles like sapphire. In forgotten days, those fair Kins of Ocean danced beneath the waves — and the one who forged this fantasia was no different.

ch: 「纷争之半神」迈德漠斯，生于光历<unbreak>4071</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4284</unbreak>年。
en: Mydeimos, the Demigod of Strife. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>4071</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4284</unbreak>.

ch: 换句话说，如果我们在树庭遇见了，或者你们到研究室来找我，想请教我的学问，我只会回应「阿那克萨戈拉斯」这个名字。
en: In other words, should we meet at the Grove, or should you seek my wisdom at the lab, I will only respond to the name "Anaxagoras."

ch: 另外，在你们问我之前，我先解释，为什么是在这里授课而不是树庭——
en: And before you ask, allow me to explain why we're teaching here instead of at the Grove—

ch: 因为现在树庭的学者们正在气头上，打算把那刻夏老师吊起来。
en: Because the scholars of the Grove are currently very upset and are planning to hang Professor Anaxa.

ch: 圣城奥赫玛公派的学生。
en: Officially sponsored students from the holy city Okhema.

ch: 迈德漠斯……
en: Mydeimos...

ch: 我们早已告别过，海瑟音。数百年前，「金织」便已身殒奥赫玛。
en: We have already bid farewell, Hysilens. The Goldweaver has already met her demise in Okhema a few hundred years ago.

ch: 吓到了？哀丽秘榭的微风，可不该把你的心弦吹得如此紧绷，放轻松点。
en: Surprised, are you? The gentle breeze of Aedes Elysiae shouldn't have pulled your heartstrings so taut. Relax.

ch: 回想一下，在你离开哀丽秘榭，回到逐火的开端时——
en: Think back to when you left Aedes Elysiae, back to the beginning of the Flame-Chase...

ch: 你的旅程异常顺利。毕竟，逐火之旅的众人因一道<color=#dbc291ff>欧洛尼斯</color>的神谕相信了「天外的救世主」会降临在翁法罗斯……
en: Your journey has been exceptionally smooth. After all, the people of the Flame-Chase Journey believed in a prophecy of <color=#dbc291ff>Oronyx</color>, and were convinced a "Deliverer from beyond the sky" would descend upon Amphoreus...

ch: 「长夜月」的记忆残影彻底消退，仿佛从未在这里出现过，眼前只有哀丽秘榭的温柔海风和无尽夕阳。
en: The memory shard of "Evernight" fades away completely, as if it had never appeared here. All that remains is the gentle sea breeze of Aedes Elysiae and the endless sunset.

ch: 感谢你，吉奥刻勒斯，是你说服了树庭的学者，让我能够来此访学。
en: Thank you, Geocles, for convincing the scholars of the Grove to let me study here.

ch: 就算是学术氛围包容的神悟树庭，人们也会惊讶于访问学者是一头大地兽，而非一名山之民…解释起来可是费了我不少功夫。
en: Even in the tolerant academic atmosphere of the Grove of Epiphany, people were surprised that the visiting scholar was a dromas rather than a Mountain Dweller... It took quite some effort to explain that one.

ch: 光是注视着山之民与奥赫玛之间一触即发的态势，我便无心再关注其他了。
en: Just watching the tension building between the Mountain Dwellers and Okhema leaves me no room to think of anything else.

ch: 我懂了！我真是天才！放心把武器生产交给我吧喀，我会为翁法罗斯，炸出一个崭新的黎明！
en: I understand now! I am a genius! Leave weapon production to me, crrk! I will blast a brand-new dawn for Amphoreus!

ch: 这样啊。那看来，翁法罗斯的忙碌日子也要暂时告一段落了。有空就在浴宫泡泡澡吧！香喷喷的！
en: It seems like Amphoreus' hectic days are winding down. Why not take a moment to unwind in the bath chamber? It's really relaxing!

ch: 好有活力！但人家总觉得，翁法罗斯的忙碌日子似乎要暂时告一段落了。这样也好，步调慢下来，生活才更放松。
en: Such energy! But it seems like Amphoreus' hectic days are winding down. That's a good thing. Slowing down helps to relax and enjoy life.

ch: 好深奥的发言呢。人家总觉得，翁法罗斯的忙碌日子似乎要暂时告一段落了。这样也好，生活就是既有命中注定，也有许多突然的奇遇。
en: Such a profound statement. I feel like Amphoreus' hectic days are winding down. That's fine, life is about destined paths and unexpected adventures.

ch: 你知道吗？奥赫玛到处都是迈德漠斯的传闻，这个人身上充满了故事…「王子」都是这样的吗？
en: Did you know that Okhema is full of stories about Mydeimos? He's just bursting with tales... are all "princes" like that?

ch: 要人家说，一定是因为两人各有所长。力量、体质、军略，是迈德漠斯更胜一筹，但白厄更全面均衡，更重视技巧，而且——运气也很好！
en: If you ask me, it must be because they have different strengths. Power, endurance, strategy — that's where Mydeimos excels. But Phainon is more balanced and well-rounded, more focused on technique, and — he's also really lucky!

ch: 难分伯仲呢…此外，坊间似乎还流传着「万敌是王座级强者」的说法。虽然不明白是什么意思，但某种程度上，也说明他的实力深不可测吧。
en: It's really too close to call... oh, and there's another rumor that "Mydei is a throne-tier warrior." I don't quite know what that means, but it sure sounds like he's a force to be reckoned with.

ch: 不过，有关迈德漠斯的传闻也太多了。如果都是真的，他恐怕连吃饭的时间都没有吧？
en: Still... there really are way too many rumors about Mydeimos flying around. If they were all true, he wouldn't even have time to eat, would he?

ch: 树庭变成了这样，似乎没时间学习啦……
en: With the Grove being like this, there isn't any time to study...

ch: 但是放心，在奥赫玛，{NICKNAME}是受人敬仰的大英雄！人家会把你的名字，传到每一个人的耳朵里。
en: But don't worry. Here in Okhema, you're a celebrated hero, {NICKNAME}! I'll make sure everyone knows your name.

ch: 你想起自己在奥赫玛也见到过这样的人台，说不定它现在发生了变化？你应该再去看看。
en: You remember seeing such a dummy in Okhema. Maybe it has changed now? You should go check it out again.

ch: 衣匠大军，踏平奥赫玛！
en: The army of Garmentmakers will trample Okhema!

ch: 就在奥赫玛遭受入侵前不久，我得到了一些预言。可惜那会儿诸事缠身，一直没空关注它。
en: Not long before Okhema was invaded, I received some prophecies. Unfortunately, I was too busy to pay attention to them at the time.

ch: 谢谢，这对我和奥赫玛都意义重大——别担心，我会全程协助你，并把解读后的内容与你分享。
en: Thank you. This is very important for me and Okhema. Don't worry. I'll help you throughout the process and share what I interpret.

ch: 在奥赫玛，若虫们以蝴蝶的样貌存在。它们身上的「浪漫」气息非比寻常，应该不难分辨。
en: In Okhema, the nymphs exist in the form of butterflies. The aura of "Romance" oozing from them is unusual, and should not be difficult to distinguish.

ch: 在奥赫玛，若虫们以蝴蝶的样貌存在。它们身上的「浪漫」气息非比寻常，应该不难分辨。
en: In Okhema, the nymphs exist in the form of butterflies. The aura of "Romance" oozing from them is unusual, and should not be difficult to distinguish.

ch: 嗯…有位织者醉心于黄金血的甜美，就像悬锋战士沉迷于蜜酿。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>褔坛的金池中央</color>，似乎有些神志不清了。
en: Hmm... There is a weaver who is mesmerized by the sweetness of Golden Blood, like a Kremnos Warrior addicted to honey brew. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside <color=#dbc291ff>in the center of the Golden Pond at the Altar of Blessings</color>, seemingly disoriented.

ch: 这可不是寻常账本！里边夹着一张旧地契，签署时间是泰坦纷争前更早的年岁，当时奥赫玛还是一片野地呢。
en: This is no simple accounting book! There is an old land deed stashed in there that was signed even before the war of the Titans, back when Okhema was no more than wilderness.

ch: 大敌当前，我自然也想为奥赫玛出一份力啊。
en: With the enemy at our gates, I naturally also wish to do my part for Okhema.

ch: 呃啊！您的风采，能和当年的悬锋勇士相媲美了！
en: Ack! You fight just like the Kremnos warriors of the past!

ch: 近来传闻奥赫玛出现了个「神偷」，风头隐隐有压过我之势。为了给扎格列斯老祖挣点颜面，我决心干票大的重整旗鼓。
en: Rumor has it that there's a "master thief" that's been running around recently, whose reputation seems to be threatening my own. So, I decided I'd do something big and restore glory to the great name of Zagreus.

ch: 悬锋城人把城市建立在这儿，又出于什么考量？就算他们真的这么爱脚底板发烫的感觉，至少也给悬桥加个扶手吧？
en: What were the people of Castrum Kremnos thinking when they built their city here? Even if they really enjoyed having their feet scorched, you'd think they would at least add railings to their bridges.

ch: 塞纳托斯于是又说：「巴特鲁斯，巴特鲁斯，您能偷盗世界上一切东西，唯独偷不到一件。瑟希斯的秘果，高悬在树庭之上，您能如何品尝到它呢？」
en: So Thanatos said again: "Bartholos, O Bartholos, you can steal everything beneath the sky, except for one thing: Cerces' secret fruit, perched atop the Grove. How would you even be able to taste it?"

ch: 「不要相信奥赫玛人，即便他只是住在奥赫玛城郊。」
en: "Do not trust Okhemans, even if they only live in its outskirts."

ch: 扎格列斯老祖在被奥赫玛元老们设计陷害时如此评价道。
en: Ancestor Zagreus espoused these words when ensnared in a trap set by the Okheman Elders.

ch: 塞纳托斯于是又说：「巴特鲁斯，巴特鲁斯，您能偷盗世界上一切东西，唯独偷不到一件。瑟希斯的秘果，高悬在树庭之上，您能如何品尝到它呢？」
en: So Thanatos said again: "Bartholos, O Bartholos, you can steal everything beneath the sky, except for one thing: Cerces' secret fruit, perched atop the Grove. How would you even be able to taste it?"

ch: 「不要相信奥赫玛人，即便他只是住在奥赫玛城郊。」
en: "Do not trust Okhemans, even if they only live in its outskirts."

ch: ——扎格列斯老祖在被奥赫玛元老们设计陷害时如此评价道。
en: ...Ancestor Zagreus espoused these words when ensnared in a trap set by the Okheman Elders.

ch: 哦哟，没有在这{RUBY_B#树庭}树林子{RUBY_E#}里迷路啊，不错不错。
en: Oh my, finding your way through {RUBY_B#the Grove}the woods{RUBY_E#} without getting lost? Impressive, impressive.

ch: 好啦，这种子本身也不是我想偷的东西，就大方地送给你吧。这树林子里只能进、不能出的道路不止一处，你可千万别阴沟翻船搞迷了路啊？
en: Tell you what. I wasn't really after this seed anyway, so consider it yours. Just remember — the Grove's paths often lead you in, but not back out. Mind you, don't lose your way!

ch: 桀桀桀，你的身手果然越来越好啦！能有你这样的侠义之士保护着翁法罗斯，我巴特鲁斯就算是香消玉殒…咳咳，咱这是在胡说些什么啊。
en: Hehehe, your skills have gotten impressive! With a valiant hero like you protecting Amphoreus, I, Bartholos, can rest in peace... Ahem, what nonsense am I spouting?

ch: 只是，翁法罗斯是个很小的世界，即使诡计多端的巴特鲁斯也渐渐发现自己没有新的角色可以扮演。但你——巴特鲁斯最好的朋友之一，却依然乐意和它游戏。
en: But Amphoreus is a tiny world, and even the tricky Bartholos ran out of roles to play. Yet you — one of their best friends — still enjoyed playing along.

ch: 所以，还是算了吧！我即将动身去和真正的巴特鲁斯会合，而你…不出意外，你将见证翁法罗斯最后、也是最初的命运。桀桀，掰掰！
en: So, never mind! I'm off to rejoin the real Bartholos, and you... if all goes as planned, you'll witness Amphoreus' last — yet also first — destiny. Hehe, see ya!

ch: （假设台词）唉…果然还是要谨记泰坦的教诲，钱财乃身外之物…世界马上就要重启了，我是用不到这些私房钱了，就全送给你吧！说不定你的口袋反而能把它们带进下一世的翁法罗斯！
en: (Invented dialogue) Alas... I should've followed the Titans' teaching that riches are temporary... with the world about to restart, these savings are useless to me, so take them all! Maybe your pockets can bring them into the next Amphoreus!

ch: 别误会——第一，咱就是货真价实的巴特鲁斯；第二，货真价实的巴特鲁斯，在「正常时间」中，也确实不会出现在此时此刻的哀丽秘榭。
en: Don't get it twisted — first, I am the one and only real Bartholos. Second, the real Bartholos truly wouldn't be in Aedes Elysiae right now, "normally."

ch: 别误会——第一，咱就是货真价实的巴特鲁斯；第二，货真价实的巴特鲁斯，在「正常时间」中，也确实不会出现在此时此刻的哀丽秘榭。
en: Don't get it twisted — first, I am the one and only real Bartholos. Second, the real Bartholos truly wouldn't be in Aedes Elysiae right now, "normally."

ch: 在很久很久以前——啊，也可能就在上个轮回里——有一支来自哈图西里的雇佣兵被困在了奥赫玛城外。
en: A long, long time ago... Ah, or maybe it was just the last cycle... a group of mercenaries from Hattusili found themselves stranded outside the city of Okhema.

ch: 据说，世界上的第一个旅行杂技团就这样诞生了；他们从奥赫玛一路表演回了遥远的哈图西里，从此再也没有从事雇佣兵的工作。
en: And just like that, the world's first traveling acrobatic troupe was born. They performed their way from Okhema to far-off Hattusili and never went back to mercenary life.

ch: 桀桀，看这边，看这边。我听说，从这里出去就能离开翁法罗斯…这事儿是真是假？
en: Hehehe, look this way, over here. I heard you can get out of Amphoreus through here... is that true?

ch: 你别说…咱有时候就想，对于更外面的世界来说，翁法罗斯是不是就像一个大大的宝箱？要是这样，和咱们作对的铁墓，大概就相当于一只讨厌的宝箱怪吧！
en: Y'know what... Sometimes I wonder if Amphoreus is like one big treasure chest to the outside world? If that's the case, then Irontomb, our enemy, would be nothing but an annoying mimic!

ch: 你知道这些柱子是什么吗？桀桀，它们是支撑翁法罗斯的服务器——我猜是这样。
en: You know what these pillars are? Heheh, they're the servers that keep Amphoreus running, or so I'd guess.

ch: 喂喂，我现在可是卡在了翁法罗斯的服务器上唉！关心一下你的老伙计啦。
en: C'mon, I'm literally stuck inside the Amphoreus servers here! Spare a thought for your old pal here, will you?

ch: 翁法罗斯，是否让您留下了遗憾？
en: Do you have any regrets about your time in Amphoreus?

ch: 巴特鲁斯会买下奥赫玛的一整条街，以后想偷哪家就偷哪家；您呢，以后要是想回来坐坐，举会儿黎明机器玩玩也不在话下……
en: I'll buy a whole street in Okhema to rob any place whenever I want. And you, if you ever want to come back and visit, you can play with the Dawn Device all you want...

ch: 如果不算那些留着金血的英雄豪杰，毫无疑问——咱巴特鲁斯，就是在这{RUBY_B#翁法罗斯}方寸果壳{RUBY_E#}里陪伴了您最久的朋友。
en: If you don't count those heroes with golden blood, then without a doubt: I, Bartholos, have been your longest companion in this little {RUBY_B#Amphoreus}nutshell{RUBY_E#}.

ch: 这位安提基色拉人，就是我老师的老师，来古士老师。在整个奥赫玛，能流利诵读古泰坦语的学者，也只有他一人而已。
en: This is my teacher's teacher, the Antikytheran scholar, Mr. Lygus. He's the only one in all of Okhema who can fluently recite ancient Titan texts.

ch: 恩维尔同学谬赞了。只是安提基色拉人天然擅长记住各种零碎的知识，所以能帮助奥赫玛做一些力所能及的工作。
en: Avilius, you flatter me. Antikytherans are naturally good at remembering bits and pieces of knowledge, so I simply assist Okhema in ways I can.

ch: 别急着谢我，哦…对了，虽然这话说出来多少显得对树庭缺乏尊重，不过——
en: Don't thank me just yet. Oh, by the way... though I mean no disrespect to the Grove... but—

ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，您可否帮我借树庭的「瑟希斯之心」一用？
en: {NICKNAME}, could you help me borrow the "Heart of Cerces" from the Grove?

ch: 可是…{F#她}{M#他}甚至不是树庭的学生…再说那个心，比人大多了……
en: But... {F#she}{M#he} isn't even a student of the Grove... Besides, that heart is much bigger than a person...

ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，请收好这件小装置。如果您有空路过树庭，可以在「瑟希斯之心」晶体的下方找到一个小小的插口——刚好符合插入这件装置的规格。
en: {NICKNAME}, please take this little device. If you pass through the Grove, you'll find a small slot under the "Heart of Cerces" crystal. This device should fit perfectly.

ch: 哇！不过，树庭真的会同意让我们……？
en: Wow! But... will the Grove really let us...?

ch: 恩维尔。树庭…不久前遭遇了黑潮的袭击……
en: Avilius. The Grove... it was recently attacked by the black tide...

ch: 不知道。但按照有限的情报推断，最有可能的…是那个毁灭树庭的恐怖剑士。除了那缺乏理智的黑潮怪物，没人会故意去毁坏「瑟希斯之心」。
en: I'm not sure. But based on the limited information we have, the most likely culprit is the terrifying swordmaster who destroyed the Grove. Other than the mindless monsters of the black tide, no one else would deliberately damage the "Heart of Cerces."

ch: 也许我们翻译出的《黄金替罪羊的呓语》，就和那个毁灭树庭的剑士有关？意味着那个人的某种过去？
en: Maybe our translations of Golden Scapegoat's Mutterings are somehow connected to the swordmaster who destroyed the Grove? Could they reflect something from that person's past?

ch: 走，跟我去奥赫玛。
en: Come, let's go to Okhema together.

ch: 从树庭「绳结学派」结业时，大家都以为我会成为一位工程兵…但在本该去应征的那天，我却选择对它宣誓，成为了一名祭司。
en: When I graduated from Nodism in the Grove, everyone assumed I'd become an engineer. But on the day I was supposed to enlist... I swore my oath instead. I became a priest.

ch: 从树庭「绳结学派」结业时，大家都以为我会成为一位工程兵…但在本该去应征的那天，我却选择对它宣誓，成为了一名祭司。
en: When I graduated from Nodism in the Grove, everyone assumed I'd become an engineer. But on the day I was supposed to enlist... I swore my oath instead. I became a priest.

ch: 「然后，我就能证明，整个翁法罗斯都是以艾格勒为中心，进行周期性的旋转运动！」在雷鸣般的锻造声里，学者自言自语。
en: "And then, I can prove that the entirety of Amphoreus is centered around Aquila, revolving in periodic motion!" The scholar mutters to himself over the thunderous clamor of the forge.

ch: 你听说悬锋城正在举办新的竞技比赛，刻法勒在上，看来你注定要在那里夺得最初的荣誉。
en: You hear that Castrum Kremnos is holding a new tournament. Kephale above, it appears you are destined to seize your inaugural glory there.

ch: 好一位勇士！就连悬锋城的本地观众，都不由得为你喝彩。
en: What a warrior! Even the local spectators at Castrum Kremnos can't help but cheer you on.

ch: 更别提，错误的撰写人，还是树庭中赫赫有名的学者。你看向眼前正在分裂繁殖的小家伙们，苦恼是否要修正培育方案中的错误。
en: Not to mention that the one who made the erroneous entry is a prominent scholar of the Grove. You look at the tiny critters multiplying before you, conflicted over whether to correct the error in the breeding scheme.

ch: 已功成名就的你骤然意识到，这正是多年前被你无视的错误数据，在机缘巧合下诱发的结果。如果这件事被捅了出去，想必你很快就会被树庭扫地出门。
en: Having achieved fame, you suddenly realize that this is the result of a stroke of luck from the erroneous data that you ignored all those years ago. If this matter were to get out, you would surely be unceremoniously cast out of the Grove.

ch: 你的丑闻成为了树庭内的一大谈资，但至少，未来的学者再也不会被这样的错误刁难了。
en: Your scandal has become a hot topic within the Grove, but at least future scholars won't be obstructed by such blunders again.

ch: 拟造的螺丝咕姆站在商店前，饶有趣味地看着眼前的世界。看来，他没有在意差分宇宙被你和树庭联合复刻这件事。
en: The simulated Screwllum stands before the shop, observing the world with keen interest. It seems he's not bothered by the fact that you and the Grove have recreated the Divergent Universe altogether.

ch: 「即使身处困境，也能让你如此挂念，我感到十分荣幸」，螺丝咕姆亲切地向你问好，「至于树庭的文档解析工作，就由我来为你带来更多『祝福』。」
en: "Even in difficult times, to know that you think of me is an honor." Screwllum greets you warmly. "As for the Grove's document analysis work, I'll be the one to bring you even more 'Blessings'."

ch: 为何千年以来，尼卡多利唯独对晨昏之眼穷追不舍？是因为它的雷枪杀死了僭越天空的狂徒，故而要向天空的暴君复仇？还是因为，浴血的战士希冀挑战翁法罗斯最为强大的权威？
en: Why has Nikador relentlessly pursued the Eye of Twilight for a thousand years? Are they seeking vengeance against the tyrants of the skies for striking down the rebels who dared to reach their heights with their Lightning Spear? Or does the blood-stained warrior aim to challenge the most supreme authority in Amphoreus?

ch: 伤痕不断地出现在两位泰坦的神体，然后又痊愈，直至千年，胜负也未曾锚定。悬锋之下的尼卡多利终丧失理性，圣城之巅的刻法勒已长眠不醒。
en: Scars etch themselves again and again into the divine bodies of the two Titans, only to heal and reappear, with no victor after a thousand years. Beneath Kremnos, Nikador has descended into madness, while atop the holy city, Kephale remains in eternal slumber.

ch: 而战争的军团，仍怀揣着最后的荣耀，向着远方的奥赫玛进军。
en: Yet the legion of war, clinging to the last vestiges of its glory, still marches toward the distant Okhema.

ch: 在众神争斗不息的时代，战争在盾牌上溅射出火花，落下的碎屑成为悬锋城盾的秘密。无论事实如何，那些古老的盾牌已无法再造。
en: In an age where divine battles raged incessantly, war made sparks upon the shield. Its fragments became the guarded secret of Castrum Kremnos' defenses. Anyway, these ancient shields can no longer be replicated.

ch: 神明掷出投枪，划破夜空的光辉会指引悬锋城的子民，沿着光的轨迹，践踏沿途的每一座城邦，直到抵达已被焚毁的废墟。
en: As the god cast their spear, trails of light across the night sky would guide the people of Kremnos. Following the trail of light, they trample every city-state in their path, until they reach the burnt ruins.

ch: 因此，当国王德索斯暗中派遣信使与喀诺尔停战，却又出尔反尔，率领悬锋城的军团兵临城下，尼卡多利第一次向它的子民降下天谴。
en: When King Desos secretly brokered a ceasefire with Canor only to betray them, leading his forces from Castrum Kremnos to their gates, Nikador unleashed divine fury on their own people for the first time.

ch: 永夜笼罩尘世，失去理性的神明将所有生命都视作假想敌。曾力战黑潮，捍卫翁法罗斯的征服者，终究也成为了黑潮的帮凶，点燃无意义的战火。
en: An eternal night shrouds the mortal realm, and the god now devoid of reason sees every life as an adversary. The defender of Amphoreus against the black tide eventually turn traitor and assistant to the black tide, igniting futile wars.

ch: 可扎格列斯，它真的爱着我们吗？倘若有利可图，恐怕，就连翁法罗斯的覆灭，也不会耽误它的交易。
en: But does Zagreus truly hold any affection for us? If profitable, surely even the downfall of Amphoreus would not hinder their dealings.

ch: 「看看遍布翁法罗斯的贼之手，其实扎格列斯把自己的灵魂藏进了里面。只要集齐所有的手臂，把它们拼接在一起，就能复活千手的扎格列斯！比艾格勒的眼睛还多上十倍！」
en: "Behold the Thief's Hand strewn across Amphoreus — Zagreus has embedded their soul within them. Gather all the limbs, piece them together, and resurrect Zagreus the Thousand Hands, with ten times the power of Aquila!"

ch: 那是人类已无法归去，无法想象的黄金时代。野兽无需捕食，新叶不会枯萎。上千的城邦屹立在翁法罗斯，没有忧愁的生灵无限制地增长。
en: It was an epoch beyond comprehension, one we can never return to — The Golden Age. Predators did not need to hunt and foliage remained evergreen. Thousands of city-states dotted Amphoreus, teeming with beings who knew no sorrow.

ch: 在公正之秤的见证下，它与众神签订了誓约。以冥河为界，死亡将平衡翁法罗斯的生命，逝去的灵魂终归于塞纳托斯的国度，登上摆渡者的长船，从今生去往来世。
en: Under the watchful eye of the Scale of Justice, they swore oaths with the gods. The River of Souls marked the boundary, where death would balance life in Amphoreus. Departed souls would journey to the realm of Thanatos, boarding the ferryman's long boat to transition from this life to the next.

ch: 这些原初的道路成为翁法罗斯的边界，时至今日，仍有无数人试图触及。
en: These primordial paths define the boundaries of Amphoreus, still sought by countless souls today.

ch: 这些框架成为翁法罗斯变化的源动力，所以轻盈的会上浮，沉重的会坠落。
en: These frameworks become the driving force behind Amphoreus' transformations, causing the light to rise and the heavy to fall.

ch: 以雅努斯为首，三位命运泰坦在混沌中划定时空，赋予法则，抟造出翁法罗斯的雏形，留下万物诞生的基石，是为创世之始。
en: Led by Janus, the three Fate Titans delineate time and space within chaos, bestow laws, and mold the embryo of Amphoreus, laying down the cornerstone for all creation.

ch: 在人子们的足迹布满翁法罗斯前，已有那伟大的神明开辟前路，因它曾到来，所以我们才能触及。
en: Before the footprints of humanity marked Amphoreus, this great deity had already paved the way. Their prior arrival enables us now to reach them.

ch: 你还想去到世界的尽头吗？在黑潮尚未降临的黄金时代，在无尽之海中寻到雅努斯的门扉，穿过它们，你将抵达翁法罗斯的每一个角落。而只有最虔诚的信徒，方能在惊涛骇浪中将它们开启。
en: Do you still desire to reach the world's end? In the Golden Age before the black tide, find Janus' gates amidst the Endless Sea, pass through them, and you can arrive at every nook of Amphoreus. Only the most devout disciples can open them amidst turbulent seas.

ch: 这里是悬锋城的竞技场，悬锋子民正在为他们那残暴的主庆祝一场胜利。而你，便是这场狂欢中注定要被牺牲的战利品。
en: This is the arena of Castrum Kremnos, where the citizens of Castrum Kremnos exalt in slaughter, celebrating yet another triumph for their bloodthirsty king. And you? You are nothing more than the loot, a doomed offering in this twisted carnival of death.

ch: 神悟树庭向整个翁法罗斯发出了实习学者考试，这对于苦心钻研学术二十年的你来说，是一个绝不能错过的机会。
en: The Grove of Epiphany has issued its Intern Scholar Examination — an open call across all of Amphoreus. After twenty long years of academic toil, you know this is a chance you cannot let slip away.

ch: 一周后，你收到了神悟树庭发来的悲报「您的学术成果非常具有科研价值！但遗憾的是与主流研究方向不符，您的简历已进入人才库，期待未来与您合作。」
en: A week later, the Grove of Epiphany delivers its verdict — a polite rejection. "Your research holds immense academic significance! However, it does not align with our current primary research direction. Your credentials have been added to our talent database, and we look forward to potential collaboration in the future."

ch: 「也罢，神悟树庭如此不识人才，不加入也罢。」说着说着你的眼角有泪划过……
en: "So be it. If the Grove of Epiphany can't recognize true genius, then I want no part of them." You say the words with defiance... but as you do, a lone tear betrays you, sliding down your cheek.

ch: 一周后，你收到了神悟树庭发来的悲报「您的学术成果非常具有科研价值！但遗憾的是与主流研究方向不符，您的简历已进入人才库，期待未来与您合作。」
en: A week later, the Grove of Epiphany delivers its verdict — a polite rejection. "Your research holds immense academic significance! However, it does not align with our current primary research direction. Your credentials have been added to our talent database, and we look forward to potential collaboration in the future."

ch: 「也罢，神悟树庭如此不识人才，不加入也罢。」说着说着你的眼角有泪划过……
en: "So be it. If the Grove of Epiphany can't recognize true genius, then I want no part of them." You say the words with defiance... but as you do, a lone tear betrays you, sliding down your cheek.

ch: 据说能进入神悟树庭面试的学者万里挑一，但是当你看到等候厅挤得像大甩卖期间的云石市集时，你不禁感叹如今的翁法罗斯真是人才济济。
en: They say only the rarest of scholars reach the interview stage, yet as you step into the waiting hall — crammed tighter than Marmoreal Market during a festival sale, you can't help but marvel at the sheer number of bright minds in Amphoreus.

ch: 这里汇聚了翁法罗斯绝大部分图书，你就像酒鬼找到了法吉娜的酒酿秘藏，恨不得在这座图书馆里用知识醉生梦死。
en: Here lies the vast majority of Amphoreus's books. To you, it's as if a hopeless drinker has stumbled upon Phagousa's legendary wine cellar — the sheer temptation to lose yourself in this sea of wisdom is overwhelming.

ch: 当时悬锋城准备吞并邻国小城，欧洛尼斯降下神谕，宣布了出征的失败。悬锋将军也会死于清泉关的隘口，死因是落马坠崖。
en: At that time, Castrum Kremnos prepared to annex its neighboring smaller city. Oronyx delivered a divine decree, foretelling the campaign's failure, and declaring the general of Kremnos would meet his end at Clearspring Gorge's narrow pass, doomed to fall from his steed to the cliffs below.

ch: 小城上下士气大振，最终利用狭隘地形以少胜多，挫败了悬锋城的进攻。而悬锋城的将军，也如预言中的那般牺牲。
en: The small city's morale soared, and they ultimately used the narrow terrain to achieve a victory against the overwhelming number of invaders, thwarting Kremnos's invasion. And just as the prophecy foretold, Kremnos's general met his destined end.

ch: 欧洛尼斯的所有预言中，仅仅只有一个还未验证，那便是关于翁法罗斯未来的走向。
en: Of all Oronyx's prophecies, only one remains unfulfilled, and that is the foretelling of Amphoreus' ultimate fate.

ch: 在那连泰坦都无法呼吸的压抑当中，时空交织如麻，襁褓中的翁法罗斯危在旦夕。
en: In that repression that could even choke Titans, space and time intertwined like fibers, with the newborn Amphoreus on the cusp of peril.

ch: 它是翁法罗斯最沉重之物，用庞大的身躯承载万物生长。
en: It is the most weighty thing in Amphoreus, carrying the growth of all things on its massive body.

ch: 吉奥里亚就这样诞生了。命运三姐妹将它作为最初的砝码，置于天平一侧，翁法罗斯终于有了稳定的物质。
en: And so, Georios was born. The Three Fates placed it as the initial counterweight on one side of the balance, and finally, Amphoreus had stable matter.

ch: 它是翁法罗斯最顽固之物，用永恒的耐心塑造大地万象。
en: They are Amphoreus's most obstinate creation, wielding endless patience to intricately sculpt the world in all its facets.

ch: 它是翁法罗斯最温柔之物，用无价的神启挽救堕落人子。
en: They were the most gentle being of Amphoreus, using priceless revelations to save fallen humanity.

ch: 在瑟希斯的赐福下，密密麻麻的麦穗从土里长出，春天也回到翁法罗斯。
en: Under Cerces's blessing, dense ears of wheat sprouted forth from the soil, and spring returned to Amphoreus.

ch: 当爱意和浪漫再无法抑制，它们如泉水般喷涌而出，化为漫野的金色羽翼。墨涅塔的蝴蝶飞向翁法罗斯的各方，直至那众神亦未洞晓的边陲。
en: Yet love and romance, unrestrained, burst forth like springs, flooding the fields as golden wings. Mnestia's butterflies soared to Amphoreus's farthest reaches — even to realms beyond divine sight.

ch: 艾格勒在翁法罗斯的边界建立起它的神国。它翅膀上短的羽毛，化作天上的霞光和火焰；那些长的羽毛，则被它制作成雷霆和闪电。
en: Aquila established their divine realm at the border of Amphoreus. The short feathers on their wings became the glow and flames in the sky. The long feathers were fashioned into thunder and lightning.

ch: 而这座立在巨人脚下的城市，后来被人们如此称呼——圣城奥赫玛。
en: And this city, founded beneath the giant, would one day be known as the Holy City of Okhema.

ch: 那些碎片，后来被扎格列斯铸成了金币。也有人说，它们成为了后世悬锋城盾的秘密。
en: Some say these fragments were later minted into coins by Zagreus. Others whisper that they became the secret behind the indomitable shields of Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 时过境迁，悬锋暴君的塑像已成陈迹，苔藓将用它青绿的手抚去过往的一切辉煌和悲欢。
en: As time marches on, the statue of the tyrant of Kremnos has become a relic as green mossy fingers smother all the glory and tragedy of the past.

ch: 据说这是军纪严明的悬锋城人最爱的游戏之一喀，当阵列变化，五面同样颜色的盾牌排成一列，就会发生奇妙的事情！
en: Apparently this game is a favorite of Castrum Kremnos' locals, who maintain strict military rigor. When a formation changes and five identical colors of shield line up, miraculous things can happen!

ch: 我感觉到了…悬锋城的勇士正在与门对面那可怕的力量抗衡，一次又一次倒下，又一次又一次站起来……
en: I can feel it... The warriors of Castrum Kremnos are locked in combat with that terrifying force behind the gates. One after the other, they fall down, and they get back up again...

ch: 欢迎来到理性赐福的树庭，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}裂分之枝{RUBY_E#}的伟大不言自明！
en: Welcome to the Grove, a place blessed by Reason. The majesty of the {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Bough of Rift{RUBY_E#} speaks for themself!

ch: …喀？找我有事吗？没事的话请安静，我正在为即将出版的《神悟树庭风俗考》做田野调查喀。
en: ...Crrrk? You need something? If not, please stay quiet, I'm conducting field studies for my upcoming Grove of Epiphany Cultural Studies.

ch: 金苹果有着许多象征，在崇尚智慧的树庭，它便代表着智慧；但这枚苹果只是一件装饰。
en: The golden apple bears many symbolic meanings. In the wisdom-worshiping Grove, it represents intellect. However, this apple is merely ornamental.

ch: 「与蛮邦战至力竭身亡」…树庭的勇士并不比其他城邦少。
en: "Died from exhaustion during the battle against the barbarian states." ...The heroic warriors of the Grove are no fewer than those of other cities.

ch: 若虫们的鸣叫声连成一片，仿佛夏日池塘中的青蛙——可惜翁法罗斯没有青蛙。
en: The chirping of the nymphs fills the air, blending together like the croaking of frogs in a summer pond — if only Amphoreus had frogs.

ch: 嗯嗯？什么叫「新的纷争半神回到了他忠实的悬锋城」「树庭贤人在公民大会激昂陈词」「黄金裔即将揭开再创世的新篇」？！
en: Wait, what? The new demigod of Strife has returned to his loyal Castrum Kremnos!? The Sage of the Grove delivered a rousing speech at the citizens' assembly!? Chrysos Heirs are about to unveil the next chapter of Era Nova!?

ch: 知道天底下所有的秘密，想问我问题的人能从云石天宫排队到悬锋城。为了图个清净，我只好躲起来。
en: I know all the secrets under the sky. The line of people wanting to ask me questions could stretch from Marmoreal Palace to Castrum Kremnos. For a bit of peace and quiet, I had no choice but to hide.

ch: 悬锋城的事，你应该知道吧。
en: You know what happened in Castrum Kremnos, right?

ch: 这里和悬锋城差好多！
en: This place is so different from Castrum Kremnos!

ch: 奥赫玛不会陷落的。
en: Okhema won't fall.

ch: 山的对面，是奥赫玛…
en: Across the mountains stands Okhema...

ch: 刻法勒的城邦…奥赫玛。
en: Kephale's city... Okhema.

ch: 你知道树庭发生的事吗？
en: Do you know what happened in the Grove?

ch: 奥赫玛的永夜…
en: Okhema's eternal night...

ch: …糟了，该不会将奥赫玛的公共设置弄坏了吧？你对此感到担忧，但某种突如其来的睡意袭来。
en: ...Oh, no. you didn't damage Okhema's public installations, did you? You feel great worry about this, but a sudden sleepiness comes upon you.

ch: 所以…下次可别乱来。这里可是奥赫玛，阿妈说，我们的一举一动，泰坦都能看得见。
en: So... Don't do that next time. This is Okhema, after all. Mom says that the Titans can see everything we do here.

ch: 不过刻法勒的光辉在奥赫玛留下过不少痕迹，你需要的话，我可以给你推荐——
en: But Kephale's light has left many markings upon Okhema. If you need, I can give you recommendations...

ch: 奥赫玛古话曾云：「泰坦赐，不可辞。」你欣然接受了泰坦内定于你的重任，将双手贴近圣烛装置——
en: An old saying from Okhema goes: "The Titans' offer is not one to be refused." You gladly accept the duty handed to you by the Titan and reach out to touch the holy candle with your hands...

ch: 「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
en: "Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.

ch: 这个回答一定没错。奥赫玛人人都喜欢金线织成的衣服，但不是每个人都能耐得住金线的「审讯」。
en: This answer is definitely right. Everyone in Okhema loves clothes woven from gold thread, but not all of them can withstand the interrogation from these threads.

ch: 万敌会怎么说？
en: What would Mydei say?

ch: 你记得万敌曾和某个狮口打过交道，他当然了解这群狮子的出题套路，叫他过来吧——
en: You remember that Mydei has dealt with a certain lion's mouth once. Of course, he would know these lions' tricks. Let's get him here...

ch: 悬锋城的人民习惯以热水泡浴，不过，要是沸腾的铁水从头浇下，即便是最勇武的人也会心生畏惧。
en: Castrum Kremnos' citizens are accustomed to hot baths, but if you pour boiling molten iron over your head, even the bravest individual would quake in his shoes.

ch: 哦、哦吼，这熟悉的风格，果然是万敌阁下的意见。
en: Oh, oh-ho, this familiar tone... I knew it was Lord Mydei's suggestion.

ch: 本狮毫不怀疑万敌阁下的勇气，嘿嘿，可惜可惜，这不是正确答案。
en: I do not doubt Lord Mydei's courage one bit, hehe. Alas, it is a wrong answer.

ch: 虽然被狮口狠狠咬到了，但万敌却没有丝毫改色，颤抖的反而是石铸的狮口。
en: Though the lion's jaw clamps down hard, Mydei's expression does not change at all. Instead, it is the stone-forged mouth that is quivering.

ch: 对、对不起！万敌大人，别把我砸碎！
en: I—I apologize! Lord Mydei, please do not break me!

ch: 万敌甩了甩手，不悦地离开了……
en: Mydei shakes off the pain on his hand and leaves with an expression of displeasure...

ch: 你想到了在翁法罗斯认识的第一个值得信赖的伙伴，白厄，他一定会回应你的请求。
en: You recall the first trustworthy companion you befriended in Amphoreus, Phainon. He will surely respond to your request.

ch: 「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
en: "Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.

ch: 你是比最遵纪守法的奥赫玛好公民还要「守序善良」的存在，就连{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}都不得不为你的契约精神鼓掌。
en: You are an existence even more Lawful Good than the most law-abiding citizens of Okhema. Even {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} would applaud your devotion to upholding an agreement.

ch: 即使在折纸大学，你也从来没有系统接受过高等数学的试炼。那么，奥赫玛里的谁看起来像是数学比较好的人呢？
en: You never once systematically experienced the trials of advanced mathematics, even while at Paperfold University. Then, who in Okhema looks like someone who's good with numbers?

ch: …问问万敌？
en: ...Ask Mydei?

ch: 万敌的数学真的比你好吗？直到消息发送成功的时候，你仍有些怀疑。
en: Is Mydei's math really better than yours? You still feel apprehensive even as you send the message.

ch: 万敌头也不回地离开了，你看到他在走远后挠了挠头……
en: Mydei leaves without looking back, and you see him scratching his head as he walks away...

ch: 因为交易的时间，不巧正处在「机缘月」。在奥赫玛的历法中，第十二个月份——「机缘月」，是属于{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}的月份。
en: That is because the date for this deal was unfortunately during the "Month of Fortune" — In Okhema's calendar, the twelfth month is the Month of Fortune, which belongs to {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}.

ch: 而你和大地兽商人约定还钱的日期，是「月末」当天。在「幽灵日」出现前，就算是奥赫玛最睿智的法官，也没法判定契约上的「月末」究竟指的是哪一天。
en: And the day you and the dromas merchant arranged for repayment is on the last day of the month. Before the Spirit Day appears, even the most sagacious judge in Okhema would be unable to determine which day is the "last day of the month" the contract is referring to.

ch: 「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
en: "Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.

ch: 奥赫玛的浴场里常见的沐浴香皂，掉在地上像烂泥一样滑溜，踩到它的人只有跌倒的份。
en: Bath soap is a staple in Okhema's baths. It could also slide all around like sloppy mud when dropped on the floor. The unfortunate soul who slips on it can only fall.

ch: 你确信奥赫玛的朋友们当中有比你更懂幽默的人，邀请谁来回答这个问题好呢？
en: Are you sure that you have friends in Okhema who have a better sense of humor than you? Who will you invite to answer this riddle?

ch: 记得在树庭求学时，我听过几节精彩的辩论。假如逻辑分为正直的逻辑和歪曲的逻辑，后者往往能用诡计把前者驳倒，但歪曲的逻辑本身却是不成立的。
en: I remember that I listened to a few outstanding debate sessions when I was studying at the Grove. Hypothetically speaking, if logic is divided into sound and twisted, the latter often employs trickery to refute the former, but twisted logic is fundamentally flawed.

ch: 哦吼？纵然本狮不便亲口妄议奥赫玛的政务，却非常乐于听到影射此事的笑话呐！
en: Oh-ho? It is inconvenient for me to speak ill of Okhema's political affairs, but I am very happy to listen to jokes that allude to such matters!

ch: 身为外邦人，擅自议论奥赫玛的管理事务恐怕有些不妥，还是再问问其他人的看法吧。
en: As an outsider, it may not be appropriate to be discussing Okhema's administrative affairs. Better ask for someone else's opinion.

ch: 「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
en: "Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.

ch: 哦吼？异乡的勇士，难道也向奥赫玛的哲学家学来了辩论的思维？可惜可惜，至少你还拥有一口袋的妙论，这不是正确答案。
en: Oh-ho? Brave outsider, could you have picked the brains of Okhema's philosophers? Alas, though you have a pocketful of clever rhetoric, this is a wrong answer.

ch: 求己不如求人，要选择奥赫玛的哪位朋友来替你回答这个刁钻的问题呢？
en: There's no shame in seeking help from others. Which friend from Okhema would you like to seek help from for answering this tricky question?

ch: 万敌会怎么说？
en: What would Mydei say?

ch: 「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
en: "Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.

ch: 「门扉时」和「幕匿时」…记得在翁法罗斯的历法中分别代表「清晨」和「晚上」。这东西在早晨搞丢脑袋，晚上还能找回来……
en: The Entry Hour and the Curtain-Fall Hour... I remember these respectively represent "dawn" and "sunset" in the Amphoreus calendar. This thing loses its head in the morning, but can retrieve it at night...

ch: 说不定，答案会是翁法罗斯某种独特的事物，既然如此，问问当地的新朋友们或许能得到答案？
en: Perhaps the answer is something special that only happened in Amphoreus. If that's the case, maybe our new local friends might have an answer?

ch: 在我认识的人中，能接近这点的或许只有万敌了，他的不死之身算是人尽皆知，也确实受悬锋族人爱戴。
en: Among the people I know, Mydei's the only one who has abilities that even come close to this. His immortality is known to all, and he is also beloved by the Kremnos clansmen.

ch: 吼，吼吼吼…万敌大人确实能死而复生，但这「可爱」，吼吼吼吼吼……
en: Ho, hohoho... Lord Mydei definitely can rise from the dead, but as for the "adorable" part... hohohoho...

ch: 好久没笑到嘴疼了…吼，那个——白厄大人，虽然您没答对，但我可以不咬您，这件事您千万别跟万敌大人提，我怕他把本狮给轰杀至渣呀！
en: It's been a long time since my jaws have hurt from laughing... Lord Phainon, you may have gotten it wrong, but I won't bite you. Please don't mention this to Lord Mydei, or I fear he'll pound me to dust!

ch: 「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
en: "Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.

ch: 有人会把硬币用旧，有人会把旧硬币当成宝贝…离开翁法罗斯的时候，就顺手抓一把硬币带走吧，说不定星际和平公司会很乐意收购呢。
en: Some will wear down their coins, others will treat old coins like artifacts... When I leave Amphoreus, I'll just grab a handful of old coins. Who knows, maybe the IPC will be more than happy to buy them.

ch: 吼？妙啊。在这历史悠久的奥赫玛，要想收集到过去使用的古币可得花费一大笔开销，而穷人们手里正巧有许多…不对吼？
en: Ho? Wonderful. In a land like Okhema, steeped in history, one would have to spend a pretty penny to collect ancient coins. Yet the poor probably have plenty of them jingling in their pockets... Isn't that so?

ch: 万敌有什么看法？
en: What do you think, Mydei?

ch: 万敌瞪了狮口一眼便离开了。
en: Mydei gives the lion a dagger stare and leaves.

ch: 我记得城里的人们在辩论时，提到过类似的话题——答案是「机遇」。据说，这是奥赫玛每个商人都必须铭记的格言。
en: I remember a debate in the city mentioning something like that — the answer is "opportunity." It's apparently an aphorism that all Okheman merchants must remember.

ch: 勇士的家乡或许如此，可在奥赫玛，再贫穷的公民都拥有悠闲泡澡的余裕吼！
en: It may be so in your homeland, but in Okhema, even the poorest folk have the luxury of time to spend in baths!

ch: 「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
en: "Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.

ch: 要不问问万敌吧？
en: Why not ask Mydei?

ch: 战场上更是如此，悬锋城的军法就是为整顿纪律而设立的。狮子，满意了？
en: It is even more so on the battlefield. Castrum Kremnos' military code was established to instil order. Satisfied, lion?

ch: 吼？确实是很符合万敌阁下风格的回答，虽说与标准答案有差距，但既然您亲自来答题，本狮当然要给您开个后门，这口就不咬了吼！
en: Ho? An answer that fits Lord Mydei's character indeed. It may differ from the standard answer, but since you answered in person, I will show you some respect and dispense with the biting!

ch: 万敌瞪了它一眼后便离开了，你感觉到，这头狮子在瑟瑟发抖。
en: Mydei stares daggers at it before leaving. You can feel the lion quaking in its proverbial boots.

ch: 是不是完全不可爱了？就连奥赫玛最虔诚的大地兽爱好者都会为此感到苦恼吼！
en: Wouldn't that be the opposite of cute? Even the most enthusiastic of dromas lovers in Okhema would be chagrined!

ch: 「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
en: "Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.

ch: 哀丽秘榭果然是个熟人社会。
en: Aedes Elysiae really is a small world, huh?

ch: （奥赫玛、悬锋城、神悟树庭、命运重渊…这些年里，我踏足了很多地方……）
en: (Okhema, Castrum Kremnos, the Grove of Epiphany, Abyss of Fate... I've walked through so many places over the years...)

ch: （在刻法勒脚下的奥赫玛，居住着一群红色头发的信使……）
en: (At Kephale's feet lies Okhema, home to a group of red-haired messengers...)

ch: （行人如织的奥赫玛，同样有着非同凡响的佳肴。其中最为人称道的，便是名为「红土块」的料理……）
en: (The bustling streets of Okhema are also home to extraordinary cuisines. Among them lies a dish that stirs the soul, known only as the "Redsoil.")

ch: o((╬◣'ω´◢ )o「哥是哀丽秘榭最强最劲的猛男海豹！」)∋
en: o((╬◣'ω´◢ )o "I'm the mightiest, manliest seal in all of Aedes Elysiae!" )∋

ch: 多亏了{NICKNAME}，哀丽秘榭越来越热闹啦。
en: Thanks to you, {NICKNAME}, Aedes Elysiae is getting livelier by the day!

ch: 真是不可思议…哀丽秘榭的草地，竟然比私人浴宫的床铺更加舒适。
en: Unbelievable... The grass here at the Aedes Elysiae is even more comfortable than the beds in the private bath chamber!

ch: 是个好愿望，但看上去它甚至不愿统治哀丽秘榭。
en: That's a good wish, but this little guy doesn't even seem interested in ruling Aedes Elysiae.

ch: 至于小奇美拉…不如就加入哀丽秘榭小精灵的大家庭，叫「奇美啦迷」吧！
en: As for the little chimera... why don't we let it join the Aedes Elysiae's fairy family and name it Chimeramem?

ch: 哀丽秘榭怎么会有大地兽？这显然是个问题，但眼下还有个更大的问题——
en: A dromas? In Aedes Elysiae? That's a big problem, but there's an even bigger one...

ch: 哀丽秘榭的建筑都是砖瓦结构，在大地兽眼里就像自助餐一样美味。你必须阻止它——
en: The village buildings are mostly made of bricks and tiles, basically an all-you-can-eat buffet for a dromas. You have to stop it...

ch: 哎呀，给我卸哪儿来了，这还是哀丽秘榭吗？
en: Oh, where are we now? Is this still Aedes Elysiae?

ch: …不久前，浮黎的目光掠过了翁法罗斯。加上黑塔女士此行获知的情报——
en: Not long ago, Fuli's gaze swept across Amphoreus. Combined with the intel Madam Herta gathered on this journey—

ch: 翁法罗斯或许将会引燃<color=#dbc291ff>一位绝灭大君的怒火</color>。
en: Amphoreus might soon trigger <color=#dbc291ff>the rage of a Lord Ravager</color>.

ch: 不知翁法罗斯背后暗中酝酿的毁灭，是来自早已闻名寰宇的焚风、星啸、铁墓，还是像幻胧这样尚不为世人所知的大君。
en: I wonder if the destruction secretly brewing behind Amphoreus comes from renowned Overlords like Zephyro, Celenova, and Irontomb, or from one still unknown to the world, like Phantylia.

ch: 呵，从这个角度看，翁法罗斯或许是个安全匣呢。毕竟，三股令使级别甚至更高的命途之力，一旦擦枪走火，可比查德威克那家伙的炸药带劲多了。
en: Hmph, when you look at it that way, Amphoreus might be a safety box. After all, three forces at the Emanator level or even higher — if they were to come to blows, it would be far more explosive than Chadwick's bombs.

ch: 若真如此…身在翁法罗斯内部的{NICKNAME}和丹恒，岂不是相当危险？
en: If that's true... wouldn't {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng be in extreme danger in Amphoreus?

ch: 听黑塔女士的叙述，那位叫来古士的智械，同样沐浴过博识尊的瞥视。有这样一位人物把守翁法罗斯，恐怕我们的计划会举步维艰。
en: Based on Madam Herta's account, that Intellitron named Lygus has also been bathed in Nous's gaze. Having such an entity guarding Amphoreus will likely make our plans extremely difficult to execute.

ch: 黑塔女士，<color=#dbc291ff>你果真进入了翁法罗斯的世界吗？</color>
en: Madam Herta, <color=#dbc291ff>did you actually enter the world of Amphoreus?</color>

ch: 螺丝咕姆先生的意思是，黑塔女士进入的翁法罗斯，有可能是那位来古士构建的认知障碍…就像同谐之力那样？
en: Mr. Screwllum means that the Amphoreus you entered, Madam Herta, might have been a cognitive barrier constructed by Lygus... similar to the power of Harmony?

ch: 翁法罗斯以空间作为第一道屏障，对黑塔女士来说，跨越这道屏障易如反掌。
en: Amphoreus uses space as its first barrier. For Madam Herta, crossing this barrier is child's play.

ch: 原来如此。黑塔女士提到，她在翁法罗斯的世界里看到过两位无名客的残像，只是那看上去既像残留的忆质，又像数据的投影。
en: That explains it. Madam Herta mentioned observing traces of the two Nameless in the world of Amphoreus, which appeared to be both residual memoria and data materialization.

ch: 推论：翁法罗斯的正身也许是一台亡佚的帝皇权杖，或其他类似的智识造物；而那位来古士便是权杖的操作员…或是隐居世外的又一位鲁珀特。
en: Deduction: Amphoreus's actual identity might be a lost Emperor's Scepter or similar Erudition construct, while Lygus may be its operator... or perhaps another Rubert hidden from the world.

ch: 前提：我们拥有那两位勇敢无名客的时间坐标，且识刻锚确实能对翁法罗斯起效。
en: Premises: We have the temporal coordinates of those two brave Nameless, and the Chronocognitive Anchor actually works on Amphoreus.

ch: {NICKNAME}，你看，这里也和记忆中的哀丽秘榭一模一样。
en: {NICKNAME}, look! This place looks exactly like how I remember Aedes Elysiae.

ch: 没关系哦，试着拍拍看吧。在哀丽秘榭，偶尔也会有奇迹发生。
en: It's okay. Give it a little tap. Sometimes small miracles happen in Aedes Elysiae.

ch: 悄悄告诉你，哀丽秘榭的鱼儿都会读心魔法，除非心甘情愿，不然绝对不会上钩。
en: Wanna know a secret? The fish in Aedes Elysiae can read minds. Unless they're totally willing, they won't bite no matter what.

ch: 在想哀丽秘榭的事。
en: I'm thinking about Aedes Elysiae.

ch: 哎呀，太沉重的话题可不适合哀丽秘榭。还是聊回捉迷藏吧，作为交换，接下来轮到我来找你咯？
en: Ah, but that's too heavy a thought for a place like Aedes Elysiae. Let's go back to Hide-and-Seek. Now it's my turn to find you, okay?

ch: 迷路迷境的入口，无论看多少次都觉得很梦幻……
en: No matter how many times I see the entrance to the Membrance Maze, it still feels like a dream...

ch: 这么说来，哀丽秘榭到处都很安静呢。待在这种让人心静的地方，无论什么烦恼，都能一下子忘掉……
en: Come to think of it, Aedes Elysiae is such a quiet place. Residing in such a serene place instantly dispels all your troubles.

ch: 毕竟哀丽秘榭只是个小村庄，去往其他城邦，我们一定能找到更高的观景台吧？
en: Aedes Elysiae is just a small village. If we visit a different city, we can definitely find a higher observation deck, right?

ch: 哀丽秘榭的风景，还真是怎么都看不够呢…下去的时候要小心哦，慢慢地，可别滑倒啦。
en: No matter how long you look, this view of Aedes Elysiae never gets old... Be careful when you're climbing down. Take it slow, and don't slip!

ch: 昔涟睡得很香。也许是哀丽秘榭的麦浪适合入梦，或是簌簌的林叶有助眠的魔法……
en: Cyrene is fast asleep. Perhaps the golden wheat fields of Aedes Elysiae is perfect to induce sleep, or maybe the rustling of leaves have a certain magical sleeping aid effect...

ch: 可惜都被我找到了！哀丽秘榭还是站在人家这一边的嘛。
en: Too bad for you, I found you every time! Aedes Elysiae is on my side, after all.

ch: 在树庭被水淹没的无措？
en: The helplessness of drowning in the Grove?

ch: 悄悄告诉你一个秘密，哀丽秘榭的麦田，会永远地留在丰收的时刻。
en: I'll let you in on a secret. The wheat fields of Aedes Elysiae remain eternally in the season of harvest.

ch: 虽然我很想说…与你共度的这段时光，都会像这哀丽秘榭一样，<color=#dbc291ff>永远留在无人叨扰的记忆之境。</color>
en: Though I have to say... The times we spent together will be like Aedes Elysiae, <color=#dbc291ff>preserved in a tranquil memory space forever.</color>

ch: 而我们一起在哀丽秘榭度过的这段美好时光，让人家愈发觉得，与其奢望「永远」，不如相信……
en: And the wonderful time we spent together in Aedes Elysiae makes me feel even more that, rather than wishing for "eternity," it's better to believe...

ch: 人家有时也会因此懊丧…不过换个角度想，在面临重要的抉择之前，静下心来整顿思路也是很重要的。正好，哀丽秘榭最适合做这事啦。
en: Sometimes I get frustrated because of that... but looking at it another way, it's really important to calm down and clear your head before making a big decision. And Aedes Elysiae is the perfect place for that.

ch: 这样一来，哀丽秘榭也种下了「开拓」的种子呢。把它当作下一段旅途的起点……
en: Now, we've also planted the seeds of the Trailblaze in Aedes Elysiae. Take it as the start of another journey...

ch: 你知道吗？在哀丽秘榭的古语中，人们会将「初见」，念作「寻获」，又或者……「重逢」。
en: Do you know that in the ancient language of Aedes Elysiae, "first encounter" is read as "searching" or... "reunion."

ch: 然后…迎面撞上了一位悬锋卫兵打扮的壮硕男性。
en: Then... You find yourself face-to-face with a powerful-looking man in Kremnos guard uniform.

ch: 我也是悬锋城的人！
en: I am from Castrum Kremnos!

ch: ——疯王的追随者，找的就是你！没想到吧，我不是悬锋城的人！
en: — The Mad King's followers, you're the one I seek! You had no idea, did you? I am not from Castrum Kremnos at all!

ch: 告诉我——悬锋城里地位最高的将领，是什么模样？
en: Tell me. What is the highest-ranking general of Castrum Kremnos like?

ch: （描述悬锋报名官的外观）
en: (Describe the appearance of the Kremnos registration officer)

ch: （描述悬锋教官的外观）
en: (Describe the appearance of the Kremnos drillmaster)

ch: 等等，我是奥赫玛的人！
en: Wait! I am from Okhema!

ch: …你怎么穿着悬锋城的盔甲？
en: ...Why are you wearing the armor of Castrum Kremnos?

ch: （指向奥赫玛的方向）
en: (Point in the direction of Okhema)

ch: 谎言。那是出城的路，莫非你希望我放下手中兵器，投奔奥赫玛？
en: Lies. That is the path out of the city. Perhaps you are hoping that I would lay down my weapons and seek asylum in Okhema?

ch: 兵卒的性命于这场战争而言无关痛痒，但若是手握实权的将领，定能令天秤倾斜。我要找的，就是悬锋城中地位最高的将领。
en: The life of a mere soldier is expendable in a battle like this. It is those of the power-wielding generals that can really tip the scales. I seek the highest-ranking general in Castrum Kremnos.

ch: （描述悬锋报名官的外观）
en: (Describe the appearance of the Kremnos registration officer)

ch: （描述悬锋教官的外观）
en: (Describe the appearance of the Kremnos drillmaster)

ch: 你不知道他究竟遭遇了什么，但结局已然清晰摆在你的面前，或是一队偶然路过的卫兵，或是冰冷无情的眷属…无论如何，悬锋城容不下除胜利之外的任何事物。
en: You have no idea what it was that happened to him, but the ending he met is clear to see. Perhaps he happened to bump into a troupe of wandering guards or a merciless Titankin... Whatever it may have been, Castrum Kremnos will tolerate no outcome but victory.

ch: 全新的盔甲被整齐放在道路旁的箱子里，看来它的主人已不再需要在悬锋城中活动了。但你认出了刻在头盔中央的小小的天秤标志，你记得这位忠于信念的战士。
en: A brand-new set of armor has been carefully stored in a box by the path. It seems that its owner no longer had any business in Castrum Kremnos. However, you recognize the insignia in the center of the helmet of a set of scales and recall the soldier who remained true to their faith.

ch: 「感官恢复时，我已身处破落的悬锋城，这里没有活物，只有失心的眷属在游荡。」
en: "When I regained my senses, I found myself in a deserted Castrum Kremnos. It lay in ruins and there was no life to be found. Only mindless Titankin wandered its ground."

ch: 悬锋城。
en: Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 奥赫玛。
en: Okhema.

ch: 神谕晦暗不明，神驹们也无法掌握目的地的确切情报，这样信息不同步的情况时有发生。横跨整个翁法罗斯的旅途，出现些微差错总是在所难免。
en: The prophecies speak in riddles, and divine foals cannot obtain real-time information on their destinations — Such asynchronous situations do happen once in a while. Given that our journey will take us across the entire world of Amphoreus, small errors are to be expected.

ch: 我是听说有位神驹在传送过程中迷失了，却没想到是在悬锋城。
en: I knew of a divine foal lost in teleportation, but never guessed it would be at Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 神谕晦暗不明，神驹们也无法掌握目的地的确切情报，这样信息不同步的情况时有发生。横跨整个翁法罗斯的旅途，出现些微差错总是在所难免。
en: The prophecies speak in riddles, and divine foals cannot obtain real-time information on their destinations — Such asynchronous situations do happen once in a while. Given that our journey will take us across the entire world of Amphoreus, small errors are to be expected.

ch: 我是听说有位神驹在传送过程中迷失了，却没想到是在悬锋城。
en: I knew of a divine foal lost in teleportation, but never guessed it would be at Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 是啊，你并非树庭学者，也对那些艰深的学术探讨提不起兴趣。学院生活并不适合像你这样将「开拓」视为终身事业的无名客，还是以后再来吧。
en: Fair enough, you're not a Grove Scholar, and such deep academic pursuits hold little appeal. Scholar's life ill suits a Nameless devoted to "Trailblazing" — better to return later.

ch: 致初次到访「神悟树庭」的学者——你好，欢迎参加雅努斯之驹的入学考试。
en: To first-time visitors of the Grove of Epiphany — welcome to the entrance examination of Janus' Steed.

ch: 当然。瑟希斯平等地为所有造物赐福，长久停驻在树庭中，我也分得了些许智能。即便是极为有限的知性，维持与你对话的程度也已足够。
en: Of course. Cerces bestows blessings upon all creations equally, and my long stay in the Grove has granted me some wisdom. Though my consciousness remains limited, it's enough for our dialogue.

ch: 智种学派与赤陶学派联合编写了这套试题。我们将根据回答情况，将你分配至树庭的不同区域参与后续教学活动。请务必认真作答。
en: These questions come from both Nousporists and Erythrokeramists. How you answer will decide which part of the Grove you'll study in, so make sure to think your answers through.

ch: 再创世…树庭的阿那克萨戈拉斯，他口中的真相还真让人放不下心啊。泰坦是旧日的黄金裔，我在书库工作大半辈子，也从未听闻这种论断。
en: Era Nova... Anaxagoras of the Grove, the truth he speaks of is truly unsettling. The Titans were Chrysos Heirs of the past? I've worked in the library for most of my life, yet I've never encountered such a claim.

ch: 可最后呢？我们，圣城奥赫玛的公民，理性、智慧和光荣的传承者，在刻法勒的注视之下，我们从未退缩，一次又一次将敌人击垮！咕嘟——
en: And in the end? We, the citizens of the Holy City of Okhema, inheritors of reason, wisdom, and glory, have never faltered under the watchful gaze of Kephale. Time and again, we have crushed our enemies! Gulp—

ch: 究竟发生了什么，让明辨是非、处变不惊的奥赫玛人停住脚步，把道路围了个水泄不通？
en: What exactly happened to make the discerning and composed people of Okhema stop in their tracks and form such a huge crowd that blocks the road?

ch: 一日内竟有两种稀世神兵横空出世，奥赫玛着实藏龙卧虎。「永恒之城」并非浪得虚名，果然有其厉害之处。
en: To have two divine relics surface in the space of a day, Okhema certainly is a mecca of wonderment. The Eternal City certainly lives up to its name to harbor such an impressive arsenal.

ch: 托您的福，我们发现奥赫玛竟然还有位论精明不逊于自己的奇才！所以我们一拍即合，决定要合伙做点买卖。
en: With your blessing, we discovered that there was an equally shrewd talent in Okhema! We hit it off instantly, and decided to do business together.

ch: 奥赫玛识字的公民都知道，阿卡索斯早已在黑潮中覆灭。你如何从一座不存在的城邦来？
en: As all who can read in Okhema know that Icatus was long since destroyed by the black tide. How could you have come from a city that does not exist?

ch: 是啊，翁法罗斯还有那么多有趣的事物等着你去开拓，为什么非得花时间来思考这些无用的内容呢。你不认为这是个有价值的话题。
en: You're right. Amphoreus has many interesting things awaiting trailblazing. Why must you waste time reflecting on such pointless conversations? This topic is clearly of no value to you.

ch: 是我刚才的表述有误。我曾来自阿卡索斯，那是我的故乡，黑潮来临前，我携带所有财产逃来了奥赫玛。我来自尚未覆灭的阿卡索斯，这点千真万确。
en: I made a mistake in my last remark. I originally came from Icatus, and that is my home. Before the black tide descended, I took all of my worldly belongings and fled to Okhema. I come from an Icatus that has not yet been destroyed. This point is absolutely true.

ch: 认为这样的讨论毫无意义，不过是思维的惰性。但实际上，整个翁法罗斯无不与之相关。
en: To think that such an argument lacks meaning is no more than mental laziness. In fact, this relates to everything we see in Amphoreus.

ch: 我是奥赫玛的希诺，以教授人们论辩的技巧为生。
en: I am Zeno of Okhema. I make a living by instructing people on the art of debate.

ch: 奥赫玛识字的公民都知道，阿卡索斯早已在黑潮中覆灭。你如何从一座不存在的城邦来？
en: As all who can read in Okhema know that Icatus was long since destroyed by the black tide. How could you have come from a city that does not exist?

ch: 是我先前的表述有误。我曾来自阿卡索斯，那是我的故乡，黑潮来临前，我携带所有财产逃来了奥赫玛。我来自尚未覆灭的阿卡索斯，这点千真万确。
en: I made a mistake in my last remark. I originally come from Icatus, and that is my home. Before the black tide descended, I took all of my worldly belongings and fled to Okhema. I come from an Icatus that has not yet been destroyed. This point is absolutely true.

ch: 认为这样的讨论毫无意义，不过是思维的惰性。但实际上，整个翁法罗斯无不与之相关。
en: To think that such an argument lacks meaning is no more than mental laziness. In fact, this relates to everything we see in Amphoreus.

ch: 我是奥赫玛的希诺，以教授人们论辩的技巧为生。
en: I am Zeno of Okhema. I make a living by instructing people on the art of debate.

ch: 我是奥赫玛的希诺，以教授人们论辩的技巧为生。
en: I am Zeno of Okhema. I make a living by instructing people on the art of debate.

ch: 数学是阐述必然性的知识，哪怕悬锋城的战士全部改信墨涅塔，圆依旧是圆，不会变成方形。但「阿卡索斯」的存在，必须依赖现实历史。
en: Mathematics explains absolute and certain truth. If all the warriors of Castrum Kremnos were to suddenly follow Mnestia, a circle would still be a circle. It would not change shape. However, the existence of "Icatus" absolutely relies on real history.

ch: 要是「阿卡索斯」真实存在，请问「奥赫玛」与「悬锋城」是否也该真实存在？「神悟树庭」与「哀丽秘榭」是否也真实存在？
en: If "Icatus" truly exists, do "Okhema" and "Castrum Kremnos" also truly exist as well? What about "Grove of Epiphany" and "Aedes Elysiae"?

ch: 哈，我就猜到你准会相信他那套言论。要是在奥赫玛公然质疑阿卡索斯的真实性，是要引起众怒的。但没关系，我愿意为我的论点辩护。
en: Hah, I knew that you would favor his argument. If Okhema were to publicly doubt the truth of Icatus' existence, it would be certain to incite outrage. I do not mind, however. I am willing to defend my theory.

ch: 若是有座城邦，远在翁法罗斯的另一头，从未与奥赫玛有过任何通信，按你刚才的论点，那座城邦的人们便全都消失不见了。
en: If there were another city on the other side of Amphoreus that had never had contact with Okhema, then according to your logic, the people of this city would disappear without a trace.

ch: 呵呵，那就叫他们看吧，最好是睁大眼睛看好了，他们引以为傲的宝贝女儿，与他们最不耻的悬锋小子相爱的样子，准叫他们气得当场发疯，哈哈哈！
en: Teehee, then let them watch as much as they want. The sight of their pride and joy, their darling daughter, falling in love with the Kremnos kid they hate the most... That ought to drive them nuts, haha!

ch: 最后的城邦，「奥赫玛」…末日之下，这里应该是庇护所有人的家园，也包括你们。
en: The last city, Okhema... It ought to be a sanctuary for all in the end times, including for people like you.

ch: 对了，上次我说的，一起离开奥赫玛的事，你考虑好了吗？
en: That's right — have you given any thought to what I mentioned last time... about leaving Okhema?

ch: 我的傻瓜，厄琉斯，你还不明白吗？！他们的仇恨只与你那悬锋城的血脉有关。
en: Silly billy, Aelius... Don't you get it!? Their hate is only for your Castrum Kremnos bloodline.

ch: 其实，我的出身与宁芙的家庭相互对立…我是悬锋将领的后代，她则来自奥赫玛历史最为悠久的几个权贵家族。
en: Y'know, I come from a completely different class to Nympha... I'm a descendant of a Kremnos general, and she comes from one of the most powerful and long-lasting noble families in Okhema history.

ch: 即使黄金战争已结束这么多年，即使悬锋孤军已与奥赫玛握手言和，我的家族已随先王政权的崩塌而灭亡…可，这份仇恨从未消失……
en: And even though the Chrysos War has long finished, even though the Kremnoan Detachment has made peace with Okhema, and even though my family was wiped out with the fall of the old king's rule — none of this animosity has disappeared...

ch: 我随万敌殿下抵达奥赫玛的第一夜，就有刺客前来企图夺走我的性命，那时我还只是个懵懂的孩童。后来，万敌殿下向元老院提出抗议，他们才不情愿地收了手。
en: The first night I arrived in Okhema alongside Lord Mydei, an assassin made an attempt on my life. I was just a child back then... Lord Mydei lodged a complaint with the Council of Elders, and they reluctantly put a stop to things.

ch: 宁芙提出了一个我并不赞成计划：公开我们的恋情，再逃到奥赫玛城外，用舆论向他的父母施压，直到我们的婚事得到同意再返回……
en: Nympha proposed a plan that I don't agree with: Publicize our relationship, then flee outside Okhema and use public opinion to pressure her parents, only returning once they've agreed to our marriage...

ch: 宁芙的父母在奥赫玛的势力范围很广…这下麻烦了。
en: Nympha's parents have a very wide network of influence in Okhema... This is big trouble.

ch: 你们奥赫玛人玩挺大…
en: You Okhemans really know how to play hardball...

ch: 前两天，我这儿有笔十分可疑的交易——一个侍卫模样的男人，竟要出手一颗价值连城的悬锋鹰血红项链。
en: A few days back, I had a really suspicious trade — this guy who looked like a retainer wanting to pawn a priceless pendant made of Kremnos eagleblood.

ch: 鹰血红极为罕见，少有的存世珍品也多作为悬锋族人的传家宝，不会出现在普通奥赫玛守卫手上。
en: Eagleblood is very rare, and the rare extant treasures are mostly safeguarded by Kremnoans, so there's no way it'd be in the hands of an ordinary Okheman guard.

ch: 你拒绝了无数出身高贵的奥赫玛青年，没想到竟是为了个悬锋族人？还非得是这个！要不是卫兵将那条项链拿给我看，我都不敢相信他所言为真。
en: You rejected all those high-born young Okheman boys, but I never thought you were doing that for a Kremnoan! And it had to be this one! I'd never have believed it was true if the guard hadn't shown me the necklace.

ch: 你们的血脉将与悬锋城相融，你们的后代将流着纷争的血——
en: Your bloodline will merge with that of Castrum Kremnos, and your progeny will carry the blood of Strife...

ch: 你？你是那个悬锋小子！
en: You? You're that Kremnos punk!

ch: 我们私奔吧！我带你离开奥赫玛，现在、立刻、马上就动身！
en: Let's elope! Let me take you away from Okhema, right here, right now... Let's just go!

ch: 这样的故事持续了至少十分钟。或许是奥赫玛的阳光让你没有睡好，你渐渐闭上了眼……
en: The story lasts at least ten minutes. Perhaps the light in Okhema has been impacting your sleep, but you gradually close your eyelids...

ch: 听说她是跟着一群外邦人来到奥赫玛的，父母都在途中走散了…「走散」是委婉的说法。
en: I heard she came to Okhema with a bunch of outlanders, and her parents got "separated" from her along the way... And I'm speaking a euphemism, you understand.

ch: 这…恐怕办不到。奥赫玛外面是很危险的。
en: I... don't think you'll be able to. It's really dangerous outside Okhema.

ch: 是这样…我是奥赫玛推理协会的一名成员，听闻树庭在黑潮中惨遭毁灭的消息，就立刻前来调查。
en: Here's the thing... I'm a member of the Okhema Deduction Society. I rushed here to investigate upon hearing about the Grove's destruction by the black tide.

ch: 奥赫玛什么时候有推理协会了？
en: Since when did Okhema have a Deduction Society?

ch: 我听奥赫玛的人们说，您能使用欧洛尼斯的神力……
en: I heard the people of Okhema say that you can use Oronyx's divine power...

ch: 碰见您的时候，我就灵机一动：或许您拿着这几样东西去树庭里转一转，就能通过某种方式知道他们几个的下落了。
en: I had an idea when I saw you — Maybe you can somehow sense what happened to them if you go take a walk in the Grove with these things on you.

ch: 树庭同样有驻守的黄金裔，在黑潮来袭时不该如此不堪一击，还有那个黑衣剑士的行为…仔细想来确有些蹊跷。
en: There was a Chrysos Heir stationed at the Grove, they shouldn't have fallen so easily to the black tide. And that black-clad swordmaster's actions... they seem rather suspicious upon reflection.

ch: 他…难道不是第一次来树庭？
en: He's been to the Grove before, hasn't he?

ch: 如果这人之前从未来过树庭，我不相信这里错综复杂的结构没有让他产生困惑。
en: If he had never visited the Grove before, I find it hard to believe he wouldn't be baffled by its intricate layout.

ch: 至少第一次过来参观的时候，即使有尼科马库斯带路，我还是因为找厕所而迷失了方向…安德烈亚斯也抱怨过自己是个路痴，在树庭工作了好几年仍然会迷路。
en: Even when Nicomachus guided me on my first visit, I got lost looking for the restroom... And Andreas, who always complained about being directionally challenged, still got lost in the Grove despite working there for years.

ch: 可问题是…黑潮怪物真有如此智慧吗？为何他能轻易避开树庭的防备，直抵核心？
en: But the question is... does the black tide possess such intelligence? How did he manage to slip past the Grove's defenses and head straight for the core?

ch: 这也太可怕了…如果真是这样，或许奥赫玛的防守，其实也形同虚设？
en: That's horrifying... If that's the case, are Okhema's defenses just for show?

ch: 无论如何，这人一定以某种形式事先了解过树庭的情况，他的行为方式根本不像一个莽撞的抢劫犯，反而像是个对一切了如指掌的刺客。
en: Regardless, this individual must have scouted out the Grove beforehand. His methodical approach doesn't scream of a careless burglar, but rather hints at a calculated assassin who's thoroughly in the know.

ch: 科洛埃、尼科马库斯、安德烈亚斯…树庭的大家…愿你们在塞纳托斯的怀抱中安眠。
en: Clio, Nicomachus, Andreas... everyone at the Grove... may you rest in the embrace of Thanatos.

ch: 他不是失去理性的怪物，是专程来摧毁树庭的！
en: He's not just a mindless beast. He was on a mission to obliterate the Grove!

ch: 那就好…我知道你实力强悍，但眼下树庭黑潮未消，依旧万分凶险。
en: That's good... I know you're strong, but right now the black tide hasn't dissipated, and it's still extremely dangerous.

ch: 如果没有其他事情，还是早些回奥赫玛吧。
en: If there's nothing else, you'd better return to Okhema soon.

ch: 将奥赫玛推理协会三位成员的遗物交给珀里法斯
en: Hand over the belongings of the three members of the Okhema Deduction Society to Periphas

ch: 根据调查结果看来，面对本次黑潮，树庭的学者本应能够有序组织撤离，人员生还率相对较高，但…那位黑衣剑士的出现改变了一切。
en: According to our investigation, the Grove's scholars could have managed an organized evacuation from the black tide, with many survivors, but... everything changed when that black-clad swordmaster appeared.

ch: 沿着黑衣剑士的动向，来到了树庭中部。
en: Tracking the black-clad swordmaster led you to the Grove's central area.

ch: 入侵者未免太熟悉树庭了。
en: The invader seems unusually familiar with the Grove.

ch: 可她们每次回来，和我聊起在树庭的生活，说的却净是些乱七八糟的玩意…什么「偷读课外读物的小技巧」啊、什么「如何替人签到赚外快」啊……
en: But every time they came home and told me about life in the Grove, it was nothing but crazy stories... about "secretly reading forbidden books" or "getting paid to fake attendance"...

ch: 你说说、你说说，在树庭那种地方，还能把日子过得这么鸡飞狗跳，我怎么就养出这么两个天赋异禀的丫头！
en: Just imagine — making such a mess even in a place like the Grove! How in the world did I raise two daughters with such special talents for mischief!?

ch: 现在唯一可惜的，就是我这把年纪，怕是没办法亲自去树庭走一趟喽。
en: All I regret is that these old bones won't let me travel to the Grove anymore.

ch: 是盗火行者……
en: It's the Flame Reaver...

ch: 你说这人，一把年纪了，非得窝在树庭瞎折腾，让他回奥赫玛就跟要了他的命似的。
en: That stubborn old fool, always clinging to the Grove, treating Okhema like it's poison to him.

ch: 嘶…不好意思，我现在身上只有这些，但之后回了奥赫玛，你要是有什么需要都可以找我帮忙！
en: S—Sorry... it's not much, but once I'm back in Okhema, just name your price!

ch: 第一，叫我阿那克萨戈拉斯。第二，什么叫「也」？你的意思…你想死在树庭？当真老糊涂了？
en: First, call me Anaxagoras. Second, what do you mean "as well"? Do you mean... you want to die here in the Grove? Have you gone senile?

ch: 那刻夏，我以前和你辩论的时候或许不曾提起：我很早就志愿为树庭奉献自己的一生。
en: Anaxa, I may have not mentioned this in my previous debates with you, but I vowed to dedicate my life to the Grove long ago.

ch: 年轻时我因家庭暂时放弃了这个理想，好在到了这个岁数，还能有机会在树庭燃烧智慧。如今黑潮覆灭树庭将即，我便也无处可去了。
en: I temporarily gave up on this ideal when I was young because I had a family. Fortunately, I had the opportunity to re-ignite my wisdom here in my old age. Now that the black tide has come to destroy it, I have nowhere left to go.

ch: 你的逻辑可真是一团浆糊。我知道你儿子在奥赫玛混得不错，何来无处可去一说？
en: Your logic makes no sense! I know your son is getting by pretty well in Okhema. What do you mean, "you have nowhere to go"?

ch: 黑潮来势汹汹，连卡林尼库斯那样的黄金裔都阵亡了。我就不奢望能离开了…只愿死前能再读一读树庭的藏书。
en: The black tide descends with brutal ferocity. Even a great Chrysos Heir like Callinicus lost their life to it. I don't expect that I would be able to leave. I simply wish to sit and read in the Grove library one last time.

ch: 你知道吗，就他那腿脚——上次我不小心给他那破烟斗弄坏了，老东西撵我撵了整整半个树庭！
en: And those legs he complains about? Last time I accidentally broke his favorite pipe, he chased me through half the Grove!

ch: 哎呦，太好了——年轻人，你可算回来了！风堇小姐才刚来过，得知你独自去了树庭，她很担心你的安全。
en: Oh thank goodness — you're back, young one! Miss Hyacine was just here, worried sick about you going to the Grove alone.

ch: 嗯，是这样的。在治疗那位来自树庭的伤者时，我发现了一封信，似乎是某位学者给妻子的家书。
en: Well, you see. During my treatment of a wounded from the Grove, I found a letter that appeared to be from a scholar to his wife.

ch: 然后我就想起来，灰宝不是和那刻夏老师一起去慰问过那些牺牲者的家属嘛，树庭的悲剧才过去没多久，我有点担心他们的生活状况。
en: Then I remembered that you and Professor Anaxa checked on the bereaved families before, and since the Grove incident is still recent, I'm worried about these families' situations.

ch: 据说翁法罗斯在最繁盛的时候，曾有超过<unbreak>1200</unbreak>只大地兽在这片土地上栖息，多么惊人的数字啊。所以，你知道这意味着什么吗？
en: It's said that during its prime, Amphoreus was home to over <unbreak>1,200</unbreak> dromases. What an astounding number! So, do you know what that means?

ch: 哎，怎么能算找麻烦，奥赫玛的公民们都知道异邦的客人神通广大，说不准您稍微拜拜{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}，就能想出什么好法子了呢？
en: Oh, how could it be considered dumping? The citizens of Okhema all know how capable guests from outlands are. Perhaps if you prayed a bit to {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}, you might come up with a brilliant solution!

ch: 加油！全奥赫玛最美的大地兽，要带着虔诚的心来认真讨好它才行啊！
en: Keep it up! Okhema's most beautiful dromas deserves your utmost effort to win its heart!

ch: 喂，对奥赫玛人这么友善干嘛？他们在排挤悬锋人的时候，可没这么好的语气！
en: Hey, why are you being so kind to these Okhemans? When they were ostracizing the Kremnoans, they weren't using such nice words!

ch: 你知道的，万敌是我兄弟。
en: You know, Mydei is a brother to me.

ch: 万敌刚走就闹事是吧？！
en: So Mydei leaves, and now you're stirring up trouble!?

ch: 那又如何？殿下是交代过我们要和奥赫玛人友善相处，可这难道意味着我们要步步退让，苟且偷生，丢掉悬锋人的尊严和荣耀吗？！
en: And what of it? His Highness instructed us to treat the Okhemans amicably, but does that mean we must retreat with every step, live dishonorably, and abandon the dignity and glory of the Kremnoans!?

ch: 不是。科可波阁下的主人从来只有一位，那便是万敌殿下。
en: No. Kokopo belongs to only one master, and that is His Highness, Mydei.

ch: 详细地说，科可波阁下的全名为「悬锋猛兽•科可波三世」，乃是陪伴过万敌殿下四处征战的坐骑，骁勇善战，勇冠三军，锐不可当。
en: To be precise, Kokopo's full name is "The Fierce Beast of Kremnos: Kokopo III." It was the loyal steed of Lord Mydei, accompanying him through countless battles — valiant, peerless in combat, and utterly unstoppable.

ch: 在这样的世界中，能平静活着便是种奢侈。而悬锋的王为他们扛起了重量。
en: In such a world, being able to live peacefully is a luxury. And the King of Kremnos bore that weight for them.

ch: ——奥赫玛的城门口，我会带着科可波阁下在那等你们，想随我返乡的，就自己来吧。悬锋城不会拒绝勇士，但也不欢迎懦弱之徒。
en: At the gates of Okhema, I'll wait with Kokopo. Come to join me if you want to return. Castrum Kremnos welcomes warriors but does not tolerate the cowards.

ch: 原来…<color=#dbc291ff>那头大地兽的恋爱对象，就是万敌啊！</color>
en: So... <color=#dbc291ff>that dromas' true love is none other than Mydei!</color>

ch: 别想了！我就算死在外面，也不愿在异邦的庇护下苟且偷生。悬锋的古训都被你们丢到脑后了吗，在那温热的浴池里泡得软烂不堪了吗？！
en: No more thinking! I'd rather die outside than survive under the protection of a foreign land. Have you forgotten the ancient creed of Kremnos? Have you soaked in those warm baths so long that you've gone soft!?

ch: 可这是王的意志！你要公然违背万敌殿下的命令吗？
en: But this is the will of our king! Are you going to openly defy Lord Mydei's orders?

ch: 殿下选择独自返乡，成为整个翁法罗斯的守护者，不就是希望我们能过上和平的生活，不必再与刀剑为伴吗！为什么非得要为那传统流血才行？
en: His Highness chose to return home alone and became the Guardian of Amphoreus so that we could live peacefully, free from the company of blades. Why must we bleed for tradition to prove ourselves?

ch: 既然…我们都将科可波阁下视作殿下的化身，离开了大地兽的帮助，你也难以抵达悬锋城，不如…未来的路，就交由它来决定吧。
en: Since we all regard Kokopo as His Highness's embodiment, you won't reach Castrum Kremnos without its help. Perhaps... let it decide the path ahead.

ch: 异乡的勇士，万敌殿下的同伴，请你为悬锋族人见证此行的结局——
en: As a warrior from the outlands, a companion of Lord Mydei, please bear witness to our choice —

ch: 悬锋的王在遥远处浴血奋战，我们理应支持他的决定，为他免除后顾之忧。
en: The King of Kremnos is far away, shedding blood for us. We should respect his will and ease his burdens.

ch: 不知道在这里，它能否听到悬锋城内正响起的厮杀声？在深沉的睡眠中，它是否也曾梦到过与主人共同征战的时光？是否仍觉得心神激荡，想再回到那个时候？
en: Here, can it still hear the sounds of battle ringing out in Castrum Kremnos? In its deep sleep, has it dreamed of warring alongside its master? Does it still feel the stir of its soul, yearning to return to those days?

ch: 大地兽做出了选择。它转身朝向奥赫玛的城门，头也不回地走去。
en: The dromas has made its choice. It turns toward Okhema's gates, walking away without looking back.

ch: 原来…<color=#dbc291ff>那头大地兽的恋爱对象，是悬锋城啊！</color>
en: Turns out... <color=#dbc291ff>the dromas' true love is Castrum Kremnos!</color>

ch: 你惊奇地发现那头号称「全奥赫玛最美」的大地兽再次出现在了工坊里，而科可波三世则站在它身旁，用充满柔情蜜意的语气轻哼着。
en: You're surprised to find the dromas once hailed as the most beautiful in all Okhema back in the workshop, with Kokopo III standing beside her, humming in a tone filled with tenderness and affection.

ch: 哼，还是悬锋城的土质尝起来更美味，对吧？
en: Hmph, but Kremnos' soil must taste better, right?

ch: （那群悬锋族人真打算返乡吗…去奥赫玛的城门口看看吧。）
en: (Are those Kremnoans really planning to go back? Maybe I should check the gates of Okhema.)

ch: 我们不属于奥赫玛。
en: We don't belong to Okhema.

ch: 后来我接受了悬锋城最严厉的选拔，却目睹与我交好的战士们都在战场上死去！
en: Later, I underwent the harshest trials in Castrum Kremnos, only to witness my comrades fall one by one on the battlefield!

ch: 我听说，在比云石天宫还要高的山上，有很多人聚在一起，决定了奥赫玛的未来。
en: I heard that on a mountain even higher than the Marmoreal Palace, many people have gathered to decide Okhema's future.

ch: 奥赫玛，会不会也像阿卡索斯那样，变成一个黑漆漆、乱糟糟，可怕怪物遍地走的地方？
en: Will Okhema become like Icatus — dark, chaotic, full of terrifying monsters everywhere?

ch: {F#女士}{M#先生}，你是奥赫玛的大英雄，肯定能进出云崖。你可以带我去刻法勒的身边吗？
en: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, you're Okhema's great hero, so you must be able to come and go at Dawncloud. Could you bring me to Kephale?

ch: 看呐，它高居云崖之巅，向奥赫玛的每一个人投去注视。我们的一切都因它的注视才得以存在。如此尊神，怎能不拜，怎能不为它献上牺牲？
en: Look, they sit atop Dawncloud, gazing upon every soul in Okhema. All that we are exists because of their watchful eye. A god so revered — how could we not worship and sacrifice to them?

ch: 可是，我想恳求您，千万不要把奥赫玛的光明丢下……
en: But I beg of you, please don't abandon the light of Okhema...

ch: 现在，大家都对奥赫玛的未来更有希望啦！
en: Now, everyone feels more hopeful about the future of Okhema!

ch: 我小的时候，奥赫玛可不像现在这样太平，三天两头都有纷争眷属袭击城墙。前一天还见过的人，可能第二天就……
en: When I was little, Okhema wasn't as peaceful as it is now. Attacks on the city walls by Strife Titankins were almost a daily thing. One day you'd see someone, and the next...

ch: 别说这种傻话，兄弟！我们不是约好了要一起站上奥赫玛小贩业的顶点吗？
en: Don't say such foolish things, brother! Didn't we promise to reach the pinnacle of the Okhema marketplace together?

ch: 呃，这只是二楼啊！你这个样子，以后怎么站上奥赫玛小贩业的顶点？
en: Uh, this is just the second floor! With you acting like this, how are you ever going to reach the top of the Okhema marketplace?

ch: 但愿再创世后，他们真的能够站上奥赫玛小贩业的顶点。到那时候，你们也一定要去看看「奥凯纳斯运动会」的盛况啊！
en: I hope that after Era Nova, they truly rise to become the finest merchants in Okhema. When that happens, you absolutely must witness the grandeur of the Okeanas Games!

ch: 毕竟，我们是要站上奥赫玛小贩业顶点的男人啊！
en: After all, we're the men who will stand at the pinnacle of the Okhema marketplace together!

ch: 虽然奥赫玛现在面临危机，但天父刻法勒还在庇护着我们所有人，是这样的，对吗？
en: Okhema's struggling, but Sky Father Kephale's still got us. Yeah?

ch: 我想让他们知道，刻法勒的声音有多么坚定、温暖，奥赫玛绝对不会被黑潮攻陷，背负世界的泰坦从没有忘记过我们这些平民。
en: Let them feel the determination and warmth in Kephale's voice, let them be convinced that Okhema will stand tall against the black tide, and the Titan who bears the world has never forgotten about us.

ch: 他有着一张奥赫玛最常见、最普通的面孔，和千千万万个圣城守卫一样。你很难在人群中找到他。
en: He's got that extremely common and very ordinary face for an Okheman, just like all the countless other guards in the holy city. You'll be hard-pressed to find him in a crowd.

ch: 我知道，他父亲也是一名圣城卫兵，杀死过黑潮怪物…他一直想做同样的事，好证明自己也有能力保护家人与奥赫玛。
en: I know. His father was a guard of the city too, slaying monsters of the black tide... He always wanted to do the same thing, to prove he had the strength to protect his family and Okhema.

ch: 刻法勒，我们的天父，我诚心向你祷问。现在的奥赫玛，万帷网变慢了，消息真真假假，好像到处都在打仗，乱糟糟的，那些山崖上，还冒出了一些奇怪的虚影……
en: Sky Father Kephale, I ask you sincerely: Okhema and the World Wound Web have slowed. Be the news true or false, but everywhere seems to be at war, chaos reigns, and on the cliffs, stand strange shadows...

ch: 奥赫玛的大家，也都会好好地迎来再创世。
en: Everyone in Okhema will definitely reach the Era Nova safely.

ch: 当初打算离开树庭的时候，似乎也是这样的心情呢。只是，这次的出走，我竟然犹豫了这么久啊。
en: I had the same feeling back when I first planned to leave the Grove. But this time... I can't believe I hesitated for so long about running away.

ch: 在畅饮蜜酿之时，我脑中掠过一缕针扎般的念头——逐火之旅果真能如此完美么？一场欢宴，果真能承载翁法罗斯那悲惨的命运么？
en: As I indulged in the honey brew, a needle-sharp thought pierced my mind — could the Flame-Chase Journey really be this perfect? Could a mere banquet truly bear the weight of Amphoreus's tragic destiny?

ch: 我当然是阿波罗尼，树庭贤人、逐火军参谋，这确凿无疑。
en: I am, without a doubt, Apollonius, Sage of the Grove and advisor to the Flame-Chasers.

ch: 无论是怒而离开树庭，还是身先士卒讨伐海洋…你总是将自己视作一枚顽石，试图悬住世界的命运。
en: Whether storming out of the Grove in anger, or leading the charge against Ocean... you always see yourself as an immovable boulder, trying to hold the world's destiny in balance.

ch: 这是海瑟音大人的认知中，您来到翁法罗斯后，最为熟悉的饮品。
en: Lady Hysilens somehow knows that this is the drink you've become most familiar with since arriving in Amphoreus.

ch: 翁法罗斯唯一的一樽，源自「海洋」的纯酿，樽铭为「把欢宴带去明天」。无他，无价。
en: The last bottle in all of Amphoreus, a pure brew of the "Ocean," bearing the inscription "Take the Feast to Tomorrow." It is, quite simply, priceless.

ch: 「心酿」回归了。把握好「仅一次」的机会，让一位翁法罗斯遇到的朋友来尝试，或许……
en: The soul brew has returned. Make the most of this "one and only chance." Let a friend from Amphoreus try it, and maybe...

ch: 「罗浮杂俎」还顺利吗？
en: How's it going with Ghostly Grove?

ch: 希望铭记的东西…呀，看灰宝期盼的表情，是想要翁法罗斯纪念品，对吧？
en: Something to remember...? Oh, judging by Grayie's eager expression, you want an Amphoreus souvenir, right?

ch: 用料殊异如此之大，容吾猜测…你是炼成捍卫树庭的战略武器，亦或是钻研来自繁星的前沿科技…？
en: With such peculiar materials in such quantities, let me guess... Are you crafting a strategic weapon to protect the Grove, or perhaps researching cutting-edge technology from the stars...?

ch: 你还是见识短浅了。猜猜看，如今悬锋之王迈德漠斯下厨时，用的是什么刀具？
en: You're still quite narrow-minded. Care to guess what kind of knife the King of Kremnos, Mydeimos, uses when he cooks these days?

ch: 哎呀，人子唷，身为神悟树庭教授，可不能将求知若渴者拒之门外啊…小姑娘，过来吧，汝大可相信多嘴多舌之神，吾来答疑解惑。
en: Oh my, child of humanity! As a professor of the Grove of Epiphany, I simply cannot turn away those who thirst for knowledge... Come closer, young lady. You can trust this chatty God. I shall answer all your questions and clear your doubts.

ch: 而这位是索芙洛尼娅。或许你在奥赫玛城中见过她，那枚髀石护身符就是她送给我的。
en: And this is Sophronia. You might have seen her in Okhema. She's the one who gave me this knucklebone talisman.

ch: 在你送给翁法罗斯的新世界中，芙缇尼重获了视力，而索芙洛尼娅也拥有了声音。不过，她们还需要一些时间适应各自的礼物。
en: In the new world you gave to Amphoreus, Futini regained her sight, and Sophronia found her voice. However, they still need some time to adjust to their respective gifts.

ch: 也许，奥赫玛的领袖更加需要能够饱览万物的金丝；而一位普通的织者，却只需要一双明媚的眼眸。
en: Perhaps the leader of Okhema needs golden threads that can see all things, while an ordinary weaver only needs a pair of bright eyes.

ch: …我和你母亲吃一样的菜，迈德漠斯。
en: ...I'll have the same as your mother, Mydeimos.

ch: 你是迈德漠斯的朋友吧？哈哈，这些天有太多人来拜访了，真想不到他人缘这么好。
en: You're Mydeimos's friend, right? Haha, so many people have been visiting these days. Who knew he has so many friends?

ch: 我们只是刚知道，有一世的迈德漠斯…受了许多苦。
en: We just found out that a past Mydeimos... suffered a great deal.

ch: 悬锋的存续…未必大于世界存亡。前世的我犯了太多错误，无论是用毒计杀死你，还是将迈德漠斯抛入冥海……
en: The survival of Kremnos... may not be worth more than the fate of the world. In my past life, I made too many mistakes, whether it was poisoning you, or casting Mydeimos into the Sea of Souls...

ch: 这么小声干嘛，和迈德漠斯当面说去。至少在最后，你如愿成为了更好的人啊。
en: Why are you whispering? Go tell Mydeimos to his face. At least in the end, you became a better person, just like you wanted.

ch: 当你在那遥远的星间，踱行于自己的道路上时，若偶感沮丧，便向翁法罗斯的方向举杯吧。随时随刻——
en: When you're wandering among those distant stars, treading your own path, should you ever feel down, raise a glass toward Amphoreus. Anytime—

ch: 奶奶快看我手里这些宝贝——哀地里亚的银戒，厄涅俄努斯的陶瓷，还有上好的银簪子…我从奥赫玛最好的裁缝铺里挑的，你戴上一定好看。
en: Grandma, look at these treasures in my hands. Silver rings from Aidonia, ceramics from Aenionus, and these fine silver hairpins... I picked them from the best tailor's shop in Okhema, they'll look beautiful on you.

ch: 现在，这个夙愿算是实现了大半吧。新生的翁法罗斯，定将迎来更有温度的律法。
en: Now, this long-cherished wish has largely come true. The reborn Amphoreus will surely embrace laws with more warmth and humanity.

ch: 若有人问起，就说这是由翁法罗斯的凯撒颁赐的——呵，要开具证明的话，就让他们亲自来谒见我吧。
