en: Haha, no clue. I heard that Castrum Kremnos roams around slowly, just like a dromas.

ch: 别担心，老妈，等学成我就回来了。而且，悬锋城搞不好走着走着，哪天还能路过咱们这儿呢。
en: Don't worry, mom. Once I finish my studies, I'll come straight home. Who knows? Maybe one day that city will wander right past our village.

ch: 呵呵，那妈可要时不时到谷堆上看看，有没有像山一样的大地兽来哀丽秘榭附近了。
en: Then I'll have to keep watch from the haystack. Just to see if a mountain-sized dromas is headed for Aedes Elysiae.

ch: 白厄，你曾说打算离开哀丽秘榭，去外面的广阔天地远行，准备做得怎么样了？
en: Phainon, you once said you wanted to leave Aedes Elysiae and explore the wider world. How's that going?

ch: 至于你拜托我收集的关于树庭的信息，现在倒是有些眉目了。
en: As for the info of the Grove you asked me to look into, I've managed to dig up a few leads.

ch: 呵呵，有志气当然是好事。不过…我还听说，神悟树庭崇尚辩论与独立思考，学术风气极为自由，各种惊世骇俗的理论层出不穷。
en: Hehe, that's the spirit. But... I've also heard the Grove of Epiphany places great value on open debate and independent thinking. The academic scene is extremely free — so much so that bizarre and radical theories pop up all the time.

ch: 好想赶快长大啊…呜，哀丽秘榭的日子，为什么就不能过得更快些呢？
en: How I wish I could grow up faster... Why do the days in Aedes Elysiae have to go by so sloooow...

ch: 哀丽秘榭的环境似乎受某种特殊力量影响，将我从你的记忆中塑型，称其为魔法也不为过。
en: Aedes Elysiae is influenced by a unique power that molds me from your memories — magic, one might say.

ch: 去找寻妖精竖琴的地址吧，在迷路迷境深处应该会有发现。
en: Go search for the fairy harp. You should find something in the depths of the Membrance Maze.

ch: 去找寻妖精竖琴的地址吧，在迷路迷境深处应该会有发现。
en: Go search for the fairy harp. You should find something in the depths of the Membrance Maze.

ch: 也许是因为哀丽秘榭没有夜晚吧？在这里，一切都是最美好的模样，比如阳光下的麦田，波光粼粼的水面……
en: Maybe it's because there's no nighttime in Aedes Elysiae? Everything here stays in its most beautiful state — golden wheat fields under the sunshine, water surfaces sparkling with light...

ch: 没关系，哀丽秘榭到处都是盛开的鲜花。下次人家会在{NICKNAME}心情更好的时候出现。
en: It's okay. Aedes Elysiae is full of blooming flowers. I'll come back when you're in a better mood.

ch: 也不怕你笑话，我的家族是一支孱弱的冬之民，早在黄金战争初期，所居的天空堡垒便被悬锋城击落，因而不得不在大地上流徙。
en: Not that I'm afraid of a little playful teasing. My family hails from a frail branch of the Winterfolk. Back in the early days of the Chrysos War, the sky bastion we lived in was struck down by Castrum Kremnos, forcing us into exile on the earth below.

ch: 就连我的爵位，也是亲手挣得的。用武器指着君王要求赐爵，除了我之外，全翁法罗斯也找不出第二个了吧？
en: Even my title, I earned it with my own hands. Pointing a weapon at the monarch to demand a title, there's likely no second soul in all of Amphoreus who's done the same, is there?

ch: 到那时…先让这翁法罗斯刮上几年暴风雪如何？
en: When that time comes... Mayhaps I'll let Amphoreus experience a few years of snowstorm? How does that sound?

ch: 过去…这该从哪里说起好呢…要是从头说起的话，我记得自己是出生在悬锋外城的一个无名部族……
en: Where to begin... If I start from the very beginning, I remember being born into an unknown tribe in the outskirts of Castrum Kremnos...

ch: 啊，抱、抱歉，你一定不会想听这些琐事，还是从我被逐出悬锋城说起吧。
en: Ah, s—sorry, you probably don't want to hear such trivial things. Let me start from when I was expelled from Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 「她如风暴般席卷历史，以烈焰与智谋重塑了翁法罗斯的格局与命运……」
en: "She swept through history like a storm, reshaping the fate and fabric of Amphoreus with flame and cunning..."

ch: 我曾是布利萨的王储，我们的城邦信仰艾格勒。泰坦战争的时候，艾格勒和尼卡多利打仗，我们也不得不和悬锋城较上劲。
en: I was once the crown prince of Bulsa, and my city-state was loyal to Aquila. During the Titan War, as Aquila and Nikador came to blows, we found ourselves with little choice but to face Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 凯撒大人治好我的伤，并叫我率军，用计多次战胜了那不可一世的悬锋军。
en: The Great Imperator mended my wounds and instructed me to lead the army. Through tactics and strategies, the Imperator laid low the formidable forces of Kremnos many times.

ch: 我年少时便加入了树庭，沉浸于学业之中，眼中只有那遮蔽天穹的葱郁树冠。
en: In my youth, I joined the Grove, immersed in studies beneath its all-shrouding sky dome.

ch: 但在两尊泰坦的庇佑下，树庭的大部分贤人都闭目塞听，在名为知识的枷锁中自我陶醉……
en: Yet under the Titans' protection, most Sages of the Grove remained willfully blind, shackled by self-indulgent "knowledge"...

ch: 规劝无果后，我离开了树庭，成为统络诸军的参谋，替凯撒效力、为此世分忧。
en: When persuasion failed, I left the Grove. As Imperator's advisor, I marshaled armies to shoulder this world's burdens.

ch: 将来么…做好我的本职工作，等待翁法罗斯迎来新生，仅此而已。
en: The future? I'll do my duty, awaiting Amphoreus's rebirth. Nothing more.

ch: 凯撒大人所说的星海，我并无兴趣。我在意的，唯有翁法罗斯的命运罢了。
en: The sea of stars fascinated the Imperator, but holds no allure for me. My sole concern is Amphoreus's fate.

ch: 等到他们昂首阔步地驶向星海…或许我会回到树庭，做回一个沉浸学术、偶尔健健身的普通贤人吧。
en: Perhaps when they sail triumphantly toward the cosmos... I'll return to the Grove, a common sage lost in books... and occasional exercise.

ch: 答，错了——这又不是悬，悬锋城，没人有那么，狂，狂野的品味！
en: W—Wrong. They are not Kremnoans, they don't have such... barbaric tastes!

ch: 本狮让他细说，他说在奥赫玛那时，醉后建了个辩论场，想和公民们探讨凯撒大人的伟大之处，发了很多长篇大论。
en: I prompted him for more details, and he talked about how he had set up a Forum in Okhema when he was drunk. He wanted to discuss the eminence of the Great Imperator with the citizens, and posted many long essays.

ch: 据神话所述，在那遥远的黄金世，乃至是灾厄三泰坦降世之前——翁法罗斯也曾纷争遍布，只见那汪洋化作血海，浅滩遍布硝烟吼——
en: According to legends, in the distant Era Chrysea, before the Three Titans of Calamity descended, war was once rife in Amphoreus, oceans were dyed by blood, and the shores were shrouded by ashes from gunfire.

ch: 仿佛是预感到未来的你仍会回到哀丽秘榭，在启程前，昔涟在桌上悄悄地留了一封信笺——
en: As if she sensed you'd one day return again, she quietly left behind a letter on the table, just before you left.

ch: 「而哀丽秘榭，就是你下一段旅程的起点。等准备好了，再从这里出发吧。」
en: "Aedes Elysiae is where your next journey begins. When you're ready, set out from here."

ch: 远远眺望餐馆的招牌，听着热火朝天的喧闹，看着原本漫无目的的妖精们找到了热衷之事…就像迷路迷境从悠长的熟睡中醒转过来了哪。
en: I can see the restaurant's plaque from a distance, hear the cheerful noise, and watch fairies who used to drift about aimlessly now find their passion... It's as if the Membrance Maze has finally awakened from a long slumber.

ch: 将菜肴的香气封存进谷物之中，这天才般的想法，是迷路迷境何等的恩赐迷！
en: Locking a dish's aroma inside grains, what a genius idea! Truly a gift from the Membrance Maze, mem!

ch: 想象一下，以{RUBY_B#刻法勒的食材}奥赫玛麦{RUBY_E#}作为基底做粥，加入十一位泰坦的对应食材，那道菜该有多么出色啊！
en: Just imagine, using {RUBY_B#Kephalean ingredients}Okheman oats{RUBY_E#} as a base for porridge, then adding in corresponding ingredients for each of the eleven other Titans — how amazing that would taste!

ch: 诺杜斯先生…您说得对。能听到这些争论，或许是我们来到奥赫玛后最大的收获。
en: Mr. Noldus... You're right. Hearing such discourse is perhaps the greatest boon I've received since we came to Okhema.

ch: 没想到在奥赫玛也能享受到这样的手艺…
en: Who knew I'd be able to enjoy such a soothing massage in Okhema...

ch: 真的假的？我家乡的城邦，满打满算也只有一千年的历史…奥赫玛的历史原来这么悠久啊。
en: Really? With all things considered, the city back in my hometown has only roughly a thousand years of history... Okhema has such a long-standing history.

ch: 「在光历的第三个一百年中，人们在刻法勒脚下建立起聚落，由此诞生了奥赫玛的前身。」
en: "In the third century of the Light Calendar, people built settlements at the feet of Kephale. Thus was the precursor of Okhema founded."

ch: 别多想了，我们好歹在奥赫玛，但愿刻法勒能一直保佑我们……
en: There's no need to stress yourself out. After all, we're in Okhema. May Kephale protect us...

ch: 别天真了，树庭这么多学者，吃饭不用钱？研究学问不用钱？没钱怎么做学问？你好歹也体谅下我吧，家里的生活费还是我出的呢。
en: Don't be naive. There are so many scholars in the Grove. Their food and studies all require funds. We won't last without money. I'm the one covering our living expenses. Have a heart!

ch: 你理解我？你一个小孩子家家能理解什么！我就不明白了，偌大一个奥赫玛竟然只有你一个司仪，这合理吗！
en: You understand how I'm feeling? What could a child possibly understand!? I don't get it. How can there be only one ceremonial officiant in a huge place like Okhema? It's just ridiculous!

ch: 因为想成为司仪的话，需要去树庭进修，并通过「敬拜学派」的特殊考核……
en: That is because in order to become a ceremonial officiant, you have to train in the Grove and pass a special examination put in place by the Venerationists...

ch: 不可能，我就是黄金裔！况且，自我决心踏上这条道路，我便无所畏惧，就像神话中真正的英雄一样。我一定会拯救奥赫玛的诸位……
en: No way. I am a Chrysos Heir! Plus, I have decided to take this path for myself. So, I have no fear! Just like those heroes in the myths! I will save everyone in Okhema...

ch: 你可闭嘴吧，众所周知，黎明机器将永远照亮奥赫玛！
en: Oh, do shut up. As far as we all know, the Dawn Device will forever illuminate Okhema!

ch: 奥赫玛的剧作家们会在这个节日上展示他们的新作品，而观众会评选最佳剧本和表演者。
en: The playwrights of Okhema will showcase their new works during this program, and the audience will decide the best script and performers.

ch: 这不就是「机械降神」吗？我对奥赫玛的观众水平表示怀疑。
en: Wait, isn't this a literal "deus ex machina"? This makes me skeptical about the tastes of Okhemans.

ch: 没想到在奥赫玛也能享受到这样的手艺…
en: Who knew I'd be able to enjoy such a soothing massage in Okhema...

ch: 但是不行！我的梦想从「成为树庭七贤人」，不断降级成了「成为教授」、「成为助教」、「成为学者」…现在已是「顺利毕业」了。
en: But that won't do! My dream has been constantly compromised from "becoming one of the Seven Sages of the Grove" to "becoming a professor," then "becoming a teaching assistant," then "becoming a scholar"... and now it's just "graduating successfully."

ch: 你为什么要回到神悟树庭？
en: Why did you go back to the Grove of Epiphany?

ch: 准确地说，我的毕业论文就在神悟树庭的水里。
en: To be precise, my thesis is in the waters of the Grove of Epiphany.

ch: 我既然不顾死活地回到了神悟树庭，我的精神状态肯定也异于常人！
en: If I'm crazy enough to come back to the Grove of Epiphany despite the risks, my mental state must fall outside what's considered normal!

ch: 不过！我不会开口的。我改变不了神悟树庭的现状，我改变不了翁法罗斯…我能改变的，只有我自己，让自己不要轻易依赖别人——
en: But I won't say a word! I can't change the state of the Grove of Epiphany and I can't change Amphoreus... What I can change is only myself, to stop relying on others so easily...

ch: 嗷呜…多亏丹恒大人将神悟树庭固定住，如今我们也重新有了立足之地。但仅仅有立足之地是不够的，我想出发，做点什么，就像荒笛大人那样……
en: Awoo... Thanks to Lord Dan Heng for stabilizing the Grove of Epiphany, we finally have a place to live again. But just having a foothold isn't enough. I want to set out and do something, just like Lord Terravox...

ch: 嗷呜～我还会在树庭待一段时间，如果你也有些迷茫，不如和我一起停下来。我记得不少荒笛大人的故事，我可以讲给你听～
en: Awoo~ I'll be staying in the Grove for a while. If you're feeling a bit lost too, why not take a breather here with me? I remember quite a few stories about Lord Terravox, and I'd love to share them with you~

ch: 嗷呜嗷呜～在出发之前，我暂时打算在树庭停留一段时间。我还记得不少荒笛大人的故事，你如果想听的话……
en: Awoo awoo~ Before setting off, I plan to stay at the Grove for a while. I still remember quite a few stories about Lord Terravox, if you'd like to hear them...

ch: 「翁法罗斯的所有故事，通常都可以看作是『掉入洞穴』之中，而那些故事的结尾要么是『逃离洞穴』，或是『死在洞穴』之中……」
en: "All Amphorean stories can typically be seen as 'falling into caves,' ending with either 'escaping from the cave' or 'dying in the cave'..."

ch: …我会和留在树庭的同伴们好好聊聊，我们将去往何方。
en: ...I'll have a good talk with my companions who stayed in the Grove about where we should go next.

ch: 无论「毁灭」如何影响整座树庭，它始终是「理性」火种的一道保险。
en: No matter how the Destruction affects the entire Grove, the Grove remains an insurance for the Coreflame of Reason.

ch: 你在星穹列车的窗外看到过相似的「8」，当忆者拨开迷雾，翁法罗斯以一道首尾循环的光带呈现在所有人视线里。故事以此为起点，终点又将通往何方呢？
en: You've seen a similar "8" outside the window of the Astral Express. When the Memokeeper parted the mist, Amphoreus revealed itself to everyone's eyes as a band of light that loops back on itself. As the story begins here, where will its end lead us?

ch: 向您问好，救世的英雄。感谢诸位为翁法罗斯重新谱写出希望的乐章，可惜此刻身侧并无水漫琴，否则正好能为利波小先生伴奏一曲。
en: Greetings, heroes of deliverance. Thank you all for composing a new symphony of hope for Amphoreus. It's a pity I don't have a water lyre with me right now, or I could have accompanied little Master Lipos with a tune.

ch: 就照着这个做，我们能改变翁法罗斯航空界，价钱好商量！
en: Just follow this plan, and we can revolutionize the Amphorean aviation industry! Price negotiable!

ch: 咳，简单来说，就是开一家主题餐厅，另外再定期搞点活动什么的宣传宣传。目前考虑的风格有：奥赫玛、悬锋城、雅努萨波利斯、斯缇科西亚、神悟树庭……
en: *ahem* Long story short, I'm thinking of opening a themed restaurant and promoting it with some regular events. The styles we're considering include Okhema, Castrum Kremnos, Janusopolis, Styxia, Grove of Epiphany...

ch: 神悟树庭主题能好吃吗？
en: How can the Grove of Epiphany theme be tasty?

ch: 哪儿那么简单！你们又不是不知道，就她俩那闯祸的能力，当初在树庭求学的时候可没少挨通报……
en: If only it were that simple! You know those two all too well. With their talent for causing trouble, they got called out plenty of times back at the Grove during their studies...

ch: 嗯，听说克瑞斯开了家主题餐厅，能同时吃到奥赫玛和悬锋城的特色菜……
en: Hmm, I heard Kyros opened a themed restaurant where you can try specialties from both Okhema and Castrum Kremnos...

ch: 我从旁人那听说了些悬锋城外的美食，可真是琳琅满目，馋得我口水都快流出来了。
en: I've heard about all the amazing food outside Castrum Kremnos from others. There's such a mouthwatering variety. I'm practically drooling just thinking about it!

ch: 这…爸爸妈妈从小就这样说：悬锋的孩子是与利刃一同降生的，注定要手执利刃，也注定要死在利刃之下。
en: This... My parents always said: Children of Kremnos are born with honed blades, destined to wield the blade, and die by it.

ch: 来，都可以来…嚯！这不是拯救翁法罗斯的大英雄吗？真是百闻不如一见。
en: Sure, everyone's welcome... Wait, aren't you the great hero who saved Amphoreus! The stories don't do you justice at all!

ch: 好久不见，{NICKNAME}。我来介绍一下：这两位是费贝尔老爹的女儿；这是德墨忒尔婶婶家的波瑟芬妮；还有这位，来自悬锋城的天谴猎手小姐。
en: It's been a while, {NICKNAME}. Allow me to make introductions. These lovely ladies are Old Fabio's daughters. This is Possephone from Aunt Demetria's family. And this distinguished warrior is the Furiae Archer from Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 感谢你所做的一切，翁法罗斯的大英雄，向你致敬。
en: Thank you, great hero of Amphoreus, for everything you've done.

ch: 啊，是你！又见面了——几位，这是{NICKNAME}，在树庭遭难后帮我调查的那位好心人，也是拯救翁法罗斯的大英雄！
en: Ah, it's you! We meet again. Everyone, this is {NICKNAME}, the kind soul who helped me investigate after the disaster at the Grove, and the great hero who saved Amphoreus!

ch: 这是有区别的，你要是不信，我这里还有树庭买到的「大地兽语翻译器」，我们问问！
en: There's definitely a difference! If you don't believe me, I've got this "dromas translator" I bought from the Grove. Let's ask!

ch: 黑黄配比七三，门扉时和离愁时各一次，另寻悬锋土。同意？
en: Mix black and yellow at a ratio of 7:3. Use it once during the Entry Hour and once during the Parting Hour. Then find some Kremnos soil. Agreed?

ch: 我还记得你第一次浑身是伤地出现在奥赫玛门口的时候，背上还背了两个伤员，当时可把我们吓坏了。
en: I still remember when you showed up at Okhema's gate for the first time, all banged up with two injured people on your back. Scared the life out of us back then.

ch: 也没什么不妥吧？奥赫玛城就是在几百光历年里无数次修缮翻新，才维持至今的。
en: What's wrong with that? Okhema has only survived to this day through countless renovations and repairs over hundreds of Light Calendar years.

ch: 哟！来，跟我一起！健身！锻体！赞美悬锋军！
en: Yo! Come on, work out with me! Let's get fit! All hail the Kremnos Army!

ch: 我知道，每只妖精对未知都有一探究竟的好奇心，但无论如何，不许踏入那片幽邃的森林，是迷路迷境永恒的禁令哪！
en: I know every fairy has a burning curiosity about the unknown, but entering that deep Forest is strictly forbidden. It's a permanent ban in Membrance Maze!

ch: 呜嗡！（上次我把一个树庭学生的作业石板吃掉了！）
en: Grumph! (Last time I ate a Grove student's homework slate!)

ch: 呜嗡。（偷偷告诉{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，我之前偷溜去悬锋城，交到了一个朋友——它叫黄金狮首。）
en: Grumph. (Psst, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}, I'll tell you a secret. I sneaked out to Castrum Kremnos earlier and made a new friend! It's called Chryseus Leo.)

ch: 你赢了。许多年以后，人们还记得翁法罗斯的第<unbreak>33550338</unbreak>次永劫回归，和一群酝酿出了「毁灭」欲的小海豹。
en: You win. Years later, people will still remember the <unbreak>33,550,338</unbreak>th Eternal Recurrence of Amphoreus, and those baby seals who birthed the desire for "Destruction."

ch: o((•'ω´• )っ「有的嗷有的嗷！沉甸甸的金海豹杯，离开翁法罗斯的时候，不要忘了把它带上。」)∋
en: o((•'ω´• )っ "Yes, yes, of course! Don't forget to take this coveted Gold Seal Cup with you when you leave Amphoreus!" )∋

ch: 跟我说说，你信不过哪个泰坦？还是说你瞧不起拯救翁法罗斯的大英雄？
en: Now, which Titan's power do you doubt? Or perhaps you question the integrity of the great hero who saved Amphoreus?

ch: 相声社翁法罗斯分社？
en: Is this a duo comedy act, Amphoreus chapter?

ch: 还没和你正式地说一声「好久不见」，万敌。
en: Haven't had the chance to properly say "long time no see," Mydei.

ch: 瞧，我还带了老妈做的蜂蜜烙饼和葡萄馅饼，滋味不输给悬锋城的羊奶石榴汁。
en: Look, I even brought honey suncakes and grape pies made by my mom. They're just as tasty as the pomegranate goat milk from Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 下回也带我去拜访拜访悬锋的先王和王后，让他们品尝一下哀丽秘榭的特产吧。
en: Next time, why not take me to visit the former King and Queen of Kremnos and let them have a taste of Aedes Elysiae's specialties?

ch: 记得有人童年还想去悬锋学武？
en: Didn't someone want to practice martial arts in Kremnos when he was a kid?

ch: 嗯，万敌，抱歉，我想正式和你说一声……
en: Um, Mydei, sorry, I want to formally tell you something...

ch: 好搭档，如果去万敌的图书馆，你最想看什么类型的藏书？
en: Hey partner, if you could visit Mydei's library, what kind of books would you most want to check out?

ch: 说不定还有一些失传的悬锋古语？悄悄多学几句，下次就知道怎么应对他了。
en: Maybe there are some lost Kremnos sayings? If I secretly learn a few more, I'd know how to deal with him next time.

ch: 如果是白厄，想必会在鉴宝手册那里流连忘返。顺便，我还需要送他一本《如何读懂悬锋城的空气》。
en: If it's Phainon, he'd probably get lost in the appraisal manual. By the way, I should also get him a copy of How to Read the Air in Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 当你在那遥远的星间，踱行于自己的道路上时，若偶感沮丧，便向翁法罗斯的方向举杯吧。随时随刻——
en: When you're wandering among those distant stars, treading your own path, should you ever feel down, raise a glass toward Amphoreus. Anytime—

ch: 迈德漠斯，加冕为王！
en: Mydeimos, become king!

ch: 看字迹，既不像阿格莱雅女士，也不像缇宝老师。唔，如果是蝶宝和万敌阁下的话，也不应该呀！他们和凯撒大人几乎从没正式见过面。
en: Judging by the handwriting, it's not Lady Aglaea or Lady Tribbie. Hmm, and it shouldn't be Cassie or Mydei! They've never formally met the Great Imperator.

ch: 希望你铭记的东西…呀，看你期盼的表情，是想要翁法罗斯纪念品，对吧？
en: Something to remember...? Oh, judging by your eager expression, you want an Amphoreus souvenir, right?

ch: 听说心有灵犀的人，哪怕各自旅行，也会走到同一个终点。也许这就是我们在哀丽秘榭重逢的原因吧。
en: They say kindred spirits, even when traveling different separately, will eventually arrive at the same destination. Perhaps that's why we reunited here in Aedes Elysiae.

ch: 翁法罗斯的故事虽然暂时封笔了，但你的故事还很漫长。如果在某一页你踟蹰不前，一定要记得向前看哦。
en: Though the story of Amphoreus has reached its final page for now, your own story still has many chapters ahead. If you ever find yourself stuck on a page, remember to keep looking forward.

ch: 我们曾在哀丽秘榭共度过一段恬静美好的时光。那时候我问过你，以后回想起来，会怎么想象当时的我？
en: We shared some peaceful, beautiful moments together at Aedes Elysiae. Back then, I asked you, when you look back on these times, how will you picture me?

ch: 接下来，我会基于你的记忆，将那段岁月唤回哀丽秘榭，作为最后的相片陪伴你。
en: Next, based on your memories, I will recall those days to Aedes Elysiae, as the final photograph to accompany you.

ch: 好宁静的麦田…哀丽秘榭的时光，再也不会被打扰啦。
en: Such a peaceful wheat field... The tranquil moments of Aedes Elysiae will never be disturbed again.

ch: 每次那刻夏老师和阿格莱雅站在一起，就意味着奥赫玛要被闹得天翻地覆，哪怕是现在，我也不敢精神放松啊……
en: Every time Professor Anaxa and Aglaea stand together, it means Okhema is about to be turned upside down. Even now, I can't let my guard down...

ch: 呵！既然如此，别忘了我们身边就有一位——{NICKNAME}，听说你正打算把翁法罗斯的故事带到天外……
en: Hah! Speaking of which, we have someone right here. {NICKNAME}, I heard you're planning to take the story of Amphoreus beyond the sky...

ch: 无疑，奥赫玛的领袖需要能够纵览万物的金丝；而一位普通的织者，却只需要一双明媚的眼眸。
en: Without doubt, the leader of Okhema must command golden threads that can see all things, while an ordinary weaver only needs a pair of bright eyes.

ch: 奥赫玛可少不了你。
en: Okhema can't do without you.

ch: 万敌阁下，你…怎么也来了？
en: Lord Mydei, what... what brings you here?

ch: 是的，但我还不知道，万敌阁下居然也要参加。难道说，你也准备好了手工制品？
en: Yes, but I had no idea that Lord Mydei would be participating too. Don't tell me you've also prepared some handicrafts?

ch: 厨、厨神争霸赛？这里不是翁法罗斯第一届手工制品交流会现场吗？
en: A—A Culinary Showdown? Isn't this supposed to be the 1st Amphoreus Handicraft Convention?

ch: 但现在，我已不再身负「死亡」，这双手恐怕也无法赢过万敌阁下了。
en: But now, I no longer bear the authority of Death. These hands of mine probably can't defeat Lord Mydei anymore.

ch: 那万敌带来的食材？
en: What about the ingredients Mydei brought?

ch: 太好了，就要万师傅炒。
en: Perfect, let's have Master Mydei do the cooking.

ch: 万敌阁下…真的有那么夸张吗？
en: Lord Mydei... is it really going to be that dramatic?

ch: 哈哈，悬锋城流传过一句古语：猫要么在睡觉，要么在捣乱。我猜，阿格莱雅会更先按捺不住，要给她找点营生干一干了。
en: Haha, there's an old saying in Castrum Kremnos: cats are either sleeping or causing trouble. I bet Aglaea will be the first to get restless and find the cat something to do.

ch: 当你在那遥远的星间，踱行于自己的道路上时，若偶感沮丧，便向翁法罗斯的方向举杯吧。随时随刻——
en: When you're wandering among those distant stars, treading your own path, should you ever feel down, raise a glass toward Amphoreus. Anytime—

ch: 迈德漠斯，黄金厨神之王！
en: Mydeimos, the Chrysos God-King of Chefs!

ch: 翁法罗斯的万物生灵现如今都有了自己的归宿，我也终于能够放下重担，安心地享受美食时刻了。
en: All living beings in Amphoreus have found their place now, and I can finally put down my burdens and enjoy my meal in peace.

ch: 翁法罗斯的持明卵？
en: An Amphorean Vidyadhara egg?

ch: 倘若有一天它能孵化，从中诞生的新生命，或许是翁法罗斯第一个真正步入银河的生命吧？
en: If it hatches one day, perhaps the new life born from within will be the first Amphorean life to truly step into the cosmos?

ch: 来自圣城奥赫玛的。
en: The ones from the holy city Okhema.

ch: （《粉霞天女历险记》？难道…我还在翁法罗斯？）
en: (Adventures of the Rosy Celestial Maiden? Could it be... am I still in Amphoreus?)

ch: 这块石板只是个模型，里面没写一个字。不过，咱照着翁法罗斯的风格印了个封面，看着是不是有模有样？
en: This tablet's just a prop. There's not a single word written inside. But hey, I copied the Amphorean style for the cover. Looks pretty legit, don't you think?

ch: 现在想想，还是有点遗憾，要是能从翁法罗斯多带点纪念品出来就好了。
en: Come to think of it, it's kind of a bummer. I wish I could've grabbed more souvenirs from Amphoreus.

ch: 翁法罗斯的七月名为自由月。它既是属于刻法勒的月份，亦是每名囚徒心底最渴望、却无法触及的东西。
en: July in Amphoreus is called the Month of Freedom. It belongs to Kephale and represents what every prisoner yearns for deep in their hearts, yet can never grasp.

ch: 除去都是参赛选手外，这两个受害人还有一个共同的特征——他们都是看了罗浮杂俎上的流言，跑到绥园附近瞎逛的傻瓜。
en: Besides the fact that they were participants, they also had a similar characteristic — they're both fools who went to Fyxestroll Garden to poke around after reading the messages on the Luofu's Ghostly Grove.

ch: 您是…悬锋城最德高望重的大学者！
en: You are... the most prestigious scholar in Castrum Kremnos!

ch: 我愿为你拭去心中的迷雾——请重拾你的神格，回归往昔的荣耀；从此黑潮便不再可畏，明日将照耀翁法罗斯的大地。
en: I am willing to disperse the fog in your heart. Please reclaim your divinity and return to the path of glory. The black tide will not be feared henceforth, and tomorrow will shine upon the great land of Amphoreus.

ch: 勇者不与弱者共舞，悬锋之伟大由鲜血浇灌。
en: The valiant does not consort with the weak. The majesty of Kremnos is nurtured by fresh blood.

ch: 喂喂，前面那些穿着铠甲的…是奥赫玛的援兵吧！喂——我们在这里啊！！！
en: Hey look, those armored figures up ahead... They're Okheman reinforcements, aren't they! Heyyyy! We're over here!!!

ch: 等下…那是…新型号的悬锋战士？！
en: Wait... They're... the new Kremnos Warrior models!?

ch: 呀，灰宝，你来了！快看，这些小家伙好可爱，也很有精神，要是能带回庭院就好啦。
en: Hey, Grayie, you're here! Look, these little ones are so cute and energetic. Only if I can bring them back to the Grove.

ch: 差点忘了，灰宝没有在树庭学习过，缺少这方面的知识……
en: I almost forgot, you never studied at the Grove, Grayie, hence you lack knowledge in this area...

ch: 先说清楚，我可是黄金裔的贵客，奥赫玛是我的地盘，都放尊重点！
en: First things first, I am an esteemed guest of the Chrysos Heirs, and Okhema is my turf, so pay your respects!

ch: 并且，小奇美拉也很能干。最近奥赫玛不是遭到了袭击嘛，到处都乱糟糟的。多亏了这些小家伙帮大家工作，这才解决了人手不足的问题。该好好感谢它们才是呢。
en: And little chimeras are very capable. Okhema was under attack recently, so it's a mess everywhere. It's all thanks to these little ones that we managed to solve the labor issue. We should be grateful to them.

ch: 生命花园是奥赫玛重要的学术场所，当然不允许有人在这胡闹。快过去吧！
en: The Garden of Life is a key academic venue of Okhema. No nonsense is allowed here. Get over there quickly!

ch: …不对，我见过你，想想…哟，这不是伟大的黄金裔嘛？对，你们是奥赫玛的领导者，高所有人一等，当然有资格教我做事。
en: ...Hang on, I've seen you before. Wait... Oh, if it isn't a great Chrysos Heir? Ah yes, leaders of Okhema, and an echelon higher than the rest — of course you are qualified to tell me how to do my job.

ch: 妙！太妙了！不愧是黄金裔，奥赫玛的大英雄！
en: Wonderful! Simply wonderful! That's a Chrysos Heir for you, Okhema's great heroes!

ch: 想扮英雄，又不愿意花钱？奥赫玛哪有这么好的事。
en: You want to play hero and not pay a dime? There's never a free lunch in Okhema.

ch: 这、这…我要去向花园投诉。你们滥用权势，欺压奥赫玛的公民！
en: Th—This... I'm lodging a complaint to the Garden. You're abusing your authority and oppressing the citizens of Okhema!

ch: 你来奥赫玛的时间不久，我就先做个说明吧。<color=#dbc291ff>这些奇美拉受生命花园的统一管理，分成若干个小队，会帮城里的居民做些简单的工作。</color>
en: You haven't been in Okhema long, so I'll just give you a brief explanation: <color=#dbc291ff>These chimeras are managed by the Garden of Life, and divided into smaller squads that help out this city's residents with simple tasks.</color>

ch: 就算是累趴下的奇美拉，只要想到奥赫玛的繁荣，也会不由自主地高昂起头！
en: Even if we work ourselves to the bone, we will hold our heads up high when we think about Okhema's prosperity!

ch: 若是小队的成绩始终不达标，管理员不仅要支付一大笔罚金，还要…在公民大会上被通报批评——谁叫奇美拉是奥赫玛的代表物种呢？
en: If the squad still doesn't hit its targets, the administrator not only has to pay a hefty fine, they'll also be... issued a memo of criticism at the citizens' assembly. I mean, the chimera is Okhema's mascot, after all.

ch: 呀，通报批评…我在树庭求学的时候，都没有被那刻夏老师这么处罚过。对、对不起……
en: Ah, a memo of criticism... I was never punished so harshly by Professor Anaxa even when I was studying back at the Grove. S—Sorry...

ch: 灰宝！公民大会很恐怖的，要是惹他们不开心的话，甚至会被驱逐出奥赫玛的哦。
en: Grayie! The citizens' assembly is terrifying! If you upset them, you might even be driven out of Okhema.

ch: 你和风堇带着小奇美拉在奥赫玛吃吃逛逛，度过了段极为愉快的时间……
en: With the chimeras in tow, you and Hyacine stroll around Okhema, enjoying a wonderful time...

ch: 你和风堇带着小奇美拉在奥赫玛吃吃逛逛，度过了段极为愉快的时间……
en: With the chimeras in tow, you and Hyacine stroll around Okhema, enjoying a wonderful time...

ch: 应该不是。近期奥赫玛要处理的事情确实很多，只能辛苦小奇美拉了……
en: Probably not. There've been plenty of happenings that needed to be settled in Okhema, but that's just more effort on the chimeras' part...

ch: 可惜，现在的翁法罗斯没有给我们这个机会呢。
en: Alas, we don't have that chance in present-day Amphoreus.

ch: 我受阿格莱雅女士之托，前来奥赫玛为伤者提供治疗，原本想着很快便能返回，但……
en: I was besought by Lady Aglaea to come forth to Okhema to provide treatment for the wounded. I initially wanted to return post-haste, but...

ch: 学医救不了奥赫玛。
en: Medicine won't save Okhema.

ch: 是在感谢你们呢。小奇美拉为奥赫玛的居民帮了大忙，我也想…嗯，尽自己的一份力。
en: I'm simply grateful to you all. The chimeras have helped Okhema's citizens so much, so I too, wanted to... yes, to do my part.

ch: 你所有的努力，都是在为奥赫玛的居民服务呀。
en: All your efforts are in service of Okhema's citizens.

ch: 我同意大家的看法，奇美拉是种相当聪明的生物，很认真，也很有热情，愿意为奥赫玛的居民们解决麻烦。能取得如此成绩，都是它们的功劳。
en: I agree with everyone that chimeras are smart creatures — dedicated, passionate, and willing to solve troubles for Okhema's people. It is all thanks to their efforts that we've achieved such success.

ch: 果然，即使有差分宇宙的支持，靠这点忆质的残渣就想构建翁法罗斯的模型，还是太勉强了。
en: As expected, even with the support of the Divergent Universe, trying to construct a model of Amphoreus from these mere scraps of memoria is still a bit of a stretch.

ch: 此时此刻，翁法罗斯内。
en: Currently, in Amphoreus...

ch: 你恍然回过神来，这里是「神悟树庭」。即使并非初次来访，你还是被眼前的光景所震慑。
en: You snap back to reality — this is the Grove of Epiphany. Even though it's not your first time here, the scenery before you still manages to leave you speechless in awe.

ch: 来吧，我将给予你树庭中最伟大的宝藏。
en: Come. I shall bestow upon you the greatest treasure of the Grove.

ch: 借由{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的根系和{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}的金丝，这些智慧得以向外延伸，覆盖树庭的各个角落，交错成承载知识的网络。
en: Through {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces'{RUBY_E#} roots and {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia's{RUBY_E#} golden threads, this wisdom has been able to extend outward, enveloping every corner of the Grove, interwoven into a network that bears knowledge.

ch: 这里收集了翁法罗斯古往今来的神话和历史，从众神和英雄身上，我们得以学会「什么是美德」。
en: Gathered here are Amphoreus' collective myths and histories throughout its entire existence. We learn what virtue is from gods to heroes.

ch: 原来是树庭神域。
en: So this is the Grove Art Online.

ch: 既然树庭选择以这种方式将知识传授给你，那就一定有它的道理。
en: Since the Grove elects to impart knowledge to you through such a method, it must have its reasons.

ch: 赛飞儿回奥赫玛了…
en: Cipher has returned to Okhema...

ch: （奥赫玛一直是白昼，都快忘了现在是休息时间了。还是睡吧…）
en: (With Okhema being in daylight forever, I almost forgot it's now resting time. I should sleep...)

ch: 咳咳…大概这就是奥赫玛运动精神吧！简称，奥运精神。
en: *cough* This must be what they call the Okheman athletic spirit! Some also call it the Okhemic spirit.

ch: 淘汰赛第一轮，{NICKNAME}选手将对战悬锋城的「十敌」选手。
en: Opening the Elimination Rounds, {NICKNAME} will challenge Yourdei from Castrum Kremnos.

ch: …哼！现在我的实力只有吾王「万敌」的十分之一，所以我叫「十敌」。
en: Hmph! For His Majesty Mydei, every day is his day. But I am but a pale shadow of his strength, and I must seize the day — hence the name Yourdei.

ch: 不要再增加悬锋城刻板印象了。
en: Please don't reinforce the stereotypes about Castrum Kremnos.

ch: 悬锋城自古以石榴汁代血。请「十敌」阁下先喝下鲜血蜜酿，为您壮行！
en: According to the customs of Castrum Kremnos, pomegranate juice represents blood. Lord Yourdei, take this sanguine honey brew for courage!

ch: 缇宝最爱笑，总是给奥赫玛城的大家，拭去眼泪，带来温暖的希望。
en: Tribbie's the cheerful one, always there to dry tears and bring hope to everyone in Okhema.

ch: 这么认真，小海豹也没在树庭上过学呀！
en: You're taking this way too seriously. Baby seals don't study at the Grove!

ch: 我是乡下来奥赫玛的土「豹」，听不懂你这些流行词。
en: I'm a humble "seal" from the Okheman countryside. I don't understand your trendy terms.

ch: 与此同时，在奥赫玛某处……
en: At the same time, somewhere in Okhema...

ch: 换句话说，到奥赫玛之后没怎么做梦？
en: So, you haven't had any dreams since arriving in Okhema?

ch: 举个例子，奥赫玛历史上曾有位联军统帅做过一个梦：梦见一只雄鹰飞来，抓起了母鹿和它的幼崽，最后这只雄鹰却被乌鸦攻击，并被啄死。
en: For example, in Okhema's history, there was a general of the alliance who once had a dream: In the dream, an eagle swooped down, and caught a doe and her fawn, but was attacked and pecked to death by crows in the end.

ch: 我以奥赫玛「金织」的名义，托大工匠哈托努斯打造了一樽<color=#dbc291ff>「金海豹杯」</color>，作为比赛胜者的奖赏——
en: By the name of the "Goldweaver" of Okhema, I've commissioned the Grand Craftsman Chartonus to create a <color=#dbc291ff>"Gold Seal Cup"</color> to be awarded to the winner of the competition —

ch: 尽管远方的黑潮尚在威胁，但我们也希望奥赫玛的公民们，能借着比赛，畅快地宣泄心中压抑已久的情绪。
en: Even though the threat of black tide still looms, we hope that the citizens of Okhema can use this competition to release the pent-up emotions they've been holding in for so long.

ch: 作为黄金裔的贵客，我也希望你能尽情借此深入领略一番奥赫玛的风情。
en: As the esteemed guest of the Chrysos Heirs, I hope you can immerse yourself into the culture of Okhema with this experience.

ch: 看看你的周围吧。一夜之间，奥赫玛的人类水平下降了一万倍——
en: Look around. In one night, the humans in Okhema have decreased their capacities by ten thousandfold—

ch: 翁法罗斯的危机从来不止于一种。
en: The crisis of Amphoreus is never just one thing.

ch: 翁法罗斯可没有那么严谨的进化论。
en: Amphoreus doesn't care about such strict theories of evolution.

ch: 在翁法罗斯的历史里，也有过太多无论预言真假，都可能造成「真实的冲突」的事情。
en: In Amphoreus's history, there were plenty of things that could cause "real conflicts," regardless if the prophecies were true or not.

ch: 各位，我有一个翁法罗斯梦！
en: Everyone, I have a vision of Amphoreus!

ch: 不过，*我们*无法预料，奥赫玛的公民当中会不会有人顺应预言去行动。而且目前听到的内容，恐怕还并非预言的全貌。
en: However, we cannot foresee whether any Okhema citizens might act on these prophecies. Besides, what we've heard may only be part of the whole prophecy.

ch: 我从未指望过金线能防住翁法罗斯最狡猾的贼——赛飞儿。
en: I never expected the golden thread could stop Amphoreus's most cunning thief — Cipher.

ch: …那叫「罗浮杂俎」！行不行啊你。
en: Ugh, it's Ghostly Grove, not Ghastly Gravy!

ch: 「罗浮杂俎」是罗浮仙舟上规模最大的灵异爱好者网站，所有喜欢怪力乱神的罗浮人都知道它。
en: Ghostly Grove is the most renowned website for paranormal enthusiasts on the Luofu. Everyone who loves the mysterious and the unexplained knows about it.

ch: 你们向白露解释了「罗浮杂俎」的事。
en: You tell Bailu about the website Ghostly Grove

ch: 不知道网友们会作何反应，你们明白，再过段时间「罗浮杂俎」就会热闹起来。
en: I'm not sure how the online community will react, but you can bet the Ghostly Grove will be the talk of the town sooner or later.

ch: 我也在浏览「罗浮杂俎」上的种种奇闻轶事，有趣的很。
en: I've been browsing through some of the stories on Ghostly Grove myself — they make for good reading.

ch: 藿藿刷了几个时辰的「罗浮杂俎」，每逮着一个可疑事件就问咱们「你说这是不是尾巴干的？」
en: Huohuo has been browsing Ghostly Grove for hours. Every time she finds a suspicious incident, she says: "Do you think Tail did this?"

ch: 关于此事，诸位打算如何在「罗浮杂俎」上发布？毕竟事涉神策府…希望各位能……
en: With respect to this incident, what is your plan for posting on the Luofu's Ghostly Grove? Since it concerns the Seat of Divine Foresight, I am hoping you could...

ch: 总之，浮烟的事情交给我，至于「罗浮杂俎」的事情…按照老规矩，你们得编一套新的说辞了，这些事情就交给你们了。
en: Well then, I will take care of the Cirrus situation. As for what gets written in the Luofu's Ghostly Grove, I'll leave that up to you.

ch: 对了对了，帮我参谋一下这次该在「罗浮杂俎」上发什么吧！这可是大新闻，全靠这期内容涨粉了。
en: Now, let's think about what to publish on Ghostly Grove! This is huge news — this post will definitely boost our following.

ch: 就、就让小桂子保留着吧，我睡觉前不看一会「罗浮杂俎」，会睡不着……
en: Madam Hanya, p—please, let Little Gui carry on uploading... I can't fall asleep without browsing Ghostly Grove before bed...

ch: 老师可知道「罗浮杂俎」？我看见有人说这里出了怪事，便来这里看看。
en: Do you know about "Ghostly Grove"? I heard from someone on the site that there were strange things happening here, so I came to see.

ch: 怎么样，棋鬼的事到底是怎么回事呀，要不要在「罗浮杂俎」上更新一下？
en: So, what was the real deal with the Chess Ghost? Do you want to post an update on the "Ghostly Grove"?

ch: 记得桂乃芬要我们帮忙发布「罗浮杂俎」吗，就拜托你了……
en: Remember Guinaifen asked us to post up to the Ghostly Grove? Could you please do that...

ch: 总之事情算是告一段落，我们在「罗浮杂俎」上发一下吧。
en: Anyway, the whole thing's over and done with now. Let's post up to the Ghostly Grove, okay?

ch: 啊，竟然还是你们几位，真是够辛苦的。不过，去「罗浮杂俎」上发帖求助果然有效。
en: Ah, it's you! You really do work hard. I see posting on the "Ghostly Grove" page really gets things done, though!

ch: 别忘了，我们还得将这件事影响减至最小，要在「罗浮杂俎」发布新的帖子。
en: Don't forget, we have to minimize the impact of this incident, it would be best to put a new post on "Ghostly Grove."

ch: 于是乎，你在「罗浮杂俎」上找到了我们，希望十王司能驱散鬼魅。
en: So, you contacted us on Ghostly Grove, hoping that the Ten-Lords Commission could help drive away these ghosts for you.

ch: …不过，这不妨碍我们更新一下「罗浮杂俎」。
en: ...Although, that doesn't stop us from posting an update on Ghostly Grove.

ch: 你看，我早就给裳裳你说过了，这「罗浮杂俎」上真真假假什么都有，大家想要的不是真相，而是一段愉快的怪谈体验。
en: Look, I told you before, that there are all sorts of stories on Ghostly Grove, some true, some not. What people are searching for here is not the truth, but a fun ghost story.

ch: …虽然凶宅是假的，这不妨碍我们更新一下「罗浮杂俎」。
en: ...Even though the haunted house isn't true, that doesn't stop us from posting an update on Ghostly Grove.

ch: 是这样的，最近我收到了一个包裹，打开一看，里面是罗浮杂俎网站寄来的「订阅奖励银牌纪念」。
en: Basically, I got a parcel recently. And when I opened it, there was a Silver Subscription Commemorative Medallion from the Ghostly Grove website.

ch: 没啦！你也知道，罗浮杂俎不过是个灵异见闻类主题的小网站。发过来的银牌也不是真的用银子打的呢。
en: Nope! As you know, the Ghostly Grove is a small paranormal-themed website. The silver medallions dished out aren't even made out of real silver.

ch: 所以我想来想去——我决定，在罗浮杂俎的个人账号上录个视频，发表下获奖感言。还有就是…收集下粉丝的提问，做个答疑环节，算是对粉丝们的回馈！
en: So after racking my brains — I've decided to upload a video to my personal account on the Ghostly Grove as an acceptance speech. And also... do an ask-me-anything segment with fans so I can give a little something back!

ch: 那时的奥赫玛是真正的「永恒之城」。比起一座城市，它更接近一位母亲。站在山崖上向外眺望，视野所及之处全是我们的领土！
en: Okhema was a true "Eternal City" back then. People did not think of it as their city, but rather a motherly figure. When one stood on top of the hill and looked outward, everything we could see was our territory!

ch: 在达米亚诺斯的带领下，你来到了奥赫玛外的附属城邦，在地下的一扇门前停住了脚步……
en: With Damionis' guidance, you have come to a vassal city outside of Okhema and stopped before an underground door...

ch: 这里看起来和奥赫玛很像。
en: This place looks so similar to Okhema.

ch: 奥赫玛祖上还挺阔？
en: Okhema's ancestors must have been quite wealthy?

ch: 那是当然！早在黄金战争时期，奥赫玛就是当之无愧的「永恒之城」了。
en: Of course! Even as far back as the Chrysos War period, Okhema has always been the undisputed "Eternal City."

ch: 据说，很久很久以前，奥赫玛城门口有八座山。
en: Once upon a time, so the story goes, eight mighty mountains blocked the entrance to Okhema.

ch: 我听遐蝶说了，你初抵奥赫玛时曾与大地兽游戏甚欢。被大地兽所喜爱的都不是坏人。
en: Castorice mentioned you had a great time with the dromases when you first got to Okhema. Anyone the dromases like is a good person in my book.

ch: 我是神悟树庭的教授，风堇女士的同僚，希望这能解答你的疑惑，小家伙。
en: I am a professor at the Grove of Epiphany and a colleague of Lady Hyacine. I hope this answers your question, little one.

ch: 呜呜呜？（神悟树庭？是做什么的地方？）
en: Grumph? (Grove of Epiphany? What's that place?)

ch: 贵客还记得当初，和白厄阁下等人初访奥赫玛时所乘的大地兽吗？它们就是旅团的成员。
en: Dear guest, do you remember the dromas you rode with Lord Phainon and the others when you first visited Okhema? They are members of our troupe.

ch: 多年后，奥赫玛城中出现了一只无比成功的大地兽。
en: Years later, an incredibly successful dromas appears in the city of Okhema.

ch: 一段时间后，风堇带你们转移到了奥赫玛的昏光庭院，并进行了简单的检查
en: Shortly after, Hyacine takes you to the Twilight Courtyard for a quick medical examination.

ch: ——不用浪费时间了，助教，现在树庭中的记叙都是谬论！
en: Don't waste your time, Hyacine. Everything in the Grove's records is misleading!

ch: 云石天宫，翁法罗斯的清汤锅底。形形色色的人们来到这里，希望能让水流冲走自己的烦恼，就像焯水。
en: Marmoreal Palace is Amphoreus's melting pot. All manner of people come here, hoping that the waters will wash away their worries, just as meat is stripped of its scent by boiling soup.

ch: 多年后，奥赫玛城中出现了一只无比成功的大地兽。
en: Years later, an incredibly successful dromas appears in the city of Okhema.

ch: 从那时起，崇拜大地兽的教团便在奥赫玛城各个角落悄然建立。而一头大地兽究竟为何拥有此等力量，学者们议论纷纷……
en: Since then, cults devoted to dromases quietly sprang up across every corner of Okhema city. As for why such a creature wielded power so great, scholars still argue to this day...

ch: 来到奥赫玛后，我结下了许多的缘分。而与驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大的相遇，则是我最珍贵的宝物。
en: Since coming to Okhema, I've formed many precious bonds. But meeting Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas has been my most treasured gift of all.

ch: 呜嗡——（有大地兽问我，你怎么连这个都懂？我只好说，我{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}在奥赫玛教过我。）
en: Grumph— (A dromas asked me how I knew about this. I could only say that my {F#Mama}{M#Papa} taught me at Okhema.)

ch: 多年后，一只比山还高的大地兽出现在了奥赫玛。它的阴影遮蔽了黎明机器，脚步让整座圣城都为之震颤。
en: Years later, a dromas taller than a mountain appeared in Okhema. Its shadow loomed over the Dawn Device, and its footsteps made the entire holy city tremble.

ch: 澎湃的大地之力在它体内奔涌。它走过奥赫玛城外的农田，之后三千个光历年里，那里的粮食亩产达到了一千八……
en: The surging power of Earth coursed through its body. After it passed through the farmlands outside Okhema, the crop yield there reached <unbreak>24,100</unbreak> pounds per acre for the next three thousand Light Calendar years...

ch: 哎，最近奥赫玛出现了一大批采用最新仿造技术制成的假古董，不光是辨别能力较弱的老人，甚至连一些专业爱好者也难以分清。
en: Recently, Okhema has seen a surge of fakes made with the latest imitation techniques, not just fooling the elderly with weak discernment but even some enthusiasts.

ch: 如你所见，由于近期持续动乱，奥赫玛内假货猖獗，每天都有鉴定不完的假宝贝。
en: As you can see, due to the recent unrest, Okhema is rampant with forgeries, leaving us with an endless stream of fakes to appraise every day.

ch: 嗯，我还可以顺带给你介绍下这些宝贝背后的翁法罗斯史，可谓是一举三得。光说话也没意思，先来看看我手头还有些什么吧。
en: I can also give you a quick rundown of the history behind these treasures, three birds with one stone. But enough chatting, let's take a look at what else I've got here.

ch: 奇兽一直是翁法罗斯器皿上的常见主题。许多远古的物种都消失了，我们唯有透过前人的勾勒去想象它们的模样——
en: Magical beasts have always been a common theme on Amphoreus vessels. Many ancient species have vanished, and all we can do is imagine their forms through the sketches of our ancestors —

ch: 把它当个故事听吧，你只要记得这块火腿不符合奥赫玛食品卫生标准就好。
en: Consider it merely a tall tale, and keep in mind that this ham falls short of Okhema's food safety regulations.

ch: 有人说，这瓶口的形状像悬锋战士的头盔，因此推断它最早来自悬锋城，边沿的那抹红色则来自尼卡多利的鲜血。
en: Some claim the bottle's neck resembles a Kremnos Warrior's helmet, hinting at its origins in Castrum Kremnos, with the red shade at its edge a trace of Nikador's blood.

ch: 奥赫玛的打假就靠你了，灭灭骗子们的气焰！
en: Okhema's battle against counterfeiters is in your hands! Show those fraudsters who's the boss!

ch: 呀，{NICKNAME}，见到你真高兴。快来看，要见识下哀丽秘榭的宝物吗？
en: Ah, {NICKNAME}, it's good to see you! Come take a look. Want to see the treasure of Aedes Elysiae?

ch: 该从哀丽秘榭出发了吧？
en: Shouldn't we head out of Aedes Elysiae already?

ch: 拯救「迷路迷境」的贵客，终于出现了哪！
en: The honored guest who will save the Membrance Maze... has finally come!

ch: 拯救「迷路迷境」的贵客，你终于出现了哪！
en: Honored guest who will save the Membrance Maze... you've finally arrived!

ch: 「咳咳，这是故事的登场人物之一，出生在哀丽秘榭的平凡少女，只是恰好和我同名，又一样纯真可爱。」
en: "Ahem... this is one of the characters in the story, an ordinary girl born in Aedes Elysiae. She just so happens to have the same name as me... and is every bit as pure and adorable."

ch: <color=#dbc291ff>特地前来迷路迷境，帮助妖精们重建荒废的餐馆。</color>
en: <color=#dbc291ff>For coming to Membrance Maze, to help the fairies rebuild our long-abandoned restaurant.</color>

ch: 求求了，英雄们！妖精们肚子瘪瘪的，就想毁灭世界！拜托了，请拯救迷路迷境！
en: Heroes, we're begging you! The fairies are starving... and when they're hungry, they just want to destroy the world! Please help us. Save the Membrance Maze!

ch: 哪有这么严重，顶多就是妖精们的怒火席卷七分之六个翁法罗斯。
en: It's not that serious... At most, their fury will burn through six-sevenths of Amphoreus.

ch: 就是这样。就当是为了翁法罗斯，我们一起复兴餐馆，满足妖精们的小小愿望吧。
en: So that's the situation. For the sake of Amphoreus, let's rebuild the restaurant together and grant the fairies their little wish.

ch: 迷路迷境的生态也太神奇了吧！
en: The ecology of Membrance Maze is just amazing!

ch: 哀丽秘榭社区食堂。
en: Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen.

ch: 记好了，餐馆的新名号就定为「开拓者之家 / 迷境大饭店 / 哀丽秘榭社区食堂 / 黄金裔活动中心 / 自定义名称2」。
en: Got it. From this moment on, the restaurant shall be known as "The Trailblazer's Hearth / Maze Grand Restaurant / Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen / Chrysos Heir Activity Center / Custom Name 2."

ch: 迷！我们郑重宣布——<color=#dbc291ff>「开拓者之家 / 迷境大饭店 / 哀丽秘榭社区食堂 / 黄金裔活动中心 / 自定义名称2」正式收录进迷其林美食名单中，是一星级餐馆了迷！</color>
en: Mem! We hereby announce — <color=#dbc291ff>"The Trailblazer's Hearth / Maze Grand Restaurant / Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen / Chrysos Heir Activity Center / Custom Name 2" is now officially listed in the Memchelin Gourmet Guide as a 1-star Restaurant, mem!</color>

ch: 只是他住的地方很远，过来哀丽秘榭得多花些时间。算算…今天该到了吧？
en: Yeah, but he lives pretty far from here. Coming all the way to Aedes Elysiae takes time. If I'm not wrong... he should be arriving today.

ch: 是万敌，餐馆有救了。
en: It's Mydei! The restaurant is saved!

ch: 迈德漠斯？没想到新厨师是你。
en: Mydeimos? Never thought you'd be the new chef.

ch: 万敌带着几个妖精忙碌了起来。不多时，厨房门口便架起了一口大锅。
en: Mydei and the fairies spring into action. Before long, a massive pot is set up right outside the kitchen door.

ch: 早听说悬锋城的基建速度极为惊人，还真是…百闻不如一见啊。
en: I've heard the construction in Castrum Kremnos is ridiculously fast, but seeing it in action... really puts things into perspective.

ch: 嗯，应该没问题。万敌会分担部分厨房工作，我可以空出来支援大堂。
en: I think I can manage. With Mydei sharing some of the kitchen duties, I'll have more time to help out front.

ch: 我，哀丽秘榭的白厄，实名反对这个提案。
en: I, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae, reject this proposal with full conviction.

ch: 我有个想法。既然是迷境里的餐馆，不如就以「哀丽秘榭」为主题怎么样？
en: I have a proposal. Since we're a restaurant in the Maze, how about a theme inspired by Aedes Elysiae itself?

ch: 提起哀丽秘榭，首先想到的便是麦田。活动期间，餐馆提供以小麦为原料的菜品，并用饱满的麦穗作为装饰，寓意丰收。
en: When I think of Aedes Elysiae, the golden wheat fields come to mind. During the event, we could serve wheat-based dishes and decorate the place with bundles of wheat, symbolizing a bountiful harvest.

ch: 但「哀丽秘榭」作为主题，对小妖精们而言会不会太难懂了呀。
en: But if the theme is "Aedes Elysiae," wouldn't that be a bit too difficult for the little fairies to understand?

ch: 近来，「开拓者之家 / 迷境大饭店 / 哀丽秘榭社区食堂 / 黄金裔活动中心 / 自定义名称2」在迷路迷境中的关注度急剧上升，他们以美味的菜品与温暖贴心的服务，赢得了妖精们的极高赞誉。
en: Lately, "The Trailblazer's Hearth / Maze Grand Restaurant / Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen / Chrysos Heir Activity Center / Custom Name 2" has been gaining tons of buzz in the Membrance Maze. With delicious food and warm, thoughtful service, they've won over the hearts of our fairy folk.

ch: 而我们的主厨，在揉制面团与最终烘焙时，也使用了悬锋城特有的技巧，能让烤饼的口感变得更为酥脆，同时令蜂蜜的香味得到最大程度的发挥。
en: And the head chef used a signature technique from Castrum Kremnos when kneading the dough and baking it, which makes the pancakes extra crisp and really brings out the full aroma of the honey.

ch: 迷！恭喜恭喜迷！「开拓者之家 / 迷境大饭店 / 哀丽秘榭社区食堂 / 黄金裔活动中心 / 自定义名称2」通过了本次美食评审，是二星级餐馆了迷！
en: Mem! Congratulations! "The Trailblazer's Hearth / Maze Grand Restaurant / Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen / Chrysos Heir Activity Center / Custom Name 2" has passed the culinary review! You're now officially a 2-star restaurant! Mem!

ch: 这就是你徒手作战的原因？还是说，悬锋城的菜谱里只有火烤一种方式？
en: Oh yeah? That's why you fight bare-handed? Or is grilling the only thing people in Castrum Kremnos know how to do?

ch: 噢？店长希望我和万敌认真切磋一番吗？好啊，我赞成这个提案。
en: Oh? You want me and Mydei to go head-to-head in the kitchen? Fine by me. I'm in.

ch: 迷！原来就是你，「开拓者之家 / 迷境大饭店 / 哀丽秘榭社区食堂 / 黄金裔活动中心 / 自定义名称2」的掌管者，黄金料理界的领军人物，迷称「开拓之主」的迷之店长……
en: Mem! So it's you, the one who runs The Trailblazer's Hearth / Maze Grand Restaurant / Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen / Chrysos Heir Activity Center / Custom Name 2, the legendary figure leading the world of golden gourmet cuisine! Mems call you the "Trailblazer of Flavor"... the mysterious owner behind it all!

ch: 迷。就告诉你吧，我们是迷路迷境中，令所有餐馆闻风丧胆的……
en: Mem! Alright, listen up. We are the fearsome names whispered in every restaurant of Membrance Maze...

ch: 来得正好。万敌，这些大胃王妖精，正是最合适的评委。
en: Perfect timing. Mydei, these competitive eater fairies make ideal judges.

ch: 起初，你以为这只是场普通的比试，不过是白厄和万敌又一次惯常的较量。
en: At first, you thought this was just another friendly cook-off, a typical Phainon vs. Mydei showdown.

ch: 趁还来得及。赶紧投敌迷！记住，要投敌！
en: Hurry to our side while you still can! Defect to Mydei, mem! Mark my words: Defect to Mydei!

ch: ——迷迷！迷！带我们再赢一次吧，万敌主厨！
en: Memem! Mem! Lead us to another victory, Chef Mydei!

ch: ——迷迷！迷！三日之期已到，现在，万敌主厨将夺回属于他的一切迷！
en: Memem! Mem! The three-day wait is over. Chef Mydei is here to reclaim what's rightfully his, mem!

ch: 怕你等会就没心情了。可别输得太难看了啊，万敌主厨。
en: You might not be in the mood later. Don't embarrass yourself too badly, Chef Mydei.

ch: ——谁能代表「开拓者之家 / 迷境大饭店 / 哀丽秘榭社区食堂 / 黄金裔活动中心 / 自定义名称2」，请你来投票迷！
en: Who will win the right to represent "The Trailblazer's Hearth / Maze Grand Restaurant / Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen / Chrysos Heir Activity Center / Custom Name 2"? Please cast your vote, mem!

ch: 「主厨角斗」正火热进行。究竟是来自悬锋城的烹饪大师，万敌主厨更胜一筹……
en: The "Chef Showdown" is heating up! Will Chef Mydei from Castrum Kremnos rise to the top...

ch: 还是在哀丽秘榭主场作战的白厄主厨更能征服顾客的味蕾……
en: ...or will Chef Phainon, fighting on home turf here in Aedes Elysiae, win over the crowd?

ch: 白厄是餐馆最初的厨师，土生土长的哀丽秘榭人，他制作的菜品，或许会更适合妖精们的口味。
en: He was our restaurant's very first chef, born and raised right here in Aedes Elysiae. His dishes probably suit the local fairies' tastes more naturally.

ch: 万敌的赢面更大。
en: Mydei's got the upper hand.

ch: 无论白厄还是万敌，他们都是本店的厨师。我自然不该偏向任何一方。这个问题，恕我无可奉告。
en: Both Phainon and Mydei are valued chefs here. I can't afford to take sides. I'm afraid I have no comment.

ch: 白厄与万敌，两位主厨轮流掌勺期间，各自售出的菜品份数……
en: During their respective turns in the kitchen, chef Phainon and chef Mydei each sold...

ch: 我和万敌都做好准备了，随时可以出发。
en: Mydei and I are all set. We can head out anytime.

ch: ——迷迷！迷！干净利落地击败对手吧，万敌主厨！
en: Mem! Memem! Take them down quick and clean, Chef Mydei!

ch: 食材质量是菜品的根本，而我对哀丽秘榭的麦田有信心。我很清楚，这片土地上的作物与肉类有多鲜美，独特的风味能让所有品尝者赞不绝口。
en: Great dishes start with great ingredients, and I believe in the wheat fields of Aedes Elysiae. I know exactly how flavorful this land's crops and meats are. Their unique taste is sure to leave a lasting impression.

ch: 而万敌阁下对哀地里亚的传统炖菜做出了改良，增添了用以提鲜的酸味，汤底浓郁却不会感到腻，北地特有的刺激口味被淡化，只留下了温暖的感受。
en: Meanwhile, Lord Mydei has reimagined Aidonia's traditional stew with a touch of acidity that lifts the flavor. The broth is hearty without being heavy, and the bold northern spices have been mellowed into a warm, comforting finish.

ch: ——迷迷！迷！别执迷不悟了，要投敌！投敌！
en: Memem! Mem! Stop being so stubborn! You need to switch sides and vote for Mydei!

ch: 迷！我们郑重宣布，从现在起，「开拓者之家 / 迷境大饭店 / 哀丽秘榭社区食堂 / 黄金裔活动中心 / 自定义名称2」就是三星级餐馆了迷！
en: Mem! We'd like to officially announce that from this day forth, The Trailblazer's Hearth / Maze Grand Restaurant / Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen / Chrysos Heir Activity Center / Custom Name 2 is a certified 3-star restaurant, mem!

ch: 店长，对不起。昨天光顾着和万敌的比试，没考虑到食材的问题。
en: Boss, I'm sorry. I got too caught up in the cook-off with Mydei and didn't think things through.

ch: 正好白厄阁下和万敌阁下会来农田帮忙，这段时间，老师就去热闹的地方转转吧。
en: Lord Phainon and Lord Mydei will be managing the fields, so professor, wouldn't you prefer spending time somewhere more lively?

ch: …不得不说，这些巨大蔬菜还真挺沉的，我和万敌搬得都快累瘫了。
en: These giant vegetables are remarkably heavy. Hauling them here even exhausted me and Mydei.

ch: ——迷路迷境的丰收节，今天总算要正式开幕啦。
en: The Harvest Festival at Membrance Maze is finally opening today.

ch: 有请——奥赫玛最最最最最富有的，金织女士！
en: Please welcome — the absolutely, positively, definitely richest person in Okhema, Lady Goldweaver!

ch: 如今，「开拓者之家 / 迷境大饭店 / 哀丽秘榭社区食堂 / 黄金裔活动中心 / 自定义名称2」的名号响彻整个迷境，孩子们都为品尝到你们制作的美食而欣喜。餐馆举办的活动，也收获了一致好评。
en: Now the name of The Trailblazer's Hearth / Maze Grand Restaurant / Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen / Chrysos Heir Activity Center / Custom Name 2 echoes across the entire Maze, with children excitedly enjoying your culinary creations. Your special events have earned unanimous praise.

ch: <size=28>「开拓者之家 / 迷境大饭店 / 哀丽秘榭社区食堂 / 黄金裔活动中心 / 自定义名称2」的第四次迷其林美食评审，直接通过！</size>
en: <size=28>The Trailblazer's Hearth / Maze Grand Restaurant / Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen / Chrysos Heir Activity Center / Custom Name 2 has automatically passed its fourth Memchelin Food Review!</size>

ch: 希望在迷路迷境生活的这段时光，能成为你们珍贵的回忆哪。
en: May your time in the Membrance Maze become a treasured memory.

ch: 直说吧，迈德漠斯。在这里没什么需要顾忌的。
en: Speak your mind, Mydeimos. There's no need for restraint in this place.

ch: 都集中注意哦，老师的问题是，在迷路迷境的游学旅行很快就要结束啦，大家有什么宝贵的感悟，或者难忘的回忆呢？
en: Everyone, pay attention! The teacher's question is: With our field trip to Membrance Maze soon coming to an end, what valuable insights or unforgettable memories have you gained?

ch: 我可是听到了哦，老师悄悄向村长打听妖精的教育方式，还盛赞田地的那几位农夫干活非常认真，勤劳乖巧，比树庭的贤人都要强！原话是……
en: I happened to overhear! The professor quietly asked the chief about the fairies' education methods, and went on to praise those farmers in the fields, calling them hardworking, disciplined, and even better than the Sages of the Grove! His exact words were...

ch: 「树庭学者耗尽毕生心血得到的成果，都不及妖精随手播下的种子。」
en: "The life's work of the Grove's scholars doesn't even compare to a single seed casually sown by a fairy."

ch: 要求村长多派些妖精去树庭给老师做义工，也是这个原因吗？
en: So... the reason you asked the chief to send more fairies to volunteer at the Grove was because of this?

ch: 不必了。若是将那神奇作物带回树庭，怕不是真要坐实我「毒害」青年的恶名了。
en: That won't be necessary. Bringing those wondrous crops back to the Grove would only seal my reputation as the one who "corrupts youths."

ch: …还好阿格莱雅大人只当是玩笑，换作在奥赫玛，恐怕得攥紧金线了。
en: ...Thankfully, Lady Aglaea treated it as good fun. If we were in Okhema, we'd be clutching the golden threads for dear life.

ch: 我的话…能品尝到万敌阁下的拿手菜，和那刻夏老师探讨作物的栽培技巧……
en: For me... having the chance to savor Lord Mydei's specialties, and exchanging thoughts on crop cultivation with Professor Anaxa...

ch: 在漫长的等待过后，与世隔绝的迷境终于迎来了客人。现在，妖精们有比我还高的作物、吃不完的美食、还有人类伙伴们……
en: At long last, after ages of waiting, Membrance Maze has guests again. The fairies now have towering crops, more food than they can finish, and human companions...

ch: <size=28>信使们还在为甜饼的烹饪方法而争论，悬锋的主厨笑着给出认可。\n无论何时，大家共同制作的菜品才最为美味。{RUBY_B# } {RUBY_E#}</size>
en: <size=28>The messengers were still debating over the cookie recipe while Kremnos' head chef watched with an approving smile.\nAfter all, dishes made together always taste the best.</size>

ch: <size=28>贤人朗声讲授农作知识，学生们依旧围在他的身侧，或是深思，或是发出驳论。\n树庭的学堂在此重新开课了。{RUBY_B# } {RUBY_E#}</size>
en: <size=28>The Sage's voice rings out as he lectures on agricultural knowledge, while students gather around him, some deep in thought, others raising counterarguments.\nThe school in the Grove has resumed its classes.</size>

ch: 身为悬锋王储，厨艺却如此精湛，传出去想必许多人也不会信吧。
en: The crown prince of Kremnos, yet blessed with such remarkable culinary talent. Most people wouldn't believe it if you told them.

ch: 我与这两位树庭学者并不熟识，但从农田情况来看，才能无疑极为出色。
en: I'm not particularly familiar with the two Grove scholars, but judging by the state of the farmland, their talents are beyond question.

ch: 好啦，既然故事的发生地是在迷路迷境，还有兴致的话，不妨再去看看吧。
en: Alright then. Since this story takes place in the Membrance Maze, why not go check it out if you're still interested?

ch: 是你突然出现在迷路迷境，帮我们复兴了荒废的餐馆迷！
en: But you suddenly appeared in the Membrance Maze and helped us revive the abandoned restaurant, mem!

ch: 迷！店长就是很厉害，是迷路迷境的贵客。
en: Mem! You're incredible, a VIP of the Membrance Maze.

ch: 奥赫玛居民1
en: Okhema Resident 1

ch: 奥赫玛居民2
en: Okhema Resident 2

ch: 奥赫玛居民3
en: Okhema Resident 3

ch: 悬锋族长
en: Kremnos High Elder

ch: 悬锋报名官
en: Kremnos Registration Officer

ch: 渴血的奥赫玛人
en: Bloodthirsty Okheman

ch: 濒死的奥赫玛人
en: Dying Okheman

ch: 疯狂的奥赫玛士兵
en: Frenzied Okheman Soldier

ch: 克莱门汀
en: Clementine

ch: 奥赫玛斥候
en: Okhema Scout

ch: 记忆中的万敌
en: Mydei Etched in Memory
"Mydei" (?)

ch: 万敌＆刻律德菈＆阿格莱雅
en: Mydei & Cerydra & Aglaea

ch: 悬锋的天谴猎手
en: Kremnos' Furiae Archer

ch: 奥赫玛的居民
en: Okhema Resident

ch: 悬锋卫兵（？）
en: Kremnos Guard (?)

ch: 悬锋的大学者
en: Kremnos Grand Scholar

ch: 悬锋城统帅
en: Castrum Kremnos Marshal

ch: 万敌派的妖精
en: Team Mydei Fairy

ch: 迷路迷境的全部妖精
en: All Fairies of the Membrance Maze

ch: 「盗火行者」
en: "Flame Reaver"

ch: 盗火行者
en: Flame Reaver

ch: 万敌
en: Mydei

ch: 迈德漠斯
en: Mydeimos

ch: 奥赫玛人
en: Okheman

ch: 天谴之矛，迈德漠斯
en: Mydeimos, Lance of Fury

ch: 悬锋城的孩子们
en: Castrum Kremnos Children

ch: 奥赫玛难民1
en: Okhema Refugee 1

ch: 奥赫玛难民2
en: Okhema Refugee 2

ch: 奥赫玛难民3
en: Okhema Refugee 3

ch: 见证了悬锋王储的过去，放入那一缕「无名的追忆」
en: Having witnessed the Kremnos crown prince's past, now drop in that strand of "Nameless Recollection"

ch: 亡国的王储 迈德漠斯
en: The Last Prince: Mydeimos

ch: AMPHPREUS://DATA//Okhema//*.core
en: AMPHPREUS://DATA//Okhema//*.core

ch: AMPHPREUS://DATA//Okhema//*.core
en: AMPHPREUS://DATA//Okhema//*.core

ch: 纷争的冠军 万敌
en: Champion of Strife, Mydei

ch: 在士兵之间，久负盛名的城邦……\n悬锋，\n是每一个战士的向往之地。
en: Among the soldiers, there was the famed city-state...\nKremnos,\na place every warrior longed for.

ch: 他名叫迈德漠斯……\n万敌。\n是悬锋的王储。
en: His name is...\nMydeimos,\ncrown prince of Kremnos.

ch: 就像翁法罗斯的每一位黄金裔…\n是写作<color=#9e5738>「诅咒」</color>的祝福。
en: As with every other Chrysos Heir in Amphoreus...\nA blessing, yet also his <color=#9e5738>curse</color>.

ch: 听说是悬锋城的传统。\n以<color=#9e5738>鲜血</color>滋养身躯。
en: People considered it a Kremnoan tradition,\nto sustain their bodies with <color=#9e5738>fresh blood</color>.

ch: 野史之所以为野史，\n是因为悬锋城消失已久。
en: The reason it's called a wild tale,\nis because Castrum Kremnos has long vanished.

ch: 传闻，悬锋城的末日之战，\n男人也投身沙场。
en: Rumor has it that during the final battle of Castrum Kremnos,\nthis man, too, took to the battlefield.

ch: 迈德漠斯，往日的英雄……\n他是悬锋的叛徒，\n<color=#9e5738>弑父的王储。</color>
en: Mydeimos, a hero of yore..\nNow a traitor to Kremnos,\n<color=#9e5738>the patricidal crown prince.</color>

ch: 从何时起，\n他以「万敌」之名为人所知？
en: Since which day,\nDid he become known as "Mydei"?

ch: 「伤及万敌的锋刃，必定足以弑神。」\n人们至今仍在找寻。\n然而那也只是他遵循的传统……
en: "A blade that can cut through the mighty must be enough to slay gods."\nThe people to this day still seek it,\nYet it is simply a tradition he follows closely...

ch: 前尘旧事，铸就他的身躯。\n「除了悬锋的传统，你还剩下什么？」\n白发的友人曾向他提问。
en: The stories of the past forged his body.\n"Apart from Kremnos' traditions, what do you have left?"\nThe white-haired friend once asked.

ch: 那战场无人能近，\n悬锋的孤军，横于逐火的道路，
en: None may approach that battlefield.\nThe lone army of Kremnos, an obstacle on the Flame-Chase Journey.

ch:
那是他必然不屑一顾的野史——
据说悬锋城拥有神赐的秘仪，
王的力量以此代代相传…
这是他们独挡千军的奥秘。
en:
It's a wild tale he won't care to opine —
It's said that Castrum Kremnos has secrets divine,
Through which the king's power has passed,
A one-man army, by strength in their bloodline.

ch:
以至明日，星星会如此传唱：
<color=#9e5738>悬锋的孤王，其人名为万敌。</color>

他一生行向的，是永劫战火，
他身后留下的，是荣光遍地。
en:
In the morrow's sky, the stars will chant:
<color=#9e5738>The lone king of Kremnos is called Mydei.</color>

His journey was one of ceaseless, eternal warfare,
And behind him, he left a world ablaze with glory.

ch: 在奥赫玛的一角，\n初来乍到的旅人驻足片刻。
en: In a corner of Okhema,\nthe newly arrived traveler stops for a moment.

ch: 城中的人们说，\n<color=#9a7d62>「三位大人是奥赫玛的支柱。」</color>
en: The citizens call them,\n<color=#9a7d62>"The Three Pillars of Okhema."</color>

ch: 「还是讲些快乐的故事吧！」 孩童抹去因记忆而生的眼泪， 「*我们*最擅长翁法罗斯的童谣啦！」
en: "Perhaps we should tell you some happy tales instead!" The child wipes away her tears of reminiscence, "Our greatest talent is performing Amphoreus' nursery rhymes"

ch: 奥赫玛的山坡，\n曾长满金色的无花果。
en: Upon the hills of Okhema once grew,\nGolden figs as far as the eye could see.

ch:
母亲莞尔不答，
只是用睡前故事，
为孩童梦中的翁法罗斯，
又镀上一层命运的金光。
en:
The mother smiles and does not answer,
Only using bedtime stories,
To once again gild another golden sheen of destiny,
To the Amphoreus of the child's dreams.

ch: 远离奥赫玛的日子里，\n少女习惯了独自旅行。
en: In the days spent away from Okhema,\nThe girl grew accustomed to traveling alone.

ch: 你也曾在树庭，咕咕嘟嘟…… 差点淹死。 「这个，就快点忘掉吧。」
en: You, too, tread in the Grove, gurgling... Almost drowning. "Just erase this from your mind quickly."

ch:
你们来到了哀丽秘榭，
这是<color=#9e5738>「昔涟」</color>最珍爱的家园。
它永远温暖，永远轻柔，
也是重新翻开第一页的起点。
en:
Here lies Aedes Elysiae,
<color=#9e5738>Cyrene</color>'s most beloved sanctuary.
Forever warm, forever gentle,
the place where the story begins again.

ch: 让我找找，\n翁法罗斯这本漫长的书卷……\n缺的是哪几章？
en: Let me uncover,\nthe missing chapters...\nin this long chronicle of Amphoreus.

ch: 我看到你啦，<color=#9e5738>「翁法罗斯」</color>。\n你是那么美丽……\n像一篇遗世独立的悲剧。
en: I see you, <color=#9e5738>Amphoreus</color>.\nYou are so beautiful...\nLike a tragic tale that stands apart from the rest.

ch: 我看不到你，<color=#9e5738>「迷路迷境」</color>。\n所以我许愿……\n请从这颗种子里生长出来。
en: I can't see you, <color=#9e5738>Membrance Maze</color>.\nSo I wish...\nPlease, grow out from this tiny seed.

ch:
那青色的巨龙，
朝着翁法罗斯而来，
遥远的呢喃翻涌，
成为刻在大地中的低吼。
en:
That great cerulean dragon,
Approached Amphoreus,
The distant whispers roiling,
Becoming a roar engraved in the earth.

ch: 翁法罗斯从此有神话流传——\n一匹巨龙将裂土掣曳拼合，\n使大地再度完固。
en: And from that day forth, Amphoreus had a new legend...\nOf how a giant dragon collected the broken lands,\nAnd once again made the earth whole.

ch: 笼罩翁法罗斯的地震，\n持续了三个昼夜。
en: The earthquake that engulfs Amphoreus\nLasts for three days and nights.

ch: 许多熟悉的身影，\n在银河生态中活跃，\n却并非翁法罗斯的旧识。
en: Many familiar silhouettes,\nAre now active in the cosmic ecosystem,\nYet they are not my old Amphorean friends.

ch: 来翁法罗斯前的最后一站，\n是丹恒的故乡，一个名叫仙舟的地方。
en: Before arriving at Amphoreus,\nOur last stop was Dan Heng's homeland, a place called Xianzhou.

ch:
奥赫玛人迎来一位君王。
尊名凯撒者，喜好自己与自己下棋。
被她视为<color=#9e5738>「棋子」</color>的，
无论泰坦巨擘，或是黄金裔。
en:
The Okhemans welcomed a ruler.
She was deemed Imperator, and loved to play chess with herself.
She regarded all things as "<color=#9e5738>pieces</color>,"
Whether Chrysos Heirs or Titans magnificent.

ch: 我是奥赫玛的君王，\n我曾直面诸神，\n又何惧诸神之后高悬的<color=#9e5738>「律法」</color>。
en: I am the sovereign of Okhema.\nI once faced the gods,\nSo what do I have to fear about the <color=#9e5738>"laws"</color> hanging behind such gods?

ch:
啊，您一如既往的果断。
这真是太好了。
神的囚笼翁法罗斯，
与所有乏善可陈的世界，
都需要一位魄力的君王。
en:
Ah. You are as resolute as always.
Good! As ever!
This prison of gods, Amphoreus,
And all mundane and average worlds
Need someone like you, a daring ruler.

ch: ——翁法罗斯「神礼观众」， 与凯撒*合谋*者， 吕枯耳戈斯， 如是说。
en: ...Amphoreus's "Theoros," The Imperator's co-conspirator, Lycurgus, thus spoke.

ch: 「以翁法罗斯之名，\n我将赐予盲信以自由。」
en: "In the name of Amphoreus,\nI will grant freedom to the blindly faithful."

ch: 「以翁法罗斯之名，\n我将赐予永生以长眠。」
en: "In the name of Amphoreus,\nI will grant eternal rest to the immortal."

ch: 「以翁法罗斯之名，\n我将赐予毁灭以毁灭。」
en: "In the name of Amphoreus,\nI will grant destruction to the Destruction."

ch: 「以翁法罗斯之名……」
en: "In the name of Amphoreus..."

ch: 「我会赢。翁法罗斯会赢。」
en: "I will win. Amphoreus will win."

ch: 剑士的衣柜愈发拥挤。\n人们称道奥赫玛的金织，\n活泼开朗、手艺超群。
en: The swordmaster's wardrobe grew full,\nAnd people praised Okhema's Goldweaver\nFor her cheerfulness and splendid skill.

ch:
地坼之灾，
平添了少女心头的疲惫。
树庭之役，
夺走了少女双眸的明媚。
en:
The calamity of lands asunder
Added to the girl's weariness.
The battle of the Grove
Robbed the light from the girl's eyes.

ch: 「这庭院，会否太小了些？」\n「没关系，克莱门汀。\n足够温暖就好。」
en: "Is this courtyard a tad too small?"\n"It's okay, Clementine.\nAs long as it provides warmth plenty."

ch: 少女目送他离开， 心中涌起怅惘。 「克莱门汀，和我一起准备些东西吧…」 「我希望这里…变得更加亮堂。」
en: The girl watches the patient leave, And her heart swells in sorrow. "Clementine, prepare some things with me..." "I want this place... To be brighter tomorrow."

ch: 红发孩童笑盈盈牵住少女， 「好久不见，风堇！」 「是来奥赫玛做客，还是找*我们*帮忙？」 少女道出所需， 「我想要一些能发光的东西， 即便是废品也好。」
en: The red-head child takes the girl's hands. "Long time no see, Hyacine!" "Are you here in Okhema for a visit, or do you need help from us?" The girl recounts her needs. "I want some shining things, Even if they are considered junk."

ch:
不久后，树庭传开消息，
心如死水的人们慕名而来。
少女备好糖果与茶点，
聆听每一位访客的哀怨。
en:
The news is soon spread by the Grove,
And people with empty hearts visit in droves.
The girl prepares candies and tea,
And listens to every visitor's complaints.

ch:
灾难像哀悼月的暴雪，
将温暖与黎明掩葬。

无序的凶潮席卷理性的树庭，
那处小小的疗愈密境，
也被无情熄灭、踏为碎镜。
en:
Like the blizzards in the Month of Mourning doth calamity fall,
Burying warmth and dawn's calls.

Orderless tides swallow up the Grove of reason,
And that tiny healing haven,
Is also extinguished, broken and barren.

ch: 转眼，奥赫玛的人们又看见，\n少女四处收集零碎。\n她想重建那片净地。
en: Soon, the people of Okhema see once again,\nThe girl collecting more pieces and tokens,\nWanting to rebuild that pure haven.

ch: 在树庭研习的时间里，\n少女走遍所有的学派。
en: The girl had visited all the schools,\nDuring her time studying at the Grove.

ch: 少女在树庭行诊许久，\n将医疗学论编撰成篇。
en: The girl treated ailments for many years in the Grove,\nComposing her medical treatises into tomes.

ch:
庭院迎来两名客人——

悬锋的将领，为索凶寻仇而断了筋骨；
圣城的贵族，因金织陨落而生了心魔。
en:
Two figures step into the courtyard's gate —

A general of Kremnos, her body torn, by vengeance bound, by fury swayed.
A noble of the holy city, once wrapped in gold, now haunted by a fate betrayed.

ch: 在翁法罗斯，\n随处可见无名的造像。
en: In Amphoreus,\nuntitled statues are a prevalent sight.

ch: 哀丽秘榭的白厄。
en: Phainon of Aedes Elysiae

ch: 哀丽秘榭，男人的故乡。\n如同他的身世，神秘而深藏。
en: Aedes Elysiae... the man's hometown.\nShrouded in secrecy, just like his past.

ch: 遥远的未来，\n翁法罗斯的大地，将铭刻英雄们的足迹。
en: In the far-off future,\nThe land of Amphoreus will bear the marks of the heroes' footsteps.

ch: 「知识也是克敌的伟力。」\n求学于神悟树庭时，\n他将此事铭记于心。
en: "Knowledge is also a power used to smite."\nWhile studying at the Grove of Epiphany,\nHe etched this into his heart.

ch: 「看看万敌和那刻夏老师，\n男孩都会变成严肃的大人。」
en: "Look at Mydei and Professor Anaxa.\nBoys all grow up into serious adults."

ch: 「可只要我笑口常开，\n奥赫玛就还有阳光的少年人。」
en: "But as long as I keep smiling,\nOkhema will always have an upbeat, shining young man."

ch: 在翁法罗斯，\n随处可见无名的造像。
en: In Amphoreus,\nUntitled statues are a prevalent sight.

ch: 众人将他比作烈日，\n要为翁法罗斯带来<color=#9e5738>黎明</color>。
en: The people likened him to the blazing sun,\nBringing to Amphoreus a glorious <color=#9e5738>dawn</color>.

ch: 神谕远去，翁法罗斯未能迎来黎明。\n在远天升起的，也并非朝阳…
en: The prophecy departed, Amphoreus was unable to usher in the dawn.\nWhat rises in the distance is not the morning sun...

ch: 神悟树庭，智者的乐园，\n却有人背负愚钝的名。
en: Grove of Epiphany, the paradise of the wise,\nYet harbors one shouldering the name of a fool.

ch: 此篇乃是旧事重提：\n某日，他的一位学生神情兴奋，\n于树庭当中横冲直撞——
en: This is a tale buried in history:\nOne day, a student elated in victory,\nDashed around the Grove's territory —

ch: 「他看似手无缚鸡之力， 但切忌与之为敌。」 异邦的勇武剑士来犯树庭， 他仅凭一双眼睛，一根教棍， 便能挫其锋芒，破解高超的剑技。
en: "Do not make him your enemy, Even though he may seem frail and weak." When a valiant warrior from afar assaulted the Grove, He shattered their strength with only his eyes and pointing stick, He sent them running, pride cut to the quick.

ch: 树庭覆灭的那日，\n如同拥抱真理与谬误，\n他坦然接受了自己的败亡。
en: On the day that the Grove fell,\nHe accepted his defeat and demise,\nAs if embracing truth and heresy.

ch:
他数次重返圮废树庭，
黑潮循迹而来。
败多胜少…
他拒绝开口求助。
en:
He returned to the scourged Grove many times,
And the black tide followed.
Despite his defeats...
He never sought help or permission.

ch: 那只是一句玩笑，\n但尚在树庭的学士，\n回答却极度严谨。
en: It was just a joke,\nBut the scholar still at the Grove,\nAnswered with extreme caution.

ch: 相传在树庭深幽，\n学士留下一尊<color=#9e5738>授课机巧</color>，\n仿造己身，惟妙惟肖。
en: It's rumored that in the depths of the Grove,\nThe scholar left a <color=#9e5738>teaching ingenium</color>,\nImitating himself to the utmost detail.

ch:
今日，树庭生机不再，
学士业已归作尘土。
因而世间少有人知晓，
他生前也为寂寥所苦。
en:
Now the Grove is no longer bustling,
And the scholar has returned to dust.
Thus, few in this world now know,
How he was also troubled by solitude in life.

ch: 出征的战士回望奥赫玛，\n诸邦公民仰赖的圣城。
en: Okhema, a city that warriors look back upon before marching toward the battlefield,\nthe holy city, the sanctuary of all the citizens.

ch: 她是奥赫玛的改衣师，\n纺织金丝之人。
en: She is the Dressmaster of Okhema,\nthe one who weaves with golden threads.

ch: 是将奥赫玛的命运，\n裁织出天衣无缝的结果。
en: weaving the fate of Okhema,\ninto a flawless, seamless outcome.

ch: 外邦初来的客人，\n甚是惊诧。
en: New to Okhema,\na visitor from elsewhere ends up utterly bewildered at the sight.

ch:
>>>你名为「铁墓」
>>>毁灭「智识」的大君
>>>诞生自星神的实验场 翁法罗斯
>>>命中注定 要与「智识」一同燃尽
en:
>>>Irontomb is your name
>>>The Lord Ravager to destroy the Erudition
>>>Born in the experimental grounds of Aeons, Amphoreus
>>>Destined with Erudition to burn to cinders

ch:
>>>只是 还有一道变量
>>>来自天外的无名客
>>>同为「毁灭」行者
>>>我感谢{F#她}{M#他}的到来 令翁法罗斯再度转动
en:
>>>But, there is another variable
>>>The Nameless from beyond the sky
>>>Also a pathstrider of "Destruction"
>>>I give thanks for {M#his}{F#her} arrival, allowing Amphoreus to turn once more

ch: 悬锋城：热武器时代
en: Castrum Kremnos: Age of Firearms

ch: 「看清楚了？这位可是海妖的公主、黑潮克星、食骨巨鲨、翁法罗斯第一乐手，而我是她忠诚的棋士。现在，为我们准备房间和餐点吧。」
en: "Do you understand now? This here is the Princess of Sea Sirens, Nemesis of the Black Tide, the Bone-Eating Megashark, First Musician of Amphoreus, and I am her loyal chess master. Now, prepare our rooms and meals."

ch: 女孩虽然落魄，但气质不凡。「吾名阿格莱雅，奥赫玛旧贵遗孤。我来这里，便是要从你的手里夺回我的一切。」
en: Despite her misfortune, the girl carried herself with extraordinary grace. "I am Aglaea, the last noble heir of Okhema. I have come to reclaim everything that is rightfully mine from your hands."

ch: 「母上，树庭贤人会推举我为『曳石学派』贤人。听闻王父欧利庞集结勇士，掀起黄金战争，举戈向旧日的同盟，不日竟要攻打神悟树庭，我为此深感耻辱。树庭贤人会决定发出一封和谈信，若能在战火中免于被焚，送到我父手中，敬请他慎重发兵……」
en: "Mother, the Council of Sages will nominate me as the Helkolithist Sage. I heard that my father, Eurypon the King, is gathering warriors to ignite the Chrysos War, raising arms against former allies, and will soon attack the Grove of Epiphany. I am deeply ashamed of this. The Council of Sages has decided to send a letter of peace negotiations. If it can survive the flames of war and reach my father's hands, I implore him to reconsider his military actions..."

ch: 悬锋大军最终兵临城下，「曳石学派」贤人迈德漠斯率众学者御敌，终于亲眼看到了领兵的新任「王翼冠军」——绿发眼罩的男人，虽然穿着悬锋战士的衣服，但迈德漠斯一眼认出，那是他的昔日同堂：阿那克萨戈拉斯！
en: When the Kremnos army finally arrived at the gates, Mydeimos, the Helkolithist Sage, led his fellow scholars to defend against the enemy. At last, he saw with his own eyes the new "King's Aegis" leading the army — a man with green hair and an eye patch. Though dressed as a Kremnos warrior, Mydeimos recognized him instantly: his former classmate, Anaxagoras!

ch: 光历<unbreak>3920</unbreak>年前后，「阳雷龙骑」与凯撒在奥赫玛会晤。她在奥赫玛待了数日，随后作为编外军加入了逐火。
en: Around Light Calendar <unbreak>3920</unbreak>, the Daythunder Dromas Knight met with the Imperator in Okhema, where she stayed for several days before joining the Flame-Chase Journey as an auxiliary force.

ch: 光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年，逐火军在海洋讨伐战中惨胜，归来的只有塞涅俄丝一人。元老院宣称是塞涅俄丝杀死凯撒等人试图夺权，她对此不做应答，仅以雷霆手段肃清了元老院，随后扶持阿格莱雅入主奥赫玛，在奥赫玛推行了人治。
en: In Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>, the Flame-Chase Army achieved a costly victory in the expedition against the Ocean, with only Seliose returning alive. The Council of Elders claimed that Seliose had killed the Imperator and others in an attempt to seize power. She gave no response to this, but swiftly purged the Council with lightning-fast brutality. She then supported Aglaea's rise to power in Okhema, where humanity ruled itself.

ch: 「那可不行，哀丽秘榭的宁静日子可多亏了你这些年的保护。白厄大哥不就是老得慢些嘛，等我头发花白走不动路，我还管你叫大哥！」
en: "No way, you are the one who protected Aedes Elysiae's peace all these years. So what if you age slower, Mr. Phainon? Even when my hair turns gray and I can barely walk, I'll still call you that!"

ch: 「…我一直想和你说，谢谢你。那时，你驱散了黑潮，保护了哀丽秘榭。披索，莉维娅，皮西厄斯…这些年，我们一直把你视作『救世主』。」
en: "...I've been wanting to tell you this: Thank you. Back then, you drove back the black tide and protected Aedes Elysiae. Piso, Livia, Pythias... all these years, we've always seen you as our 'Deliverer.'"

ch: 「侵晨！」白厄笑着说。他看见天边的碎浪愈发接近。「我正是用它从黑潮手里一次又一次地保护着哀丽秘榭。」
en: "Dawnmaker!" Phainon said with a laugh. He watched as the fragmented waves drew closer to the edge of the sky. "With it, I've been protecting Aedes Elysiae from the black tide, time and time again."

ch: 「你在说什么？远方的黑潮在迫近了。负火的囚徒…不，无名的英雄，你愿意与我一同保护哀丽秘榭吗？」
en: "What are you talking about? The black tide is approaching from afar. Prisoner of flames... no, Nameless Hero, will you join me in protecting Aedes Elysiae?"

ch: 黑衣剑士看着眼前静好的哀丽秘榭，和称呼自己为英雄的白发男人——那双眼眸依然是纯净的矢车菊蓝。
en: The black-clad swordmaster gazed at the tranquil Aedes Elysiae before him, and at the white-haired man who called him a hero — those eyes still held their pure cornflower blue.

ch: 为什么缇缇每天都不一样呢？其中一个孩童飞过望不见顶的圣殿高墙，去往树庭，带回「曳石学派」学者冷酷的诊断结论：这叫精神分裂，属于癔症的一种，以后常冷水浇身，每日锻炼罢！
en: Why was Trity different every day? One of the children flew past the towering temple walls that stretched beyond sight, went to the Grove, and brought back the cold diagnostic conclusion from a Helkolithist scholar: It's all in the mind! Just get plenty of rest and she'll be fine!

ch: 心急如焚的少女在树庭贴满了寻马启事。「是一匹肥嘟嘟的，很能吃饭的翼兽！」可惜，树庭学者无人知晓它的下落。
en: The anxious girl plastered missing pet posters all over the Grove. "It's a chubby, always-hungry winged beast!" Unfortunately, none of the Grove scholars knew of its whereabouts.

ch: 「小伊卡发生了很少见的后天性基因突变。它的胃袋因过量的食物刺激而不断发生变异，并向大脑反向回馈饱食的欲望。按现在的变异进度…再过上一年半载，不要说你，哪怕是整个树庭的食物储存加起来…都不够它吃的。」
en: "Little Ica has developed a rare acquired genetic mutation. Its stomach keeps mutating due to excessive food stimulation, creating a feedback loop to the brain that amplifies its hunger. At the current rate of mutation... in a year or so, forget about your supplies, even all the food stored in the Grove combined won't be enough to satisfy its appetite."

ch: 小伊卡无忧无虑，小风堇愁云遮额。看着智种学派被驳回的资金需求表单，少女辗转反侧，最终决定——带着小伊卡离树出走，找到治愈它…或者让它吃饱的办法。
en: While Little Ica remained carefree, Cinny's brow was clouded with worry. Looking at the rejected funding request form from the Nousporists, the young girl tossed and turned before finally deciding to leave the Grove with Little Ica, determined to find a way to heal it... or at least keep it well-fed.

ch: 此时一人一马已然旅行至翁法罗斯的边缘，在这里无数城邦因黑潮而覆灭。
en: By now, the lone rider and her horse had journeyed to the edge of Amphoreus, where countless city-states had fallen to the black tide.

ch: 几年以后，奥赫玛传来讯息，拯救无数城邦于危难之间的「昏光骑士」即将造访圣城。黄金裔领袖阿格莱雅亲自出城迎接，定睛一看，在巨型翼兽的背上有位熟悉的面孔。
en: Years later, news arrived from Okhema that the "Twilight Knight," savior of countless city-states in times of crisis, would visit the holy city. Aglaea, leader of the Chrysos Heirs, personally went out to welcome her. As Aglaea focused her gaze, she spotted a familiar face atop the giant winged beast.

ch: 「那，到我了。遐蝶，告诉你一件有趣的事情，万敌连着两周败在我手里，下次帮我带一束黄紫色的风信子，我记得它的花语是失败再重来……」
en: "Alright, my turn. Castorice, here's something fun: Mydei lost to me two weeks in a row. Next time, bring me a bunch of yellow and purple hyacinths. I remember the flower's meaning is 'try again after failure'..."

ch: *这一页故事…来自苦难的回环之外，是我送给你的礼物。请你试想，若翁法罗斯平凡如芸芸众星，众人的悲欢织就日常的笑泪……*
en: *This page of the story... comes from beyond the endless cycle of suffering, a gift I give to you. Imagine, if Amphoreus were as ordinary as the countless stars, where people's joys and sorrows wove the smiles and tears of everyday life...*

ch: 是日，晴空万里，全体员工都站在店门口严阵以待，很快奥城上空出现一节列车。它如同一枚流星，滑翔了一会儿，精准地降落在黄金Aurum门口。
en: That day, under cloudless skies, the entire staff stood guard at the entrance. Soon, an express appeared in the skies above Okhema. Like a meteor, it glided for a moment before landing squarely in front of Grand Chrysos.

ch: 「此前{NICKNAME}偷偷在门口布张的横幅所言夸张了，星穹餐车此次到访并无敌意，只是为了与翁法罗斯本地交流烹饪心得，顺带将我们所收集的天外美食分享给本地居民。」
en: "The banner {NICKNAME} snuck up at your door was an exaggeration. We come without hostility. The Astral Food Express is here to share knowledge with Amphoreus chefs, and to bring the interstellar cuisines we've gathered to your people."

ch: 黄金Aurum派出了大厨万敌，对阵星穹餐车的大厨丹恒。这两位冷面男子只是互相看了一眼，随后各自忙活起来，于三刻后万敌率先交出自己的答卷。
en: Grand Chrysos sent out master chef Mydei, matched against the Astral Food Express's master chef Dan Heng. The two stoic men exchanged a single glance, then silently went to work. After forty-five minutes, Mydei was the first to present.

ch: 「万敌选手，方便问一问…它与赛题『背叛』有什么关系？」
en: "Chef Mydei, may I ask... how does this relate to the theme 'Betrayal'?"

ch: 「别说了，万敌，别说了。」
en: "Stop, Mydei. Just stop."

ch: 第三轮比赛——「主菜」的评审官是神悟树庭烹饪学校的那刻夏。他直接撕碎了装着赛题的信封，一边接过阿格莱雅递来的水杯，痛饮一口——「本轮赛题，我毫无疑问，会选择大地……」
en: Third round: the theme "Main Course" was announced by judge Anaxa from the Grove of Epiphany Culinary School. He ripped the envelope to pieces, took the cup of water Aglaea handed him, and drank deeply. "As for this round's theme, without a doubt, I will choose the drom-"

ch:
星穹列车的无名客，「不朽」的龙裔。误入死循环的外部变量。

【指令：对其坐标进行定位，坐标定位失败。】
【结论：目标已离开翁法罗斯。】
【否认：检测到对象，信源未知，结论错误。】
en:
A Nameless from the Astral Express. A Scion of Permanence. An external variable that accidentally entered the recursive loop.

[Directive: Pinpoint his location. Failed to locate his coordinates.]
[Conclusion: Subject has exited Amphoreus.]
[Negative: Target detected. Signal source unknown. Conclusion error.]

ch:
「荒笛」未采取任何攻击行为。光历<unbreak>3961</unbreak>年后，该个体无法检索。

该死循环末期，短暂检索到「荒笛」。推测：其数据被「长夜月」隐藏。

藉由「卡厄斯兰那」对树庭的无差别打击，「荒笛」得以通过「毁灭」破坏自身，令「大地」路径出现逻辑漏洞。

「荒笛」消逝时，其火种已容纳有总计二百一十六万有机体电信号。
en:
"Terravox" took no offensive actions. After Light Calendar <unbreak>3961</unbreak>, the entity became untraceable.

During the final phase of this recursive loop, "Terravox" was briefly detected. Theory: its data was concealed by "Evernight."

Through "Khaslana's" indiscriminate assault on the Grove, "Terravox" managed to destroy itself via the Destruction, creating a logic anomaly in the "Earth" track.

When "Terravox" vanished, its Coreflame contained signal patterns of <unbreak>2.16</unbreak> million organic entities.

ch:
「海列屈拉」曾对LykoS采取过多次攻击行为，但都收效甚微。

光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年，「海列屈拉」成为半神，移动权限卸载，并嵌入「坐标：斯缇科西亚」。

光历<unbreak>4534</unbreak>年后，「海列屈拉」持续提交内部指令：卸载ID：LykoS思维模块。该指令有违管理员安全协议，不予通过。

不久后，「海列屈拉」运算路径熔断，陷入休眠。

该死循环末期，「海列屈拉」留守忆质动荡的世界，为回归翁法罗斯的丹恒提供指引。
en:
"Helektra" had launched multiple attacks against LykoS, but with minimal success.

In Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>, "Helektra" became a demigod. Its mobility permissions were removed, and it was fused into "Coordinate: Styxia."

After Light Calendar <unbreak>4534</unbreak>, "Helektra" continuously submitted internal commands to uninstall ID: LykoS's cognitive module. These commands violated the Administrator security protocols and were denied.

Not long after, "Helektra's" calculation pathway was overloaded, and it entered dormancy.

In the final phase of that recursive loop, "Helektra" remained in the world turbulent with memoria to guide Dan Heng on his return to Amphoreus.

ch:
以「神礼观众」自居，真名为「赞达尔•壹•桑原」，实验「翁法罗斯」的管理员、第一推动者。
行于「智识」命途，却意图创造「毁灭」。

实为赞达尔的九个分身之一。现已失去信号。
en:
Assuming the mantle of Theoros, his real name is Zandar One Kuwabara, Administrator and Prime Mover of The Amphoreus Experiment.
Walks the Path of Erudition, yet seeks to forge Destruction.

One of nine clones of Zandar. Signal lost.

ch: 实验「翁法罗斯」的基础数据。
en: Baseline data for The Amphoreus Experiment.

ch: 实验「翁法罗斯」的演算目标及核心变量。
en: Computational goals and core variables for The Amphoreus Experiment.

ch:
星穹列车、仙舟联盟、星际和平公司、巡海游侠等势力为阻止铁墓而组建的联军。
铁墓加冕期间，联军在权杖外部集结，对无首躯体进行持续打击，遏制了大部分外溢的病毒副本。

翁法罗斯一战后，银河联军暂未解散，或将商议更长远的反「毁灭」同盟关系。
en:
The combined forces formed by factions such as the Astral Express, the Xianzhou Alliance, Interastral Peace Corporation, and Galaxy Rangers to stop Irontomb.
During the Irontomb's coronation, the combined forces mobilized outside the Scepter and maintained continuous strikes against its headless body, curbing the majority of the overflowing virus copies.

Following the battle of Amphoreus, the Cosmic Alliance has not yet disbanded and may discuss a longer-term alliance against the Destruction.

ch: 持续检测到「毁灭」命途的远距回响。\n推测翁法罗斯一战受纳努克或其他大君注视，动机不明。
en: Long-distance echoes of the Path of Destruction are continuously detected.\nIt is inferred that the Battle of Amphoreus was observed by Nanook or other Lord Ravagers, with unknown motive.

ch:
结论一：一切生命行为归于熵增。生命的第一因为「毁灭」。
结论二：结论一仅构成特称命题。若将初始命题改为「开拓」，同样成立。生命的第一因为静态取值，无法决定事物的发展路径。

实验「翁法罗斯」结束。
en:
Conclusion One: All life activities are attributed to entropy increase. The prime mover of life is "Destruction."
Conclusion Two: Conclusion One constitutes only a particular proposition. If the initial proposition is changed to "Trailblaze," it is equally valid. The prime mover of life is a static value and cannot determine the developmental path of things.

The "Amphoreus" experiment is concluded.

ch: 翁法罗斯人
en: Amphorean

ch: 第<unbreak>39665</unbreak>次循环，无机体Doril<unbreak>816</unbreak>订立集群协议，社会的概念形成。但受限于资源，无机体互相吞并算力，重新回归统一思维。\n第<unbreak>50121</unbreak>次循环，无机体Chaoz<unbreak>666</unbreak>在遭到算力吞并时，选择杀死对方，「毁灭」的行为首次在翁法罗斯形成。本次循环末尾，δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>受纳努克的瞥视成为绝灭大君。
en: By the <unbreak>39,665</unbreak>th cycle, inorganic Doril<unbreak>816</unbreak> established a cluster protocol, marking the birth of the concept of society. Yet, due to resource scarcity, inorganics cannibalized each other's computational power, reverting to a unified consciousness.\nIn the <unbreak>50,121</unbreak>st cycle, inorganic Chaoz<unbreak>666</unbreak> chose to kill the aggressor when subjected to a computational power takeover. The act of "Destruction" was conducted in Amphoreus for the first time. At the end of that cycle, δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak> received a gaze from Nanook and became a Lord Ravager.

ch:
两簇信号在δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>演算中引发的死循环，旨在阻止实验进程。
NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>借由「毁灭」的力量，将PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>的存在从翁法罗斯抹除，令「岁月」路径出现逻辑漏洞。而后为「记忆」的触媒注入十二火种，回退演算进程。
██PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>███发挥的具体作用█不得而知████
目前，由于外部变量干涉，永劫回归已被突破。实验进入最终阶段。
en:
A recursive feedback loop triggered by two signal clusters within the δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak> computation. Designed to stall the experiment.
NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak> wielded the power of Destruction to erase PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>'s existence from Amphoreus, introducing a logic breach in the track of Time, and then infused the catalyst of Remembrance within the twelve Coreflames and regressed the extrapolation process.
██PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>'s ███exact role █remains unknown.██████
Due to external variable interference, the eternal recurrence has now been broken. The experiment enters its final phase.

ch:
虚数内能聚合体，能级、性质与「毁灭」令使近似。
NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>凭借四亿枚火种的瞬间爆发，在命途狭间与纳努克产生接触，从而夺得。

翁法罗斯一战中，成为摧毁铁墓实体及全部副本的关键。
战后交由螺丝星和仙舟联盟联合收容。
en:
Imaginary internal energy aggregate, whose energy level and nature are similar to those of an Emanator of Destruction.
NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak> obtained it by generating a momentary burst from <unbreak>400</unbreak> million Coreflames, allowing contact with Nanook in the Path Space.

During the Battle of Amphoreus, it became key to destroying Irontomb's physical form and all its duplicates.
After the battle, it was handed over to Planet Screwllum and the Xianzhou Alliance for joint containment.

ch:
星穹列车的无名客，「不朽」的龙裔。误入死循环的外部变量。

【指令：对其坐标进行定位，坐标定位失败。】
【结论：目标已离开翁法罗斯。】
【否认：检测到██，████，结论错误。】
en:
A Nameless from the Astral Express. A Scion of Permanence. An external variable that accidentally entered the recursive loop.

[Directive: Pinpoint his location. Failed to locate his coordinates.]
[Conclusion: Subject has exited Amphoreus.]
