[Negative: █████ ██████ detected. █████ █████████. Conclusion error.]

ch:
「迈德漠斯」多次对LykoS发起正面攻击。该个体拥有不完全的重启权限。

光历<unbreak>4284</unbreak>年，HertA、ScreW访问权限到期，同时LykoS特殊权限恢复至约<unbreak>60%</unbreak>。出于压力，「迈德漠斯」做出决策「牺牲」，通过仪式将思维模块卸载，复制其数据并升级权限为「无条件无限重启」，锁定后续行动为：持续无害化ID：LykoS。

光历<unbreak>4479</unbreak>年，LykoS恢复权限：低规格数据清除。耗费二十余年，「迈德漠斯」被LykoS全域静默。
en:
"Mydeimos" launched multiple frontal attacks against LykoS. This entity possessed incomplete restart permissions.

In Light Calendar year <unbreak>4284</unbreak>, HertA and ScreW's access permissions expired. Simultaneously, LykoS's special permissions were restored to approximately <unbreak>60%</unbreak>. Being pressured, "Mydeimos" decided to "sacrifice" itself, uninstalling its cognitive module through a ceremony, copying its own data, and promoting its permissions to "Unconditional and Infinite Restart." Its future actions were permanently set to "continuous neutralization of ID: LykoS."

In Light Calendar year <unbreak>4479</unbreak>, LykoS's permission was restored to clear low-spec data. After spending <unbreak>20</unbreak> years, LykoS forced "Mydeimos" to cease responding.

ch:
本次循环中，「赛法利娅」基于原始本能的运算逻辑发生变化，「拯救」在其决策中占据大部分权重。

光历<unbreak>4534</unbreak>年，「赛法利娅」插入无来源指令：「坐标：创世涡心」=「坐标：奥赫玛」
，将ID：LykoS引导至战场。指令生效后，「赛法利娅」被LykoS强制静默。
en: In this loop, "Cifera's" instinct-based calculation logic has changed. "Salvation" weighed heavily in its decision-making.\n\nIn Light Calendar <unbreak>4534</unbreak>, "Cifera" inserted a sourceless command: "Coordinate: Vortex of Genesis" = "Coordinate: Okhema," guiding ID: LykoS to the battlefield. After the command took effect, LykoS forced "Cifera" to cease responding.

ch: 光历<unbreak>4510</unbreak>年，「雅辛忒丝」成为半神，但拒绝卸载移动权限，「守护」占行动逻辑的最高权重，驱使其留在地面照顾其它人类个体。\n\n光历<unbreak>4602</unbreak>年，翁法罗斯全域普通人类灭绝。「雅辛忒丝」思维模块磨损严重，最终不得不放弃移动权限，嵌入「坐标：晨昏之眼」。
en: In Light Calendar <unbreak>4510</unbreak>, "Hyacinthia" ascended to demigod status but refused to uninstall mobility permissions. "Protection" held the greatest weight in its action logic, compelling it to remain on the ground to care for other human individuals.\n\nAll normal humans in Amphoreus ceased life functions in Light Calendar <unbreak>4602</unbreak>. "Hyacinthia's" cognitive module was severely deteriorated, and it was forced to relinquish its mobility permissions and fuse itself into "Coordinate: Eye of Twilight."

ch: 哀丽秘榭社区食堂
en: Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen

ch: 好伙伴，我当然是白厄！\n来自哀丽秘榭，是希洛尼摩斯与奥妲塔之子。这段血缘关系最危险的时候，是八岁那年下雨天我忘了收麦子。\n有时家长的严厉也是一种爱。同样的，村长大概也只是担心你被骗吧，保持警惕是一件好事。
en: Dear friend, of course I'm Phainon!\nBorn in Aedes Elysiae, I'm the son of Hieronymus and Audata. Well, my family bonds nearly ended the day I left the wheat out in the rain when I was eight.\nLet's just say a parent's tough love is a form of love nonetheless. Likewise, maybe the village chief was just worried that you'd be scammed. A little caution never hurt anyone, after all.

ch: 好伙伴，很高兴你能注意到这一点。\n在刻法勒脚下的奥赫玛，居住着一群红色头发的信使。她们和你差不多高，能够打开通往诸界的门径，把信嗖地送到目的地！我给你的回信便是如此送达的。
en: Dear friend, I'm so glad you noticed!\nAt Kephale's feet lies Okhema, home to a group of red-haired messengers. They're about as tall as you are, and can open doorways between realms, sending letters with a whoosh, right to where they need to be! That's how this letter found its way to you.

ch: 在那行人如织的奥赫玛，同样有着非同凡响的佳肴。其中最为人称道的，便是名为「红土块」的料理。虽然品尝需要一定门槛，但制作方式十分简单，挑选合适红土压制成块即可。\n入口即化，令人唇齿留香。
en: The bustling streets of Okhema are also home to extraordinary cuisines. Among them lies a dish that stirs the soul — known only as the "Redsoil." It's a bit of an acquired taste, but making it is simple — just press the right kind of red soil into a solid block.\nIt melts in your mouth, and the flavor lingers beautifully.

ch: 翁法罗斯各地都有身怀赐福的若虫，靠近后交互即可收起若虫，将它的赐福带给阿格莱雅。
en: Nymphs with blessings are everywhere in Amphoreus. Approach and interact to collect the nymphs, and bring their blessings to Aglaea.

ch: 在翁法罗斯，有些门只能在特定的时空开启。<color=#f29e38ff>亮着太阳灯纹的门，只能在白昼时空开启。亮着月亮灯纹的门，只能在永夜时空开启。</color>
en: In Amphoreus, some doors can only be opened in a specific space-time. <color=#f29e38ff>Sun-marked doors can only be opened during the day, and moon-marked doors can only be opened in the evernight.</color>

ch: 在翁法罗斯，各处都可以看到残留有记忆的物件。在开拓者靠近它们时，可以看到它们覆有一层能量的波纹。此时，通过<color=#f29e38ff>长按按键的方式可以施放「欧洛尼斯祷言」</color>，将它们回溯至一段时间之前的状态。
en: In Amphoreus, memory-laden objects can be found everywhere. When the Trailblazer approaches, they reveal an energy ripple over them. At this point, by <color=#f29e38ff>holding down the button, you can use "Oronyx's Prayer"</color> to rewind them to their previous state from a certain time ago.

ch: 「贼灵」是翁法罗斯人尽皆知（自称）的大盗，<color=#f29e38ff>喜欢在别人面前偷走他即将到手的宝物，带着赃物躲入虚空</color>，并留下一枚嘲讽的翻飞之币。
en: The Spirithief is a (self-proclaimed) well-known master thief across Amphoreus. <color=#f29e38ff>They enjoy stealing treasures others are just about to obtain and then vanishing into the void with their stolen goods</color>. They tend to leave a Coin of Whimsy in mockery in the aftermath.

ch: 「扎格列斯之手」是诡计之泰坦扎格列斯的遗留神体。在这位泰坦陨落后，翁法罗斯的人们学会了如何改造它，从而让它为己所用。
en: Hand of Zagreus is the divine body left behind by Zagreus, the Trickery Titan. After the Titan had fallen, the people of Amphoreus learned to modify and utilize them.

ch: 「密径驱动机构」链接着<color=#f29e38ff>翁法罗斯全域的雅努斯密径</color>，将其启动后，所有<color=#f29e38ff>已解锁</color>的密径都将进入<color=#f29e38ff>「瞬时生效」</color>状态。
en: The Secret Path Mechanism connects to <color=#f29e38ff>all Janus's Hidden Passages across Amphoreus</color>. Once activated, all <color=#f29e38ff>unlocked</color> passages will enter an <color=#f29e38ff>Instant Activation</color> state.

ch: 翁法罗斯的「恨」
en: Amphorean Hatred

ch: 锵锵！这就是灵异爱好者网站「罗浮杂俎」。
en: Ta-da! This is the paranormal lovers' website, Ghostly Grove.

ch: 现在打开「罗浮杂俎」，看看网友们又发了什么吧。
en: Now, open Ghostly Grove and check out what people have been posting about.

ch: 插播一下，「罗浮杂俎」的订阅奖励也可以在这里领取了！
en: And just so you know, Ghostly Grove subscription rewards can also be claimed here!

ch: 内容更新：翁法罗斯英雄纪.exe
en: Content Update: Amphoreus' Saga of Heroes.exe

ch: 开拓者之家 / 迷境大饭店 / 哀丽秘榭社区食堂 / 黄金裔活动中心 / 自定义名称2
en: The Trailblazer's Hearth / Maze Grand Restaurant / Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen / Chrysos Heir Activity Center / Custom Name 2

ch: 我是奥赫玛最快的大地兽！
en: I'm the fastest dromas in all of Okhema!

ch: 我把悬锋的菜谱带来了，不知道能不能派上用场。
en: I brought recipes from Kremnos. Hope they're useful.

ch: 旧日的荣光，悬锋的君王
en: Glory of Yore, King of Kremnos

ch:
新的一站，新的开拓！——当然，也要穿新衣服！

启程前，黑天鹅替我卜了一卦，说本姑娘在翁法罗斯会有「美丽冻人」的精彩表现。我当场就明白了，意思是这条小裙子终于能上身啦！

来，{NICKNAME}，咱们合个影，美美出片~
en:
A new destination, a new trailblaze! — And of course, a new outfit!

Before departure, Black Swan read my fortune, saying I'd have a "glacially beautiful" moment in Amphoreus. I immediately understood — it means I finally get to wear this little dress!

Come on, {NICKNAME}, let's take a picture together and capture the beauty!

ch: 罗浮杂俎
en: Ghostly Grove

ch: 在【罗浮杂俎】上粉丝数达
en: Fans on Ghostly Grove

ch: 推进<color=#f29e38ff>翁法罗斯</color>剧情以解锁
en: Progress the <color=#f29e38ff>Amphoreus</color> Storyline to unlock

ch: 树庭的分析报告
en: Grove Analysis Report

ch: 翁法罗斯英雄纪.exe
en: Amphoreus' Saga of Heroes.exe

ch:
来处蒙尘已久。
如那以悬锋为名的险城，男人的一切尽皆藏于迷雾，唯有弑王者的恶名为人所闻。
他那不死不伤的身躯，既能阻绝刀剑，亦能喝退探究者的目光。
那便看向他的道途，唯此可以一窥那争斗着的心。他用烈火烧焚前路，而归途……
归途以血作辙。
en:
His home had long been covered in dust.
Like that perilous city named Kremnos, the man's past is equally veiled in shadows. Only his infamy as the King-Slayer is recounted in echoes.
His immortal and woundless body barred all swords and blades, and also dispelled curiosity and peeking gaze.
Instead, look at his road, for that is the only way to scry into his fighting heart. He inflamed the path ahead with fire, and his road home...
Shall be paved in blood.

ch:
那高高在上的，又是何者授予它们神格？
学士漫步神悟树庭，执此一问，驳斥眼之所见的一切智者。
恰如他所精擅的魔术，辩才无双的反对者们，开口时便已坠入陷阱——
神格亦是由他者「授予」。倾尽残生，这渎神者从未探究……
他仅作证明。
en:
What nameless being bestowed divinity on those higher existences?
The scholar walks through Grove of Epiphany and refutes all the wise ones he meets with this question alone.
For akin to the magic tricks he is so skilled at, his sophistry opponents fall into his trap as soon as they open their mouths —
By admitting that divinity is indeed "bestowed" by other beings. See, throughout this blasphemer's life, he had never sought via questions...
Instead, only ever offered proof.

ch: 见证了翁法罗斯的冒险，将拥有的#1枚「无名的追忆」放入
en: After witnessing Amphoreus' adventure, insert the #1 "Nameless Recollection" you obtained

ch: 翁法罗斯英雄纪
en: Amphoreus' Saga of Heroes

ch: 知晓了悬锋城的过往，放入那一缕「无名的追忆」
en: Having learned about Castrum Kremnos' past, now drop in that strand of "Nameless Recollection"

ch: 树庭生活
en: Life In the Grove

ch: 内容更新：翁法罗斯英雄纪.exe
en: Content Update: Amphoreus' Saga of Heroes.exe

ch:
不败者，一切战场的领主，悬锋城与废墟的王，
战车大匠，尸山王座，胜利父，
荣耀僭主，裂地惊海的雷，翁法罗斯的守护者，
纷争的泰坦，天谴之矛，尼卡多利。
全体世间应听遣的将领，永恒且锋利的兵戈，纷争与断绝纷争的法则。
礼赞尼卡多利，最伟大的征服者，最伟大的守护者。
en:
The undefeated. The sovereign of all battles. The king of Castrum Kremnos and of ruins,
Grand Artisan of the war chariot, the throne upon a mountain of corpses, and father of victory,
The usurper of glories, the lightning that split the sea, the Guardian of Amphoreus,
The Titan of Strife, the Lance of Fury: Nikador.
A general that all the world should heed, the eternal sharp sword, the law of Strife and of ending Strife.
Praise Nikador, greatest of conquerors, greatest of guardians.

ch: 冥河中沉眠的死龙，受炼成召引再度苏醒，化成槁骨腐肉的模样。\n它曾是「死亡」的泰坦，逆溯冥河向上，离开乌有之界于现世搁浅。它曾随冥河潮汐涌上大地，为翁法罗斯的万事万物烙上命定的终局。那些将死的，或已死的存在，皆会因它的归来感受到灵魂深处的颤栗。
en: Netherwing, slumbering dormant in the River of Souls, has been reawakened by an alchemical summoning and morphed into a thing of rot and decay.\nIt once was the Death Titan, swimming upstream in the River of Souls' currents, leaving the realm of non-existence and stranded in the mortal world. Once, they followed the tides of the River of Souls to drown the living lands, branding all things in Amphoreus with a fated end. All the existences that will die or have died will feel a shudder in the depths of their souls with the dragon's return.

en: About Mydei

ch: 回忆•翁法罗斯
en: Memory: Amphoreus

ch: 队伍编成•万敌
en: Added to Team With Mydei

ch: 这趟翁法罗斯之旅，我们都进步很大，一比一平！哎，不对，他其实比我更早迈出那一步，那…算他小胜！
en: We both made huge progress on this Amphoreus adventure, I'd say it's a draw! Hmm... wait. He made that progress way before I did, so... Okay okay, he wins... but just by a hair!

ch: 迈德漠斯看起来酷酷的，不好说话，实际却很友善…为什么会这样呢？不懂，果然…我还是更了解女生的心思呀。
en: Mydeimos seems so... cool and aloof, but he's actually really friendly... How does that work? I don't really get it... Guess I just understand girls more than I understand guys, huh.

ch: 不知道为什么，虽然相处的时间不长，我们马上成了无话不谈的好朋友。上一次在她的庭院，我们从泰科铵聊到翁法罗斯，喝了一壶又一壶的花茶，吃了一块又一块蜜饼，最后，连小伊卡也困睡着了…还是觉得意犹未尽！
en: I don't know how, but we became super good friends even though we haven't known each other for a long time. The last time I went to her courtyard, we talked about everything from Taikiyan to Amphoreus, and drank pots and pots of floral tea, and ate one honeycake after another. Little Ica even fell asleep... but we still didn't feel like that chat was long enough!

ch: 放心，无名客会永远与翁法罗斯站在一起！
en: Don't worry. The Nameless will forever stand with Amphoreus!

ch: 远道而来的贵客，风儿顺着金丝捎来了你的讯息。我名阿格莱雅，奥赫玛的改衣师，翁法罗斯的黄金裔之一。愿我们坦诚相待。
en: O, noble guest from afar. The wind brought me news of you along the golden threads. My name is Aglaea, the Dressmaster of Okhema and one of Amphoreus' Chrysos Heirs. I hope we treat each other with honesty.

ch: 在奥赫玛的这段时光，过得可还愉快？如有吩咐，尽可向「衣匠」传达，圣城定会为它的盟友献上最盛情的招待。
en: Has your time in Okhema been enjoyable? If you have any wishes, please let this "Garmentmaker" know. The holy city will certainly offer the most splendid hospitality for its allies.

ch: 我们会重逢的，朋友。无论你行向何处，奥赫玛的大门始终为英雄敞开。
en: We will meet again, friend. No matter where your journey leads, the gates of Okhema will forever be open to heroes.

ch: 翁法罗斯的「岁月」已铭记了太多创伤，多亏了这位活泼的无名客，她就像一道靓丽的色彩，将记忆中堆叠的阴霾一扫而空。
en: Amphoreus's "Time" has already received too many scars. Thankfully, that lively Nameless is now here. Like a dash of vibrant colors, she has swept away all the dusty gloom that the memories had built up.

ch: 当那一缕「爱」的丝线编入翁法罗斯的命运，她的每一道注视早已在万载岁月里，穿过我们跳动的心，将彼此的生命连缀成形。
en: When that one thread of "love" was woven into Amphoreus's destiny, her every gaze was already infused into the countless years, molding our lives into shape through our beating hearts.

ch: 自黄金战争以来，世界几近覆灭，如今人类仅余奥赫玛这一座城邦，我的职责便是守护这一方净土…不惜任何代价。
en: The world is almost destroyed after the Chrysos War, and now Okhema alone remains as the sole city of humanity. My duty is to protect this remaining haven... At any cost.

ch: 「凯撒」的演讲对大多数翁法罗斯人来说或许有些耸人听闻，但*我们*也看到，思索前路的时候，她会一连数天对着棋盘，不吃不喝——那些不为世人所知的点点滴滴，才是*我们*选择留下的原因……
en: The Imperator's speeches might sound extreme to most Amphoreans, but we saw how she spent days on end staring at the chessboard, neither eating nor drinking, lost in thought over the road ahead. It's those quiet moments unseen by the world that made us choose to stay...

ch:
缇宝：为了防止旅途被破坏——
缇宁：为了维护旅途的和平——
缇安：我们乘着穿梭在翁法罗斯的火筒！
缇宝：缇宝送温暖~
缇安：缇安打坏蛋！
缇宁：缇宁…
缇宝：嗯，就是这样！
en:
Tribbie: To prevent our journey from being disrupted—
Trinnon: To maintain peace on our journey—
Trianne: We ride on a rocket, traversing Amphoreus!
Tribbie: Tribbie sends warmth~
Trianne: Trianne beats the baddies!
Trinnon: Trinnon...
Tribbie: Yeah, that's how it is!

ch: 我是悬锋的王储「迈德漠斯」，亦是奥赫玛的战士「万敌」。若想了解更多，便观我一战，或与我一战。
en: I am the crown prince of Kremnos "Mydeimos," and also the warrior of Okhema "Mydei." If you want to know me better, observe me in battle or fight me yourself.

ch: 悬锋城和奥赫玛积怨已久，长枪能刺穿敌王，却难以荡平民众心中的执念。
en: Castrum Kremnos and Okhema have long been at odds. A spear can pierce through the enemy king, but it cannot resolve the deep grudges of the people.

ch: 关于这位学者，我听说过不下于十个关于他的恶名，但那位树庭的好学生平日里总喜欢念叨这位老师对他们有多好…能让他如此评价的人，想来也会对我的胃口。
en: I've heard more than a dozen sins attributed to him, but a certain good student from the Grove loves to talk about how wonderful that scholar is as a teacher... Anyone capable of leaving such an impression on him is likely someone I'd appreciate as well.

ch: 在来到奥赫玛之前，我听悬锋的孩子提起过，有个来无影去无踪的侠盗时不时会找他们玩。有时告诉他们哪儿的果子最解渴，有时告诉他们黑潮会从哪儿袭来，现在想来，想必便是她了。
en: Before I came to Okhema, I had heard from the Kremnoan children about a thief who came and went as they pleased, often playing with the children. Sometimes, they would tell the children where the juiciest fruits could be found. Other times, they warned of where the black tide would strike. Looking back now, it must have been her.

ch: 她为翁法罗斯做的牺牲与努力，将让这片破碎的焦土，生长出繁荣的城邦。
en: The great efforts and sacrifices she made for Amphoreus will make this broken and charred land flourish with prosperous cities.

ch: 我最初的记忆，是在深渊中与黑暗搏杀，只因悬锋先王假借预言，将我掷入冥海献祭泰坦。但九个冬天后，这副身躯爬出了冥海…连死神也将其弃置不顾。
en: My earliest memory is of fighting the darkness in the Abyss. This was because the former king of Kremnos, under the guise of prophecy, threw me into the Sea of Souls as a sacrifice to the Titans. But after nine winters, this body of mine crawled out of the Sea... Even the Reaper themself had abandoned it.

ch: 现在，该是翁法罗斯的胜利了。
en: Now, is the time for Amphoreus's victory.

ch: 过去，我不曾想到自己会与悬锋的敌国联合，征战四方。奥赫玛是座繁荣的城邦，只是…无法成为所有人的归宿。
en: In the past, I never would've thought that I'd join forces with the enemy nations of Kremnos and wage war across the land. Okhema is a prosperous city-state, but... it cannot be a home for everyone.

ch: 告诉后人，我将恪守诺言，镇守悬锋直至最后一滴血。拭目以待吧，并非是黑潮吞噬了我，而是我要将其碾碎。
en: Tell the future generations that I shall keep my promise, guarding Kremnos until I spill my last drop of blood. Watch closely. It won't be the black tide that devours me. I shall be the one who crushes it.

ch: 流淌吧，悬锋之血！
en: Blood of Kremnos, stream forth!

ch: 我名为阿那克萨戈拉斯，神悟树庭七贤人之一，「智种学派」的创立者。不必我多说了，第一，别叫我那刻夏。第二，别打断我——沉默是金。切记。
en: My name is Anaxagoras, one of the Seven Sages of the Grove of Epiphany, founder of the Nousporists. Now, don't make me repeat the following again. Rule number one: Do not call me Anaxa. Rule number two: Never interrupt me — silence is golden. Remember that.

ch: 对抗黑潮的战争使一些人成为神，使一些人成为人，也使另一些人成为怪物——万敌接过纷争的权柄，他已作出自己的选择。
en: The battle against the black tide turned some people into gods, some into humans, and some into monsters — Mydei already made his choice when he took over Strife's authority.

ch: 是泰坦又如何？她仍是树庭的学生。
en: So what if she's a Titan? She's still a student of the Grove.

ch: 神树靠着太阳才能向天空生长，若说是「昏光庭院」呵护着树庭众位学者，那风堇便是「昏光庭院」的「光」。
en: The divine tree can only grow towards the sky when it is supported by the sun. If the Twilight Courtyard is what protects the scholars of the Grove, then Hyacine is the "light" of the Twilight Courtyard.

ch: 短短时间内能阅遍树庭的藏书，消化大量翁法罗斯的资料…倒是比很多人更像优秀的学者，若论及对大地兽的精通程度，他更是万中无一。
en: Being able to read all of the Grove's books and interpret the mountains of information regarding Amphoreus in such a short time... He's more of an outstanding scholar than many people I know. And when it comes to knowledge about the dromas? He is indeed second to none.

ch: 要是有一天我没回来，你就去奥赫玛下水道，沿着最粗的那根管子往前走到底，那儿有个小窝，告诉那些孩子别等我了，各谋生路吧。
en: If one day I don't come back, go to the sewers of Okhema. Follow the largest pipe all the way to the end. There's a little hideout there — Tell the kids there not to wait for me anymore and to find their own way in life.

ch: 她送给我的小鱼干是翁法罗斯一绝，而且…永远都吃不完！
en: The dried fish she gave me was the best in all of Amphoreus. And somehow... it never ran out!

ch: 欢迎来到奥赫玛，我是遐蝶。抱歉，与他人保持一定距离是我的习惯…如果阁下愿意，我自然可以站近些。
en: Welcome to Okhema. I am Castorice. Apologies, it is my habit to keep my distance from others... I can get closer if you wish, however.

ch: 纷争带来的死亡往往充满痛苦与黑暗，但万敌阁下赐予对手的，是荣誉与光明的牺牲。
en: Death brought by Strife is often full of pain and darkness, but what Lord Mydei grants to his enemies is a glorious and brilliant demise.

ch: 万敌阁下，我们各司其职吧。
en: Lord Mydei, let's each do our duty.

ch: 我曾踽踽独行，就像落单的蝴蝶不知该往哪儿飞去…或许是逐火之旅和奥赫玛的伙伴，或许是一路上遇到的人们，让我寻到了下一次振翅的方向。
en: I once stumbled alone like a solitary butterfly that did not know where to go... Perhaps it was thanks to the Flame-Chase Journey and my friends in Okhema, or perhaps it was the people I encountered along the way that helped me find the direction for my next flight.

ch: 自从故乡毁于黑衣剑士之手，我便奔赴圣城寻找黎明。身为黄金裔，我的愿望未曾改变，只是背负他人的愿望，追逐火种，支撑起新的明天…可如今我才知晓，翁法罗斯没有明天——在你到来之前……
en: I left for the holy city to seek the dawn after the black-robed swordmaster laid waste to my homeland. My wish as a Chrysos Heir has never changed — I just want to shoulder the hopes of others, chase the Coreflames, and build a new tomorrow... But now... I realize Amphoreus has no tomorrow... not until you arrived.

ch: 哀丽秘榭的白厄，向你致意。同为奥赫玛的异乡人，相聚即是缘分。随我来，说不定我们以后还有并肩作战的时候。
en: I'm Phainon of Aedes Elysiae. Greetings. As fellow outlanders in Okhema, our meeting is surely fate's design. Come. Maybe we'll even have a chance to fight alongside each other in the future.

ch: 三月小姐，感谢你与翁法罗斯站在了一起。
en: Thank you for standing with Amphoreus, Miss March.

ch: 哀丽秘榭的麦田如海般宽广，从种子发芽，到麦芒坠地，人们在这里出生，玩耍，长大…后来，无论去向何方，我总能闻到那带着麦芽清香的微风。现在想想，正是因为这样我才没误入歧途吧。
en: The wheat fields of Aedes Elysiae were like endless seas. Like plants that bud, bloom, then wilt... Children were born there, played there, and grew up there... No matter where I went, I could always smell that sweet, wheat-scented breeze. Looking back now, I think that's what stopped me from straying off the path.

ch: 翁法罗斯，一定会迎来真正的黎明。
en: Amphoreus will welcome a true dawn.

ch: 真像在树庭求学的那段时光呐……
en: Reminds me of when I was studying at the Grove...

ch: 万敌大人的恢复速度异于常人，即使受了重伤，需要我来治疗，他也会同我谈笑风生…唔…这么说来，往往这时他总会比平日里更健谈一些。
en: Lord Mydei's regenerative abilities are way faster than that of an ordinary human. Even when he's badly wounded and requires my help, he still talks and jokes as if nothing's wrong... Strange... now that I think about it, he seems way chattier than usual during those moments.

ch: 阿格莱雅女士，光明一定会再次照拂翁法罗斯。
en: Lady Aglaea, light will definitely shine upon Amphoreus again.

ch: 有了大地的帮助，阳光一定会洒遍翁法罗斯~
en: With the Earth's aid, sunlight is sure to shine across all of Amphoreus~

ch: 在树庭的研习没有白费呀。
en: See? All that studying at the Grove didn't go to waste.

ch: 公正之秤的两端永远平衡，但为何世间从未公平？人与泰坦力量悬殊，翁法罗斯与银河也是如此…真正的「律法」，只能以战争与血火铸就。
en: The scales of justice are forever balanced, yet why has the world never been fair? The strength between a human and Titan is worlds apart, and so too is Amphoreus and the vast cosmos... True Law can only be tempered through war and fire.

ch: 悬锋王，让历史铭记这场伟大的战役吧。
en: Let history remember this glorious campaign, King of Kremnos.

ch: 棋子只识敌我两方，孰不知宇宙远不止黑白二色。翁法罗斯的终点也不过是银河的起点，我必将奔赴更渺远的群星。
en: On the board, there is only black and white, only foe and friend, but the universe is so much vaster than two simple shades. The end of Amphoreus is nothing more than the first step into the cosmos, and I will march toward those far-off lights.

ch: 翁法罗斯的三月，是属于永夜之帷的时间…就请以「长夜月」这个称呼，将我放进你的回忆中吧。若能躲进岁月的罅隙，属于我们的时间还有很多，很多♭
en: The third month of Amphoreus is the month reserved for the Veil of Evernight... So, please place me into your memory using the name "Evernight." If we can hide in the cracks of time, then we'll still have countless moments that belong to us ♭.

ch: 翁法罗斯，一颗悲剧的宝石，它与神相争的光芒吸引了那些觊觎记忆的窃贼。但那些伤痕累累的「岁月」，分明向我诉说着对「忘却」的渴求。
en: Amphoreus, a jewel forged in tragedy. Its defiant brilliance, daring to rival the divine, drew in thieves who covet memory. Yet in the scarred years of "Time," I hear a longing... for "Oblivion."

ch: 这位优秀的裁衣师本该为翁法罗斯编织出更多的回忆，若是我的话，一定会为自己无法亲眼见证翁法罗斯的未来而感到遗憾。
en: Such a talented tailor should have woven more memories for Amphoreus. If it were me, I would certainly feel regret for not being able to witness Amphoreus's future with my own eyes.

ch: 三月抵达翁法罗斯的时间坐标比你们早许多，她已如烛火熄灭，但我是那烛火的影，藏进岁月的狭间，等待你们的到来。
en: March arrived at Amphoreus's temporal coordinates long before you all did. She has already gone out like a candle, but I am that candle's lingering shadow, hidden in the folds of time, awaiting your arrival.

ch: 罗浮持明一族，习御水行雨之术，而翁法罗斯的古龙，有拔天倚地之力。龙祖早已陨落，其间奥秘只揭开一角…不知未来的旅途中，又会有何种际遇。
en: The Vidyadhara of the Luofu wield the art of water and rain-calling, while the ancient dragons of Amphoreus once held the power to raise the heavens and anchor the earth. The great Long is no more, yet we have barely glimpsed THEIR mysteries... Who can say what the journey ahead may reveal?

ch: 那微光汇聚的天空，早已为翁法罗斯的生灵带来点点希望。
en: That sky where twilight converges has already brought glimmers of hope to life in Amphoreus.

ch: 想用翁法罗斯的礼节打招呼？可以。虽然我认为像往常那样就好。
en: You wish to greet me with Amphorean etiquette? Go ahead. Though I think our usual way is just fine.

ch: 比「大地」的火种更为沉重的，是翁法罗斯所有生灵期待的目光。他的路已到尽头，该到我们去回应这份期待了。
en: Heavier than the Coreflame of Earth are the hopeful gazes of every living being in Amphoreus. His journey reached its end. Now it's time for us to carry that hope forward.

ch: 接纳「大地」的火种后，这具龙裔之躯中的「不朽」之力也将成为翁法罗斯世间万灵的护佑，将它们载向遥远星海，驰骋奔腾在更辽阔的八荒之地。
en: After I accepted the Coreflame of Earth as one of Long's Scions, the power of the Permanence within this body became a shield for all life in Amphoreus, carrying them into the distant sea of stars to race freely through the boundless unknown beyond.

ch: 翁法罗斯危机四伏，为了确保大家平安归来…得想尽一切可能的方法。
en: Amphoreus is fraught with dangers... We must consider every possible method to ensure everyone's safe return.

ch: 真让人期待呀，未来的旅途中，{NICKNAME}的「故事」会怎样发展呢？希望翁法罗斯的「记忆」，会成为其中浪漫的一笔…一定会的，对吧♪
en: I really look forward to seeing how {NICKNAME}'s "story" will unfold in future journeys. I hope Amphoreus's "memories" will become a romantic note in those journeys... It definitely will, right? ♪

ch: 他的愿望，关乎翁法罗斯的大地生灵。那是一个珍贵又易碎的梦，所以才要用心呵护，对不对？
en: His wish is about Amphoreus's creatures of the earth. What a precious yet fragile dream. That's why it must be nurtured diligently, isn't it?

ch: 如果一千个缇宝老师都生活在奥赫玛，嘻…那一定是天堂吧！每每想到这里，就对明天更期待了呢。
en: If all one thousand Tribbies were living in Okhema... then that'd surely be heaven! Hehe. I look forward to tomorrow even more every time I think about this.

ch: 凯撒的冠冕，真的很吸睛呀。不如…下次回到哀丽秘榭，{NICKNAME}也用麦穗给人家编个头环吧？
en: The Imperator's crown really grabs your attention. Maybe... the next time we're in Aedes Elysiae, {NICKNAME} can also make a wreath of wheat for me ♪

ch: 前方必是辉煌，迈德漠斯。
en: Glory surely lies ahead, Mydeimos.

ch: 前方必是辉煌，迈德漠斯。
en: Glory surely lies ahead, Mydeimos.

ch: 「永恒之地」翁法罗斯。它被赋予了鲜花的芬芳，西风的温暖…以及永不褪色的回忆。
en: Amphoreus, The Eternal Land. It was blessed with the fragrance of flowers, the warmth of the west wind... and memories that never fade.

ch: Amphoreus
en: Amphoreus

ch: 翁法罗斯
en: Amphoreus

ch: 奥赫玛地区冠军
en: Okhema Regional Champion

ch: 风靡全奥赫玛的「奇美拉世界锦标赛」正在盛大进行。组建你的出战阵容，与熟悉的十三位奇美拉训练家展开精彩对决吧！
en: Okhema is abuzz with the "Chimera World Tournament"! Assemble your lineup and get ready for spectacular matches against thirteen familiar chimera trainers!

ch: 风靡全奥赫玛的「奇美拉世界锦标赛」正在盛大进行。组建你的出战阵容，与熟悉的十三位奇美拉训练家展开精彩对决吧！
en: Okhema is abuzz with the "Chimera World Tournament"! Assemble your lineup and get ready for spectacular matches against thirteen familiar chimera trainers!

ch: 悬锋羊奶
en: Kremnos Goat Milk

ch: 我方所有奇美拉被击倒后，万敌会<color=#f29e38ff>变身成蜜果羹</color>加入对战。我方被击倒的奇美拉越多，蜜果羹越强！
en: After all ally chimeras are defeated, Mydei will <color=#f29e38ff>transform into Fig Stew</color> and enter the battle. The more defeated ally chimeras, the stronger Fig Stew is!

ch: 悬锋战士永不言败
en: Kremnos Warriors Never Lose

ch: 神悟树庭优秀毕业生
en: Grove of Epiphany Graduate with Honors

ch: 悬锋地区冠军，不过如此。
en: So much for Kremnos' Champion.

ch: 我将击败你们，证明自己是翁法罗斯第一训练家
en: I will defeat you all and prove that I'm the greatest trainer in Amphoreus

ch: 风靡全奥赫玛的「奇美拉世界锦标赛」正在盛大举行。组建你的出战阵容，与熟悉的十三位奇美拉训练家展开精彩对决吧！
en: Okhema is abuzz with the "Chimera World Tournament"! Assemble your lineup and get ready for spectacular matches against thirteen familiar chimera trainers!

ch: 翁法罗斯
en: Amphoreus

ch: 由「纷争」雕琢的泰坦眷属，流淌着尼卡多利的金血。刚猛的身躯是军阵的盾牌，以坚石之身阻隔敌军，以粗大臂膀搬运战场的口粮，也常被悬锋的士兵当作练武的对象。
en: A Titankin sculpted by "Strife." They are infused with Nikador's golden ichor. Their robust bodies are the shields of the army, and they use their stony corpus to cut off their foes, while their powerful limbs carry rations across the battlefield. They are also used as sparring partners by the soldiers of Kremnos.

ch: 由「纷争」雕琢的泰坦眷属，流淌着尼卡多利的金血。信仰如飞箭矢志不移，为泰坦造主的悬锋与凶矛寻取猎物，猎杀荒原中的奇兽与战场上的敌兵，射程之内无活物得以幸免。
en: A Titankin sculpted by "Strife." They are infused with Nikador's golden ichor. With faith as steadfast as flying arrows, they are the means to find prey for Kremnos' forces, hunting down beasts and foes across the wastes, and ensuring none survive within firing range.

ch: 由「纷争」雕琢的泰坦眷属，流淌着尼卡多利的金血。信仰如飞箭矢志不移，为泰坦造主的悬锋与凶矛寻取猎物，猎杀荒原中的奇兽与战场上的敌兵，射程之内无活物得以幸免。
en: A Titankin sculpted by "Strife." They are infused with Nikador's golden ichor. With faith as steadfast as flying arrows, they are the means to find prey for Kremnos' forces, hunting down beasts and foes across the wastes, and ensuring none survive within firing range.

ch: 在翁法罗斯的野地和巷弄间游荡的双子精灵，以窃取财物、捉弄旅人为乐。往往在寻宝者得手在即时捷足先登，徒留的硬币是它无伤大雅的玩笑。
en: The twin sprites roaming the wilds and alleys of Amphoreus, taking pleasure in stealing valuables and playing tricks on travelers. They often outpace Treasure Hunters at the last moment, leaving only a coin as a harmless joke.

ch: 向树庭学者请教。
en: Consult the Grove scholars.

ch: 向树庭学者请教。
en: Consult the Grove scholars.

ch: 「贤人都应该有大胡子！」不知神悟树庭的哪位贤人提出了这个观点，但它很快便得到了云集响应。贤人们纷纷采撷来枝条和树叶，装扮自己并不茂盛的下巴。那届贤人会议在欢笑中落下帷幕，而用枝叶制成的长袍也成为了贤人的专用服饰。据说在瑟希斯的见证下，这种长袍会随着智慧的增长而生出新的树叶——就像胡子那样。
en: "A Sage must wear a beard!" No one knows which Sage from the Grove of Epiphany first proposed this idea, but it quickly gained enthusiastic support. Soon, Sages were adorning their sparse chins with gathered twigs and leaves. That meeting of the Sages ended in joyous laughter, and the robes made from branches and leaves became their official attire. It is said that under Cerces's witness, these robes would sprout new leaves as wisdom grows, just like a beard would.

ch:
这不是被神悟树庭承认的学派。
最初，只是出于心血来潮，圣城的某人提出了第一条公式：
「不想动弹。」
于是他平平无奇地度过了一天。
随后是第二天，第三天，
每天他都躺在街边，无论吃饭亦或睡觉。
人们问起他这样做的理由，他提出了第二条公式：
「做人应当像箩筐，不要装太多东西。」
他随脚踢翻一个空箩筐，有人赞叹他的智慧。
久而久之，躺在街边的人变成了一群，
每日聊天、晒太阳，除此以外再无事业。
直到某天，人们毫无征兆地散去，各奔东西。
若要问起不再躺平的原因：
「箩筐终究还是要装东西。」
学派创始人笑着回应。
en:
This school of thought was never recognized by the Grove of Epiphany.
It all began on a whim, when someone in the holy city proposed the first formula:
"I don't want to move a muscle."
And so he spent an utterly ordinary day.
Then came the second day, and the third.
Each day he lay on the street, whether eating or sleeping.
When people asked about his reasons for doing so, he proposed the second formula:
"One should be like an empty basket, never carrying too much."
He kicked over an empty basket, and some praised his wisdom.
Gradually, the one person lying on the street became many,
spending their days chatting and basking in the sun, pursuing nothing else.
Until one day, without warning, they all dispersed in different directions.
When asked why they no longer chose to lie idle:
"A basket must carry something after all."
The founder replied with a smile.

ch:
悬锋的战士历来讲究荣耀，
偷袭、诡计，都是可耻的卑劣行径。
然而有这样一位士兵，他从不正面对敌。
要么事先布下天罗地网，要么干脆自阴沟里出击。
有人说他曾在多洛斯学艺，有人说他是扎格列斯的卧底。
可是他所带领的大队，总能传来胜利的消息。
忍无可忍的同僚提出决斗，
他则把决斗的内容换成比试射艺
——准星必须对准自己。
同僚被这大胆的提议吓到，请求他先做示范，
他泰然自若地扣下扳机，
弩矢擦着脸颊嵌入墙壁。
「不好意思，打偏了。」
en:
Warriors of Kremnos have always valued glory,
so sneaking and trickery are considered shameful, despicable acts.
Yet there was one soldier who never faced his enemies head-on.
He either set elaborate traps beforehand or struck from the gutters.
Some say he trained in Dolos, others claim he was Zagreus's spy.
But the battalion under his command always brought back news of victory.
A colleague, fed up with his ways, challenged him to a duel,
but he changed the terms to an archery contest,
with arrows aimed at oneself.
Terrified by this bold proposal, the challenger asked him to demonstrate first.
He calmly pulled the trigger.
The bolt grazed his cheek and embedded in the wall.
"Sorry, I missed."

ch:
「教室不应为学者所独享！」
神悟树庭中，一伙学生突发奇想。
他们偷印讲义，将资料带出课堂。
印不了的，便徒手抄录，免费发放，
惠及贫民、流浪儿、乃至不识字的老妇。
每当幕匿降临，学生与受惠者们便会聚在一起，
探讨今日所学，让知识的枝条肆意生长。
更有胆大的学生，直接将外人带进课堂。
伪装成奇兽、盆栽，乃至窗边的雕像。
一位教授在教室里宣讲，一群人在教室外借光。
对于此等闹剧，教授们颇有默契：
「启蒙愚者，本就是贤人的天职。」
en:
"Classrooms shouldn't be the exclusive domain of scholars!"
In the Grove of Epiphany, a group of students had an ingenious idea.
They secretly printed lecture notes and brought materials outside the classroom.
What couldn't be printed, they copied by hand, distributing them for free,
benefiting the poor, orphans, and even illiterate elderly women.
When dusk fell, students and beneficiaries would gather together,
discussing what they'd learned that day, letting the branches of knowledge grow wild.
Bolder students even smuggled outsiders directly into classes,
disguising them as strange beasts, potted plants, or even statues by the window.
While professors lectured inside, crowds learned by proxy outside.
To such shenanigans, the professors had a tacit agreement:
"Enlightening the foolish is, after all, a Sage's sacred duty."

ch: 奥赫玛著名的「奇美拉世界锦标赛」正在火热进行中。找风堇和缇宝了解关于赛事的信息，成为奇美拉训练家吧！
en: The famous "Chimera World Tournament" is in full swing in Okhema! Talk to Hyacine and Tribbie to learn more about the tournament and become a chimera trainer!

ch: 奥赫玛著名的「奇美拉世界锦标赛」正在火热进行中。找风堇和缇宝学习对战的基础规则，成为奇美拉训练家吧！
en: The famous "Chimera World Tournament" is in full swing in Okhema! Learn the basic battle rules from Hyacine and Tribbie to become a chimera trainer!

ch: 奥赫玛著名的「奇美拉世界锦标赛」正在火热进行中。找风堇和缇宝学习对战的基础规则，成为奇美拉训练家吧！
en: The famous "Chimera World Tournament" is in full swing in Okhema! Learn the basic battle rules from Hyacine and Tribbie to become a chimera trainer!

ch: 奥赫玛著名的「奇美拉世界锦标赛」正在火热进行中。找风堇和缇宝了解关于赛事的信息，成为奇美拉训练家吧！
en: The famous "Chimera World Tournament" is in full swing in Okhema! Talk to Hyacine and Tribbie to learn more about the tournament and become a chimera trainer!

ch: 嗯，如果你也参与了翁法罗斯之行，许多事会变得简单。
en: Indeed. Had you joined the Amphorean expedition, it would've made a lot of things easier.

ch: 你到底怎么啦，在翁法罗斯留下后遗症了不成？连花姐都忘了？
en: What's gotten into you? Did Amphoreus give you amnesia? How could you forget about Big Sis Dahlia?

ch: 「我是翁法罗斯掌管火漆的神。」它双手叉腰，挺起胸膛，「把火漆给我，我来帮你合成一枚超~强大的火漆！」
en: "I am the Amphorean God of Sealing Wax." It puts its hands on its hips and puffs out its chest. "Give me your Sealing Wax, and I'll synthesize a super powerful one for you!"

ch: 身为神悟树庭的优秀辩手，你很快便指出了小奇美拉的问题所在——
en: As a skilled debater from the Grove of Epiphany, you quickly point out the issue with the little chimera:

ch: 某日 和平的奥赫玛
en: Just another day in peaceful Okhema

ch: 灰宝应该很熟悉小奇美拉了吧。在翁法罗斯，很早就有安排奇美拉进行对战的传统，而它们的指挥者，也被称为<color=#dbc291ff>奇美拉训练家。</color>
en: Grayie, you must be quite familiar with Little Chimera by now. In Amphoreus, there's a long-standing tradition of arranging battles for chimeras, and those who command them are known as <color=#dbc291ff>Chimera Trainers.</color>

ch: 那可是场全奥赫玛瞩目的焦点战，我也在现场观赛。最终，凯撒大人以微弱的优势获胜。
en: It was a match that had all of Okhema watching, and I was there to witness it. In the end, the Great Imperator won by a narrow margin.

ch: 这就是小敌专属的奇美拉，不仅打架很厉害，在悬锋古语方面也相当有造诣呢。
en: This is De's personal chimera. Not only is it fierce in combat, but it's also quite accomplished in the ancient Kremnos language.

ch: 今日的奥赫玛，依旧很和平呢。
en: Okhema is as peaceful as ever today.

ch: 好吧，你忽然觉得，吵吵闹闹的奥赫玛也挺不错的，不是吗？
en: Well, you suddenly realize that the noisy, bustling Okhema isn't so bad after all, is it?

ch: 要是工作太久的话，奇美拉积攒的怒火就要席卷整个翁法罗斯了，很可怕的。
en: If the chimeras work too long, their pent-up rage will sweep through all of Amphoreus. That's terrifying.

ch: 啧，你们多洛斯人就没有偷以外的打招呼方式？没错，树庭的地区徽章就在我手里。
en: Tsk, don't you Dolosians have any way to say hello besides stealing? Yes, I have the Grove's regional badge right here.

ch: 我说啊，树庭男孩，你是什么时候产生了能打得过我的错觉？嘻，究竟谁是考官……
en: Hey, Grove boy, when exactly did you get the delusion that you could beat me? Heh, who do you think is the examiner here...

ch: 对吧对吧？我也这样觉得。乌拉尼娅想让「天空」看到，奥赫玛的余晖中，人们仍然团结，愿以信念与勇气来捍卫新世界的曙光。
en: Right, right? Urania feels the same. Urania wants the "Sky" to see that, in Okhema's afterglow, people still stand united, ready to guard the dawn of a new world with their faith and courage.

ch: 女孩露出欣慰的笑容，其记忆中的身形随之消散。奥赫玛的余晖中，唯余启目集留在原地，致以永志不忘的纪念。
en: The girl smiled in relief, and her form born of memory faded away. In the afterglow of Okhema, only the scroll of enlightenment remained, standing as an everlasting memorial.
